EB]][mahāsubhāṣitasaṅgrahaḥ0001-1 aṃśavastava niśākara nūnaṃ kalpitāstaruṇaketakakhaṇḍaiḥ |  0001-2 yena pāṇḍurataradyutayo naḥ kaṇṭakairiva tudanti śarīraṃ ||0002-1 aṃśukaṃ hṛtavatā tanubāhu- svastikāpihitamugdhakucāgrā |  0002-2 bhinnaśaṅkhavalayaṃ pariṇetrā paryarambhi rabhasādaciroḍhā ||0003-1 aṃśukamiva śītabhayātsaṃstyānatvacchalena himadhavalaṃ |  0003-2 ambhobhirapi gṛhītaṃ paśyata śiśirasya māhātmyaṃ ||0004-1 aṃśukena jaghanaṃ tirodadhe ka cukena ca kucau mṛgīdṛśāṃ |  0004-2 pīyamānamaniśaṃ priyekṣaṇaiḥ kṣāmatāmiva jagāma madhyamaṃ ||0005-1 aṃśupāṇibhiratīva pipāsuḥ padmajaṃ madhu bhṛśaṃ rasayitvā |  0005-2 kṣībatāmiva gataḥ kṣitimeṣyaṃllohitaṃ vapuruvāha pataṅgaḥ ||0006-1 aṃśumānapi vipākapiśaṅgaṃ rūpamāpa parito divasānte |  0006-2 kaḥ paro'tra na vikāramupeyāddhvāntabhīmaparivellitamūrtiḥ ||0007-1 aṃśo daṇḍasamaḥ pūrvaḥ prayāsasama uttamaḥ |  0007-2 vilopo vā yathālābhaṃ prakṣepasama eva vā ||0008-1 aṃśo'pi duṣṭadiṣṭānāṃ pareṣāṃ syādvināśakṛt |  0008-2 bālaleśo'pi vyāghrāṇāṃ yatsyājjīvitahānaye ||0009-1 aṃsāvavaṣṭabdhanatā samādhiḥ śirodharāyā rahitaprayāsaḥ |  0009-2 dhṛtā vikārāṃstyajatā mukhena prasādalakṣmīḥ śaśalāñchanasya ||0010-1 aṃsālambitavāmakuṇḍaladharaṃ mandonnatabhrūlataṃ kiṃcitkuñcitak_oṃalādharapuṭaṃ sāciprasārīkṣaṇaṃ |  0010-2 alolāṅgulipallavairmuralikāmāpūrayantaṃ mudā mūle kalpatarostribhaṅgalalitaṃ dhyāye jaganmohanaṃ ||0011-1 aṃsāsaktakapolavaṃśavadanavyāsaktabimbādhara-dvandvodīritamandamandapavanprārabdhamugdhadhvaniḥ|  0011-2 īṣadvakrimalolahāranikaraḥ pratyekarokānana-nyañcaccañcadudañcadaṅgulicayastvāṃ pātu rādhādhavaḥ ||0012-1 aṃsena karṇaṃ cibukena vakṣaḥ karadvayenākṣi tirodadhānāṃ |  0012-2 saṃtāḍayāmāsa hariḥ sametya cakoranetrāṃ calukodakena ||0013-1 aṃhaḥ saṃharadakhilaṃ sakṛdudayādeva sakalalokasya |  0013-2 taraṇiriva timirajaladhiṃ jayati jaganmaṅgalaṃ harernāma ||0014-1 akaṇṭakā puṣpamahī veśayoṣidamātṛkā |  0014-2 mantrihīnā ca rājyaśrīrbhujyate viṭaceṭakaiḥ ||0015-1 akaṇṭhasya kaṇṭhe kathaṃ puṣpamālā vinā nāsikāyāḥ kathaṃ dhūpagandhaḥ |  0015-2 akarṇasya karṇe kathaṃ gītanṛtyaṃ apādasya pāde kathaṃ me praṇāmaḥ ||0016-1 akaparddakasya viphalaṃ januriti jānīmahe maheśo'pi |  0016-2 śirasi kṛtena kaparddī bhavati jaṭājūṭakenāpi ||0017-1 akaravamadhimauli pādapadmāvapanaya mānini mānitāmakāṇḍe |  0017-2 yadi pararamaṇīṃ gatastadātha stanayugaliṅgayugaṃ sprśāmi tanvi ||0018-1 akaruṇa kātaramanasā darśitanīrā nirantarāleyaṃ |  0018-2 tvāmanudhāvati vimukhaṃ gaṅgeva bhagīrathaṃ dṛṣṭiḥ ||0019-1 akaruṇatvamakāraṇavigrahaḥ paradhanāpahṛtiḥ parayoṣitaḥ |  0019-2 svajanabandhujaneṣvasahiṣṇutā prakṛtisidhamidaṃ hi durātmanāṃ ||0020-1 akaruṇa mṛṣābhāśāsindho vimuñca mamāñcalaṃ tava paricitaḥ snehaḥ samyaṅmayetyabhidhāyinīṃ |  0020-2 aviralagaladvāṣpāṃ tanvīṃ nirastavibhūṣaṇāṃ ka iha bhavatīṃ bhadre nidre vinā vinivedayet ||0021-1 akaroḥ kimu netraśoṇimānaṃ kimakārṣīḥ karapallavāvarodhaṃ |  0021-2 kalahaṃ kimadhāḥ krudhā rasajñe hitamarthaṃ na vidanti daivadaṣṭāḥ ||0022-1 akarṇamakaroccheṣaṃ vidhirbrahmāṇḍabhaṅgadhīḥ |  0022-2 śrutvā rāmakathāṃ ramyāṃ śiraḥ kasya na kampate ||0023-1 akarṇadhārāśugasaṃbhṛtāṅgatāṃ gatairaritreṇa vināsya vairibhiḥ |  0023-2 vidhāya yāvattaraṇerbhidāmaho nimajjya tīrṇaḥ samare bhavārṇavaḥ ||0024-1 akartavyaṃ na kartavyaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi |  0024-2 kartavyameva kartavyaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi ||0025-1 akartavyeṣvasādhvīva tṛṣṇā prerayate janaṃ |  0025-2 tameva sarvapāpebhyo lajjā māteva rakṣati ||0026-1 akarmaṇāṃ vai bhūtānāṃ vṛttiḥ syānna hi kācana |  0026-2 tadevābhriprapadyeta na vihanyātkathaṃcana ||0027-1 akarmaśīlaṃ ca mahāśanaṃ ca lokadviṣṭaṃ bahumāyaṃ nṛśaṃsaṃ |  0027-2 adeśakālajñamaniṣṭaveṣaṃ etāngṛhe na prativāsayīta ||0028-1 akalaṅkacandrakalayā kalitā sā bhāti vāruṇī taruṇī |  0028-2 bhālasthalīva śambhoḥ saṃdhyādhyānopaviṣṭasya ||0029-1 akalaṅkāntike kāntiḥ keti kālaṅkalaṅkinaḥ |  0029-2 aruṇe taruṇe masyā dhāvaṃ kāmayate śaśī ||0030-1 akalaṅkā pulakavatī sasnehā muktakañcukī śyāmā |  0030-2 patatu tavorasi dayitā khaṅgalatā vairiṇaḥ śirasi ||0031-1 akalaṅko dṛḍhaḥ śuddhaḥ parivārī guṇānvitaḥ |  0031-2 sadvaṃśo hṛdayagrāhī khaṅgaḥ susadṛśastava ||0032-1 akalitanijapararūpaḥ svakamapi doṣaṃ parasthitaṃ vetti |  0032-2 nāvāsthitastaṭasthānacalānapi vicalitānmanute ||0033-1 akaliyugamakharvamatra hṛdyaṃ vyacaradapāpaghano yataḥ kuṭumbī |  0033-2 mama ruciriha lakṣmaṇāgrajena prabhavati śarmadaśāsyamardena ||0034-1 akalilatapastejovīryaprathimni yaśonidhā- vavitathamadadhmāte roṣānmunāvabhidhāvati |  0034-2 abhinavadhanurvidyādarpakṣamāya ca karmaṇe sphurati rabhasātpāṇiḥ pādopasaṃgrahaṇāya ca ||0035-1 akalpaḥ svāṅgaceṣṭāyāṃ śakunta iva pañjare |  0035-2 anucchvasansmaranpūrvaṃ garbhe kiṃ nāma vindate ||0036-1 akasmātprakriyā néṇāṃ akasmāccāpakarṣaṇaṃ |  0036-2 śubhāśubhe mahattvaṃ ca prakartuṃ buddhilāghavāt ||0037-1 akasmādapi yaḥ kaścidarthaṃ prāpnoti pūruṣaḥ |  0037-2 taṃ haṭheneti manyante sa hi yatno na kasyacit ||0038-1 akasmādunmatta praharasi kimadhvakṣitiruhaṃ hradaṃ hastāghātairvidalasi kimutphullanalinaṃ |  0038-2 tadā jānīmaste karivara balodgāramasamaṃ saṭāṃ suptasyāpi spṛśasi yadi pañcānanaśiśoḥ ||0039-1 akasmādekasminpathi sakhi mayā yāmunataṭaṃ vrajantyā dṛṣṭo'yaṃ navajaladharaśyāmalatanuḥ |  0039-2 sa dṛgbhaṅgyā kiṃ vākuruta na hi jāne tata idaṃ mano me vyālolaṃ kvacana gṛhakṛtye na lagate ||0040-1 akasmādeva kupyanti prasīdantyanimittataḥ |  0040-2 śīlametadasādhūnāṃ abhraṃ pāriplavaṃ yathā ||0041-1 akasmādeva tanvaṅgī jahāsa yadiyaṃ punaḥ |  0041-2 nūnaṃ prasūnabāṇo'syāṃ svārājyamadhitiṣṭhati ||0042-1 akasmādeva te caṇḍi sphuritādharapallavaṃ |  0042-2 mukhaṃ muktāruco dhatte gharmāmbhaḥkaṇamañjarīḥ ||0043-1 akasmādeva yaḥ kopādabhīkṣṇaṃ bahu bhāṣate |  0043-2 tasmādudvijate lokaḥ sasphuliṅgādivānalāt ||0044-1 akasmāddveṣṭi yo bhaktaṃ ājanmaparisevitaṃ |  0044-2 na vyañjane ruciryasya tyājyo nṛpa ivāturaḥ ||0045-1 akāṇḍakopino bharturanyāsakteśca yoṣitaḥ |  0045-2 praśāntiścetasaḥ kartuṃ brahmaṇāpi na śakyate ||0046-1 akāṇḍadhrtamānasavyavasitotsavaiḥ sārasairakāṇdapaṭutāṇḍavairapi śikhaṇḍināṃ maṇḍalaiḥ |  0046-2 diśaḥ samavalokitāḥ sarasanirbharaprollasad- bhavatpṛthuvarūthinīrajanibhūrajaḥśyāmalāḥ ||0047-1 akāṇḍapātajātānāṃ astrāṇāṃ marmabhedināṃ |  0047-2 gāḍhaśokaprahārāṇāṃ acintaiva mahauṣadhaṃ ||0048-1 akāṇḍe vakṣojaskhalitavasanavyāpṛtakaraṃ mṛṣā jṛmbhārambhonnamitabhujabandhonnatakucaṃ |  0048-2 vṛthā yātāyātaiḥ kapaṭakalitānyonyahasitaṃ harantyetāścittānyahaha jagatāṃ vāravanitāḥ ||0049-1 akāmasya kriyā kāciddṛśyate neha kaṛhicit |  0049-2 yadyaddhi kurute kiṃcittattatkāmasya ceṣṭitaṃ ||0050-1 akāmāṃ kāmayānasya śarīramupatapyate |  0050-2 icchantīṃ kāmayānasya prītirbhavati śobhanā ||0051-1 akāmānkāmayati yaḥ kāmayānānparidviṣan |  0051-2 balavantaṃ ca yo dveṣṭi tamāhurmūḍhacetasaṃ ||0052-1 akāraṇaṃ rūpamakāraṇaṃ kulaṃ mahatsu nīceṣu ca karma śobhate |  0052-2 idaṃ hi rūpaṃ paribhutapūrvakaṃ tadeva bhūyo bahumānamāgataṃ ||0053-1 akāraṇaṃ vyākaraṇaṃ tantrīśabdo'pyakāraṇaṃ |  0053-2 akāraṇaṃ trayo vedāstaṇḍulāstatra kāraṇaṃ ||0054-1 akāraṇāviṣkṛtakopadāruṇātkhalādbhayaṃ kasya na nāma jāyate |  0054-2 viṣaṃ mahāheriva yasya durvacaḥ suduḥsahaṃ saṃnihitaṃ sadā mukhe ||0055-1 akāraṇena viprebhyo yaḥ kupyati narādhipaḥ |  0055-2 krṣṇasarpaṃ sa gṛhṇāti śirasā baladaṛpitaḥ ||0056-1 akāryakaraṇādbhītaḥ kāryāṇāṃ ca vivarjanāt |  0056-2 akāle mantrabhedācca yena mādyenna tatpibet ||0057-1 akāryapratiṣedhaśca kāryāṇāṃ ca pravartanaṃ |  0057-2 pradānaṃ ca pradeyānāṃ adeyānāmasaṃgrahaḥ ||0058-1 akāryamasakṛtkṛtvā dṛśyante hyadhanā narāḥ |  0058-2 dhanayuktāstvadharmasthā dṛśyante cāpare janāḥ ||0059-1 akāryāṇyapi paryāpya kṛtvāpiṃ vṛjinārjanaṃ |  0059-2 vidhīyate hitaṃ yasya sa dehaḥ kasya susthiraḥ ||0060-1 akārye tathyo vā bhavati vitathaḥ kāmamathavā tathāpyuccairdhāmnāṃ harati mahimānaṃ janaravaḥ |  0060-2 tulottīrṇasyāpi prakaṭanihatāśeṣatamaso ravestādṛktejo na hi bhavati kanyāṃ gata iti ||0061-1 akālacaryā viṣamā ca goṣṭhī kumitrasevā na kadāpi kāryā |  0061-2 paśyāṇḍajaṃ padmavane prasuptaṃ dhanurvimuktena śareṇa bhinnaṃ ||0062-1 akālajaladendoḥ sā hṛdyā vadanacandrikā |  0062-2 nityaṃ kavicakorairyā pīyate na ca hīyate ||0063-1 akālajaladaślokaiścitramātmakṛtairiva |  0063-2 jātaḥ kādambarīrāmo nāṭake pravaraḥ kaviḥ ||0064-1 akālajaladacchannaṃ ālokya ravimaṇḍalaṃ |  0064-2 cakravākayugaṃ rauti rajanībhayaśaṅkayā ||0065-1 akālamṛtyuṃ parihṛtya jīvitaṃ dadāti yo dehasukhaṃ ca dehināṃ |  0065-2 natena dhātrāsti samaḥ kuto'dhiko na jīvitāddānamihātiricyate ||0066-1 akālamṛtyurviśvāso viśvasanhi vipadyate |  0066-2 yasminkaroti viśvāsaṃ sa jīvatyaparo mṛtaḥ ||0067-1 akālasahamatyalpaṃ mūrkhavyasanināyakaṃ |  0067-2 aguptaṃ bhīruyodhaṃ ca durgavyasanamucyate ||0068-1 akālasainyayuktastu hanyate kālayodhinā |  0068-2 kauśikena hatajyotirniśītha iva vāyasaḥ ||0069-1 akāle kṛtyamārabdhaṃ kaṛtuṃ nārthāya kalpate |  0069-2 tadeva kāla ārabdhaṃ mahate'rthāya kalpate ||0070-1 akāle garjite deve durdinaṃ vāthavā bhavet |  0070-2 pūrvakāṇḍahataṃ lakṣyaṃ anadhyāyaṃ pracakṣate ||0071-1 akiṃcanaḥ paripatansukhamāsvādayiṣyasi |  0071-2 akiṃcanaḥ sukhaṃ śete samuttiṣṭhati caiva hi ||0072-1 akiṃcanatvaṃ rājyaṃ ca tulayā samatolayat |  0072-2 akiṃcanatvamadhikaṃ rājyādapi jitātmanaḥ ||0073-1 akiṃcanasya dāntasya śāntasya samacetasaḥ |  0073-2 mayā saṃtuṣṭamanasaḥ sarvāḥ sukhamayā diśaḥ ||0074-1 akiṃcanasya śuddhasya upapannasya sarvaśaḥ |  0074-2 avekṣamāṇastrīṃllokānna tulyamupalakṣaye ||0075-1 akiṃcanāśca dṛśyante puruṣāścirajīvinaḥ |  0075-2 samṛddhe ca kule jātā vinaśyanti pataṃgavat ||0076-1 akiṃcitkāriṇāṃ dīnairākṛṣṭaguṇakarmaṇāṃ |  0076-2 aghāya gatasattvānāṃ darśanasparśanādikaṃ ||0077-1 akīrtiṃ cāpi bhūtāni kathayiṣyanti te'vyayāṃ |  0077-2 saṃbhāvitasya cākīrtirmaraṇādatiricyate ||0078-1 akīrtiryasya gīyeta loke bhūtasya kasyacit |  0078-2 patatyevādhamāṃllokānyāvacchabdaḥ prakīrtyate ||0079-1 akīrtirnindyate devaiḥ kīrtirlokeṣu pūjyate |  0079-2 kīrtyarthaṃ tu samārambhaḥ sarveṣāṃ sumahātmanāṃ ||0080-1 akīrteḥ kāraṇaṃ yoṣidyoṣidvairasya kāraṇaṃ |  0080-2 saṃsārakāraṇaṃ yoṣidyoṣitaṃ varjayettataḥ ||0081-1 akuṇṭhotkaṇṭhayā pūrṇaṃ akaṇṭhaṃ kalakaṇṭhi māṃ |  0081-2 kambukaṇṭhyāḥ kṣaṇaṃ kaṇṭhe kuru kaṇṭhārtimuddhara ||0082-1 akuberapurīvilokanaṃ na dharāsūnukaraṃ kadācana |  0082-2 atha tatpratikārahetave-'damayantīpatilocanaṃ bhaja ||0083-1 akurvanto'pi pāpāni śucayaḥ pāpasaṃśrayāt |  0083-2 parapāpairvinaśyanti matsyā nāgahrade yathā ||0084-1 akulānāṃ kule bhāvaṃ kulīnānāṃ kulakṣayaṃ |  0084-2 saṃyogaṃ viprayogaṃ ca paśyanti cirajīvinaḥ ||0085-1 akulīnaḥ kulīnaśca maryādāṃ yo na laṅghayet |  0085-2 dharmāpekṣī mṛdurdāntaḥ sa kulīnaśatairvaraḥ ||0086-1 akulīnastu puruṣaḥ prakṛtaḥ sādhusaṃkṣayāt |  0086-2 durlabhaiśvaryasaṃprāpto garvitaḥ śatrutāṃ vrajet ||0087-1 akulīno'pi mūrkho'pi bhūpālaṃ yo'tra sevate |  0087-2 api saṃmānahīno'pi sa sarvatra prapūjyate ||0088-1 akule patito rājā mūrkhaputro hi paṇḍitaḥ |  0088-2 nirdhanasya dhanaprāptistṛṇavanmanyate jagat ||0089-1 akūpārādvāri pracurataramādāya jaladaḥ sa dānādhyakṣo'pi prakirati jalaṃ nādbhutamidaṃ |  0089-2 sa megho dhanyo yatparikirati muktāphalatayā yadīyāsau kīrtirnaṭati nṛpanārīkucataṭe ||0090-1 akūrcārambho'pi praticubukadeśaṃ karatalaṃ pratijñāyāṃ kurvanyuvatiṣu dṛśaṃ snigdhataralāṃ |  0090-2 kumāro'haṃ kārātpariṣadi samānānagaṇayanbhujau vakṣaḥ paśyannavavayasi kāntiṃ vitanute ||0091-1 akṛtakavalārambhairvaktrairbhayasthagitekṣaṇāḥ kimapi valitagrīvaṃ sthitvā muhurmṛgapaṅktayaḥ |  0091-2 gaganamasakṛtpaśyantyetāstathāśrughanairmukhairnipatati yathā śṛṅgāgrebhyo'kramaṃ nayanodakaṃ ||0092-1 akṛtajñamanāryaṃ ca dīrgharoṣamanārjavaṃ |  0092-2 caturo viddhi cāṇḍālāñjātyā jāyeta pañcamaḥ ||0093-1 akṛtatyāgamahimnāṃ mithyā kiṃ rājarājaśabdena |  0093-2 goptāraṃ na nidhīnāṃ mahayanti maheśvaraṃ vibudhāḥ ||0094-1 akṛtadviṣadunnaticchidaḥ śritasaṃrakṣaṇavandhyakarmaṇaḥ |  0094-2 puruṣasya nirarthakaḥ karaḥ kila kaṇḍūyanamātrasārthakaḥ ||0095-1 akṛtapremaiva varaṃ na punaḥ saṃjātavighaṭitapremā |  0095-2 uddhṛtanayanastāmyati yathā hi na tatheha jātāndhaḥ ||0096-1 akṛta viśadadhāmno bimbasāraṃ gṛhītvā dayita yuvativaktraṃ lokadhātreti vidmaḥ |  0096-2 na hi na hi bhavadīyo moha evaiṣa mitra sitagaralanidhānaṃ tattvato niścinu tvaṃ ||0097-1 akṛtasyāgamo nāsti kṛte nāśo na vidyate |  0097-2 akasmādeva loko'yaṃ tṛṣṇe dāsīkṛtastvayā ||0098-1 akṛtātmānamāsādya rājānamanaye rataṃ |  0098-2 samṛddhāni vinaśyanti rāṣṭrāṇi nagarāṇi ca ||0099-1 akṛte'pyudyame puṃsāṃ anyajanmakṛtaṃ phalaṃ |  0099-2 śubhāśubhaṃ samabhyeti vidhinā saṃniyojitaṃ ||0100-1 akṛteṣvevakāryeṣu mṛtyurvai saṃprakarṣati |  0100-2 yuvaiva dharmaśīlaḥ syādanimittaṃ hi jīvitaṃ ||0101-1 akṛtopadravaḥ kaścinmahānapi na pūjyate |  0101-2 pūjayanti narā nāgānna tārkṣyaṃ nāgaghātinaṃ ||0102-1 akṛtayaṃ naiva kṛtyaṃ syātprāṇatyāge'pyupasthite |  0102-2 na ca kṛtyaṃ parityājyaṃ eṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ ||0103-1 akṛtayaṃ manyate kṛtayaṃ agamyaṃ manyate sugaṃ |  0103-2 abhakṣyaṃ manyate bhakṣyaṃ strīvākyaprerito naraḥ ||0104-1 akṛtrimapremarasā vilāsālasagāminī |  0104-2 asāre dagdhasaṃsāre sāraṃ sāraṅgalocanā ||0105-1 akṛtrimavilāsāṅkaṃ aśikṣitakalākramaṃ |  0105-2 avibhāgāṅgasubhagaṃ babhūva surataṃ tayoḥ ||0106-1 akṛtvā karma yo loke phalaṃ vindati viṣṭitaḥ |  0106-2 sa tu vaktavyatāṃ yāti dveṣyo bhavati prāyaśaḥ ||0107-1 akṛtvā nijadeśasya rakṣāṃ yo vijigīṣate |  0107-2 sa nṛpaḥ paridhānena vṛtamauliḥ pumāniva ||0108-1 akṛtvā parasaṃtāpaṃ agatvā khalanamratāṃ |  0108-2 anutsṛjya satāṃ vartma yatsvalpamapi tadbahu ||0109-1 akṛtvā pauruṣaṃ yā śrīḥ kiṃ tayālasabhāgyayā |  0109-2 kuraṅgo'pi samaśnāti daivādupanataṃ tṛṇaṃ ||0110-1 akṛtvā mānuṣaṃ karma yo daivamanuvartate |  0110-2 vṛthā śrāmyati saṃprāpya patiṃ klībamivāṅganā ||0111-1 akṛtvā helayā pādaṃ uccairmūrdhasu vidviṣāṃ |  0111-2 kathaṃkāramanālambā kīrtirdyāmadhirohati ||0112-1 akṛpaṇamaśaṭhamacapalaṃ yoginamaviṣādinaṃ budhaṃ śūraṃ |  0112-2 yadi nāśrayati naraṃ śrīḥ śrīreva hi vañcitā bhavati ||0113-1 akṛśaṃ kucayoḥ kṛśaṃ valagne vitataṃ cakṣuṣi vistṛtaṃ nitambe |  0113-2 aruṇādharamāvirastu citte karuṇāśāli kapālibhāgadheyaṃ ||0114-1 akṛśaṃ nitambabhāge kṣāmaṃ madhye samunnataṃ kucayoḥ |  0114-2 atyāyataṃ nayanayormama jīvitametadāyāti ||0115-1 akṛṣṭaphalamūlena vanavāsarataḥ sadā |  0115-2 kurute'harahaḥ śrāddhaṃ ṛṣirvipraḥ sa ucyate ||0116-1 akekī kiṃ kekī vacasi caturaḥ kinna kuraraḥ śukaḥ kiṃvā mūkaḥ sa ca kalaravaḥ kiṃ kṣataravaḥ |  0116-2 tvayāgaṇyaiḥ puṇyaiḥ pikamadhurimā dhīragarimā yato labdhaḥ stabdhaḥ kimasi ruciraṃ neha suciraṃ ||0117-1 akausumī manmathacāpayaśṭi- ranaṃśukā vibhramavaijayantī |  0117-2 lalāṭaraṅgāṅgaṇanartakīyaṃ anañjanā bhrūranuyāti dṛṣṭaṃ ||0118-1 akratvaṅgamatastakraṃ na śatakratunā hutaṃ |  0118-2 nādattamiti vākyārthāttakraṃ śakrasya durlabhaṃ ||0119-1 akratvarthamiti jñātvā śakre na hutavānpurā |  0119-2 nādattamiti śāstrārthāttakraṃ śakrasya durlabhaṃ ||0120-1 akrameṇānupāyena karmārambho na sidhyati |  0120-2 dadhisarpiḥpayāṃsīva śabarasya yathā hi goḥ ||0121-1 akrodhaṃ śikṣayantyanyaiḥ krodhanā ye tapodhanāḥ |  0121-2 nirdhanāste dhanāyaiva dhātuvādopadeśinaḥ ||0122-1 akrodhanaḥ sadācāro dīrghamāyuravāpnuyāt ||0124-1 akrodhanaśca rājendra satyaśīlo dṛḍhavrataḥ |  0124-2 ātmopamaśca bhūteṣu sa tīrthaphalamaśnute ||0125-1 akrodhavairāgyajitendriyatvaṃ kṣamādayāśāntijanapriyatvaṃ |  0125-2 nirlobhadātā bhayaśokahārī jñānasya cihnaṃ bhayalakṣaṇāni ||0126-1 akrodhasya yadā krodhaḥ sarvanāśāya kalpate |  0126-2 rāghavasya prakopena baddho mugdhākṣīpratikṛtya tatkṛtavatī dyūte'pi yannārjitaṃ ||0134-1 akṣamaḥ kṣamatāmāno kriyāyāṃ yaḥ pravartate |  0134-2 sa hi hāsyāspadatvaṃ ca labhate prāṇasaṃśayaṃ ||0135-1 akṣamālāpavṛttijñā ||0139-1 akṣaramaitrībhājaḥ sālaṃkārasya cāruvṛttasya |  0139-2 kiṃ brūmo sakhi yūno na hi na hi sakhi padyabandhasya ||0140-1 akṣarāṇāmakāro'haṃ iti viṣṇuḥ svayaṃ bruvan |  0140-2 bhavatā so'pi 0144-2 vardhamānātmanāmeva bhavanti hi vipattayaḥ ||0145-1 akṣibhyāṃ kṛṣṇaśārābhyāṃ asyāḥ karṇau na bādhitau |  0145-2 śaṅke kanakatāḍaṅkapāśatrāsavaśādiva ||0146-1 akṣīṇakarmabandhastu jñātvā ||0150-1 akṣeṣviyaṃ vyasanitā hṛdaye yadete rāgo ghano madhumadotkaṭamānanaṃ ca |  0150-2 padmastathāpi paramāspadameva lakṣmyāstaddainyameva kila durbhagatā yadebhiḥ ||0151-1 akṣoṭhaśuṇṭhimaricārdrakadāḍimatvakkustumburūlavaṇatailasusaṃskṛtānyaḥ |  0151-2 matsyānsuśītasitabhaktatale dadhāti sa brahmalokamadhigacchati puṇyakarmā ||0152-1 akṣaure'pi ca nakṣatre kurvīta |  0192-2 tathā gaṅgājalenaiva sarvapāpaṃ vinaśyati ||0193-1 agniṃ stokamivātmānaṃ saṃdhukṣayati yo naraḥ |  0193-2 sa vardhamāno grasate mahāntamapi saṃcayaṃ ||0194-1 agniḥ stoko vardhate agnirdevo dvijātīnāṃ munīnāṃ hṛdi daivataṃ |  0203-2 pratimāsvalpabuddhīnāṃ sarvatra samadarśinaḥ ||0204-1 agnirhi devatāḥ sarvāḥ sarvaṇaṃ ca tadātmakaṃ |  0204-2 tasmātsuvarṇaṃ dadatā dattāḥ copayuṅkte taddāru yāvanno dīpyate paraiḥ ||0207-1 sa eva khalu dārubhyo yadā nirmathya dīpyate |  0207-2 tadā tacca vanaṃ cānyannirdahatyāśu tejasā ||0208-1 evameva kule jātāḥ pāvakopamatejasaḥ |  0208-2 kṣamāvanto nirākārāḥ kāṣṭhe'gniriva śerate ||0209-1 agnihotraṃ gṛhaṃ kṣetraṃ garbhirṇīṃ vṛddhabālakau |  0209-2 riktahastena nopeyādrājānaṃ devatāṃ guruṃ ||0210-1 agnihotraṃ trayo ||0212-1 agnihotramadhītaṃ vā dānādyāścākhilāḥ kriyāḥ |  0212-2 bhajante tasya vaiphalyaṃ yasya vākyamakāraṇaṃ ||0213-1 agnihotreṣu viprāṇāṃ hṛdi devo manīṣiṇāṃ |  0213-2 pratimāsvalpabuddhīnāṃ sarvatra viditātmanāṃ ||0214-1 agneryathā dāruviyogayogayoradṛṣṭato'nyatra nimittamasti |  0214-2 evaṃ hi jantorapi durvibhāvyaḥ śarīrasaṃyogaviyogahetuḥ ||0215-1 agnau kriyāvatāṃ devo divi devo śiśiramarutā dahyate padminīva |  0220-2 prāṇāndhatse kathamapi balādgacchataḥ śalyatulyāṃstatkenāsau sutanu janito māmmathaste vikāraḥ ||0221-1 agnyādhānena yajñena kāṣāyeṇa jaṭājinaiḥ |  0221-2 lokānviśvāsayitvaiva tato lumpedyathā vṛkaḥ ||0222-1 agracchāyā tṛṇāgniśca nīcasevā paṭe jalaṃ |  0222-2 veśyārāgaḥ khalaprema sarvaṃ budbudasannibhaṃ ||0223-1 agrataḥ pṛṣṭhato madhye pārśvato'tha ||0230-1 agre kugrāmavargaḥ piśitarasalasaccaṇḍacaṇḍāyamānaḥ paścādvyādho vadhārtho niśitaśarakaraḥ pādamudrānapāyī |  0230-2 viṣvagdīpto vanāgnirvanamatigahanaṃ dhūmavātyā ca dṛṣṭeḥ saroddhī kāndiśīko hari hari hariṇaḥkaṃ śaraṇyaṃ prayātu ||0231-1 agre gacchata dhenudugdhakalaśānādāya gopyo gṛhaṃ dugdhe vaskayaṇīkule punariyaṃ rādhā śanairyāsyati |  0231-2 ityanyavyapadeśaguptahṛdayaḥ kurvanviviktaṃ vrajaṃ devaḥ kāraṇanandasūnuraśivaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ sa muṣṇātu vaḥ ||0232-1 agre gītaṃ sarasakavayaḥ pārśvato dākṣiṇātyāḥ pṛṣṭhe līlāvalayaraṇitaṃ cāmaragrāhiṇīnāṃ |  0232-2 yadyastyevaṃ kuru 0236-2 tathāpi prabhubhaktānāṃ saudharmyādevamucyate ||0237-1 yaireva stutibhiḥ svāmī prāpyate vyasanāvaṭaṃ |  0237-2 paścānmūkatvamāpannairḍaddharttuṃ naiva śakyate ||0238-1 agre māhiṣikaṃ dṛṣṭvā ||0247-1 aghaṃ sa kevalaṃ bhuṅkte yaḥ pacatyātmakāraṇāt |  0247-2 yajñaśiṣṭāśanaṃ hyetatsatāmannaṃ vidhīyate ||0248-1 aghaṭitaṃ ghaṭanāṃ nayati dhruvaṃ sughaṭitaṃ kṣaṇabhaṅguratācalaṃ |  0248-2 ||0269-1 aṅgaṃ dakṣiṇamāruhya vāmenottarati sphuṭaṃ |  0269-2 tadā hānikarī jñeyā vyatyayena tu lābhadā ||0270-1 aṅgaṃ damanapattrābhamaṅge yasminpratīyate |  0270-2 vidyāddamanavajraṃ tu 0272-2 aṅgāni bhūṣaṇānāṃ kāmapi suṣamāmajījanaṃstasyāḥ ||0273-1 aṅgaṃ yena rathīkṛtaṃ nayanayoryugmaṃ rathāṅgīkṛtaṃ patraṃ svaṃ rathakarmasāratthikṛtaṃ śvāsasturaṃgīkṛtāḥ |  0273-2 koda'ḍīkṛtamātmavīryamacirānmaurvīkṛtaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ vāmāṅgaṃ viśikhīkṛtaṃ diśatu naḥ kṣemaṃ sa dhanvī pumān ||0274-1 aṅgaṇaṃ tadidamunmadadvipa- śreṇiśoṇitavihāriṇo hareḥ |  0274-2 |  0284-2 vijānansiddhasādhyādīnvairiṇo'strairna pīḍyate ||0285-1 aṅgasaṅgāttathā jīvo bhajate prākṛtānguṇān |  0285-2 ahaṃkārābhibhūtaḥ sanbhinnastebhyo'pi so'vyayaḥ ||0286-1 aṅgāḥ bhavataḥ prauḍhaniḥsāṇanādāt ||0287-1 aṅgākṛṣṭadukūlayā sarabhasaṃ gūḍhau bhujābhyāṃ stanāvākṛṣṭe jaghanāṃśuke kṛtamadhaḥ saṃsaktamūrudvayaṃ |  0287-2 nābhīmūlanibaddhacakṣuṣi mayi vrīḍānatāṅgyā karajaśreṇiṣu śroṇibhāgaḥ prātaryāti praguṇataratāṃ vaiśasaṃ naiśamasyāḥ ||0289-1 aṅgāṅgamāgate śatrau kiṃ karoti paricchadaḥ |  0289-2 rāhuṇā grasite candre kiṃ kiṃ bhavati tārakaiḥ ||0290-1 aṅgāṅgibhāvamajñātvā kathaṃ sāmarthyanirṇayaḥ |  0290-2 paśya ṭiṭṭibhamātreṇa samudro vyākulīkṛtaḥ ||0291-1 aṅgānāmatitānavaṃ kuta idaṃ kampaśca kasmātkuto mugdhe pāṇḍukapolamānanamiti prāṇeśvarepṛcchati |  0291-2 tanvyā sarvamidaṃ svabhāvata iti vyāhṛtya pakṣmāntara- vyāpī bāṣpabharastayā valitayā niḥśvasya mukto'nyataḥ ||0292-1 aṅgāni khedayasi kiṃ śirīṣakusumaparipelavāni mudhā |  0292-2 ayamīhitakusumānāṃ saṃpādayitā tavāsti dāsajanaḥ ||0293-1 aṅgāni candanarajaḥparidhūsarāṇi tāmbūlarāgasubhago'dharapallavaśca |  0293-2 svacchāñjane ca nayane vasanaṃ tanīyaḥ kāntāsu bhūṣaṇamidaṃ vibahvaśca śeṣaḥ||0294-1 aṅgāni dattvā hemāṅgi prāṇānkrīṇāsi cennṛṇāṃ |  0294-2 yuktametanna tu punaḥ koṇaṃ nayanapadmayoḥ ||0295-1 aṅgāni dhīpaṭutvaṃ śaktirdaśanāḥ śanairviśīryante |  0295-2 nikhilendriyāṇi yeṣāṃ cirāyuṣaste narā jñeyāḥ ||0296-1 aṅgāni nidrālasavibhramāṇi vākyāni kiṃcinmadalālasāni |  0296-2 bhrūkṣepajihmāni ca vīkṣitāni cakāra kāmaḥ pramadājanānāṃ ||0297-1 aṅgāni me dahatu kāntaviyogavahniḥ samrakṣatu priyatamaṃ hṛdi vartate'sau |  0297-2 ityāśayā śaśimukhī jaladaśruvāri- dhārābhiruṣṇamabhiṣiñcati hṛtpradeśaṃ||0298-1 aṅgāni ślathaniḥ sahāni nayate mugdhālase vibhramaś- vāsotkampitak_oṃalastanamuraḥ sāyāsasupte bhruvau |  0298-2 kiṃ cāndolanakautukavyuparatāvāsyeṣu vāmabhruvāṃ svedāmbhaḥ stapitākulālakalateṣvāvāsito manmathaḥ ||0299-1 aṅgāmodasamocchaladghṛṇipatadbhṛṅgāvalīmālita- sphūrjallañchanasūtragumphitamilannīlotpalaśrīriva |  0299-2 niryatpādanakhonmukhāṃśuvisarasragdanturaḥ smaryatāṃ mañjuśrīḥ suramuktamañjariśikhāvarṣairivābhyarcitaḥ ||0300-1 aṅgārapūrve gamane ca lābhaḥ s_oṃe śanau dakṣiṇamarthalābhaṃ |  0300-2 budhe gurau paścimakāryasiddhī ravau bhṛgau cottaramarthalābhaḥ ||0301-1 aṅgāraśūlāśmapalālakeśa- vistīrṇaviṭcarmamṛteṣu dṛṣṭaḥ |  0301-2 śvā mūtrayanyacchati kāryanāśaṃ dāridryamṛtyupramukhānanarthān ||0302-1 aṅgārasadṛśī nārī ghṛtakumbhasamaḥ pumān |  0302-2 ye prasaktā vilīnāste ye sthitāste pade sthitāḥ ||0303-1 aṅgārasadṛśī yoṣitsarpiḥkumbhasamaḥ pumān |  0303-2 tasyāḥ parisare brahmansthātavyaṃ na kadācana ||0304-1 aṅgārahāsiṣu vilāsagṛhodareṣu tīvramabhito vāyuḥ kukūlānalaṃ |  0305-2 apyambhāṃsi nakhaṃpacāni saritāmāśā jvalantīva ca grīṣme'sminnavavahnidīpitamivāśeṣaṃ jagadvartate ||0306-1 aṅgāraiḥ śākavṛkṣasya cūrṇitaiḥ saghṛtaistryahaṃ |  0306-2 dattairnaśyatyatīsārastryahaṃ pānīyavāraṇāt ||0307-1 aṅgāsaṅgimṛṇālakāṇḍamayate bhṛṅgāvalīnāṃ rucaṃ nāsāmauktikamindranīlasaraṇiṃ śvāsānilādgāhate |  0307-2 datteyaṃ himavālukāpi 0379-2 rājavatpraviśedgrāmaṃ coravadgamanaṃ caret ||0380-1 ajasya gṛhṇato janma nirīhasya hatadviṣaḥ |  0380-2 svapato jāgarūkasya yāthātmyaṃ veda kastava ||0381-1 ajasraṃ lasatpadminī vṛndasaṅgaṃ |  0385-2 tasyaikā jāyate tṛptirna dvitīyā kathaṃcana ||0386-1 ajāgalasthastana uṣṭrapucchaṃ kakṣāntare keśamathāṇḍayugmaṃ |  0386-2 tvāṃ saṃsṛjansāyaṇamāyaṇādau brahmāgragaṇyo na babhūva pūjyaḥ ||0387-1 ajāṅghrinirdattarajaścayāpi kapālinā baddharasāpi kāmaṃ |  0387-2 tato'pyadhodhaḥ patitāpi nityaṃ gaṅgā kusaṅgāpi punāti lokān ||0388-1 ajājījambāle rajasi maricānāṃ ca luṭhitāḥ ||0426-1 ajñātamātṛla lana- maiṇaśiśuṃ kaścidaṅkamāropya |  0426-2 adyāpi rakṣasi vidho dharmātmā konu bhavadanyaḥ ||0427-1 ajñātavīvadhāsāratoyasasyo vrajettu yaḥ pararāṣṭraṃ na bhūyaḥ sa 0441-2 śrāddhahantā bhavetkartā nirāśāḥ pitaro gatāḥ ||0442-1 ajñānājjñānato vāpi yadduruktamudāhṛtaṃ |  0442-2 tatkṣantavyaṃ yuvābhyāṃ me kṛtvā prītiparaṃ manaḥ ||0443-1 ajñānādyadi vā 0452-2 saṅgana bahubhirnaṣṭastena svargaṃ na gacchati ||0453-1 ajñānaikahato bālye yauvane gṛhatatparaḥ |  0453-2 vārdhake'patyacintārtaḥ karmabhirbadhyate punaḥ ||0454-1 ajñānopahato bālye dhanyaḥ so'yaṃ bhavati bhuvana yo'vadhūte'vadhūtaḥ ||0459-1 ajño jantuśca nīco'yaṃ ātmanaḥ sukhaduḥkhayoḥ |  0459-2 īśvaraprerito gacchetsvargaṃ vā śvabhrameva vā ||0460-1 ajño na paśyābhyāsavijṛmbhitaṃ ||0462-1 ajño bhavati vai bālaḥ pitā bhavati mantradaḥ |  0462-2 ajñaṃ hi bāla ityāhuḥ pitetyeva tu mantradaṃ ||0463-1 ajño vā yadi vā viparyayagate jñāne'tha saṃdehabhṛddṛṣṭādṛṣṭavirodhi karma kurute yastasya goptā guruḥ |  0463-2 niḥ saṃdehaviparyaye sati punarjñāne viruddhakriyaṃ rājā cetpuruṣaṃ na śāsti tadayaṃ prāptaḥ prajāviplavaḥ ||0464-1 añcati nijāmadharaṇīpatau valati kautukāḍambarādidaṃ bhuvanamaṇḍalaṃ daradarīdarīdaryaho ||0476-1 aṭanena mahāraṇye supanthā jāyate śanaiḥ |  0476-2 vedābhyāsāttathā jñānaṃ śanaiḥ parvatalaṅghanaṃ ||0477-1 aṭa vā vikaṭaḥ patatranādaiḥ kaṭuvācaṃ raṭa vāthavā divāndha |  0477-2 paruṣaṃ paripaśya saṃyataṃ tatparamaṃ naḥ puramāgato na cettvaṃ ||0478-1 aṭavī kīdṛśī prāyo durgamā bhavati priye |  0478-2 priyasya kīdṛśī kāntā tanoti suratotsavaṃ ||0479-1 aṭavyā drumapuṣpāṇi dūrasthā api bāndhavāḥ |  0479-2 kāntā cālekhyarūpā ca te kāle na pratiṣṭhitāḥ ||0480-1 aṭṭaśūlā janapadāḥ aṇukaṃ surataṃ nāma daṃpatyoḥ pārśvasaṃsthayoḥ |  0482-2 jāyante nibiḍāśleṣāḥ samībhūtaśarīrayoḥ ||0483-1 aṇunāpi praviśyāriṃ chidreṇa balavattaraṃ |  0483-2 niḥśeṣaṃ majjayedrāṣṭraṃ 0485-2 viparītamanāryeṣu yathecchasi tathā kuru ||0486-1 aṇubhyaśca mahadbhyaśca śāstrebhyaḥ kuśalo naraḥ |  0486-2 sarvataḥ sāramādadyātpuṣpebhya iva ṣaṭpadaḥ ||0487-1 aṇumātraṃ yathā śalyaṃ 0498-2 tṛṇamapi dugdhāya gavāṃ dugdhamapi viṣāya sarpāṇāṃ ||0499-1 ataḥ kavirnāmasu yāvadarthaḥ syādapramatto vyavasāyabuddhiḥ |  0499-2 siddhe'nyathā'rthe na yateta bhūyaḥ pariśramaṃ tatra ||0545-1 atitṛṣṇā na kartavyā tṛṣṇāṃ naiva parityajet |  0545-2 atitṛṣṇābhibhūtasya śikhā bhavati mastake |  0546-1 atitejasvyapi rājā pānāsakto na sādhayatyarthān |  0546-2 tṛṇamapi dagdhuṃ śakto ||0582-1 atipracaṇḍā bahuduḥkhabhāginī vivādaśīlā paragehagāminī |  0582-2 bhartuḥ svayaṃ nindati yā ca taskarī tyajetsvabhāryāṃ daśaputraputriṇīṃ ||0583-1 atiprauḍhā rātrirbahalaśikhadīpaḥ prabhavati priyaḥ premārabdhasmaravidhirasajñaḥ paramasau |  0583-2 sakhi svairaṃ svairaṃ suratamakarodvrīḍitavapuryataḥ paryaṅko'yaṃ ripuriva kaḍatkāramukharaḥ ||0584-1 atibalināmapi malinā- śayena balikarṇaputrāṇāṃ |  0584-2 viśvāsopanatānāṃ vāsoputreṇa jīvitaṃ jahre ||0585-1 atibahutaralajjāśṛṅkhalābaddhapādo madananṛpativāho yauvanonmattahastī |  0585-2 prakaṭitakucakumbho l_oṃarājīkareṇa pibati sarasi nābhīmaṇḍalākhye payāṃsi ||0586-1 atibhīrumatiklībaṃ dīrghasūtraṃ pramādinaṃ |  0586-2 vyasanādviṣayākrāntaṃ na bhajanti nṛpaṃ prajāḥ ||0587-1 atimandacandanamahīdharavātaṃ |  0590-2 garbheṇa duṣyate kanyā gṛhavāsena ca dvijaḥ ||0591-1 atimāninamagrāhyaṃ ātmasaṃbhāvitaṃ naraṃ |  0591-2 krodhanaṃ vyasane hanti svajano'pi narādhipaṃ ||0592-1 atimṛdu papau kumbhasaṃbhavo'mbhodhiṃ ||0597-1 atiruciraṅgajakṛttyā kṣobhitadakṣaṃ bhavantameva bhaje |  0597-2 yasminprasādasumukhe sadyo vāmāpi bhavati mama tuṣṭyai ||0598-1 atirupavatī sītā atigarvī ca tasmādāhṛtya dātavyā bhūmiḥ pārthivasattama ||0688-1 atyāsannā vināśāya dūrasthā na phalapradāḥ |  0688-2 sevyā madhyamabhāvena rājāvahnirguruḥ striyaḥ ||0689-1 atyuktau yadi na prakupyasi mṛṣāvādaṃ na cenmanyase tadbrūmo'dbhutakīrtanāya rasanā keṣāṃ na kaṇḍūyate |  0689-2 deva tvattaruṇapratāpadahanajvālāvalīśoṣitāḥ sarve vāridhayastato ripuvadhūnetrāmbubhiḥ pūritāḥ ||0690-1 atyuccastanaśailadurgamamuro nābhirgabhīrāntarā bhīmaṃ dehavanaṃ sphuradbhujalataṃ r_oṃālijālākulaṃ |  0690-2 vyādhaḥ pañcaśaraḥ kiratyatitarāṃ tīkṣṇānkaṭākṣāśugāṃs- tanme brūhi manaḥkuraṅga śaraṇaṃ kiṃ sāṃprataṃ yāsyasi ||0691-1 atyuccāḥ paritaḥsphuranti girayaḥ sphārāstathāmbhodhayastānetānapi bibhratī kimapi na klāntāsi tubhyaṃ namaḥ |  0691-2 āścaryeṇa muhurmuhuḥ stutimimāṃ prast_oṃi |  0872-2 āndolanaśramajalasphuṭasāndrabindu- muktāphalaprakaravicchuritaṃ priyāyāḥ ||0873-1 adyāpi tatkanakagaurakṛtāṅgarāgaṃ prasvedabinduvitataṃ vadnaṃ priyāyāḥ|  0873-2 ante smarāmi lajjāvaśātkaradhṛtaṃ ca tato vrajantyāḥ ||0875-1 adyāpi tatkamalareṇusugandhagandhi tatpremavāri makaradhvajapātakāri |  0875-2 prāpn_oṃyahaṃ yadi punaḥ surataikatīrthaṃ prāṇāṃstyajāmi niyataṃ tadavāptihetoḥ ||0876-1 adyāpi tatkṛtakacagrahamāgraheṇa dantairmayā daśanavāsasi khaṇḍyamāne |  0876-2 tasyā manāṅmukulitākṣamalakṣyamāṇa- sītkāragarbhamasakṛdvadanaṃ smarāmi||0877-1 adyāpi tattaralatārakitākṣamāsyaṃ ālipracandanarasāhitaśobhamasyāḥ |  0877-2 kastūrikātilakatārakitābhirāma- gaṇḍasthaladyuti muhurmanasā smarāmi ||0878-1 adyāpi tatpraṇayabhaṅguradṛṣṭipātaṃ tasyāḥ smarāmi rativibhramagātrabhaṅgaṃ |  0878-2 vastrāñcalaskhalanacārupayodharāntaṃ dantacchadaṃ daśanakhaṇḍanamaṇḍanaṃ ca ||0879-1 adyāpi tatsapariveṣaśaśiprakāśaṃ āsyaṃ smarāmi jaḍgātravivartaneṣu |  0879-2 tadveladujjvalakarāṅgulijālagumpha- doḥ kandalīyugalakaṃ dayitaṃ priyāyāḥ ||0880-1 adyāpi tatsuratakelinirastrayuddhaṃ bandhopabandhapatanotthitaśūnyahastaṃ|  0879-2 vimūrcchati manaḥ stutarāṃ madīyaṃ ||0883-1 adyāpi tadvikasitāmbujamadhyagauraṃ gorocanātilakabhāsuraphālarekhaṃ |  0883-2 īṣanmadālasavighūrṇitadṛṣṭipātaṃ tasyā mukhaṃ prati mano mama gacchatīdaṃ ||0884-1 adyāpi tannayanakajjalamujjvalāsyaṃ viśrāntakarṇayugalaṃ parihāsahetoḥ|  0884-2 paśye tavātmani navīnapayodharābhyāṃ kṣīṇaṃ vapuryadi vinaśyati no na doṣaḥ ||0885-1 adyāpi tanmadanakārmukabhaṅgurabhru- dantadyutiprakarakarburitādharoṣṭhaṃ|  0885-2 karṇāvasaktapulakojjvaladantapatraṃ tasyāḥ punaḥ punarapīha mukhaṃ smarāmi||0886-1 adyāpi tanmanasi saṃparivartate me  0945-2 jṛmbhāvatīrṇamukhamārutagandhalabdha- mughabhramadbhramaravibhramalolanetrāṃ ||0946-1 adyāpi tāṃ stimitavastramivāṅgalagnāṃ prauḍhapratāpamadanānalataptadehāṃ |  0946-2 śvāsottaraṃ ca nibhṛtaṃ ca muhurvadantīṃ ||0948-1 adyāpi tāni parivartitakaṃdharāṇi kiṃcitkṣutatruṭitakañcukajālakāni |  0948-2 tasyā bhujāgraluladudvalakuntalāni citte sphuranti mama vakravilocanāni ||0949-1 adyāpi tāni mama cetasi saṃsphuranti karṇāntasaṃgatakaṭākṣanirīkṣitāni|  0949-2 tasyāḥ smarajvarakarāṇi madālasāni līlāvilāsabahulāni vilocanāni ||0950-1 adyāpi tāni mama cetasi saṃsphuranti bimboṣṭhadeśaparikīrṇaśucismatāni |  0951-1 adyāpi tāni mṛduvākyasubhāṣitāni tirthagvivarttinayanāntanirīkṣaṇāni līlālasāñcitagatāni śucismitāni tasyāḥ smarāmi madavibhramaceṣṭitāni ||0952-1 adyāpi tāmanibhṛtakramamāgataṃ ca māṃ dvāri vīkṣya śayane nimiṣeṇa suptāṃ |  0952-2 mandaṃ mayi spṛśati kaṇḍakitāṅgayaṣṭiṃ utphullagaṇḍaphalakāṃ bahuśaḥ smarāmi ||0953-1 adyāpi tāmanunayatyapi cāṭupūrvaṃ kopātprākṛtamukhīṃ mayi sāparādhe |  0953-2 āliṅgati prasabhamutpulakāṅgayaṣṭiṃ māmete duḥsahamivoktavatīṃ smarāmi||0954-1 adyāpi tāmanunayatyapi mayyasaktāṃ vyāvṛttya keliśayane śayitāṃ parācīṃ |  0954-2 nidrākulāmiva mamābhimukhībhavantīṃ prātarmadaṅganihitaikabhujāṃ smarāmi||0955-1 adyāpi tāmabhiviśālanitambabimbāṃ gambhīranābhikuharāṃ kaṇḍūyanaṃ vidadhatīṃ hṛdi cintayāmi||0958-1 adyāpi tāmavahitāṃ manasācalena saṃcintayāmi yuvatīṃ mama jīvitāśāṃ |  0958-2 nānyopabhuktanavayauvanabhārasārāṃ janmāntare'pi mama saiva gatiryathā syāt ||0959-1 adyāpi tāmavigaṇayya kṛtāparādhaṃ āpādamūlapatitaṃ sahasā calantīṃ |  0959-2 vastrāñcalaṃ mama karānnijamākṣipantīṃ mā meti roṣaparuṣaṃ vadatīṃ smarāmi ||0960-1 adyāpi tāmahamalajjitapūrvaghṛṣṭe śayyātale suśayitāṃ madanotsavāya |  0960-2 vīrṇāvatīṃ vikacacampakapuṣpanāsāṃ dhyāyāmi cetasi sadā nadatīṃ śubhāṅgīṃ ||0961-1 adyāpi tāmita itaśca puraśca paścādantarbahiḥ parita eva paribhramantīṃ|  0961-2 paśyāmi phullakanakāmbujasaṃnibhenvaktreṇa tiryagapavartitalocanena ||0962-1 adyāpi tāmupavane paricārayuktāṃ saṃcintayāmyupagatāṃ madanotsavāya |  0962-2 māṃ pārśvasaṃnihitalokabhayātsaśaṅkaṃ vyāvartitekṣaṇamanukṣaṇamīkṣamāṇāṃ ||0963-1 adyāpi tāmubhayapārśvagahāraramyāṃ vāsantikākusumabhāsittakañcukāṃ ca|  0963-2 ||0971-1 adyāpi rojjhati haraḥ kila kālakūṭaṃ kūrmo bibharti dharaṇīṃ puṣṭhabhāge |  0971-2 ambhonidhirvahati duḥsahavāḍavāgniṃ aṅgīkṛtaṃ sukṛtinaḥ paripālayanti ||0972-1 adyāpi santastu gurutīrthādau taduccaiḥpadakāṅkṣiṇaḥ ||1027-1 adhaḥ paśyanpārśvadvayavalitasācīkṛtaśirāḥ śanaiḥ pakṣasthairyāddivi masṛṇacakrākṛtigatiḥ |  1027-2 cirāccillastiryaktvaritataramāhāranipuṇo nipatyaivākasmāccalacaraṇamūrdhaṃ prapatati ||1028-1 adhaḥ paśyasi kiṃ bāle patitaṃ tava kiṃ bhuvi |  1028-2 re re mūrkha na jānāsi gataṃ tāruṇyamauktikaṃ ||1029-1 adhaḥpuṣpī śaṅkhapuṣpī lajjālurgirikarṇikā |  1029-2 nīlinī sahadevā ca putramārjārikā tathā ||1030-1 viṣṇukrāntā ca sarvāsāṃ jaṭā grāhyā raverdine |  1030-2 baddhā bhuje vilepādvā kāye śastraughavārikā ||1031-1 adhaḥ śete śambhustava caraṇamādhāya hṛdaye bahirdvāre dauvārikapadamupetaḥ kamalajaḥ |  1031-2 viḍaujā vaiphalyaṃ bhajati nijavijñāpanakṛte tāvahaṃ dāsaḥ syāmiti manasi lajjā bhayamapi ||1032-1 adhaḥsthā ramate nārī uparisthaśca kāmukaḥ |  1032-2 prasiddhaṃ tadrataṃ jñeyaṃ grāmabālajanapriyaṃ ||1033-1 adhanaṃ khalu jīvadhanaṃ dhanamardhadhanaṃ mahaddhanaṃ dhānyaṃ |  1033-2 atidhanametatsundari vidyā ca tapaśca kīrtiśca ||1034-1 adhanā api te dhanyāḥ sādhavo gṛhamedhinaḥ |  1034-2 yadgṛhā hyarhavaryāmbutṛṇabhūmīśvarāvarāḥ ||1035-1 adhanā dhanamicchanti vācaṃ caiva catuṣpadāḥ |  1035-2 mānavāḥ svargamicchanti mokṣamicchanti devatāḥ ||1036-1 adhanenārthakāmena nārthaḥ śakyo vivitsatā |  1036-2 arthairarthā nibadhyante gajairiva mahāgajāḥ ||1037-1 adhano dātukāmo'pi saṃprāpto dhanināṃ gṛhaṃ |  1037-2 manyate yācako'yaṃ dhigdāridryaṃ khalu dehināṃ ||1038-1 adhano'yaṃ dhanaṃ prāpya mādyannuccairna māṃ smaret |  1038-2 iti kāruṇiko nūnaṃ dhanaṃ me bhūri nādadat ||1039-1 adhamaṃ bādhate bhūyo duḥkhavego na tattamaṃ |  1039-2 pādadvayaṃ vrajatyāśu śītasparśo na cakṣuṣī ||1040-1 adhamamitrakumitrasamāgamaḥ priyaviyogabhayāni daridratā |  1040-2 apayaśaḥ khalu lokaparābhavo bhavati pāpataroḥ phalamīdṛśaṃ ||1041-1 adhamarṇaśavājīviśrāddhabhugduṣṭabhūbhujāṃ |  1041-2 abhiprāyā na siddhyanti tenedaṃ dhriyate jagat ||1042-1 adhamāḥ kalimicchanti saṃdhimicchanti madhyamāḥ |  1042-2 uttamā mānamicchanti māno hi mahatāṃ dhanaṃ ||1043-1 adhamā dhanamicchanti dhanamānau ca madhyamāḥ |  1043-2 uttamā mānamicchanti māno hi mahatāṃ dhanaṃ ||1044-1 adhame saṃgatā lakṣmīrnopabhogāya kasyacit |  1044-2 kardame patitā chāyā sahakārataroriva ||1045-1 adhamo mātukāraśca dhātukāraśca madhyamaḥ |  1045-2 dhātumātukriyākāra uttamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||1046-1 adhamo lakṣaṇajñaḥ syānmadhyamo lakṣyamācaret |  1046-2 lakṣyalakṣaṇasaṃyukta uttamaḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||1047-1 adharaṃ kila bimbanāmakaṃ phalamasmāditi bhavyamanvayaṃ |  1047-2 labhate'dharabimbamityadaḥ padamasyā radanacchadaṃ vadat ||1048-1 adharaḥ kisalayarāgaḥ k_oṃalaviṭapānukāriṇau bāhū |  1048-2 kusumamiva lobhanīyaṃ yauvanamaṅgeṣu saṃnaddhaṃ ||1049-1 adharaḥ padmarāgo'yaṃ anarghaḥ savraṇo'pi te |  1049-2 mugdhe hastaḥ kimartho'yaṃ apārtha iha dīyate ||1050-1 adharadyutirastapallavā mukhaśobhā śaśikāntilaṅghinī |  1050-2 tanurapratimā ca subhruvo na vidherasya kṛtiṃ vivakṣati ||1051-1 adharamadhare kaṇṭhaṃ kaṇṭhe nidhāya bhujaṃ bhuje hṛdi ca hṛdayaṃ madhye madhyaṃ sarojadṛśo dṛḍhaṃ |  1051-2 sarabhasamaho corāvūruṃ padaṃ ca pade balādgamayati jano dhanyaḥ kaścitsamāṃ śiśire niśāṃ ||1052-1 adharamadhare kaṇṭhe kaṇṭhaṃ sacāṭu dṛśordṛśāvalikamalike kṛtvā gopījanena sasaṃbhramaṃ |  1052-2 śiśuriti rudankṛṣṇo vakṣaḥsthale nihito'cirān- nibhṛtapulakaḥ smeraḥ pāyātsmarālasavigrahaḥ ||1053-1 adharamamṛtaṃ kaḥ saṃdeho madhunyapi nānyathā madhuramadhikaṃ drākṣāyāśca prasannarasaṃ phalaṃ |  1053-2 sakṛdapi punarmadhyasthaḥ sanrasāntaravijjano vadatu yadihānyatsvādu syātpriyādaśanacchadāt ||1054-1 adharasya madhurimāṇaṃ kucakāṭhinyaṃ dṛśostathā taikṣṇyaṃ |  1054-2 kavitāyāḥ paripākānanubhavarasiko vijānāti ||1055-1 adharāmṛtapānena mamāsyamaparādhyatu |  1055-2 mūrdhno kimaparāddhaṃ yaḥ pādau nāpnoti cumbituṃ ||1056-1 adharāmṛtamādhurīdhurīṇo harilīlāmuralīnināda eṣaḥ |  1056-2 pratatāna manaḥpramodamuccairhariṇīnāṃ hariṇīdṛśaṃ munīnāṃ ||1057-1 adharāmṛtena pittaṃ naśyati vāyuḥ payodharayugena |  1057-2 anavarataratena kaphaṃ tridoṣaśamanaṃ vapurnāryāḥ ||1058-1 adhareṇa samāgamādradānāṃ aruṇimnā pihito'pi śuklabhāvaḥ |  1058-2 hasitena sitena pakṣmalākṣyāḥ punarullāsamavāpa jātapakṣaḥ ||1059-1 adhareṇonnatibhājā bhujaṃgaparipīḍitena te dūti |  1059-3 saṃkṣobhitaṃ mano me jalanidhiriva mandarāgeṇa ||1060-1 adhare navavīṭikānurāgo nayane kajjalamujjvalaṃ dukūlaṃ |  1060-2 idamābharaṇaṃ nitambanīnāṃ itaradbhūṣaṇamaṅgadūṣaṇāya ||1061-1 adhare binduḥ kaṇṭhe maṇimālā stanayuge śaśaplutakaṃ |  1061-2 tava sūcayanti ketaki kusumāyudhaśāstrapaṇḍitaṃ ramaṇaṃ ||1062-1 adhare madhurā sarasvatīyaṃ nanu karṇe maṇikarṇikāpravāhaḥ |  1062-2 śirasi pratibhāti ||1075-1 adharmamanyatra mahītale'sminsaṃkṣobhahetuṃ malinaṃ vicārya |  1075-2 niṣkāsanāyāsya ruṣeva deva sitaṃ yaśaḥ sarvadiśaḥ prayāti ||1076-1 adharmarucayo mūḍhāstiryaggatiparāyaṇāḥ |  1076-2 vidhiṃ viśuddhabodhabandhurantaredhi buddhadeva naḥ ||1078-1 adharmastu mahāṃstāta bhavettasya mahīpateḥ |  1078-2 yo haredbaliṣaḍbhāgaṃ na ca rakṣati putravat ||1079-1 adharmādarjitaṃ dravyaṃ 1086-2 dṛḍhasphoṭaṃ prakurvīta ūrdhvasaṃsthānayogataḥ ||1087-1 adhastanaśvabhrabhuvo na yāti ṣaṇ- na sarvanārīṣu na sañjito'nyataḥ |  1087-2 na jāyate vyantaradevajātiṣu na bhāvanajyotiṣikeṣu 1104-2 anurodhasthiratayā na ca śakyapratāraṇaḥ ||1105-1 adhidehali hanta hemavallī śaradinduḥ sarasīruhe śayānaḥ |  1105-2 adhikhañjanacañcu mauktikālī phalitaṃ kasya sujanmanastapobhiḥ ||1106-1 1110-2 kiṃ bhaviteti saśaṅkaṃ paṅkajanayanā parāmṛśati ||1111-1 adhirajanimukhe yaḥ sāndralākṣānurāgairvyatikarita ivoccaiḥ pāṭalatvaṃ dadhānaḥ |  1111-2 uṣasi sa khalu dīpaḥ pānanirdhūtarāgaḥ śataśaḥ kokilakulaṃ ||1116-1 adhiṣṭhānaṃ samicchanti hyacalaṃ nirbale sati |  1116-2 saṃsāre sarvabhūtānāṃ tṛṇabinduvadasthire ||1117-1 adhītapañcāśugabāṇavañcane sthitā madantarbahireṣi ceduraḥ |  1117-2 smarāśugebhyo hṛdaya bibhetu na praviśya tattvanmayasapuṭe mama ||1118-1 adhītavidyairvigate śiśutve dhanorjite hāriṇi yauvane ca |  1118-2 sevyā nitambāstu vilāsinīnāṃ tatastadarthaṃ dharaṇīdharāṇāṃ ||1119-1 adhītasya ca taptasya karmaṇaḥ sukṛtasya ca |  1119-2 ṣaṣṭhaṃ bhajati bhāgaṃ tu prajā dharmeṇa pālayan ||1119-3 ṣaḍbhāgasya na bhoktāsau rakṣate na prajāḥ kathaṃ ||1120-1 adhītibodhācaraṇapracāraṇairdaśāścatasraḥ praṇayannupādhibhiḥ |  1120-2 caturdaśatvaṃ kṛtavānkutaḥ svayaṃ na vedmi vidyāsu caturdaśasvayaṃ ||1121-1 adhīte tu mahābhāṣye vyarthā sā padamañjarī |  1121-2 nādhīte tu mahābhāṣye vyarthā sā padamañjarī ||1122-1 adhītya caturo vedāndharmaśāstrāṇyanekaśaḥ |  1122-2 paraṃ tattvaṃ na jānāti darvī pākarasāniva ||1123-1 adhītya caturo vedānvyākṛtyāṣṭādaśa smṛtīḥ |  1123-2 aho śramasya vaiphalyaṃ ātmāpi kalito na cet ||1124-1 adhītya nītiṃ yasmācca nītiyukto na dṛśyate |  1124-2 anabhijñaśca sācivyaṃ gamitaḥ kena hetunā ||1125-1 adhītya vedānparisaṃstīrya cāgnīniṣṭvā yajñaiḥ pālayitvā prajāśca |  1125-2 gobrāhmaṇārthe śastrapūtāntarātmā hataḥ saṃgrame kṣatriyaḥ svargameti ||1126-1 adhītya sakalaṃ śrutaṃ ceramupāsya ghoraṃ tapo yadicchasi phalaṃ tayoraha hi lābhapūjādikaṃ |  1126-2 chinatsi tarupallavaprasarameva śūnyāśayaḥ kathaṃ samupalipsate surasamasya pakvaṃ phalaṃ |  1127-1 adhītyedaṃ yathāśāstraṃ naro jānāti brāhmaṇo'tho yajeta dadyādiyāttīrthamukhyāni caiva |  1129-2 adhyāpayedyājayeccāpi yājyānpratigrahānvā viditānpratīcchet ||1130-1 tathā rājanyo rakṣaṇaṃ vai prajānāṃ kṛtvā dharmeṇāprayatto'tha dattvā|  1130-2 yajñairiṣṭvā sarvavedānadhītya dārānkṛtvā puṇyakṛdāvasedgṛhān ||1131-1 vaiśyo'dhītya kṛṣigorakṣapaṇyairvittaṃ cinvanpālayannapramattaḥ |  1131-2 priyaṃ kurvanbrāhmaṇakṣatriyāṇāṃ dharmaśīlaḥ puṇyakṛdāvasedgṛhān ||1132-1 paricaryāṃ vandanaṃ brāhmāṇānāṃ nādhīyīta pratiṣiddho'sya yajñaḥ |  1132-2 nityotthito bhūtaye'tandritahaḥ syādeṣa smṛtaḥ śūdradharmaḥ purāṇaḥ ||1133-1 adhīraḥ karkaśaḥ stabdhaḥ kucelaḥ svayamāgataḥ |  1133-2 ete pañca na pūjyante bṛhaspatisamā yadi ||1134-1 adhīrākṣyāḥ pīnastanakalaśamāskandasi muhuḥ kramādūrudvandvaṃ kalayasi ca lāvaṇyalalitaṃ |  1134-2 bhujāśliṣṭo harṣādanubhavasi hastāhatikalāṃ idaṃ vīṇādaṇḍaṃ prakaṭaya phalaṃ kasya tapasaḥ ||1135-1 adhunā dadhimanthanānubandhaṃ kuruṣe kiṃ guruvibhramālasāṅgi |  1135-2 kalaśastani adhṛtaparipatannicolabandhaṃ muṣitanakāramavakradṛṣṭipātaṃ |  1137-2 prakaṭahasitamunnatāsyabimbaṃ purasudṛśaḥsmaraceṣṭitaṃ smarāmi ||1138-1 adhṛta yadvirahoṣmaṇi sajjitaṃ manasijena tadūruyugaṃ ||1160-1 adhyeti nṛtyati lunāti minoti nauti krīṇāti hanti vapate cinute bibheti |  1160-2 muṣṇāti gāyati dhinoti bibharti bhinte lobhena sīvyati paṇāyati yācate ca ||1161-1 adhruveṇa śarīreṇa 1216-2 yatsārabhūtaṃ tadupāsanīyaṃ haṃsairyathā kṣīramivāmbumadhyāt ||1217-1 anantaratnaprabhavasya yasya himaṃ na saubhāgyavilopi jātaṃ |  1217-2 eko hi doṣo guṇasaṃnipāte nimajjatīndoḥ kavikumudabandhoḥ kṣitipatestrilokīyaṃ kṣudrā tadiha kathamasyāḥ sthitiriti |  1221-2 mudheyaṃ vaḥ śaṅkā kalayata kiyaddarpaṇatalaṃ viśālā kiṃ tatra sphurati na kavīndrapratikṛtiḥ ||1222-1 anantodbhūtabhūtaughasaṃkule bhūtale'khile |  1222-2 śastre śāstre tricaturāścaturā yadi mādṛśāḥ ||1223-1 ananyakṣuṇṇaśrīrmalayavanajanmāyamanilo nipīya svedāmbu smaramakarasaṃbhukttavibhavaṃ |  1223-2 vidarbhāṇāṃ bhūri priyatamaparīrambharabhasa- prasaṅgādeṅgāni dviguṇapulakāsañji tanute ||1224-1 ananyaśobhābhibhaveyamākṛtirvimānanā subhru kutaḥ piturgṛhe |  1224-2 parābhimarśo na tavāsti kaḥ karaṃ prasārayetpannagaratnasūcaye ||1225-1 ananyasādhāraṇakāntikānta- tanoramuṣyāḥ kimu madhẏadeśaḥ |  1225-2 jagattrayījanmabhṛtāṃ niṣaṇṇā cittāvalīyaṃ trivalīmiṣeṇa ||1226-1 ananyasādhāraṇasaurabhānvitaṃ dadhānamatyujjvalapuṣpasaṃpadaḥ |  1226-2 na campakaṃ bhṛṅgagaṇaḥ siṣeve kathaṃ sugandhermalinātmanāṃ ratiḥ ||1227-1 ananyasāmānyatayā prasiddhastyāgīti gīto jagatītale yaḥ |  1227-2 abhūdahaṃpūrvikayā gatānāṃ atīva bhūmiḥ smaramārgaṇānāṃ ||1228-1 ananyālambanatvena prema bhāgavataṃ bhaja |  1228-2 nṛṇāṃ premeti kā mātrā prāptaṃ prema prabhoryadi ||1229-1 ananyāścintayanto māṃ ye janāḥ paryuṃpāsate |  1229-2 teṣāṃ nityābhiyuktānāṃ yogakṣemaṃ vahāmyahaṃ ||1230-1 ananyāśritacittena sevito'pi ca vāridaḥ |  1230-2 siṃñcenna cettadā manye cātakasyaiva pātakaṃ ||1231-1 anapekṣitaguruvacanā sarvāngranthīnvibhedayati samyak |  1231-2 prakaṭayati pararahasyaṃ vimarśaśakttirnijā jayati ||1232-1 anabhijñāya śāstrārthānpuruṣāḥ paśubuddhayaḥ |  1232-2 prāgalbhyādvaktumicchanti mantreṣvabhyantarīkṛtāḥ ||1233-1 anabhijño guṇānāṃ yo na bhṛtyaiḥ so'nugamyate |  1233-2 dhanāḍhyo'pi kulīno'pi kramāyāto'pi bhūpatiḥ ||1234-1 anabhidhyā parasveṣu sarvasattveṣu sauhṛdaṃ |  1234-2 karmaṇāṃ phalamastīti trividhaṃ manasā caret ||1235-1 anabhilaṣataḥ śrīlīlābje parāgavilepanaṃ tridaśakariṇaḥ pātuṃ dānapravāhamavāñchataḥ |  1235-2 tridaśasumanogandhāsaktiṃ vimuktavataḥ sakhe bata khalu śivā saṃtuṣṭasya dvirepha tava sthitiḥ ||1236-1 anabhyāsahatotsāhā pareṇa paribhūyate |  1236-2 yā lajjājananī jāḍyātkiṃ tayā mandavidyayā ||1237-1 anabhyāsahatā vidyā hato rājavirodhakṛt |  1237-2 jīvanārthaṃ hataṃ tīrthaṃ jīvanārthaṃ hataṃ vrataṃ ||1238-1 anabhyāsena vidyānāṃ asaṃsargeṇa dhīmatāṃ |  1238-2 anigraheṇa cākṣāṇāṃ jāyate vyasanaṃ nṛṇāṃ ||1239-1 anabhyāsena vedānāṃ ācārasya ca varjanāt |  1239-2 ālasyādannadoṣācca mṛtyurviprānjighāṃsati ||1240-1 anamyāsairhatā vidyā nityahāsairhatāḥ striyaḥ |  1240-2 kubījena hataṃ kṣetraṃ bhṛtyadoṣairhatā nṛpāḥ ||1241-1 anabhravṛṣṭiḥ śravaṇāmṛtasya sarasvatī vibhramajanmabhūmiḥ |  1241-2 vaidarbharītiḥ kṛtināmudeti saubhāgyalābhapratibhūḥ padānāṃ ||1242-1 anabhrevidyutaṃ dṛṣṭvā dakṣiṇāṃ diśamāśritāṃ |  1242-2 rātrāvindradhanuścāpi jīvitaṃ dvitrimāsikaṃ ||1243-1 anamrākramaṇaṃ śauryaṃ dhanaṃ nijabhujārjitaṃ bhāryā rūpānurūpā ca puruṣasyeha yujyate ||1243-2 anyathā tu kimetena rūpeṇāpi . . .1244-1 anayanapathe priye na vyathā yathā dṛśya eva duṣprāpe |  1244-2 mlānaiva kevalaṃ niśi tapanaśilā vāsare jvalati ||1245-1 anayaśca nayaścāpi daivātsaṃpadyate naraiḥ |  1245-2 tadvaśātkurute karma śubhāśubhaphalaṃ pumān ||1246-1 anayā kṛtamanyabhuktayā vasudhāgocarayā viraktayā |  1246-2 atiśāyi mahendrayoṣitāṃ vapuṣā kiṃ na tavāvarodhanaṃ ||1247-1 anayā jaghanābhogabharamantharayānayā |  1247-2 anyato'pi vrajantyā me hṛdaye nihitaṃ padaṃ ||1248-1 anayā tava rūpasīmayā kṛtasaṃskāravibodhanasya me |  1248-2 ciramapyavalokitādya sā smṛtimārūḍhavatī śucismitā ||1249-1 anayānukramaṇikayā muktāmaṇayo mayābhihitāḥ |  1249-2 ekaiko'pi hi bhāsvānkiṃ punareṣāṃ nigadyate nikaraḥ ||1250-1 anayā ratnasamṛddhyā sāgara lahalahasi kimiha laharībhiḥ |  1250-2 tvadvallabhā varākyo vahanti varṣāsu vārīṇi ||1251-1 anayā surakāmyamānayā saha yogaḥ sulabhastu na tvayā |  1251-2 ghanasaṃvṛtayāmbudāgame kumudeneva niśākaratviṣā ||1252-1 anayeneva rājyaśrīrdainyeneva manasvitā |  1252-2 mamlau sātha viṣādena padminīva himāmbhasā ||1253-1 anayoranavadyāṅgi stanayorjṛmbhamāṇayoḥ |  1253-2 avakāśo na paryāptastava bāhulatāntare ||1254-1 anayo vinayastasya vidhiryasyānuvartate |  1254-2 nayaḥ samyakprayukto'pi bhāgyahīnasya durnayaḥ ||1255-1 anarghyaṃ saundaryaṃ jagadupari mādhuryalaharī- parītaṃ saurabhyaṃ diśi diśi rasaikavyasanitā |  1255-2 iti prītyāsmābhistvayi khalu rasāle vyavasitaṃ ka evaṃ jānīte yadasi kaṭukīṭairupahataḥ ||1256-1 anarghyamapi māṇikyaṃ hemāśrayamapekṣate |  1256-2 anāśrayā na śobhante paṇḍitā vanitā latāḥ ||1257-1 anarghyalāvaṇyanidhānabhūmirna kasya lobhaṃ laṭabhā tanoti |  1257-2 avaimi puṣpāyudhayāmiko'syāṃ aviśvasanna kṣaṇameti nidrāṃ ||1258-1 anarghyāṇyapi ratnāni labhyante vibhavaiḥ sukhaṃ |  1258-2 durlabho ratnakoṭyāpi kṣaṇo'pi hi gatāyuṣaḥ ||1259-1 anarthakaṃ vipravāsaṃ gṛhebhyaḥ pāpaiḥ saṃdhiṃ paradārābhimarśaṃ |  1259-2 dambhaṃ stainyaṃ paiśunaṃ madyapānaṃ na sevate yaḥ sa sukhī sadaiva ||1260-1 anarthamakarāgārādasmātsaṃsārasāgarāt |  1260-2 uḍḍīyate nirudvegaṃ sarvatyāgena putraka ||1261-1 anarthamarthataḥ paśyannarthaṃ caivāpyanarthataḥ |  1261-2 indriyaiḥ prasṛto bālaḥ suduḥkhaṃ manyate sukhaṃ ||1262-1 anarthāṃ ścārtharūpeṇa arthāṃścānartharūpataḥ |  1262-2 arthāyaiva hi keṣāṃciddhananāśo bhavatyuta ||1263-1 anarthā hyartharūpāśca arthāścānartharūpiṇaḥ |  1263-2 bhavanti te vināśāya daivāyattasya rocate ||1264-1 anarthitarpaṇaṃ vittaṃ cittamadhyānadarpaṇaṃ |  1264-2 atīrthasarpaṇaṃ dehaṃ paryante śocyatāṃ vrajet ||1265-1 anarthitvānmanuṣyāṇāṃ bhayātparijanasya ca |  1265-2 maryādāyāmamaryādāḥ striyastiṣṭhanti bhartṛṣu ||1266-1 anarthe caiva nirataṃ arthe caiva parāṅmukhaṃ |  1266-2 na taṃ bhartāramicchanti ṣaṇḍhaṃ patimiva striyaḥ ||1267-1 anartho'pyartharūpeṇa tathārtho'nartharūpabhāk |  1267-2 utpadyate vināśāya tasmāduktaṃ parīkṣayet ||1268-1 analaṃkṛto'pi mādhava harasi mano me sadā prasabhaṃ |  1268-2 kiṃ punaralaṃkṛtastvaṃ saṃprati nakharakṣataistasyāḥ ||1269-1 analaḥ śītanāśāya viṣanāśāya gāruḍaṃ |  1269-2 viveko duḥkhanāśāya sarvanāśāya durmatiḥ ||1270-1 analaḥ salilājjātaḥ kārttikeyo'pi vahnitaḥ |  1270-2 gūḍhaṃ hi mahatāṃ janma paricchettuṃ ka īśvaraḥ ||1271-1 analasajavāpuṣpotpīḍacchavi prathamaṃ tataḥ samadayavanīgaṇḍacchāyaṃ punarmadhupiṅgalaṃ |  1271-2 tadanu ca navasvarṇādarśaprabhaṃ śaśinastatastaruṇatagarākāraṃ bimbaṃ vibhāti nabhastale ||1272-1 analastambhanavidyāṃ subhaga bhavānniyatameva jānāti |  1272-2 manmathaśarāgnitapte hṛdi me kathamanyathā vasasi ||1273-1 analpaṃ jalpantaḥ kati bata gatā no yamapuraṃ purastādasmākaṃ vidhṛtanayanā vyāttavadanāḥ |  1273-2 atītā yadyevaṃ na hi nijahitaṃ cetasi vayaṃ vahāmo hā mohādviṣayaviṣajātādavasitāḥ ||1274-1 analpaṃ saṃtāpaṃ śamayati manojanmajanitaṃ tathā śītaṃ sphītaṃ himavati niśīthe glapayati |  1274-2 tadevaṃ ko'pyūṣmā ramaṇaparirambhotsavamilat- purandhrīnīrandhrastanakalaśajanmā vijayate ||1275-1 analpacintābharamohaniścalā vilokyamānaiva karoti sādhvasaṃ |  1275-2 svabhāvaśobhānatimātrabhūṣaṇā tanustaveyaṃ bata kiṃ nu sundari ||1276-1 analpatvātpradhānatvādvaṃśasyevetare svarāḥ |  1276-2 vijigīṣornṛpatayaḥ prayānti parivāratāṃ ||1277-1 anavadyamavadyaṃ syādvāruṇīleśamātrataḥ |  1277-2 tadvacchiṣyo viruddhārthādviguroreva naśyati ||1278-1 anavaratakanakavitaraṇa- jalalavabhṛtakarataraṅgitārthitateḥ |  1278-2 bhaṇitiriva matirmatiriva ceṣṭā ceṣṭeva kīrtirativimalā ||1279-1 anavaratadhanurjyāsphālanakrūrapūrvaṃ 1280-2 mṛtyuṃjayamiva japati tvadgotraṃ virahiṇī bālā ||1281-1 anavaratanayanavigalita- jalalavaparimuṣitapattralekhāntaṃ |  1281-2 karatalaniṣaṇṇamabale vadanamidaṃ kaṃ na tāpayati ||1282-1 anavasthitacittasya na jane na vane sukhaṃ |  1285-2 jane dahati saṃsargo vane saṅgavivarjanaṃ ||1286-1 anavasthitacittānāṃ prasādo'pi bhayaṃkaraḥ |  1286-2 sarpī hanti kila snehādapatyāni na kāmakrodhaparityāgaḥ śiṣṭācāranidarśanaṃ ||1294-1 anasūyārjavaṃ śaucaṃ saṃtoṣaḥ priyavāditā |  1294-2 damaḥ satyamanāyāso na bhavanti durātmanāṃ ||1295-1 anastamitasārasya tejasastadvijṛmbhitaṃ |  1295-2 yena pāṣāṇakhaṇḍasya mūlyamalpaṃ vasuṃdharā ||1297-1 anākalitamānuṣyāḥ kṣamāsaṃsparśavarjitāḥ |  1297-2 pratibuddhairna sevyante pūrvadevavirodhinaḥ ||1298-1 anākāśe candraḥ
