anāgataṃ yaḥ kurute sa śobhate sa śocate yo na karotyanāgataṃ |  1302-2 vane vasanneva jarāmupāgato bilasya vācā na kadāpi hi śrutā ||1303-1 anāgataṃ hi budhyeta yacca kāryaṃ puraḥ sthitaṃ |  1303-2 na tu buddhikṣayātkiṃcidatikrāmetprayojanaṃ ||1304-1 anāgatavartīṃ cintāṃ kṛtvā yastu prahṛṣyati |  1304-2 sa tiraskāramāpnoti bhagnabhāṇḍo dvijo yathā ||1305-1 anāgatavatīṃ cintāṃ yo naraḥ kartumicchati |  1305-2 sa bhūmau pāṇḍuraḥ śete s_oṃaśarmapitā yathā ||1306-1 anāgatavidhātā ca pratyutpannamatiśca yaḥ |  1306-2 dvaveva sukhamedhete dīrghasūtrī vinaśyati ||1307-1 anāgatavidhātāraṃ apramattamakopanaṃ |  1307-2 sthirārambhamadīnaṃ ca naraṃ śrīrupatiṣṭhati ||1308-1 anāgatavidhānaṃ ca kartavyaṃ viṣaye nṛpaiḥ ||1308-2 āgamaścāpi kartavyastathā doṣo na jāyate ||1309-1 anāgatavidhānaṃ tu kartavyaṃ śubhamicchatā |  1309-2 āpadaṃ śaṅkamānena puruṣeṇa vipaścitā ||1310-1 anāgatopadhaṃ hiṃsraṃ durbuddhimabahuśrutaṃ |  1310-2 tyakttopāttaṃ madyapānadyūtastrīmṛgayāpriyaṃ ||1310-3 kārye mahati yuñjāno hīyate'rthapatiḥ śriyā ||1311-1 anāghrātaṃ puṣpaṃ kisalayamalūnaṃ kararuhairanāviddhaṃ ratnaṃ madhu navamanāsvāditarasaṃ |  1311-2 akhaṇḍaṃ puṇyānāṃ phalamiva ca tadrūpamanaghaṃ na jāne bhokttāraṃ kamiha samupasthāsyati vidhiḥ ||1312-1 anātapatro'pyayamatra lakṣyate sitātapatrairiva sarvato vṛtaḥ |  1312-2 acāmaro'pyeṣa sadaiva vījyate vilāsabālavyajanena ko'pyayaṃ ||1313-1 anāturotkaṇṭhitayoḥ prasidhyatā samāgamenāpi ratirna māṃ prati |  1313-2 parasparaprāptinirāśayorvaraṃ śarīranāśo'pi samānurāgayoḥ ||1314-1 anātmavānnayadveṣī vardhayannarisaṃpadaḥ |  1314-2 prāpyāpi mahadaiśvaryaṃ saha tena vinaśyati ||1315-1 anāthānāṃ daridrāṇāṃ bālavṛddhatapasvināṃ |  1315-2 anyāyaparibhūtānāṃ sarveṣāṃ pārthivo gatiḥ ||1316-1 anāthānāṃ nātho gatiragatikānāṃ vyasanināṃ vinetā bhītānāmabhayamadhṛtīnāṃ bharavaśaḥ |  1316-2 suhṛdbandhuḥ svāmī śaraṇamupakārī varaguruḥ pitā mātā bhrātā jagati puruṣo yaḥ sa nṛpatiḥ ||1317-1 anāthānrogiṇo yaśca putravatparipālayet |  1317-2 guruṇā samanujñātaḥ sa bhiṣakcchabdamaśnute ||1318-1 anādaraparo vidvānīhamānaḥ sthirāṃ śriyaṃ |  1318-2 agneḥ śeṣamṛṇāccheṣaṃ śatroḥ śeṣaṃ na śeṣayet ||1319-1 anādarahatāṃ sevāṃ dāmpatyaṃ premavarjitaṃ |  1319-2 maitrīṃ ca hetusāpekṣāṃ ce tanā nādhikurvate ||1320-1 anādarālokavivṛddhaśokaḥ pituḥ priyāvākyavaśaṃgatasya |  1320-2 auttānapādirjagatāṃ śaraṇyaṃ ārādhya viṣṇuṃ padamagryamāyāt ||1321-1 anādāyī vyayaṃ kuryādasahāyī raṇapriyaḥ |  1321-2 āturaḥ sarvabhakṣī ca naraḥ śīghraṃvinaśyati ||1322-1 anādidhāvisvaparaṃparāyā hetusrajaḥ srotasi veśvare vā |  1322-2 āyattadhīreṣa janastadāryāḥ kimīdṛśaḥ paryanuyogayogyaḥ ||1323-1 anādiṣṭopi bhūpasya dṛṣṭvā hānikaraṃ ca yaḥ |  1323-2 yatate tasya nāśāya sa bhṛtyo'rho mahībhujāṃ ||1324-1 anādṛtyaucityaṃ hriyamavigaṇayyātimahatīṃ yadetasyāpyarthe dhanalavadurāśātaralitāḥ |  1324-2 alīkāhaṃkārajvarakuṭilitabhrūṇi dhanināṃ mukhāni prekṣyante dhigidamatiduṣpūramudaraṃ ||1325-1 anādeyaṃ nādadīta parikṣīṇo'pi pārthivaḥ |  1325-2 na cādeyaṃ samṛddho'pi sūkṣmamapyarthamutsṛjet ||1326-1 anādeyasya cādānādādeyasya ca varjanāt |  1326-2 daurbalyaṃ khyāpyate rājñaḥ sa pretyeha ca naśyati ||1327-1 anādyantā tu sā tṛṣṇā antardehagatā nṛṇāṃ |  1327-2 vināśayati saṃbhūtā ayonija ivānalaḥ ||1328-1 anāptapuṇyopacayairdurāpā phalasya nirdhūtarajāḥ savitrī |  1328-2 tulyā bhavaddarśanasaṃpadeṣā vṛṣṭerdivo vītabalāhakāyāḥ ||1329-1 anāmnāyamalā vedā brāhmaṇasyāvrataṃ malaṃ |  1329-2 malaṃ pṛthivyā vāhīkāḥ puruṣasyānṛtaṃ malaṃ ||1330-1 anāyakā vinaśyanti naśyanti bahunāyakāḥ |  1330-2 strīnāyakā vinaśyanti naśyanti śiśunāyakāḥ ||1331-1 anāyake na vastavyaṃ na vasedbahunāyake |  1331-2 strīnāyake na vastavyaṃ na vasedbālanāyake ||1332-1 anāyavyayakartā ca anāthaḥ kalahapriyaḥ |  1332-2 āturaḥ sarvabhakṣī ca naraḥ śīghraṃ vinaśyati ||1333-1 anāyāsakṛśaṃ madhyaṃ aśaṅkatarale dṛśau |  1333-2 abhūṣaṇamanohāri vapurvayasi subhruvaḥ ||1334-1 anāyi deśaḥ katamastvayādya vasantamuktasya daśāṃ vanasya |  1334-2 tvadāptasaṃketatayā kṛtārthā śravyāpi nānena janena saṃjñā ||1335-1 anārataṃ tena padeṣu lambhitā vibhajya samyagviniyogasatkriyāḥ |  1335-2 phalantyupāyāḥ paribṛṃhitāyatīrupetya saṃgharṣamivārthasaṃpadaḥ ||1336-1 anārataṃ pratidiśaṃ pratideśaṃ jale sthale |  1336-2 jāyante ca mriyante ca budbudā iva vāriṇi ||1337-1 anāratapariskhalannayanavāridhārāśata- pravṛddhapathanimnagāsalilaruddhayānodyamā|  1337-2 tvadīyaripukāminī bahuvideśayānaiṣiṇī vinindati valaddṛśā gururuṣāśrupaṃ prāvṛṣaṃ ||1338-1 anārabdhākṣepaṃ paramakṛtavāṣpavyatikaraṃ nigūḍhāntastāpaṃ hṛdayavinipītaṃ vyavasitaṃ |  1338-2 kṛśāṅgyā yatpāpe vrajati mayi nairāśyapiśunaṃ ślathairaṅgairuktaṃ hṛdayamidamunmūlayati tat ||1339-1 anārabhyā bhavantyarthāḥ kecinnityaṃ tathāgatāḥ |  1339-2 kṛtaḥ puruṣakāro'pi bhavedyeṣu nirarthakaḥ ||1340-1 anārambhastu kāryāṇāṃ prathamaṃ buddhilakṣaṇaṃ |  1340-2 ārabdhasyāntagamanaṃ dvitīyaṃ buddhilakṣaṇaṃ ||1341-1 anārādhya kālīmanāsvādya gauḍī- mṛte mantratantrādvinā śabdacauryāt |  1341-2 prabandhaṃ pragalbhaṃ prakartuṃ pravaktuṃ viriñciprapañce madanyaḥ kaviḥ kaḥ ||1342-1 anārogyamanāyuṣyaṃ asvargyaṃ cātibhojanaṃ |  1342-2 apuṇyaṃ lokavidviṣṭaṃ tasmāttatparivarjayet ||1343-1 anāryatā niṣṭhuratā krūratā niṣkriyātmatā |  1343-2 puruṣaṃ vyañjayantīha loke kaluṣayonijaṃ ||1344-1 anāryaprajñānāmiha janavadhūnāṃ hi manaso mahāśalyaṃ karṇe tava kanakajambūkisalayaḥ |  1344-2 bhramanbhikṣāhetoradhinagari buddho'si na mayā?tvayaitāvadveṣaḥ pathika na vidheyaḥ punarapi ||1345-1 anāryamapyācaritaṃ kumāryā bhavānmama kṣāmyatu s_oṃya tāvat |  1345-2 haṃso'pi devāṃśatayāsi vandyaḥ śrīvatsalakṣmeva hi matsyamūrtiḥ ||1346-1 anāryavṛttamaprājñaṃ asūyakamadhārmikaṃ |  1346-2 anarthāḥ kṣipramāyānti vāgduṣṭaṃ krodhanaṃ tathā ||1347-1 anāryeṇa kṛtaghnena saṃgatirme na yujyate |  1347-2 vināśamapi kāṅkṣanti jñātīnāṃ jñātayaḥ sadā ||1348-1 anālokya vyayaṃ karttā anāthaḥ kalahapriyaḥ |  1348-2 āturaḥ sarvakṣetreṣu naraḥ śīghraṃ vinaśyati ||1349-1 anālocya premṇaḥ pariṇatimanādṛtya suhṛdastvayākāṇḍe mānaḥ kimiti sarale saṃprati kṛtaḥ |  1349-2 samākṛṣṭā hyete pralayadahanodbhāsuraśikhāḥ svahastenāṅgārāstadalamadhunāraṇyaruditaiḥ ||1350-1 anāvartī kālo vrajati sa vṛthā tanna gaṇitaṃ daśāstāstāḥ soḍhā vyasanaśatasaṃpātavidhurāḥ |  1350-2 kiyadvā vakṣyāmaḥ kimiva bata nātmanyupakṛtaṃ vayaṃ yāvattāvatpunarapi tadeva vyavasitaṃ ||1351-1 anāvarjitacittāpi dhruvaṃ sarvānpradhāvati |  1351-2 phalaṃ na labhate kiṃcittṛṣṇā jīrṇeva kāminī ||1352-1 anāvilaṃ phalaṃ bhuṅkte viṣayāṇāmanutsukaḥ |  1352-2 utsuko labdharokeṇa tatra śokena śīryate ||1353-1 anāvṛtanavadvārapañjare vihagānilaḥ |  1353-2 yattiṣṭhati tadāścaryaṃ viyoge tasya kā kathā ||1354-1 anāvṛtāḥ svavarṇeṣu sarvasādhāraṇāḥ purā |  1354-2 nāryo babhūvurnirvairo yataḥ sarvo'bhavajjanaḥ ||1355-1 anāvṛṣṭihate deśe sasye ca pralayaṃ gate |  1355-2 dhanyāstāta na paśyanti deśabhaṅgaṃ kulakṣayaṃ ||1356-1 anāśritā dānapuṇyaṃ vedapuṇyamanāśritāḥ |  1356-2 rāgadveṣavinirmuktā vicarantīha mokṣiṇaḥ ||1357-1 anāśrite dṛptagurau avajñāṃ kalayennṛpaḥ |  1357-2 saṃvartena maruttastu nirastamakarodguruṃ ||1358-1 anāsthā vastūnāmabhimataguṇānāmupahṛtau ghano garvastanvyā ruṣi ca vihitāḍambaravidhiḥ |  1358-2 prahāraḥ pādābhyāṃ yamanamapi kāñcyā caraṇayoḥ priyāyā vibbokaṃ tadidamiti dhanyo'nubhavati ||1359-1 anāsvāditasaṃbhogāḥ patantu tava śatravaḥ |  1359-2 bālavaidhavyadagdhānāṃ kulastrīṇāṃ stanā iva ||1360-1 anāsvādyamavikreyaṃ anādeyamanīpsitaṃ |  1360-2 dattaṃ nirupakāraṃ yadvandhyadānena tena kiṃ ||1361-1 anāhitāgniḥ śatagurayajvā ca sahsraguḥ |  1361-2 surāpo vṛṣalībhartā braḥmahā gurutalpagaḥ ||1362-1 asatpratigrahe yukttaḥ stenaḥ kutsitayājakaḥ |  1362-2 adoṣastyaktumanyonyaṃ karmasaṃkaraniścayāt ||1363-1 anāhūtaḥ praviśati apṛṣṭo bahu bhāṣate |  1363-2 viśvasityapramatteṣu mūḍhacetā narādhamaḥ ||1363ā-1 anāhūtaḥ samāyātaḥ anāpṛṣṭastu bhāṣate |  1363ā-2 paranindātmanaḥ stutiścatvāri laghulakṣaṇaṃ ||1364-1 anāhūtapraviṣṭasya dṛṣṭasya kruddhacakṣuṣā |  1364-2 svayamevopaviṣṭasya varaṃ mṛtyurna bhojanaṃ ||1365-1 anahūtāḥ svayaṃ yānti rasāsvādavilolupāḥ |  1365-2 nivāritā na gacchanti makṣikā iva bhikṣukāḥ ||1366-1 anāhūto viśedyastu apṛṣṭo bahu bhāṣate |  1366-2 ātmānaṃ manyate prītaṃ bhūpālasya sa durmatiḥ ||1367-1 anāhvāne praveśaśca apṛṣṭe paribhāṣaṇaṃ |  1367-2 ātmastutiḥ pare nindā catvāri laghulakṣaṇaṃ ||1368-1 anicchato'pi duḥkhāni yathehāyānti dehinaḥ |  1368-2 sukhānyapi tathā manye cintādainyena ko guṇaḥ ||1369-1 aniḥsarantīmapi gehagarbhātkīrtiṃ pareṣāmasatīṃ vadanti |  1369-2 svairaṃ bhramantīmapi ca trilokyāṃ tvatkīrtimāhuḥ kavayaḥ satīṃ tu ||1370-1 anicchanto'pi vinayaṃ vidyābhyāsena bālakāḥ |  1370-2 bheṣajeneva nairujyaṃ prāpaṇīyāḥ prayatnataḥ ||1371-1 anicchannapi cittena videśastho'pi mānavaḥ |  1371-2 svakarmotpātavātena nīyate yatra tatphalaṃ ||1372-1 anijyayā vivāhaiśca vedasyotsādanena ca |  1372-2 kulānyakulatāṃ yānti dharmasyātikrameṇa ca ||1373-1 anityaṃ nisrāṇaṃ jananamaraṇavyādhikalitaṃ jaganmithyātvārthairahamahamikāliṅgitamidaṃ |  1373-2 vicintyaivaṃ santo vimalamanaso dharmamatayastapaḥ kartuṃ vṛttāstadapasṛtaye jainamanaghaṃ ||1374-1 anityaṃ yauvanaṃ rūpaṃ jīvitaṃ dravyasaṃcayaḥ |  1374-2 aiśvaryaṃ priyasaṃvāso gṛdhyedeṣu na paṇḍitaḥ ||1375-1 anityatāsamākhyānaṃ viṣayādiviḍambanaṃ |  1375-2 paścāttāpasya kathanaṃ kālasya caritaṃ tathā ||1376-1 anityate jagannindye vandanīyāsi saṃprati |  1376-2 yā karoṣi prasaṅgena duḥkhānāmapyanityatāṃ ||1377-1 anityatve kṛtamatirmlānamālyena śocati |  1377-2 nityatve kṛtabuddhistu bhinnabhāṇḍe'nuśocati ||1378-1 anityamiti jānanto na bhavanti bhavanti ca |  1378-2 atha yenaiva kurvanti naiva jātu bhavanti te ||1379-1 anityasya śarīrasya sarvadoṣamayasya ca |  1379-2 durgandhasya ca rakṣārthaṃ nāhaṃ pāpaṃ kar_oṃi vai ||1380-1 anityāni śarīrāṇi vibhavo naiva śāśvataḥ |  1380-2 nityaṃ saṃnihito mṛtyuḥ kartavyo dharmasaṃgrahaḥ ||1381-1 anitye priyasaṃvāse saṃsāre cakravadgatau |  1381-2 pathi saṃgatamevaitadbhrātā mātā pitā sakhā ||1382-1 anityo vijayo yasmāddṛśyate yudhyamānayoḥ |  1382-2 parājayaśca saṃgrāme tasmādyuddhaṃ vivarjayet ||1383-1 anidro duḥsvapnaḥ prapatanamanadri drumataṭaṃ jarāhīnaḥ kampastimirarahitastrāsasamayaḥ |  1383-2 anāghātaṃ duḥkhaṃ vigatanigaḍo bandhanavidhiḥ sajīvaṃ jantūnāṃ maraṇamavanīśāśrayarasaḥ ||1384-1 anidhāya mukhe patraṃ pūgaṃ khādati yo naraḥ |  1384-2 saptajanmadaridratvaṃ ante viṣṇusthitiśca na ||1385-1 anindā parakṛtyeṣu svadharmaparipālanaṃ |  1385-2 kṛpaṇeṣu dayālutvaṃ sarvatra madhurā giraḥ ||1386-1 prāṇairapyupakāritvaṃ mitrāyāvyabhicāriṇe |  1386-2 gṛhāgate pariṣvaṅgaḥ śaktyā dānaṃ sahiṣṇutā ||1387-1 bandhubhirbaddhasaṃyogaḥ sujane caturaśratā |  1387-2 taccittānuvidhāyitvaṃ iti vṛttaṃ mahātmanāṃ ||1388-1 anindyamapi nindanti stuvantyastutyamuccakaiḥ |  1388-2 svāpateyakṛte martyāḥ kiṃ kiṃ nāma na kurvate ||1389-1 anibandhanakacabandhanaṃ anidānaṃ dānamuttarīyasya |  1389-2 ākasmikamandasmitaṃ apahastayatīva bālyametasyāḥ ||1390-1 anibhālita eva kevalaṃ khanigarbhe nidhireṣa jīryatu |  1390-2 na tu sīdatu mūlyahānito vaṇijālokanagocarīkṛtaḥ ||1391-1 animiṣamavirāmā rāgiṇāṃ sarvarātraṃ navanidhuvanalīlāḥ kautukenātivīkṣya|  1391-2 idamudavasitānāmasphuṭālokasaṃpannayanamiva sanidraṃ ghūrṇate daipamarciḥ ||1392-1 aniyataruditasmitaṃ virājat- katipayak_oṃaladantakuḍmalāgraṃ |  1392-2 vadanakamalakaṃ śiśoḥ smarāmi skhaladasamañjasamugdhajalpitaṃ te ||1393-1 aniyuktā hi sācivye yadvadanti manīṣiṇaḥ |  1393-2 anurāgadravasyaitāḥ praṇayasyātibhūmayaḥ ||1394-1 anirākṛtatāpasaṃpadaṃ phalahīnāṃ sumanobhirujjhitāṃ |  1394-2 khalatāṃ khalanāmivāsatīṃ pratipadyeta kathaṃ budho janaḥ ||1395-1 anirīkṣaṇameva dṛṣṭirārdrā parihāsālapanāni maunameva |  1395-2 avadhīraṇameva cābhiyogo vinigūḍho'pi hi lakṣyate'nurāgaḥ ||1396-1 anirghātaṃ dhārādharamaśamanīyaṃ nidhirapāṃ akāṭhinyaṃ cintāmaṇimajaḍabhūtaṃ surataruṃ |  1396-2 abhittvopādāya prabhurapaśuvṛttiṃ ca surabhiṃ parārthaikasvārthānakṛta puruṣānādipuruṣaḥ ||1397-1 anirjayena dviṣatāṃ yasyāmarṣaḥ praśāmyati |  1397-2 puruṣoktiḥ kathaṃ tasminbrūhi tvaṃ hi tapodhana ||1398-1 kṛtaṃ puruṣaśabdena jātimātrāvalambinā |  1398-2 yo'ṅgīkṛtaguṇaiḥ ślādhyaḥ savismayamudāhṛtaḥ ||1399-1 grasamānamivaujāṃsi sadasā gauraveritaṃ |  1399-2 nāma yasyābhinanadanti dviṣo'pi sa pumānpumān ||1400-1 anirdayopabhogasya rūpasya mṛdunaḥ kathaṃ |  1400-2 kaṭhinaṃ khalu te cetaḥ śirīṣasyeva bandhanaṃ ||1401-1 anirloḍitakāryasya vāgjālaṃ vāgmino vṛthā |  1401-2 nimittādaparāddheṣordhānuṣkasyeva valgitaṃ ||1402-1 anirvācyamanirbhinnaṃ aparicchinnamavyayaṃ |  1402-2 brahmeva sujanaprema duḥkhamūlanikṛntanaṃ ||1403-1 anirvṛtaṃ tathā mandaṃ paralokaparāṅmukhaṃ |  1403-2 narakāya na sadgatyaṃ kuputrālambijanma vai ||1404-1 anirvedaḥ śriyo mūlaṃ cañcurme lohasaṃnibhā |  1404-2 ahorātrāṇi dīrghāṇi samudraḥ kiṃ na śuṣyati ||1405-1 anirvedaḥ śriyo mūlaṃ duḥkhanāśe sukhasya ca |  1405-2 mahānbhavatyanirviṇṇaḥ sukhaṃ cātyantamaśnute ||1406-1 anirvedaḥ śriyo mūlaṃ anirvedaḥ paraṃ sukhaṃ |  1406-2 anirvedo hi satataṃ sarvārtheṣu pravartakaḥ ||1407-1 anirvedo hi satataṃ sarvārtheṣu pravartakaḥ |  1407-2 karoti saphalaṃ jantoḥ karma yacca karoti saḥ ||1408-1 anila nikhilaviśvaṃ prāṇiti tvatprayuktaṃ sapadi ca vinimīlatyākulaṃ tvadviyogāt |  1408-2 vapurasi parameśasyācitaṃ nocitaṃ te surabhimasurabhiṃ vā yatsamaṃ svīkaroṣi||1409-1 aniśaṃ nayanābhirāmayā ramayā saṃmadino mukhasya te |  1409-2 niśi niḥsaradindiraṃ kathaṃ tulayāmaḥ kalayāpi paṅkajaṃ ||1410-1 aniśaṃ mataṅgajānāṃ bṛṃhitamākarṇyate yathā vipine |  1410-2 manye tathā na jīvati gajendrapalakavalanaḥ siṃhaḥ ||1411-1 aniśamapi makaraketurmanaso rujamāvahannabhimato me |  1411-2 yadi madirāyatanayanāṃ tāmadhikṛtya praharatīti ||1412-1 aniścitairadhyavasāyabhīrubhiryatheṣṭasaṃlāparatiprayojanaiḥ |  1412-2 phale visaṃvādamupāgatā giraḥ prayānti loke parihāsavastutāṃ ||1413-1 aniṣṭaḥ kanyakāyā yo varo rūpānvito'pi yaḥ |  1413-2 yadi syāttasya no deyā kanyā śreyo'bhivāñchatā ||1414-1 aniṣṭadaḥ kṣitīśānāṃ bhūkampaḥ saṃdhyayordvayoḥ |  1414-2 digdāhaḥ pītavarṇatvādrājñāṃ cāniṣṭadaḥ paraḥ ||1415-1 aniṣṭayogātpriyaviprayogataḥ parāpamānāddhanahīnajīvitāt |  1415-2 anekajanmavyasanaprabandhato bibheti no yastapaso bibheti saḥ ||1416-1 aniṣṭasamprayogācca viprayogātpriyasya ca |  1416-2 mānuṣā mānasairduḥkhairyujyante alpabuddhayaḥ ||1417-1 aniṣṭādiṣṭalābhe'pi na gatirjāyate śubhā |  1417-2 yatrāste viṣasaṃsargo'mṛtaṃ tadapi mṛtyave ||1418-1 aniṣpannāmapi kriyāṃ nayopetāṃ vicakṣaṇāḥ |  1418-2 phaladāṃ hi prakurvanti mahāsenāpatiryathā ||1419-1 anīrṣyāḥ śrotāro mama vacasi cedvacmi tadahaṃ svapakṣādbhetavyaṃ bahu na tu viprapakṣātprabhavataḥ |  1419-2 tamasyākrāntaśe kiyadapi hi tejovayavinaḥ svaśaktyā bhāsante divasakṛti satyeva na punaḥ ||1420-1 anīrṣyurguptadāraḥ syāccokṣaḥ syādaghṛṇī nṛpaḥ |  1420-2 striyaṃ seveta nātyarthaṃ mṛṣṭaṃ muñjīta nāhitaṃ ||1421-1 anīrṣyurguptadāraḥ syātsaṃvibhāgī priyaṃvadaḥ |  1421-2 ślakṣṇo madhuravākstrīṇāṃ na cāsāṃ vaśago bhavet ||1422-1 anīśāya śarīrasya hṛdayaṃ svavaśaṃ mayi |  1422-2 stanakampakriyālakṣyairnyastaṃ niḥśvasitairiva ||1423-1 anīśvaro'yaṃ puruṣo bhavābhave sūtraprotā dārumayīva yoṣā |  1423-2 dhātrā tu diṣṭasya vaśe kilāyaṃ tasmādvada tvaṃ śravaṇe dhrto'haṃ ||1424-1 anukartumapahnotuṃ ativartitumīkṣituṃ |  1424-2 aśakye tejasāṃ patyau mitratānumatikṣamā ||1425-1 anukurutaḥ khalasujanāvagrimapāścātyabhāgayoḥ sūcyāḥ |  1425-2 vidadhāti randhrameko guṇavānanyastvapidadhāti ||1426-1 anukūlakalatro yastasya svarga ihaiva hi |  1426-2 pratikūlakalatrasya narako nātra saṃśayaḥ ||1427-1 anukūlamarthyamavirodhi hitaṃ śravaṇīyamāgamarahasyayutaṃ |  1427-2 vacanaṃ madīyamapakarṇayati kva manobhavaḥ kva guṇasaṃgrahaṇaṃ ||1428-1 anukūlavarapuraṃdhriṣu puruṣāṇāṃ baddhamūlarāgāṇāṃ |  1428-2 nayati mano duḥśīlaḥ kusumāstro hīnapātreṣu ||1429-1 anukūlavidhāyidaivato vijayī syānnanu kīdṛśo nṛpaḥ |  1429-2 virahiṇyapi jānakī vane nivasantī mudamādadhau kutaḥ ||1430-1 anukūlāṃ vimalāṅgīṃ kulajāṃ kuśalāṃ suśīlasaṃpannāṃ |  1430-2 pañcalakārāṃ bhāryāṃ puruṣaḥ puṇyodayāllabhate ||1431-1 anukūlā sadā tuṣṭā dakṣā sādhvī vicakṣaṇā |  1431-2 ebhireva guṇairyuktā śrīriva strī na saṃśayaḥ ||1432-1 anukūle vidhau deyaṃ yataḥ pūrayitā hariḥ |  1432-2 pratikūle vidhau deyaṃ yataḥ sarvaṃ hariṣyati ||1433-1 anukūle sati dhātari bhavatyaniṣṭādapīṣṭamavilambaṃ |  1433-2 pītvā viṣamapi śaṃbhurmṛtyuṃjayatāmavāpa tatkālaṃ ||1434-1 anukṛtagaṇḍaśailamadamaṇḍitagaṇḍataṭa- bhramadalimaṇḍalīniviḍaguṅgumaghoṣajuṣaḥ |  1434-2 dalayati helayaiva harirugrakarānkariṇa- strijagati teja eva guru no vikṛtākṛtitā ||1435-1 anukṣaṇamanukṣaṇaṃ kṣitipa rakṣyamāṇā tvayā prayāti vidiśo daśa prabalakīrtirekākinī |  1435-2 iyaṃ niyatamarthiṣu pratidinaṃ vitīrṇā ramā jahāti na tavāntikaṃ dvitayametadatyadbhutaṃ ||1436-1 anugataparitoṣitānujīvī madhuravacāścaritānuraktalokaḥ |  1436-2 sunipuṇaparamāptasaktatantro bhavati ciraṃ nṛpatiḥ pradīptaraśmiḥ ||1437-1 anugantuṃ satāṃ vartma kṛtsnaṃ yadi na śakyate |  1437-2 svalpamapyanugantavyaṃ mārgastho nāvasīdati ||1438-1 anugamya śmaśānāntaṃ nivartantīha bāndhavāḥ |  1438-2 agnau prakṣipya puruṣaṃ jñātayaḥ suhṛdastathā ||1439-1 anugṛhāṇa śiśūnabhilaṅghitā śabaravārivihāravanasthalī |  1439-2 visṛja kātaratāmidamagrato harini kāruṇikasya tapovanaṃ ||1440-1 anugrahavidhau devyā mātuśca mahdantaraṃ |  1440-2 mātā gāḍhaṃ nibadhnāti bandhaṃ devī nikṛntati ||1441-1 anugrahādeva divaukasāṃ naro nirasya mānuṣyakameti divyatāṃ |  1441-2 ayovikāre svaritatvamiṣyate kuto'yasāṃ siddharasaspṛśāmapi ||1442-1 anucarati śaśāṅkaṃ rāhudoṣe'pi tārā patati na vanavṛkṣe yāti bhūmiṃ latā ca |  1442-2 tyjati na ca kareṇuḥ paṅkalagnaṃ gajendraṃ vrajatu caratu dharmaṃ bhartṛnāthā hi nāryaḥ ||1443-1 anucitakarmārambhaḥ svajanavirodho balīyasā spardhā |  1443-2 pramadājanaviśvāso mṛtyordvārāṇi catvāri ||1444-1 anucitaphalābhilāṣī nityaṃ vidhinā nivāryate puruṣaḥ |  1444-2 drākṣāvipākasamaye mukhapāko bhavati kākānāṃ ||1445-1 anucitamucitaṃ vā karma ko'yaṃ vibhāgo bhagavati paramāstāṃ bhaktiyogo draḍhīyān |  1445-2 kirati viṣamahīndraḥ sāndrapīyūṣamindurdvayamapi sa maheśo nirviśeṣaṃ bibharti ||1446-1 anucitamevācaritaṃ paśupatinā yadvidheḥ śiraśchinnaṃ |  1446-2 chinno na cāsya hasto yenāyaṃ durlipiṃ likhati ||1447-1 anucite yadi karmaṇi yujyate śaṭhadhiyā prabhuṇā saguṇo janaḥ |  1447-2 bhavati nāsya guṇāpacayastataḥ padagatasya kirīṭamaṇeriva ||1448-1 anuccanīcacalatāṃ aṅgānāṃ calapādatāṃ |  1448-2 kaṭikūrparaśīrṣāṃśakarṇānāṃ samarūpatāṃ ||1449-1 ramyāṃ pratīkaviśrāntiṃ urasaśca samunnatiṃ |  1449-2 abhyāsābhyarhitaṃ prāhuḥ sauṣṭhavaṃ nṛtyavedinaḥ ||1450-1 anucchiṣṭo devairaparidalito rāhudaśanaiḥ kalaṅkenāspṛṣṭo na khalu paribhūto dinakṛtā |  1450-2 kuhūbhirno lupto na ca yuvativaktreṇa vijitaḥ kalānāthaḥ ko'yaṃ kanakalatikāyāmudayate ||1451-1 anujaguratha divyaṃ dundubhidhvānamāśāḥ surakusumanipātairvy_oṃni lakṣmīrvitene |  1451-2 priyamiva kathayiṣyannāliliṅga sphurantīṃ bhuvamanibhṛtavelāvīcibāhuḥ payodhiḥ ||1452-1 anujjhitasuhṛdbhāvaḥ suhṛdāṃ durhṛdāmapi |  1452-2 sama ityeva bhāvyo'pi nama ityabhibhāṣyate ||1453-1 anutkīrṇā yathā paṅke putrikā vātha dāruṇi |  1453-2 varṇā yathā maṣīkalke tathā sarge sthitāḥ pare ||1454-1 anuttamānubhāvasya parairapihitaujasaḥ |  1454-2 akāryasuhṛdo'smākaṃ apūrvāstava kīrtayaḥ ||1455-1 anutthāne dhruvo nāśaḥ prāptasyānāgatasya ca |  1455-2 prāpyate phalamutthānāllabhate cārthasaṃpadaṃ ||1456-1 anu tvā tāta jīvantu suhṛdaḥ sādhubhiḥ saha |  1456-2 parjanyamiva bhūtāni svādudrumamivāṇḍajāḥ ||1457-1 anutsūtrapadanyāsā sadvṛttiḥ sannibandhanā |  1457-2 śabdavidyeva no bhāti rājanītirapaspaśā ||1458-1 anuditasaṭāvaṃsau nātisphuṭāḥ karajāṅkurā daśanamukulodbhedaḥ stoko mukhe mṛdu garjitaṃ |  1458-2 mṛgapatiśiśornāstyadyāpi kriyā svakulocitā madakṛtamahāgandhasyāndhyaṃ vyapohati dantināṃ ||1459-1 anudinamatitīvraṃ rodiṣīti tvamuccaiḥ sakhi kila kuruṣe tvaṃ vācyatāṃ me mudhaiva |  1459-2 hṛdayamidamanaṅgāṅgārasaṅgādvilīya prasarati bahirambhaḥ susthite naitadaśru ||1460-1 anudinamadhikaṃ te kampate kāyavallī śiva śiva nayanāntaṃ nāśrudhārā jahāti|  1460-2 kathaya kathaya ko'yaṃ yatkṛte k_oṃalāṅgi tyajati na pariṇaddhaṃ pāṇḍimānaṃ kapolaḥ ||1461-1 anudinamanukūlamācarantaṃ vihitamatiḥ pratikūlamācaretkaḥ |  1461-2 śamitagaralajātakaṇṭhadāhaṃ śitikaṇṭhaḥ śaśinaṃ śirahsu dhatte ||1462-1 anudunamanuraktaḥ padminīcakravāle navaparimalamādyaccañcarīkānukarṣī |  1462-2 kalitamadhurapadmaḥ ko'pi gambhīravedī jayati mihirakanyākūlavanyākarīndraḥ||1463-1 anudinamabhyāsadṛḍhaiḥ soḍhuṃ dīrgho'pi śakyate virahaḥ |  1463-2 pratyāsannasamāga ma- muhūrtavighno'pi durviṣaḥ ||1464-1 anudehamāgatavataḥ pratimāṃ pariṇāyakasya gurumudvahatā |  1464-2 mukureṇa vepathubhṛto'tibharātkathamapyapāti na vadhūkarataḥ ||1465-1 anudghuṣṭaḥ śabdairatha ca ghaṭanātaḥ sphuṭarasaḥ padānāmarthātmā ramayati na tūttānitarasaḥ |  1465-2 yathā dṛśyaḥ kiṃcitpavanacalacīnāṃśukatayā stanābhogaḥ strīṇāṃ harati na tathonmudritatanuḥ ||1466-1 anunayagurorgoṣṭhībandho mukhāsavasaṃpadāṃ śapathavivaraṃ visrabdhānāṃ dhiyāṃ prathamātithiḥ |  1466-2 avinayavacovādasthānaṃ puraṃdhriṣu paprathe madavilasitasyaikācāryaściraṃ rativibhramaḥ ||1467-1 anunayati patiṃ na lajjamānā kathayati nāpi sakhījanāya kiṃcit |  1467-2 prasarati malayānile navoḍhā vahati paraṃtu cirāya śūnyamantaḥ ||1468-1 anunayamagṛhītvā vyājasuptā parācī rutamatha kṛkavākostāramākarṇya kalye |  1468-2 kathamapi parivṛttā nidrayāndhā kila strī mukulitanayanaivāśliṣyati prāṇanāthaṃ ||1469-1 anunetuṃ māninyā dayitaścaraṇe sarāgacaraṇāyāḥ |  1469-2 yāvatpatitaḥ sa tayā tatkṣaṇamavadhīritaḥ kasmāt ||1470-1 anupāyena karmāṇi viparītāni yāni ca kriyamāṇāni duṣyanti havīṃṣyaprayateṣviva ||1471-1 anupālayatāmudeṣyatīṃ prabhuśaktiṃ dviṣatāmanīhayā |  1471-2 apayāntyacirānmahībhujāṃ jananirvādabhayādiva śriyaḥ ||1472-1 anupoṣya trirātrāṇi tirthānyanabhigamya ca |  1472-2 adattvā kāñcanaṃ gāśca daridro nāma jāyate ||1473-1 anuprāsini sandarbhe gonandanasamaḥ kutaḥ |  1473-2 yathārthanāmataivāsya yadvā vadati cārutāṃ ||1474-1 anubandhaṃ kṣayaṃ hiṃsāṃ anapekṣya ca pauruṣaṃ |  1474-2 mohādārabhyate karma yattattāmasamucyate ||1475-1 anubandhaṃ ca saṃprekṣya vipākāṃścaiva karmaṇāṃ |  1475-2 utthānamātmanaścaiva dhīraḥ kurvīta vā na vā ||1476-1 anubandhānavekṣeta sānubandheṣu karmasu |  1476-2 saṃpradhārya ca kurvīta na vegena samācaret ||1477-1 anubhavaṃ vadanendurupāgamanniyatameṣa yadasya mahātmanaḥ |  1477-2 kṣubhitamutkalikātaralaṃ manaḥ paya iva stimitasya mahodadheḥ ||1478-1 anubhavata dadata vittaṃ mānyānmānayata sajjanānbhajata |  1478-2 atiparuṣapavanavilulita- dīpaśikhācañcalā lakṣmīḥ ||1479-1 anubhavata yuvatyo bhāgyavatyo nitāntaṃ kusumavalayavelāsaṅgakhelāsukhāni |  1479-2 mama tu madhukarāṇāṃ vāṭapāṭaccarāṇāṃ sapadi patati dhāṭī puṣpavāṭīniveśe ||1480-1 anubhavannavadolamṛtūtsavaṃ paṭurapi priyakaṇṭhajighṛkṣayā |  1480-2 anyadāsanarajjuparigrahe bhujalatāṃ jalatāmabalājanaḥ ||1481-1 anubhāvavatā guru sthiratvādavisaṃvādi dhanurdhanaṃjayena |  1481-2 svabalavyasane'pi pīḍyamānaṃ guṇavanmitramivānatiṃ prapede ||1482-1 anubhūtacareṣu dīrghikāṇāṃ upakaṇtheṣu gatāgataikatānāḥ |  1482-2 madhupāḥ kathayanti padminīnāṃ salilairantaritāni korakāṇi ||1483-1 anubhūtabhavavyavasthitirjanatākānaratābhilāṣiṇī |  1483-2 tadavaimi sukhena saṃsṛtau kalitānaṅgatayaiva nisṛtiḥ ||1484-1 anubhūtamidaṃ loke yadbadhvā balavattaraiḥ |  1484-2 īśvarairdurbalaḥ kṛṣyaḥ kratau paśurivābalaḥ ||1485-1 anumatamivānetuṃ joṣaṃ tamītamasāṃ kulaṃ diśi diśi dṛśo vinyasyantyaḥ śriyāṅkuritāñjanāḥ |  1485-2 madanahutabhugdhūmacchāyaiḥ paṭairasitairvṛtāḥ prayayurarasadbhūṣairaṅgaiḥ priyānabhisārikāḥ ||1486-1 anumatisarasaṃ vimucya cūtaṃ navanavamañjulamañjarīparītaṃ |  1486-2 api pikadayite kathaṃ matiste ghaṭayati niśphalapippale'valepaṃ ||1487-1 anumamāra na māra kathaṃ nu sā ratiratiprathitāpi pativratā |  1487-2 iyadanāthavadhūvadhapātakī dayitayāpi tayāsi kimujjñitaḥ ||1488-1 anumaraṇe vyavasāyaṃ strīdharme kaḥ karoti savivekaḥ |  1488-2 saṃsāramuktyupāyaṃ daṇḍagrahaṇaṃ vrataṃ hitvā ||1489-1 anuyayau vividhopalakuṇḍala- dyutivitānakasaṃvalitāṃśukaṃ |  1489-2 dhṛtadhanuvalayasya pay_oṃucaḥ śabalimā balimānamuṣo vapuḥ ||1490-1 anuyātāne kajanaḥ parapuruṣairuhyate'sya nijadehaḥ |  1490-2 adhikārasthaḥ puruṣaḥ śava iva na śṛṇoti vīkṣate kumatiḥ ||1491-1 anuyāti na bhartāraṃ yadi daivātkathaṃcana |  1491-2 tathāpi śīlaṃ saṃrakṣyaṃ śīlabhaṅgātpatatyadhaḥ ||1492-1 anuyāsyanmunitanayāṃ sahasā vinayena vāritaprasaraḥ |  1492-2 sthānādanuccalannapi gatveva punaḥ pratinivṛttaḥ ||1493-1 anuyukto dasyuvadhe raṇe kuryātparākramaṃ |  1493-2 nāsya kṛtyamataḥ kiṃcidanyaddasyunibarhaṇāt ||1494-1 anuraktajanaviraktā namrotsiktā viraktarāgiṇyaḥ |  1494-2 vañcakavacanāsaktā nāryaḥ sadbhāvaśaṅkinyaḥ ||1495-1 anuraktena hrṣṭena tuṣṭena jagatīpatiḥ |  1495-2 alpenāpi svasainyena bhūmiṃ jayati bhūmipaḥ ||1496-1 anurañjitā api guṇairna namanti prakṛtayo vinā daṇḍāt |  1496-2 aṅkagatāpi na vīṇā kalamadhuramatāḍitā kvaṇati ||1497-1 anurañjaya rājānaṃ mā jānanjātu kopayeḥ prakṛtīḥ |  1497-2 etaddvayānurāga- sthirayā tiṣṭha pratiṣṭhayāśliṣṭaḥ ||1498-1 anurāgaṃ jano yāti parokṣe guṇakīrtanaṃ |  1498-2 na bibhyati ca sattvāni siddherlakṣaṇamuttamaṃ ||1499-1 anurāgavatī saṃdhyā divasastatpuraḥsaraḥ |  1499-2 aho daivagatiścitrā tathāpi na samāgamaḥ ||1500-1 anurāgavantamapi locanayordadhataṃ vapuḥ sukhamatāpakaraṃ |  1500-2 nirakāsayadravimapetavasuṃ viyadālayādaparadiggaṇikā ||1501-1 anurāgavartinā tava viraheṇogreṇa sā gṛhītāṅgī |  1501-2 tripuraripuṇeva gaurī varatanurardhāvaśiṣṭeva ||1502-1 anurāgādabhisarato laṅghitajaladheḥ kalādhināthasya |  1502-2 rajanīmukhacumbanataḥ śithilitamalakaṃ kalaṅkamākalaye ||1503-1 anurāgo vṛthā strīṣu strīṣu garvo vṛthā tathā |  1503-2 pṛiyo'haṃ sarvadā hyasyā mamaiṣā sarvadāpriyā ||1504-1 anurūpamidaṃ kūpa chadmacchannasya kiṃ na te |  1504-2 sanmārgavibhramānmārgapāto'yaṃ yannipātitaḥ ||1505-1 anurūpeṇa saṃsargaṃ prāpya sarvo'pi modate |  1505-2 dinaṃ tejonidhiryadvadratriṃ doṣākarastathā ||1506-1 anulepanāni kusumānyabalāḥ kṛtamanyavaḥ patiṣu dīpaśikhāḥ |  1506-2 samayena tena cirasuptamano- bhavabodhanaṃ samamabodhiṣata ||1507-1 anul_oṃena balinaṃ pratil_oṃena durjanaṃ |  1507-2 ātmatulyabalaṃ śatruṃ vinayena balena vā ||1508-1 anuvanaṃ vanarājivadhūmukhe bahalarāgajavādharacāruṇi |  1508-2 vikacabāṇadalāvalayo'dhikaṃ rurucire rucirekṣaṇavibhramāḥ ||1509-1 anuvanamanuyāntaṃ bāṣpavāri tyajantaṃ muditakamaladāmakṣāmamālokya rāmaṃ |  1509-2 dinamapi ravirocistāpamantaḥ prapede rajanirapi ca tārābāṣpabindūnbabhāra||1510-1 anuvanamanuśailaṃ tāmanālokya sītāṃ pratidinamatidīnaṃ vīkṣya rāmaṃ virāmaṃ |  1510-2 giriraśanimayo'yaṃ yastadā na dvidhābhūtkṣitirapi na vidīrṇā sāpi sarvaṃsahaiva |  1511-1 anuvādayitā vādyaṃ nṛtyasi yattvayi sureśvaraḥ sākṣāt |  1511-2 pakṣaśca te'javandyastadasi kalāpinparaṃ dhanyaḥ ||1512-1 anuvelaṃ nihanyante yasya sindhorivodyamāḥ |  1512-2 taṃ pramathya śriyaṃ ko'pi vipakṣo bhūbhṛduddharet ||1513-1 anuśayavatyevoktā proṣyatpatikā na bhedato bahubhiḥ |  1513-2 paradeśādāgacchat- patikāpi yathā pramuditaiva ||1514-1 anuśāsaddhi dharmeṇa vyavahāreṇa saṃsthayā |  1514-2 nyāyena ca caturthena caturantāṃ mahīṃ jayet ||1515-1 anuśīlitakuñjavāṭikāyāṃ jaghanālaṃkṛtapītaśāṭikāyāṃ |  1515-2 muralīkalakūjite ratāyāṃ mama ceto'stu kadambadevatāyāṃ ||1516-1 anuśocanamastavicāramanā vigatasya mṛtasya ca yaḥ kurute |  1516-2 sa gate salile tanute varaṇaṃ bhujagasya gatasya gatiṃ kṣipati ||1517-1 anuṣṭhānena rahitāṃ pāṭhamātreṇa kevalaṃ |  1517-2 rañjayatyeva yā lokaṃ kiṃ tayā śukavidyayā ||1518-1 anuṣṭhitaṃ tu yaddevairṛṣibhiryadanuṣṭhitaṃ |  1518-2 nānuṣṭheyaṃ manuṣyaistu taduktaṃ karma ācaret ||1519-1 anuṣṭhiteṣu kāryeṣu yo guhyaṃ na prakāśayet |  1519-2 sa tatra labhate siddhiṃ jalamadhye kapiryathā ||1520-1 anusarati karikapolaṃ bhramaraḥ śravaṇena tāḍyamāno'pi |  1520-2 gaṇayati na tiraskāraṃ dānāndhavilocano nīcaḥ ||1521-1 anusara sarastīraṃ vairaṃ kimatra sahātmanā katipayapayaḥpāṇaṃ māninsamācara cātaka |  1521-2 pralayapavanairastaṃ nītaḥ purātanavārido yadayamadayaṃ kīlājālaṃ vimuñcati nūtanaḥ ||1522-1 anūḍhā mandire yasya rajaḥ prāpnoti kanyakā |  1522-2 patanti pitarastasya svargasthā api tairguṇaiḥ ||1523-1 anūnavegādayamadvitīyaścchāyāturaṅgādiva lajjamānaḥ |  1523-2 khuroddhutairvīra turaṅgamaste rajobhirahṇanāṃ patimāvṛṇoti ||1523ā-1 anrjutvamasadbhāvaṃ kārpaṇyaṃ calacittatā |  1523ā-2 puṃsāṃ mitreṣu ye doṣāste veśyāsu guṇāḥ smṛtāḥ ||1524-1 anṛtaṃ ca samutkarṣe rājagāmi ca paiśunaṃ |  1524-2 guroścālīkanirbandhaḥ samāni brahmahatyayā ||1525-1 anṛtaṃ cāṭuvādaśca dhanayogo mahānayaṃ |  1525-2 satyaṃ vaiduṣyamityeṣa yogo dāridryakārakaḥ ||1526-1 anṛtaṃ satyamityāhuḥ satyaṃ cāpi tathānṛtaṃ |  1526-2 iti yāstāḥ kathaṃ vīra saṃrakṣyāḥ puruṣairiha ||1527-1 anṛtaṃ sāhasaṃ māyā mūrkhatvamatilubdhatā |  1527-2 aśaucatvaṃ nirdayatvaṃ strīṇāṃ doṣāḥ svabhāvajāḥ ||1528-1 anṛtapaṭutā kraurye cittaṃ satāmavamānitā matiravinaye dharme śāṭhyaṃ guruṣvapi vañcanaṃ |  1528-2 lalitamadhurā vākpratyakṣe parokṣavibhāṣiṇī kaliyugamahārājasyaitāḥ sphuranti vibhūtayaḥ ||1529-1 anrtamanṛtametadyastudhāsūtirindurniyatamayamanāryo nirgataḥ kālakūṭāt |  1529-2 hṛdayadahanadakṣā dāruṇā cānyatheyaṃ vada sakhi madhuratve mohaśaktiḥ kuto'sya||1530-1 anṛte dharmabhagne ca na śuśrūṣati cāpriye |  1530-2 na priyaṃ na hitaṃ vācyaṃ sadbhireveti ninditāḥ ||1531-1 anekagaticitritaṃ vividhajātibhedākulaṃ sametya tanumadgaṇaḥ pracuracitraceṣṭodyataḥ |  1531-2 purārjitavicitrakarmaphalabhugvicitrāṃ tanuṃ pragṛhya naṭavatsadā bhramati janmaraṅgāṅgaṇe ||1532-1 anekacittamantraśca dveṣyo bhavati mantriṇāṃ |  1532-2 anavasthitacittatvātkarye taiḥ samupekṣyate ||1533-1 anekajanmasaṃbhūtaṃ pāpaṃ puṃsāṃ praṇaśyati |  1533-2 snānamātreṇa gaṅgāyāṃ sadyaḥ puṇyasya bhājanaṃ ||1534-1 anekajīvaghātotthaṃ mlecchocchiṣṭaṃ malāvilaṃ |  1534-2 malāktapātranikṣiptaṃ kiṃ śaucaṃ lihato madhu ||1535-1 anekadoṣaduṣṭasya kāyasyaiko mahānguṇaḥ |  1535-2 yo yathā vartayatyenaṃ taṃ tathaivānuvartate ||1536-1 anekadoṣaduṣṭasya madhuno'pāstadoṣatāṃ |  1536-2 yo brūte tadrasāsaktaḥ so'satyāmbudhirastadhīḥ ||1537-1 anekadheti praguṇena cetasā vivicya mithyātvamalaṃ sadūṣaṇaṃ |  1537-2 vimucya jainendramataṃ sukhāvahaṃ bhajanti bhavyā bhavaduḥkhabhīravaḥ ||1538-1 anekaparyāyaguṇairupetaṃ vilokyate yena samastatattvaṃ |  1538-2 tadindriyānindriyabhedabhinnaṃ jñānaṃ jinendrairgaditaṃ hitāya ||1539-1 anekabhavasaṃcitā iha hi karmaṇā nirmitāḥ priyāpriyaviyogasaṃgamavipattisaṃpattayaḥ |  1539-2 bhavanti sakalāsvimā gatiṣu sarvadā dehināṃ jarāmaraṇavīcike jananasāgare majjatāṃ ||1540-1 anekamalasaṃbhave kṛmikulaiḥ sadā saṃkule vicitrabahuvedane budhavinindite duḥsahe |  1540-2 bhramannayamanārataṃ vyasanasaṃkaṭe dehavānpurārjitavaśo bhave bhavati bhāminīgarbhake ||1541-1 anekamukhapāpātmā chadmasaṃdarśitāśramaḥ |  1541-2 karburaprakṛtiḥ kaścitkāpeyakalahocitaḥ ||1541ā-1 anekayuddhavijayī saṃdhānaṃyasya gacchati |  1541ā-2 tatpratāpena tasyāśu vaśaṃ gacchanti vidviṣaḥ ||1542-1 anekarājyāntaritaṃ atikṣiptaṃ na yudhyate |  1542-2 antargatāmitraśalyaṃ antaḥśalyaṃ hi na kṣamaṃ ||1544-1 anekavarṇapadatāṃ vāgvidyudiva bibhratī |  1544-2 abhrānteṣu sadā sārasaṅgiṣu syātsphuradguṇā ||1545-1 anekavidvajjanaratnapūrṇaṃ ve dodakanyāyataraṅgaramyaṃ |  1545-2 alaṅghanīyaṃ gurutīrthamekaṃ sabhāsamudraṃ śirasā namāmi ||1546-1 anekaśāstraṃ bahu veditavyaṃ alpaśca kālo bahavaśca vighnāḥ |  1546-2 yatsārabhūtaṃ tadupāsitavyaṃ haṃso yathā kṣīramivāmbumadhyāt ||1547-1 anekasaṃśayocchedi parokṣārthasya darśakaṃ |  1547-2 sarvasya locanaṃ śāstraṃ yasya nāstyandha eva saḥ ||1548-1 anekasuṣiraṃ kāntaṃ vādi strīmukhapaṅkajaṃ |  1548-2 paśya kānte vanasyānte netraśrutimanoramaṃ ||1549-1 anekasuṣiraṃ vādyaṃ kāntaṃ ca ṛṣisaṃjñitaṃ |  1549-2 cakriṇā ca sadārādhyaṃ yo jānāti sa paṇḍitaḥ ||1550-1 aneke phaṇinaḥ santi bhekahbakṣaṇatatparāḥ |  1550-2 eka eva hi śeṣo'yaṃ dharaṇīdharaṇakṣamaḥ ||1551-1 anekairnāyakaguṇaiḥ sahitaḥ sakhi me patiḥ |  1551-2 sa eva yadi jāraḥ syātsaphalaṃ jīvitaṃ bhavet ||1552-1 anena kalyāṇi mṛṇālak_oṃalaṃ vratena gātraṃ glapayasyakāraṇaṃ |  1552-2 prasādamākāṅkṣati yastavotsukaḥ sa kiṃ tvayā dāsajanaḥ prasādyate ||1553-1 anena kasyāpi kulāṅkureṇa spṛṣṭasya gātreṣu sukhaṃ mamaivaṃ |  1553-2 kāṃ nirvṛtiṃ cetasi tasya kuryādyasyāyamaṅgātkṛtinaḥ prarūḍhaḥ ||1554-1 anena kiṃ na paryāptaṃ māṃsasya parivarjanaṃ |  1554-2 yatpāṭitaṃ tṛṇenāpi svamaṅgaṃ paridūyate ||1555-1 anena kumbhadvayasaṃniveśa- saṃlakṣyamāṇena kucadvayena unmajjatā yauvanavāraṇena vāpīva tanvaṅgi taraṅgitāsi ||1556-1 anena tanumadyayā mukharanūpurārāviṇā navāmburuhak_oṃalena caraṇena saṃbhāvitaḥ|  1556-2 aśoka yadi sadya eva kusumairna saṃpatsyase vṛthā vahasi dohadaṃ lalitakāmisādhāraṇaṃ ||1557-1 anena tava putrasya prasuptasya vanāntare |  1557-2 śikhāmāruhya hastena khaḍgena nihataṃ śiraḥ ||1558-1 anena tvaṃ svarūpeṇa puṣpabāṇaiśca pañcabhiḥ |  1558-2 mohayanpuruṣānstrīśca kuru sṛṣṭiṃ sanātanīṃ ||1559-1 anena dharmaḥ saviśeṣamadya me trivargasāraḥ pratibhāti bhāvini |  1559-2 tvayā manonirviṣayārthakāmayā yadeka eva pratigṛhya sevyate ||1560-1 anena puruṣo dehānupādatte vimuñcati |  1560-2 harṣaṃ śokaṃ bhayaṃ duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ cānena vindati ||1561-1 anena bhavati śreṣṭho mucyante ca sabhāsadaḥ |  1561-2 kartārameno gacchecca nindyo yatra hi nindyate ||1562-1 anena martyadehena yallokadvayaśarmadaṃ |  1562-2 vicintya tadanuṣṭheyaṃ heyaṃ karma tato'nyathā ||1563-1 anena yūnā saha pārthivena rambhoru kaccinmanaso ruciste |  1563-2 siprātaraṅgānilakampitāsu vihartumudyānaparaṃparāsu ||1564-1 anena yogarājena dhūpitāmbarabhūṣaṇaḥ |  1564-2 dhūpitāṅgastribhuvanaṃ manujaḥ kurute vaśaṃ ||1565-1 anena yogena vivṛddhatejā nijāṃ parasmai padavīmayacchan |  1565-2 samācarācāramupāttaśastro japopavāsābhiṣavairmunīnāṃ ||1566-1 anena rambhoru bhavanmukhena tuṣārabhānostulayā jitasya |  1566-2 ūnasya nūnaṃ paripūraṇāya tārāḥ sphuranti pratimānakhaṇḍāḥ ||1567-1 anena vītarāgeṇa buddhenevādhareṇa te |  1567-2 dūti nirvyājamākhyātā sarvavastuṣu śūnyatā ||1568-1 anena sarvārthikṛtārthitā kṛtā hṛtārthinau kāmagavīsuradrumau |  1568-2 mithaḥpayaḥsecanapallavāśanaiḥ pradāya dānavyasanaṃ samāpnutaṃ ||1569-1 anena sārdhaṃ tava yauvanena koṭiṃ parāmacchiduro'dhyarohat |  1569-2 premāpi tanvi tvayi vāsavasya guṇo'pi cāpe sumanaḥśarasya ||1570-1 anena sārdhaṃ viharāmburāśestīreṣu tālīvanamarmareṣu |  1570-2 dvīpāntarānītalavaṅgapuṣpairapākṛtasvedalavā marudbhiḥ ||1571-1 anena sidhyati hyetanmamāpyeṣa parākramaḥ |  1571-2 evaṃ jñātvā caredyastu saphalāstasya buddhayaḥ ||1572-1 anenaiva prakāreṇa trayo grīvāśritāḥ śubhāḥ |  1572-2 lalāṭe yugalāvartau candrārkau śubhakārakau ||1573-1 anaiśvarye tṛṣā bhāryā pathi kṣetre tridhā kṛṣiḥ |  1573-2 lambakaḥ sākṣiṇaścaiva pañcānarthā asaṃkṛtāḥ ||1574-1 anaucityādṛte nānyadrasabhaṅgasya kāraṇaṃ |  1574-2 prasiddhaucityabandhastu rasasyopaniṣatparā ||1575-1 anaucityena kanyāsu purastrīṣu ca yā ratiḥ |  1575-2 sa kāmo hi kṣitīndrāṇāṃ ariṣaḍvargapūrvajaḥ ||1576-1 antaḥkaṭurapi laghurapi sadvṛttaṃ yaḥ pumānna saṃtyajati |  1576-2 sa bhavati sadyo vandyaḥ sarṣapa iva sarvalokasya ||1577-1 antaḥkaṭu sadā prema mānuṣaṃ parilakṣyate |  1577-2 hatāśānna karotyasmāndaivapremaiva kevalaṃ ||1578-1 antaḥkapālavivare jihvāmākuñcya cārpayet |  1578-2 bhrūmadhyadṛṣṭiramṛtaṃ pibetkhecaramudrayā ||1579-1 antaḥkaraṇatattvasya dampatyoḥ snehasaṃśrayāt |  1579-2 ānandagranthireko'yaṃ apatyamiti kathyate ||1580-1 antaḥkaraṇavikāraṃ guruparijanasaṃkaṭe'pi kulaṭānāṃ |  1580-2 jānanti tadabhiyuktā bhrūbhaṅgāpāṅgamadhuradṛṣṭena ||1581-1 antaḥkaraṇaśūnyo'pi tṛṇapūlakapūruṣaḥ satkṛtaḥ kṣetrapatinā samartho mṛgavārane ||1582-1 antaḥ kiṃcitkiṃcinmuktānāmahaha vibhramaṃ vahasi |  1582-2 dūrāddarśayasi punaḥ kṣārodgāraṃ jaḍādhīśaḥ ||1583-1 antaḥ kuṭilatāṃ bibhracchaṅkhaḥ sa khalu niṣṭhuraḥ |  1583-2 huṃkaroti yadā dhmātastadaiva bahu gaṇyatāṃ ||1584-1 antaḥkūjadudārakaṇṭhamasakṛnmuñceti lolekṣaṇaṃ prāyaḥ smerakapolamūlamamṛtaprasyandi bimbādharaṃ |  1584-2 ādhūtāṅgulipallavāgramalamityānartitabhrūlataṃ pītaṃ yena mukhaṃ tvadīyamabale so'haṃ hi dhanyo yuvā ||1584ā-1 antaḥ kecana kecanāpi hi dale kecittathā pallave mūle kecana kecana tvaci phale puṣpe ca ke'pi drumāḥ |  1584ā-2 saurabhyaṃ nitarāṃ bibhartyavikalaḥ śrīkhaṇḍaṣaṇḍīkṛtaḥ sarvāṅge surabhirna ko'pi dadṛśe muktvā bhavantaṃ kvacit ||1585-1 antaḥkopakaṣāyite'pi hṛdaye sādhorasacceṣṭitairbhadrāṇyeva bahiḥ kriyāsu vacanānyāvirbhavantyarthataḥ |  1585-2 madhye'tyantakarālavāḍavaśikhāśoṣe'pi vārāṃnidheḥ kallolāḥ prakaṭībhavanti satataṃ muktāphalodgāriṇaḥ ||1587-1 antaḥkrūrāḥ s_oṃyamukhā agādhahṛdayāḥ striyaḥ |  1587-2 antarviṣā bahiḥs_oṃyā bhakṣyā viṣakṛtā iva ||1588-1 antaḥ krodhojjihānajvalanabhavaśikhākārajihvāvalīḍha- prauḍhabrahmāṇḍabhāṇḍaḥ pṛthubhuvanaguhāgarbhagambhīranādaḥ |  1588-2 dṛpyatpārīndramūrtirmurajidavatu vaḥ suprabhāmaṇḍalībhiḥ kurvannirdhūmadhūmadhvajanicitamiva vy_oṃa r_oṃacchaṭānāṃ ||1589-1 antaḥkhedamivodvahanyadaniśaṃ ratnākaro ghūrṇate yacca dhyānamivāsthito na kanakakṣoṇīdharaḥ syandate |  1589-2 jāne dānavilāsadānarabhasaṃ śauryaṃ ca te śuśruvāneko manthavighaṭṭanāstadaparaṣṭaṅkāhatīḥ śaṅkate ||1590-1 antaḥpuracaraiḥ sārdhaṃ yo na mantraṃ samācaret |  1590-2 na kalatrairnarendrasya sa bhavedrājavallabhaḥ ||1591-1 antaḥpuradhanādhyakṣairvairidūtairnirākṛtaiḥ |  1591-2 saṃsargaṃ na vrajedrājaṃ vinā pārthivaśāsanāt ||1592-1 antaḥpurāṇāṃ vihitavyavasthaḥ pade pade'haṃ skhalitāni rakṣan |  1592-2 jarāturaḥ saṃprati daṇḍanītyā sarvaṃ nṛpasyānukar_oṃi vṛttaṃ ||1593-1 antaḥpurīyasi raṇeṣu sutīyasi tvaṃ pauraṃ janaṃ tava sadā ramaṇīyate śrīḥ |  1593-2 dṛṣṭaḥ priyābhiramṛtadyutidarśamindra- saṃcāramatra bhuvi saṃcarasi kṣitīśa ||1594-1 antaḥpure pitṛtulyaṃ mātṛtulyaṃ mahānase |  1594-2 goṣu cātmasamaṃ dadyātsvayameva kṛṣiṃ vrajet ||1595-1 antaḥprakāśamicchantaḥ sadasacca vivecituṃ |  1595-2 snehaṃ sūktipradīpe'sminvardhayantu subuddhayaḥ ||1596-1 antaḥprataptamarusaikatadahyamāna- mūlasya campakataroḥ kva vikāsacintā |  1596-2 prāyo bhavatyanucitasthitideśabhājāṃ śreyaḥ svajīvaparipālanamātrameva ||1597-1 antaḥ praviśya yuvacihnamuro'balānāṃ yena krameṇa bata loḍayate manīṣin |  1597-2 āśritya taṃ hi niyamaṃ tata unnayete etau kucau sapadi hanti vidīrṇamadhyāt ||1598-1 antaḥśarīrapariśoṣamudagrayantaḥ kīṭakṣatasrutibhirasramivodvamantaḥ |  1598-2 chāyāviyogamalinā vyasane nimagnā vṛkṣāḥ śmaśānamupagantumiva pravṛttāḥ ||1599-1 antaḥsaṃtoṣacittānāṃ saṃpadasti pade pade |  1599-2 antarmalinacittānāṃ sukhaṃ svapne'pi durlabhaṃ ||1600-1 antaḥsaṃtoṣavāṣpaiḥ sthagayati na dṛśastābhirākarṇayiṣyannaṅgenānastir_oṃā racayati pulakaśreṇimānandakandāṃ |  1600-2 na kṣoṇībhaṅgabhīruḥ kalayati ca śiraḥkampanaṃ tanna vidmaḥ śṛṇvannetasya kīrtīḥ kathamuragapatiḥ prītimāviṣkaroti ||1601-1 antaḥsamutthavirahānalatīvratāpa- saṃtāpitāṅga karipuṅgava muñca śokaṃ |  1601-2 dhātrā svahastalikhitāni lalāṭapaṭṭe ko vākṣarāṇi parimārjayituṃ samarthaḥ ||1602-1 antaḥ sametyāpi bahiḥ prayāti spṛṣṭā vidhatte tvavagūhanāni |  1602-2 dattvādharaṃ roditi śuṣkameva saivaṃ vilāsaistapasāpyalabhyā ||1603-1 antaḥsāravihīnānāṃ sahāyaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati |  1603-2 malaye'pi sthito veṇurveṇureva na candanaḥ ||1604-1 antaḥsāravihīnānāṃ upadeśo na jāyate |  1604-2 malayācalasaṃsargānna veṇuścandanāyate ||1605-1 antaḥsārairakuṭilaissusnigdhaiḥ suparīkṣitaiḥ |  1605-2 mantribhirdhāryate rājyaṃ sustambhairiva mandiraṃ ||1606-1 antaḥsāro'pi niryāti nūnamarthitayā saha |  1606-2 anyathā tadavasthasya mahimā kena dehināṃ ||1607-1 antaḥsthasuratārambhā bhilāṣamapi gopayat |  1607-2 anyonyaṃ mithunaṃ vetti netre dṛṣṭvaiva cañcale ||1608-1 antaḥsthenāviruddhena suvṛttenāticāruṇā |  1608-2 antarbhinnena saṃprāptaṃ mauktikenāpi bandhanaṃ ||1609-1 antaḥsvīkṛtajāhnavījalamatisvacchandaratnāṃkura- śreṇīśoṇabhujaṅganāyakaphaṇācakrollasatpallavaṃ |  1609-2 bhūyādabhyudayāya mokṣanagaraprasthānabhājāmitaḥ pratyūhapraśamaikapūrṇakalaśaprāyaṃ śiro dhūrjaṭeḥ ||1610-1 antakaḥ paryavasthātā janminaḥ saṃtatāpadaḥ |  1610-2 iti tyājye bhave bhavyo muktāvruttiṣṭhate janaḥ ||1611-1 antakaḥ śamano mṛtyuḥ pātālaṃ vaḍavāmukhaṃ |  1611-2 kṣuradhārā viṣaṃ sarpo vahnirityekataḥ striyaḥ ||1612-1 antakāya dadatā tvayā priyā- kāyakāncanalatāpratigrahaṃ |  1612-2 dīyate bata madīyajīvanaṃ dakṣiṇānila kuto na dakṣiṇā ||1613-1 antakāle ca māmeva smaranmuktvā kalevaraṃ |  1613-2 yaḥ prayāti sa madbhāvaṃ yāti nāstyatra saṃśayaḥ ||1614-1 antakāle hi bhūtāni muhyantīti purāśrutiḥ |  1614-2 [rājñaivaṃ kurvatā loke pratyakṣā sā śrutiḥ kṛtā] ||1615-1 antako'pi hi jantūnāṃ antakālamapekṣate |  1615-2 na kālaniyamaḥ kaściduttamarṇasya vidyate ||1616-1 antaraṃ kiyadākhyānti santo raghukirātayoḥ |  1616-2 antaraṃ tāvadākhyānti santo raghukirātayoḥ ||1617-1 antaraṅgamanaṅgasya śṛṅgārakuladaivataṃ |  1617-2 aṅgīkaroti tanvaṅgī sā vilāsamayaṃ vayaḥ ||1618-1 antaraṅgā hi ye rājñaḥ parasvādāyinaḥ śaṭhāḥ |  1618-2 bhṛtyā bhavanti prāyeṇa tebhyo rakṣedimāḥ prajāḥ ||1619-1 antarāyatimiropaśāntaye śāntapāvanamacintyavaibhavaṃ |  1619-2 taṃ naraṃ vapuṣi kuñjaraṃ mukhe manmahe kimapi tundilaṃ mahaḥ ||1620-1 antargatamalo duṣṭastīrthasnānaśatairapi |  1620-2 na śudhyati yathā bhāṇḍaṃ surāyā dāhitaṃ ca sat ||1621-1 antargatā madanavahniśikhāvalī yā sā bāghyate kimiha candanapaṅkalepaiḥ |  1621-2 yatkumbhakārapacanopari paṅkalepastāpāya kevalamasau na ca tāpaśāntyai ||1622-1 antargatairguṇaiḥ kiṃ dvitrā api yatra sākṣiṇo viralāḥ |  1622-2 sa guṇo gīteryadasau vanecaraṃ hariṇamapi harati ||1623-1 antargato yadi haristapasā tataḥ kiṃ nāntargato yadi haristapasā tataḥ kiṃ|  1623-2 antarbahiryadi haristapasā tataḥ kiṃ nāntarbahiryadi haristapasā tataḥ kiṃ ||1624-1 antargāḍhaṃ cihnahīnaṃ viśālaṃ madhye sthūlaṃ sthūladhārātitīkṣṇaṃ |  1624-2 rakṣovakṣaśchedanārthaṃ mahāntaṃ kṛtvā khaṅgaṃ devarājotihṛṣṭaḥ ||1625-1 antargūḍhānarthānavyañjayataḥ prasādarahitasya |  1625-2 saṃdarbhasya nadasya ca na rasaḥ prītyai rasajñānāṃ ||1626-1 antargṛhaṃ nayati vardhitar_oṃaharṣaṃ sparśena sītkaraṇagarbhamukhīḥ karoti|  1626-2 kiṃcādharavraṇavatīḥ kurute puranghrīḥ kiṃ vallabhaḥ kimuta haimana eṣa vātaḥ||1627-1 antargṛhe kṛṣṇamavekṣya cauraṃ baddhvā kavāṭaṃ jananīṃ gataikā |  1627-2 ulūkhale dāmanibaddhamenaṃ tatrāpi dṛṣṭvā stimitā babhūva ||1628-1 antarjalāvāritamūrti yāto bālāpariṣvaṅgasukhāya patyuḥ |  1628-2 vighnāya vaimalyamapāṃ babhūva vyarthaḥ prasādo hi jalāśayānāṃ ||1629-1 antardadhānāpi kaṭhorabhāvaṃ svacchadyutiḥ sā nijamādhurībhiḥ |  1629-2 bhuktā rasaṃ svāduvidāṃ tanoti guṇopagūḍhā sitaśarkareva ||1630-1 antarduṣṭaḥ kṣamāyuktaḥ sarvānarthakaraḥ kila |  1630-2 śakuniḥ śakaṭāraśca dṛṣṭāntāvatra bhūpate ||1631-1 antardhṛtaguṇaireva pareṣāṃ sthīyate hṛdi |  1631-2 arthaṃ samarthayantyenaṃ samagraṃ kusumasrajaḥ ||1632-1 antarnāḍīniyamitamarullaṅghitabrahmarandhraṃ svānte śāntipraṇayini samunmīladānandasāndraṃ |  1632-2 pratyagjyotirjayti yaminaḥ spaṣṭalālāṭanetra- vyājavyaktīkṛtamiva jagadvāpi candrārdhamauleḥ ||1633-1 antarnidahyamānena śaktihīnena śatruṣu |  1633-2 saṃtatiḥ kriyate yena nindyaṃ antarbalānyahamamuṣya mṛgādhipasya vācā nigadya kathamadya laghūkar_oṃi |  1635-2 jānanti kiṃ na karajakṣatakumbhikumbhā- dāmuktamauktikamayāni digantarāṇi ||1636-1 antarbhāvanigūdheyaṃ vākte antarbhūya prabhoḥ prāpyo viśeṣaḥ sarvathā budhaiḥ |  1638-2 ko hi nāma na kurvīta kevalodarapūraṇaṃ ||1639-1 antarmagnakareṇavaḥ kalabhakavyārugṇakandāṅkuraiḥ sāmodāḥ paritaḥ |  1644-2 niṣṭhurabāhyākārā dṛtiriva patisaṃnidhau navyā ||1645-1 antarmohanamaulighūrṇanacalanmandāravibhraṃśanaḥ stambhākarṣaṇadṛptiharṣaṇamahāmantraḥ kuraṅgīdṛśāṃ |  1645-2 dṛpyaddānavadūyamānadiviṣaddurvāraduḥkhāpadāṃ bhraṃśaḥ kaṃsariporvilopayatu vo'śreyāṃsi vaṃśīravaḥ ||1646-1 antarye satataṃ luthantyagaṇitāstāneva pāthodharairāttānāpatatastaraṅgavalayairāliṅgya ||1650-1 antarvahasi kaṣāyaṃ bāhyākāreṇa madhuratāṃ yāsi |  1650-2 sahakāra māyiviṭapinyuktaṃ lokairbahirnītaḥ ||1651-1 antarbahistrijagatīrasabhāvavidvānyo nartayatyakhiladehabhṛtāṃ kulāni |  1651-2 kṣemaṃ dadātu bhagavānparamādidevaḥ śṛṅgāranāṭakamahākavirātmajanmā ||1652-1 antarvāṇiṃ manyamānaḥ khalo'yaṃ paurobhāgyaṃ sūktimuktāsu dhatte |  1652-2 sarvānandinyaṅgake kāminīnāṃ īrma guñjāphalasamākārā yoṣitaḥ kena nirmitāḥ ||1655-1 antarviṣṇostrilokī nivasati phaṇināmīśvare so'pi śete sindhoḥ so'pyekadeśe tamapi culukayāṃ kumbhayoniścakāra |  1655-2 dhatte khadyotalīlāmayamapi antaśchidrairiyamadhigatā dustyajā duṣṭavaṃśairatyāsaktirnijakulaśubhodarkalābhāya na syāt |  1658-2 kiṃ tu grīṣmaśvasanajanitānyonyasaṃgharṣavahni- jvālāmālājaṭilavapuṣāmātmanāṃ nāśanāya ||1659-1 antastava sa jvalano bhīmā makarāśca sarvato vikaṭāḥ |  1659-2 atha bata viṣamayamaṅgaṃ taditi niṣevyaḥ kathaṃ bhaverjaladhe ||1660-1 antastāraṃ taralitatalāḥ stokamutpīḍabhājaḥ pakṣmāgreṣu na naśyati tamo nāma kṛtayā dīpavārtayā ||1662-1 antastṛṣṇopataptānāṃ dāvadāhamayaṃ jagat |  1662-2 bhavatyakhilajantūnāṃ yadantastadbahiḥ sthitaṃ ||1663-1 antikāntikagatenduvisṛṣṭe jihmatāṃ jahati 1664-2 tatkarṇārjunakṛṣṇavigrahavatī sākṣātkurukṣetratāṃ yātāsi tvadavāptireva taruṇi śreyaḥ paraṃ gaṇyate ||1665-1 anteṣu remire dhīrā nate madhyeṣu remire |  1665-2 antaprāptiṃ 1701-2 andhaḥ paśyati cāreṇa śāstrahīno na paśyati ||1702-1 anghrīnīranghrapīnastanataṭaluṭhanāyāsamandapracārāścārūnullāsayanto draviḍanaravadhūhāridhammillabhārān |  1702-2 jighrantaḥ siṃhalīnāṃ annapānādibhiścaiva vastrālaṃkārabhūṣaṇaiḥ |  1718-2 gandhamālyairvicitraiśca guruṃ tatra prapūjayet ||1719-1 annapānāni jīryante yatra bhakṣāśca bhakṣitāḥ |  1719-2 tasminnevodare garbhaḥ kiṃ nāma na vijīryate ||1720-1 annapraṇāśe sīdanti śarīre pañca dhātavaḥ |  1720-2 āhārātsarvabhūtāni saṃbhavanti mahītale ||1721-1 annamūlaṃ balaṃ puṃsāṃ balamūlaṃ hi jīvanaṃ |  1721-2 tasmādyatnena 1723-2 yajamānaṃ dānahīno nāsti yajñasamo ripuḥ ||1724-1 annādaṣṭaguṇaṃ piṣṭaṃ piṣṭādaṣtaguṇaṃ payaḥ |  1724-2 payaso'ṣṭaguṇaṃ māṃsaṃ māṃsādaṣṭaguṇaṃ ghṛtaṃ ||1725-1 annādivargaṃ phalapuṣpamāṃsa- matsyādibhiḥ pūrṇamukhaḥ sadaiva |  1725-2 syāddṛṣṭamātro'bhimatārthasiddhyai mṛṣṭānnabhojyāya mude ca kākaḥ||1726-1 annādiviṣṭhānavag_oṃayāni na vā vidhunvanvadane sadaiva |  1726-2 vāmopasavyo'pyavalokyamāno manorathaṃ pūrayate dhruvaśca ||1727-1 annādiviṣṭhāpiśitādibhiryaḥ pūrṇānano'bhīṣṭaphalaprado'sau |  1727-2 mantrādisiddhyai vaṇigādilābhe śasto vivāhādividhau ca kākaḥ ||1728-1 annāde bhrūṇahā mārṣṭi annena abhiśaṃsati |  1728-2 stenaḥ pramukto rājani yācannanṛtasaṃkare ||1729-1 annāde bhrūṇahā mārṣṭi patyau bhāryāpacāriṇī |  1729-2 gurau śiṣyaśca yājyaśca steno rājani kilbiṣaṃ ||1730-1 annādbhavanti bhūtāni parjanyādannasaṃbhavaḥ |  1730-2 yajñādbhavati parjanyo yajñaḥ karmasamudbhavaḥ ||1731-1 annādraktaṃ ca śuklaṃ cāpyato jīvaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ |  1731-2 indriyāṇi ca buddhiśca tṛpyantyannena nityaśaḥ ||1732-1 annābhāve mṛtyuḥ śālibhirannāni śālayo vṛṣṭyā |  1732-2 vṛṣṭistapaseti vadannamṛtyave tattapaścaratu ||1733-1 annāśane syātparamāṇumātraḥ praśakyate śodhayituṃ tapobhiḥ |  1733-2 māṃsāśane parvatarājamātro no śakyate śodhayituṃ mahattvāt ||1734-1 annena dhāryate sarvaṃ jagadetaccarācaraṃ |  1734-2 annātprabhavati prāṇaḥ pratyakṣaṃ nāsti saṃśayaḥ ||1735-1 anne pāne ca tāmbūle phale puṣpe vibhūṣaṇe |  1735-2 vastre vilepane dhūpe śayyāyāmāsaneṣu ca ||1736-1 anyaṃ kānanamāśu gaccha tarasā vanyaṃ phalaṃ bhuṅkṣva re dhanyaṃ dhāma vibhāti te na hi tathā puṇyaṃ jaghanyaṃ kuru |  1736-2 etasminkariśāva mā vraja vane jalpāmi tathyaṃ vaco jānāsyeva karīndradarpadalano nidrāti pañcānanaḥ ||1737-1 anyaṃ manuṣyaṃ hṛdayena kṛtvā anyaṃ tato dṛṣṭibhirāhvayanti |  1737-2 anyatra muñcanti madaprasekaṃ anyaṃ śarīreṇa ca kāmayante ||1738-1 anyaḥ kaḥ kṣāravārdhe tvamiva niyamito vānarairvā narairvā vipreṇaikena ko'nyaḥ karakuharapuṭīpātramātre nipītaḥ |  1738-2 jalpannitthaṃ pṛthūrmighvanibhiravataratphenakūṭāṭṭahāsaiḥ spardhāṃ dhatte payodheradhikamadhipuraṃ nirmito yattaṭākaḥ ||1739-1 anyaḥ karoti vyāpāraṃ lipto bhavati lekhakaḥ |  1739-2 bhagaliṅgaprasaṅgena chinnā bhavati nāsikā ||1740-1 anyaḥ ko'pi sa kumbhasaṃbhavamunerāstāṃ śikhī jāṭharo yaṃ saṃcintya dukūlavahnisadṛśaḥ saṃlakṣyate vāḍavaḥ |  1740-2 vandyaṃ tajjaṭharaṃ sa mīnamakaragrāhāvalistoyadhiḥ paścātpārśvamapūritāntaraviyadyatra svananbhrāmyati ||1741-1 anya ityanupajātayantraṇaṃ drāgudañcitavatī vilocanaṃ |  1741-2 māmavetya cakitā vṛtānanā dantadaṣṭarasanā manāgabhūt ||1742-1 anyakarmavimūḍho ya ātmakarmaviśāradaḥ |  1742-2 yathā paśya na jānāti stanapānetaracchiśuḥ ||1743-1 anyakālaparihāryamajasraṃ taddvayena vidadhe dvayameva |  1743-2 dhṛṣṭatā rahasi bhartṛṣu tābhirnirdayatvamitarairabalāsu ||1744-1 anyakṣetre kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ puṇyakṣetre vinaśyati |  1744-2 puṇyakṣetre kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ vajralepo bhaviṣyati ||1745-1 anyato naya muhūrtamānanaṃ candra eṣa sarale kalāmayaḥ ||1745-2 mā kadācana kapolayormalaṃ saṃkramayya samatāṃ sa neṣyati ||1476-1 anyato yadi nijopacikīrṣā mānahāniriti bhītiranītiḥ |  1476-2 śrīdharo'pi hi bale śriyamicchanmānamātanuta vāmanameva ||1477-1 anyatkṛtyaṃ manujaścintayati divāniśaṃ viśuddhadhiyā |  1477-2 vedhā vidadhātyanyatsvāmīva na śakyate dhartuṃ ||1748-1 anyatra deśe ghaṭitā jaganti grasiṣyate viśvasṛjeti matvā |  1748-2 saṃkocayitvā kimu pādamūla- dvayāntarāle nihitāsti yoniḥ ||1749-1 anyatra bhīṣmādgāṅgeyādanyatra ca hanūmataḥ |  1749-2 hariṇīkhuramātreṇa carmaṇā mohitaṃ jagat ||1750-1 anyatra yāpitaniśaṃ parilohitāṅgaṃ anyāṅganāgatamivāgatamuṣṇaraśmiṃ |  1750-2 prātarnirīkṣya kupiteva hi padminīyaṃ utphullahallakasulohitalocanābhūt ||1751-1 anyatra yūyaṃ kusumāvacāyaṃ kurudhvamatrāsmi kar_oṃi sakhyaḥ |  1751-2 nāhaṃ hi dūraṃ bhramituṃ samarthā prasīdatāyaṃ racito'ñjalirvaḥ ||1752-1 anyatra vrajatīti kā khalu kathā nāpyasya tādṛksuhṛdyo māṃ necchati nāgataśca hahahā ko'yaṃ vidheḥ prakramaḥ |  1752-2 ityalpetarakalpanākavalitasvāntā niśāntāntare bālā vṛttavivartanavyatikarā nāpnoti nidrāṃ niśi ||1753-1 anyathā cintitā hyarthā naraistāta manasvibhiḥ |  1753-2 anyathaiva hi gacchanti daivāditi matirmama ||1754-1 anyathā paridṛṣṭāni munibhirvedadarśibhiḥ |  1754-2 anyathā parivartante vegā iva nabhasvataḥ ||1755-1 anyathāliṅgyate kāntā bhāvena duhitānyathā |  1755-2 manaso bhidyate vṛttirabhinneṣvapi vastuṣu ||1756-1 anyathā varttamānānāṃ arthī bhūto'yamanyathā |  1756-2 asmābhiryadanuṣṭheyaṃ gandharvaistadanuṣṭhitaṃ ||1757-1 anyathā vedaśāstrāṇi jñānapāṇḍityamanyathā |  1757-2 anyathā tatpadaṃ śāntaṃ lokāḥ kliśyanti cānyathā ||1758-1 anyathā śāstragarbhiṇyā dhiyā dhīro'rthamīhate |  1758-2 svāmīva prāktanaṃ karma vidadhāti tadanyathā ||1759-1 anyathaiva vicintyante puruṣeṇa manorathāḥ |  1759-2 daivenāhitasadbhāvāḥ karmaṇāṃ gatayo'nyathā ||1760-1 anyathaivasatī putraṃ cintayedanyathā patiṃ |  1760-2 yathā yathā svabhāvasya mahābhāga udāhṛtaṃ ||1761-1 anyathaiva hi manyante puruṣāstāni tāni ca |  1761-2 anyathaiva prabhustāni karoti vikaroti ca ||1762-1 anyathaiva hi sauhārdaṃ bhavetsvacchāntarātmanaḥ |  1762-2 pravartate'nyathā vāṇī śāṭhyopahatacetasaḥ ||1763-1 anyadasmi bhavatīṃ na yācitā vāramekamadharaṃ dhayāmi te |  1763-2 ityasisvadadupāṃśukākuvāksopamardahaṭhavṛttireva taṃ ||1764-1 anyadābhāṣitaṃ pūrvaṃ dattamanyattato'lpakaṃ |  1764-2 yatsadoṣamayogyaṃ vā kūṭadānena tena kiṃ ||1765-1 anyadā bhūṣaṇaṃ puṃsaḥ kṣamā lajjeva yoṣitaḥ |  1765-2 parākramaḥ paribhave vaiyātyaṃ surateṣviva ||1766-1 anyadīyamavicintya pātaka nirghṛṇo harati jīvitopamaṃ |  1766-2 dravymatra kitavo vicetanastena gacchati kadarthanāṃ ciraṃ ||1767-1 anyaduḥkhena yo duḥkhī yo'nyaharṣeṇa harṣataḥ |  1767-2 sa eva jagatāmīśo nararūpadharo hariḥ ||1768-1 anyaducchṛṅkhalaṃ sattvaṃ anyacchāstraniyantritaṃ |  1768-2 sāmānādhikaraṇyaṃ hi tejastimirayoḥ kutaḥ ||1769-1 anyaduptaṃ jātamanyadityetannopapadyate |  1769-2 upyate yaddhi yadbījaṃ tattadeva prarohati ||1770-1 anyadoṣamiva sa svakaṃ guṇaṃ khyāpayetkathamadhṛṣṭatājaḍaḥ |  1770-2 ucyate sa khalu kāryavattayā dhigvabhinnabudhasetumarthitāṃ ||1771-1 anyadgopucchakaṃ jñeyaṃ śuddhakāṣṭhavinirmitaṃ |  1771-2 mukhe ca lohakaṇṭhena vedhyaṃ tryaṅgulasaṃmitaṃ ||1772-1 anyapūrvāṃ striyaṃ sādhvīṃ kāmayeta na garvataḥ |  1772-2 sādhvīricchanmahādevaḥ ṣaṇḍo'bhūddārukāvane ||1773-1 anyapratāpamāsādya yo dṛḍhatvaṃ na gacchati |  1773-2 jātuṣābharaṇasyeva rūpeṇāpi hi tasya kiṃ ||1774-1 anyamāśrayate lakṣmīstvanyamanyaṃ ca medinī |  1774-2 ananyagāminī puṃsāṃ kīrtirekā pativratā ||1775-1 anyayānyavanitāgatacittaṃ cittanāthamabhiśaṅkitavatyā |  1775-2 pītabhūrisurayāpi na mede nirvṛtirhi manaso madahetuḥ ||1776-1 anyayā yauvane martyo buddhyā bhavati mohitaḥ |  1776-2 madhye'nyayā jarāyāṃtu so'nyāṃ rocayate matiṃ ||1777-1 anyavarṇaṃ śiro yasya pucchaṃ vā yasya vājinaḥ |  1777-2 pucchena śirasā vāpi nānāvarṇaḥ sa ninditaḥ ||1778-1 anyavarṇaparāvṛttyā bandhacihnanigūhanaiḥ |  1778-2 anākhyātaḥ satāṃ madhye kaviścoro vibhāvyate ||1779-1 anyastrīspṛhayālavo jagati ke padbhyāmagamyā ca kā ko dhāturdaśane samastamanujaiḥ kā prārthyate'harniśaṃ |  1779-2 dṛṣṭvaikāṃ yavaneśvaro nijapure padmānanāṃ kāminīṃ mitraṃ prāha kimādareṇa sahasā yārānadīdaṃśamā ||1780-1 anyasmāllabdhoṣmā kśudraḥ prāyeṇa duḥsaho bhavati |  1780-2 ravirapi na dahati tādṛgyādṛghyuttaptavālukānikaraḥ ||1781-1 anyasminnapi kāle dayitāvirahaḥ karoti saṃtāpaṃ |  1781-2 kiṃ punaraviralajaladhara- gurutararasiteṣu divaseṣu ||1782-1 anyasminpreṣyamāṇe tu purastādyaḥ samutpatet |  1782-2 ahaṃ kiṃ karavāṇīti sa rājavasatiṃ vaset ||1783-1 anyasya lagati karṇe jīvitamanyasya harati bāṇa iva |  1783-2 hṛdayaṃ dunoti piśunaḥ kaṇṭaka iva pādalagno'pi ||1784-1 anyasyai saṃpratīyaṃ kuru madanaripo svāṅgadānaprasādaṃ nāhaṃ soḍhuṃ samarthā śirasi suranadīṃ nāpi saṃdhyāṃ praṇantuṃ |  1784-2 ityuktvā kopaviddhāṃ vighaṭayitumumāmātmadehaṃ pravṛttāṃ rundhānaḥ pātu śambhoḥ kucakalasahaṭhasparśakṛṣṭo bhujo vaḥ ||1785-1 anyāṅganābhiradhikaṃ sa karoti keliṃ tvaṃ tena mā kuru viṣādamadabhrarūpe|  1785-2 pepīyate madhukaraḥ kva na taṃ marandaṃ no jātu vismarati paṅkajinīṃ tathāpi||1786-1 anyā jagaddhitamayī manasaḥ pravṛttiranyaiva kāpi racanā vacanāvalīnāṃ |  1786-2 lokottarā ca kṛṭirākṛtirārtahṛdyā vidyāvatāṃ sakalameva girāṃ davīyaḥ||1787-1 anyādānākulāntaḥkaraṇavaśavipadbādhitapretaraṅkaṃ grāsabhraśyatkarālaślathapiśitaśavāgragrahe muktanādaṃ |  1787-2 sarvaiḥ krāmadbhirulkānanakavalarasavyāttavaktraprabhābhirvyaktaistaiḥ saṃvaladbhiḥ kṣaṇamaparamiva vy_oṃni vṛttaṃ śmaśānaṃ ||1788-1 anyānapi tarūnropya phalapuṣpopayoginaḥ |  1788-2 ratnadhenusahasrasya phalaṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ ||1789-1 anyā nirarthikā cintā balatejaḥpraṇāśinī |  1789-2 nāśayetsarvasaukhyaṃ tu rūpahāniṃ nidarśayet ||1790-1 anyāni śāstrāṇi vinodamātraṃ prāpteṣu vā teṣu na taiśca kiṃcit |  1790-2 cikitsitajyotiṣamantravādāḥ pade pade pratyayamāvahanti ||1791-1 anyāni śāstrāṇi vinodamātraṃ prāpteṣu kāleṣu na taiśca kiṃcit |  1791-2 cikitsitajyotiṣamantravādāḥ pade pade pratyayamāvahanti ||1792-1 anyānparivadansādhuryathā hi paritapyate |  1792-2 tathā parivadannanyāṃstuṣṭo bhavati durjanaḥ ||1793-1 anyānyopamitaṃ yugaṃ nirupamaṃ te'yugmamaṅgeṣu yatso'yaṃ sikthakamāsyakāntimadhunastanvaṅgi candrastava |  1793-2 tvadvācāṃ svaramātrikāṃ madakalaḥ puṃskokilo ghoṣayatyabhyāsasya kimastyagocaramiti pratyāśayā mohitaḥ ||1794-1 anyā prakāmasurataśramakhinnadehā rātriprajāgaravipāṭalanetrapadmā |  1794-2 śayyāntadeśalulitākulakeśapāśā nidrāṃ prayāti mṛdusūryakarābhitaptā||1795-1 anyā priyeṇa paribhuktamavekṣya gātraṃ harṣānvitā viracitādharacāruśobhā |  1795-2 kūrpāsakaṃ paridadhāti nakhakṣatāṅgī vyālambinīlalalitālakakuñcitākṣī ||1796-1 anyābhyo vanyābhyo mālati dhanyāsi vallarībhyastvaṃ |  1796-2 yatkila tavaiva savidhe krīḍati madhupaḥ sadaiva mudito'yaṃ ||1797-1 anyāmanyāṃ dhanāvasthāṃ prāpya vaiśeṣikīṃ narāḥ |  1797-2 asaṃtuṣṭāḥ pramuhyanti saṃtoṣaṃ yānti paṇḍitāḥ ||1798-1 anyāyaḥ prauḍhavādena nīyate nyāyatāṃ yayā |  1798-2 nyāyaścānyāyatāṃ lobhātkiṃ tayā kṣudravidyayā ||1799-1 anyāyakarabhogaiśca yo hi jīvati nityaśaḥ |  1799-2 virāgādeva lokānāṃ bhraṃśate sa hi pārthivaḥ ||1800-1 anyāyadraviṇādāneṣvudyamaḥ kriyate vṛthā |  1800-2 lubdhānāṃ satyasaṃkocātsaṃkucantyeva saṃpadaḥ ||1801-1 anyāyavittena kṛto'pi dharmaḥ savyāja ityāhuraśeṣalokāḥ |  1801-2 nyāyārjitārthena sa eva dharmo nirvyāja ityāryajanā vadanti ||1802-1 anyāyasamupāttena dānadharmo dhanena yaḥ |  1802-2 kriyate na sa kartāraṃ trāyate mahato bhayāt ||1803-1 anyā yā vasanottamaṃ tadadhunā saṃgṛhya mānyaṃ punaryanmāṃ darśayasi priyaṃ priyatamaṃ toṣāya roṣāya no |  1803-2 sarvasaiva sataśca rītiriyatī pūrvaṃ śrutā vṛddhataḥ prāyaḥ prāpya nijaprakarṣamakhilaṃ mitraṃ mudādarśayat ||1804-1 anyāyopārjitaṃ dravyaṃ daśavarṣāṇi tiṣṭhati |  1804-2 prāpte caikādaśe varṣe samūlaṃ ca vinaśyati ||1805-1 anyāyopārjitaṃ dravyaṃ arthadūṣaṇamucyate |  1805-2 apātradānaṃ pātrārtha haraṇaṃ tasya lakṣaṇaṃ ||1806-1 anyārthamaṅgīkṛtavāripāṇau viśaṅkamānāstava dānanīraṃ |  1806-2 parasparaṃ dīnamukhā na ke vā devāḥ sumeruṃ śuśucuḥ svabhūmiṃ ||1807-1 anyā vihāya patigṛha- mavicintitakulakalaṅkajanagarhāḥ |  1807-2 rāgoparaktahṛdayā yānti digantaṃ manuṣyā āsajya ||1808-1 anyāściraṃ suratakelipariśrameṇa khedaṃ gatāḥ praśithilīkṛtagātrayaṣṭyaḥ|  1808-2 saṃhṛṣyamāṇavipulorupayodharārtā abhyañjanaṃ vidadhati pramadāḥ suśobhāḥ ||1809-1 anyāsāṃ na kimasti veśmani vadhūḥ kaivaṃ niśi prāvṛṣi praiti prāntataḍāgamamba gṛhiṇi svasthāsi me'vasthayā |  1809-2 bhagno'yaṃ valayo ghaṭo vighaṭitaḥ kṣaṇṇā tanuḥ kaṇṭakairākrāntaḥ sa tathā bhujaṅgahatakaḥ kaṣṭaṃ na yaddaṣṭavān ||1810-1 anyā sādhigatā tvayā kva yuvatī yasyāḥ sa mānagraho yāte locanagocaraṃ priyatame saṃpratyapakrāmati |  1810-2 asmākaṃ punarugrapūruṣaśatāśleṣapragalbhātmanāṃ etādṛśyanabhijñapūruṣapariṣvaṅge kutaḥ sādhvasaṃ ||1811-1 anyā sā sarasī marāla munibhiryattīrasopānikā- vinyastānbalitaṇḍulānkavalayandṛṣṭo'si hṛdyairmukhaiḥ |  1811-2 eṣā pakkaṇavāpikā kamalinīkhaṇḍe'tra guptātmabhirvyādhaistvadvidhamugdhabandhanavidhau kiṃ nāma nāsūtryate ||1812-1 anyāsu tāvadupamardasahāsu bhṛṅga lolaṃ vinodaya manaḥ sumanolatāsu |  1812-2 mughdāmajātarajasaṃ kalikāmakāle vyarthaṃ kadarthayasi kiṃ navamallikāyāḥ ||1813-1 anyāstā guṇaratnarohaṇabhuvo dhanyā mṛdanyaiva sā saṃbhārāḥ khalu te'nya eva vidhinā yaireṣa sṛṣṭo yuvā |  1813-2 śrīmatkāntijuṣāṃ dviṣāṃ karatalātstrīṇāṃ nitambasthalāddṛṣṭe yatra patanti mūḍhamanasāmastrāṇi vastrāṇi ca ||1814-1 anyāstā malayādrikānanabhuvaḥ svacchasravannirjjharāstṛṣṇā yāsu nivartate tanubhṛtāmālokamātrādapi |  1814-2 rūkṣadhvāṅkṣaparigraho marurayaṃ sphārībhavadbhrāntayaḥ tā etā mṛgatṛṣṇikā hariṇa he nedaṃ payo gamyatāṃ ||1815-1 anyūnaṃ guṇamamṛtasya dhārayantī saṃphullasphuritasaroruhāvataṃsā |  1815-2 preyobhiḥ saha sarasī niṣevyamāṇā raktatvaṃ vyadhita vadhūdṛśaṃ surā ca ||1816-1 anyūnonnatayo'timātrapṛthavaḥ pṛthvīdharaśrībhṛtastanvantaḥ kanakāvalībhirupamāṃ saudāmanīdāmabhiḥ |  1816-2 varṣantaḥ śamamānayannupalasacchṛṅgāralekhāyudhāḥ kāle kāliyakāyakālavapuṣaḥ pāṃsūngajāmbh_oṃucaḥ ||1817-1 anye ca bahavo rāgā jātā deśaviśeṣataḥ |  1817-2 mārūprabhṛtayo loke te ca taddeśikāḥ smṛtāḥ ||1818-1 anye cetprākṛtā lokā bahupāpāni kurvate |  1818-2 pradhānapuruṣeṇāpi kāryaṃ tatpṛṣṭhato nu kiṃ ||1819-1 anye te jaladāyino jaladharāstṛṣṇāṃ vinighnanti ye bhrātaścātaka kiṃ vṛthātiraṭitaiḥ khinno'si viśrāmyatāṃ |  1819-2 meghaḥ śārada eṣa kāśadhavalaḥ pānīyariktodaro garjatyeva hi kevalaṃ bhṛśataraṃ no bindumapyujjhati ||1820-1 anye te vihagāḥ payoda parito dhāvanti tṛṣṇāturā vāpīkūpataḍāgasāgarajale majjanti dattādarāḥ |  1820-2 māmadyāpi na vetsi cātakaśiśuṃ yacchuṣkakaṇṭho'pi sannānyaṃ vāñchati nopasarpati na ca prastauti na dhyāyati ||1821-1 anye te sumanolihaḥ prahasadapyambhojamujjhanti ye vātāndolanakelicañcaladalaprāntairapi trāsitāḥ |  1821-2 anyaḥ ko'pi sa eṣa ṣaṭpadabhaṭaḥ saṃsahya karṇāhatīryenānekapagaṇḍagaṇḍalamiladdānāmbuni krīḍitaṃ ||1822-1 anyenāpi svamāṃsena chidyamānena dūyate |  1822-2 tathāpi paramāṃsāni svādūnīti samaśnute ||1823-1 anye'pi santi guṇinaḥ kati no jagatyāṃ hāra tvameva guṇināmuparisthito'si |  1823-2 eṇīdṛśāmurasi nityamavasthito'si sadvṛttatā ca śucitā ca na khaṇḍitā te||1824-1 anye'pi santi bata tāmarasāvataṃsā haṃsāvalīvalayino jalasaṃniveśāḥ |  1824-2 ko'pyāgraho gururayaṃ bata cātakasya pauraṃdarīṃ yadabhivāñchati vāridhārāṃ ||1825-1 anyeyaṃ rūpasaṃpattiranyā vaidagdhyadhoraṇī |  1825-2 naiṣā nalinapatrākṣī sṛṣṭiḥ sādhāraṇī vidheḥ ||1826-1 anyeṣāṃ yo na pāpāni cintayatyātmano yathā |  1826-2 tasya pāpāgamastāta hetvabhāvānna vidyate ||1827-1 karmaṇā manasā vācā parapīḍāṃ karoti yaḥ |  1827-2 tadbījaṃ janma phalati prabhūtaṃ tasya cāśubhaṃ ||1828-1 anyeṣāmapi naśyanti suhṛdaśca dhanāni ca |  1828-2 paśya buddhyā manuṣyāṇāṃ rājannāpadamātmanaḥ ||1829-1 anyeṣvarthakṛtā maitrī yāvadarthaviḍambanaṃ |  1829-2 puṃbhiḥ strīṣu kṛtā yadvatsumanaḥsviva ṣaṭpadaiḥ ||1830-1 anye hi duḥkhamṛtavaḥ prathayantyahobhiḥ sūryāṃśuluptatimirairabhisārikāṇāṃ |  1830-2 hemanta eṣa himaruddhasahasradhāmā kāmaṃ karoti divaseṣvapi śarma tāsāṃ ||1831-1 anyaiḥ sākaṃ virodhena vayaṃ pañcottaraṃ śataṃ |  1831-2 parasparavirodhena vayaṃ pañca ca te śataṃ ||1832-1 anyocchiṣṭeṣu pātreṣu bhuktvaiteṣu mahībhujaḥ |  1832-2 kasmānna lajjāmavahañśaucacintāṃ na vā dadhuḥ ||1833-1 anyo dhanaṃ pretagatasya bhuṅkte vayāṃsi cāgniśca śarīradhātūn |  1833-2 dvābhyāmayaṃ saha gacchatyamutra puṇyena pāpena ca veṣṭyamānaḥ ||1834-1 anyonyaṃ kṛtavairāṇāṃ putrapautraṃ nigacchati |  1834-2 putrapautre vinaṣṭe tu paralokaṃ nigacchati ||1835-1 anyonyaṃ daśanacchadeṣu daśatoranyonyamāliṅgatoranyonyaṃ nakharaiḥ kharairvilikhatoranyonyamācumbatoḥ |  1835-2 autsukyena navaṃ navaṃ nidhuvanaprāgalbhyamabhyasyatoḥ śrānte pañcaśare'pi na praṇayinoḥ prāpto'pakarṣaṃ rasaḥ ||1836-1 anyonyaṃ matimāsthāya yatra sampratibhāṣyate |  1836-2 na caikamatye śreyosti mantraḥ so'dhama ucyate ||1837-1 anyonyakṛtavairāṇāṃ saṃvāsānmṛdutāṃ gataṃ |  1837-2 nava tiṣṭhati tadvaraṃ puṣkarasthamivodakaṃ ||1838-1 anyonyagūḍhaceṣṭita- sadbhāvasnehapāśabaddhasya |  1838-2 vicchedakaro mṛtyurdhīrāṇāṃ vā paricchedaḥ ||1839-1 anyonyagopyaṃ viduṣāṃ tu lakṣaṃ yadasya tulyāḥ prabhavo bhavanti |  1839-2 parasparāliṅganatatparāṇāṃ na kānta saukhyaṃ yuvatījanānāṃ ||1840-1 anyonyagrathitāruṇāṅgulinamatpāṇidvayasyopari nyasyocchavāsavikampitādharadalaṃ nirvedaśūnyaṃ mukhaṃ |  1840-2 āmīlannayanāntavāntasalilaṃ ślādhyasya nindyasya vā kasyedaṃ dṛḍhasauhṛdaṃ pratidinaṃ dīnaṃ tvayā smaryate ||1841-1 anyonyadarśanakṛtaḥ samānarūpānurāgakulavayasāṃ |  1841-2 keṣāṃcideva manye samāgamo bhavati puṇyavatāṃ ||1842-1 anyonyaprakaṭānurāgarabhasādudbhūtar_oṃāñcayorutkaṇṭhāparikhedaduḥsahatayā kṣāmībhavadgātrayoḥ |  1842-2 naktaṃ daivavaśātkṣaṇaṃ gurujanātsvāyattatāṃ prāptayoryāto durlabhasaṃgamotsavavidhiryūnorjanākhyeyatāṃ ||1843-1 anyonyabhedo bhrātéṇāṃ suhṛdāṃ vā balāntaka |  1843-2 bhavatyānandakṛddeva dviṣatāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ ||1844-1 anyonyamutpīḍayadutpalākṣyāḥ stanadvayaṃ pāṇḍu tathā pravṛddhaṃ |  1844-2 madhye yathā śyāmamukhasya tasya mṛṇālasūtrāntaramapyalabhyaṃ ||1845-1 anyonyarāgavaśayoryuvayorvilāsa- svacchandatācchidapayātu tadālivargaḥ|  1845-2 atyājayansicayamājimakārayanvā dantairnakhaiśca madano madanaḥ kathaṃ syāt ||1846-1 anyonyalakṣaṇairyuktāṃ nārīṃ saṃkīrṇakāṃ viduḥ |  1846-2 yā nijaireva saṃyuktā cihnaistāṃ kevalāṃ jaguḥ ||1847-1 anyonyalāvaṇyavilokanāntaṃ netradvayaṃ syātsatataṃ kilāsyāḥ |  1847-2 ityeva nāsā vihitā vidhātrā madhye tayordarśanavighnakartrī ||1848-1 anyonyavārighaṭitau dhanavāripātādbhītau bhṛśaṃ mṛgavadhūrmṛgayūthapaśca |  1848-2 vittastayā ghaṭanayā kṛtasaukhyamohau naivāmbuvāhajalaśīkarapātapīḍāṃ ||1849-1 anyonyaviparītāni matāni manasaḥ sadā |  1849-2 avidyāyāṃ punaḥ satye jñānasyoccatarasya hi |  1849-3 aṅgāni nikhilāni syuḥ pūrayanti parasparaṃ ||1850-1 anyonyaśvasitāśanaiḥ phaṇadharairāviśya sattvānbahirbhuñjānaiḥ paricārakaistṛṇagaṇairānandinā nandinā |  1850-2 bhikṣānnopacitaiśca dāratanayaiḥ puṣṇāti viśvāni yaḥ sa svāmī mama daivataṃ taditaro nāmnāpi nāmnāyate ||1851-1 anyonyasaṃgamavaśādadhunā vibhātāṃ tasyāpi te'pi manasī vikasadvilāse |  1851-2 sraṣṭuṃ punarmanasijasya tanuṃ pravṛttaṃ ādāviva dvyaṇukakṛtparamāṇuyugmaṃ ||1852-1 anyonyasaṃbhinnadṛśāṃ sakhīnāṃ tasyāstvayi prāganurāgacihnaṃ |  1852-2 kasyāpi ko'pīti niveditaṃ ca dhātreyikāyāścaturaṃ vacaśca ||1853-1 anyonyasaṃvalitamāṃsaladantakānti sollāsamāviralasaṃ valitārdhatāraṃ |  1853-2 līlāgṛhe pratikalaṃ kilakiñciteṣu vyāvartamānavinayaṃ mithunaṃ cakāsti||1854-1 anyonyasamupaṣṭambhādanyonyāpāśrayeṇa ca |  1854-2 jñātayaḥ saṃpravardhante sarasīvotpalānyuta ||1855-1 anyonyasmādvinirbhinnaṃ bhinnagarbhaṃ na yudhyate |  1855-2 tathaivāpasṛtaṃ śaktaṃ naikarājyāntarīkṛtaṃ ||1856-1 anyonyasya niyantraṇāparibhavādaprauḍhaśītātapāḥ puṣpyatkiṃśukacūtanūtanadalāvirbhūtaśoṇaśriyaḥ |  1856-2 padmollāsitagandhavāsitavahadvātāvadātatviṣo modonmādajuṣo haranti hṛdayaṃ vāsantikā vāsarāḥ ||1857-1 anyonyasya layaṃ bhayādiva mahābhūteṣu yāteṣvalaṃ kalpānte parameka eva sa taruḥ skandhoccayairjṛmbhate |  1857-2 vinyasya trijaganti kukṣikurhare devena yasyāsyate śākhāgre śiśuneva sevitajalakrīḍāvilāsālasaṃ ||1858-1 anyonyasyāvyabhīcāro bhavedāmaraṇāntikaḥ |  1858-2 eṣa dharmaḥ samāsena jñeyaḥ matrīpuṃsayoḥ paraḥ ||1859-1 anyonyākṣinipātajātamadayoranyonyaceṣṭāśata- spṛṣṭāntaḥpadayormanobhavaśaravyāghātasaṃbhrāntayoḥ |  1859-2 syādeva dviradendrayoriva tayorāliṅganaṃ prāṅgaṇe dhairyastambhaviḍambinī balavatī lajjā na cedargalā ||1860-1 anyonyāntaranirgatāṅgulidalaśreṇībhavanniścala- granthipragrathitaṃ karadvayamuparyuttānamābibhratā |  1860-2 seyaṃ vibhramatoraṇapraṇayinā jṛmbhābharottabhite- noccairbāhuyugena śaṃsati manojanmapraveśotsavaṃ ||1861-1 anyonyāsphālabhinnadviparudhiravasāmāṃsamastiṣkapaṅke magnānāṃ syandanānāmupari kṛtapadanyāsavikrāntapattau |  1861-2 sphītāsṛkpānagoṣṭhīrasadaśivaśivātūṛyanṛtyatkabandhe saṃgrāmaikārṇavāntaḥpayasi vicarituṃ paṇḍitāḥ pāṇḍuputrāḥ ||1862-1 anyonyāhatadantanādamukharaṃ prahvaṃ mukhaṃ kurvatā netre sāśrukaṇe nimīlya pulakavyāsaṅgi kaṇḍūyatā |  1862-2 hā hā heti suniṣṭhuraṃ vivadatā bāhū prasārya kṣaṇaṃ puṇyāgniḥ pathikena pīyata iva jvālāhataśmaśruṇā ||1863-1 anyonyeṣāṃ puṣkarairāmṛśanto dānodbhedānuccakairbhugnavālāḥ |  1863-2 unmūrdhānaḥ saṃnipatyāparāntaiḥ prāyudhyanta spaṣṭadantadhvanībhāḥ ||1864-1 anyopabhogakaluṣā mānavatī premagarvitā muditā |  1864-2 saundaryagarvitā ca premaparādhīnamānasānūḍhā ||1865-1 anyo'pi candanatarormahanīyamūrteḥ sekārthamutsahati tadguṇabaddhatṛṣṇaḥ|  1865-2 śākhoṭakasya punarasya mahāśayoyaṃ ambhoda eva śaraṇaṃ yadi nirguṇasya ||1866-1 anyo hi nāśnāti kṛtaṃ hi karma sa eva kartā sukhaduḥkhabhāgī |  1866-2 yattena kiṃciddhi kṛtaṃ hi karma tadaśnute nāsti kṛtasya nāśaḥ ||1867-1 anvagrāhi mayā preyānniśi svopanayāditi |  1867-2 na vipralabhate tāvadālīriyamalīkavāk ||1868-1 anvayāgatavidyānāṃ anvayāgatasaṃpadāṃ |  1868-2 viduṣāṃ ca prabhūṇāṃ ca hṛdayaṃ nāvalipyate ||1869-1 anvarthavedī śūraśca kṣamāvānna ca karkaśaḥ |  1869-2 kalyāṇamedhāstejasvī sa bhadraḥ parikīrtitaḥ ||1870-1 anviṣyadbhirayaṃ cirātkathamapi prārthyeta yadyarthibhirnātha tvaṃ punararthinaḥ pratidinaṃ yatnātsamanviṣyasi |  1870-2 prāptau 1873-2 pariṇatagarbhabharārtā siṃhavadhūḥ śallakīvipine ||1874-1 apaḥ pibanprapāpālīṃ anurakto vilokayan |  1874-2 agastyaṃ cintayāmāsa caturaḥ sāpi sāgarān ||1875-1 apakartāhamasmīti hṛdi te mā yadvanna ciraṃ sa tu jīvati ||1881-1 apakāriṣu mā pāpaṃ cintaya tvaṃ kadācana |  1881-2 svayameva patiṣyanti kūlajātā iva drumāḥ ||1882-1 apakuryātsamarthaṃ vā nopakuryādyadāpadi |  1882-2 ||1886-1 apakrānte bālye taruṇimani cāgantumanasi prayāte mugdhatve caturimaṇi cāśleṣarasike |  1886-2 na kenāpi spṛṣṭaṃ yadiha vayasā marma paramaṃ yadetatpañceṣorjayati vapurindīvaradṛśaḥ ||1887-1 apakvaṃ bhaṅgamāyāti atijīrṇaṃ tu karkaśaṃ |  1887-2 jñātighṛṣṭaṃ tu sodvegaṃ kalaho bāndhavaiḥ saha ||1888-1 apakvamapi cūtasya phalaṃ dravati vegataḥ |  1888-2 guḍaśuṇṭīpralepena vidhṛtaṃ śaśvadātape ||1889-1 apakve tu ghaṭe nīraṃ cālanyāṃ sūkṣmapiṣṭakaṃ |  1889-2 strīṇāṃ ca hṛdaye vārtā na tiṣṭhati kadāpi hi ||1890-1 apagatamadarāgā yoṣidekā prabhāte kṛtanibiḍakucāgrā vilaṅghayitvā satreṇa tataḥ svayamupakramet ||1894-1 apaṭaḥ kapaṭī himahīnaruciḥ prathitaḥ paśuranyakalatrarataḥ |  1894-2 tava rāya(?)vasantasamo na haro na harirnna harirnna harirnna hariḥ ||1895-1 apaṇḍitāste puruṣā matā me ye strīṣu ca śrīṣu ca viśvasanti |  1895-2 śriyo hi kurvanti tathaiva nāryo bhujaṅgakanyāparisarpaṇāni ||1896-1 apaṇḍito vāpi suhṛtpaṇḍito vāpyanātmavān |  1896-2 mantramūlaṃ yato rājyaṃ ato mantraṃ surakṣitaṃ ||1897-1 apatuṣāratayā viśadaprabhaiḥ suratasaṅgapariśramanodibhiḥ |  1897-2 kusumacāpamatejayadaṃśubhirhimakaro makarorjitaketanaṃ ||1898-1 apatyaṃ dharmakāryāṇi śuśrūṣā ratiruttamā |  1898-2 dārādhīnastathā svargaḥ pitṛṇāmātmanaśca ha ||1899-1 apatyadarśanasyārthe prāṇānapi ca yā tyajet |  1899-2 tyajanti tāmapi krūrā mātaraṃ dārahetave ||1900-1 apatyāni prāyo daśa daśa varāhī janayati kṣamābhāre dhuryaḥ sa punariha nāsīnna bhavitā |  1900-2 padaṃ kṛtvā yaḥ svaṃ phaṇipatiphaṇācakravalaye nimajjantīmantarjaladhi vasudhāmuttulayati ||1901-1 apatye yattādṛgduritamabhavattena mahatā viṣaktastīvreṇa vraṇitahṛdayena vyathayatā |  1901-2 paṭurdhārāvāhī nava iva cireṇāpi hi na me nikṛntanmarmāṇi krakaca iva manyurviramati ||1902-1 apathena pravavṛte na jātūpacito'pi saḥ |  1902-2 vṛddhau nadīmukhenaiva prasthānaṃ lavaṇāmbhasaḥ ||1903-1 apathenaiva yo yogādadhaḥ sārāyate svayaṃ |  1903-2 nīcopasarpaṇavaśātsa patedvaṃśavānapi ||1904-1 apathyabhogeṣu yathāturāṇāṃ spṛhā yathārtheṣvatidurgatānāṃ |  1904-2 paropatāpeṣu yathā khalānāṃ strīṇāṃ tathā cauryaratotsaveṣu ||1905-1 apathyamāyatau lobhādāmanantyanujīvinaḥ |  1905-2 priyaṃ śrṇoti yastebhyastamṛcchanti na saṃpadaḥ ||1906-1 apathyasya ca bhuktasya dantasya calitasya ca |  1906-2 amātyasya ca duṣṭasya samūloddharaṇaṃ sukhaṃ ||1907-1 apadāntaraṃ ca paritaḥ kṣitikṣitāṃ apatandrutabhramitahemanemayaḥ |  1907-2 javimārutāñcitaparasparopama- kṣitireṇuketuvasanāḥ patākinaḥ ||1908-1 apado dūragāmo ca sākṣaro na ca paṇḍitaḥ |  1908-2 amukhaḥ sphuṭavaktā ca yo jānāti sa paṇḍitaḥ ||1909-1 apadhvasto hyavamato duḥkhaṃ jīvati jīvitaṃ |  1909-2 jīvitaṃ yadavakṣiptaṃ yathaiva maraṇaṃ tathā ||1910-1 apanaya mahāmohaṃ rājannanena tavāsinā kathaya kuhakakrīḍāścaryaṃ kathaṃ kva ca śikṣitaṃ |  1910-2 yadarirudhiraṃ pāyaṃ pāyaṃ kusumbharasāruṇaṃ jhagiti vamati kṣīrāmbhodhipravāhasitaṃ yaśaḥ ||1911-1 apanidramadhūkapāṇḍurā sudṛśo'dṛśyata gaṇḍamaṇḍalī |  1911-2 gamitāśrujalaplavairiva kraśimākīrṇatayāpi nimnatāṃ ||1912-1 apanītaṃ sunītena yo'rthaṃ pratyāninīṣate |  1912-2 matimāsthāya sudṛḍhāṃ tadakāpuruṣavrataṃ ||1913-1 apanītaparimalāntara- kathe padaṃ nyasya devatarukusume |  1913-2 puṣpāntare'pi gantuṃ vāñchasi cedbhramara dhanyo'si ||1914-1 apaneyamudetumicchatā timiraṃ roṣamayaṃ dhiyā puraḥ |  1914-2 avibhidya niśākṛtaṃ tamaḥ prabhayā nāṃśumatāpyudīyate ||1915-1 apamānaṃ puraskṛtya mānaṃ kṛtvā tu pṛṣṭhataḥ |  1915-2 svārthamabhyuddharetprājñaḥ kāryadhvaṃso hi mūrkhatā ||1916-1 apamānaḥ pativihito guruparikaratīvratā gṛhe dauḥsthyaṃ |  1916-2 śīlakṣataye yāsāṃ tāsāmatirāgato'nyanararaktiḥ ||1917-1 apamānāttapovṛddhiḥ saṃmānācca tapaḥkṣayaḥ |  1917-2 arcitaḥ pūjito vipro dugdhā gauriva gacchati ||1918-1 apamānāttu saṃbhūtaṃ mānena praśamaṃ nayet |  1918-2 sāmapūrva upāyo vā praṇāmo vābhimānaje ||1919-1 apamānito'pi kulajo na vadati puruṣaṃ svabhāvadākṣiṇyāt |  1919-2 nahi malayacandanataruḥ paraśuprahataḥ sravetpūyaṃ ||1920-1 apameghodayaṃ varṣaṃ adṛṣṭakusumaṃ phalaṃ |  1920-2 atarkitopapannaṃ vo darśanaṃ pratibhāti me ||1921-1 apayāti saroṣayā niraste kṛtakaṃ kāmini cukṣuve mṛgākṣyā |  1921-2 kalayannapi savyatho'vatasthe-'śakunena skhalitaḥ kiletaro'pi ||1922-1 apayāntīnāmadhunā saṃketaniketanānmṛgākṣīṇāṃ |  1922-2 vāsasa eva na kevalaṃ abhavanmanaso'pi parivartaḥ ||1923-1 apayāyini svato'rthe kathamiva sauhārdadhīḥ kadaryāṇāṃ |  1923-2 yasyāpayānasamaye prāṇatyāgo'pi hā sukaraḥ ||1924-1 aparajaladherlakṣmīṃ yasminpurīṃ purabhitprabhe madagajaghaṭākārairnāvāṃ śatairavamṛdnati |  1924-2 jaladapaṭalānīkākīrṇaṃ navotpalamecakaṃ jalanidhiriva vy_oṃa vy_oṃnaḥ samo'bhavadambudhiḥ ||1925-1 sukarastaruvatsahiṣṇunā ripurunmūlayituṃ mahānapi ||1927-1 aparāddhaṃ bhavadvāṇīśrāviṇā pṛccha kiṃ mayā |  1927-2 vīṇāha paruṣaṃ yanmāṃ kalakaṇṭhī ca niṣṭhuraṃ ||1928-1 aparāddhāṃstu susnigdhānsnohoktyā mānadānataḥ |  1928-2 sādhayedbhedadaṇḍābhyāṃ yathāyogena cāparān ||1929-1 aparādhaṃ na śṛṇumo na cāsatyaṃ tvayoditaṃ |  1929-2 gopyeti gaditaḥ kṛṣṇastūṣṇīṃ tiṣṭhanpunātu vaḥ ||1930-1 aparādhaḥ sa daivasya na punarmantriṇāmayaṃ |  1930-2 kāryaṃ sughaṭitaṃ yatnāddaivayogādvinaśyati ||1931-1 aparādhasahasrabhājanaṃ patitaṃ bhīmabhavārṇavodare |  1931-2 agatiṃ śaraṇāgataṃ hare kṛpayā kevalamātmasātkuru ||1932-1 aparādhānurūpaṃ ca daṇḍaṃ pāpeṣu pātayet |  1932-2 udvejayeddhanairṛddhāndaridrānvadhabandhanaiḥ ||1933-1 aparādhini mayi daṇḍaṃ saṃharasi kimudyataṃ kuṭilakeśi |  1933-2 vardhayasi vilasitaṃ tvaṃ dāsajanāyātra kupyasi ca ||1934-1 aparādhī nāmāhaṃ prasīda rambhoru virama saṃrambhāt |  1934-2 sevyo janaśca kupitaḥ kathaṃ nu dāso niraparādhaḥ ||1935-1 aparādhīnāśokaḥ sahate caraṇāhatiṃ sarojadṛśāṃ |  1935-2 vilasitabakulo vanitā- mukhavāsī madyapāta iva ||1936-1 aparādhe'pi niḥśaṅko niyogī cirasevakaḥ |  1936-2 sa svāminamavajñāya carecca niravagrahaḥ ||1937-1 aparādho na me'stīti naitadviśvāsakāraṇaṃ |  1937-2 vidyate hi nṛśaṃsebhyo bhayaṃ guṇavatāmapi ||1938-1 aparādho mayā kānte kṛto yadi tvayā mataḥ |  1938-2 nipātya giriśṛṅgoccau kucau kiṃ na nipīḍyate ||1939-1 aparāhṇaśītalatareṇa śanairanilena lolitalatāṅgulaye |  1939-2 nilayāya śākhina ivāhvayate dadurākulāḥ khagakulāni giraḥ ||1939ā-1 aparityaktamātmānaṃ ||1941-1 aparīkṣitalakṣaṇapramāṇairaparāmṛṣṭapadārthasārthatattvaiḥ |  1941-2 avaśīkṛtajaitrayuktijālairalametairanadhītatarkavidyaiḥ ||1942-1 aparīkṣya na kartavyaṃ kartavyaṃ suparīkṣitaṃ |  1942-2 paścādbhavati saṃtāpo brāhmaṇī nakulaṃ yathā ||1943-1 aparokṣadhano gamyaḥ śrīmānapi nānyatheti nirdiṣṭaṃ |  1943-2 kandarpaśāstrakāraiḥ kutaḥ kathā luptavibhavasya ||1944-1 aparṇeyaṃ aparṇaiva latā sevyā vidvadbhiriti me matiḥ |  1945-2 yayā vṛtaḥ purāṇo'pi sthāṇuḥ sūte'mṛtaṃ phalaṃ ||1946-1 aparyantasya kālasya kiyānaṃśaḥ śaracchataṃ |  1946-2 tanmātraparamāyuryaḥ sa kathaṃ jayo randhraprahāriṇāṃ ||1954-1 apaśokamanāḥ kuṭumbinīṃ anugṛhṇīṣva nivāpadattibhiḥ |  1954-2 svajanāśru kilātisaṃtataṃ dahati pretamiti pracakṣate ||1955-1 apaścāttāpakṛtsamyaganubandhiphalapradaḥ |  1955-2 adīrghakālo'bhīṣṭaśca praśasto mantra ucyate ||1956-1 apaśyadbhiriveśānaṃ raṇānnivavṛte gaṇaiḥ |  1956-2 muhyatyeva hi kṛcchreṣu saṃbhramajvalitaṃ manaḥ ||1957-1 vācāṭaṣṭiṭṭibho yatra ||1959-1 apasarati na cakṣuṣo mṛgākṣī rajaniriyaṃ ca na yāti naiti nidrā |  1959-2 praharati madano'pi duḥkhitānāṃ bata bahuśo'bhimukhībhavantyapāyāḥ ||1960-1 apasara pṛthivi ||1964-1 apasārasamāyuktaṃ nayajñairdurgamucyate |  1964-2 apasāraparityaktaṃ durgavyājena bandhanaṃ ||1965-1 apastaranti pāṣāṇā hyanughnanti hi rākṣasān |  1965-2 kapayaḥ karma kurvanti kālasya tathāpyanekacitto hṛtamathavā vivṛṇoti kaḥ parasvaṃ ||1970-1 apahastitabāndhave tvayā vihitaṃ sāhasamasya tṛṣṇayā |  1970-2 tadihānaparādhini priye sakhi ko'yaṃ karuṇojjhitakramaḥ ||1971-1 apahāya yasyārthastasya tatphalaṃ ||1973-1 apahnuvānasya janāya yannijāṃ adhīratāmasya kṛtaṃ manobhuvā |  1973-2 abodhi tajjāgaraduḥkhasākṣiṇī niśā ca śayyā ca śaśāṅkak_oṃalā ||1974-1 apāṃ nidhiṃ bhavatyavaśyaṃ tadvidvānnāśrayedaśubhātmakaṃ ||1976-1 apāṃ mūle līnaṃ kṣaṇaparicitaṃ candanarase muṇālīhārādau kṛtalaghupadaṃ candramasi ca |  1976-2 muhūrtaṃ viśrāntaṃ sarasakadalīkānanatale priyākaṇṭhāśleṣe nivasati paraṃ śaityamadhunā ||1977-1 apāṃ vihāre tava hāravibhramaṃ karotu nīre pṛṣadutkarastaran |  1977-2 kaṭhorapīnoccakucadvayītaṭa- truṭattaraḥ sāravasāravormijaḥ ||1978-1 apākuru kapolataḥ sakhi bhujaṅgavallīrasaṃ parityaja kucasthalāttruṭitabandhanaṃ kañcukaṃ |  1978-2 pidhehi daśanacchade daśanajakṣataṃ lākṣayā vadetthamabalāgaṇe gurujane kathaṃ yāsyasi ||1979-1 1982-2 visāri r_oṃāñcanakañcukaṃ tanostanoti yo'sau subhage tavāgataḥ ||1983-1 apāṅgastava tanvaṅgi vicitro'yaṃ bhujaṅgamaḥ |  1983-2 dṛṣṭamātraḥ sumanasāṃ api mūrchāvidhāyakaḥ ||1984-1 apāpāstatkulīnāśca mānayanti svakānhitān |  1992-2 eṣa prāyo narendrāṇāṃ śaṅkanīyastu śobhanaḥ ||1993-1 apāmudvṛttānāṃ nijamupadiśantyā sthitipadaṃ dadhatyā śālīnāmavanatimudāre sati phale |  1993-2 mayūrāṇāmugraṃ viṣamiva harantyā madamaho kṛtaḥ kṛtsnasyāyaṃ vinaya iva lokasya śaradā ||1994-1 apāyakalitā manurjagati sāpadaḥ sampado vinaśvaramidaṃ sukhaṃ viṣayajaṃ śriyaścañcalāḥ |  1994-2 bhavanti jarasārasāstaralalocanā yoṣitastadapyayamaho janastapasi no pare rajyati||1995-1 apāyasaṃdarśanajāṃ vipattiṃ upāyasaṃdarśanajāṃ ca siddhiṃ |  1995-2 medhāvino nītividhiprayuktāṃ bhavatkīrtayaḥ ||1999-1 apārasaṃsārasamudramadhye saṃmajjato me śaraṇaṃ kimasti |  1999-2 guro dayālo kṛpayā vadaitadviśveśapādāmbujadīrghanaukā ||2000-1 apāre kāvyasaṃsāre kavireva prajāpatiḥ |  2000-2 yathā vai rocate viśvaṃ tathedaṃ parivartate ||2001-1 apāre pāthodhau kimiti satimigrāhagahane nilīya śrīnāthaḥ svapiti bhujage śaṅkita iva |  2001-2 kimetāvadbhirvā bhavatu kila apāsya lakṣmīharaṇotthavairitāṃ acintayitvā ca tadadrimanthanaṃ |  2008-2 dadau nivāsaṃ haraye mahodadhirvimatsarā dhīradhiyāṃ hi vṛttayaḥ ||2009-1 api kalpānilasyaiva taraṅgasya mahodadheḥ |  2009-2 śakyate prasaro roddhuṃ nānuraktasya cetasaḥ ||2010-1 api kāpuruṣo bhīruḥ syāccennṛpatisevakaḥ |  2010-2 tathāpi na parābhūtiṃ janādāpnoti mānavaḥ ||2011-1 api kāpuruṣo bhīruḥ ||2015-1 api kuñjarakarṇāgrādapi pippalapallavāt |  2015-2 api vidyudvilasitādvilolaṃ lalanāmanaḥ ||2016-1 api kriyārthaṃ sulabhaṃ samitkuśaṃ jalānyapi snānavidhikṣamāṇi te |  2016-2 api svaśaktyā
