kevalamasaṃmānaṃ labhate ca viḍambanāṃ ||2122-1 apṛṣṭena na vaktavyaḥ sacivena vipaścitā |  2122-2 nānuśiṣyādapṛcchantaṃ mahadetaddhi sāhasaṃ ||2123-1 apṛṣṭenāpi vaktavyaṃ sacivenātra kiṃcana |  2123-2 pṛṣṭena tu viśeṣeṇa vācyaṃ pathyaṃ mahīpateḥ ||2124-1 apṛṣṭo'trāpradhāno yo brūte rājñaḥ puraḥ kudhīḥ |  2124-2 na kevalamasaṃmānaṃ labhate ca viḍambanaṃ ||2125-1 apṛṣṭvaiva bhavenmūḍhajñānaṃ manasi cintanāt |  2125-2 apūrṇaḥ kurute śabdaṃ na pūrṇaḥ kurute ghaṭaḥ ||2126-1 apekṣante na ca snehaṃ na pātraṃ na daśāntaraṃ |  2126-2 sadā lokahitāsaktā ratnadīpā ivottamāḥ ||2127-1 apetāḥ śatrubhyo vayamiti viṣādo'yamaphalaḥ pratīkārastveṣāmaniśamanusaṃdhātumucitaḥ |  2127-2 jarāsaṃdhādbhagnaḥ saha halabhṛtā dānavaripurjaghānainaṃ paścānna kimanilasūnuḥ priyasakhaḥ ||2128-1 apehi hṛdayādvā me vāme darśanamehi vā |  2128-2 adūravirahotkaṇṭhāduḥkhaṃ duḥkena sahyate ||2129-1 apyakhilālaṃkārā- nākalayanto'pi rasavidaścitraṃ |  2129-2 kalayanti sarasakāvye nālaṃkāraṃ kadācidapi ||2130-1 apyagraṇīrmantrakṛtāmṛṣīṇāṃ kuśāgrabuddhe kuśalī guruste |  2130-2 yatastvayā jñānamaśeṣamāptaṃ lokena caitanyamivoṣṇaraśmeḥ ||2131-1 apyatiśayitamanarthaṃ śamayatyarthaṃ samarpayannṛpatiḥ |  2131-2 tamanarpayannirarthaṃ prāṇena samaṃ parityajatyarthaṃ ||2132-1 apyatyucco bhūmisamaḥ pārthivo'pi na pārthivaḥ |  2132-2 mānārthaṃ jīvitaṃ tasya kṛte māne na jīvati ||2133-1 apyanārabhamāṇasya vibhorutpāditāḥ paraiḥ |  2133-2 vrajanti guṇatāmarthāḥ śabdā iva vihāyasaḥ ||2134-1 apyanāvarjitāḥ svena phalarāgeṇa saṃnatāḥ |  2134-2 arbhakairapi gṛhyante sādhusaṃtānaśākhinaḥ ||2135-1 apyanekairupacitairdurvinītaiḥ sutairalaṃ |  2135-2 nidarśanaṃ dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ śataṃ duryodhanādayaḥ ||2136-1 apyabhīṣṭā na labhyante saṃtyaktā na tyajanti ca |  2136-2 vāsanā iva saṃsāre mohanaikaparāḥ striyaḥ ||2137-1 apyaśakyaṃ tvayā dattaṃ duḥkhaṃ śakyantarātmani |  2137-2 bāṣpo vāhīkanārīṇāṃ vegavāhī kapolayoḥ ||2138-1 apyākarasamutpannamaṇijātirasaṃskṛtā |  2138-2 jātarūpeṇa kalyāṇi na hi saṃyogamarhati ||2139-1 apyātmano vināśaṃ gaṇayati na khalaḥ paravyasanahṛṣṭaḥ |  2139-2 prāyo mastakanāśe samaramukhe nṛtyati kabandhaḥ ||2140-1 apyāpatsamayaḥ sādhoḥ prayāti ślāghanīyatāṃ |  2140-2 vidhorvidhuṃtudāskandavipatkālo'pi sundaraḥ ||2141-1 apyāmīlitapaṅkajāṃ kamalinīmapyullasatpallavāṃ vāsantīmapi saudhabhittipatitāmātmapraticchāyikāṃ |  2141-2 manvānaḥ prathamaṃ priyeti pulakasvedaprakampākulaṃ prītyāliṅgati nāsti seti na punaḥ khedottaraṃ mūrcchati ||2142-1 apyutkaṭe ca raudre ca śatrau yasya na hīyate |  2142-2 dhairyaṃ prāpte mahīpasya na sa yāti parābhavaṃ ||2143-1 apyunnatapadārūḍhaḥ pūjyānnaivāpamānayet |  2143-2 nahuṣaḥ śakratāṃ prāpya cyuto'gastyāvamānanāt ||2144-1 apyunmattātpralapato bālācca parisarpataḥ |  2144-2 sarvataḥ sāramādadyādaśmabhya iva kāñcanaṃ ||2145-1 apyupāyaistribhistāta yo'rthaḥ prāptuṃ na śakyate |  2145-2 tasya vikramakālāṃstānyuktānāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ ||2146-1 apyuddāmavyasanasaraṇeḥ saṃgame kāmukānāṃ bhadraṃ bhadre bhuvanajayinastvatkalākaulaśasya |  2146-2 apyutsāhapracurasuhṛdaḥ kāmakelīnivāsāḥ prauḍhotsāhāstava suvadane svastimanto vilāsāḥ ||2147-1 apyekavaṃśajanuṣoḥ paśyata pūrṇatvatucchatābhājoḥ |  2147-2 jyākārmukayoḥ kaścidguṇabhūtaḥ kaścidapi bhartā ||2148-1 apyetadrajanīmayaṃ jagadatho nidrāmayī sā niśā nidrā svapnamayī bhavedatha ca sa svapno mṛgākṣīmayaḥ |  2148-2 seyaṃ mānamayī mama priyatamā taccāṭuceṣṭāmayo mādṛkkveti samīhitaikavidhaye saṃkalpa tubhyaṃ namaḥ ||2149-1 apyeva dahanaṃ spṛṣṭvā vane tiṣṭhanti pādapāḥ |  2149-2 rājadoṣaparāmṛṣṭāstiṣṭhante nāparādhinaḥ ||2150-1 apyautsukye mahati dayitaprārthanāsu pratīpāḥ kāṅkṣantyo'pi vyatikarasukhaṃ kātarāḥ svāṅgadāne |  2150-2 ābādhyante na khalu madanenaiva labdhāntaratvādābādhante manasijamapi kṣiptakālāḥ kumāryaḥ ||2151-1 aprakaṭavartitastana- maṇḍalikānibhṛtacakradarśinyaḥ |  2151-2 āveśayanti hṛdayaṃ smaracaryāguptayoginyaḥ ||2152-1 aprakaṭīkṛtaśaktiḥ śakto'pi janāttiraskriyāṃ labhate |  2152-2 nivasannantardāruṇi laṅghyo vahnirna tu jvalitaḥ ||2153-1 apragalbhasya yā vidyā kṛpaṇasya ca yaddhanaṃ |  2153-2 yacca bāhubalaṃ bhīrorvyarthametattrayaṃ bhuvi ||2154-1 apragalbhāḥ padanyāse jananīrāgahetavaḥ |  2154-2 santyeke bahulālāpāḥ kavayo bālakā iva ||2155-1 apraṇodyo'tithiḥ sāyaṃ sūryoḍho gṛhamedhinā |  2155-2 kāle prāptastvakāle vā nāsyānaśnangṛhe vaset ||2156-1 apraṇādyo'tithiḥ sāyaṃ sūryoḍho gṛhamedhināṃ |  2156-2 pūjayā tasya devatvaṃ prayānti gṛhamedhinaḥ ||2157-1 apratikṛtyātmānaṃ sahasānartheṣu na pravarteta |  2157-2 śirasi dhṛte'mṛtakiraṇe viṣamaghasadviṣamanetro'pi ||2158-1 apratibuddhe śrotari vakturvākyaṃ prayāti vaiphalyaṃ |  2158-2 nayanavihīne bhartari lāvaṇyamiveha khañjanākṣīṇāṃ ||2159-1 apratiṣṭhāśca ye kecidadharmaśaraṇāśca ye |  2159-2 teṣāṃ pratiṣṭhā gaṅgeha śaraṇaṃ śarma varma ca ||2160-1 apratyakṣāṇi śāstrāṇi vivādastatra kevalaṃ |  2160-2 pratyakṣaṃ jyautiṣaṃ śāstraṃ candrārkau yatra sākṣiṇau ||2161-1 apratyākalitaprabhāvavibhave sarvāśrayāmbhonidhau vāso nālpatapaḥphalaṃ yadaparaṃ doṣo'yameko mahān |  2161-2 śambūko'pi yadatra durlabhatarai ratnairanarghaiḥ saha spardhāmekanivāsakāraṇavaśādekāntato vāñchati ||2162-1 apradātā samṛddho'sau daridraśca mahāmanāḥ |  2162-2 aśrutaśca samunnaddhastamāhurmūḍhacetasaṃ ||2163-1 apradīpā yathā rātriranādityaṃ yathā nabhaḥ |  2163-2 tathāsāṃvatsaro rājā bhramatyandha ivādhvani ||2164-1 apradhānaḥ pradhānaḥ syātpārthivaṃ yadi sevate |  2164-2 pradhāno'pyapradhānaḥ syādyadi sevāvivarjitaḥ ||2165-1 aprabhūtamatanīyasi tanvī kāñcidhāmni pihitaikataroru |  2165-2 kṣ_oṃamākulakarā vicakarṣa krāntapallavamabhīṣṭatamena ||2166-1 apramattaśca yo rājā sarvajño vijitendriyaḥ |  2166-2 kṛtajño dharmaśīlaśca sa rājā tiṣṭhate ciraṃ ||2167-1 apramatte'pi puruṣe hitakāryāvalambini |  2167-2 daivamunmārgarasikaṃ anyathaiva pramadyate ||2168-1 apramādaśca kartavyastvayā rājñaḥ samāśraye |  2168-2 tvadīyasya śarīrasya vayaṃ bhāgyopajīvinaḥ ||2169-1 aprasannamaparāddhari patyau kopadīptamurarīkṛtadhairyaṃ |  2169-2 kṣālitaṃ nu śamitaṃ nu vadhūnāṃ drāvitaṃ nu hṛdayaṃ madhuvāraiḥ ||2170-1 aprasādo'nadhiṣṭhānaṃ deyāṃśaharaṇaṃ ca yat |  2170-2 kālayāpo'pratīkārastadvairāgyasya kāraṇaṃ ||2171-1 aprastāvastutibhiraniśaṃ karṇaśūlaṃ karoti svaṃ dāridryaṃ vadati vasanaṃ darśayatyeva jīrṇaṃ |  2171-2 chāyābhūtaścalati na puraḥ pārśvayornaiva paścānniḥsvaḥ khedaṃ diśati dhanināṃ vyādhivadduścikitsyaḥ ||2172-1 aprākṛtaḥ sa kathamastu na vismayāya yasminnuvāsa karuṇā ca kṛtajñatā ca |  2172-2 lakṣmīśca sāttvikaguṇajvalitaṃ ca tejo dharmaśca mānavinayau ca parākramaśca ||2173-1 aprākṛtasya cāritātiśayasya bhāvairatyadbhutairmama hṛtasya tathāpyanāsthā|  2173-2 ko'pyeṣa vīraśiśukākṛtiraprameya- sāmarthyasārasamudāyamayaḥ padārthaḥ ||2174-1 aprākṛtasyāhavadurmadasya nivāryamasyāstrabalena vīryaṃ |  2174-2 alpīyaso'pyāmayatulyavṛttermahāpakārāya riporvivṛddhiḥ ||2175-1 aprājñena ca kātareṇa ca guṇaḥ syādbhaktiyuktena kaḥ prajñāvikramaśālino'pi hi bhavetkiṃ bhaktihīnātphalaṃ |  2175-2 prajñāvikramabhaktayaḥ samuditā yeṣāṃ guṇā bhūtaye te bhṛtyā nṛpateḥ kalatramitare saṃpatsu cāpatsu ca ||2176-1 aprāptakālaṃ vacanaṃ bṛhaspatirapi bruvan |  2176-2 labhate buddhyavajñānaṃ avamānaṃ ca bhārata ||2177-1 aprāptakālavacanaṃ bṛhaspatirapi bruvan |  2177-2 prāpnuyādbuddhiśaithilyaṃ apamānaṃ ca śāśvataṃ ||2178-1 aprāptakālo yo mūrkho hasetsvecchānusārataḥ |  2178-2 prāpnuyādbuddhyavajñānaṃ sabhāyāṃ caiva śāśvataṃ ||2179-1 aprāptakelisukhayoratimānaruddha- saṃdhānayo rahasi jātaruṣorakasmāt |  2179-2 yūnormitho'bhilaṣatoḥ prathamānunītiṃ bhāvāḥ prasādapiśunāḥ kṣapayanti nidrāṃ ||2180-1 aprāptapuṣpodgamavibhramaiva ruddhā bhujaṅgena tathā yatheyaṃ |  2180-2 na śakyate spraṣṭumapīhamānairāmodinī candanaśākhikeva ||2181-1 aprāptaprathamāvakartanaruṣā vyānamramūkībhavad- vakreṣvanyaśiraḥsu yasya dahane chinnaṃ śiro juhvataḥ |  2181-2 uccārya svayameva mantramakaronnāsyāhamityātmanastyāgaṃ paṅktimukhaḥ sa vikramasuhṛdvīraḥ kathaṃ varṇyate ||2182-1 aprāptayauvanā nārī na kāmāya na śāntaye |  2182-2 saṃprāpte ṣoḍaśe varṣe gardabhī cāpsarāyate ||2183-1 aprāptavallabhasamāgamanādhikāyāḥ sakhyāḥ puro'tra nijacittavinodabuddhyā |  2183-2 ālāpaveṣagatihāsyavikatthanādyaiḥ prāṇeśvarānukṛtimākalayanti līlāṃ ||2184-1 aprāpye'pi yathā kāme dharme cintā na kiṃ tathā |  2184-2 alābhe'pi dvayorekā bhayadā śivadāparā ||2185-1 aprāpyeṣurudāsitāsiraśanerārātkutaḥ śaṅkutaścakravyutkramakṛtparokṣaparaśuḥ śūlena śūnyā yayā |  2185-2 mṛtyurdaityapateḥ kṛtaḥ sa sadṛśaḥ pādāṅgulīparvataḥ pārvatyā pratipālyatāṃ tribhuvanaṃ niḥśalyakalyaṃ tayā ||2186-1 aprāmāṇyaṃ ca vedānāṃ śāstrāṇāṃ cātilaṅghanaṃ |  2186-2 sarvatra cānavasthānaṃ etannāśanamātmanaḥ ||2187-1 aprārthanamasaṃsparśaṃ asaṃdarśanameva ca |  2187-2 puruṣasyeha niyamo bhavedrāgaprahāṇaye ||2188-1 aprārthitaṃ yathā duḥkhaṃ tathā sukhamapi svayaṃ |  2188-2 prāṇinaṃ pratipadyeta sarvaṃ niyatiyantritaṃ ||2189-1 apriyaṃ na hi bhāṣeta na virudhyeta kenacit |  2189-2 kāryasiddhiṃ samīheta kāryabhraṃśo hi mūrkhatā ||2190-1 apriyaṃ puruṣa cāpi paradrohaṃ parastriyaṃ |  2190-2 adharmamanṛtaṃ caiva dūrātprājño vivarjayet ||2191-1 apriyaṃ yasya kurvīta bhūyastasya priyaṃ caret |  2191-2 acireṇa priyaḥ sa syādyo'priyaḥ priyamācaret ||2192-1 apriyamuktāḥ puruṣāḥ prayatante dviguṇamapriyaṃ vaktuṃ |  2192-2 tasmādavācyamapriyaṃ apriyamaśrotukāmena ||2193-1 apriyavacanadaridraiḥ priyavacanāḍhyaiḥ svadāraparituṣṭaiḥ |  2193-2 paraparivādanivṛttaiḥ kvacitkvacinmaṇḍitā vasudhā ||2194-1 apriyavacanāṅgārairdagdho'pi na vipriyaṃ vadatyāryaḥ |  2194-2 kiṃ dahyamānamagaru svabhāvasurabhiṃ parityajati ||2195-1 apriyasyāpi vacasaḥ pariṇāmāvirodhinaḥ |  2195-2 vaktā śrotā ca yatrāsti ramante tatra saṃpadaḥ ||2196-1 apriyāṇyapi kurvantaḥ svārthāyodyata ceṣṭitāḥ |  2196-2 paṇḍitā nopalabhyante vāyasairiva kokilāḥ ||2197-1 apriyāṇyapi kurvāṇo niṣṭhurāṇyapi ca bruvan |  2197-2 cetaḥ prahlādayatyeva sarvāvasthāsu vallabhaḥ ||2198-1 apriyāṇyapi kurvāṇo yaḥ priyaḥ priya eva saḥ |  2198-2 dagdhamandirasāre'pi kasya vahnāvanādaraḥ ||2199-1 apriyāṇyapi pathyāni ye vadanti nṛṇāmiha |  2199-2 ta eva suhṛdaḥ proktā anye syurnāmadhārakāḥ ||2200-1 apriyā na bhaviṣyanti priyo me na bhaviṣyati |  2200-2 ahaṃ ca na bhaviṣyāmi sarvaṃ ca na bhaviṣyati ||2201-1 apriyaiḥ saha saṃvāsaḥ priyaiścāpi vinābhavaḥ |  2201-2 asadbhiḥ saṃprayogaśca tadduḥkhaṃ cirajīvināṃ ||2202-1 apriyairapi niṣpiṣṭaiḥ kiṃ syātkleśāsahiṣṇubhiḥ |  2202-2 ye tadunmūlane śaktā jigīṣā teṣu śobhate ||2203-1 apriyo'pi hi pathyaḥ syāditi vṛddhānuśāsanaṃ |  2203-2 vṛddhānuśāsane tiṣṭhanpriyatāmupagacchati ||2204-1 aprītāṃ rogiṇīṃ nārīṃ antarvatnīṃ dhṛtavratāṃ |  2204-2 rajasvalāmakāmāṃ ca na kāmeta balātpumān ||2205-1 apsu plavante pāṣāṇā mānuṣā ghnanti rākṣasān |  2205-2 kapayaḥ karma kurvanti kālasya kuṭilā gatiḥ ||2206-1 apsvātmānaṃ na vīkṣeta nāvagāhetpayorayaṃ |  2206-2 saṃdigdhanāvaṃ nārohenna bāhubhyāṃ nadīṃ taret ||2206ā-1 aphalaṃ śrāddhaṃ apātre dhanaṃ aphalaṃ yatna dattamarthibhyaḥ |  2206ā-2 yauvanamaphalaṃ yaminaśśrutamaphalaṃ durvinītasya ||2207-1 aphalasyāpi vṛkṣasya chāyā bhavati śītalā |  2207-2 nirguṇo'pi varaṃ bandhuryaḥ paraḥ para eva saḥ ||2208-1 aphalāni durantāni samavyayaphalāni ca |  2208-2 aśakyāni ca kāryāṇi nārabheta vicakṣaṇaḥ ||2209-1 abandhuṣvapi bandhutvaṃ snehātsamupajāyate |  2209-2 bandhuṣvapi ca bandhutvaṃ alokajñeṣu hīyate ||2210-1 abalaḥ pronnataṃ śatruṃ yo yāti madamohitaḥ |  2210-2 yuddhārthaṃ sa nivarteta śīrṇadanto yathā gajaḥ ||2211-1 abalasvakulāśino jhaṣānnijanīḍadrumapīḍinaḥ khagān |  2211-2 anavadyatṛṇārdino mṛgānmṛgayāghāya na bhūbhujāṃ ghnatāṃ ||2212-1 abalāṃ balinā nītāṃ daśāmimāṃ makaraketunā rakṣa |  2212-2 āpatpatitoddhṛtaye bhavati hi śubhajanmanāṃ janma ||2213-1 abalā api vīreśānyatsāhāyyamupāśritāḥ |  2213-2 parābhavanti dṛkkoṇapātenaiva sa manmathaḥ ||2214-1 abalāḍhyavigrahaśrīramartyanatirakṣamālayopetaḥ |  2214-2 pañcakramoditamukhaḥ pāyātparameśvaro muhuranādiḥ ||2215-1 abalābuddhihīnāyā doṣaṃ kṣantuṃ sadārhasi |  2215-2 mūḍhasya satataṃ doṣaṃ kṣamāṃ kurvanti sādhavaḥ ||2216-1 abalā yatra prabalā śiśuravanīśo nirakṣaro mantrī |  2216-2 nahi nahi tatra dhanāśā jīvita āśāpi durlabhā bhavati ||2217-1 abalāvanapara eko bhuvanatritaye'pi cettadā bharttā |  2217-2 kathamanyathā sudhākara- candanamukhyāpriyatvaṃ syāt ||2218-1 abalā viṣaheta kathaṃ dṛḍhaśaktimamuṣya ratirasaprasaraṃ |  2218-2 madanatulitānurāgo na vidadhyādyadi balādhānaṃ ||2219-1 abalāsu vilāsino'nvabhūvannayanaireva navopagūhanāni |  2219-2 marudāgamavārtayāpi śūnye samaye jāgrati saṃpravṛddha eva ||2220-1 abaleti parīvādo vṛthā hi hariṇīdṛśāṃ |  2220-2 yāsāṃ netranipātena naṭavadghūrṇyate jagat ||2221-1 abale salile vyavasyatā te mukhabhāvo gamito na paṅkajena |  2221-2 kathamādimavarṇatāntyajasya dvijarājena kṛtorunigrahasya ||2222-1 abalo'si na jitakāśī- pratibhaṭarāśīnparāpata kṣitipa |  2222-2 jātāmbhaḥkaṇapātaḥ kva vinaśyatyanalasaṃghātaḥ ||2223-1 abālarucire bhruvau na ca marālamandā gatirdṛgañcalamacañcalaṃ hṛdayabhūdabhūto dayā(?)|  2223-2 sudhā na khalu vākpathātithirathāpi yūnāṃ mano manojaśarajarjjarannayati mohamasyāstanuḥ ||2224-1 abudhā ajaṃgamā api kayāpi gatyā paraṃ padamavāptāḥ |  2224-2 mantriṇa iti kīrtyante nayabalaguṭikā iva janena ||2225-1 abudhaiḥ kṛtamānasaṃvidastava pārthaiḥ kuta eva yogyatā |  2225-2 sahasi plavagairupāsitaṃ na hi guñjāphalameti soṣmatāṃ ||2226-1 abudhairarthalābhāya paṇyastrībhiriva svayaṃ |  2226-2 ātmā saṃskṛtya saṃskṛtya paropakaraṇīkṛtaḥ ||2227-1 abuddhimāśritānāṃ ca kṣantavyamaparādhināṃ |  2227-2 na hi sarvatra pāṇḍityaṃ sulabhaṃ puruṣeṇa vai ||2228-1 atha cedbuddhijaṃ kṛtvā brūyuste tadabuddhijaṃ |  2228-2 pāpānsvalpe'pi tānhanyādaparādhe tathānṛjūn ||2229-1 abuddhvā cittamaprāpya viśrambhaṃ prabhaviṣṇuṣu |  2229-2 na svecchaṃ vyavahartavyaṃ ātmano bhūtimicchatā ||2230-1 abodhi no hrīnibhṛtaṃ madiṅgitaṃ pratītya vā nādṛtavatyasāviti |  2230-2 lunāti yūnaḥ sma dhiyaṃ kiyadgatā nivṛtya bālādaradarśaneṣuṇā ||2231-1 abjaṃ tvajjamathābjabhūstata idaṃ brahmāṇḍamaṇḍātpunarviśvaṃ sthāvarajaṃgamaṃ taditarattvanmūlamitthaṃ payaḥ |  2231-2 dhiktvāṃ caura iva prayāsi nibhṛtaṃ nirgatya jālāntarairbadhyante vivaśāstvadekaśaraṇāstvāmāśritā jantavaḥ ||2232-1 abdāyanartuṣvatha māsapakṣa- dināni kārye'pyavadhau vidadhyāt |  2232-2 hīnāvadhiryena bhavatyasatyaḥ sarvo'pi loke śakuno gṛhītaḥ ||2233-1 abdebhakumbhe nirbinne vidyutkhaḍgalatāhate |  2233-2 svacchamuktāphalasthūlā nipetustoyabindavaḥ ||2234-1 abdairvārijighṛkṣayārṇavagataiḥ sākaṃ vrajantī muhuḥ saṃsargādvaḍavānalasya samabhūdāpannasattvā taḍit |  2234-2 manye deva tayā krameṇa janito yuṣmatpratāpānalo yenārātivadhūvilocanajalaiḥ sikto'pi saṃvardhate ||2235-1 abdhinā saha mitratve dāridryaṃ yadi jāyate |  2235-2 lāñchanaṃ sāgarasyaiva maitrīkarturna lāñchanaṃ ||2236-1 abdhirna tṛpyati yathā saritāṃ sahasrairno cendhanairiva śikhī bahudhopanītaiḥ |  2236-2 jīvaḥ samastaviṣayairapi tadvadevaṃ saṃcintya cārudhiṣaṇastyajatīndriyārthān ||2237-1 abdhiryadyavadhīrito na tu tadā tasmānnipīyāmbudairvāntānyācasi kākubhirjalalavānuttānacañcūpuṭaḥ |  2237-2 tatte nistrapanīcataivamucitā nirvaktumetatkathaṃ vidmaḥ kena guṇena māniṣu punaḥ sāraṅga saṃgīyate ||2238-1 abdhī ratnamadho dhatte dhatte vā śirasā tṛṇaṃ |  2238-2 abdhereva hi doṣo'yaṃ ratnaṃ ratnaṃ tṛṇaṃ tṛṇaṃ ||2239-1 abdherambhaḥ sthagitabhuvanābhogapātālakukṣeḥ | potopāyā iha hi bahavo laṅghane'pi kṣamante |  2239-2 āho riktaḥ kathamapi bhavedeṣa daivāttadānīṃ ko nāma syādavaṭakuharālokane'pyasya kalpaḥ ||2240-1 abdhau majjanti mīnā iva phaṇina iva kṣauṇirandhraṃ viśanti krāmantyadrīnvihaṅgā iva kapaya iva kvāpyaraṇye caranti |  2240-2 deva kṣmāpālaśakra prasaradanupamatvaccamūcakravāha- vyūhavyādhūtadhūlīpaṭalahatadṛśaḥ kāndiśīkāḥ kṣitīśāḥ ||2241-1 abravīcca bhagavanmataṅgajairyadbṛhadbhirapi karma duṣkaraṃ |  2241-2 tatra nāhamanumantumutsahe |  2243-2 cakranduruccakairmuṣṭigrāhyamadhyā dhanurlatā ||2244-1 abhayaṃ sattvasaṃśuddhirjñānayogavyavasthitiḥ |  2244-2 dānaṃ damaśca yajñaśca svādhyāyastapa ārjavaṃ ||2245-1 ahiṃsā ||2313-1 abhimukhagate yasminneva priye bahuśo vadatyavanatamukhaṃ tūṣṇīmeva sthitaṃ mṛganetrayā |  2313-2 atha kila balāllīlālolaṃ sa eṣa tathekṣitaḥ kathamapi yathā dṛṣṭyā manye kṛtaṃ vinayavāritavṛttiratastayā na vivṛto madano na ca saṃvṛtaḥ ||2320-1 abhimuni sahasā hṛte parasyā ghanamarutā jaghanāṃśukaikadeśe |  2320-2 cakitamavasanoru satrapāyāḥ pratiyuvatīrapi vismayaṃ nināya ||2321-1 abhiyāti naḥ satṛṣa eṣa cakṣuṣo harirityakhidyata nitambinījanaḥ |  2321-2 na viveda yaḥ satatamenamīkṣate na vitṛṣṇatāṃ vrajati khalvasāvapi ||2322-1 abhiyuktaṃ balavatā durlabhaṃ hīnasādhanaṃ |  2322-2 hṛtasvaṃ kāminaṃ coraṃ āviśanti prajāgarāḥ ||2323-1 abhiyukto balavatā tiṣṭhandurge prayatnavān |  2323-2 tadbalīyastarāhvānaṃ kurvītātmavimuktaye ||2324-1 abhiyukto yadā paśyenna kāṃcidgatimātmanaḥ |  2324-2 yudhyamānastadā prājño mriyate ripuṇā saha ||2325-1 abhiyoktā balī yasmādalabdhvā na nivartate |  2325-2 upahārādṛte tasmātsaṃdhiranyo na vidyate ||2326-1 abhirāme'bhiniveśaṃ vidadhānā vividhalābhanirapekṣā |  2326-2 upahasyase sumadhye vidagdhavārāṅganāvāraiḥ ||2327-1 abhilakṣyaṃ sthiraṃ puṇyaṃ khyātaṃ sadbhirniṣevitaṃ |  2327-2 seveta siddhimanvicchañślāghyaṃ vindhyamiveśvaraṃ ||2328-1 abhilaṣata upāyaṃ vikramaṃ kīrtilakṣmyorasugamamarisainyairaṅkamabhyāgatasya|  2328-2 janaka iva śiśutve supriyasyaikasūnoravinayamapi sehe pāṇḍavasya smarāriḥ||2329-1 abhilaṣati na khalu puruṣaḥ śriyamapi kīrtyā vinākṛtāṃ kuśalaḥ |  2329-2 kṣaṇikāya vastune kastyajatīha cirasthiraṃ śreyaḥ ||2330-1 abhilaṣati padmayonau niḥsvavadhūnāṃ sutānsraṣṭuṃ |  2330-2 svaṃ svaṃ viśaṅkamānā vepante krakacavarttino lokāḥ ||2331-1 abhilaṣatoranubhāvāntilottamāyāḥ kilottamānubhayoḥ |  2331-2 sundopasundayorapi nāśo bhedādudāhriyate ||2332-1 abhilaṣanti tavādharamādhurīṃ tadiha kiṃ hariṇākṣi mudhā budhāḥ |  2332-2 surasudhāmadharīkurute yatastvadadharo'dharatāmagamattataḥ ||2333-1 abhilaṣasi yadīndo vaktralakṣmīṃ mṛgākṣyāḥ punarapi sakṛdabdhau majja saṃkṣālayāṅkaṃ |  2333-2 suvimalamatha bimbaṃ pārijātaprasūnaiḥ surabhaya vada no cettvaṃ kva tasyā mukhaṃ kva ||2334-1 abhilaṣitādhikavarade praṇipatitajanārtihāriṇi śaraṇye |  2334-2 caraṇau namāmyahaṃ te vidyādharadevate gauri ||2335-1 abhivarṣati yo'nupālayanvidhibījāni vivekavāriṇā |  2335-2 sa sadā phalaśālinīṃ kriyāṃ śaradaṃ loka ivādhitiṣṭhati ||2336-1 abhivādanaśīlasya nityaṃ vṛddhopasevinaḥ |  2336-2 catvāri tasya vardhanta āyuḥ prajñā yaśo balaṃ ||2337-1 abhivādayeta vṛddhaṃ āsanaṃ cāsya darśayet |  2337-2 kṛtāñjalirupāsīta gacchantaṃ pṛṣṭhato'nviyāt ||2338-1 abhivādya yathā vṛddhānsanto gacchanti nirvṛtiṃ |  2338-2 evaṃ sajjanamākruśya mūrkho bhavati nirvṛtaḥ ||2339-1 abhivīkṣya sāmikṛtamaṇḍanaṃ yatīḥ kararuddhanīvigaladaṃśukāḥ striyaḥ |  2339-2 dadhire'dhibhitti paṭahapratisvanaiḥ sphuṭamaṭṭahāsamiva saudhapaṅktayaḥ ||2340-1 abhiśaptaḥ puṇyakārye pravṛtto'pi na siddhibhāk |  2340-2 bhartrānugamanodyuktā reṇukā janamārikā ||2341-1 abhiśastavatprapaśyanti daridraṃ pārśvataḥ sthitaṃ |  2341-2 dāridryaṃ pātikaṃ loke kastacchaṃsitumarhati ||2342-1 abhiṣiṣeṇayiṣuṃ bhuvanāni yaḥ smaramivākhyata lodhrarajaścayaḥ |  2342-2 kṣubhitasainyaparāgavipāṇḍura- dyutirayaṃ tirayannudabhūddiśaḥ ||2343-1 abhiṣekārdraśirasā rājā rājyāvalokinā |  2343-2 sahāyavaraṇaṃ kāryaṃ tatra rājyaṃ pratiṣṭhitaṃ ||2344-1 yadapyalpataraṃ karma tadapyekena duṣkaraṃ |  2344-2 puruṣeṇāsahāyena kimu rājyaṃ mahodayaṃ ||2345-1 abhisaraṇaparā sadā varākī samaramahādhvasu raktapaṅkileṣu |  2345-2 hṛdi dharaṇibhujāmiyaṃ nṛpaśrīrnihitapadaiva kalaṅkamātanoti ||2346-1 abhisaraṇamayuktamaṅganānāṃ iti tava sundari mā sma bhūdvitarkaḥ |  2346-2 nanu patimagamatsvayaṃ nadīnāṃ saridapi śaṃbhujaṭāmuhūrtamālā ||2347-1 abhisaraṇarasaḥ kṛśāṅgayaṣṭerayamaparatra na vīkṣitaḥ śruto vā |  2347-2 ahimapi yadiyaṃ nirāsa nāṅghrernibiḍatanūpuramātmanīnabuddhyā ||2348-1 abhisāre sarojākṣi yadi gantuṃ samīhase |  2348-2 samācchādya mukhaṃ yāhi prayatnena priyaṃ prati ||2349-1 abhihanti hanta kathameṣa mādhavaṃ sukumārakāyamanavagrahaḥ smaraḥ |  2349-2 acireṇa vaikṛtavivartadāruṇaḥ kalabhaṃ kaṭhora iva kūṭapākalaḥ ||2350-1 abhihitāpyabhiyogaparāṅmukhī prakaṭamaṅgavilāsamakurvatī |  2350-2 upari te puruṣāyitumakṣamā navavadhūriva śatrupatākinī ||2351-1 abhīkṣṇamuccairdhvanatā pay_oṃucā ghanāndhakārīkṛtaśarvarīṣvapi |  2351-2 taḍitprabhādarśitamārgabhūmayaḥ prayānti rāgādabhisārikāḥ striyaḥ ||2352-1 abhīkṣṇamuṣṇairapi tasya soṣmaṇaḥ surendrabandīśvasitānilairyathā |  2352-2 sacandanāmbhaḥkaṇak_oṃalaistathā vapurjalārdrāpavanairna nirvavau ||2353-1 abhīpsāṃ svātmano rakṣā'virataṃ susthiraṃ tathā |  2353-2 yatnamātiṣṭha dhairyeṇa tataḥ siddhirbhaveddhruvaṃ ||2354-1 abhīṣṭaphalasaṃsiddhistuṣṭiḥ kāmyā susaṃpadaḥ |  2354-2 dvitribhirbahubhi sārdhaṃ bhojanena prajāyate ||2355-1 abhīṣṭamāsādya cirāya kāle samuddhṛtāśaṃ kamanī cakāśe |  2355-2 yoṣinmanojanmasukhodayeṣu samuddhṛtāśaṅkamanīcakāśe ||2356-1 abhuktāyāṃ yasyāṃ kṣaṇamapi na yātaṃ nṛpaśatairbhuvastasyā lābhe ka iva bahumānaḥ kṣitibhujāṃ |  2356-2 tadaṃśasyāpyaṃśe tadavayavaleśe'pi patayo viṣāde kartavye vidadhati jaḍāḥ pratyuta mudaṃ ||2357-1 abhuktvāmalakaṃ pathyaṃ bhuktvā tu badarīphalaṃ |  2357-2 kapitthaṃ sarvadā pathyaṃ kadalī na kadācana ||2358-1 abhuñjatāṃścādadatāṃ dhanaṃ caurā haranti hi |  2358-2 saraghāṇāṃ yathā sarvaṃ mākṣikaṃ vanacāriṇaḥ ||2359-1 abhūtapūrvaṃ mama bhāvi kiṃ vā sarvaṃ sahe me sahajaṃ ca duḥkhaṃ |  2359-2 kiṃ tu tvadagre śaraṇāgatānāṃ parābhavo nātha na te'nurūpaṃ ||2360-1 abhūtamāsajya viruddhamīhitaṃ balādalabhyaṃ tava lipsate nṛpaḥ |  2360-2 vijānato'pi hyanayasya raudratāṃ bhavatyapāye parimohinī matiḥ ||2361-1 abhūtprācī piṅgā rasapatiriva prāśya kanakaṃ gatacchāyaścandro budhajana iva grāmyasadasi |  2361-2 kṣaṇātkṣīṇāstārā nṛpataya ivānudyamaparā na dīpā rājante draviṇarahitānāmiva guṇāḥ ||2362-1 abhūdambhorāśeḥ saha vasatirāsītkamalayā guṇānāmādhāro nayanaphalaminduḥ prathayati |  2362-2 kathaṃ siṃhīsūnustamapi tudati prauḍhadaśanairguṇānāmāsvādaṃ piśunarasanā kiṃ rasayati ||2363-1 abhūvannadbhutoṣmāṇaḥ śītavyāpte jagattraye |  2363-2 kucotsaṅgāḥ kṛśāṅgīṇāṃ sthānaṃ manmathatejasaḥ ||2364-1 abhedenaiva yudhyeranrakṣeyuśca parasparaṃ |  2364-2 phalgu sainyasya yatkiṃcinmadhye vyūhasya tadbhavet ||2365-1 abhedenopāste kumudamudare vā sthitavato vipakṣādambhojādupagatavato vā madhulihaḥ |  2365-2 aparyāptaḥ ko'pi svaparaparicaryāparicaya- prabandhaḥ sādhūnāmayamanabhisaṃdhānamadhuraḥ ||2366-1 abhedyo'nuddhataḥ stabdhaḥ sūnṛtaḥ priyadarśanaḥ |  2366-2 bahuśrutaḥ kālavedī jitagrantho'rthakarmavit ||2367-1 abhogasubhagā bhūtiradainyadhavalaṃ kulaṃ |  2367-2 adarpaviśadā vidyā bhavatyunnatacetasāṃ ||2368-1 abhoginau maṇḍalinau tatkṣaṇānmuktakañcukau |  2368-2 varamāśīviṣau spṛṣṭau na tu patnyāḥ payodharau ||2369-1 abhyaktaṃ rahasi gataṃ vicittamanyena mantrayantaṃ vā |  2369-2 ucitapraṇayamapi nṛpaṃ sahasāryā nopasarpanti ||2370-1 abhyaktamiva snātaḥ śuciraśucimiva prabuddha iva suptaṃ |  2370-2 baddhamiva strairagatirjanamiha sukhasaṅginamavaimi ||2371-1 abhyaghāni municāpalāttvayā yanmṛgaḥ kṣitipateḥ parigrahaḥ |  2371-2 akṣamiṣṭa tadayaṃ pramādyatāṃ saṃvṛṇoti khalu doṣamajñatā ||2371ā-1 abhyantaragatā bāhyā bāhyāścābhyataraṃ gatāḥ |  2371ā-2 yairnarā nidhanaṃ yānti yathā rājā kacadrumaḥ ||2372-1 abhyarthaye kimapi jīvitajanmatastvāṃ utkaṇṭhatodgati niḥsara tāvadeva |  2372-2 kānte dṛgantapathalambini jīvatīti yāvanna karṇapathameti janāpavādaḥ ||2373-1 abhyarthya sapraṇati mandiramabhyupetā devī svayaṃ bhagavatī pṛthageva tāsāṃ|  2373-2 āsannavallabhasamāgamasūcanāni saṃjīvanāni vacanānyapi vācitāni ||2374-1 abhyastāḥ sphuṭameva śāstragatayaḥ samyakkavitvodadheḥ pāraṃ cādhigataṃ satāṃ pariṣadi prāptaḥ pratiṣṭhodayaḥ |  2374-2 nirviṇṇasya mamādhunā nanu paraḥ panthā na dainyaṃ vinā netuṃ vāñchati vāsanā suradhunītīre'nurūpaṃ vayaḥ ||2375-1 abhyaste'pi nitambabhāraphalake khedālaseyaṃ gatiḥ kiṃcitsaṃvalitārdhapakṣmaviralālokā dṛśo'ntargatāḥ |  2375-2 tanmanye nibhṛtaṃ tvayādya hṛdaye kaściddhṛto vallabho niśvāsāḥ kathamanyathā dviguṇatāmete tavaivaṃ gatāḥ ||2376-1 abhyaste'pi hi nāma vastuni cirādajñānasaṃbhāvanaṃ śaucāśaucāvivāditā viśakalasmṛtyakṣarāvartanaṃ |  2376-2 vāraṃ vāramṛṇopaghātakathanaṃ ko'pyeṣa ḍambhātmanāṃ prāyo dagdhadurīśavañcanavidhau jāgartyapūrvaḥ kramaḥ ||2377-1 abhyasya pavanavijayaṃ vyākhyāya ca śaivasaṃhitāḥ sakalāḥ |  2377-2 maraṇasamaye gurūṇāṃ pardavadasavo viniṣkrāntāḥ ||2378-1 abhyasya vedamavadhāya ca pūrvatantraṃ ālakṣya śiṣṭacaritāni pṛthagvidhāni|  2378-2 adhyāpanādibhiravāpya dhanaṃ ca bhūri karmāṇi mātaralasāḥ kathamācareyuḥ ||2379-1 abhyasya smaradaṃśakauśalamupādhyāyīrupāsyāvayoḥ krīḍāmnāyarahasyavastuni mitho'pyāsījjigīṣā sakhi |  2379-2 utkampotpulakāṅgasaṃbhṛtaghanasvedāvilastanmayā sadyo niṣpratibhaḥ sa manmathakathāvaitaṇḍikaḥ khaṇḍitaḥ ||2380-1 abhyasyādau śrutimatha gṛhaṃ prāpya labdhvā mahārthāniṣṭvā yajñairjanitatanayaḥ pravrajedāyuṣo'nte |  2380-2 ityācaṣṭe ya iha sa manuryājñavalkyo'pi vā me tāvatkālaṃ pratibhavati cedāyuṣastatpramāṇaṃ ||2381-1 abhyāyāntaṃ jhaṭiti gilituṃ vāyumapyāyatāsye bhīmākāre prakṛtikuṭile baddhanirvyājavaire |  2381-2 prāyeṇetthaṃ kṛtaparicaye pāpini krūrasarpe bhadraśrībhiḥ paricitikathā kīdṛśī mādṛśānāṃ ||2382-1 abhyāvahati kalyāṇaṃ vividhā vāksubhāṣitā |  2382-2 saiva durbhāṣitā rājannanarthāyopapadyate ||2383-1 abhyāsaḥ karmaṇāṃ samyagutpādayati kauśalaṃ |  2383-2 vidhinā tāvadabhyastaṃ yāvatsṛṣṭā mṛgekṣaṇā ||2384-1 abhyāsakāraṇā vidyā lakṣmīḥ puṇyānusāriṇī |  2384-2 dānānusāriṇī kīrtirbuddhiḥ karmānusāriṇī ||2385-1 abhyāsarahitā vidyā nirudyogā nṛpaśriyaḥ |  2385-2 veṣayoṣāśca rāgiṇyo hāsyāyatanamaṅgane ||2386-1 abhyāsaśchandasāṃ daṇḍo jvaradaṇḍaśca laṅghanaṃ |  2386-2 yamadaṇḍo viṣṇubhaktiḥ śatrudaṇḍaḥ śubhā gatiḥ ||2387-1 abhyāsasthitacūtaṣaṇḍagahanasthānādito gehinī grāmaṃ kaṃcidavṛkṣakaṃ virahiṇī tūrṇaṃ vadhūrnīyatāṃ |  2387-2 atrāyāntyacireṇa kokilakulavyāhārajhaṃkāriṇaḥ panthastrījanajīvitaikaharaṇaprauḍhāḥ puro vāsarāḥ ||2388-1 abhyāsāttu sthirasvānta ūrdhvaretāśca jāyate |  2388-2 parānandamayo yogī jarāmaraṇavarjitaḥ ||2389-1 abhyāsāddhāryate vidyā kulaṃ śīlena dhāryate |  2389-2 guṇena jñāyate tvāryaḥ kopo netreṇa gamyate ||2390-1 abhyāsāddhāryate vidyā kulaṃ śīlena dhāryate |  2390-2 guṇairmitrāṇi dhāryante akṣṇā krodhaśca dhāryate ||2391-1 abhyāsānusarī vidyā buddhiḥ karmānusāriṇī |  2391-2 udyogānusarī lakṣmīḥ phalaṃ bhāgyānusāri ca ||2392-1 abhyāsena sthiraṃ cittaṃ abhyāsenānilacyutiḥ |  2392-2 abhyāsena parānando hyabhyāsenātmadarśanaṃ ||2393-1 abhyāsenānyasaṃcāro hyabhyāsenānyarūpatā |  2393-2 abhyāsena samutkrāntirabhyāsenāṇimādayaḥ ||2394-1 abhyāso ratihetorbhavati narāṇāṃ na vastusadguṇataḥ |  2394-2 satyapi māṃsopacaye rāgāya kucau sphijau na punaḥ ||2395-1 abhyāso hi karmaṇāṃ kauśalamāvahati |  2395-2 na hi sakṛnnipātamātreṇoda- bindurapi grāvaṇi nimnatāmādadhāti ||2396-1 abhyukṣito'si salilairna balāhakānāṃ cāṣāgrapakṣasadṛśaṃ bhṛśamantarāle |  2396-2 mithyaitadānanamidaṃ bhavatastathā hi hemantapadmamiva niṣprabhatāmupaiti ||2397-1 abhyutthānamupāgate gṛhapatau tadbhāṣaṇe namratā tatpādārpitadṛṣṭirāsanavidhistasyopacaryā svayaṃ |  2397-2 supte tatra śayīta tatprathamato jahyācca śayyāmiti prācyaiḥ putri niveditaḥ kulavadhūsiddhāntadharmāgamaḥ ||2398-1 abhyuddhṛtā vasumatī dalitaṃ ripūraḥ krīḍīkṛtā balavatā balirājalakṣmīḥ|  2398-2 ekatra janmani kṛtaṃ tadanena yūnā janmatraye yadakarotpuruṣaḥ purāṇaḥ ||2399-1 abhyudyatkavalagrahapraṇayinaste śallakīpallavāstaccāsphālasahaṃ saraḥ kṣitidhṛtāmityasti ko nihnute |  2399-2 dantastambhaniṣaṇṇaniḥsahakaraḥ śvāsairatiprāṃśubhiryenāyaṃ virahī tu vāraṇapatiḥ svāminsa vindhyo bhavān ||2400-1 abhyunnatastanayugā taralāyatākṣī dvāri sthitā tadupayānamahotsavāya |  2400-2 sā pūrṇakumbhanavanīrajatoraṇasraksaṃbhāramaṅgalamayatnakṛtaṃ vidhatte ||2401-1 abhyunnatāṅguṣṭhanakhaprabhābhirnikṣepaṇādrāgamivodgirantau |  2401-2 ājahratustaccaraṇau pṛthivyāṃ sthalāravindaśriyamavyavasthāṃ ||2402-1 abhyunnatānāmaṇurapyudāraṃ paścātprakopaṃ janayedarīṇāṃ |  2402-2 taṃ cāpramattaḥ prasamīkṣya yāyān- na nāśayeddṛṣṭamadṛṣṭahetoḥ ||2403-1 abhyunnatā purastādavagāḍhā jaghanagauravātpaścāt |  2403-2 dvāre'sya pāṇḍusikate padapaṅktirdṛśyate'bhinavā ||2404-1 abhyunnate'pi jalade jagadekasāra- sādhāraṇapraṇayahāriṇi hā yadete |  2404-2 ullāsalāsyalalitaṃ taravo na yānti he dāvapāvaka sa tāvaka eva doṣaḥ ||2405-1 abhyunnatevāṅghrinakhāṅkurāṇāṃ dyutirvireje hariṇī dṛśo'syāḥ |  2405-2 puṅkhāvalī pañcaśarā yudhānāṃ lāvaṇyadarpadviguṇīkṛteva ||2406-1 abhyunnato'si salilaiḥ paripūrito'si tvāmarthayanti vihagāstṛṣitāstathaite |  2406-2 kālaḥ payodhara paropakṛtestavāyaṃ caṇḍānilavyatikare kva bhavānkva te vā ||2407-1 abhyupayuktāḥ sadbhirgatāgatairaharahaḥ prakhindānāḥ |  2407-2 kṛpaṇajanasaṃnikarṣaṃ prāpyārthāḥ prasvapantīva ||2408-1 abhyullasanti vinivāritacandanānāṃ eṇīdṛśāṃ vapuṣi kuṅkumapatralekhāḥ|  2408-2 abhyāgatāḥ karasarojapadāravinda- saṃrakṣaṇāya kiraṇā iva tigmabhānoḥ ||2409-1 abhyuṣṇātsaghṛtādannādacchidrāccaiva vāsasaḥ |  2409-2 aparapreṣyabhāvācca bhūya icchanpatatyadhaḥ ||2410-1 abhyetya yācito'pi tyaktvā lajjāṃ mayā vigatalajjaḥ |  2410-2 cicchedaiṣa mamāśāṃ sahasā pratiṣedhaśastreṇa ||2411-1 abhracchāyā khalaprītiḥ samudrānte ca medinī |  2411-2 alpenaiva vinaśyanti yauvanāni dhanāni ca ||2412-1 abhracchāyā khalaprītirnavasasyāni yoṣitaḥ |  2412-2 kiṃcitkālopabhogyāni yauvanāni dhanāni ca ||2413-1 abhracchāyā khalaprītirveśyārāgo vibhūtayaḥ |  2413-2 mahībhujāṃ prasādaśca pañcaite cañcalāḥ smṛtāḥ ||2414-1 abhracchāyā tṛṇādagniḥ khalaprītiḥ sthale jalaṃ |  2414-2 veśyārāgaḥ kumitraṃ ca ṣaḍete budbudopamāḥ ||2415-1 abhracchāyā tṛṇādagniḥ parādhīnaṃ ca yatsukhaṃ |  2415-2 ajñāneṣu ca vairāgyaṃ kṣiprametadvinaśyati ||2416-1 abhradhvānairmukharitadiśaḥ śreṇayastoyadānāṃ dhārāsārairdharaṇivalayaṃ sarvataḥ plāvayanti |  2416-2 tena snehaṃ vahati vipulaṃ matsakhīyuktametattvaṃ niḥsneho yadasi tadidaṃ nātha me vismayāya ||2417-1 abhrapuṣpamapi ditsati śītaṃ sārthinā vimukhatā yadabhāji |  2417-2 stokakasya khalu cañcupuṭena mlānirullasati tadghanasaṃghe ||2418-1 abhravṛndaṃ viśākhāntaṃ prasūtyantaṃ ca yauvanaṃ |  2418-2 rājyāntaṃ narakaṃ tadvadyācanāntaṃ hi gauravaṃ ||2419-1 abhrūvilāsamaspṛṣṭamadarāgaṃ mṛgekṣaṇaṃ |  2419-2 idaṃ tu nayanadvandvaṃ tava tadguṇabhūṣitaṃ ||2420-1 amajjadākaṇṭhamasau sudhāsu priyaṃ priyāyā vacanaṃ nipīya |  2420-2 dviṣanmukhe'pi svadate stutiryā tanmiṣṭatā neṣṭamukhe tvameyā ||2421-1 amadayanmadhugandhasanāthayā kisalayādharasaṃgatayā manaḥ |  2421-2 kusumasaṃbhṛtayā navamallikā smitarucā tarucāruvilāsinī ||2422-1 amanaskaṃ gate ||2424-1 amantramakṣaraṃ nāsti nāsti mūlamanauṣadhaṃ |  2424-2 nirdhanā pṛthivī nāsti hyāmnāyāḥ khalu durlabhāḥ ||2425-1 amandataravāryagradhārāhatamahībhṛtaḥ |  2425-2 citracāpadharā vīrā vidyotante ghanā iva ||2426-1 amandamaṇinūpurakvaṇanacārucārīkramaṃ jhaṇajjhaṇitamekhalāskhalitatārahāracchaṭaṃ |  2426-2 idaṃ taralakaṅkaṇāvaliviśeṣavācālitaṃ mano harati subhruvaḥ kimapi kandukakrīḍitaṃ ||2427-1 amandamattamātaṅga āsārābhyudayānvitaḥ |  2427-2 ityādilakṣaṇopetaḥ skandhāvāraḥ praśasyate ||2428-1 amandānandaniṣyandaṃ apāstānyakriyākramaṃ |  2428-2 jagajjanmotsave tasyāḥ pītāmṛtamivābhavat ||2429-1 amandānandānāṃ galadalaghusaṃtāpavipadāṃ padāmbhojadvandvaṃ śirasi dadhatāminduśirasaḥ |  2429-2 kadā naḥ kālindīsalilaśabalairambarasarittaraṅgairaṅgārībhavati bhavabandhendhanacayaḥ ||2430-1 amanyatāsau kusumeṣu garbhagaṃ parāgamandhaṃkaraṇaṃ viyogināṃ |  2430-2 smareṇa mukteṣu purā purāraye tadaṅgabhasmeva śareṣu saṃgataṃ ||2431-1 2432-2 surapatigajagaṇḍasraṃsidānāmbudhārā prasavasurabhimāśāṃ vāsavīyāṃ namāmi ||2433-1 amarīmukhasīdhumādhurīṇāṃ laharī kācana cāturī kalānāṃ |  2433-2 taralīkurute mano madīyaṃ ||2441-1 amalātmasu pratiphalannabhitastaruṇīkapolaphalakeṣu muhuḥ |  2441-2 visasāra sāndrataramindurucāṃ adhikāvabhāsitadiśāṃ nikaraḥ ||2442-1 amalīmasamacchidraṃ akrauryamatisundaraṃ |  2442-2 ||2460-1 amitraṃ kurute mitraṃ mitraṃ dveṣṭi hinasti ca |  2460-2 śubhaṃ vettyaśubhaṃ pāpaṃ bhadraṃ daivahato naraḥ ||2461-1 amitraṃ kurute mitraṃ mitraṃ dveṣṭi hinasti vaḥ |  2461-2 mitrāṇi tasya ||2470-1 amitro na vimoktavyaḥ kṛpaṇaṃ bahvapi bruvan |  2470-2 kṛpā tasminna kartavyā hanyādevāpakāriṇaṃ ||2471-1 amitro mitratāṃ yāti mitraṃ cāpi praduṣyati |  2471-2 sāmarthyayogātkāryāṇāṃ ||2493-1 amī helonmeṣavyasaniṣu palāśeṣu paritaḥ pibanti svacchandaṃ madhu madhuliho mādyati janaḥ |  2493-2 ayaṃ ca pratyagraṃ daśati sahakāraṃ parabhṛto yadīdaṃ marmāntarvidalati ka eṣa vyatikaraḥ ||2494-1 amuṃ kālakṣepaṃ tyaja jalada gambhīramadhuraiḥ kimebhirnirghoṣaiḥ sṛja jhaṭiti jhātkāri salilaṃ |  2494-2 aye paśyāvasthāmakaruṇasamīravyatikara- sphuraddāvajvālāvalijaṭilamūrterviṭapinaḥ ||2495-1 amuṃ puraḥ paśyasi devadāruṃ putrīkṛto'sau vṛṣabhadhvajena |  2495-2 yo hemakumbhastananiḥsṛtānāṃ skandasya mātuḥ payasāṃ rasajñaḥ ||2496-1 amuṃ sahāsaprahitekṣaṇāni taraṅgacayacumbinastuhinadīdhiteraṃśavaḥ ||2499-1 amudro'pi varaṃ kūpaḥ samudreṇāpi tena kiṃ |  2499-2 susvādu salilaṃ yatra pīyate pathikaiḥ pathi ||2500-1 amunā marukūpena ke ke nāma na vañcitāḥ |  2500-2 rudatpathikanetrāmbupicchilaprāntabhūminā ||2501-1 amunā yamunājalakelikṛtā sahasā tarasā parirabhya bhṛtā |  2501-2 hariṇā hariṇī mṛganetravatī navayauvanayauvanabhāravatī ||2502-1 amunaiva kaṣāyitastanī subhagena priyagātrabhasmanā |  2502-2 navapallavasaṃstare yathā racayiṣyāmi tanuṃ vibhāvasau ||2503-1 amunaiva pathāgatāgataṃ kṛtavānadya manoharo hariḥ |  2503-2 sakhi varṇāvalipada- kramaśrotā vettā dvijavara śuka śrāmyasi kutaḥ ||2505-1 amuṣminnudyānadrumakuharanīrandhrabharite tamaḥkhaṇḍe piṇḍīkṛtabahalakālāyasaghane |  2505-2 yatāmadyāsmākaṃ kathamapi vācaṃ ca sakalāṃ na maunena nyūno bhavati guṇabhājāṃ guṇagaṇaḥ ||2507-1 amuṣminpañceṣostribhuvanajigīṣoḥ sahacare mukhaṃ rātreratrestanubhuvi rahaścumbati sati |  2507-2 jvalantīrṣyāroṣodayamayatayevoṣadhilatāḥ patadbhṛṅgībhaṅgyā dadhati kumudinyaḥ kaluṣatāṃ ||2508-1 amuṣminsaṃnaddhe jalamuci samabhyasya katicitkakārānparyantadviguṇamatarephaprasavinaḥ |  2508-2 sa mādyandātyūhaścalavipulakaṇṭhaḥ prasarati kramodañcattāraḥ kramavaśanamanmandamadhuraḥ ||2509-1 amuṣminsaṃsāre parikalitasāretaratayā tadā vidyotkarṣaḥ pariṇatimupaiti śrutividāṃ |  2509-2 yadā mandākinyā madhuravamarālīkalakala- praṇālīvācāle parisarataṭe yānti divasāḥ ||2510-1 amuṣmiṃllāvāṇyāmṛtasarasi nūnaṃ mṛgadṛśaḥ smaraḥ śarvapluṣṭaḥ pṛthujaghanabhāge nipatitaḥ |  2510-2 yadaṅgāṅgārāṇāṃ prathamapiśunā nābhikuhare śikhā dhūmasyeyaṃ pariṇamati r_oṃāvalivapuḥ ||2511-1 amuṣmai caurāya pratinihatamṛtyupratibhiye prabhuḥ prītaḥ prādāduparitanapādadvayakṛte |  2511-2 suvarṇānāṃ koṭīrdaśa daśanakoṭikṣatagirīngajendrānapyaṣṭau madamuditakūjanmadhulihaḥ ||2512-1 amuṣya dorbhyāmaridurgaluṇṭhane dhruvaṃ gṛhītārgaladīrghapīnatā |  2512-2 uraḥśriyā tatra ca gopurasphurat- kapāṭadurdharṣatiraḥprasāritā ||2513-1 amuṣya dhīrasya jayāya sāhasī tadā khalu jyāṃ viśikhaiḥ sanāthayan |  2513-2 nimajjayāmāsa yaśāṃsi saṃśaye smarastrilokīvijayārjitānyapi ||2514-1 amuṣya muṣitā lakṣmīścakṣuṣeti na nūtanaṃ |  2514-2 na vedmi kathayatyasyāḥ karṇe lagnaṃ kimutpalaṃ ||2515-1 amuṣya vidyā rasanāgranartakī trayīva nītāṅgaguṇena vistaraṃ |  2515-2 agāhatāṣṭādaśatāṃ jigīṣayā navadvayadvīpapṛthagjayaśriyāṃ ||2516-1 amuṣyāṃ saṃkrāntau tava taruṇi tāruṇyataraṇe smaro dātā devastrivalitaṭinītīranikaṭe |  2516-2 amū te vakṣojau sakhi sughaṭitau hāṭakaghaṭau mahādānaṃ kasmai vada bhavatu sāraṅganayane ||2517-1 amuṣyā lāvaṇyaṃ mṛdulamṛdulānapyavayavānmanolaulyaṃ dhātuḥ karakaṭhinatāṃ me vimṛśati |  2517-2 padaṃ citte dhatte matiriti purā paṅkajabhuvā dhruvaṃ kalyāṇīyaṃ kalitasukṛtaireva racitā ||2518-1 amuṣyorvībharttuḥ prasṛmaracamūsindhurabhavairavaimi prārabdhe vamathubhiravaśyāyasamaye |  2518-2 na kampantāmantaḥ pratinṛpabhaṭā mlāyatu na tadvadhūvaktrāmbhojaṃ bhavatu na sa teṣāṃ kudivasaḥ ||2519-1 amūni gacchanti yugāni na kṣaṇaḥ kiyatsahiṣye na hi mṛtyurasti me |  2519-2 sa māṃ na kāntaḥ sphuṭamantarujjhitā na taṃ manastacca na kāyavāyavaḥ ||2520-1 amūrkho yo manuṣyāṇāṃ manyusaṃtaptacetasāṃ |  2520-2 parasparopakāreṇa puṃsāṃ bhavati vigrahaḥ ||2521-1 amūrhi bhittvā jaladāntarāṇi paṅkāntarāṇīva mṛṇālasūcyaḥ |  2521-2 patanti candravyasanādvimuktā divo'śrudhārā iva vāridhārāḥ ||2522-1 amūlyasya mama svarṇatulākoṭidvayaṃ kiyat |  2522-2 iti kopādivātāmraṃ pādayugmaṃ mṛgīdṛśaḥ ||2523-1 amṛtaṃ kirati ||2525-1 amṛtaṃ tadadharabimbe vacaneṣvamṛtaṃ vilokane'pyamṛtaṃ |  2525-2 amṛtabhṛtau kucakumbhau satyaṃ sā sṛṣṭiraparaiva ||2526-1 amṛtaṃ durlabhaṃ nṇāṃ devānāmudakaṃ tathā |  2526-2 pitṇāṃ durlabhaḥ putrastakraṃ śakrasya durlabhaṃ ||2527-1 amṛtaṃ nāma yatsanto mantrajihveṣu juhvati |  2527-2 śobhaiva mandarakṣubdhakṣubhitāmbhodhivarṇanā ||2528-1 amṛtaṃ bhujyate vidye bhavatīmāśritaiḥ ||2538-1 amṛtamadhuraiḥ kāñcīnādaiḥ kṛtābhayaḍiṇḍime trivalilaharīlāvaṇyāmbhaḥkaṇotkarakarbure |  2538-2 viṣamanayanajvālājālāvalīḍhaparākramo luṭhati madanastanvaṅgīnāṃ nitambaśilātale ||2539-1 ||2540-1 amṛtamamṛtaṃ candraṃ candraṃ ratiṃ ca ratiṃ tathā prathitamatayaḥ kāmaṃ brūyurmadhūni madhūnyapi |  2540-2 yadi na subhagāsparśāmodaṃ vinā pramude tataḥ sakalamakalaṃ teṣāṃ vyūhaṃ bravīmi ||2558-1 amṛtāyatāmiti vadetpīte bhukte kṣute ca śataṃ jīva |  2558-2 choṭikayā saha jṛmbhā- samaye syātāṃ cirāyurānandau ||2559-1 amṛtā vigataprāṇā sāntaḥ śalyākṛtavraṇā |  2559-2 abaddhā |  2566-2 devatānāṃ pitṇāṃ ca bhāgo yena pradīyate ||2567-1 ambaraṃ vinayataḥ priyapāṇeryoṣitaśca karayoḥ kalahasya |  2567-2 vāraṇāmiva vidhātumabhīkṣṇaṃ kakṣyayā ca valayaiśca śiśiñje ||2568-1 abdhirapi potalaṅghyaḥ satāṃ manaḥ kena tulyaṃ syāt ||2570-1 ambaramapanaya mugdhe vrajatu vikāśaṃ digambaratā |  2570-2 hārāvalisurataṭinī nakhaśaśimaṇḍalasya kucaśambhoḥ ||2571-1 ambaramambuni 2577-2 kopāveśavaśādaśeṣavadanaiḥ pratyuttaraṃ dattavānambhodhirjaladhiḥ payodhirudadhirvārāṃ nidhirvāridhiḥ ||2578-1 ambā tuṣyati na mayā na snuṣayā sāpi nāmbayā na mayā |  2578-2 ahamapi na tayā ||2580-1 ambāyāśca pituśca sadguṇagaṇo yasminnabhivyajyate tasminsvapratibimbiteva nikhilā saivākṛtiḥ sā dyutiḥ |  2580-2 sā vāṇi vinayaḥ sa eva sahajaḥ puṇyānubhāvaḥ sa ca ślāghāyāḥ sadanaṃ duḥsutāṃ tāndṛṣṭvārthamitastato nikhanati svaṃ niḥsvamātanvatī ||2582-1 ambā śete'tra vṛddhā pariṇatavayasāmagraṇīratra tāto niḥśeṣāgārakarmaśramaśithilatanuḥ kumbhadāsī tatheha |  2582-2 pāṃśurvāraṇakarṇatālapavanairdikprāntanīhāratāṃ |  2588-2 nimnatvaṃ girayaḥ samaṃ viṣamatāṃ śūnyaṃ janasthānakaṃ niryāte tvayi rājyapāla bhavati tyaktasvabhāvaṃ jagat ||2589-1 ambhaḥ kumbhāmbhoruha- cāmarabhṛṅgārahemarūpyāṇi |  2589-2 phalatāmbūlavarāmbara- madirāmīnājyabhojyāni ||2590-1 ambhaḥsaṃbhṛtimantharāmbudaravaiḥ śālūragarjābhara- prārabdhapriyaviprayuktayuvatījīvagrahe bhīṣaṇāḥ |  2590-2 vidyuddanturitāndhakārapaṭalā gāmbhīryabaddhārava- sthairyonmūlanaśaktayaḥ kathamamī niryānti varṣāniśāḥ ||2591-1 ambhasaḥ parimāṇena unnataṃ kamalaṃ bhavet |  2591-2 svasvāminā balavatā paiśunyādbhidyate sneho vāgbhirbhidyeta kātaraḥ ||2594-1 ambhasā śamamāyāti muṣṭimeyaśikhaḥ śikhī |  2594-2 pravṛddho'dhaḥsthitaiḥ paścātsaṃtaptaireva dṛśyate ||2595-1 ambhasi taraṇisutāyāḥ stambhitataraṇiḥ sa devakīsūnuḥ |  2595-2 ātaravirahitagopyāḥ kātaramukhamīkṣate smeraḥ ||2596-1 ambhastattvaṃ bhūmitattvaṃ ca vāyostattvaṃ tejastattvamākāśatattvaṃ |  2596-2 pañcaitāni prāṇavāyuṃ militvā nāḍīyugme prāṇināṃ saṃcaranti ||2597-1 ambhāṃsi jalajantūnāṃ durgaṃ durganivāsināṃ |  2597-2 svabhūmiḥ śvāpadādīnāṃ rājñāṃ sainyaṃ paraṃ balaṃ ||2598-1 ambhojagarbhasukumāratanustadāsau kaṇṭhagrahe prathamarāgaghane vilīya |  2598-2 sadyaḥ patanmadanamārgaṇarandhramārgairmanye mama priyatamā hṛdayaṃ praviṣṭā ||2599-1 ambhojapatrāyatalocanānāṃ ambhodhidīrghāsviha dīrghikāsu |  2599-2 samāgatānāṃ kuṭilairapāṅgairanaṅgabāṇaiḥ prahatā yuvānaḥ ||2600-1 ambhojaprakaro'tha ketakakulaṃ kundotkaraḥ kairava- vrāto malligaṇo'tha campakacayo jātīgaṇo vāthavā |  2600-2 no cedādaramātanoti pika tatkhedaṃ vṛthā mā kṛthā yasmātkvāpi kadāpi ko'pi bhavitā yastvadguṇaṃ jñāsyati ||2601-1 ambhojākṣyāḥ puravanalatā dhāmni saṃketabhājaścetonāthe cirayati bhṛśaṃ mohanidrāṃ gatāyāḥ |  2601-2 svacchaṃ nābhihradavalayitaṃ kāntaratnāṃśujālaṃ toyabhrāntyā pibati hariṇī vismayaṃ ca prayāti |  2602-1 ambhojāni ghanāghanavyavahito'pyullāghayatyaṃśumāndūrastho'pi payodharo'tiśiśirasparśaṃ karotyātapaṃ |  2602-2 śaktiḥ kāpyaparikṣatāsti mahatāṃ svairaṃ daviṣṭhānyaho yanmāhātmyavaśena yānti ghaṭanāṃ kāryāṇi niryantraṇāṃ ||2603-1 ambhojinīvanavilāsanivāsameva haṃsasya hanti nitarāṃ kupito vidhātā |  2603-2 na tvasya dugdhajalabhedavidhau prasiddhāṃ vaidagghyakīrtimapahartumasau samarthaḥ ||2604-1 ambhodastanitaṃ niśamya kariṇāṃ bṛṃheti raṃhoyutassadyastyaktamahīdhrakandaragṛhaḥ kautūhalī nirgataḥ |  2604-2 etasminkṣaṇa eva caṇḍamaśanerākarṇya śabdaṃ krudhā taṃ pratyutpatati svagarjitajitaṃ dhīro mṛgāṇāṃ patiḥ ||2605-1 ambhodhiḥ sthalatāṃ sthalaṃ jaladhitāṃ dhūlīvalaḥ śailatāṃ merurmṛtkaṇatāṃ tṛṇaṃ kuliśatāṃ vajraṃ tṛṇaklībatāṃ |  2605-2 vahniḥ śītalatāṃ himaṃ dahanatāmāyāti yasyecchayā līlādurlalitādbhutavyasanine daivāya tasmai namaḥ ||2606-1 ambhodhikṣiptamuktāruciharicaraṇodgīrṇagaṅgāmbutulyaṃ kālindīphenakāntisphuritaphaṇadharonmuktanirmokarociḥ |  2606-2 karṇāṭīkuntalāntarvigalitasumanodāmaramyaṃ samantācchrīkhaṇḍālepalakṣmīmupanayati yaśo yasya khaḍgaprasūtaṃ ||2607-1 ambhodhīnāṃ tamālaprabhavakisalayaśyāmavelāvanānāṃ ā pārebhyaścaturṇāṃ caṭulatimikulakṣobhitāntarjalānāṃ |  2607-2 mālevāmlānapuṣpā tava nṛpatiśatairuhyate yā śirobhiḥ sā mayyeva skhalantī kathayati vinayālaṃkṛtaṃ te prabhutvaṃ ||2608-1 ambhodhereva jātāḥ kati jagati na te hanta santīha śaṅkhā yānsaṃgṛhya bhramanti pratibhavanamamī bhikṣavo jīvanāya |  2608-2 ekaḥ śrīpāñcajanyo hariharakamalakroḍahaṃsāyamāno yasyādhvānairamānairasuravaravadhūvargagarbhā galanti ||2609-1 ambhodherjalayantramandiraparispande'pi nidrāṇayoḥ śrīnārāyaṇayorghanaṃ vighaṭayatyūṣmā samāliṅganaṃ |  2609-2 kiṃ cottaptaviyatkapālaphalake kaṅkālaśeṣaśriyaṃ candraṃ marmarayanti parpaṭamiva krūrā raveraṃśavaḥ ||2610-1 ambhodhervaḍavāmukhānalajhalājvālopagūḍhāntarā vyāmohādapibannapaḥ sphuṭamamī tarṣeṇa paryāvilāḥ |  2610-2 uddeśasphuradindracāpavalayajvālāpadeśādaho dahyante kathamanyathārdhamalināṅgāradyutastoyadāḥ ||2611-1 ambhodhau viharantamantarahitaiḥ kīrtiṃ vahantaṃ guṇaistaṃ mainākamavajragarvaviṣayau pakṣau dadhānaṃ numaḥ |  2611-2 āsanne suralokamānuṣajagatpātālapārātyaye yaḥ pāthonidhilaṅghinaḥ pathi marutsūnorvyanaiṣītklamaṃ ||2612-1 ambhonidheranavagītaguṇaikarāśeruccaiḥśravaprabhṛtiṣu prasabhaṃ hṛteṣu |  2612-2 āśvāsanaṃ yadavakṛṣṭamabhūnmaharṣe toyaṃ tvayā tadapi niṣkaruṇena pītaṃ ||2613-1 ambho'pi pravahatsvabhāvamaśanairāśyānamaśmāyate grāvāmbhaḥ sravati dravatvamuditodrekeṣu cāveyuṣaḥ |  2613-2 kālasyāskhalitaprabhāvarabhasaṃ bhāti prabhutve'dbhute kasyāmutra vidhātṛśaktighaṭite mārge nisargaḥ sthiraḥ ||2614-1 ambhobindugrahaṇarabhasāṃścātakānvīkṣamāṇāḥ śreṇībhūtāḥ parigaṇanayā nirdiśanto valākāḥ |  2614-2 tvāmāsādya stanitasamaye mānayiṣyanti siddhāḥ sotkampāni priyasahacarīsaṃbhramāliṅgitāni ||2615-1 ambho bhajasva ciramasya yathābhilāṣaṃ etanna tāṇḍavaya sairibha kānanaṃ ca |  2615-2 duśceṣṭitena yadanena bhṛśaṃ tavaiṣa dhvastāśayo bhavati niṣkaluṣastaḍāgaḥ ||2616-1 ambhobhistanakumbhayostava ghanaśleṣātsamutkīrṇatāṃ yātāyā śukavakrimapraṇayinī seyaṃ na luptā lipiḥ |  2616-2 kiṃ caitāṃ kusumeṣu kuñjaraśironakṣatramālāṃ tiro- dhitsurniṣphalameva majjasi nabhaḥ svacche sarovāriṇi ||2617-1 ambh_oṃucāṃ salilamudgiratāṃ niśīthe tāḍīvaneṣu nibhṛtasthitakarṇatālāḥ |  2617-2 ākarṇayanti kariṇo'rdhanimīlitākṣā dhārāravaṃ daśanakoṭiniṣaṇṇahastāḥ ||2618-1 ambhorāśirivāsi sattvanilayo no mandarakṣo bhavānkalyāṇaprakṛtiḥ sumeruriva kiṃ devaḥ surāpāśrayaḥ |  2618-2 sacchāyo na tu rūḍhadustaralatastvaṃ kalpavṛkṣo yathā taiḥ kurvanti tulāṃ tathāpi bhavato mūḍhāḥ kavīnāṃ dhiyaḥ ||2619-1 ambhoruhaṃ vadanamambakamindukāntaḥ pāthonidhiḥ kusumacāpabhṛto vikāraḥ |  2619-2 prādurbabhūva subhaga tvayi dūrasaṃsthe caṇḍālacandradhavalāsu niśāsu tasyāḥ ||2620-1 ambhoruhamaye snātvā vāpīpayasi kāminī |  2620-2 dadāti bhaktisaṃpannā puṣpasaubhāgyakāmyayā ||2621-1 ambhoruhākṣi śaṃbhoścaraṇāvārādhitau kena |  2621-2 yasmai vicalitavadanā madanākūtaṃ vibhāvayasi ||2622-1 ambhovāhamuradviṣo nivasanaṃ dhvāntādridivyauṣadhī kandarpasya vilāsacampakadhanurvarṣālatāmañjarī |  2622-2 lekhā vy_oṃakaśopale viracitā cāmīkarasya sphuraddhāmnaḥ pānthivilāsinījanamanaḥ kampāya śampābhavat ||2623-1 amlānapaṅkajā mālā kaṇṭhe rāmasya sītayā |  2623-2 mudhā budhā bhramantyatra pratyakṣe'pi kriyāpade ||2624-1 amlānamālyābharaṇāmbarasya varāṅganānandanamandirasya |  2624-2 nityaprakāśotsavasevitasya svargasya vittasya ca ko viśeṣaḥ ||2625-1 amlānastabakanti kuntalabhare sīmantasīmāsvimāḥ sindūranti kapolabhittiṣu milanmaireyarāganti ca |  2625-2 prauḍherṣyādyutiviśramanti nayanopānte kuraṅgīdṛśaḥ bimboṣṭhe kṣitipāla bālataraṇerlākṣārasanti tviṣaḥ ||2626-1 amlānirāmodabharaśca divyaḥ puṣpeṣu bhūyādbhavadaṅgasaṅgāt |  2626-2 dṛṣṭaṃ prasūnopamayā mayānyanna dharmaśarmobhayakarmaṭhaṃ yat ||2627-1 amlāno balavāñśūraśchāyevānugataḥ sadā |  2627-2 satyavādī mṛdurdāntaḥ sa rājavasatiṃ vaset ||2628-1 ayaṃ kanakanirmitaḥ sakalabhūdharādunnataḥ sahasranayanāśrayaḥ sapadi labdhabhāgyodayaḥ |  2628-2 kucopari parisphurattaruṇicārucelāñcalaṃ manāgapi nivāraya tyajatu garvamurvīdharaḥ ||2629-1 ayaṃ kāṇaḥ śukro viṣamacaraṇaḥ sūryatanayaḥ kṣatāṅgo'yaṃ rāhurvikalamahimā śītakiraṇaḥ |  2629-2 ajānānasteṣāmapi niyatakarmasvakaphalaṃ grahagrāmagrastā vayamiti jano'yaṃ pralapati ||2630-1 ayaṃ kāmo nijāmo vā tvayā kimavadhāritaṃ |  2630-2 iti dṛṣṭiriva praṣṭuṃ śrutiṃ śrayati subhruvāṃ ||2631-1 ayaṃ khalu mṛṇālinīnavavilāsavaihāsikastviṣāṃ vitapate patiḥ sapadi dṛśyamānā nijāḥ |  2631-2 stanau pulakayanti cotpaladṛśāṃ priyoraḥsthale viparyasitavṛttayo ghusṛṇapaṅkapatrāṅkurāḥ ||2632-1 ayaṃ ca suratajvālaḥ kāmāgniḥ praṇayendhanaḥ |  2632-2 narāṇāṃ yatra hūyante yauvanāni dhanāni ca ||2633-1 ayaṃ jyotsnājānistava vadanadūno'mbaraguhāṃ praviṣṭastatrāpi prasṛtamidamenaṃ dṛḍhatamaḥ |  2633-2 iti trāsodrekakramagalitasattvaḥ kṣayagadī vidhirdagdho dīnaṃ vyathayati nidānaṃ hi mṛdutā ||2634-1 ayaṃ tasyā rathakṣobhādaṃsenāṃso nipīḍitaḥ |  2634-2 ekaḥ kṛtī śarīre'smiñśeṣamaṅgaṃ bhuvo bharaḥ ||2635-1 ayaṃ tāvadbāṣpastruṭita iva muktāmaṇisaro visarpandhārābhirluṭhati dharaṇīṃ jarjarakaṇaḥ |  2635-2 niruddho'pyāvegaḥ sphuradadharanāsāpuṭatayā pareṣāmunneyo bhavati ca bharādhmātahṛdayaḥ ||2636-1 ayaṃ te vidrumacchāyo marumārga ivādharaḥ |  2636-2 karoti kasya no bāle pipāsākulitaṃ manaḥ ||2637-1 ayaṃ trayāṇāṃ grāmāṇāṃ nidhānaṃ madhuradhvaniḥ |  2637-2 rekhātrayamitīvāsyāḥ sūtritaṃ kaṇṭhakandale ||2638-1 ayaṃ daridro bhaviteti vaidhasīṃ lipiṃ lalāṭe'rthijanasya jāgratīṃ |  2638-2 mṛṣā na cakre'lpitakalpapādapaḥ praṇīya dāridryadaridratāṃ nalaḥ ||2639-1 ayaṃ dūtārthasaṃkṣepaḥ pratyarthaniyatā giraḥ |  2639-2 prayojanaṃ kriyotpādi kiyacchakyeta bhāṣituṃ ||2640-1 ayaṃ dūrabhrāntaḥ paṭutarapipāsākulamanāḥ kapole te mattadvipa nipatitaḥ ṣaṭpadayuvā |  2640-2 tvamapyetāṃ pīnaśravaṇadaradolāvyasanitāṃ vimuñca svācchandyādapanayatu tāvattṛṣamimāṃ ||2641-1 ayaṃ dvīpī priyāṃ leḍhi jihvāgreṇa punaḥ punaḥ |  2641-2 prītimāyāti ca tayā lihyamānaḥ svakāntayā ||2642-1 ayaṃ dhārāvāhastaḍidiyamiyaṃ dagdhakarakā sa cāyaṃ nirghoṣaḥ sa ca ravavaśo bhekanicayaḥ |  2642-2 itīva pratyaṅgaprathitamadanāgniṃ kṛśatanurghanaśvāsotkṣepairjvalayati muhurmṛtyuvaśinī ||2643-1 ayaṃ dhūrto māyāvinayamadhurādasya caritātsakhi pratyūṣi tvaṃ prakṛtisarale paśyasi na kiṃ |  2643-2 kapole yallākṣārasabahalarāgapraṇayinīṃ imāṃ dhatte mudrāmanaticiravṛttāntapiśunāṃ ||2644-1 ayaṃ nijaḥ paro veti gaṇanā laghucetasāṃ |  2644-2 udāracaritānāṃ tu vasudhaiva kuṭumbakaṃ ||2645-1 ayaṃ netrādatrerajani rajanīvallabha iti bhramaḥ ko'yaṃ prajñāparicayaparādhīnamanasāṃ |  2645-2 sudhānāmādhāraḥ sa khalu ratibimbādharasudhā- rasāsekasnigdhādajani nayanātpuṣpadhanuṣaḥ ||2646-1 ayaṃ paṭaḥ sūtradaridratāṃ gato hyayaṃ paṭaśchidraśatairalaṃkṛtaḥ |  2646-2 ayaṃ paṭaḥ prāvarituṃ na śakyate hyayaṃ paṭaḥ saṃvṛta eva śobhate ||2647-1 ayaṃ paṭo me pituraṅgabhūṣaṇaṃ pitāmahādyairupabhuktayauvanaḥ |  2647-2 alaṃkariṣyatyatha putrapautrakānmayādhunā puṣpavadeva dhāryate ||2648-1 ayaṃ padmāsanāsīnaścakravāko virājate |  2648-2 yugādau bhagavānvedhā vinirmitsuriva prajāḥ ||2649-1 ayaṃ pīnastanābhogasaubhāgyavibhavocitaḥ |  2649-2 draviṇopārjanasyaiva kālaḥ kuvalayekṣaṇe ||2650-1 ayaṃ puraḥ pārvaṇaśarvarīśaḥ kiṃ darpaṇo'yaṃ rajanīramaṇyāḥ |  2650-2 yatastadīyaṃ pratibimbamasminsaṃlakṣyate lāñchanakaitavena ||2651-1 ayaṃ prabhurayaṃ bhṛtya iti yā jagataḥ sthitiḥ |  2651-2 phalaṃ vijayate tatra śrīprasādāprasādayoḥ ||2652-1 ayaṃ bandhuḥ paraścāyaṃ mamāyamayamanyataḥ |  2652-2 iti brahmanna jānāmi tena jīvāmyanāmayaḥ ||2653-1 ayaṃ mandadyutirbhāsvānastaṃ prati yiyāsati |  2653-2 udayaḥ patanāyeti śrīmato bodhayannarān ||2654-1 ayaṃ mama dahatyaṅgaṃ ambhojadalasaṃstaraḥ |  2654-2 hutāśanapratinidhirdāhātmā nanu yujyate ||2655-1 ayaṃ mārtaṇḍaḥ kiṃ sa khalu turagaiḥ saptabhiritaḥ kṛśānuḥ kiṃ sarvāḥ prasarati diśo naiṣa niyataṃ |  2655-2 kṛtāntaḥ kiṃ sākṣānmahiṣavahano'sāviti ciraṃ samālokyājau tvāṃ vidadhati vikalpānpratibhaṭāḥ ||2656-1 ayaṃ mukhasaroruhabhramaravibhramaḥ subhruvāṃ kucasthalakuraṅgakaḥ pṛthunitambalīlāśikhī |  2656-2 na yauvanamadodayaścarati cārukānticchaṭā- kulatrivalikūlinīpulinarājahaṃsaściraṃ ||2657-1 ayaṃ mṛgaḥ samāyāti mṛgātsiṃhaḥ palāyate |  2657-2 tato vegātpalāyasva tvaritaistvaritaiḥ padaiḥ ||2658-1 ayaṃ meghavyūhe balini paripanthinyapasṛte śarajjanyāḥ svairaṃ hasitamiva harṣādavirataṃ |  2658-2 payaḥpūrabhraṃśakramajanitasopānasikate nadītīre dhīraṃ carati viśadaḥ khañjanagaṇaḥ ||2659-1 ayaṃ me vāggumpho viśadapadavaidagdhyamadhuraḥ sphuradbandho vandhyaḥ parahṛdi kṛtārthaḥ kavihṛdi |  2659-2 kaṭākṣo vāmākṣyā daradalitanetrāntagalitaḥ kumāre niḥsāraḥ sa tu kimapi yūnaḥ sukhayati ||2660-1 ayaṃ ratnākaro'mbhodhirityasevi dhanāśayā |  2660-2 dhanaṃ dūre'stu vadanaṃ apūri kṣāravāribhiḥ ||2661-1 ayaṃ rasālaḥ sukṛtaikasālaḥ pravālamālollasadālavālaḥ |  2661-2 mudaḥ pradātā bhavitā kathaṃ me varāṅganetyaśrumukhī śuśoca ||2662-1 ayaṃ revākuñjaḥ kusumaśarasevāsamucitaḥ samīro'yaṃ velāvanavidaladelāparimalaḥ|  2662-2 iyaṃ prāvṛḍdhanyā navajaladavinyāsacaturā smarādhīnaṃ cetaḥ sakhi kimapi kartuṃ mṛgayate ||2663-1 ayaṃ lolanmuktāvalikiraṇamālāparikaraḥ sphuṭasyendorlakṣmīṃ kṣapayitumalaṃ manmathasuhṛt |  2663-2 viśālaḥ śyāmāyāḥ skhalitaghananīlāṃśukavṛtiḥ stanābhogaḥ snihyanmasṛṇaghusṛṇālepasubhagaḥ ||2664-1 ayaṃ vahati dhātāraṃ yadvā devīṃ sarasvatīṃ |  2664-2 pakṣadvayamapi sthāne rājahaṃsasya nirmalaṃ ||2665-1 ayaṃ vārāmeko nilaya iti ratnākara iti śrito'smābhistṛṣṇātaralitamanobhirjalanidhiḥ |  2665-2 ka evaṃ jānīte nijakarapuṭīkoṭaragataṃ kṣaṇādenaṃ tāmyattimimakaramāpāsyati muniḥ ||2666-1 ayaṃ vipāko vada kasya yūnaḥ kalyāṇi kalyāṇaparaṃparāṇāṃ |  2666-2 yadakṣikoṇasravadacchadhārā hārāvatāro guṇamantareṇa ||2667-1 ayaṃ śūnyo grāmaḥ surasadanametannu patitaṃ puraḥ śuṣkā vāpī tarurayamitaḥ śīrṇaviṭapaḥ |  2667-2 vayaṃ caite pānthāḥ parikṛśadaśābhāgyagatayaḥ samānaḥ saṃyogaḥ kaṭurapi mano me ramayati ||2668-1 ayaṃ sa kālaḥ saṃprāpto dhārttarāṣṭropajīvināṃ |  2668-2 niveṣṭavyaṃ mayā tatra prāṇānaparirakṣatā ||2669-1 ayaṃ sa te tiṣṭhati saṃgamotsuko viśaṅkase bhīru yato'vadhīraṇāṃ |  2669-2 labheta vā prārthayitā na vā śriyaṃ śriyo durāpaḥ kathamīpsito bhavet ||2670-1 ayaṃ sa bhuvanatrayaprathitasaṃyamaḥ śaṃkaro bibharti vapuṣādhunā virahakātaraḥ kāminīṃ |  2670-2 anena kila nirjitā vayamiti priyāyāḥ karaṃ kareṇa paritāḍayanjayati jātahāsaḥ smaraḥ ||2671-1 ayaṃ sa raśanotkarṣī pīnastanavimardanaḥ |  2671-2 nābhyūrujaghanasparśī nīvīvisraṃsanaḥ karaḥ ||2672-1 ayaṃ sarvāṇi śāstrāṇi hṛdi jñeṣu ca vakṣyati |  2672-2 sāmarthyakṛdamitrāṇāṃ mitrāṇāṃ ca nṛpātmajaḥ ||2673-1 ayaṃ senottaṃsaḥ karakṛtakṛpāṇo raṇabhuvi dviṣadbhūmīpālāḥ kimapasarata prāṇakṛpaṇāḥ |  2673-2 kimabhyarthyaḥ pṛthvīdharakuharavāso'dya bhavatāṃ na kiṃ hṛdyā vidyādharanagaranīlotpaladṛśaḥ ||2674-1 ayaṃ snigdhaśyāmo ya iha viharatyambujavane vinidre vyāguñjanmadhupa iti taṃ jalpatu janaḥ |  2674-2 ahaṃ śaṅke paṅkeruhakuharavāsavyasaninīṃ śriyaṃ bhṛṅgacchadmā muraripurupeto ramayituṃ ||2675-1 ayaṃ svabhāvaḥ svata eva yatpara- śramāpanodapravaṇaṃ mahātmanāṃ |  2675-2 sudhāṃśureṣa svayamarkakarkaśa- prabhābhitaptāmavati kṣitiṃ kila ||2676-1 ayaṃ svārthaḥ parārtho'yaṃ ityevaṃ vā na kalpayet | vibudhā naiva manyante svaṃ paraṃ vā pṛthakpṛthak | niyuñjīta parasyārthe protsaheta svakarmaṇi || ayaṃ hi tīvreṇa jaganti tejasā2677-2 pratāpya bhāsāṃ patirastamāgataḥ |  2677-2 pratāpamātropanatā vibhūtayaściraṃ na tiṣṭhanti paropatāpināṃ ||2678-1 ayaṃ hi dehino deho dravyajñānakriyātmakaḥ |  2678-2 dehino vividhakleśasaṃtāpakṛdudāhṛtaḥ ||2679-1 ayaṃ hi prathamo rāgaḥ samastajanarañjane |  2679-2 yasya nāsti dvitīyo'pi sa kathaṃ pañcamo bhavet ||2680-1 ayaḥpiṇḍa ivottapte khalānāṃ hṛdaye kṣaṇāt |  2680-2 patitā api nekṣyante guṇāstoyakanā iva ||2681-1 ayathāvihitānāṃ yanmanojñatāsaṃpādau na staḥ |  2681-2 kathayāmyatastarūṇāṃ ropavidhānaṃ yathoddiṣṭaṃ ||2682-1 ayane viṣuve caiva ṣaḍaśītimukheṣu ca |  2682-2 candrasūryoparāge ca dattamakṣayamaśnute ||2683-1 ayamakṣuṇṇakāntaśrīradharo hariṇīdṛśaḥ |  2683-2 pravālapadmarāgāderupari pratigarjati ||2684-1 ayamaṅkurabhāva eva tāvatkucayoḥ karṣati lokalocanāni |  2684-2 itaretarapīḍanīmavasthāṃ gatayoḥ śrīranayoḥ kathaṃ bhavitrī ||2685-1 ayamatijaraṭhāḥ prakāmagurvīralaghuvilambipayodharoparuddhāḥ |  2685-2 satatamasumatāmagamyarūpāḥ pariṇatadikkarikāstaṭīrbibharti ||2686-1 ayamaparalatāyāḥ sādaraṃ hanta pītvā madhu mama makarandaṃ pātumāyāti bhṛṅgaḥ |  2686-2 iti manasi viṣādaṃ mallike mā kuru tvaṃ bata vada madhupānāṃ mānase ko vivekaḥ ||2687-1 ayamapi kharayoṣitkarṇakāṣāyamīṣadvisṛmaratimirorṇājarjaropāntamarciḥ |  2687-2 madakalakalaviṅkīkākunāndīkarebhyaḥ kṣitiruhaśikharebhyo bhānumānuccinoti ||2688-1 ayamapi puruhūtapreyasīmūrdhni pūrṇaḥ kalaśa iva sudhāṃśuḥ sādhurullālasīti |  2688-2 madanavijayayātrākālavijñāpānāya sphurati jaladhimadhye tāmrapātrīva bhānuḥ||2689-1 ayamabhinavameghaśyāmalottuṅgasānurmadamukharamayūrīmuktasaṃsaktakekaḥ |  2689-2 śakuniśabalanīḍānokahasnigdhavarṣmā vitarati bṛhadaśmā parvataḥ prītimakṣṇoḥ ||2690-1 ayamamṛtanidhānaṃ nāyako'pyoṣadhīnāṃ amṛtamayaśarīraḥ kāntiyukto'pi candraḥ |  2690-2 bhavati vigataraśmirmaṇḍalaṃ prāpya bhānoḥ parasadananiviṣṭaḥ ko laghutvaṃ na yāti ||2691-1 ayamamṛtanidhānaṃ nāyako'pyoṣadhīnāṃ śatabhiṣaganuyātaḥ śaṃbhumūrdhāvataṃsaḥ |  2691-2 virahayati na cainaṃ rājayakṣmā śaśāṅkaṃ hatavidhiparipākaḥ kena vā laṅghanīyaḥ||2692-1 ayamayamasāvākarṇyārātpratidvipaḍiṇḍimaṃ madakaluṣite netre mārjannudastakarārgalaḥ |  2692-2 agaṇitasṛṇiḥ krodhastabdhāyataśrutipallavaḥ praviśati nṛpasyāntaḥkakṣāṃ javādarimudgaraḥ ||2693-1 ayamayogivadhūvadhapātakairmramimavāpya divaḥ khalu pātyate |  2693-2 śitiniśādṛṣadi sphuṭadutpatat- kaṇagaṇādhikatārakitāmbaraḥ ||2694-1 ayamaravivarebhyaścātakairniṣpatadbhirharibhiracirabhāsāṃ tejasā cānuliptaiḥ |  2694-2 gatamupari ghanānāṃ vārigarbhodarāṇāṃ piśunayati rathastaṃ śīkaraklinnanemiḥ||2695-1 ayamalaghuvisārisphārijihvākalāpo jvalati yadi na madhye vāḍavo havyavāhaḥ|  2695-2 muhurupacitasāro vāribhirnimnagānāṃ tribhuvanamapi kiṃ na plāvayatyamburāśiḥ ||2696-1 ayamavasaraḥ saraste salilairupakartumarthināmaniśaṃ |  2696-2 idamapi ca sulabhamambho bhavati purā jaladharābhyudaye ||2697-1 ayamavasara upakṛtaye prakṛticalā yāvadasti saṃpadiyaṃ |  2697-2 vipadi sadābhyudayinyāṃ punarupakartuṃ kuto'vasaraḥ ||2698-1 ayamavicāritacārutayā saṃsāro bhāti ramaṇīyaḥ |  2698-2 atra punaḥ paramārthadṛśāṃ na kimapi sāramaṇīyaḥ ||2699-1 ayamasau gaganāṅgaṇadīpakastaralakālabhujaṃgaśikhāmaṇiḥ |  2699-2 kṣaṇaviḍambitavāḍavavigrahaḥ patati vārinidhau vidhuro raviḥ ||2700-1 ayamasau bhagavānuta pāṇḍavaḥ sthitamavāṅmuninā śaśimaulinā |  2700-2 samadhirūḍhamajena nu jiṣṇunā sviditi vegavaśānmumuhe gaṇaiḥ ||2701-1 ayamaho rajanīcarakesarī giridarīśayanātsahasotthitaḥ |  2701-2 timiravāraṇakumbhavidāraṇoc- chvalitaraktabharairiva lohitaḥ ||2702-1 ayamātmā svayaṃ sākṣādguṇaratnamahārṇavaḥ |  2702-2 sarvajñaḥ sarvadṛksārvaḥ parameṣṭhī nirañjanaḥ ||2703-1 ayamāndolitaprauḍhacandanadrumapallavaḥ |  2703-2 utpādayati sarvasya prītiṃ malayamārutaḥ ||2704-1 ayamālohitacchāyo madena mukhacandramāḥ |  2704-2 saṃnaddhodayarāgasya candrasya pratigarjati ||2705-1 ayamiha mugdho madhupaḥ parihṛtasahakāramañjarīpuñjaḥ |  2705-2 asaralamarasamasāraṃ śākhoṭakaviṭapamanusarati ||2706-1 ayamudayati kokīśokaśalyairmayūkhaiḥ śatamakhapuranārīnetragaṇḍūṣapeyaḥ |  2706-2 udayagirimṛgendrodgārabhinnāṅkaraṅku- śravaṇarudhiradhārāpāṭalaḥ pārvaṇenduḥ ||2707-1 ayamudayati candraścandrikādhautaviśvaḥ pariṇatavimalimni vy_oṃni karpūragauraḥ |  2707-2 ṛjurajataśalākāspardhibhiryasya pādairjagadamalamṛṇālīpañjarasthaṃ vibhāti ||2708-1 ayamudayati candro vāridherambugarbhādamṛtakaṇakarālairaṃśubhirdīpyamānaḥ |  2708-2 bhujagaśayanavakṣoharmyadeśe lalantyā vadanamiva yadṛcchottānitaṃ viśvamātuḥ ||2709-1 ayamudayati mudrābhañjanaḥ padminīnāṃ udayagirivanālībālamandārapuṣpaṃ |  2709-2 virahavidhurakokadvandvabandhurvibhindankupitakapikapolakroḍatāmrastamāṃsi ||2710-1 ayamudayamahīdhradhāturāgairaruṇakarāruṇitāmbarābhirāmaḥ |  2710-2 vitarasi na dṛśau kṛśāṅgi tārāṃ iva divi vanditumindurabhyupaiti ||2711-1 ayamudayamahībhṛnmūrdhni pāṇiṃ gṛhītvā divasapatirahauṣīdindupādānhavīṃṣi |  2711-2 aruṇakiraṇavahnau kanyakā pauruhūtī haridapi kimakārṣīttārakālājah_oṃaṃ ||2712-1 ayamudito himaraśmirvanitāvadanasya kīdṛśaḥ sadṛśaḥ |  2712-2 nīlādikopalambhaḥ sphurati pratyakṣataḥ kasya ||2713-1 ayamupagatakṛṣṇaḥ kṛṣṇasārākṣipātairyamakṛ(vikasi?)tanavanīlāmbhojavaktraścakāsti |  2713-2 jalayuvatikucānuprāsitottuṅgakumbha- sthalamadakalagarjannīranāgastaṭākaḥ ||2714-1 ayamuṣasi vinidradrāviḍītuṅgapīna- stanaparisarasāndrasvedabindūpamardī |  2714-2 srutamalayajavṛkṣakṣīrasaurabhyasabhyo vahati sakhi bhujaṅgībhuktaśeṣaḥ samīraḥ ||2715-1 ayamekapade tayā viyogaḥ priyayā copanataḥ suduḥsaho me |  2715-2 nava vāridharodayādahobhirbhavitavyaṃ ca nirātapatvaramyaiḥ ||2716-1 ayameko'hameketi jñānaṃ tatsaṃgame na me |  2716-2 rāga evādhikastatra haridrācūrṇayoriva ||2717-1 ayameva paro dharmo hyayameva paraṃ tapaḥ |  2717-2 patiśuśrūṣaṇaṃ yatra tatstrīṇāṃ svargahetukaṃ ||2718-1 ayaśaḥ prāpyate yena yena cādhogatirbhavet |  2718-2 svārthācca bhraśyate yena tatkarma na samācaret ||2719-1 ayaśasyaṃ anāyuṣyaṃ paradārābhimarśanaṃ |  2719-2 arthakṣayakaraṃ ghoraṃ pāpasya ca punarbhavaṃ ||2720-1 ayaśobhidurāloke kopadhāmaraṇādṛte |  2720-2 ayaśobhidurā loke kopadhā maraṇādṛte ||2721-1 ayaścaṇakacarvaṇaṃ phaṇiphaṇāmaṇeḥ karṣaṇaṃ kareṇa giritolanaṃ jalanidheḥ padā laṅghanaṃ |  2721-2 prasuptaharibodhanaṃ niśitakhaṅgasaṃsparśanaṃ kadācidakhilaṃ bhavenna ca śaṭhāddhanasyārjanaṃ ||2722-1 ayastu kākatuṇḍena carma ārāmukhena hi |  2722-2 mṛtpiṇḍaṃ ca ghaṭaṃ caiva vidhyetsūcīmukhena hi ||2723-1 ayācataḥ sīdataśca sarvopāyairnimantraya |  2723-2 ānṛśaṃsyaṃ paro dharmo'yācate yatpradīyate ||2724-1 ayācitaḥ sukhaṃ datte yācitaśca na yacchati |  2724-2 sarvasvaṃ cāpi harate vidhiruccṛṅkhalo nṛṇāṃ ||2725-1 ayācitāraṃ nahi devadevaṃ adriḥ sutāṃ grāhayituṃ śaśāka |  2725-2 abhyarthanābhaṅgabhayena sādhurmādhyasthamiṣṭe'pyavalambate'rthe ||2726-1 ayācito mayā labdho matpreṣitaḥ punargataḥ |  2726-2 yatrāgatastatra gatastatra kā parivedanā ||2727-1 ayācyaṃ caiva yācante'bhojyānvyāhārayanti ca |  2727-2 utkocairvañcanābhiśca kāryāṇi ghnanti cāsyati ||2728-1 ayājyayājanaiścaiva nāstikyena ca karmaṇāṃ |  2728-2 kulānyāśu vinaśyanti yāni hīnāni mantrataḥ ||2729-1 ayi kaṭhora yaśaḥ kila te priyaṃ kimayaśo nanu ghoramataḥparaṃ |  2729-2 kimabhavadvipine hariṇīdṛśaḥ kathaya nātha kathaṃ bata manyase ||2730-1 ayi kānta paśya meghaṃ nahi nahi pāpaṃ tavātipuṇyāyāḥ |  2730-2 nahi nahi paśya payodharaṃ apasāraya kañcukīmurasaḥ ||2731-1 ayi kiṃ guṇavati mālati jīvati bhavatīṃ vinā madhupāḥ |  2731-2 atha yadi jīvati jīvatu jīvanamapi jīvanābhāsaḥ ||2732-1 ayi kuraṅgi tapovanavibhramādupagatāsi kirātapurīmimāṃ |  2732-2 iha na paśyasi dāraya māraya grasa pibeti śukānapi jalpataḥ ||2733-1 ayi kuraṅgi turaṅgamavikrame tyaja vanaṃ javanaṃ gamanaṃ kuru |  2733-2 iha vane vicaranti hi nāyakāḥ surabhilohitalohitasāyakāḥ ||2734-1 ayi kulanicūlamūloc- chedanaduḥśīlavīcivācāle |  2734-2 bakavighasapaṅkasārā na cirātkāveri bhavitāsi ||2735-1 ayi kṣudro mābhūnmatimahimagarvo manasi vaḥ karī yāto bandhaṃ yadiha vinayastatra vijayī |  2735-2 ayaṃ krodhādhmātastyajati vinayaṃ cenmadavaśāttataḥ skandhāvāraṃ na kimakhilamevākulayati ||2736-1 ayi khalu badhirādhirāja kīraṃ tudasi śalākanipātanena mohāt |  2736-2 aniśamapi sudhānidhānavāṇīṃ racayatu maunamukho'stu vā samaste ||2737-1 ayi khalu viṣamaḥ purākṛtānāṃ bhavati hi jantuṣu karmaṇāṃ vipākaḥ |  2737-2 haraśirasi śirāṃsi yāni rejuḥ śiva śiva tāni luṭhanti gṛdhrapādāḥ ||2738-1 ayi cakitamugdhacātaka marubhuvi dhāvasi mudhā kimudgrīvaṃ |  2738-2 grīṣme davāgnivalitastāpiccho'yaṃ na vidyutvān ||2739-1 ayi cakorakuṭumbini kātare tiraya pakṣapuṭena kuṭumbakaṃ |  2739-2 bahu gataṃ kiyadapyavaśiṣyate vyapagataṃ timirairuditaḥ śaśī ||2740-1 ayi cātaka cañcupuṭātskhalayati jaladodabindumanilaścet |  2740-2 dvija eva bhāgyahīno jīvanadātā kṛtī jaladaḥ ||2741-1 ayi citta vittaleśe sahajapremṇā kiyannu lubdhamasi |  2741-2 na tathāpi tadviyogaḥ kevalamāste śivenāpi ||2742-1 ayi cetovihaga tvaṃ viṣayāraṇye bhramannasi śrāntaḥ |  2742-2 viśrāmakāmanā cecchivakalparuhe ciraṃ tiṣṭha ||2743-1 ayi jalada yadi na dāsyasi katicittvaṃ cātakāya jalakaṇikāḥ |  2743-2 tadayamacireṇa bhavitā salilāñjalidānayogyaste ||2744-1 ayi tyaktāsi kastūri pāmaraiḥ paṅkaśaṅkayā |  2744-2 alaṃ khedena bhūpālāḥ kiṃ na santi mahītale ||2745-1 ayi dayite tava vadanaṃ pāyaṃ pāyaṃ manobhavo garjan |  2745-2 smitamavalambya tamisrāsvapi hatakānhanta no hanti ||2746-1 ayi daladaravinda syandamānaṃ marandaṃ tava kimapi lihanto mañju guñjantu bhṛṅgāḥ |  2746-2 diśi diśi nirapekṣastāvakīnaṃ vivṛṇvanparimalamayamanyo bāndhavo gandhavāhaḥ ||2747-1 ayi dīnadayārdranātha he mathurānātha kadāvalokyase |  2747-2 hṛdayaṃ tvadalokakātaraṃ dayita bhrāmyati kiṃ kar_oṃyahaṃ ||2748-1 ayi durjanagarjitena kiṃ sarale namramukhī viṣīdasi tvaṃ |  2748-2 paripanthini devakīsute parivādo'pi tapobhirunnataiḥ ||2749-1 ayi duṣkṛtakena kena vatse halikadvāri lavaṅgi puṣpitāsi |  2749-2 stabakāstava pāṃsubhiḥ parītāḥ paritaḥ prāṅgaṇasīmni yalluṭhanti ||2750-1 ayi dūti sakhī tvameva me madano hanti śitaiḥ śilīmukhaiḥ |  2750-2 dayitaṃ tamupānayāśu tatsuśako jīvitanirgamo'nyathā ||2751-1 ayi nandatanūja kiṃkaraṃ patitaṃ māṃ viṣame bhavāmbudhau |  2751-2 kṛpayā tava pādapaṅkaja- sthitadhūlīsadṛśaṃ vibhāvaya ||2752-1 ayi pataṅgi lavaṅgalatāvane piba madhūni vidhūya madhuvratān |  2752-2 iha vane ca vanecarasaṃkule na ca satāmasātāṃ ca nirūpaṇaṃ ||2753-1 ayi parāri parunmalayānilā vavuramī jagureva ca kokilāḥ |  2753-2 kalamalotkalitaṃ tu na me manaḥ sakhi babhūva vṛthaiva yathaiṣamaḥ ||2754-1 ayi pibata cakorāḥ kṛtsnamunnāmikaṇṭha- kramasaralitacañcaccañcavaścandrikāmbhaḥ |  2754-2 virahavidhuritānāṃ jīvitatrāṇahetorbhavati hariṇalakṣmā ye na tejodaridraḥ ||2755-1 ayi bata guru garvaṃ mā sma kastūri yāsīrakhilaparimalānāṃ maulinā saurabheṇa|  2755-2 girigahanaguhāyāṃ līnamatyantadīnaṃ svajanakamamunaiva prāṇahīnaṃ karoṣi ||2756-1 ayi makarandasyandini padmini manye tavaiva subhagatvaṃ |  2756-2 puṣpavatīmapi bhavatīṃ tyajati na vṛddhaḥ śucirhaṃsaḥ ||2757-1 ayi madana na dagdhastvaṃ kimīśena kopātkimuta rativiyoge nānvabhūrmūrkha duḥkhaṃ |  2757-2 aviditaparapīḍo yena māmutpalākṣī- rahitamahitapātraiḥ patrivarṣairdunoṣi ||2758-1 ayi manmathacūtamañjari śravaṇāyatalocane priye |  2758-2 apahṛtya manaḥ kva yāsi me kimarājakamatra vartate ||2759-1 ayi mamaiṣa cakoraśiśurmunervrajati sindhupibasya na śiṣyatāṃ |  2759-2 aśitumabdhimadhītavato'sya ca śaśikarāḥ pibataḥ kati śīkarāḥ ||2760-1 ayi malayaja mahimāyaṃ kasya girāmastu viṣayaste |  2760-2 udgirato yadgaralaṃ phaṇinaḥ puṣṇāsi parimalodgāraiḥ ||2761-1 ayi mālati saurabhasāravinir- jitasaṃvikasatkamalānilaye |  2761-2 madhupānavidhau madhupasya punarbhuvane bhavatīmahamākalaye ||2762-1 ayi mṛgākṣi tavādharapallave dayitadantapadaṃ na bhavatyadaḥ |  2762-2 bhuvanamohanamantrapadāṅkitaṃ kimuta yantramidaṃ smarayoginaḥ ||2763-1 ayi roṣamurīkaroṣi no cetkimapi tvāṃ prati vāridhe vadāmaḥ |  2763-2 jaladena tavārthinā vimuktānyapi toyāni mahānna hā jahāsi ||2764-1 ayi laṅghitamaryāda smara smara harānalaṃ |  2764-2 dagdhaṃ dagdhumayuktaṃ te janaṃ virahakātaraṃ ||2765-1 ayi varoru hatasmaradīpike yadi gatāsi madīkṣaṇagocarāt |  2765-2 asamasāyakasāyakakīlitā vada gamiṣyasi me hṛdayātkathaṃ ||2766-1 ayi vijahīhi dṛḍhopagūhanaṃ tyaja navasaṃgamabhīru vallabhaṃ |  2766-2 aruṇakarodgama eṣa vartate varatanu saṃpravadanti kukkuṭāḥ ||2767-1 ayi vidhuṃ paripṛccha guroḥ kutaḥ sphuṭamaśikṣyata dāhavadānyatā |  2767-2 glapitaśaṃbhugalādgaralāttvayā kimudadhau jaḍa vā vaḍavānalāt ||2768-1 ayi śākunika kṛto'ñjaliritare na katīha jīvanopāyāḥ |  2768-2 hatvā śukānkimetadvipinamasārasvataṃ kuruṣe ||2769-1 ayi saṃprati dehi darśanaṃ smara paryutsuka eṣa mādhavaḥ |  2769-2 dayitāsvanavasthitaṃ nṛṇāṃ na khalu prema calaṃ suhṛjjane ||2770-1 ayi saṃprasīda pārvati śivo'pi tava pādayornipatito'haṃ |  2770-2 śiva iti kathaṃ hi jalpasi sarudhiragajacarmasaṃvītaḥ ||2771-1 āyi sakhi kuru kṣipraṃ rambhādalaiḥ śiśirānilaṃ sahacari tanau satkarpūraṃ drutaṃ parilepaya |  2771-2 sarasabisinīpatraistalpaṃ priye parikalpaya sphuṭamiti vibho tasyā gehe bhavanti kiloktayaḥ ||2772-1 ayi sakhi niśā kiṃ vā ghasraḥ śaśī kimu bhāskaraḥ sphurati purataḥ kāmaḥ kiṃ vā mamāsti sa vallabhaḥ |  2772-2 pratipalamiti prāṇādhīśa priyā virahāturā kathayati muhurmandaṃ mandaṃ sakhīṃ savidhasthitāṃ ||2773-1 ayi sakhi paridoṣo jāyate cumbane kiṃ kimu kucaparirambhe kiṃ rate brūhi tathyaṃ |  2773-2 itinigadati nāthe dīpamālokayantī hari hari hariṇākṣī hrīsamudre nimagnā ||2774-1 ayi sakhi mama prāṇādhīśo gato viṣayāntaraṃ kusumaviśikhastasmāduccairdunoti tanuṃ śaraiḥ |  2774-2 laghu kuru tathā yatnaṃ yena smarādhinivāraṇe paṭutaramatestasyāśu syādihāgamanaṃ tataḥ ||2775-1 ayi sakhi śastaḥ sakhivatpatiriti kiṃ tvaṃ na jānāsi |  2775-2 śasto'tisakhivadupapatirityāli kathaṃ tvayāpi nābodhi ||2776-1 ayi sarasija sāyaṃ saṃnidhānaṃ tvadīyaṃ bhramara upagato'yaṃ cūtamālāṃ vihāya |  2776-2 anupamamadhulobhāddūrataḥ sāṃprataṃ tadidamanucitametanmudraṇaṃ yanmukhasya ||2777-1 ayi sarale tāvadimā upadeśagiro viśanti karṇāntaḥ |  2777-2 yāvannāntarbhūtaṃ taccetasi māmakaṃ cetaḥ ||2778-1 ayi sutanuśarīre talpamāruhya tūrṇaṃ viracaya mama kaṇṭhe bandhanaṃ bāhuvallyā |  2778-2 itinigadati nāthe dīpamālokayantī hari hari hariṇākṣī hrīsamudre nimagnā ||2779-1 ayi sundari tava vadanaṃ nityaṃ pūrṇaṃ sudhānidhirmatvā |  2779-2 hanta patatyupariṣṭānmadhye'mbudhi nityamevāsau ||2780-1 ayi sundari saṃprati paśya puraścaramācalamastakameti raviḥ |  2780-2 samupaiti tamaḥpaṭalījaṭilā rajanī kuru kāmakalāḥ sakalāḥ ||2781-1 ayi svayūthyairaśanikṣatopamaṃ mamādya vṛttāntamimaṃ batoditā |  2781-2 mukhāni lolākṣi diśāmasaṃśayaṃ daśāpi śūnyāni vilokayiṣyasi ||2782-1 ayi hastagataiḥ prāṇairamībhiḥ kandukairiva |  2782-2 aparyantarasaṃ mugdhe kiyatkrīḍitumicchasi ||2783-1 ayi hāralate saṃhara harahuṃkṛtidagdhadehasaṃkṣobhaṃ |  2783-2 sadbhāvajānuraktirnahi ramyā paṇyanārīṇāṃ ||2784-1 ayi hṛdaya dayāṃ mayi kuru kuraṅganayanāṃ vinā badhāna dhṛtiṃ |  2784-2 ṭasaditi jhaṭiti sphuṭa vā sphuṭamidamuktaṃ gatirnānyā ||2785-1 ayuktaṃ bahu bhāṣante yatra kutrāpi śerate |  2785-2 nagnā vikṣipya gātrāṇi sajjarā kṣitibhṛti rahasyeva kathayet ||2787-1 ayuktaṃ svāmino yuktaṃ yuktaṃ nīcasya dūṣaṇaṃ |  2787-2 amṛtaṃ rāhave mṛtyurviṣaṃ śaṃkarabhūṣaṇaṃ ||2788-1 ayuktaḥ prākṛtaḥ stabdhaḥ śaṭho naikṛtiko'lasaḥ |  2788-2 viṣādī dīrghasūtrī ca kartā tāmasa ucyate ||2789-1 ayuktacāraṃ durdarśaṃ asvādhīnaṃ narādhipaṃ |  2789-2 varjayanti narā dūrānnadīpaṅkamiva dvipāḥ ||2790-1 ayuktarūpaṃ kimataḥparaṃ bhavettrinetravakṣaḥ sulabhaṃ tavāpi yat |  2790-2 stanadvaye'sminharicandanāspade padaṃ citābhasmarajaḥ kariṣyati ||2791-1 ayutaṃ niyutaṃ vāpi pradiśantu prākṛtāya bhogāya |  2791-2 krīṇanti na kusumadhanuṣaṃ jāgarayati|  2795-2 aho netradvandvaṃ vilasati vilaṅghya śrutipathaṃ kathaṃ na trailokyaṃ jayati madanaḥ smeravadanaḥ ||2796-1 aye kelīgṛhastambha kiṃ kṛtaṃ sukṛtaṃ tvayā |  2796-2 karasparśādindormukulayati netrāṇi nalinī ||2798-1 aye ko'yaṃ vṛddho gṛhaparivṛḍhaḥ kiṃ tava pitā na me bhartā kiṃtu vyapagatadṛganyacca badhiraḥ |  2798-2 huhuṃ śrānto'dyāhaṃ 2800-2 iyaṃ dhanyā dhanyā saralakadalī sundaradalā parātmānaṃ manye sukhayati phalenāmṛtavatā ||2801-1 aye diṣṭyā naṣṭo mama gṛhapiśācīparicayaḥ parāvṛttaṃ mohātsphurati ca manāgbrahmaṇi manaḥ | |  2802-2 nirāvarte nitye sthiraniravadhānabhramamaye vivekaprabhraśyadvikṛtiparamānandajaladhau ||2803-1 aye nīlagrīva kva kathaya sakhe te'dya munayaḥ paraṃ toṣaṃ yeṣāṃ tava varavilāso vitanute | 2804-2 dviṣāmatibhṛśaṃ yaśaḥ prakaṭapārado dhmāpanādudusphuṭata tārakāḥ kapaṭato vihāyastaṭe ||2805-1 aye pāthovāha sthagaya kakubho'nyāstata itastyajaitāṃ sīmānaṃ vasati munirasyāṃ kalaśabhūḥ |  2805-2 udañcatkope'sminsa jaladhirapi sthāsyati na te yataḥ pāyaṃ pāyaṃ salilamiha śauryaṃ prathayasi ||2806-1 aye madhupa mā kṛthā bata vṛthā manodīnatāṃ tuṣārasamaye latāśataniṣevaṇavyākulaḥ|  2806-2 iyaṃ purata eva te sarasapuṣpamāsodaye rasālanavamañjarī madhujharī jarījṛmbhate ||2807-1 aye mamodāsitameva jihvayā dvaye'pi tasminnanatiprayojane |  2807-2 garau giraḥ pallavanārthalāghave ||2819-1 aye helāvelātulitakulaśaile jalanidhau kuto vārāmoghaṃ bata jalada moghaṃ vitarasi|  2819-2 samantāduttālajvaladanalakīlākavalana- klamopetānetānupacara payobhirviṭapinaḥ||2820-1 2825-2 daivena nāśitaṃ yattu tasya rakṣā na dṛśyate ||2826-1 arakṣitā gṛhe ruddhāḥ puruṣairāptakāribhiḥ |  2826-2 ātmānamātmanā yāstu rakṣeyustāḥ surakṣitāḥ ||2827-1 arakṣitāraṃ rājānaṃ 2838-2 daṇḍaprāyo hi nṛpatirbhunaktyākramya medinīṃ ||2839-1 arayo'pi hi saṃdheyāḥ sati kāryārthagaurave |  2839-2 ahimūṣakavaddevā hyarthasya padavīṃ gataiḥ ||2840-1 aralūvṛkṣapatrāṇāṃ lepo budhyati mandātmā sa ca sarvatra naśyati ||2856-1 ariṇā saha saṃvāsādviṣeṇa saha bhojanāt |  2856-2 pāpmanā saha sauhārdānmaraṇaṃ pratipadyate ||2857-1 arito'bhyāgato doṣaḥ śatrusaṃvāsakāritaḥ |  2857-2 sarpasaṃvāsadharmitvānnityodvegena dūṣitaḥ ||2858-1 jāyate plakṣabījāśātkapotādiva śālmaleḥ |  2858-2 udvegajanano nityaṃ paścādapi bhayāvahaḥ ||2859-1 aripakṣāśrite mitre
