anityacittaḥ puruṣastasminko nāma viśvaset ||2863-1 ariṣaṅvarga evāyaṃ asyāstāta padāni ṣaṭ |  2863-2 teṣāmekamapi cchindankhañjaya bhramarīṃ śriyaṃ ||2864-1 ariṣṭāni mahārāja śṛṇu vakṣyāmi tāni te |  2864-2 yeṣāmālokanānmṛtyuḥ nijaṃ jānāti yogavit ||2865-1 aruṃtudaṃ paruṣaṃ rūkṣavācaṃ vākkaṇṭakairvitudantaṃ manuṣyān |  2865-2 vidyādalakṣmīkatamaṃ janānāṃ mukhe nibaddhāṃ nirṛtiṃ vahantaṃ ||2866-1 arucirniśayā vinā śaśī śaśinā sāpi vinā mahattamaḥ |  2866-2 ubheyena vinā manobhava- sphuritaṃ naiva cakāsti kāminoḥ ||2867-1 aruṇakiraṇajālairantarikṣe gatarkṣe calati śiśiravāte mandamandaṃ prabhāte|  2867-2 yuvatijanakadambe nāthamuktauṣṭhabimbe caramagirinitambe candrabimbaṃ lalambe ||2868-1 aruṇakiraṇe vahnau lājānuḍūni juhoti yā pariṇayati tāṃ saṃdhyāmetāmavaimi maṇirdivaḥ |  2868-2 iyamiva sa evāgnibhrāntiṃ karoti purāyataḥ karamapi na kastasyaivotkaḥ sakautukamīkṣituṃ ||2869-1 aruṇajalajarājīmugdhahastāgrapādā bahulamadhupamālākajjalendīvarākṣī |  2869-2 anupatati virāvaiḥ patriṇāṃ vyāharantī rajanimacirajātā pūrvasaṃdhyā suteva ||2870-1 aruṇadalanalinyā snigdhapādāravindā kaṭhinatanudharaṇyāṃ yātyakasmātskhalantī |  2870-2 avani tava suteyaṃpādavinyāsadeśe tyaja nija kaṭhinatvaṃ jānakī yātyaraṇyaṃ||2871-1 aruṇanayanaṃ sabhrūbhaṅgaṃ darasphuritādharaṃ sutanu śaśinaḥ kliṣṭāṃ kāntiṃ karotu tavānanaṃ |  2871-2 kṛtamanunayaiḥ kopo'yaṃ te manasvini vardhatāṃ iti gaditayāśliṣṭo devyā śivāya śivo'stu vaḥ ||2872-1 aruṇamapi vidrumadruṃ mṛdulataraṃ cāpi kisalayaṃ bāle |  2872-2 adharīkaroti nitarāṃ tavādharo madhurimātiśayāt ||2873-1 aruṇarāganiṣedhibhiraṃśukaiḥ śravaṇalabdhapadaiśca yavāṅkuraiḥ |  2873-2 parabhṛtāvirutaiśca vilāsinaḥ smarabalairabalaikarasāḥ kṛtāḥ ||2874-1 aruṇitākhilaśailavanā muhurvidadhatī pathikānparitāpinaḥ |  2874-2 vikacakiṃśukasaṃhatiruccakairudavahaddavahavyavahaśriyaṃ ||2875-1 aruṇe ca taruṇi nayane tava malinaṃ ca priyasya mukhaṃ |  2875-2 mukhamānataṃ ca sakhite jvalitaścāsyāntare smarajvalanaḥ ||2876-1 aruṇodayavelāyāṃ daśāhena phalaṃ labhet |  2876-2 govisarjanavelāyāṃ sadyaḥ phalada iṣyate ||2877-1 arundhatīkāmapuraṃdhrilakṣmī- jambhadviṣaddāranavāmbikānāṃ |  2877-2 caturdaśīyaṃ tadihocitaiva gulphadvayāptā yadadṛśyasiddhiḥ ||2878-1 aruṣyankruśyamānasya sukṛtaṃ nāma vindati |  2878-2 duṣkṛtaṃ cātmano marṣī ruṣyatyevāpamārṣṭi vai ||2879-1 arūpo'pi surūpo'pi āḍhyo'pi dravyavarjitaḥ |  2879-2 duḥśīlaḥ śīlayukto vā strīṇāṃ bhartādhidevatā ||2880-1 are cet_oṃatsya bhramaṇamadhunā yauvanajale tyaja tvaṃ svacchandaṃ yuvatijaladhau paśyasi na kiṃ |  2880-2 tanūjālījālaṃ stanayugalatumbīphalayutaṃ manobhūḥ kaivartaḥ kṣipati ratitantu pratimuhuḥ ||2881-1 are daiva tvadāyattaṃ kāmaṃ vittādi gacchatu |  2881-2 mamāyattaṃ punarvṛttaṃ hartuṃ kasyeha yogyatā ||2882-1 are yamabhaṭāḥ śaṭhāḥ kapaṭavigrahe tūdbhaṭā nivedayata vo yamaṃ na ca tavādhikāro mayi |  2882-2 ahaṃ ca śivasundarīcaraṇayugmapaṅkeruha- skhalanmadhusudhārasaṃ samapibaṃ na jānītha re ||2883-1 are rāmāhastābharaṇa bhasalaśreṇiśaraṇa smarakrīḍāvrīḍāśamana virahiprāṇadamana|  2883-2 sarohaṃsottaṃsa pracaladala nīlotpala sakhe sakhedo'haṃ mohaṃ ślathaya kathaya kvenduvadana ||2884-1 are vada harernāma kṣemadhāma kṣaṇe kṣaṇe |  2884-2 bahiḥ sarati niḥśvāse viśvāsaḥ kaḥ pravartate ||2885-1 araiḥ saṃdhāryate nābhirnābhau cārāḥ pratiṣṭhitāḥ |  2885-2 svāmisevakayorevaṃ vṛtticakraṃ pravartate ||2886-1 arodi madhupairbhṛśaṃ kamalamālayā mīlitaṃ vyakampi jalavīcibhirvidalitaṃ mukhaṃ kairavaiḥ |  2886-2 vilokya rajanau hrade virahikokaśokaṃ ghanaṃ paravyasanakātarāḥ kimiva kurvate sādhavaḥ ||2887-1 arkakarpāsayormūlaṃ jalapītaṃ jayedviṣaṃ |  2887-2 paṭolamūlanasyena kāladaṣṭo'pi jīvati ||2888-1 arkacchāyaṃ tirayati sudhāliptavidyunmatallī cakraprakhyaṃ mahati suṣamāmaṇḍale dūramagnaṃ |  2888-2 raktādarśapratiphalamiva śrīsadaṅgaṃ vahantī dṛṣṭā kācittaralanayanā devateva smarasya ||2889-1 arkāḥ kiṃ phalasaṃcayena bhavatāṃ kiṃ vaḥ prasūnairnavaiḥ kiṃ vā bhūrilatācayena mahatā gotreṇa kiṃ bhūyasā |  2889-2 yeṣāmekatamo babhūva sa punarnaivāsti kaścitkule chāyāyāmupaviśya yasya pathikāstṛptiṃ phalaiḥ kurvate ||2890-1 arkāḥ kecana kecidakṣataravaḥ keciddalakṣmāruhāḥ nimbāḥ kecana kecidatra vipine krūrāḥ karīradrumāḥ |  2890-2 mākando makarandatundilamiladbhṛṅgāliśṛṅgāritaḥ ko'pyatrāsti na mitra yatra tanute karṇāmṛtaṃ kokilaḥ ||2891-1 arkābhimukhyasalilasthitisādhanāni raktāmbujasya phalitānyadhunā tapāṃsi|  2891-2 yadbhīru tasya paribhūtikaraṃ padaṃ tvaṃ lākṣārasāntaritarāgamidaṃ karoṣi ||2892-1 arghāyāmbudhirindumaṇḍalamapi śrīcandanaṃ taṇḍulāstārā bilvadalaṃ nabhaḥsuradhunī dhūpaḥ pradīpo raviḥ |  2892-2 kheṭāḥ pañcaphalāni kiṃ ca kakubhastāmbūlamārātrikaṃ meruḥ śrījagatīpate tava yaśoyogeśvarasyārcane ||2893-1 arghyaṃ dattvātha devāya bhāskarāya samāhitaḥ |  2893-2 tato'laṃkṛtagātraḥ sanvṛttamālokya mantravat ||2894-1 arghyamarghyamiti vādinaṃ nṛpaṃ so'navekṣya bharatāgrajo yataḥ |  2894-2 kṣatrakopadahanārciṣaṃ tataḥ saṃdadhe dṛśamudagratārakāṃ ||2895-1 arcakasya tapoyogādarcanasyātiśāyanāt |  2895-2 ābhirūpyācca mūrtīnāṃ devaḥ sāṃnidhyamṛcchati ||2896-1 arcāmaḥ satataṃ gaṇādhipamathāpyākhūnnihanmaḥ śataṃ dhyāyāmo hṛdi bhairavaṃ tadapi tu protsārayāmaḥ śunaḥ |  2896-2 bhūteśaṃ praṇumastathāpi śataśo bhūtānnigṛhṇīmahe nahyekasya guṇaḥ parasya mahato doṣānapi prorṇute ||2897-1 arcāmīti dhiyā yadeva kusumaṃ kṣiptvā jano mucyate vidhyāmīti dhiyā tadeva vikiranbhasmīkṛto manmathaḥ |  2897-2 ityābhyantaravṛttimātrarasiko bāhyānapekṣaśca yaḥ sa svāmī mama daivataṃ taditaro nāmnāpi nāmnāyate ||2898-1 arcirmālākarālāddivamabhilihato dāvavahneradūrāduḍḍīyoḍḍīya kiṃcicchalabhakavalanānandamandapracārāḥ |  2898-2 agre'gre saṃraṭantaḥ pracurataramasīpātadurlakṣadhūmrā dhūmyāṭāḥ paryaṭanti prativiṭapamamī niṣṭhurāḥ svasthalīṣu ||2899-1 arciṣmanti vidārya vaktrakuharāṇyāsṛkkaṇo vāsukestarjanyā viṣakarburāngaṇayataḥ saṃspṛśya dantāṅkurān |  2899-2 ekaṃ trīṇi navāṣṭa sapta ṣaḍiti vyastāstasaṃkhyākramā vācaḥ śaktidharasya śaiśavakalāḥ kurvantu vo maṅgalaṃ ||2900-1 arcye viṣṇau śilādhīrguruṣu naramatirvaiṣṇave jātibuddhirviṣṇorvā vaiṣṇavānāṃ kalimalamathane pādatīrthe'mbubuddhiḥ |  2900-2 śrīviṣṇornāmni mantre sakalakaluṣahe śabdasāmānyabuddhirviṣṇau sarveśvareśe taditarasamadhīryasya vā nārakī saḥ ||2901-1 arjayejjñānamarthāṃśca pumānamaravatsadā |  2901-2 keśeṣviva gṛhītaḥ sanmṛtyunā dharmamācaret ||2902-1 arjitaṃ svena vīryeṇa nānyamāśritya kaṃcana |  2902-2 phalaśākamapi śreyo bhoktuṃ hyakṛpaṇaṃ gṛhe ||2903-1 parasya nu gṛhe bhoktuḥ paribhūtasya nityaśaḥ |  2903-2 sumṛṣṭamapi na śreyo vikalpo'yamataḥ satāṃ ||2904-1 arjunaḥ kṛṣṇasaṃyuktaḥ karṇaṃ yatrānudhāvati |  2904-2 tannetraṃ tu kurukṣetraṃ iti mugdhe mṛśāmahe ||2905-1 arjunaḥ phalgunaḥ pārthaḥ kirīṭī śvetavāhanaḥ |  2905-2 bībhatsurvijayī kṛṣṇaḥ savyasācī dhanaṃjayaḥ ||2906-1 arjunasya ime bāṇā neme bāṇāḥ śikhaṇḍinaḥ |  2906-2 sīdanti mama gātrāṇi māghamā segavā iva ||2907-1 arjunasya pratijñe dve na dainyaṃ na palāyanaṃ |  2907-2 āyū rakṣati marmāṇi āyurannaṃ prayacchati ||2908-1 arjunānte varārohe bhīmānte ca varānane |  2908-2 pāṇḍavaiḥ saha yoddhavyaṃ rakṣaṇīyo dhanaṃjayaḥ ||2909-1 arjunīyati yadarjane jano varjanīyajanatarjanādibhiḥ |  2909-2 maṅkṣu naśyati cirāya saṃcitā vañcitā jagati ke na saṃpadā ||2910-1 arthaṃ dhigastu bahuvairikaraṃ narāṇāṃ rājyaṃ dhigastu bhayadaṃ bahu cintanīyaṃ |  2910-2 svargaṃ dhigastu punarāgamanapravṛttiṃ dhigdhikśarīramapi rogasamāśrayaṃ ca||2911-1 arthaṃ mahāntamāsādya vidyāmaiśvaryameva vā |  2911-2 vicaratyasamunnaddho yaḥ sa paṇḍita ucyate ||2912-1 arthaṃ sapratibandhaṃ prabhuradhigantuṃ sahāyavāneva |  2912-2 dṛśyaṃ tamasi na paśyati dīpena vinā sacakṣurapi ||2913-1 arthaḥ kāmo dharmo mokṣaḥ sarve bhavanti puruṣasya |  2913-2 tāvadyāvatpīḍāṃ jāṭharavahnirna vidadhāti ||2914-1 arthaḥ sukhaṃ kīrtirapīha mā bhūdanartha evāstu tathāpi dhīrāḥ |  2914-2 nijapratijñāmanurudhyamānā mahodyamāḥ karmasamārabhante ||2915-1 artha eva hi keṣāṃcidanartho bhavitā nṛṇāṃ |  2915-2 arthaśreyasi cāsakto na śreyo vindate naraḥ ||2916-1 arthagrahaṇe na tathā dunoti kaṭukūjitairyathā piśunaḥ |  2916-2 rudhirādānādadhikaṃ dunoti karṇe kvaṇanmaśakaḥ ||2917-1 arthajñātsaṃśayacchettā tataḥ śreyānsvakarmakṛt |  2917-2 muktasaṅgastato bhūyānadogdhā dharmamātmanaḥ ||2918-1 arthatyāgo hi kāryaḥ syādarthaṃ śreyāṃsamicchatā |  2918-2 bījaupamyena kaunteya mā te bhūdatra saṃśayaḥ ||2919-1 arthadharmau parityajya yaḥ kāmamanuvartate |  2919-2 evamāpadyate kṣipraṃ rājā daśaratho yathā ||2920-1 arthanāśaṃ manastāpaṃ gṛhe duścaritāni ca |  2920-2 vañcanaṃ cāpamānaṃ ca matimānna prakāśayet ||2921-1 arthapatau bhūmipatau bāle vṛddhe tapo'dhike viduṣi |  2921-2 yoṣiti mūrkhe guruṣu ca viduṣā naivottaraṃ deyaṃ ||2922-1 arthapraśnakṛtau loke sulabhau tau gṛhe gṛhe |  2922-2 dātā cottaradaścaiva durlabhau puruṣau bhuvi ||2923-1 arthaprāṇavināśasaṃśayakarīṃ prāpyāpadaṃ dustarāṃ pratyāsannabhayo na vetti vibhavaṃ svaṃ jīvitaṃ kāṅkṣati |  2923-2 uttīrṇastu tato dhanārthamaparāṃ bhūyo viśatyāpadaṃ prāṇānāṃ ca dhanasya cādhamadhiyāmanyonyahetuḥ paṇaḥ ||2924-1 arthapriyatayātmānaṃ apriyāya dadāti yā |  2924-2 kāmātmanyapi niḥsnehāṃ ko'nurakteti manyate ||2925-1 arthamanarthaṃ bhāvaya nityaṃ nāsti tataḥ sukhaleśaḥ satyaṃ |  2925-2 putrādapi dhanabhājāṃ bhītiḥ sarvatraiṣā vihitā rītiḥ ||2926-1 arthayuktasya karaṇaṃ anarthasya ca varjanaṃ |  2926-2 nyāyataśca karādānaṃ svayaṃ ca pratimokṣaṇaṃ ||2927-1 arthayuktimavijñāya yaḥ śubhe kurute matiṃ |  2927-2 mitre vā yadi vā śatrau tasyāpi calitā matiḥ ||2928-1 arthayedeva mitrāṇi sati vāsati vā dhane |  2928-2 nānarthayanvijānāti mitrāṇāṃ sāraphalgutāṃ ||2929-1 artharakṣāparo bhṛtyaḥ kṛtyākṛtyavivekavit |  2929-2 sāndhivigrahikaḥ kāryo rājñā nayaviśāradaḥ ||2930-1 arthavantaḥ praśasyante nindyante tadvinākṛtāḥ |  2930-2 āgemeṣvapi cedevaṃ adbhutaṃ kiṃ śarīriṣu ||2931-1 arthavānarthamarthibhyo na dadātyatra ko guṇaḥ |  2931-2 ekaiva gatirarthasya dānamanyā vipattayaḥ ||2932-1 arthavāneva loke'sminpūjyate mitrabāndhavaiḥ |  2932-2 arthahīnastu puruṣo jīvannapi mṛtopamaḥ ||2933-1 arthavānduṣkulīno'pi loke pūjyatamo naraḥ |  2933-2 śaśinastulyavaṃśo'pi nirdhanaḥ paribhūyate ||2934-1 arthaścetsarvathā rakṣya iti kaiścidudāhṛtaṃ |  2934-2 tatkathaṃ na hariścandro'rakṣatkuśikanandane ||2935-1 dharmastu rakṣitaḥ sarvairapi dehavyayena ca |  2935-2 śibiprabhṛtibhūpālairdadhīcipramukhairdvijaiḥ ||2936-1 arthasaṃpadvimohāya bahuśokāya caiva hi |  2936-2 tasmādarthamanarthakyaṃ śreyo'rthī dūratastyajet ||2937-1 arthasaṃpādanārthaṃ ca pīḍyamānasya śatrubhiḥ |  2937-2 sādhuṣu vyapadeśārthaṃ dvividhaḥ saṃśrayaḥ smṛtaḥ ||2938-1 arthasiddhiṃ parāmicchandharmamevāditaścaret |  2938-2 nahi dharmādapaityarthaḥ svargalokādivāmṛtaṃ ||2939-1 arthasya niścayo dṛṣṭo vicāreṇa hitoktitaḥ |  2939-2 na snānena na dānena prāṇāyāmaśatena vā ||2940-1 arthasya puruṣo dāsaḥ sa ca jātu na kasyacit |  2940-2 yadarjanaparā loke sarve'pi bhuvanatraye ||2941-1 arthasya puruṣo dāso dāsastvartho na kasyacit |  2941-2 iti satyaṃ mahārāja baddho'smyarthena kauravaiḥ ||2942-1 arthasya mūlaṃ prakṛtirnayaśca dharmasya kāruṇyamakaitavaṃ ca |  2942-2 kāmasya vittaṃ ca vapurvayaśca mokṣasya sarvārthanivṛttireva ||2943-1 arthasya saṃgrahe caināṃ vyaye caiva niyojayet |  2943-2 śauce dharme'nnapaktyāṃ ca pāriṇāhyasya cekṣaṇe ||2944-1 arthasya sadotthānaṃ niyamaparīpālanaṃ kriyājñānaṃ |  2944-2 sthānatyāgaḥ paṭutā-'nudvegaḥ strīṣvaviśvāsaḥ ||2945-1 arthasya sādhane siddha utkarṣe rakṣaṇe vyaye |  2945-2 nāśopabhoga āyāsastrāsaścintā bhramo nṛṇāṃ ||2946-1 arthasyānarthapūrṇasya ko'vasīdatu saṃgrahe |  2946-2 tatsaṃtuṣṭairnnacediṣṭairduṣṭaiḥ syānnayanotsavaḥ ||2947-1 arthasyopārjanaṃ kaṣṭaṃ kaṣṭamasya gṛhāgamaḥ |  2947-2 tasyāgatasya bandhubhyo viniyogaḥ sukhāvahaḥ ||2948-1 arthasyopārjanaṃ kṛtvā naivābhāgyaḥ samaśnute |  2948-2 araṇyaṃ mahadāsādya mūḍhaḥ s_oṃilako yathā ||2949-1 arthasyopārjane duḥkhaṃ pālane ca kṣaye tathā |  2949-2 nāśe duḥkhaṃ vyaye duḥkhaṃ ghnanti caivārthakāraṇāt ||2950-1 arthahīno'pi madhuraḥ śabdo lokapriyaṃkaraḥ |  2950-2 vīṇāveṇumṛdaṅgādīnyatrodāharaṇāni naḥ ||2951-1 arthāṃśca durlabhāṃlloke kleśāṃśca sulabhāṃstathā |  2951-2 duḥkhaṃ caiva kuṭumbārthe yaḥ paśyati sa mucyate ||2952-1 arthāṃstyajata pātrebhyaḥ sutānprāpnuta kāmajān |  2952-2 priyaṃ priyebhyaścarata rājā hi tvarate jaye ||2953-1 arthāḥ khalu samṛddhā hi bāḍhaṃ duḥkhaṃ vijānatāṃ |  2953-2 asamṛddhāstvapi sadā mohayantyavicakṣaṇān ||2954-1 arthāḥ pādarajopamā girinadīvegopamaṃ yauvanaṃ mānuṣyaṃ jalabindulolacapalaṃ phenopamaṃ jīvanaṃ |  2954-2 dharmaṃ yo na karoti niścalamatiḥ svargārgalodghāṭanaṃ paścāttāpahato jarāpariṇataḥ śokāgninā dahyate ||2955-1 arthāḥ sādhāraṇā eva viyujyante svabhāvataḥ |  2955-2 mamatāṃ tyajatāṃ teṣu mahadutpadyate yaśaḥ ||2956-1 arthākṛṣṭadhiyaḥ padaṃ racayataḥ śabdāvadhānātmanaḥ saṃdhicchedavidhānanirgamavidhivyāpāramātanvataḥ |  2956-2 mā māṃ kaścidiha grahīditi muhuḥ sāśaṅkamāpaśyataścaurasyeva kaverbhayaṃ bhavati yattadvidviṣāmastu vaḥ ||2957-1 arthāgamo nityamarogitā ca priyā ca bhāryā priyavādinī ca |  2957-2 vaśyaśca putro'rthakarī ca vidyā ṣaḍjīvalokasya sukhāni rājan ||2958-1 arthā gṛhe nivartante śmaśāne caiva bāndhavāḥ |  2958-2 sukṛtaṃ duṣkṛtaṃ cāpi gacchantamanugacchati ||2959-1 arthāturāṇāṃ na suhṛnna bandhuḥ kāmāturāṇāṃ na bhayaṃ na lajjā |  2959-2 vidyāturāṇāṃ na sukhaṃ na nidrā kṣudhāturāṇāṃ na vapurna tejaḥ ||2960-1 arthātpalāyate jñānaṃ mārjārānmūṣiko yathā |  2960-2 vakavatjñāyatāmarthaḥ siṃhavacca jayedripuṃ ||2961-1 arthā duḥkhaṃ parityaktuṃ pālitāścāpi te'sukhāḥ |  2961-2 duḥkhena cādhigamyante teṣāṃ nāśaṃ na cintayet ||2962-1 arthāddharmaśca kāmaśca svargaścaiva narādhipa |  2962-2 prāṇayātrā hi lokasya vinārthaṃ na prasidhyati ||2963-1 arthādbhraṣṭastīrthayātrāṃ tu gacchetsatyādmraṣṭo rauravaṃ vai vrajecca |  2963-2 yogādbhraṣṭaḥ satyadhṛtiṃ ca gacchedrājyādbhraṣṭo mṛgayāyāṃ vrajecca ||2964-1 arthānarthāntare buddhirniścitāpi na śobhate |  2964-2 ghātayanti hi karyāṇi dūtāḥ paṇḍitamāninaḥ ||2965-1 arthānarthau viniścitya vyavasāyaṃ bhajeta ha |  2965-2 guṇataḥ saṃgrahaṃ kuryāddoṣatastu visarjayet ||2966-1 arthā na santi na ca muñcati māṃ durāśā tyāge ratiṃ vahati durlalitaṃ mano me |  2966-2 yācñā ca lāghavakarī svavadhe ca pāpaṃ prāṇāḥ svayaṃ vrajata kiṃ paridevanena||2967-1 arthā na syuryadi vijahimo dharmamarthaikasādhyaṃ kāyakleśaiḥ katikatividhaḥ sādhanīyo na dharmaḥ |  2967-2 kāyaḥ śrānto yadi bhavati kastāvatā dharmalopaścittaṃ dattvā sakṛdiva śive cintitaṃ sādhayāmaḥ ||2968-1 arthānāmadhikānāṃ rājñā caureṇa vā nāśaḥ |  2968-2 anne khalvatibhukte vamanaṃ vā syādvireko vā ||2969-1 arthānāmananuṣṭhātā kāmacārī vikatthanaḥ |  2969-2 api sarvāṃ mahīṃ labdhvā kṣiprameva vinaśyati ||2970-1 arthānāmarjanaṃ kāryaṃ vardhanaṃ rakṣaṇaṃ tathā |  2970-2 bhakṣyamāṇo nirādāyaḥ sumerurapi hīyate ||2971-1 arthānāmarjane duḥkhaṃ arjitānāṃ ca rakṣaṇe |  2971-2 nāśe duḥkhaṃ vyaye duḥkhaṃ dhigarthāḥ kaṣṭasaṃśrayāḥ ||2972-1 arthānāmārjanaṃ kāryaṃ vardhanaṃ rakṣaṇaṃ tathā |  2972-2 bhakṣyamāṇo nirādāyaḥ kṣīyate himavānapi ||2973-1 arthānāmīśiṣe tvaṃ vayamapi ca girāmīśmahe yāvaditthaṃ śūrastvaṃ vāgmidarpajvaraśamanavidhāvakṣayaṃ pāṭavaṃ naḥ |  2973-2 sevante tvāṃ dhanāndhā matimalahataye māmapi śrotukāmā mayyapyāsthā na te cettvayi mama sutarāmeṣa rājangato'smi ||2974-1 arthānāmīśvaro yaḥ syādindriyāṇāmanīśvaraḥ |  2974-2 indriyāṇāmanaiśvaryādaiśvaryādbhraśyate hi saḥ ||2975-1 arthānāharato'narthāḥ samāyānti pramādinaḥ |  2975-2 apramattastato mārge nityamevāstu vittavān ||2976-1 arthānulāpānvrajasundarīṇāṃ akṛtrimāṇāṃ ca sarasvatīnāṃ |  2976-2 ārdrāśayena śravaṇāñcalena saṃbhāvayantaṃ taruṇaṃ gṛṇīmaḥ ||2977-1 arthānkecidupāsate kṛpaṇavatkecittvalaṃkurvate veśyāvatkhalu dhātuvādina ivodbadhnanti ca sādhubhyo nāsatpuruṣamāśrayet ||2979-1 arthā bhāgyodaye jantuṃ viśanti śataśaḥ svayaṃ |  2979-2 digbhyo'bhyupetya sarvābhyaḥ sāyaṃ tarumivāṇḍajāḥ ||2980-1 arthābhāve tu yajjñānaṃ pratyakṣamiva ||2984-1 arthārthī jīvaloko'yaṃ jvalantamupasarpati |  2984-2 kṣīṇakṣīrāṃ nirājīvyāṃ vatsastyajati mātaraṃ ||2985-1 arthārthī jīvaloko'yaṃ śmaśānamapi sevate |  2985-2 janitāramapi tyaktvā niḥsvaṃ gacchati dūrataḥ ||2986-1 arthārthī yāni kaṣṭāni mūḍho'yaṃ sahate janaḥ |  2986-2 śatāṃśenāpi mokṣārthī tāni cenmokṣamāpnuyāt ||2987-1 arthārthī yāni kaṣṭāni sahate kṛpaṇo janaḥ |  2987-2 tānyeva yadi dharmārthī na bhūyaḥ kleśabhājanaṃ ||2988-1 arthālābhe'pi mahati svādhyāyaṃ na samutsṛjet |  2988-2 kulānyakulatāṃ yānti svādhyāyasya vivarjanāt ||2989-1 arthāharaṇakauśalyaṃ kiṃ stumaḥ mṛtyurhasatyavanipaṃ raṇaraṅgabhīruṃ ||2991-1 arthiko vyādhito mūrkhaḥ pravāsī parasevakaḥ |  2991-2 jīvanto'pi mṛtāḥ pañca pañcaite dukhabhāginaḥ ||2992-1 arthitā vibhavastyāgaḥ svātantryamucitajñatā |  2992-2 iti pañcaguṇopateṃ āśrayedāśrayaṃ naraḥ ||2993-1 arthitve prakaṭīkṛte'pi na phalaprāptiḥ prabhoḥ pratyuta druhyandāśarathirviruddhacarito yuktastayā kanyayā |  2993-2 utkarṣaṃ ca parasya mānayaśasorvisraṃsanaṃ cātmanaḥ strīratnaṃ ca jagatpatirdaśamukho dṛptaḥ kathaṃ mṛṣyate ||2994-1 arthinastvaritadānena tṛptirbhavati yādṛśī |  2994-2 bahudānaṃ vilambena na tādṛktṛptikārakaṃ ||2995-1 arthināṃ kṛpaṇā dṛṣṭistvanmukhe patitā sakṛt |  2995-2 tadavasthā punardeva nānyasya mukhamīkṣate ||2996-1 arthināṃ mitravargasya vidviṣāṃ ca parāṅmukhaḥ |  2996-2 yo ||3004-1 arthibhyaśca dviṣadbhyaśca vaimukhyaṃ yasya nāstyasau |  3004-2 mahodāraḥ sadā śāntaḥ kṛtajñaḥ ko'pi durlabhaḥ ||3005-1 arthibhraṃśabahūbhavatphalabharavyājena kubjāyitaḥ ||3021-1 arthe hyavidyamāne'pi saṃsṛtirna nivartate |  3021-2 dhyāyato viṣayānasya svapne'narthāgamo yathā ||3022-1 arthairanekairjananīmamuṣyāścittaṃ ca dattvā cirakālacintyaṃ |  3022-2 ||3056-1 ardhaprothasthitā rekhā dṛśyante yasya vājinaḥ |  3056-2 tasya mṛtyuḥ samuddiṣṭo daśamaṃ prāpya vatsaraṃ ||3057-1 ardhapluṣṭaṃ bahubhyaḥ śavapiśitamupāhṛtya hṛṣṭaścitābhyo jātagrāsātirekaḥ sphuṭataradhamanīnaddhaśuṣkārdrakāyaḥ |  3057-2 pretaḥ saṃtarjya dṛṣṭyā kuṭilaparuṣayā majjaniṣkarṣaśuṣkairāhantyāhāralubdhānmuhurabhipatato jambukānasthikhaṇḍaiḥ ||3058-1 ardhamīlitavilolatārake sā dṛśau nidhuvanaklamālasā |  3058-2 yanmuhūrtamavahanna tatpunastṛptirāsta dayitasya paśyataḥ ||3059-1 tatklamastamadidīkṣata kṣaṇaṃ tālavṛntacalanāya nāyakaṃ |  3059-2 tadvidhā hi bhavadaivataṃ priyā vedhaso'pi vidadhāti cāpalaṃ ||3060-1 ardharātre dinasyārdhe tvardhacandre'rdhabhāskare |  3060-2 rāvaṇena hṛtā sītā kṛṣṇapakṣe sitāṣṭamī ||3061-1 ardhasiddheṣu kāryeṣu ātmaguhyaṃ prakāśayet |  3061-2 sa eva nidhanaṃ yāti bakaḥ karkaṭakādyathā ||3062-1 ardhasmitena vinimantrya daśārdhabāṇaṃ ardhaṃ vidhūya vasanāñcalamardhamārge |  3062-2 ardhena netraviśikhena nivṛtya sārdhaṃ ardhārdhameva taruṇī taruṇaṃ cakāra||3063-1 ardhahastena hīnastu bhavenmadhyasturaṅgamaḥ |  3063-2 tato hastena hīnaśca hīna eva smṛto hayaḥ ||3064-1 ardhāṅganāpuṃvapuṣaḥ purārermūrttiḥ śriyaṃ nauriva vastanotu |  3064-2 premātibhārādaparaṃ yadardhaṃ mamajja śṛṅgārarasāmburāśau ||3065-1 ardhāṅgāhitapaurvakīrtivanitādīvyatsitāṃśuprabhaṃ kailāsīkṛtadikkarīndraśirasi nyastasvapādāmbujaṃ |  3065-2 viśvavyāpyavināśi śaṃkarapadaṃ yāyāttvadīyaṃ yaśo na syādasya yadi kṣitīśa bhavato dānādikebhyo janiḥ ||3066-1 ardhāṅgulaparīṇāhajihvāgrāyāsabhīravaḥ |  3066-2 sarvāṅgakleśajananaṃ abudhāḥ karma kurvate ||3067-1 ardhācitā satvaramutthitāyāḥ pade pade durnimite galantī |  3067-2 kasyāścidāsīdraśanā tadānīṃ aṅguṣṭhamūlārpitasūtraśeṣā ||3068-1 ardhādhītāśca yairvedāstathā śūdrānnabhojanāḥ |  3068-2 te dvijāḥ kiṃ kariṣyanti nirviṣā iva pannagāḥ ||3069-1 ardhāsane samadhiropya suradvipasya śakro'pi yadyudhi śacīṃ kavacīkaroti |  3069-2 dhīrasya tasya sahate daśakandharasya kaḥ sāhasaikarasikaḥ karavāladhārāṃ ||3070-1 ardhena jaladaśyāmaṃ ardhenātapapiṅgalaṃ |  3070-2 ardhanārīśvarākāraṃ na ko manyeta vāsaraṃ ||3071-1 ardhokte bhayamāgato'si kimidaṃ kaṇṭhaśca kiṃ gadgadaścāṭorasya na ca kṣaṇo'yamanupakṣipteyamāstāṃ kathā |  3071-2 brūhi prastutamastu saṃprati mahatkarṇe sakhīnāṃ mukhaistṛptirnirbharamebhirakṣarapadaiḥ prāgeva me saṃbhṛtā ||3072-1 ardhodgatena kadalī mṛdutāmratalena garbhakoṣeṇa |  3072-2 pibati nidāghajvaritā ghanadhārāṃ karapuṭenaiva ||3073-1 ardhonmīlitalocanasya pibataḥ paryāptamekaṃ stanaṃ sadyaḥ prasnutadugdhadigdhamaparaṃ hastena saṃmārjataḥ |  3073-2 mātrā cāṅgulilālitasya vadane smerāyamāne muhurviṣṇoḥ kṣīrakaṇorudhāmadhavalā dantadyutiḥ pātu vaḥ ||3074-1 arpayati pratidivasaṃ priyasya pathi locane bālā |  3074-2 nikṣipati kamalamālāḥ k_oṃalamiva kartumadhvānaṃ ||3075-1 arpayantyarthine prāṇānna praṇāmamarātaye |  3075-2 na nāstītyuttaraṃ jātu suhṛde sumanojanāḥ ||3076-1 arpitaṃ rasitavatyapi nāma- grāhamanyayuvaterdayitena |  3076-2 ujjhati sma madamapyapibantī vīkṣya madyamitarā tu mamāda ||3077-1 arpitāḥ prathamatastvayi gāvo gopaśāvaka iti praṇayena |  3077-2 dīyate punaridaṃ dhanahīnairvetanaṃ garuḍaketana cetaḥ ||3078-1 arvāgabhyetya garvādiva saridavarā seyamityuddidhīrṣāḥ kālindīṃ kopavegākalitahalahaṭhotkṣepiṇaḥ kṣemahetuḥ |  3078-2 tālāṅkasyāśu dālārasavivaśahṛdaḥ sraṃsadaṃsottarīyaṃ tiryagvyastāḍghri bhūyaḥ suvalanamatha laghūtthānamādhāvanaṃ tat ||3079-1 arvācīnavacaḥ prapañcasukhināṃ duḥśikṣitānāṃ puro gambhīraṃ kavipuṅgavasya kimaho sarvasvamuddhāṭyate |  3079-2 vyarthaṃ kardamagandhagauravahṛtagrāmīṇagoṣṭhīmukhe ko'yaṃ nāma sacetano'sti ya iha prastauti kastūrikāṃ ||3080-1 arvāñcatpañcaśākhaḥ sphuraduparijaṭāmaṇḍalaḥ saṃśritānāṃ nityāparṇo'pi tāpatritayamapanayansthāṇuravyādapūrvaḥ |  3080-2 yaḥ pronmīlatkapardaiḥ śirasi viracitābālabandhe dyusindhoḥ pāthobhirlabdhasekaḥ phalati phalaśataṃ vāñchitaṃ bhaktibhājāṃ ||3081-1 alaṃkaroti yaḥ ślokaṃ śuka eva na madhyamaḥ |  3081-2 alaṃ karoti yaḥ ślokaṃ śuka eva namadhyamaḥ ||3082-1 alaṃkaroti hi jarā rājāmātyabhiṣagyatīn |  3082-2 viḍambayati paṇyastrīmallagāyanasevakān ||3083-1 alaṃkartuṃ karṇau bhṛśamanubhavantyā navarujaṃ sasītkāraṃ tiryagvalitavadanāyā mṛgadṛśaḥ |  3083-2 karābjavyāpārānatisukṛtasārānrasayato januḥ sarvaślāghyaṃ jayati lalitottaṃsa bhavataḥ ||3084-1 alaṃkāraḥ śaṅkākaranarakapālaṃ parijano viśīrṇāṅgo bhṛṅgī vasu ca vṛṣa eko bahuvayāḥ |  3084-2 avastheyaṃ sthāṇorapi bhavati sarvāmaragurorvidhau vakre mūrdhni sthitavati vayaṃ ke punaramī ||3085-1 alaṃkārapriyo viṣṇurjaladhārāpriyaḥ śivaḥ |  3085-2 namaskārapriyo bhānurbrāhmaṇo bhojanapriyaḥ ||3086-1 alaṃkārabhṛto rītimantaḥ siddhā rasonnatau |  3086-2 lakṣaṇairlakṣitātmānaḥ kṛtino nanu kecana ||3087-1 alaṃkāro hi nārīṇāṃ kṣamā tu puruṣasya vā |  3087-2 duṣkaraṃ tacca vaḥ kṣāntaṃ tridaśeṣu viśeṣataḥ ||3088-1 yādṛśī vaḥ kṣamā putryaḥ sarvāsāmaviśeṣataḥ |  3088-2 kṣamā dānaṃ kṣamā yajñaḥ kṣamā satyaṃ ca putrikāḥ ||3089-1 kṣamā yaśaḥ kṣamā dharmaḥ kṣamāyāṃ viṣṭhitaṃ jagat ||3090-1 alaṃkṛtaḥ kāñcanakoṭimūlyairmahārharatnairgajavājivāhaiḥ |  3090-2 nimeṣamātraṃ labhate na jīvaṃ kālena kāle śikhayā gṛhītaḥ ||3091-1 alaṃkriyante śikhinaḥ kekayā madaraktayā |  3091-2 vācā vipaścito'tyarthaṃ mādhuryaguṇayuktayā ||3092-1 alaṃkriyā śaktisamanvitānāṃ tapodhanānāṃ balaśaktiragryā |  3092-2 vyāpādadāvānalavāridhārā pratyeha ca kṣāntiranarthaśāntiḥ ||3093-1 alaṃ tridivavārtayā kimiti sārvabh_oṃaśriyā vidūrataravartinī bhavatu mokṣalakṣmīrapi |  3093-2 kalindagirinandinītaṭanikuñjapuñjodare mano harati kevalaṃ navatamālanīlaṃ mahaḥ ||3094-1 alaṃ nalaṃ roddhumamī kilābhavanguṇā vivekapramukhā na cāpalaṃ |  3094-2 smaraḥ sa ratyāmaniruddhameva yatsṛjatyayaṃ sarganisarga īdṛśaḥ ||3095-1 alaṃ parigraheṇeha doṣavānhi parigrahaḥ |  3095-2 kṛmirhi kośakārastu badhyate svaparigrahāt ||3096-1 alaṃ vā bahu yo brūte hitavākyāvamāninaḥ |  3096-2 sa tasmāllabhate doṣaṃ kapeḥ sūcīmukho yathā ||3097-1 alaṃ vā bahuvādena yatra yatrānurajyase |  3097-2 tatra tatraiva te duḥkhadāvapāvakapaṅktayaḥ ||3098-1 alaṃ vilaṅghya priyavijña yācñāṃ kṛtvāpi vāmyaṃ vividhaṃ vidheye |  3098-2 yaśaḥpathādāśravatāpadotthātkhalu skhalitvāstakhaloktikhelāt ||3099-1 alaṃ vilambya tvarituṃ hi velā kārye kila sthairyasahe vicāraḥ |  3099-2 gurūpadeśaṃ pratibheva tīkṣṇā pratīkṣate jātu na kālamartiḥ ||3100-1 alaṃ vivādena yathā śrutaṃ tvayā tathāvidhastāvadaśeṣamastu saḥ |  3100-2 mamātra bhāvaikarasaṃ manaḥ sthitaṃ na kāmavṛttirvacanīyamīkṣate ||3101-1 alaṃ sthitvā śmaśāne'smingṛdhrag_oṃāyusaṃkule |  3101-2 kaṅkālabahule ghore sarvaprāṇibhayaṃkare ||3102-1 na punarjīvitaḥ kaścitkāladharmamupāgataḥ |  3102-2 priyo vā yadi vā dveṣyaḥ prāṇināṃ gatirīdṛśī ||3103-1 alaṃ himānīparidīrṇagātraḥ samāpitaḥ phālgunasaṃgamena |  3103-2 atyantamākāṅkṣitakṛṣṇavartmā bhīṣmo mahātmājani māghatulyaḥ ||3104-1 alakatamaḥ paripītaṃ susmitasuṣamāpuraskṛtaṃ madhuraṃ |  3104-2 ko na sudhānidhisahajaṃ sumukhi mukhaṃ hanta saṃmanutāṃ ||3105-1 alakāśca khalāścaiva mūrdhni bhīrujanairdhṛtāḥ |  3105-2 uparyupari satkāre'pyāviṣkurvanti vakratāṃ ||3106-1 alakeṣu cūrṇabhāsaḥ svedalavābhānkapolaphalakeṣu |  3106-2 navaghanakautukinīnāṃ vārikaṇānpaśyati kṛtārthaḥ ||3107-1 alaktako yathā rakto naraḥ kāmī tathaiva ca |  3107-2 hṛtasārastathā so'pi pādamūle nipātyate ||3108-1 alaktako yathā rakto niṣpīḍya navayauvanaṃ ||3113-1 alaghūpalapaṅktiśālinīḥ parito ruddhanirantarāmbarāḥ |  3113-2 adhirūḍhanitambabhūmayo na vimuñcanti cirāya mekhalāḥ ||3114-1 alaṅghyaṃ tattadudvīkṣya yadyaduccairmahībhṛtāṃ |  3114-2 priyatāṃ jyāyasīṃ mā gānmahatāṃ kena tuṅgatā ||3115-1 alaṅghyaṃ sarveṣāmiha khalu phalaṃ karmajanitaṃ vipatkarmapraiṣyā vyathayati na jātāsi hṛdayaṃ |  3115-2 yadajñāḥ kurvanti mahāhradasamīpasthaṃ paśya nīlaṃ vanaspatiṃ ||3126-1 alabdhvā yadi vā labdhvā nānuśocanti paṇḍitāḥ |  3126-2 ānantaryaṃ cārabhate na prāṇānāṃ dhanāyate ||3127-1 alabhanta nabhaḥkṣetre alabhyaṃ labdhukāmasya janasya gatirīdṛśī |  3129-2 alabdheṣu manastāpaḥ saṃcitārtho vinaśyati ||3130-1 alabhyalābhāya ca labdhavṛddhaye yathārhatīrthapratipādanāya ca |  3130-2 yaśasvinaṃ vismaratyantarātmā ||3132-1 alamathavā bahuvādairviracaya lokānurāganirbandhaṃ |  3132-2 tatraikatra samagraṃ tannihitaṃ yanna jātu saṃnihitaṃ ||3133-1 alamandha bhujāyaṣṭibhrāntyā bhrātarjaḍasya te |  3133-2 daṃśāya daṃdaśūko'yaṃ daṃśamudrāṃ na muñcati ||3134-1 alamanyathā gṛhītvā na khalu manasvini mayā prayuktamidaṃ |  3134-2 prāyaḥ samānavidyāḥ parasparayaśaḥpurobhāgāḥ ||3135-1 satyapi viṣamiti hi kimucyate vāri ||3137-1 alamabhimukhairbaddhairbhogairalaṃ bhramibhirdṛśoralamaviralairgarjodgārairalaṃ viṣavṛṣṭibhiḥ |  3137-2 kimiha bhujagāḥ kopāvegairamībhiramudritairnanu ||3139-1 alamalamatimātraṃ sāhasenāmunā te tvaritamayi vimuñca tvaṃ latāpāśamenaṃ |  3139-2 calitamapi niroddhuṃ jīvitaṃ jīviteśe kṣaṇamiha mama kaṇṭhe bāhupāśaṃ nidhehi ||3140-1 alamalamativṛddhyā sthīyatāṃ tasya paśyasyakaruṇa karabhororbhajyate madhyametat |  3140-2 iti gurujaghanājñācoditā r_oṃarājiḥ stanayugamasitākṣyā vaktumārohatīva ||3141-1 alamalamanugamya prasthitaṃ prāṇanāthaṃ prathamavirahaśoke na pratīkāra eṣaḥ |  3141-2 sapadi ramaṇayātrā śreya ityāraṭantyā caraṇapatanapūrvaṃ sā niruddheva kāñcyā ||3142-1 alamalamiyameva prāṇināṃ pātakānāṃ nirasanaviṣaye yā kṛṣṇa |  3145-2 nāsaṃskṛtaśca puruṣaḥ prākṛtasattvaḥ praṇayitavyaḥ ||3146-1 alalitagatiruccaiḥ sthūlavakrāṅgulīkaṃ vahati caraṇa yugmaṃ kandharāṃ hrasvapīnāṃ |  3146-2 kapilakacakalāpā krūraceṣṭātipīnā dviradamadavigandhiḥ svāṅkake'naṅkake ca ||3147-1 dviguṇakaṭukaṣāyaprāyabhugvītalajjā luladativipuloṣṭhī duḥkhasādhyā prayoge |  3147-2 bahirapi bahur_oṃātyantamantarviśālaṃ vahati jaghanarandhraṃ mūrkhaṃ striyaṃ bālaṃ dhārmikaṃ durjanaṃ paśuṃ |  3151-2 maitrīpradhānaṃ kalyāṇabuddhiṃ sāntvena sādhayet ||3152-1 alasabhujalatābhirnādṛto nāgarībhirbhavanadamanakānāṃ nātithirvā babhūva |  3152-2 cānnāni bhuktāni ye ca syuḥ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ ||3253-1 avadhyo brāhmaṇo bālaḥ strī tapasvī ca rogabhāk |  3253-2 vihitā vyaṅgitā teṣāṃ aparādhe garīyasi ||3254-1 avanatavadanenduricchatīva mama hi sadasi gauravapriyasya kulajanadarśanakātaraṃ hi cakṣuḥ ||3256-1 avanamya vakṣasi nimagnakuca- dvitayena gāḍhamupagūḍhavatā |  3256-2 dayitena tatkṣaṇacaladraśanā- kalakiṃkiṇīravamudāsi vadhūḥ ||3257-1 avanau śanaiḥ śanaistvaṃ nidadhāsi padadvayaṃ svasya |  3257-2 lakṣyaṃ paśyasi na vadasi bhajasi jalaṃ baka tato'si sitaḥ ||3258-1 avantiḥ kāvyamānarca bharcormaukhariśekharaḥ (?)|  3258-2 śiṣyo bāṇaśca saṃkrāntakāntavedyavacāḥ kaviḥ ||3259-1 avantinātho'yamudagrabāhurviśālavakṣāstanuvṛttamadhyaḥ |  3259-2 āropya cakrabhramamuṣṇatejāstvaṣṭreva yatnollikhito vibhāti ||3260-1 avanti ye janakasamā munīśvarāścaturvidhaṃ gaṇamanavadyavṛttayaḥ |  3260-2 svadehavaddalitamadāṣṭakārayo bhavantu te mama guravo bhavāntakāḥ ||3261-1 avandhyaṃ divasaṃ kuryāddharmataḥ kāmato'rthataḥ |  3261-2 gate hi divase tasmiṃstadūnaṃ tasya jīvitaṃ ||3262-1 avandhyakopasya vihanturāpadāṃ bhavanti vaśyāḥ svayameva dehinaḥ |  3262-2 amarṣaśūnyena janasya jantunā na jātahārdena |  3269-2 patramayo'pi padārthaḥ pataṅgatāmeti guṇayogāt ||3270-1 avalipteṣu mūrkheṣu raudrasāhasikeṣu ca |  3270-2 tathaivāpetadharmeṣu na maitrīmācaredbudhaḥ ||3271-1 avalepamanaṅgasya
