avinayabhuvāmajñānānāṃ śamāya bhavannapi prakṛtikuṭilādvidyābhyāsaḥ khalatvavivṛddhaye |  3355-2 phaṇibhayabhṛtāmastūcchedakṣamastamasāmasau viṣadharaphaṇāratnāloko bhayaṃ tu bhṛśāyate ||3356-1 avinayaratamādarādṛte vaśamavaśaṃ hi nayanti vidviṣaḥ |  3356-2 śrutavinayanidhiṃ samāśritastanurapi naiti parābhavaṃ kvacit ||3357-1 avināśi tu tadviddhi yena sarvamidaṃ tataṃ |  3357-2 vināśamavyayasyāsya na kaścitkartumarhati ||3358-1 avināśinamagrāmyaṃ akarotsātavāhanaḥ |  3358-2 viśuddhajātibhiḥ kośaṃ ratnairiva subhāṣitaiḥ ||3359-1 avinītaḥ suto jātaḥ kathaṃ na dahanātmakaḥ |  3359-2 vinītastu suto jātaḥ kathaṃ na puruṣottamaḥ ||3360-1 avinītasya yā vidyā sā ciraṃ naiva tiṣṭhati |  3360-2 markaṭasya gale baddhā maṇīnāṃ mālikā yathā ||3361-1 avinīto bhṛtyajano nṛpatiradātā śaṭhāni mitrāṇi |  3361-2 avinayavatī ca bhāryā mastakaśūlāni catvāri ||3362-1 avibhāviteṣuviṣayaḥ prathamaṃ madano'pi nūnamabhavattamasā |  3362-2 udite diśaḥ prakaṭayatyamunā yadadharmadhāmni dhanurācakṛṣe ||3363-1 avibhāvyatārakamadṛṣṭahima- dyutibimbamastamitabhānu nabhaḥ |  3363-2 avasannatāpamatamisramabhādapadoṣataiva viguṇasya guṇaḥ ||3364-1 avibhramālokanadurbhagāṇi pravyaktavaktrastanamaṇḍalāni |  3364-2 aṅgāni re pāmarakāminīnāṃ apuṇyatāruṇya kimāśritāni ||3365-1 avimṛṣyametadabhilaṣyati sa dviṣatāṃ vadhena viṣayābhiratiṃ |  3365-2 bhavavītaye nahi tathā sa vidhiḥ kva śarāsanaṃ kva ca vimuktipathaḥ ||3366-1 avirataṃ parakāryakṛtāṃ satāṃ madhurimātiśayena vaco'mṛtaṃ |  3366-2 api ca mānasamambunidhiryaśo vimalaśāradacandiracandrikā ||3367-1 aviratakusumāvacāyakhedānnihitabhujālatayaikayopakaṇṭhaṃ |  3367-2 vipulataranirantarāvalagna- stanapihitapriyavakṣasā lalambe ||3368-1 aviratataruṇīsahasramadhya- sthitivigalatpuruṣavratā ivaite |  3368-2 pratipadamatikātarāḥ kṣitīśāḥ parikalayanti bhayaṃ samantato'pi ||3369-1 aviratamaklamamuddhṛta- dharātalaṃ susmitollasadvadanaṃ |  3369-2 jagadānandavidhāyinaṃ upaimi śaraṇaṃ prabhuṃ śeṣaṃ ||3370-1 aviratamadhupānāgāramindindirāṇāṃ abhisaraṇanikuñjaṃ rājahaṃsīkulasya |  3370-2 pravitatabahuśālaṃ sadma padmālayāyā vitarati ratimakṣṇoreṣa līlātaḍāgaḥ ||3371-1 aviratamidamambhaḥ svecchayoccālayantyā vikacakamalakāntottānapāṇidvayena|  3371-2 parikalita ivārghyaḥ kāmabāṇātithibhyaḥ salilamiva vitīrṇaṃ bālalīlāsukhānāṃ ||3372-1 avirataratalīlāyāsajātaśramāṇāṃ upaśamamupayāntaṃ niḥsahe'ṅge'ṅganānāṃ |  3372-2 punaruṣasi viviktairmātariśvāvacūrṇya jvalayati madanāgniṃ mālatīnāṃ rajobhiḥ ||3373-1 aviratavirutakapotīṃ arpitarasamāvṛṇoti ghanavalanaḥ |  3373-2 navalatikāmatikātara- taralitamadiradvayīṃ mudiraḥ ||3374-1 aviratāmbujasaṃgatisaṃgalad- bahalakesarasaṃvaliteva yā |  3374-2 lalitavastuvidhānasukhollasat- tanuruhā tanurātmabhuvo'vatāt ||3375-1 aviralakamalavikāsaḥ sakalālimadaśca kokilānandaḥ |  3375-2 ramyo'yameti saṃprati lokotkaṇṭhākaraḥ kālaḥ ||3376-1 aviralakaravālakampanairbhrukuṭītarjanagarjanairmuhuḥ |  3376-2 dadṛśe tava vairiṇāṃ madaḥ sa gataḥ kvāpi tavekṣaṇe kṣaṇāt ||3377-1 aviraladhārānikaraṃ jaladairjalamutsṛjadbhiratimātraṃ |  3377-2 mānivadhūhṛdayebhyaḥ kāluṣyamaśeṣato mṛṣṭaṃ ||3378-1 aviralapatadbāṣpotpīḍaprasiktakapolayā vacanaviṣayaḥ saṃdeśo'nyastayā vihito na te |  3378-2 manasi kimapi dhyāyantyā tu kṣaṇaṃ tava kāntayā pathika nihitā dṛṣṭiḥ kaṣṭaṃ nave karuṇāṅkure ||3379-1 aviralaparāgasaikata- makarandataraṅgiṇīmanuvanāntaṃ |  3379-2 pikayuvatijānudaghnīṃ gāhante madhupayoṣitastṛṣitāḥ ||3380-1 aviralaparivāhairaśruṇaḥ sāraṇīnāṃ smaradahanaśikhoṣṇaśvāsapūraiśca tasyāḥ |  3380-2 subhaga bata kṛśāṅgyāḥ spardhayānyonyamebhiḥ kriyata iva puro bhūḥ paṅkilā pāṃsulā ca ||3381-1 aviralapulakaḥ saha vrajantyāḥ pratipadamekataraḥ stanastaruṇyāḥ |  3381-2 ghaṭitavighaṭitaḥ priyasya vakṣas- taṭamuvi kandukavibhramaṃ babhāra ||3382-1 aviralaphalinīvanaprasūnaḥ kusumitakundasugandhigandhavāhaḥ |  3382-2 guṇamasamayajaṃ cirāya lebhe viralatuṣārakaṇastuṣārakālaḥ ||3383-1 aviralamadajalanivahaṃ bhramarakulānīkasevitakapolaṃ |  3383-2 abhimataphaladātāraṃ kāmeśaṃ gaṇapatiṃ vande ||3384-1 aviralamadadhārādhautakumbhaḥ śaraṇyaḥ phaṇivaravṛtagātraḥ siddhasādhyādivandyaḥ|  3384-2 tribhuvanajanavighnadhvāntavidhvaṃsadakṣo vitaratu gajavaktraḥ saṃtataṃ maṅgalaṃ vaḥ ||3385-1 aviralamiva dāmnā pauṇḍarīkeṇa naddhaḥ snapita iva ca dugdhasrotasā nirbhareṇa |  3385-2 kavalita iva kṛtsnaścakṣuṣā sphāritena prasabhamamṛtamegheneva sāndreṇa siktaḥ ||3386-1 aviralavigalanmadajala- kapolapālīnilīnamadhupakulaḥ |  3386-2 udbhinnanavaśmaśru- śreṇiriva dvipamukho jayati ||3387-1 aviralavilolajaladaḥ kuṭajārjunanīpasurabhivanavātaḥ |  3387-2 ayamāyātaḥ kālo hanta mṛtāḥ pathikagehinyaḥ ||3388-1 aviruddhaṃ sukhasthaṃ yo duḥkhamārge niyojayet |  3388-2 janmajanmāntare duḥkhī sa naraḥ syādasaṃśayaṃ ||3389-1 avilambi suvṛttaṃ ca udaraṃ cātipūjitaṃ |  3389-2 nātidīrghaṃ samaṃ pṛṣṭhaṃ kiṃcicca vinataṃ śubhaṃ ||3390-1 avilambe kṛtyasiddhau māntrikairāpyate yaśaḥ |  3390-2 vilambe karmabāhulyaṃ vikhyāpyāvāpyate dhanaṃ ||3391-1 aviviktāvatistabdhau stanāvāḍhyāvivādṛtau |  3391-2 viviktāvānatāveva daridrāviva garhitau ||3392-1 avivekamatirnṛpatirmantrī guṇavatsu vakritagrīvaḥ |  3392-2 yatra khalāśca prabalāstatra kathaṃ sajjanāvasaraḥ ||3393-1 avivekavṛthāśramāvivārthaṃ kṣayalobhāviva saṃśritānurāgaṃ |  3393-2 vijigīṣumivānayapramādāvavasādaṃ viśikhau vininyatustaṃ ||3394-1 aviveki kucadvaṃdvaṃ hantu nāma jagattrayaṃ |  3394-2 śrutipraṇayinorakṣṇorayuktaṃ janamāraṇaṃ ||3395-1 avivekini bhūpāle naśyanti guṇināṃ guṇāḥ |  3395-2 pravāsarasike kānte yathā sādhvyāḥ stanonnatiḥ ||3396-1 avivekini bhūpe yaḥ karotyāśāṃ samṛddhaye |  3396-2 yāsyāmyahamaneneti karotyāśāṃ sa mṛddhaye ||3397-1 aviveko hi sarveṣāṃ āpadāṃ paramaṃ padaṃ |  3397-2 vivekarahito loke paśureva na saṃśayaḥ ||3398-1 aviśadacalaṃ netraprāntāvalokanamasphuṭaṃ cakitacakitā vācaḥ sparśaḥ kvacijjanasaṃkule |  3398-2 iti tava mayā premārambhe ya eva nirīkṣitāḥ kaṭhinamanaso dṛṣṭā bhāvāsta eva virajyataḥ ||3399-1 aviśīrṇakāntapātre navyadaśe sumukhi saṃbhṛtasnehe |  3399-2 madgehadīpakalike kathamupayātāsi nirvāṇaṃ ||3400-1 aviśuddhakulotpannā dehārpaṇajīvikā śaṭhācaraṇā |  3400-2 kvāhaṃ rūpājīvā kva bhavantaḥ ślāghanīyajanmaguṇāḥ ||3401-1 aviśrānto vāto dahana iva soyaṃ janayati prasaktaṃ sātatyāddalayati kulādrīnapi jalaṃ |  3401-2 prasūte kṛtyeṣu vyavasitiranirvyūḍhasudṛḍhā phalāvāptiṃ loke pratikalamasaṃbhāvyavibhavāṃ ||3402-1 aviśrāmaṃ vahedbhāraṃ śītoṣṇaṃ ca na vindati |  3402-2 sasaṃtoṣastathā nityaṃ trīṇi śikṣeta gardabhāt ||3403-1 aviśrāmamapātheyaṃ anālambhamadeśakaṃ |  3403-2 tamaḥkāntāramadhvānaṃ kathameko gamiṣyasi ||3404-1 aviśvasandhūrtadhuraṃdharo'pi naraḥ puraṃdhrīpurato'ndha eva |  3404-2 aśeṣaśikṣākuśalo'pi kākaḥ pratāryate kiṃ na pikāṅganābhiḥ ||3405-1 aviśvastā striyaḥ sarvā adhamottamamadhyamāḥ |  3405-2 yaḥ kaścidviśvasettāsāṃ paścāttāpaiḥ sa dahyate ||3406-1 aviśvāsaṃ sadā tiṣṭhetsaṃdhinā vigraheṇa ca |  3406-2 dvaidhībhāvaṃ samāśritya pāpe śatrau balīyasi ||3407-1 aviśvāsavidhānāya mahāpātakahetave |  3407-2 pitāputravirodhāya hiraṇyāya namo'stu te ||3408-1 aviṣaṃ viṣamityāhurbrahmasvaṃ viṣamucyate |  3408-2 viṣaṃ hanti kilaikaṃ ca brahmasvaṃ putrapautrakaṃ ||3409-1 avisaṃvādako dakṣaḥ kṛtajño matimānṛjuḥ |  3409-2 api saṃkṣīṇakośo'pi labhate parivāraṇaṃ ||3410-1 avisaṃvādanaṃ dānaṃ samayasyāvyatikramaḥ |  3410-2 āvartayanti bhūtāni samyakpraṇihitā ca vāk ||3411-1 avisṛṣṭo'pi sanprājñaḥ sarveṇa ca samaṃ vrajet |  3411-2 praviśedapyanāhūtastvanyadā bhartturājñayā ||3412-1 avismṛtopakāraḥ syānna kurvīta kṛtaghnatāṃ |  3412-2 hatvopakāriṇaṃ vipro nāḍījaṅghamadhaścyutaḥ ||3413-1 avīro'pi camūvīrasāhāyyena dviṣo jayet |  3413-2 camūsāhāyyaśūnyānāṃ jayaśrīrvyākulāyate ||3414-1 avṛttiṃ vinayo hanti hantyanarthaṃ parākramaḥ |  3414-2 hanti nitayaṃ kṣamā krodhaṃ ācāro hantyalakṣaṇaṃ ||3415-1 avṛttikaṃ tyajeddeśaṃ vṛttiṃ sopadravāṃ tyajet |  3415-2 tyajenmāyāvinaṃ mitraṃ dhanaṃ prāṇaharaṃ tyajet ||3416-1 avṛttikaṃ prabhuṃ bhṛtyā apuṣpaṃ bhramarāstaruṃ |  3416-2 ajalaṃ ca saro haṃsā muñcantyapi ciroṣitaṃ ||3417-1 avṛttirbhayamantyānāṃ madhyānāṃ maraṇādbhayaṃ |  3417-2 uttamānāṃ tu martyānāṃ avamānātparaṃ bhayaṃ ||3418-1 avṛttivyādhiśokārtānanuvarteta śaktitaḥ |  3418-2 ātmavatsatataṃ paśyedapi kīṭapipīlakāḥ ||3419-1 avekśya svātmānaṃ viguṇamaparānicchati tathā phalatyetanno cedvilapati na santīha guṇinaḥ |  3419-2 nimārṣṭuṃ śaptuṃ vā paribhavitumudyacchati tato'pyaho nīce ramyā saguṇavijigīṣā vidhikṛtā ||3420-1 avemavyāpārākalanamaturīsparśamacirādanunmīlattantuprakaraghaṭanāyāsamasakṛt |  3420-2 viṣīdatpāñcālīvipadapanayaikapraṇayinaḥ paṭānāṃ nirmāṇaṃ patagapatiketoravatu naḥ ||3421-1 avaiti tattvaṃ sadasattvalakṣaṇaṃ vinā viśeṣaṃ viparītarocanaḥ |  3421-2 yadṛcchayā mattavadastacetano jano jinānāṃ vacanātparāṅmukhaḥ ||3422-1 avaitu śāstrāṇi naro viśeṣataḥ karotu citrāṇi tapāṃsi bhāvataḥ |  3422-2 atattvasaṃsaktamanāstathāpi no vimuktisaukhyaṃ gatabādhamaśnute ||3423-1 avaimi caināmanagheti kiṃ tu lokāpavādo balavānmato me |  3423-2 chāyā hi bhūmeḥ śaśino malatve- nāropitā śuddhimataḥ prajābhiḥ ||3424-1 avaimi te sāramataḥ khalu tvāṃ kārye guruṇyātmasamaṃ niyokṣye |  3424-2 vyādiśyate bhūdharatāmavekṣya kṛṣṇena dehodvahanāya śeṣaḥ ||3425-1 avaimi pūtamātmānaṃ dvayenaiva dvijottamāḥ |  3425-2 mūrdhni gaṅgāprapātena dhautapādāmbhasā ca vaḥ ||3426-1 avaimi saubhāgyamadena vañcitaṃ tava priyaṃ yaścaturāvalokinaḥ |  3426-2 karoti lakṣyaṃ ciramasya cakṣuṣo na vaktramātmīyamarālapakṣmaṇaḥ ||3427-1 avaimi haṃsāvalayo valakṣāstvatkāntikīrteścapalāḥ pulākāḥ |  3427-2 uḍḍīya yuktaṃ patitāḥ sravantī- veśantapūraṃ paritaḥ plavante ||3428-1 avaiṣṇavo hato vipro hataṃ śrāddhamadakṣiṇaṃ |  3428-2 abrahmaṇyaṃ hataṃ kṣetraṃ anācāraṃ kulaṃ hataṃ ||3429-1 avyaktamakṣaramupāsya babhūva kaścitsvaṃ labdhavarṇamavagatya kṛtārthamānī|  3429-2 sadyastribhaṅgalalitasphuraṇādamanda- nandotthayā jaḍatayaiva vayaṃ kṛtārthāḥ||3430-1 avyaktādīni bhūtāni vyaktamadhyāni bhārata |  3430-2 avyaktanidhanānyeva tatra kā paridevanā ||3431-1 avyayavato'pi dhaninaḥ svajanasahasraṃ bhavetpadasthasya |  3431-2 bhraṣṭadhanasya hi satataṃ bandhurapi mukhaṃ na darśayati ||3432-1 avyaye vyayamāyāti vyaye yāti suvistaraṃ |  3432-2 apurvaḥ ko'pi bhāṇḍārastava bhārati dṛśyate ||3433-1 avyavasāyinamalasaṃ daivaparaṃ sahasācca parihīṇaṃ |  3433-2 pramadeva hi vṛddhapatiṃ necchatyavagūhituṃ lakṣmīḥ ||3434-1 avyavasthitacittasya prasādo'pi bhayaṃkaraḥ |  3434-2 vyavasthitaprasannātmā kupito'pyabhayaṃkaraḥ ||3435-1 avyavasthitavṛttānāṃ abhinnaśruticakṣuṣāṃ |  3435-2 adharmārjitabhogānāṃ āśīrapyahitocitā ||3436-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  3436-2 avyavasthau hi dṛśyete yuddhe jayaparājayau ||3437-1 avyākaraṇamadhītaṃ bhinnadroṇyā taraṅgiṇītaraṇaṃ |  3437-2 bheṣajamapathyasahitaṃ trayamidamakṛtaṃ varaṃ na kṛtaṃ ||3438-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  3438-2 anyākṣepo bhaviṣyantyāḥ kāryasiddherhi lakṣaṇaṃ ||3439-1 avyākhyeyāṃ vitarati parāṃ prītimantarnimagnā kaṇṭhe lagnā harati nitarāṃ yāntaradhvāntajālaṃ |  3439-2 tāṃ drākṣādyairapi bahumatāṃ mādhurīmudgirantīṃ kṛṣṇetyākhyāṃ kathaya rasane yadyasi tvaṃ rasajñā ||3440-1 avyājasundaramanuttaramaprameyaṃ aprākṛtaṃ paramamaṅgalamaṅghripadmaṃ |  3440-2 saṃdarśayedapi sakṛdbhavatī dayārdrā draṣṭāsmi kena tadahaṃ tu vilocanena||3441-1 avyājasundarīṃ tāṃ vijñānena lalitena yojayatā |  3441-2 parikalpito vidhātrā bāṇaḥ kāmasya viṣadigdhaḥ ||3442-1 avyātsa vo yasya nisargavakraḥ spṛśatyadhijyasmaracāpalīlāṃ |  3442-2 jaṭāpinaddhoragarājaratna- marīcilīḍhobhayakoṭirinduḥ ||3443-1 avyātsvarlokacūḍāmaṇipaṭalaśikhāśreṇiśoṇīkṛtāṅghriḥ kṣoṇībhāraṃ vinetuṃ jaṭharajuṣi jagadbāndhave devakī vaḥ |  3443-2 rājñāmuddāmadoṣṇāṃ raṇaśirasi raṇatkīkasacchedabhīmāḥ śastrāṇāṃ khaṇṇakārāḥ pratihatiguravo yacchruterdohado'bhūt ||3444-1 avyādvo vajrasārasphuradurunakharakrūracakrakramāgra- prodbhinnendrārivakṣaḥsthalagaladasṛgāsārakāśmīragauraḥ |  3444-2 prasphūrjatkeśarāgragrathitajaladharaśreṇinīlābjamālyaḥ sūryācandrāvataṃso naraharirasamābaddhaśṛṅgāralīlaḥ ||3445-1 avyādvo valitāṅghripātavicaladbhūgolahelonmukha- bhrāmyaddikkarikalpitānukaraṇo nṛtyangaṇagrāmaṇīḥ |  3445-2 yasyoddaṇḍitaśuṇḍapuṣkaramarudvyākṛṣṭasṛṣṭaṃ muhustārācakramudaktaśīkarapṛṣallīlāmivābhyasyati ||3446-1 avyādvo vāmano yasya kaustubhapratibimbitā |  3446-2 kautukālokinī jātā jāṭharīva jagattrayī ||3447-1 avyādhigātramanukūlataraṃ kalatraṃ veśma prasiddhavibhavaṃ niśitā ca vidyā|  3447-2 ślāghyaṃ kulaṃ caramakālagatiḥ samartho mātuḥ kaṭākṣapariṇāmavibhūtayaste ||3448-1 avyādhijaṃ kaṭukaṃ śīrṣarogaṃ pāpānubandhaṃ paruṣaṃ tīkṣṇamugraṃ |  3448-2 satāṃ peyaṃ yanna pibantyasanto manyuṃ mahārāja piba praśāmya ||3449-1 avyādhinā śarīreṇa manasā ca nirādhinā |  3449-2 pūrayannarthināmāśāṃ tvaṃ jīva śaradāṃ śataṃ ||3450-1 avyāpareṣu vyāpāraṃ yo naraḥ kartumicchati |  3450-2 sa eva nidhanaṃ yāti kīlotpaṭīva vānaraḥ ||3451-1 avyāpāraratā vasantasamaye grīṣme vyavāyapriyāḥ saktāḥ pramṛṣi palvalāmbhasi nave kūpodakadveṣiṇaḥ |  3451-2 kaṭvamloṣṇaratāḥ śaradyadhibhujo hemantanidrālasāḥ svairdoṣairapacīyamānavapuṣo naśyantu te śatravaḥ ||3452-1 avyāhati na śakyā gaurvinā daṇḍena rakṣituṃ |  3452-2 iti pratyeti mugdho'pi vallavaḥ kimu rājakaṃ ||3453-1 avyāhṛtaṃ vyāhṛtācchreya āhuḥ satyaṃ vadedvyāhṛtaṃ taddvitīyaṃ |  3453-2 priyaṃ vadedvyāhṛtaṃ tattṛtīyaṃ dharmyaṃ vadedvyāhṛtaṃ taccaturthaṃ||3454-1 avyutpannasvabhāvānāṃ nārīṇamiva sāṃprataṃ |  3454-2 sītkārācāryakaṃ kartuṃ ayaṃ prāpto himāgamaḥ ||3455-1 avyutpanne śrotari vaktṛtvamanarthakaṃ puṃsāṃ |  3455-2 netravihīne bhartari lāvaṇyamanarthakaṃ strīṇāṃ ||3456-1 avratasyāpi te dharmaḥ kārya evāntarāntarā |  3456-2 medhībhūto'pi hi bhrāmyanghāsagrāsaṃ karoti gauḥ ||3457-1 aśaktaḥ satataṃ sādhuḥ kurūpā ca pativratā |  3457-2 vyādhito devabhaktaśca nirdhanā brahmacāriṇaḥ ||3458-1 aśaktastaskaraḥ sādhuḥ kurūpā cetpativratā |  3458-2 rogī ca devatābhakto vṛddhā veśyā tapasvinī ||3459-1 aśaktastu bhavetsādhurbrahmacārī va nirdhanaḥ |  3459-2 vyādhito devabhaktaśca vṛddhā nārī pativratā ||3460-1 aśaktāḥ śaktimātmīyāṃ ślāghante ye ca durjanāḥ |  3460-2 te bhavantyupahāsāya mahatāmeva saṃnidhau ||3461-1 aśakte raudratātaikṣṇyaṃ tīvrapāpeṣu dhīratā |  3461-2 chadmadhīrvāci pāruṣyaṃ nīcānāṃ śauryamīdṛśaṃ ||3462-1 aśaktairbalinaḥ śatroḥ kartavyaṃ prapalāyanaṃ |  3462-2 saṃśritavyo'thavā durgo nānyā teṣāṃ gatirbhavet ||3463-1 aśakto yaḥ kṣāntiṃ satatamapakāriṇyapi jane vidhatte so'vaśyaṃ bhujaga iva daṃṣṭrāvirahitaḥ |  3463-2 prabhuḥ satyāṃ śaktau kṣamata iha yasmātsucaritaḥ sa tejasvī lokadvitayavijigīṣurvijayate ||3464-1 aśaknuvansoḍhumadhīralocanaḥ sahasraraśmeriva yasya darśanaṃ |  3464-2 praviśya hemādriguhāgṛhāntaraṃ nināya bibhyaddivasāni kauśikaḥ ||3465-1 aśakyaṃ nārabhetprājñaḥ akāryaṃ naiva kārayet |  3465-2 asatyaṃ naiva vaktavyaṃ ālasyaṃ naiva kārayet ||3466-1 aśakyaṃ nārabhetprājño akāryaṃ naiva kārayet |  3466-2 yathādeśagataṃ dharmaṃ yathākālaṃ ca jīvayet ||3467-1 aśakyaḥ sahasā rājanbhāvo vettuṃ parasya vai |  3467-2 antaḥsvabhāvairgītaistairnaipuṇyaṃ paśyatā bhṛśaṃ ||3468-1 aśakyārambhavṛttīnāṃ kutaḥ kleśādṛte phalaṃ |  3468-2 ākāśamāsvādayataḥ kutastu kavalagrahaḥ ||3469-1 aśaṅkitamatiḥ svastho na śaṭhaḥ parisarpati |  3469-2 na cāsya duṣṭā vākcāpi tasmānnāstīha saṃśayaḥ ||3470-1 aśaṅkitebhyaḥ śaṅketa śaṅkitebhyaśca sarvaśaḥ |  3470-2 aśaṅkyādbhayamutpannaṃ api mūlaṃ nikṛntati ||3471-1 aśaṅkyamapi śaṅketa nityaṃ śaṅketa śaṅkitāt |  3471-2 bhayaṃ hi śaṅkitājjātaṃ samūlamapi kṛntati ||3472-1 aśaṭhamalolamajihmaṃ tyāginamanurāgiṇaṃ viśeṣajñaṃ |  3472-2 yadi nāśrayati naraṃ śrīḥ śrīreva hi vañcitā tatra ||3473-1 aśaṭhahṛdayaḥ kṛtajñaḥ sānukrośaḥ sthitaḥ satāṃ mārge |  3473-2 aparāpavādakarmā śucikarmarataḥ sa khalvāryaḥ ||3474-1 aśanaṃ me vasanaṃ me jāyā me bandhuvargo me |  3474-2 iti me me kurvāṇaṃ kālavṛko hanti puruṣājaṃ ||3475-1 aśanaṃ vasanaṃ vāso yasya kāśyāmamārgataḥ |  3475-2 kīkaṭena samā kāśī gaṅgāpyaṅgāravāhinī ||3476-1 aśanamātrakṛtajñatayā gurorna piśuno'pi śuno labhate tulāṃ |  3476-2 api bahūpakṛte sakhitā khale na khalu khelati khe latikā yathā ||3477-1 aśanādindriyāṇīva syuḥ kāryāṇyakhilānyapi |  3477-2 etasmātkāraṇādvittaṃ sarvasādhanamucyate ||3478-1 aśanairaśanairbālye yauvane ghasmarātsmarāt |  3478-2 kalyavaikalyataḥ śeṣe sphuṭaṃ naṣṭaṃ vayo nṛṇāṃ ||3479-1 aśaraṇaśaraṇapramodabhūtairvanatarubhiḥ kriyamāṇacārukarma |  3479-2 hṛdayamiva durātmanāmaguptaṃ navamiva rājyamanirjitopabhogyaṃ ||3480-1 aśarmadahanajvalatkaṭukaṭākṣarūkṣekṣaṇa- kṣaṇakṣapitaśātrave jayati sindhurādhīśvare |  3480-2 vayaṃ na bahu manmahe nijabhujānamadgāṇḍiva- cyutāstraśikhitāṇḍavajvalitakhāṇḍavaṃ pāṇḍavaṃ ||3481-1 aśastraṃ puruṣaṃ hatvā naraḥ saṃjāyate kharaḥ |  3481-2 kṛmiḥ strīvadhakarttā ca bālahantā ca jāyate ||3482-1 aśastrapūtamavyājaṃ puruṣāṅgopakalpitaṃ |  3482-2 vikrīyate mahāmāṃsaṃ gṛhyatāṃ gṛhyatāmidaṃ ||3483-1 aśāntahutabhukśikhākavalitaṃ jaganmandiraṃ sukhaṃ viṣamavātabhugnasanavaccalaṃ kāmajaṃ |  3483-2 jalasthaśaśicañcalā bhuvi vilokya lokasthitiṃ vimuñcata janāḥ sadā viṣayamūrchanāṃ tattvataḥ ||3484-1 aśāntāntastṛṣṇā dhanalavaṇavārivyatikarairgatacchāyaḥ kāyaściravirasarūkṣāśanatayā |  3484-2 anidrā mando'gnirnṛpasalilacaurānalabhayātkadaryāṇāṃ kaṣṭaṃ sphuṭamadhanakaṣṭādapi paraṃ ||3485-1 aśāśvatamidaṃ sarvaṃ cintyamānaṃ hi bhārata |  3485-2 kadalīsaṃnibho lokaḥ samo hyasya na vidyate ||3486-1 aśāsaṃstaskarānyastu baliṃ gṛhṇāti pārthivaḥ |  3486-2 tasya prakṣubhyate rāṣṭraṃ svargācca parihīyate ||3487-1 aśāstracakṣunṛpatirandha ityabhidhīyate |  3487-2 varamandho na cakṣuṣmānmadādākṣiptasatpathaḥ ||3488-1 aśāstraviduṣāṃ teṣāṃ na kāryamahitaṃ vacaḥ |  3488-2 arthaśāstrānabhijñānāṃ vipulāṃ śriyamicchatāṃ ||3489-1 aśikṣitānāṃ kāvyeṣu śāstrābhyāso nirarthakaḥ |  3489-2 kimastyanupanītasya vājapeyādibhirmakhaiḥ ||3490-1 aśithilaparispandaḥ kunde tathaiva madhuvrato nayanasuhṛdo vṛkṣāścaite na kuḍmalaśālinaḥ |  3490-2 dalati kalikā cautī nāsmiṃstathā mṛgacakṣuṣāṃ atha ca hṛdaye mānagranthiḥ svayaṃ śithilāyate ||3491-1 aśithilamaparāvasajya kaṇṭhe dṛḍhaparirabdhabṛhadbahiḥ stanena |  3491-2 hṛṣitatanuruhā bhujena bharturmṛdumamṛdu vyatividdhamekabāhuṃ ||3492-1 aśirāḥ puruṣaḥ kāryo lalāṭe brahmaghātinaḥ |  3492-2 asambhāṣyaśca kartavyastanmanoranuśāsanaṃ ||3493-1 rājā stenena gantavyo muktakeśena dhāvatā |  3493-2 ācakṣāṇena tatsteyaṃ evaṃkarmāsmi śādhi māṃ ||3494-1 aśiṣyaṃ śāsti yo rājanyaśca śūnyamupāsate |  3494-2 kadaryaṃ bhajate yaśca tamāhurmūḍhacetasaṃ ||3495-1 aśītāstaraṇo māghe phālgune paśupakṣiṇau |  3495-2 caitre jalacarāḥ sarve vaiśākhe naravānarau ||3496-1 aśītenāmbhasā snānaṃ payaḥpānaṃ varāḥ striyaḥ |  3496-2 etadvo mānuṣāḥ pathyaṃ snigdhamuṣṇaṃ ca bhojanaṃ ||3497-1 aśīmahi vayaṃ bhikṣāṃ āśāvāso vasīmahi |  3497-2 śayīmahi mahīpṛṣṭhe kurvīmahi kimīśvaraiḥ ||3498-1 aśīlā bhinnamaryādā nityasaṃkīrṇamaithunāḥ |  3498-2 alpāyuṣo bhavantīha tathā nirayagāminaḥ ||3499-1 aśucitānilayaṃ pralayaṃ śriyāṃ ayaśasāṃ vibhavaṃ prabhavaṃ rujāṃ |  3499-2 sukṛtanirdalanaṃ calanaṃ dhṛteḥ pariharetparavallabhayā rataṃ ||3500-1 aśucirvacanādyasyaśucirbhavati pūruṣaḥ |  3500-2 śuciścaivāśuciḥ sadyaḥ kathaṃ rājā na daivataṃ ||3501-1 aśucīkṣaṇe'śrupāte kalahe śvāsakāsayoḥ |  3501-2 rathyāprasarpaṇe'bhyaṅge kṣute narmaṇyupaspṛśet ||3502-1 aśuddhaprakṛtau rājñi janatā nānurajyate |  3502-2 yathā gṛdhrasamāsannaḥ kalahaṃsaḥ samācaret ||3503-1 aśuddhā tu bhavennārī yāvacchalyaṃ na muñcati |  3503-2 niḥsṛte tu tataḥ śalye rajasā śudhyate tataḥ ||3504-1 aśuddhīnāṃ tu sarvāsāṃ ālayāḥ kutsitāḥ striyaḥ |  3504-2 sadā śaucaṃ na kurvanti bhuñjate'nnaṃ tathāvidhāḥ ||3505-1 aśubhapuṣi kalāvapyapramattāḥ svadharmādanudinamupakārānācarante budhānāṃ|  3505-2 bahujanaparipuṣṭā baddhadīkṣāsta ete tanusukhamapi hitvā tanvate rājasevāṃ ||3506-1 aśubhodaye janānāṃ naśyati buddhirna vidyate rakṣā |  3506-2 suhṛdo'pi santi ripavo viṣamaviṣaṃ jāyate'pyamṛtaṃ ||3507-1 aśṛṇvannapi boddhavyo mantribhiḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ |  3507-2 yathā svadoṣanāśāya vidureṇāmbikāsutaḥ ||3508-1 aśeṣacakṣuḥśravaṇaṃ pratikūlo bhavannapi |  3508-2 vinatānandaheturyaḥ sa pumānāptanandanaḥ ||3509-1 aśeṣadoṣāpagamaprakāśa- mitrāgamotsāhamahotsavārhaṃ |  3509-2 vikāsaśobhāṃ janayatyajasraṃ dhanaṃ janānāṃ dinamambujānāṃ ||3510-1 aśeṣalaṅkāpatisainyahantā śrīrāmasevācaraṇaikakartā |  3510-2 anekaduḥkhāhatalokagoptā tvasau hanūmāṃstava saukhyakartā ||3511-1 aśeṣavighnapratiṣedhadakṣa- mantrākṣatānāmiva diṅmukheṣu |  3511-2 vikṣepalīlā karaśīkarāṇāṃ karotu vaḥ prītimibhānanasya ||3512-1 aśokanirbhartsitapadmarāgaṃ ākṛṣṭahemadyutikarṇikāraṃ |  3512-2 muktākalāpīkṛtasinduvāraṃ vasantapuṣpābharaṇaṃ vahantī ||3513-1 aśoke śokārtaḥ kimasi bakule'pyākulamanā nirānandaḥ kunde saha ca sahakārairna ramase |  3513-2 kusumbhe viśrambhaṃ yadiha bhajase kaṇṭakaśatairasaṃdigdhaṃ dagdhabhramara bhavitāsi kṣatavapuḥ ||3514-1 aśocyaḥ śocate śocyaṃ kiṃ vā śocyo na śocyate |  3514-2 kaśca kasyeha śocyo'sti dehe'sminbudbudopame ||3515-1 aśocyānanvaśocastvaṃ prajñāvādāṃśca bhāṣase |  3515-2 gatāsūnagatāsūṃśca nānuśocanti paṇḍitāḥ ||3516-1 aśocyānīha bhūtāni yo mūḍhastāni śocati |  3516-2 tadduḥkhāllabhate duḥkhaṃ dvāvanarthau niṣevate ||3517-1 aśocyo nirdhanaḥ prājño'śocyaḥ paṇḍitabāndhavaḥ |  3517-2 aśocyā vidhavā nārī putrapautrapratiṣṭhitā ||3518-1 aśnāti yaḥ saṃskurute nihanti dadāti gṛhṇātyanumanyate ca |  3518-2 ete ṣaḍapyatra vinindanīyā bhramanti saṃsāravane nirantaṃ ||3519-1 aśnāti yo māṃsamasau vidhatte vadhānumodaṃ trasadehabhājāṃ |  3519-2 gṛhṇāti repāṃsi tatastapasvī tebhyo durantaṃ bhavameti jantuḥ ||3520-1 aśnābhyācchādayāmīti prāpaśyanpāpapūruṣaḥ |  3520-2 nāmarṣaṃ kurute yastu puruṣaḥ so'dhamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||3521-1 aśnīta pibata khādata jāgrata saṃviśata tiṣṭhata vā |  3521-2 sakṛdapi cintayatāhnaḥ sāvadhiko dehabandha iti ||3522-1 aśmanā sādhayellohaṃ lohenāśmānameva ca |  3522-2 bilbāniva kare bilvairmlecchānmlecchaiḥ prasādhayet ||3523-1 aśmātakasya vāme badarī vā dṛśyate'hinilayo vā |  3523-2 ṣaḍbhirudagvāsya karaiḥ sārdhe puruṣatraye toyaṃ ||3524-1 aśmānamapyupāyena lohaṃ vā jarayennaraḥ |  3524-2 na tu kaścidupāyo'sti brahmasvaṃ yena jīryate ||3525-1 aśmāpyahṛdayo yasya guṇasāraṃ parīkṣate |  3525-2 ucitaiva suvarṇasya tasyāgnipatane ruciḥ ||3526-1 aśraddhayā hutaṃ dattaṃ tapastaptaṃ kṛtaṃ ca yat |  3526-2 asadityucyate pārtha na ca tatpretya no iha ||3527-1 aśraddhādarśanaṃ bhāntirduḥkhaṃ ca trividhaṃ tataḥ |  3527-2 daurmanasyamayogyeṣu viṣayeṣu ca yogatā ||3528-1 aśraddheyaṃ na vaktavyaṃ pratyakṣamapi yadbhavet |  3528-2 yathā vānarasaṃgītaṃ tathaiva plavate śilā ||3529-1 aśrāntaṃ dṛḍhayantraṇena kucayoratyaktakāṭhinyayorābaddhasphuṭamaṇḍalonnatimilaccolaṃ vimucyorasaḥ |  3529-2 nīvīvicchuritaṃ vidhāya tamamuṃ vāmastanālambinīṃ veṇīṃ pāṇinakhāñcalaiḥ śithilayatyākramya pīṭhaṃ padā ||3530-1 aśrāntaviśrāṇitayajñayūpa- stambhāvalīrdrāgavalambamānaḥ |  3530-2 yasya svabhāvādbhuvi saṃcacāra kālakramādekapado'pi dharmaḥ ||3531-1 aśrāntaśrutipāṭhapūtarasanāvirbhūtabhūristavā- jihmabrahmamukhaughavighnitanavasvargakriyākelinā |  3531-2 pūrvaṃ gādhisutena sāmighaṭitā muktā nu mandākinī yatprāsādadukūlavalliranilāndolairakheladdivi ||3532-1 aśrāntirbandhutāṃ dhatte kaṣṭaṃ naṣṭasya naśvaraḥ |  3532-2 skandhena paṅgunā paṅgurnahi vartmani nīyate ||3533-1 aśrāvi bhūmipatibhiḥ kṣaṇavītanidrairaśnanpuro haritakaṃ mudamādadhānaḥ |  3533-2 grīvāgralolakalakiṅkiṇikānināda- miśraṃ dadhaddaśanacarcuraśabdamaśvaḥ ||3534-1 aśrucchalena sudṛśo hutapāvakadhūmakaluṣākṣyāḥ |  3534-2 aprāpya mānamaṅge vigalati lāvaṇyavāripūra iva ||3535-1 aśrutamiva khalajalpitaṃ adṛṣṭamiva gurumukhendumālinyaṃ |  3535-2 agaṇitanijāpamānaṃ bhāmini bhavadarthamacyutaḥ sahate ||3536-1 aśrutaśca samunnaddho daridraśca mahāmanāḥ |  3536-2 arthāścākarmaṇā prepsurmūḍha ityucyate budhaiḥ ||3537-1 aśrubhiḥ pādyamākalpya praṇīya hṛdayāsanaṃ |  3537-2 upete dayite kāntā pariṣvaṅgamupānayat ||3538-1 aśvaṃ naiva gajaṃ naiva vyāghraṃ naiva ca naiva ca |  3538-2 ajāputraṃ baliṃ dadyāddevo durbalaghātakaḥ ||3539-1 aśvaṃ snātaṃ gajaṃ mattaṃ vṛṣabhaṃ kāmamohitaṃ |  3539-2 śūdramakṣarasaṃyuktaṃ dūrataḥ parivarjayet ||3540-1 aśvaḥ śastraṃ śāstraṃ vīṇā vāṇī naraśca nārī ca |  3540-2 puruṣaviśeṣaṃ prāptā bhavantyayogyāśca yogyāśca ||3541-1 aśvaḥ supto gajo matto gāvaḥ prathamasūtikāḥ |  3541-2 antaḥpuragato rājā dūrataḥ parivarjayet ||3542-1 aśvagandhāpalaṃ triṃśaccūrṇayitvā vicakṣaṇaḥ |  3542-2 vṛddhadārukacūrṇena samabhāgaṃ ca kārayet ||3543-1 aśvatthacalapatrāgralīnatoyakaṇopame |  3543-2 sthirāśā jīvite yasya tatsamo nāstyacetanaḥ ||3544-1 aśvatthamekaṃ picumandamekaṃ nyagrodhamekaṃ daśa ciñciṇīkāḥ |  3544-2 kapitthabilvāmalakatrayaṃ ca pañcāmravāpī narakaṃ na paśyet ||3545-1 aśvatthasya mahattvaṃ ko nanu vaktuṃ naraḥ prabhavet |  3545-2 savitari yatrālakṣmīrmande lakṣmīramandāste ||3546-1 aśvatthāmā balirvyāso hanūmāṃśca vibhīṣaṇaḥ |  3546-2 kṛpaḥ paraśurāmaśca saptaite cirajīvinaḥ ||3547-1 aśvatthāmā hata iti yudhi giramanṛtāṃ yudhiṣṭhiro'vādīt |  3547-2 punaranutāpamavāpatpāpaṃ kṛtvānutapyeta ||3548-1 aśvapṛṣṭhaṃ gajaskandho nārīṇāṃ ca payodharaḥ |  3548-2 dantadhāvanaśastraṃ ca yathā sthūlaṃ tathā sukhaṃ ||3549-1 aśvapraśaṃsā vikhyātā dhanurvedastataḥparaṃ |  3549-2 gāndharvaśāstramaparaṃ vṛkṣāyurveda eva ca ||3550-1 aśvaplutaṃ vāsavagarjitaṃ ca strīṇāṃ ca cittaṃ puruṣasya bhāgyaṃ |  3550-2 avarṣaṇaṃ cāpyativarṣaṇaṃ ca devo na jānāti kṛto manuṣyaḥ ||3551-1 aśvamadhye kṛtaravā śivā yuddhaprapañcakṛt |  3551-2 śivā saptasvarā grāhyā bahuśabdāśca niṣphalāḥ ||3552-1 aśvamedhasahasraṃ ca satyaṃ ca tulayā dhṛtaṃ |  3552-2 atyaricyata satyaṃ ca iti vedavido viduḥ ||3553-1 aśvamedhasahasraṃ ca satyaṃ ca tulayā dhṛtaṃ |  3553-2 aśvamedhasahasrāddhi satyameva viśiṣyate ||3554-1 aśvamedhasahasraṃ ca satyaṃ ca tulayā dhṛtaṃ |  3554-2 tulayitvā tu paśyāmi satyamevātiricyate ||3555-1 aśvamedhasahasraṃ ca satyaṃ ca tulayā dhṛtaṃ |  3555-2 nābhijānāmi yadyasya satyasyārdhamavāpnuyāt ||3556-1 aśvamedhasahasrasya phalaṃ satyaṃ tulāntare |  3556-2 dhṛtvā saṃloḍyate rājansatye bhavati gauravaṃ ||3557-1 aśvamedhasahasrāṇāṃ sahasraṃ yaḥ samācaret |  3557-2 nāsau padamavāpnoti madbhaktairyadavāpyate ||3558-1 aśvayānaṃ gajaṃ mattaṃ gāvaścaiva prasūtikāḥ |  3558-2 tathā cāntaḥpure dāsīṃ dūrataḥ parivarjayet ||3559-1 aśvaśālāṃ samāsādya yadāntarmadhumakṣikāḥ |  3559-2 madhujālaṃ prabadhnanti mriyante'śvāstadā dhruvaṃ ||3560-1 aśvasya lakṣaṇaṃ vego mado mātaṅgalakṣaṇaṃ |  3560-2 cāturyaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ nāryā udyogaḥ puruṣalakṣaṇaṃ ||3561-1 aśvānāṃ ca patākānāṃ bālānāṃ paṇyayoṣitāṃ |  3561-2 vidūṣakapaṭānāṃ ca cāpalyamatimaṇḍanaṃ ||3562-1 aśvā nāgāḥ syandanānāṃ ca saṅghā mantrāḥ siddhā daivataṃ cānukūlaṃ |  3562-2 etānyāhuḥ sādhanāni sma rājñāṃ yebhyaśceyaṃ buddhirutkṛṣyate me||3563-1 aśvā yasya jayastasya yasyāśvāstasya medinī |  3563-2 aśvā yasya yaśastasya yasyāśvāstasya kāñcanaṃ ||3564-1 aśvārūḍhaṃ payaḥpānaṃ gajārūḍhaṃ tu maithunaṃ |  3564-2 śibikīmardanaṃ caiva pādacārī tu bhojanaṃ ||3565-1 aśvārūḍhaṃ yatiṃ dṛṣṭvā khaṭvārūḍhāṃ rajasvalāṃ |  3565-2 sakeśāṃ vidhavāṃ dṛṣṭvā sacailaṃ snānamācaret ||3566-1 aśvāścatuṣkoṭimitā lakṣāṇyekādaśaiva ca |  3566-2 saptatriṃśatsahasrāṇi tathā śatacatuṣṭayaṃ ||3567-1 saptatiścaiva saṃkhyātāḥ procyante pattayastataḥ |  3567-2 ṣaṭkoṭyo'śītilakṣāṇi pañcādhikamitāni ca ||3568-1 dviṣaṣṭi ca sahasrāṇi tathā śatacatuṣṭayaṃ |  3568-2 pañcāśaditi saṃkhyātā mahākṣauhinikā budhaiḥ ||3569-1 aśvinīmaitrarevatyo mṛgo mūlaṃ punarvasuḥ |  3569-2 puṣyo jyeṣṭhā tathā hastaḥ prasthāne śreṣṭha ucyate ||3570-1 aśvinī sūyate vatsaṃ kāmadhenusturaṃgamaṃ |  3570-2 tathaiva sāgaro vahniṃ yathā rājā tathā prajā ||3571-1 aśvīye yamavāhanasya nakulasyāśīviṣāṇāṃ kule mārjārasya ca mūṣakeṣu ghaṭate yā prītirātyantikī |  3571-2 kṣīṇe'rthe vidhureṣu bandhuṣu dṛḍhe lokāpavāde śanairjñeyā kāmijaneṣu saiva gaṇikāvargasya naisargikī ||3572-1 aśve javo vṛṣe dhauryaṃ maṇau kāntiḥ kṣamā nṛpe |  3572-2 hāvabhāvau ca veśyāyāṃ gāyake madhurasvaraḥ ||3573-1 dātṛtvaṃ dhanike śauryaṃ sainike bahudugdhatā |  3573-2 goṣu damastapasviṣu vidvatsu vāvadūkatā ||3574-1 sabhyeṣvapakṣapātastu tathā sākṣiṣu satyavāk |  3574-2 ananyabhaktirbhṛtyeṣu suhitoktiśca mantriṣu ||3575-1 maunaṃ mūrkheṣu ca strīṣu pātivratyaṃ subhūṣaṇaṃ |  3575-2 mahādurbhūṣaṇaṃ caitadviparītamamīṣu ca ||3576-1 aśvairyānaṃ yānaṃ strībhirlīlaiva procyate līlā |  3576-2 māṃsāṃ bhuktaṃ bhuktaṃ cānyadayānamalīlābhuktaṃ ||3577-1 aṣṭakulācalasaptasamudrā brahmapuraṃdaradinakararudrāḥ |  3577-2 na tvaṃ nāhaṃ nāyaṃ lokastadapi kimarthaṃ kriyate śokaḥ ||3578-1 aṣṭadhā devatāyonistiryagyoniśca pañcadhā |  3578-2 ekadhā mānuṣī yonirime bhūtāścaturdaśa ||3579-1 aṣṭapādaścatuṣkarṇo dvimukhī dvimukhastathā |  3579-2 rājadvāre paṭhedghoro na ca devo na rākṣasaḥ ||3580-1 aṣṭamaṃ brahmarandhraṃ syātparaṃ nirvāṇasūcakaṃ | taddhyātvā sūcikāgrābhaṃ dhūmākāraṃ vimucyate |  3580-2 tacca jālaṃdharaṃ jñeyaṃ mokṣadaṃ līnacetasāṃ || aṣṭamī ca amāvāsyā varjanīyā caturdaśī |  3581-2 pūrṇimārdhadinaṃ yāvanniṣiddhā sarvakarmasu ||3582-1 aṣṭamī hantyupādhyāyaṃ śiṣyaṃ hanti caturdaśī |  3582-2 āmāvāsyo'bhayaṃ hanti pratipatpāṭhanāśinī ||3583-1 aṣṭame dvādaśe vāpi śākaṃ yaḥ pacate gṛhe |  3583-2 kumitrāṇyanapāśritya kiṃ vai sukhataraṃ tataḥ ||3584-1 aṣṭāṅgayogapariśīlanakīlanena duḥsādhasiddhisavidhaṃ vidadhadvidūre |  3584-2 āsādayannabhimatāmadhunā viveka- khyātiṃ samādhidhanamaulimaṇirvimuktaḥ ||3585-1 aṣṭāṅgulasya kathito vāyormāno vicakṣaṇaiḥ |  3585-2 caturaṅgulamānaṃ ca tejastattvaṃ nigadyate ||3586-1 aṣṭādaśa tathā madhye hīne caiva caturdaśa |  3586-2 saptāṅgulaḥ khuraḥ prokta uttamāśvasya paṇḍitaiḥ ||3587-1 aṣṭādaśapurāṇeṣu vyāsasya vacanadvayaṃ |  3587-2 paropakāraḥ puṇyāya pāpāya parapīḍanaṃ ||3588-1 aṣṭādaśāpi smṛtayo vadanti yasyāparādhaḥ khalu tasya daṇḍaḥ |  3588-2 svasyāparādhaḥ khalu nābhimūle śiraḥ kuto muṇḍayate mṛgākṣi ||3589-1 aṣṭānāṃ lokapālānāṃ saṃbhavatyaṃśato nṛpaḥ |  3589-2 tasmādabhibhavatyeṣa sarvabhūtāni tejasā ||3590-1 aṣṭābhiḥ kila daṇḍanītinipuṇaiḥ satprāḍvivākaiḥ samaṃ madhyesaudhamanuttamāsanagataḥ kāryāṇi kurvannṛṇāṃ |  3590-2 viṣṇurbhūpavapurvidhāya kimasau dikpālayukpālayatyevaṃ bhrāntimato manāṅna kurute kāskānayaṃ mādhavaḥ ||3591-1 aṣṭāvaṅgāni yogasya yamo niyama āsanaṃ |  3591-2 prāṇāyāmaḥ pratyāhāro dhāraṇā dhyānatanmayaḥ ||3592-1 aṣṭāvimāni harṣasya navanītāni bhārata |  3592-2 vartamānāni dṛśyante tānyeva susukhānyapi ||3593-1 samāgamaśca sakhibhirmahāṃścaiva dhanāgamaḥ |  3593-2 putreṇa ca pariṣvaṅgaḥ saṃnipātaśca maithune ||3594-1 samaye ca priyālāpaḥ svayūtheṣu ca saṃnatiḥ |  3594-2 abhipretasya lābhaśca pūjā ca janasaṃsadi ||3595-1 aṣṭottaraśataṃ ślokaṃ cāṇakyena yathoditaṃ |  3595-2 yasya vijñānamātreṇa nṇāṃ prajñā pravardhate ||3596-1 aṣṭau guṇāḥ puruṣaṃ dīpayanti prajñā ca kaulyaṃ ca damaḥ śrutaṃ ca |  3596-2 parākramaścābahubhāṣitā ca dānaṃ yathāśakti kṛtajñatā ca ||3597-1 aṣṭau tānyavrataghnāni āpo mūlaṃ phalaṃ payaḥ |  3597-2 havirbhrāhmaṇakāmyā ca gurorvacanamauṣadhaṃ ||3598-1 aṣṭau nṛpemāni manuṣyaloke svargasya lokasya nidarśanāni |  3598-2 catvāryeṣāmanvavetāni sadbhiścatvāryeṣāmanvavayanti santaḥ ||3599-1 yajño dānamadhyayanaṃ tapaśca catvāryetānyanvavetāni sadbhiḥ |  3599-2 damaḥ satyamārjavamānṛśaṃsyaṃ catvāryetānyanvavayanti santaḥ ||3600-1 aṣṭau pūrvanimittāni narasya vinaśiṣyataḥ |  3600-2 brāhmaṇānprathamaṃ dveṣṭi brāhmaṇaiśca virudhyate ||3601-1 brāhmaṇasvāni cādatte brāhmaṇāṃśca jighāṃsati |  3601-2 ramate nindayā caiṣāṃ praśaṃsāṃ nābhinandati ||3602-1 naitānsmarati kṛtyeṣu yācitaścābhyasūyati |  3602-2 etāndoṣānnaraḥ prājño buddhyā buddhvā vivarjayet ||3603-1 aṣṭau māsānyathādityastoyaṃ harati raśmibhiḥ |  3603-2 tathā haretkaraṃ rāṣṭrānnityamarkavrataṃ hi tat ||3604-1 aṣṭau yadā tu dṛśyante samantāddevayonayaḥ |  3604-2 upasargaṃ tamityāhurdaivamunmattavadbudhāḥ ||3605-1 aṣṭau yasya diśo dalāni vipulaḥ kośaḥ suvarṇācalaḥ kāntaṃ kesarajālamarkakiraṇā bhṛṅgāḥ payodāvalī |  3605-2 nālaṃ śeṣamahoragaḥ pravitataṃ vārāṃnidherlīlayā tadvaḥ pātu samuddharankuvalayaṃ kroḍākṛtiḥ keśavaḥ ||3606-1 aṣṭau hāṭakakoṭayastrinavatirmuktāphalānāṃ tulāḥ pañcāśanmadhugandhamattamadhupāḥ krodhoddhatāḥ sindhurāḥ |  3606-2 aśvānāmayutaṃ prapañcacaturaṃ vārāṅganānāṃ śataṃ dattaṃ pāṇḍyanṛpeṇa yautakamidaṃ vaitālikāyārpyatāṃ ||3607-1 asaṃkalpājjayetkāmaṃ krodhaṃ kāmavivarjanāt |  3607-2 arthānarthekṣayā lobhaṃ bhayaṃ tattvāvamarśanāt ||3608-1 asaṃkalpitameveha yadakasmātpravartate |  3608-2 nivartyārambhamārabdhaṃ nanu daivasya karma tat ||3609-1 asaṃkhyapuṣpo'pi manobhavasya pañcaiva bāṇārthamayaṃ dadāti |  3609-2 evaṃ kadaryatvamivāvadhārya sarvasvamagrāhi madhorvadhūbhiḥ ||3610-1 asaṃkhyāḥ paradoṣajñā guṇajñā api kecana |  3610-2 svayameva svadoṣajñā vidyante yadi pañcaṣāḥ ||3611-1 asaṃgatenonnatimāgatena calena vakreṇa malīmasena |  3611-2 sā durjaneneva samastametaṃ prabādhate bhrūyugalena lokaṃ ||3612-1 asaṃgṛhītasya punarmantrasya śṛṇu yatphalaṃ |  3612-2 ahīnaṃ dharmakāmābhyāṃ arthaṃ prāpnoti kevalaṃ ||3613-1 asaṃcayādapūrvasya kṣayātpūrvārjitasya ca |  3613-2 karmaṇo bandhamāpnoti śārīraṃ na punaḥ punaḥ ||3614-1 asaṃtuṣṭasya viprasya tejo vidyā tapo yaśaḥ |  3614-2 sravantīndriyalaulyena jñānaṃ caivāvakīryate ||3615-1 asaṃtuṣṭā dvijā naṣṭāḥ saṃtuṣṭāśca mahībhṛtaḥ |  3615-2 salajjā gaṇikā naṣṭā nirlajjāśca kulāṅganā ||3616-1 asaṃtuṣṭāścyutāḥ sthānānmānātpratyavaropitāḥ |  3616-2 svayaṃ copahṛtā bhṛtyā ye cāpyupahatāḥ paraiḥ ||3617-1 asaṃtuṣṭo'sakṛllokānāpnotyapi sureśvaraḥ |  3617-2 akiṃcano'pi saṃtuṣṭaḥ śete sarvāṅgavijvaraḥ ||3618-1 asaṃtoṣaḥ paraṃ duḥkhaṃ saṃtoṣaḥ paramaṃ sukhaṃ |  3618-2 sukhārthī puruṣastasmātsaṃtuṣṭaḥ satataḥ bhavet ||3619-1 asaṃtoṣaḥ paraṃ pāpaṃ ityāha bhagavānhariḥ |  3619-2 lobhaḥ pāpasya bījo'yaṃ moho mūlaṃ ca tasya vai |  3619-3 asatyaṃ tasya hi skandho mahāśākhā suvistarā ||3620-1 asaṃtoṣaparā mūḍhāḥ saṃtoṣaṃ yānti paṇḍitāḥ |  3620-2 asantoṣasya nāstyantastuṣṭistu paramaṃ sukhaṃ ||3621-1 asaṃtoṣo'sukhāyaiva lobhādindriyavibhramaḥ |  3621-2 tato'sya naśyati prajñā vidyevābhyāsavarjitā ||3622-1 asaṃtyāgātpāpakṛtāmapāpāṃstulyo daṇḍaḥ spṛśate miśrabhāvāt |  3622-2 śuṣkeṇārdraṃ dahyate miśrabhāvāttasmātpāpaiḥ saha saṃdhiṃ na kuryāt ||3623-1 asaṃdadhāno mānāndhaḥ samenāpi hato bhṛśaṃ |  3623-2 āmakumbhamivābhittvā nāvatiṣṭheta śaktimān ||3624-1 asaṃdigdhamanā bhūtvā vadedikṣuraso yathā |  3624-2 vikṣubdho vacasā yo hi vākyaśalyena hanyate ||3625-1 asaṃpattau paro lābho guhyasya kathanaṃ tathā |  3625-2 āpadvimokṣaṇaṃ caiva mitrasyaitatphalatrayaṃ ||3626-1 asaṃpannaḥ kathaṃ bandhurasahiṣṇuḥ kathaṃ prabhuḥ |  3626-2 anātmavitkathaṃ vidvānasaṃtuṣṭaḥ kathaṃ sukhī ||3627-1 asaṃpādayataḥ kaṃcidarthaṃ jātikriyāguṇaiḥ |  3627-2 yadṛcchāśabdavatpuṃsaḥ saṃjñāyai janma kevalaṃ ||3628-1 asaṃprāptarajā gaurī prāpte rajasi rohiṇī |  3628-2 avyañjanā bhavetkanyā kucahīnā ca nagnikā ||3629-1 asaṃbhavaṃ hemamṛgasya janma tathāpi rāmo lulubhe mṛgāya |  3629-2 prāyaḥ samāpannavipattikāle dhiyo'pi puṃsāṃ malinā bhavanti ||3630-1 asaṃbhavaguṇastutyā jāyate svātmanastrapā |  3630-2 karṇikāraṃ sugandhīti vadanko nopahasyate ||3631-1 asaṃbhāvyaṃ na vaktavyaṃ pratyakṣamapi dṛśyate |  3631-2 śilā tarati pānīyaṃ gītaṃ gāyati vānaraḥ ||3632-1 asaṃbhāṣyaṃ na bhāṣeta bhāṣase yadi tattathā |  3632-2 pareṣāṃ hi samudvege nātmanaśca śubhaṃ phalaṃ ||3633-1 asaṃbhṛtaṃ maṇḍanamaṅgayaṣṭeranāsavākhyaṃ karaṇaṃ madasya |  3633-2 kāmasya puṣpavyatiriktamastraṃ bālyātparaṃ sātha vayaḥ prapede ||3634-1 asaṃbhedyaḥ śucirdakṣaḥ kṛtānnasya parīkṣakaḥ |  3634-2 sūdānāṃ ca viśeṣajñaḥ sūdādhyakṣo vidhīyate ||3635-1 asaṃbhogena sāmānyaṃ kṛpaṇasya dhanaṃ paraiḥ |  3635-2 asyedamiti saṃbandho hānau duḥkhena gamyate ||3636-1 asaṃbhramo vilajjatvaṃ avajñā prativādini |  3636-2 hāso rājñaḥ stavaśceti pañcaite jayahetavaḥ ||3637-1 asaṃmataḥ kastava muktimārgaṃ punarbhavakleśabhayātprapannaḥ |  3637-2 baddhaściraṃ tiṣṭhatu sundarīṇāṃ ārecitabhrūcaturaiḥ kaṭākṣaiḥ ||3638-1 asaṃmāne tapovṛddhiḥ saṃmmānācca tapaḥkṣayaḥ |  3638-2 pūjayā puṇyahāniḥ syānnindayā sadgatirbhavet ||3639-1 asaṃmukhālokanamābhimukhyaṃ niṣedha evānumatiprakāraḥ |  3639-2 pratyuttaraṃ mudraṇameva vācāṃ navāṅganānāṃ nava eva panthāḥ ||3640-1 asaṃvibhāgī duṣṭātmā kṛtaghno nirapatrapaḥ |  3640-2 tādṛṅnarādhamo loke varjanīyo narādhipa ||3641-1 asaṃvṛtasya kāryāṇi prāptānyapi viśeṣataḥ |  3641-2 niḥsaṃśayaṃ vipadyante bhinnaplava ivodadhau ||3642-1 asaṃvṛtākāratayā bhinnamantrasya bhūpateḥ |  3642-2 sakṛcchidraghaṭasyeva na tiṣṭhatyudayodakaṃ ||3643-1 asaṃśayaṃ kṣatraparigrahakṣamā yadāryamasyāmabhilāṣi me manaḥ |  3643-2 satāṃ hi saṃdehapadeṣu vastuṣu pramāṇamantaḥkaraṇapravṛttayaḥ ||3644-1 asaṃśayaṃ nyastamupāntaraktatāṃ yadeva roddhuṃ rāmaṇībhirañjanaṃ |  3644-2 hṛte'pi tasminsalilena śuklatāṃ nirāsa rāgo nayaneṣu na śriyaṃ ||3645-1 asaṃśayaṃ mahābāho mano durnigrahaṃ calaṃ |  3645-2 abhyāsena tu kaunteya vairāgyeṇa ca gṛhyate ||3646-1 asaṃśayaṃ vijānīhi kāle sarvaṃ phaliṣyati |  3646-2 dhṛtiṃ dhāraya visrabdhaṃ bhavetsarvaṃ samañjasaṃ ||3647-1 asakalakalikākulīkṛtāli- skhalanavikīrṇavikāsikeśarāṇāṃ |  3647-2 marudavaniruhāṃ rajo vadhūbhyaḥ samupaharanvicakāra korakāṇi ||3648-1 asakalanayanāvalokanena smitaparihāsamanoharairvacobhiḥ |  3648-2 kamalamukhi murārirevamevaṃ kathaya kiyanti dināni vañcanīyaḥ ||3649-1 asakalanayanekṣitāni lajjā gatamalasaṃ paripāṇḍutā viṣādaḥ |  3649-2 iti vividhamiyāya tāsu bhūṣāṃ prabhavati maṇḍayituṃ vadhūranaṅgaḥ ||3650-1 asakṛdasakṛnnaṣṭāṃ naṣṭāṃ mṛgo mṛgatṛṣṇikāṃ śramaparigato'pyutpakṣmākṣaḥ paraiti punaḥ punaḥ |  3650-2 gaṇayati na tanmāyātoyaṃ hataḥ salilāśayā bhavati hi matistṛṣṇāndhānāṃ vivekaparāṅmukhī ||3651-1 asakṛnna ne'ti sāvadhi- niṣedhabodhiśrutirmayā kalitā |  3651-2 gamayati paramanavarataṃ yā tamakhaṇḍārtharūpamānandaṃ ||3652-1 asakṛdekarathena tarasvinā harihayāgrasareṇa dhanurbhṛtā |  3652-2 dinakarābhimukhā raṇareṇavo rurudhire rudhireṇa suradviṣāṃ ||3653-1 asakṛdyudhi vijitādapi bhīto bārhadrathājjale durgaṃ |  3653-2 kṛtvā harirnyavātsīdvijito'pyāśaṅkanīyo'riḥ ||3654-1 asakṛnna vadedāśāṃ prārthayeddevatāṃ sakṛt |  3654-2 nālāyanī pañca patīnprāpoccārya punaḥ punaḥ ||3655-1 asaktamārādhayato yathāyathaṃ vibhajya bhaktyā samapakṣapātayā |  3655-2 guṇānurāgādiva sakhyamīyivānna bādhate'sya trigaṇaḥ parasparaṃ ||3656-1 asaṅgasaṃgadoṣeṇa satyāśca mativibhramaḥ |  3656-2 ekarātraprasaṅgena kāṣṭhaghaṇṭāviḍambanā ||3657-1 asajjanaḥ sajjanasaṅgisaṅgātkaroti duḥsādhyamapīha sādhyaṃ |  3657-2 puṣpāśrayācchaṃbhuśiro'dhirūḍhā pipīlikā cumbati candrabimbaṃ ||3658-1 asajjanāyāśu varaṃ na dadyātprītito nṛpaḥ |  3658-2 varaṃ bhasmāsurāyeśaḥ dattvā nīliphalaṃ gataḥ ||3659-1 asajjanāścenmadhurairvacobhiḥ śakyanta eva pratikartumāryaiḥ |  3659-2 tatketakīreṇubhiramburāśerbandhakriyāyāmapi kaḥ prayāsaḥ ||3660-1 asajjanena saṃparkādanayaṃ yānti sādhavaḥ |  3660-2 madhuraṃ śītalaṃ toyaṃ pāvakaṃ prāpya tapyate ||3661-1 asataḥ śrīmadāndhasya dāridryaṃ paramāñjanaṃ |  3661-2 ātmaupamyena bhūtāni daridraḥ paramīkṣate ||3662-1 asatāṃ ca parikṣepaḥ satāṃ ca parigūhanaṃ |  3662-2 abhūtānāṃ ca hiṃsānāṃ adharmāṇāṃ ca varjanaṃ ||3663-1 asatāṃ dharmabuddhiścetsatāṃ saṃtāpakāraṇaṃ |  3663-2 upoṣitasya vyāghrasya pāraṇaṃ paśumāraṇaṃ ||3664-1 asatāṃ pragrahaḥ kāmaḥ kopaścāvagrahaḥ satāṃ |  3664-2 vyasanaṃ doṣabāhulyādatyantamubhayaṃ mataṃ ||3665-1 asatāṃ bata sattāpi na nyāyānugatā yadā |  3665-2 tatastebhyorthapūrttyāśā sudhālipseva bhoginaḥ ||3666-1 asatāṃ saṅgadoṣeṇa satī yāti matirbhramaṃ |  3666-2 ekarātripravāsena kāṣṭhaṃ muñje pralambitaṃ ||3667-1 asatāṃ saṅgadoṣeṇa sādhavo yānti vikriyāṃ |  3667-2 duryodhanaprasaṅgena bhīṣmo goharaṇe gataḥ ||3668-1 asatāṃ saṅgamutsṛjya satsu saṅgaṃ samācaret |  3668-2 asatāṃ saṅgadoṣeṇa māṇḍavyaḥ śūlamāptavān ||3669-1 asatāṃ sahajo bhāvaśchannaḥ kenāpi hetunā |  3669-2 saṃskāra iva bījānāṃ phalena saha jāyate ||3670-1 asatāmupabhogāya durjanānāṃ vibhūtayaḥ |  3670-2 picumandaḥ phalāḍhyo'pi kākairevopabhujyate ||3671-1 asatā saha saṅgena ko na yātyadhamāṃ gatiṃ |  3671-2 payo'pi śauṇḍanīhaste madyamityabhidhīyate ||3672-1 asatīcaritaṃ tadvadvasantādeścavarṇanaṃ |  3672-2 grīṣmādervarṇanaṃ tadvadvarṣāderapi varṇanaṃ ||3673-1 asatī bhavati salajjā kṣāraṃ nīraṃ ca śītalaṃ bhavati |  3673-2 dambhī bhavati vivekī priyavaktā bhavati dhūrtajanaḥ ||3674-1 asato'pi bhavati guṇavānsadbhyo'pi paraṃ bhavantyasadvṛttāḥ |  3674-2 paṅkādudeti kamalaṃ krimayaḥ kamalādapi bhavanti ||3675-1 asato vā sato vāpi svayaṃ svānvarṇayanguṇān |  3675-2 hāsyatāṃ yāti śakro'pi kiṃ punaḥ prākṛto janaḥ ||3676-1 asatkāryarato'dhīra ārambhī viṣayī ca yaḥ |  3676-2 sa rājaso manuṣyeṣu mṛto janmādhigacchati ||3677-1 asatpratigrahītā ca narake yātyadh_oṃukhe |  3677-2 eko miṣṭānnabhugyaḥ sa yāti pūyavahaṃ naraḥ ||3678-1 asatpralāpaṃ pāruṣyaṃ paiśunyamanṛtaṃ tathā |  3678-2 catvāri vācā rājendra na jalpennānucintayet ||3679-1 asatyaḥ sarvaloke'sminsatataṃ satkṛtāḥ priyaiḥ |  3679-2 bhartāraṃ nānumanyaṃte vinipātagataṃ striyaḥ ||3680-1 asatyatā niṣṭhuratākṛtajñatā bhayaṃ pramādo'lasatā viṣāditā |  3680-2 vṛthābhimāno'pi ca dīrghasūtratā tathāṅganākṣādi vināśanaṃ śriyaḥ ||3681-1 asatyamapratyayamūlakāraṇaṃ kuvāsanāsadmasamṛddhivāraṇaṃ |  3681-2 vipannidānaṃ paravañcanorjitaṃ kṛtāparādhaṃ kṛtibhirvivarjitaṃ ||3682-1 asatyametadviditaṃ samastaṃ akāryakārīti mṛṣā prapañcaḥ |  3682-2 kucāpalāpakramameva kartuṃ ācchādanaṃ te hṛdayasya śaśvat ||3683-1 asatyaśīlā vikṛtā durgrāhyahṛdayāḥ sadā |  3683-2 yuvatyaḥ pāpasaṃkalpāḥ kṣaṇamātrādvirāgiṇaḥ ||3684-1 asatyasaṃdhasya sataścalasyāsthiracetasaḥ |  3684-2 naiva devā na pitaraḥ pratīcchantīti naḥ śrutaṃ ||3685-1 asatyasya vaṇigmūlaṃ śākhāstasya varāṅganāḥ |  3685-2 kāyasthāḥ patrapuṣpāṇi phalāni dyūtakāriṇaḥ ||3686-1 asatyāḥ satyasaṃkāśāḥ satyāścāsatyarūpiṇaḥ |  3686-2 dṛśyante vividhā bhāvāstasmādyuktaṃ parīkṣaṇaṃ ||3687-1 asatyā ca hatā vāṇī tathā paiśunyavādinī |  3687-2 saṃdigdho'pi hato mantro vyagracitto hato japaḥ ||3688-1 asatyātmaguṇe śastraṃ hastābhyāṃ vinivāryate |  3688-2 eṣāpi na gatiḥ kṣemyā na cānyā vidyate kvacit ||3689-1 asatyenaiva jīvanti veśyāḥ satyavivarjitāḥ |  3689-2 etāḥ satyena naśyanti madyeneva kulāṅganāḥ ||3690-1 asatsaṃparkadoṣeṇa adhastādyānti sādhavaḥ |  3690-2 mārgastimiradoṣeṇa samo'pi viṣamāyate ||3691-1 asatsaṅgādguṇajño'pi viṣayāsaktamānasaḥ |  3691-2 akasmātpralayaṃ yāti gītarakto yathā mṛgaḥ ||3692-1 asadṛśajaneṣu yācñā mahatāṃ nahi lāghavāya suhṛdarthe |  3692-2 harirapi pāṇḍusutebhyaḥ svayamarthī dhārtarāṣṭreṣu ||3693-1 asaddharmastvayaṃ strīṇāṃ asmākaṃ bhavati prabho |  3693-2 pāpīyaso narānyadvai lajjāṃ tyaktvā bhajāmahe ||3694-1 asadbhiḥ sevito rājā svayaṃ sannapi dūṣyate |  3694-2 kiṃ sevyo bhogisaṃvīto gandhavānapi candanaḥ ||3695-1 asadbhirasatāmeva bhujyante dhanasaṃpadaḥ |  3695-2 phalaṃ kimpākavṛkṣasya dhvāṅkṣā bhakṣanti netare ||3696-1 asadvṛtto nāyaṃ na ca sakhi guṇaireṣa rahitaḥ priyo muktāhārastava caraṇamūle nipatitaḥ |  3696-2 gṛhāṇainaṃ mugdhe vrajatu tava kaṇṭhapraṇayitāṃ upāyo nāstyanyo hṛdayaparitāpopaśamane ||3697-1 asanto'bhyarthitāḥ sadbhiḥ kiṃcitkāryaṃ kadācana |  3697-2 manyante santamātmānaṃ asantamapi vitaśruṃ ||3698-1 asanto ye nivartante vedebhya iva nāstikāḥ |  3698-2 narakaṃ bhajamānāste pratipadyanti kilbiṣaṃ ||3699-1 asanthitapadā suvihvalāṅgī madaskhalitaceṣṭitairmanojñā |  3699-2 kva yāsyasi varoru suratakāle viṣamā kiṃ vānavāsikā tvaṃ ||3700-1 asabhyaḥ piśunaścaiva kṛtaghno dīrghavairiṇaḥ |  3700-2 catvāraḥ karmacaṇḍālāḥ jāticaṇḍālapañcamāḥ ||3701-1 asamagravilokitena kiṃ te dayitaṃ paśya varoru nirviśaṅkaṃ |  3701-2 nahi jātu kuśāgrapītamambhaḥ sucireṇāpi karotyapetatṛṣṇaṃ ||3702-1 asamañjasamasamañjasa- masañjasametadāpatitaṃ |  3702-2 vallavakumārabuddhyā hari hari harirīkṣataḥ kutukāt ||3703-1 asamarthaṃ parityajya samarthāḥ paribhuñjate |  3703-2 nṛpāṇāṃ nāsti dāyādyaṃ vīrabhogyā vasundharā ||3704-1 asamaye matirunmiṣati dhruvaṃ karagataiva gatā yadiyaṃ kuhūḥ |  3704-2 punarupaiti nirudhya nivāsyate sakhi mukhaṃ na vidhoḥ punarīkṣyate ||3705-1 asamarthāḥ prakurvanti munayo'pyarthasaṃcayaṃ |  3705-2 kiṃ na kurvanti bhūpālā yeṣāṃ kośavaśāḥ prajāḥ ||3706-1 asamartho bhavetsādhurnirdhano brahmacāryapi |  3706-2 vyādhimāndevapūjī ca kurūpā ca pativratā ||3707-1 asamasamarasampallampaṭānāṃ bhaṭānāṃ avadhiravadhi yuddhe yena hampīravīraḥ |  3707-2 sa kila sakaladṛptakṣatranakṣatralakṣmī- haraṇakiraṇamālī kasya na syānnamasyaḥ ||3708-1 asamasāhasasuvyavasāyinaḥ sakalalokacamatkṛtikāriṇaḥ |  3708-2 yadi bhavanti na vāñchitasiddhayo hatavidherayaśo na manasvinaḥ ||3709-1 asamāne samānatvaṃ bhavitā kalahe mama |  3709-2 iti matvā dhruvaṃ mānī mṛgātsiṃhaḥ palāyate ||3710-1 asamāpitakṛtyasaṃpadāṃ hatavegaṃ vinayena tāvatā |  3710-2 prabhavantyabhimānaśālināṃ madamuttambhayituṃ vibhūtayaḥ ||3711-1 asamāptajigīṣasya strīcintā kā manasvinaḥ |  3711-2 anākramya jagatkṛtsnaṃ no saṃdhyāṃ bhajate raviḥ ||3712-1 asamaiḥ samīyamānaḥ samaiśca parihīyamāṇasatkāraḥ |  3712-2 adhuri viniyujyamānastribhirarthapatiṃ tyajati bhṛtyaḥ ||3713-1 asamyagupayuktaṃ hi jñānaṃ sukuśalairapi |  3713-2 upalabhyāpyaviditaṃ viditaṃ cāpyanuṣṭhitaṃ ||3714-1 asahāyaḥ pumānekaḥ kāryāntaṃ nādhigacchati |  3714-2 tuṣeṇāpi vinirmuktastaṇḍulo na prarohati ||3715-1 asahāyaḥ samartho'pi tejasvī kiṃ kariṣyati |  3715-2 rāmaḥ sugrīvasāhāyyātlaṅkāṃ nirdagdhavānpurā ||3716-1 asahāyaḥ samartho'pi tejasvyapi karoti kiṃ |  3716-2 nivāte patito vahniḥ svayamevopaśāmyati ||3717-1 asahāyaḥ samartho'pi na kāryaṃ kartumarhati |  3717-2 tuṣeṇāpi parityaktā na prarohanti taṇḍulāḥ ||3718-1 asahāyaḥ sahāyārthī māmanudhyātavāndhruvaṃ |  3718-2 pīḍyamānaḥ śaraistīkṣṇairdroṇadrauṇikṛpādibhiḥ ||3719-1 asahāyasya kāryāṇi siddhiṃ nāyānti kānicit |  3719-2 tasmātsamastakāryeṣu sahāyo bhūpatergatiḥ ||3720-1 asahāyo'samartho vā tejasvī kiṃ kariṣyati |  3720-2 atṛṇe patito vahniḥ svayamevopaśāmyate ||3721-1 asahāścaiva vijñeyāḥ prabhāvanto videhajāḥ |  3721-2 aṅgadeśodbhavāstīkṣṇāḥ suhastāḥ sudṛḍhāstathā ||3722-1 asahyavātoddhatareṇumaṇḍalā pracaṇḍasūryātapatāpitā mahī |  3722-2 na śakyate draṣṭumapi pravāsibhiḥ priyāviyogānaladagdhamānasaiḥ ||3723-1 asahyānyapi soḍhāni gaditānyapriyāṇyapi |  3723-2 sthitaḥ paragṛhadvāri tṛṣṇe nivṛttimāpnuhi ||3724-1 asādhanā vittahīnā buddhimantaḥ suhṛnmatāḥ |  3724-2 sādhayantyāśu kāryāṇi kākakūrmamṛgākhuvat ||3725-1 asādhuḥ sādhurvā bhavati khalu jātyaiva puruṣo na saṅgāddaurjanyaṃ na hi sujanatā kasyacidapi |  3725-2 prarūḍhe saṃsarge maṇibhujagayorjanmajanite maṇirnāherdoṣānspṛśati na tu sarpo maṇiguṇān ||3726-1 asādhu parigantavyaṃ na ca sādhu ca saṃvalaṃ |  3726-2 saṃvalaṃ kuru yatnena maraṇaṃ dhruvaniścayaṃ ||3727-1 asādhyaṃ nārabhetprājñaḥ akāryaṃ naiva kārayet |  3727-2 anṛtaṃ naiva jalpeta abhakṣyaṃ naiva bhakṣayet ||3728-1 asādhyaṃ śatrumālokya dāyādaṃ tasya bhedayet |  3728-2 rājyakāmaṃ samarthaṃ ca yathā rāmo vibhīṣaṇaṃ ||3729-1 asādhyaṃ sādhumantrāṇāṃ tīvraṃ vāgviṣamutsṛjat |  3729-2 dvijihvaṃ vadanaṃ dhatte duṣṭo durjanapannagaḥ ||3730-1 asādhyamanyathā doṣaṃ paricchidya śarīriṇāṃ |  3730-2 yathā vaidyastathā rājā śastrapāṇirviṣahyati ||3731-1 asādhyāyāḥ sukhaṃ siddhiḥ siddhāyāścānurañjanaṃ |  3731-2 raktāyāśca ratiḥ samyakkāmaśāstraprayojanaṃ ||3732-1 asāmānyollekhaṃ virasahatahevākinamalaṃ vidhiṃ vande nindāmyuta bata na jāne kimucitaṃ |  3732-2 anarghaṃ nirmāṇaṃ lalitatanu yasyeha bhavatī na yaḥ kṛtvāpi tvāṃ pariharati sargavyasanitāṃ ||3733-1 asāraṃ saṃsāraṃ parimuṣitaratnaṃ tribhuvanaṃ nirālokaṃ lokaṃ maraṇaśaraṇaṃ bāndhavajanaṃ |  3733-2 adarpaṃ kandarpaṃ jananayananirmāṇamaphalaṃ jagajjīrṇāraṇyaṃ kathamasi vidhātuṃ vyavasitaḥ ||3734-1 asāraḥ saṃsāraḥ sarasakadalīsārasadṛśo lasadvidyullekhācakitacapalaṃ jīvitamidaṃ|  3734-2 yadetattāruṇyaṃ nagagatanadīvegasadṛśaṃ aho dhārṣṭyaṃ puṃsāṃ tadapi viṣayāndhāvati manaḥ ||3735-1 asāraḥ sarvataḥ sāro vācā sārasamuccayaḥ |  3735-2 vācā sā calitā yena sukṛtaṃ tena hāritaṃ ||3736-1 asārabhūte saṃsāre sāraṃ sāraṅgalocanā |  3736-2 tadarthaṃ dhanamicchanti tattyāge ca dhanena kiṃ ||3737-1 asārabhūte saṃsāre sārabhūtā nitambinī |  3737-2 iti saṃcintya vai śaṃbhurardhāṅge kāminīṃ dadhau ||3738-1 asārāḥ santyete virativirasā vātha viṣayā jugupsantāṃ yadvā nanu sakaladoṣāspadamiti |  3738-2 tathāpyantastattvapraṇihitadhiyāmapyatibalastadīyo'nākhyeyaḥ sphurati hṛdaye ko'pi mahimā ||3739-1 asāre khalu saṃsāre sāraṃ śvaśuramandiraṃ |  3739-2 kṣīrābdhau ca hariḥ śete śivaḥ śete himālaye ||3740-1 asāre khalu saṃsāre sāraṃ śvaśuramandiraṃ |  3740-2 haro himālaye śete viṣṇuḥ śete mahodadhau ||3741-1 asāre khalu saṃsāre sārametaccatuṣṭayaṃ |  3741-2 kāśyāṃ vāsaḥ satāṃ saṅgo gaṅgāmbhaḥ śaṃbhusevanaṃ ||3742-1 asāre khalu saṃsāre sukhabhrāntiḥ śarīriṇāṃ |  3742-2 lālāpānamivāṅguṣṭhe bālānāṃ stanyavibhramaḥ ||3743-1 asāre bata saṃsāre karmatantraḥ śarīriṇāṃ |  3743-2 jāyante priyasaṃyogā viyoge hṛdayacchidaḥ ||3744-1 asāre saṃsāre viṣamaviṣapāke nṛpasukhe kṛtāntenācānte prakṛticapale jīvitabale |  3744-2 dhruvāpāye kāye viṣayamṛgatṛṣṇāhatahṛdaḥ kṣaraprāṇaiḥ prāṇānahaha parimuṣṇanti kudhiyaḥ ||3745-1 asāre saṃsāre sumatiśaraṇe kāvyakaraṇe yatheṣṭaṃ ceṣṭante kati na kavayaḥ svasvarucayaḥ |  3745-2 paraṃ dugdhasnigdhaṃ madhuraracanaṃ yastu vacanaṃ prasūte brūte vā bhavati viralaḥ ko'pi saralaḥ ||3746-1 asāro nirguṇo vakraścitrarūpatayānvitaḥ |  3746-2 avāpa na cirādbhraṃśaṃ śakracāpaḥ khalo yathā ||3747-1 asāvadhāne pāṇḍityaṃ krayakrītaṃ ca maithunaṃ |  3747-2 bhojanaṃ ca parādhīnaṃ tisraḥ puṃsāṃ viḍambanāḥ ||3748-1 asāvanāsthāparayāvadhīritaḥ saroruhiṇyā śirasā namannapi |  3748-2 upaiti śuṣyankalamaḥ sahāmbhasā manobhuvā tapta ivābhipāṇḍutāṃ ||3749-1 asāvanupanīto'pi vedānadhijage guroḥ |  3749-2 svabhāvaśuddhaḥ sphaṭiko na saṃskāramapekṣate ||3750-1 asāvantaścañcadvikacanavalīlābjayugala- stalasphūrjatkamburvilasadalisaṃghāta upari |  3750-2 vinā doṣāsaṅgaṃ satataparipūrṇākhilakalaḥ kutaḥ prāptaścandro vigalitakalaṅkaḥ sumukhi te ||3751-1 asāvahaṃ lohamayī sa yasyāḥ krūraḥ sakhi prastara eṣa kāntaḥ |  3751-2 ākarṣakadrāvakacumbakeṣu naiko'pyasau bhrāmaka ityavaihi ||3752-1 asāvudayamārūḍhaḥ kāntimānraktamaṇḍalaḥ |  3752-2 rājā harati lokasya hṛdayaṃ mṛdubhiḥ karaiḥ ||3753-1 asāvudvelalāvaṇyaratnākarasamudbhavaḥ |  3753-2 jagadvijayamāṅgalyaśaṅkhaḥ kusumadhanvanaḥ ||3754-1 asāvekadvitriprabhṛtiparipāṭyā prakaṭayankalāḥ svairaṃ svairaṃ navakamalakandāṅkurarucaḥ |  3754-2 purandhrīṇāṃ preyovirahadahanoddīpitadṛśāṃ kaṭākṣebhyo bibhyannibhṛtamiva candro'bhyudayate ||3755-1 asiḥ śarā varma dhanuśca noccakairvivicya kiṃ prārthitamīśvareṇa te |  3755-2 athāsti śaktiḥ kṛtameva yācñayā na dūṣitaḥ śaktimatāṃ svayaṃgrahaḥ ||3756-1 asijīvī maṣījīvī devalo grāmayājakaḥ |  3756-2 dhāvakaḥ pācakaścaiva ṣaḍviprāḥ śūdrajātayaḥ ||3757-1 asitakhuracatuṣkaḥ śyāmalagranthipādaḥ sravati karasamīpe mūtradhārāṃ savegāṃ |  3757-2 daśanacalakhalīnaḥ kukkuṭaskandhabandhaḥ kiṭivarakaṭhinorurdūragaḥ syātturuṅgaḥ ||3758-1 asitagirisamaṃ syātkajjalaṃ sindhupātre surataruvaraśākhā lekhanī patramurvī |  3758-2 likhati yadi gṛhītvā śāradā sarvakālaṃ tadapi tava guṇānāmīśa pāraṃ na yāti||3759-1 asitanayanalakṣmīṃ lakṣayitvotpaleṣu kvaṇitakanakakāñcīṃ mattahaṃsasvaneṣu |  3759-2 adhararuciraśobhāṃ bandhujīve priyāṇāṃ pathikajana idānīṃ roditi bhrāntacittaḥ ||3760-1 asitabhujagabhīṣaṇāsipatro ruharuhikāhitacittatūrṇacāraḥ |  3760-2 pulakitatanurutkapolakāntiḥ pratibhaṭavikramadarśane'yamāsīt ||3761-1 asitabhujagaśiśuveṣṭitaṃ abhinavamābhāti ketakīkusumaṃ |  3761-2 āyasavalayālaṃkṛta- viṣāṇamiva dantinaḥ patitaṃ ||3762-1 asitamekasurāśitamapyamūnna punareṣa vidhurviśadaṃ viṣaṃ |  3762-2 api nipīya surairjanitakṣayaṃ svayamudeti punarnavamārṇavaṃ ||3763-1 asitavasanasragsaṃvītā ghanāgurusāravanmṛgamadamaṣīsnātā jātāṃ tvameva tamasvinī |  3763-2 abhisara sukhaṃ dantoddyotaṃ na tanvi vikāsayeḥ śvasitamathavā muñceścañcaddvirephaghanodgamaṃ ||3764-1 asitātmā susaṃnaddhaḥ samāviṣkṛtacāpalaḥ |  3764-2 bhujaṃgakuṭilastasyā bhrūvikṣepaḥ khalāyate ||3765-1 asiddhasādhanaṃ sadbhiḥ śāsanaṃ daṇḍa ucyate |  3765-2 taṃ yuktyaiva nayeddaṇḍaṃ yuktadaṇḍaḥ praśasyate ||3766-1 asidhārāṃ viṣaṃ vahniṃ samatve yaḥ prapaśyati |  3766-2 mālāsudhātuṣārāṇāṃ sa yogī kathyate budhaiḥ ||3767-1 asidhārākramakrītā varamekāpi kākiṇī |  3767-2 na parabhrūvinirdiṣṭā sāgarāntāpi medinī ||3768-1 asidhārāpathe nātha śatruśoṇitapicchile |  3768-2 ājagāma kathaṃ lakṣmīrnirjagāma kathaṃ yaśaḥ ||3769-1 asidhenuriyaṃ vibhāti te jitasarvakṣitipālamaṇḍalā |  3769-2 pralaye jagatīmivāśituṃ sphuratī kālakarālajihvakā ||3770-1 asindūreṇa sīmanto mā bhūnno yoṣitāmiti |  3770-2 ataḥ pariharantyājāvasiṃ dūreṇa te'rayaḥ ||3771-1 asimātrasahāyasya prabhūtāriparābhave |  3771-2 anyatucchajanasyeva na smayo'sya mahādhṛteḥ ||3772-1 asīvyaddehe sve paśupatirumāṅkaṃ samaghano vigupto gopībhirduhitaramayātsā kamalabhūḥ |  3772-2 yadādeśādetajjagadapi mṛgīdṛkparavaśaṃ sa vaśyaḥ kasya syādahaha viṣamo manmathabharaḥ ||3773-1 asukhamatha sukhaṃ vā karmaṇāṃ paktivelāsvahaha niyatamete bhuñjate dehabhājaḥ |  3773-2 tadiha purata eva prāha mauhurtikaścetkathaya phalamamīṣāmantataḥ kiṃ tataḥ syāt ||3774-1 asukhaiśca vinālāpo guhyasya kathanaṃ tathā |  3774-2 vipadvimokṣaṇaṃ caiva mitratāyāḥ phalatrayaṃ ||3775-1 asubhiraśubhaṃ tyaktvā dehaṃ nijaṃ kila yogavidviśati viśadaṃ jñānālokātparasya kalevaraṃ |  3775-2 nayanavivaraiḥ sūkṣmaiḥ sākṣādaho tava naipuṇaṃ viśasi hṛdayaṃ draṣṭuṃ spaṣṭaṃ bahiśca viceṣṭase ||3776-1 asubhṛtāṃ vadhamācarati kṣamādvadati vākyamasahyamasūnṛtaṃ |  3776-2 parakalatradhanānyapi vāñchati na kurute kimu madyamadākulaḥ ||3777-1 asuraracitaprayatnādvijñātā diviravañcanā yena |  3777-2 saṃrakṣitā matimatā ratnavatī vasumatī tena ||3778-1 asurasamaradakṣairvajrasaṃdhṛṣṭacāpairanupamabalavīryaiḥ svaiḥ kulaistulyavīryaḥ |  3778-2 raghuriva sa narendro yajñaviśrāntakośo bhava jagati guṇānāṃ bhājanaṃ bhrājitānāṃ ||3779-1 asurasuranareśāṃ yo na bhogeṣu tṛptaḥ kathamiha manujānāṃ tasya bhogeṣu tṛptiḥ |  3779-2 jalanidhijalapāne yo na jāto vitṛṣṇastṛṇaśikharagatāmbhambhaḥpānataḥ kiṃ sa tṛpyet ||3780-1 asurahitamapyādityotthaṃ vipattimupāgataṃ ditisutaguruḥ prāṇairyoktuṃ na kiṃ kacavattamaḥ |  3780-2 paṭhati luṭhatīṃ kaṇṭhe vidyāmayaṃ mṛtajīvanīṃ yadi na vahate saṃdhyāmaunavratavyayabhīrutāṃ ||3781-1 asuro hitamupadiṣṭaḥ prahlādo nāradena garbhasthaḥ |  3781-2 tattvaviduṣāṃ varo'bhūd- dhitopadeśaṃ sadā śṛṇuyāt ||3782-1 asulabhā sakalendumukhī ca sā kimapi cedamanaṅgaviceṣṭitaṃ |  3782-2 abhimukhīṣviva vāñchitasiddhiṣu vrajati nirvṛtimekapade manaḥ ||3783-1 asuhṛtsasuhṛccāpi saśatrurmitravānapi |  3783-2 saprajñaḥ prajñayā hīno daivena labhate sukhaṃ ||3784-1 asūcibhedyāmāsādya bālāṃ prauḍhābhilāpiṇīṃ |  3784-2 hā kaṣṭaṃ muṣito'smīti prabhāte vakti kāmukaḥ ||3785-1 asūcīsaṃcāre tamasi nabhasi prauḍhajalada- dhvaniprājñaṃmanye patati pṛṣatānāṃ nicaye |  3785-2 idaṃ saudāminyāḥ kanakakamanīyaṃ vilasitaṃ mudaṃ ca mlāniṃ ca prathayati pathi svairasudṛśāṃ ||3786-1 asūta sadyaḥ kusumānyaśokaḥ skandhātprabhṛtyeva sapallavāni |  3786-2 pādena nāpaikṣata sundarīṇāṃ saṃparkamāśiñjitanūpureṇa ||3787-1 asūta sā nāgavadhūpabhogyaṃ mainākamambhonidhibaddhasakhyaṃ |  3787-2 kruddhe'pi pakṣacchidi vṛtraśatrāvavedanājñaṃ kuliśakṣatānāṃ ||3788-1 asūyako dandaśūko niṣṭhuro vairakṛnnaraḥ |  3788-2 sa kṛcchraṃ mahadāpnoti nacirātpāpamācaran ||3789-1 asūyayā hatenaiva pūrvopāyodyamairapi |  3789-2 kartṇāṃ gṛhyate saṃpatsuhṛdbhirmantribhistathā ||3790-1 asūyāviṣṭe manasi yadi saṃpatpravartate |  3790-2 tuṣāgniṃ vāyusamyogaṃ iva jānīhi suvrata ||3791-1 asūyaikapadaṃ mṛtyurativādaḥ śriyo vadhaḥ |  3791-2 aśuśrūṣā tvarā ślāghā vidyāyāḥ śatravastrayaḥ ||3792-1 asekato'tyantaniṣekataśca śākhāviśoṣaṃ phalino nirūpya |  3792-2 saptāhamātraṃ śṛtameva sarpirviḍaṅgadugdhāmbu niṣecanīyaṃ ||3793-1 asevake cānuraktirdānaṃ sapriyabhāṣaṇaṃ |  3793-2 anuraktasya cihnāni doṣe'pi guṇasaṃgrahaḥ ||3794-1 aseviteśvaradvāraṃ adṛṣṭavirahavyathaṃ |  3794-2 anuktaklībavacanaṃ dhanyaṃ kasyāpi jīvitaṃ ||3795-1 asoḍhā tatkālollasadasahabhāvasya tapasaḥ kathānāṃ viśrambheṣvatha ca rasikaḥ śailaduhituḥ |  3795-2 pramodaṃ vo diśyātkapaṭabaṭuveṣāpanayane tvarāśathilyābhyāṃ yugapadabhiyuktaḥ smaraharaḥ ||3796-1 asau gataḥ saugata eva yasmātkuryānnirālambanatāṃ mamaiva |  3796-2 sakhi priyaste kṣaṇikaḥ kimanyannirātmakaḥ śūnyatamaḥ sa vandyaḥ ||3797-1 asau gireḥ śītalakandarasthaḥ pārāvato manmathacāṭudakṣaḥ |  3797-2 dharmālasāṅgīṃ madhurāṇi kūjansaṃvījate pakṣapuṭena kāntāṃ ||3798-1 asaujanyañcetobhavasamucitaṃ bhāvayati tadvṛthā saṃsāre'sminnahaha samayaṃ kiṃ gamayasi |  3798-2 cirādbhūyo bhūyaḥ kalayasi sakhedo bhavasukhaṃ tato manye tyāgātprabhavati parā nirvṛtiriti ||3799-1 asau nāstīvenduḥ kvacidapi raviḥ proṣita iva grahoḍūnāṃ cakraṃ nabhasi likhitaproñchitamiva |  3799-2 aharvā rātrirvā dvayamapi praluptapravicayaṃ ghanairbaddhavyūhaiḥ kimidamatighoraṃ vyavasitaṃ ||3800-1 asau bibhrattāmratviṣamudayaśailasya śirasi skhalanprāleyāṃśuryadi bhavati matto haladharaḥ |  3800-2 tadānīmetattu pratinavatamāladyutiharaṃ tamo'pi vyālolaṃ vigalati tadīyaṃ nivasanaṃ ||3801-1 asaubhāgyaṃ dhatte paramasukhabhogāspadamayaṃ vicitraṃ tadgehaṃ bhavati pṛthukārtasvaramayaṃ |  3801-2 niviṣṭaḥ palyaṅke kalayati sa kāntārataraṇaṃ prasādaṃ kopaṃ vā janani bhavatī yatra tanute ||3802-1 asau maruccumbitacārukesaraḥ prasannatārādhipamaṇḍalāgraṇīḥ |  3802-2 viyuktarāmāturadṛṣṭivīkṣito vasantakālo hanumānivāgataḥ ||3803-1 asau mahākālaniketanasya vasannadūre kila candramauleḥ |  3803-2 tamisrapakṣe'pi saha priyābhirjotsnāvato nirviśati pradoṣān ||3804-1 asau mahendradvipadānagandhistrimārgagāvīcivimardaśītaḥ |  3804-2 ākāśavāyurdinayauvanotthānācāmati svedalavānmukhe te ||3805-1 asau mahendrādrisamānasāraḥ patirmahendrasya mahodadheśca |  3805-2 yasya kṣaratsainyagajacchalena yātrāsu yātīva puro mahendraḥ ||3806-1 asau rasaucityaguṇojjvalo'pi gumpho na kāvyavyapadeśayogyaḥ |  3806-2 dhatte khalasyāpi na durviṣahya- dveṣagrahotsāraṇamantratāṃ yaḥ ||3807-1 asau vidyāśālī śiśurapi vinirgatya bhavanādihāyātaḥ saṃpratyavikalaśaraccandravadanaḥ |  3807-2 yadālokasthāne bhavati puramunmādataralaiḥ kaṭākṣairnārīṇāṃ kuvalayitavātāyanamiva ||3808-1 asau samarasāhasaṃ vitanute'grimaśreyase mukundamamumātmani sthirayituṃ na kiṃ vāñchati |  3808-2 ataḥ parataraṃ kutaḥ prataraṇāya vārāṃnidhernidānamiha saṃsṛteḥ sukhasṛteśca kiṃ kāraṇaṃ ||3809-1 asau samālokitakānanāntare vikīrṇavispaṣṭamarīcikesaraḥ |  3809-2 vinirgataḥ siṃha ivodayācalādgṛhītaniṣpandamṛgo niśākaraḥ ||3810-1 asau hi dattvā timirāvakāśaṃ astaṃ vrajatyunnatakoṭirinduḥ |  3810-2 jalāvagāḍhasya vanadvipasya tīkṣṇaṃ viṣāṇāgramivāvaśiṣṭaṃ ||3811-1 asau hi rāmā rativigrahapriyā rahaḥpragalbhā ramaṇaṃ rahogataṃ |  3811-2 ratena śatrau ramayetparena vā no cedudeṣyatyaruṇaḥ puro ripuḥ ||3812-1 asau hi saṃketasamutsukābhirvilāsinībhirmadanāturābhiḥ |  3812-2 saroṣadṛṣṭaḥ sphuritādharābhirdrutaṃ ravirbhīta ivāstameti ||3813-1 astaṃgatabhāraviravi kālavaśātkālidāsavidhuvidhuraṃ |  3813-2 nirvāṇabāṇadīpaṃ jagadidamadyoti ratnena ||3814-1 astaṃ gatavati savitari pāyasapiṇḍaṃ sudhākaraṃ prācī |  3814-2 vyaracayadambarakuśabhuvi carati kalaṅkastadantare kākaḥ ||3815-1 astaṃ gatavati savitari bhartari madhupaṃ niveśya kośānte |  3815-2 kamalinyo'pi ramante kimatra citraṃ mṛgākṣīṇāṃ ||3816-1 astaṃgate divānāthe nalinī madhupacchalāt |  3816-2 gilanti svavināśāya guṭikāṃ kālakūṭajāṃ ||3817-1 astaṃgate nijaripāvapi kumbhayonau saṃkocamāpa jaladhirna tu mādyati sma |  3817-2 gambhīratāguṇacamatkṛtaviṣṭapānāṃ śatrukṣaye'pi mahatāmucitaṃ hyadaḥ syāt ||3818-1 astaṃgate bhāsvati nāndhakārānśanaiścaro hanti vidhau budhaśca |  3818-2 piturguṇairna pratibhāti putro guṇānvito yaḥ sa guṇena bhāti ||3819-1 astaṃgato'yamaravindavanaikabandhurbhāsvānna laṅghayati ko'pi vidhipraṇītaṃ|  3819-2 he cakra dhairyamavalambya vimuñca śokaṃ dhīrāstaranti vipadaṃ na tu dīnacittāḥ ||3820-1 astaṃ bhāsvati lokalocanakalāloke gate bhartari strīlokocitamācaranti sukṛtaṃ vahnau vilīya tviṣaḥ |  3820-2 apyetāstu cikīrṣayeva tapasāṃ tārākṣamālā diśo manye khañjanakaṇṭhak_oṃalatamaḥkṛṣṇājinaṃ bibhrati ||3821-1 astaṃ muktirupaitu yatra na tanūsādhyā harerbhaktayastannaḥ saṃsṛtiredhatāṃ niravadhiryasyāḥ prasādodayāt |  3821-2 mūrdhni śrīpuruṣottamapraṇatayaḥ śrīrāmanāmānane hṛddeśe yadunandanasya jaladaśyāmābhirāmākṛtiḥ ||3822-1 astaṃ yatāpi kila mastakavartināsāvastācalo'himarucā rucimapyalambhi |  3822-2 prāyaḥ paropakṛtaye kṛtino'nepekṣya svārthaṃ vipatkavalitā api bhāvayanti ||3823-1 astaṃ yātastimirapaṭalīdattabhaṅgaḥ pataṃgaḥ prāpto naivodayagiriśir_oṃūlameṇāvacūlaḥ |  3823-2 tatte kālaṃ katipalamayaṃ bhāti khadyotapota dyotaṃ dyotaṃ punarapi punardyotatāṃ ko vilambaḥ ||3824-1 astaṃ śaśī yāti śaśāṅkavadane mānaṃ vimuñcādhunā kiṃ mānena mudhā natabhru gaganādbhraśyantyamūstārakāḥ |  3824-2 itthaṃ tvāmanuśikṣayankṣititalādunnamya pādaṃ śanaiḥ kṣīṇāṃ vīkṣya niśāṃ nisargasubhagaṃ gāyatyasau kukkuṭaḥ ||3825-1 astagrastagabhastimatkaratatinyaṅnītacañcūpuṭī pāṭīrādrimatho himācalamadhaḥ prakṣipya pakṣadvayaṃ |  3825-2 paścādunnatapucchapuñjamudayatprācīprakāśacchalādaṇḍaṃ maṇḍalamaindavaṃ janayati vyaktaṃ bakoṭīviyat ||3826-1 astapratyupakāragandhamakṛtasvaprārthanāpekṣama- pyambhobhirbhuvamārdrayanti jaladā jīvantyamī jantavaḥ |  3826-2 daivajñaḥ punarasti vṛṣṭiriti vāgekā mayokteti yadviśvaṃ krītamivādhigacchati tadevāghūrṇate marmaṇi ||3827-1 astabdhaḥ pūjayenmānyāngurūnsevedamāyayā |  3827-2 arceddevānnadambhena śriyamicchedakutsitāṃ ||3828-1 astabdhatāmacāpalyaṃ vairāṇāṃ cāpyakartṛtāṃ |  3828-2 pratyakṣato vijānīyādbhadratāṃ kṣudratāmapi ||3829-1 astabdhamaklībamadīrghasūtraṃ sānukrośaṃ ślakṣṇamahāryamanyaiḥ |  3829-2 arogajātīyamudāravākyaṃ dūtaṃ vadantyaṣṭaguṇopapannaṃ ||3830-1 astamastakaparyastasamastārkāṃśusaṃstarā |  3830-2 pīnastanasthitātāmrakamravastreva vāruṇī ||3831-1 astamitaviṣayasaṅgā mukulitanayanotpalā mṛduśvasitā |  3831-2 dhyāyati kimapyalakṣyaṃ nityaṃ yogābhiyukteva ||3832-1 astamīyuṣi niśākare satī rāgato'tividhurā kumudvatī |  3832-2 ṣaṭpadaṃ garalamagrahīnmukhe saṃmukhe'pi khagaśabdavāritā ||3833-1 astavyastamitastataḥ pathi patanmadyaṃ mahādudvamanhastābhyāṃ mukhamakṣikāḥ pariṇudangālīrgadangadgadan |  3833-2 uttālaiḥ śiśubhirbhṛśaṃ valayito bībhatsamūrtirmahānmatto dakṣiṇataḥ kṣaṇaṃ kṣipa dṛśaṃ matto'yamāgacchati ||3834-1 astavyastasamīrakampitatayā dṛṣṭestiraskāriṇīṃ hastenālakavallarīmakuṭilāmānīya karṇāntikaṃ |  3834-2 udvīkṣya priyamārgamadhvagavadhūrastaṃ gate bhāsvati chinnāśā svaniveśameti śanakaiḥ svapnekṣaṇāśaṃsinī ||3835-1 astavyastānkramatatagatīnpatrimālātaraṅgānveṇīdaṇḍāniva dhṛtavatī muktasaṃdhyāṅgarāgā |  3835-2 dhvāntamlānāṃśukaparicayacchannalāvaṇyaśocyā dyauḥ pratyagradyumaṇivirahādvāntamakṣṇorna yāti ||3836-1 astādripārśvamupajagmuṣi tigmabhāsi jānīta śītakiraṇo'bhyudito na veti |  3836-2 cārā ivātha rajanītimiraprayuktāśceruściraṃ caraṇabhūmiṣu cañcarīkāḥ ||3837-1 astādriśirovinihita- ravimaṇḍalasarasayāvaghaṭṭāṅkaṃ |  3837-2 nayatīva kālakaulaḥ kvāpi nabhaḥsairibhaṃ siddhyai ||3838-1 astābhimukhe sūrye udite saṃpūrṇamaṇḍale candre |  3838-2 gamanaṃ budhasya lagne uditāstamite ca ketau ||3839-1 astāvalambiravibimbatayodayādri- cūḍonmiṣatsakalacandratayā ca sāyaṃ |  3839-2 saṃdhyāpranṛttaharahastagṛhītakāṃsya- tāladvayeva samalakṣyata nākalakṣmīḥ||3840-1 astāvilarūkṣākṣyo mūṣakanayanāśca na śubhadā gāvaḥ |  3840-2 pracalaccipiṭaviṣāṇā karaṭāḥ kharasadṛśavarṇāśca ||3841-1 asti kāraṇamavyaktaṃ sarvavyāpi parāparaṃ |  3841-2 sāṃnidhyādapi durgrāhyaṃ viśvamūrtyopalakṣitaṃ ||3842-1 asti ko'pi timirastanaṃdhayaḥ kiṃcidañcitapadaṃ sa gāyati |  3842-2 yanmanāgapi niśamya kā vadhūrnāvadhūtahṛdayopajāyate ||3843-1 asti grīvā śiro nāsti dvau bhujau karavarjitau |  3843-2 sītāharaṇasāmarthyo na rāmo na ca rāvaṇaḥ ||3844-1 asti jalaṃ jalarāśau kṣāraṃ tatkiṃ vidhīyate tena |  3844-2 laghurapi varaṃ sa kūpo yatrākaṇṭhaṃ janaḥ pibati ||3845-1 asti putro vaśe yasya bhṛtyo bhāryā tathaiva ca |  3845-2 abhāve sati saṃtoṣaḥ svargastho'sau mahītale ||3846-1 asti bhayamasti kautukaṃ asti ca mandākṣamasti cotkaṇṭhā |  3846-2 bālānāṃ praṇayijane bhāvaḥ ko'pyeṣa naikarasaḥ ||3847-1 asti yadyapi sarvatra nīraṃ nīrajarājitaṃ |  3847-2 modate na tu haṃsasya mānasaṃ mānasaṃ vinā ||3848-1 asti śrīstanapatrabhaṅgamakarīmudrāṅkitoraḥsthalo devaḥ sarvajagatpatirmadhuvadhūvaktrābjacandrodayaḥ |  3848-2 krīḍākroḍatanornavenduviśade daṃṣṭrāṅkure yasya bhūrbhāti sma pralayābdhipalvalatalotkhātaikamustākṛtiḥ ||3849-1 asti svarṇamayo'drirasti viṣayaḥ kṣuttṛḍbharāvarjitaḥ santi kṣīraghṛtākarā jaladhayaḥ santi drumāḥ kāmadāḥ |  3849-2 kiṃ nastaccaritādbhutaśravaṇataḥ sādhyaṃ kṣudhā tāmyatāṃ dṛṣṭaṃ yatsavidhe vidhehi sumate tatraiva sarvaṃ śramaṃ ||3850-1 asti svāduphalaṃ kimasti kimathāghrātuṃ kṣamaḥ korakastadviśrāmyatu nāma bhoktumucitaṃ patraṃ kimastyantataḥ |  3850-2 sevyo hanta yadīdṛśo'pi manujairvṛkṣādhamaḥ pippalo duḥsvātantryamidaṃ vidheḥ kathaya tatkasyāgrato rudyatāṃ ||3851-1 astītyeva kṛṣiṃ kuryātasti nāstīti vāṇijaṃ |  3851-2 nāstītyeva ṛṇaṃ dadyātnāhamasmīti sāhasaṃ ||3852-1 astu tāvadagastyena jahnormahimanihnavaḥ |  3852-2 kā kathā tasya bālasya viśvagrāse'pyatṛpyataḥ ||3853-1 astu svastyayanāya digdhanapate kailāsaśailāśraya- śrīkaṇṭhābharaṇenduvibhramadivānaktaṃbhramatk_oṃudī |  3853-2 yatrālaṃ nalakūbarābhisaraṇārambhāya rambhāsphuratpāṇḍimnaiva tanostanoti virahavyagrāpi veśagrahaṃ ||3854-1 aste śivā paścimāyāṃ paracakrabhayāya sā |  3854-2 śubhā kuberadiśyaste grāmāntaḥ śūnyakāriṇī ||3855-1 astokavismayamapasmṛtapūrvavṛttaṃ udbhūtanūtanabhayajvarajarjaraṃ naḥ |  3855-2 ekakṣaṇatruṭitasaṃghaṭitapramohaṃ ānandaśokaśabalatvamupaiti cetaḥ ||3856-1 astodayācalavilambiravīndubimba- vyājātkṣaṇaṃ śravaṇayornihitāravindā |  3856-2 tārācchalena kusumāni samutkṣipantī ||3858-1 astopadhānavinihita- ravibimbaśironikuñcitadigaṅgaḥ |  3858-2 vaste'ndhakārakambalaṃ ambaraśayane dinādhvanyaḥ ||3859-1 astyatraiva kilārṇave tadamṛtaṃ tatraiva hālāhalaḥ santyasminmalaye ||3861-1 astyapratisamādheyaṃ stanadvandvasya dūṣaṇaṃ |  3861-2 sphuṭatāṃ kañcukānāṃ yannāyātyāvaraṇīyatāṃ ||3862-1 astyuttarasyāṃ diśi devatātmā himālayo nāma nagādhirājaḥ |  3862-2 pūrvāparau astyevoddāmadāvānalavikalataraṃ kānanaṃ yatra tatra prauḍhottāpābhibhūtaṃ jagadapi sakalaṃ nirjalā eva nadyaḥ |  3866-2 kiṃ re nirlajja garjaṃ kalayasi bahuśastarjayanpānthabālāḥ parjanya tvāmamī kiṃ kvacidapi gaṇayantyambudatvena lokāḥ ||3867-1 astraṃ vimucya sakalaṃ prathamaprayoge bhūyo'pi hantumabalāṃ vihitodyamasya |  3867-2 puṣpāyudhasya vapureva tadīyamekaṃ lakṣyaṃ ca hanta śaradhiśca sthite'sminmama pitari gurau sarvadhanvīśvarāṇāṃ |  3869-2 karṇālaṃ saṃbhrameṇa vraja kṛpa samaraṃ muñca hārdikyaśaṅkāṃ tāte cāpadvitīye vahati raṇadhuraṃ ko bhayasyāvakāśaḥ ||3870-1 astraprayogakhuralīkalahe gaṇānāṃ sainyairvṛto'pi jita eva mayā kumāraḥ |  3870-2 etāvatāpi parirabhya kṛtaprasādaḥ prādādimaṃ priyaguṇo bhagavāngururme||3871-1 astravyastaśirastraśastrakaṣaṇaiḥ nijakuñjanirjharajalairjambālapiṇḍāyate ||3873-1 astrāmāsa tṛṇaṃ priyādruhi tṛṇāmāsa smarārerdhanurdārāmāsa muneḥ śilāpi nṛvarāmāsa svayaṃ pādukā |  3873-2 kulyāmāsa mahārṇavo'pi kapayo  3913-2 bahistvayālaṃkriyātamidānī- muro muraṃ vidviṣataḥ śriyeva ||3914-1 asmākamātmabhūrbhūtvā hantāsmāneva haṃsi yat |  3914-2 re re kandarpa tannityaṃ anaṅgatvaṃ sadāstu te ||3915-1 asmābhiścaturamburāśiraśanāvacchedinīṃ medinīṃ bhrāmyadbhirna sa ko'pi nistuṣaguṇo dṛṣṭo viśiṣṭo janaḥ |  3924-2 yasyāgre cirasaṃcitāni hṛdaye duḥkhāni saukhyāni vā saṃjalpya kṣaṇamekamardhamathavā ||3927-1 asmiṃste śirasi tadā kānte vaidūryasphaṭikasuvarṇāḍhye |  3927-2 śobhāṃ svāṃ na vahati tāṃ baddhā suśliṣṭā kuvalayamāleyaṃ ||3928-1 asmiñjagati mahatyapi kimapi na tadvastu vedhasā vihitaṃ |  3928-2 animittavatsalāyā bhavati yato māturupakāraḥ ||3929-1 asmiñjaḍe jagati ko nu bṛhatpramāṇa- karṇaḥ karī nanu bhavedduritasya pātraṃ |  3929-2 ityāgataṃ tamapi yo'linamunmamātha mātaṅga eva kimataḥparamucyate'sau ||3930-1 asmiñjarāmaraṇamṛtyumahātaraṅga- miśrodadhau mahati saṃparivartamānaḥ |  3930-2 puṇyaplavena sukṛtena narāstarantaḥ saṃprāpya tīramabhayaṃ sukhamāpnuvanti||3931-1 asminkaḥ prabhavedyogo hyasaṃdhārye'mitātmani |  3931-2 laṅghane kaḥ samarthaḥ syādṛte devaṃ maheśvaraṃ ||3932-1 asminkarīndrakaranirgalitāravinda- kandānukāriṇi ciraṃ rucicakravāle |  3932-2 kasmai phalāya kulaṭākulakoṭih_oṃaṃ haṃho mṛgāṅka kuruṣe karuṇāmapāsya ||3933-1 asminkāle tu yadyuktaṃ tadidānīṃ vidhīyatāṃ |  3933-2 gataṃ tu nānuśocanti gataṃ tu gatameva hi ||3934-1 asminkuñje vināpi pracalati pavanaṃ vartate ko'pi nūnaṃ paśyāmaḥ kiṃ na gatvetyanusarati gaṇe bhītabhīte'rbhakāṇāṃ |  3934-2 tasminrādhāsakho vaḥ sukhayatu vilasankrīḍayā kaiṭabhārirvyātanvāno mṛgāriprabalavuraghurārāvaraudroccanādān ||3935-1 asminkuṭilakalloladolāvikṣobhite'mbhasi |  3935-2 hāsyahetuḥ kathaṃ setuḥ sikatāmuṣṭibhirbhavet ||3936-1 asminkelivane sugandhapavane krīḍatpuraṃdhrījane guñjadbhṛṅgakule viśālabakule kūjatpikīsaṃkule |  3936-2 unmīlannavapāṭalāparimale mallīprasūnākule yadyekāpi na mālatī vikasitā tatkiṃ na ramyo madhuḥ ||3937-1 asmindigvijayodyate patirayaṃ me stāditi dhyāyati kampaṃ sāttvikabhāvañcati ripukṣoṇīndradārā dharā |  3937-2 asyaivābhimukhaṃ nipatya samare yāsyadbhirūrdhvaṃ nijaḥ panthā bhāsvati dṛśyate bilamayaḥ pratyarthibhiḥ pārthivaiḥ ||3938-1 asminnaktamaharvivekavikale kālādhame nīradaiḥ saṃnaddhairabhito niruddhagaganābhogāsu digbhittiṣu |  3938-2 bhānorna prasarantu nāma kiraṇāḥ kiṃ tvasya tejasvinaḥ sattāmātraparigraheṇa vikasantyadyāpi padmākarāḥ ||3939-1 asminnagṛhyata pinākabhṛtā salīlaṃ ābaddhavepathuradhīravilocanāyāḥ |  3939-2 vinyastamaṅgalamahauṣadhirīśvarāyāḥ srastoragapratisareṇa naitasyeśvaramaulimaṇḍanamaṇergāyanti viśve yaśaḥ ||3941-1 asminna nirguṇaṃ gotre apatyamupajāyate |  3941-2 ākare padmarāgāṇāṃ janma kācamaṇeḥ kutaḥ ||3942-1 asminnambhodavṛndadhvanijanitaruṣi ||3943-1 asminnīṣadvalitavitatastokavicchinnabhugnaḥ kiṃcillīlopacitavibhavaḥ puñjitaścotthitaśca |  3943-2 dhūmodgārastaruṇamahiṣaskandhanīlo davāgneḥ svairaṃ sarpansṛjati gagane gatvarānpatrabhaṅgān ||3944-1 asminparasparadveṣaparuṣe puruṣāyuṣe |  3944-2 kevalaṃ madhurā vāṇī dadātyānīya sauhṛdaṃ ||3945-1 asminprakīrṇapaṭavāsakṛtāndhakāre dṛṣṭo manāṅmaṇivibhūṣaṇaraśmijālaiḥ|  3945-2 pātālamudyataphaṇākṛtiśṛṅgako'yaṃ māmadya saṃsmarayatīva bhujaṅgalokaḥ ||3946-1 asminprakṛtimanojñe lagnā prāyeṇa mānmathī dṛṣṭiḥ |  3946-2 sundari yato bhavatyāḥ pratikṣaṇaṃ kṣīyate madhyaḥ ||3947-1 asminbhūvalaye janasya mahimā bhāgyena saṃjāyate no tatrāsti hi kāraṇaṃ prayatatā naivātha kaścidguṇaḥ |  3947-2 kākāyāśucibhojine hi vitaratyuccaistu 3988-2 tatpātotpātatālakramanamitadṛśastāṇḍavottālatālī- lālityāllobhitāḥ smaḥ pratipadamamunā kandukakrīḍitena ||3989-1 asyāṅke kaṣapaṭṭabhāsicapalā śrīḥ svarṇarekhāyate dhārāsāraghanaṃ ||3995-1 asyā mukhaṃ himarucirnanu yadvidhātrā saṃpūrya sarvamavaśeṣatayātra muktaḥ |  3995-2 āśyānatāmupagato'sya rucā cakāsti nāsāgramauktikamiṣādamṛtasya binduḥ ||3996-1 asyā |  4001-2 praṣṭavyāḥ khalu yūyameva yadi ko'pyastaṃ gate bhāsvati prauḍaḥadhvāntapayodhimagnajagatīhastāvalambakṣamaḥ ||4002-1 asyā yadaṣṭādaśa saṃvibhajya vidyāḥ śrutī dadhraturardhamardhaṃ |  4002-2 karṇāntarutkīrṇagabhīrarekhaḥ kiṃ tasya saṃkhyaiva navā navāṅkaḥ ||4003-1 asyā yadāsyena purastiraśca tiraskṛtaṃ śītarucāndhakāraṃ |  4003-2 sphuṭasphuradbhaṅgikacacchalena tadeva saṃgrāmeṣu nijāṅgulīmayamahāsiddhauṣadhīvīrudhaḥ parvāsye viniveśya jāṅgulikatā yairnāma nālambitā ||4011-1 asyāstanimā madhye prathimā kucayordṛśośca cāñcalyaṃ |  4011-2 ūrvoḥ krameṇa vṛtto- virahatāṇḍavaraṅgabhūmau svedodabindukusumāñjalimāvikīrya|  4013-2 nāndīṃ papāṭha pṛthuvepathuvepamāna- kāñcīlatākalaravaiḥ smarasūtradhāraḥ ||4014-1 asyāstuṅgamiva stanadvayamidaṃ nimneva nābhiḥ sthitā dṛśyante viṣamonnatāśca valayo bhittau samāyāmapi |  4014-2 aṅge ca pratibhāti mārdavamidaṃ snigdhasvabhāvaściraṃ premṇā manmukhacandramīkṣata iva smereva vaktīti ca ||4015-1 asyāstrāṇamaho viyogaduritādasmāsu kṛtvā kṛtī svairaṃ gacchasi tattu kiṃ vimṛśasi trāsāvahaṃ hanta naḥ |  4015-2 vācāleṣu dineṣu kokilarutairutpañcamaprakramaiḥ sajyotsnāsu ca yāminīṣvaśaraṇāḥ kiṃ nāma kurmo vayaṃ ||4016-1 asyaikasyāpi kāyasya sahajā asthikhaṇḍakāḥ |  4016-2 pṛthakpṛthaggamiṣyanti kimutānyaḥ priyo janaḥ ||4017-1 asyaiva rambhoru tāvananasya dṛśaiva saṃjīvitamanmathasya |  4017-2 vanaṃ vidhātā nanu nīrajānāṃ nīrājanārthaṃ kimu nirmimīte ||4018-1 asyaiva sargāya bhavatkarasya sarojasṛṣṭirmama hastalekhaḥ |  4018-2 ityāha dhātā hariṇekṣaṇāyāṃ kiṃ hastalekhīkṛtayā tayāsyāṃ ||4019-1 asyodarasya pratitulyaśobhaṃ nāstīti dhātrā bhuvanatraye'pi |  4019-2 saṃkhyānarekhā iva saṃprayuktāstisro virejurvalayaḥ sudatyāḥ ||4020-1 asyorvīramaṇasya pārvaṇavidhudvairājyasajjaṃ yaśaḥ sarvāṅgojjvalaśarvaparvatasitaśrīgarvanirvāsi yat |  4020-2 tatkambupratibimbitaṃ kimu śaratparjanyarājiśriyaḥ paryāyaḥ kimu dugdhasindhupayasāṃ sarvānuvādaḥ kimu ||4021-1 asraṃ locanakoṇa eva kṛpaṇadravyāyate sarvadā kaṇṭhe kākuvacaḥ prasuptakamalakroḍasthabhṛṅgāyate |  4021-2 hā rāvo hṛdaye viyogikulajākāmābhilāṣāyate vaidehīvirahajvaro raghupaterāpākatāpāyate ||4022-1 asramajasraṃ moktuṃ dhiṅnaḥ karṇāyate nayane |  4022-2 draṣṭavyaṃ paridṛṣṭaṃ tatkaiśoraṃ vrajastrībhiḥ ||4023-1 asrasrotastaraṅgabhramiṣu taralitā māṃsapaṅke luṭhantaḥ sthūlāsthigranthibhaṅgairdhavalabisalatāgrāsamākalpayantaḥ |  4023-2 māyāsiṃhasya śaureḥ sphuradaruṇahṛdambhojasaṃśleṣabhājaḥ pāyāsurdaityavakṣaḥsthalakuharasarorājahaṃsā nakhā vaḥ ||4024-1 asrākṣīnnavanīlanīrajadalopāntātisūkṣmāyata- tvaṅmātrāntaritāmiṣaṃ yadi vapurnaitatprajānāṃ patiḥ |  4024-2 pratyagrakṣaradasravisrapiśitagrāsagrahaṃ gṛhṇato gṛdhradhvāṅkṣavṛkāṃstanau nipatataḥ ko vā kathaṃ vārayet ||4025-1 asvatantrāḥ striyaḥ kāryāḥ puruṣaiḥ svairdivāniśaṃ |  4025-2 viṣayeṣu ca sajjantyaḥ saṃsthāpya hyātmano vaśe ||4026-1 asvādhyāyaḥ pikānāṃ madanamakhasamārambhaṇasyādhimāso nidrāyā janmalagnaṃ kimapi madhulihāṃ ko'pi durbhikṣakālaḥ |  4026-2 ṛṣṭiryātrotsukānāṃ malayajamarutāṃ pānthakāntākṛtāntaḥ prāleyonmūlamūlaṃ samajani samayaḥ kaścidautpātiko'yaṃ ||4027-1 ahaṃkāra kvāpi vraja vṛjina he mā tvamiha bhūrabhūmirdarpāṇāmahamapasara tvaṃ piśuna he |  4027-2 are krodha sthānāntaramanusarānanyamanasāṃ trilokīnātho naḥ sphurati hṛdi devo harirasau ||4028-1 ahaṃkāro dhiyaṃ brūte mainaṃ suptaṃ prabodhaya |  4028-2 utthite paramānande na tvaṃ nāhaṃ na vai jagat ||4029-1 ahaṃ kimambā kimabhīṣṭatāpade taveti māturdhuri tātapṛcchayā |  4029-2 pralobhyatulyaṃ tanīyānatik_oṃalaśca stanadvayaṃ voḍhumalaṃ na tāvat |  4033-2 itīva tatsaṃvahanārthamasyā valitrayaṃ puṣyati madhyabhāgaḥ ||4034-1 ahaṃ tāvanmahārāje pitṛtvaṃ nopalakṣaye |  4034-2 bhrātā bhartā ||4039-1 ahaṃbhāvātyayo jātu sukaro na kathaṃcana |  4039-2 cetanāyāmahambhāvo bhautikyāṃ vijitaḥ sakṛt |  4039-3 ādhyātmikyāṃ punaścaiṣa sphītaḥ sphurati no'grataḥ ||4040-1 ahaṃ mametyeva ||4046-1 ahaṃ hi saṃmato rājño ya evaṃ manyate kudhīḥ |  4046-2 balīvardaḥ sa vijñeyo viṣāṇaparivarjitaḥ ||4047-1 ahanyahani boddhavyaṃ kimadya sukṛtaṃ kṛtaṃ |  4047-2 dattaṃ vā dāpitaṃ vāpi patantī jāhnavī naḥ punātu ||4112-1 ahiriva janayogaṃ sarvadā varjayedyaḥ kuṇamiva vasu nārīṃ tyaktakāmo virāgī |  4112-2 viṣamiva viṣayārthānmanyamāno durantāñjayati paramahaṃso muktibhāvaṃ sameti ||4113-1 ahirbiḍālo jāmātā eḍakā ca saputriṇī |  4113-2 ātmabhāgyaṃ na paśyanti bhāgineyastu pañcamaḥ ||4114-1 ahīnakālaṃ rājārthaṃ svārthaṃ priyahitaiḥ saha |  4114-2 parārthaṃ deśakāle ca brūyāddharmārthasaṃhitaṃ ||4115-1 ahīnabhujagādhīśavapurvalayakaṅkaṇaṃ |  4115-2 śailādinandicaritaṃ kṣatakandarpadarpakaṃ ||4116-1 vṛṣapuṃgavalakṣmāṇaṃ śikhipāvakalocanaṃ |  4116-2 sasarvamaṅgalaṃ n_oṃi pārvatīsakhamīśvaraṃ ||4117-1 ahīndrānpātālādviṣamiva nimajjyoddharati yaḥ ya āruhya svargaṃ kavalayati sendrānsuragaṇān |  4117-2 mahīṃ bhrāntvā bhrāntvā raghunalanṛpā yena vijitāḥ sa mṛtyuḥ kālaṃ na kṣamata iti mā kārṣṭa manasi ||4118-1 ahṛtahṛdayāḥ santaḥ satyaṃ bravīmi niśamyatāṃ vipinamadhunā gatvā vāso mṛgaiḥ saha kalpyatāṃ |  4118-2 sujanacaritadhvaṃsinyasminkhalodayaśālini prabhavati kalau nāyaṃ kālo gṛheṣu bhavādṛśāṃ ||4119-1 ahetuḥ pakṣapāto yastasya nāsti pratikriyā |  4119-2 sa hi snehātmakastanturantarbhūtāni sīvyati ||4120-1 ahetu bhrūkuṭiṃ naiva sadā kurvīta pārthivaḥ |  4120-2 vinā doṣeṇa yo bhṛtyānrājā dharmeṇa pālayet ||4121-1 aheriva guṇādbhīto miṣṭānnādyā viṣādiva |  4121-2 rākṣasībhya iva strībhyaḥ sa vidyāmadhigacchati ||4122-1 aho anaucitīyaṃ te hṛdi śuddhe'pyaśuddhavat |  4122-2 aṅkaḥ khalairivākalpi nakhaistīkṣṇamukhairmama ||4123-1 aho ahaṃ namo mahyaṃ yadahaṃ vīkṣito'nayā |  4123-2 bālayā trastasāraṅgacapalāyatanetrayā ||4124-1 aho ahīnāmapi lehanaṃ syādduḥkhāni nūnaṃ nṛpasevanāni |  4124-2 eko'hinā daṣṭamupaiti mṛtyuṃ kṣmāpena daṣṭastu sagotramitraḥ ||4125-1 aho ahobhirna kalervidūyate sudhāsudhārāmadhuraṃ pade pade |  4125-2 dine dine candanacandraśītalaṃ yaśo yaśo dātanayasya gīyate ||4126-1 aho ahobhirmahimā himāgame-'pyabhiprapede prati tāṃ smarārditāṃ |  4126-2 tapartupūrtāvapi medasāṃ bharā vibhāvarībhirvibharāṃbabhūvire ||4127-1 aho aiśvaryamattānāṃ mattānāmiva mānināṃ |  4127-2 asaṃbaddhā giro rūkṣāḥ kaḥ sahetānuśāsitā ||4128-1 aho kathamasīmedaṃ himanāma vijṛmbhate |  4128-2 caratyeva sahasrāṃśau dhavalaṃ timirāntaraṃ ||4129-1 aho kanakamāhātmyaṃ vaktuṃ kenāpi śakyate |  4129-2 nāmasāmyādaho citraṃ dhattūro'pi madapradaḥ ||4130-1 aho kālasya sūkṣmo'yaṃ ko'pyalakṣyakramaḥ kramaḥ |  4130-2 yatpākapariṇāmena sarvaṃ yātyanyarūpatāṃ ||4131-1 aho kimapi te śuddhaṃ yaśaḥkusumamudgataṃ |  4131-2 yasyāyamamṛtasyandī bālendurbāhyapallavaḥ ||4132-1 aho kuṭilabuddhīnāṃ durgrāhyamasatāṃ manaḥ |  4132-2 anyadvacasi kaṇṭhe'nyadanyadoṣṭhapuṭe sthitaṃ ||4133-1 aho kenedṛśī buddhirdāruṇā tava nirmitā |  4133-2 triguṇā śrūyate buddhirna tu dārumayī kvacit ||4134-1 aho khalabhujaṃgasya vicitro'yaṃ vadhakramaḥ |  4134-2 anyasya daśati śrotraṃ anyaḥ prāṇairviyujyate ||4135-1 aho khalabhujaṃgasya viparīto vadhakramaḥ |  4135-2 karṇe lagati cānyasya prāṇairanyo viyujyate ||4136-1 aho guṇāḥ s_oṃyatā ca vidvattā janma satkule |  4136-2 dāridryāmbudhimagnasya sarvametanna śobhate ||4137-1 aho guṇānāṃ prāptyarthaṃ yatante bahudhā naraḥ |  4137-2 muktā yadarthaṃ bhagnāsyā itareṣāṃ ca kā kathā ||4138-1 aho tama ivedaṃ syānna prajñāyeta kiṃcana |  4138-2 rājā cenna bhavelloke vibhajansādhvasādhunī ||4139-1 aho'tinirmohi janasya citraṃ paraṃ caritraṃ gadituṃ na yogyaṃ |  4139-2 mukhe hi cānyaddhṛdi bhāvamanyatdevo na jānāti kuto manuṣyaḥ ||4140-1 aho'tibalavaddaivaṃ vinā tena mahātmanā |  4140-2 yadasāmarthyayukte'pi nīcavarge jayapradaṃ ||4141-1 aho tṛṣṇāveśyā sakalajanatāmohanakarī vidagdhā mugdhānāṃ harati vivaśānāṃ śamadhanaṃ |  4141-2 vipaddīkṣādakṣāsahataralatāraiḥ praṇayinī- kaṭākṣaiḥ kūṭākṣaiḥ kapaṭakuṭilaiḥ kāmakitavaḥ ||4142-1 aho dānamaho vīryaṃ aho dhairyamakhaṇḍitaṃ |  4142-2 udāravīradhīrāṇāṃ hariścandro nidarśanaṃ ||4143-1 aho divyaṃ cakṣurvahasi tava sāpi
