duḥkhakaro'vamanyate ||4146-1 aho durantā saṃsāre bhogatṛṣṇā yayā hṛtāḥ |  4146-2 anaucityādakīrteśca devā api na bibhyati ||4147-1 aho durjasaṃsargānmānahāniḥ pade pade |  4147-2 pāvako lohasaṅgena mudgarairabhihanyate ||4148-1 aho durjanasarpasya sarpasya mahadantaraṃ |  4148-2 karṇamanyasya daśati anyaḥ prāṇairviyujyate ||4149-1 aho dainyamaho kaṣṭaṃ pārakyaiḥ kṣaṇabhaṅguraiḥ |  4149-2 yannopakuryādasvārthairmartyaḥ svajñātivigrahaiḥ ||4150-1 aho dhanamadāndhastu paśyannapi na paśyati |  4150-2 yadi paśyatyātmahitaṃ sa paśyati na saṃśayaḥ ||4151-1 aho dhanānāṃ mahatī vidagdhatā sukhoṣitānāṃ kṛpaṇasya veśmani |  4151-2 vrajanti na tyāgadaśāṃ na bhogyatāṃ parāṃ ca kāṃcitprathayanti nirvṛtiṃ ||4152-1 aho dhanuṣi naipuṇyaṃ manmathasya mahātmanaḥ |  4152-2 śarīramakṣataṃ kṛtvā bhinattyantargataṃ manaḥ ||4153-1 aho dhātrā puraḥ sṛṣṭaṃ sāhasaṃ tadanu striyaḥ |  4153-2 naitāsāṃ duṣkaraṃ kiṃcinnisargādiha vidyate ||4154-1 aho dhārṣṭyamasādhūnāṃ nindatāmanaghāḥ striyaḥ |  4154-2 muṣṇatāmiva caurāṇāṃ tiṣṭha caureti jalpatāṃ ||4155-1 aho nakṣatrarājasya sābhimānaṃ viceṣṭitaṃ |  4155-2 parikṣīṇasya vakratvaṃ saṃpūrṇasya suvṛttatā ||4156-1 aho nu kaṣṭaṃ satataṃ pravāsaṃ tato'tikaṣṭaḥ paragehavāsaḥ |  4156-2 kaṣṭādhikā nīcajanasya sevā tato'tikaṣṭā dhanahīnatā ca ||4157-1 aho nu citraṃ padmotthairbaddhāstantubhiradrayaḥ |  4157-2 avidyamānā yāvidyā tayā sarve vaśīkṛtāḥ ||4158-1 aho pūrṇaṃ saraḥ spaṣṭaṃ asi nātra vicāraṇā |  4158-2 luṭhantastvayi yatsarve snānti jātu kathaṃcana ||4159-1 aho prakṛtisādṛśyaṃ śleṣmaṇo vāgdevyā yanmātaṃgadivākaraḥ |  4161-2 śrīharṣasyābhavatsabhyaḥ samo bāṇamayūrayoḥ ||4162-1 aho pramādī bhagavānprajāpatiḥ kṛśātimadhyā ghaṭitā mṛgekṣaṇā |  4162-2 yadi pramādādanilena bhajyate kathaṃ punaḥ śakṣyati kartumīdṛśaṃ ||4163-1 aho bata khalaḥ puṇyairmūrkho'pyaśrutapaṇḍitaḥ |  4163-2 svaguṇodīraṇe śeṣaḥ paranindāsu vākpatiḥ ||4164-1 aho bata mahatkaṣṭaṃ viparītamidaṃ jagat |  4164-2 yenāpatrapate sādhurasādhustena tuṣyati ||4165-1 aho bata vicitrāṇi caritāni mahātmanāṃ |  4165-2 lakṣmīṃ tṛṇāya manyante tadbhāreṇa namanti ca ||4166-1 aho bata sabhā sabhyairiyaṃ maunādadhaḥ kṛtā |  4166-2 santo vadanti yatsatyaṃ sabhāṃ na praviśanti vā ||4167-1 aho bata saritpateridamanāryarūpaṃ paraṃ yadujjvalarucīnmaṇīnsuciracarcitāsthāguṇān |  4167-2 jaḍairanupayogibhiḥ 4172-2 gāyanti yatratyajanā murāreḥ karmāṇi bhadrāṇyavatāravanti ||4173-1 aho madāvalepo'yaṃ asārāṇāṃ durātmanāṃ |  4173-2 kauravāṇāṃ mahīpatvaṃ asmākaṃ kila kālajaṃ ||4174-1 aho mahaccitramidaṃ 4180-2 girāṃ devī sadyaḥ śrutikalitakalhārakalikā- madhūlīmādhuryaṃ kṣipati paripūrtyai bhagavatī ||4181-1 aho mohaḥ puṃsāmiha jagati jātiḥ kila śubhā jarāmṛtyuvyādhīnapi jayati yā niṣprabhatayā |  4181-2 parasmājjātānāṃ vyasanaśatamete'pi dadhati svayaṃ sutvā tebhyo vidiśati sutānsā viśasituṃ ||4182-1 aho moho varākasya kākasya yadasau puraḥ |  4182-2 sarīsarti narīnarti yadayaṃ  4187-2 rātriḥ svapnāya bhūtānāṃ ceṣṭāyai karmaṇāmahaḥ ||4188-1 aho rūpamaho rūpaṃ aho mukhamaho mukhaṃ |  4188-2 aho madhyamaho madhyaṃ asyāḥ sāraṅgacakṣuṣaḥ ||4189-1 aho vidhātastvamatīva bāliśo snehapāśo nijasargavṛddhaye svayaṃ kṛtaste tamimaṃ vivṛścasi ||4191-1 aho vidhātrā hatakena nārthātkṛto viyogo'pi viyogināṃ naḥ |  4191-2 rathāṅganāmnāmiva yena sīmā na vidyate nāpi sapakṣavattvaṃ ||4192-1 aho viśālaṃ bhūpāla bhuvanatritayodaraṃ |  4192-2 māti mātumaśakyo'pi yaśorāśiryadatra te ||4193-1 aho viṣādapyadhikāḥ striyo raktavimānitāḥ |  4193-2 aho asevyāḥ sādhūnāṃ dolālolā ca kamalā rogābhogagehaṃ dehaṃ ||4196-1 aho saṃsṛtiveśyeyaṃ rāgādyuddīpanodyatā |  4196-2 rasamutpādya sarveṣāṃ ante vairasyakāriṇī ||4197-1 aho satsaṃgatirloke kiṃ pāpaṃ na vināśayet |  4197-2 na dadāti sukhaṃ kiṃ vā narāṇāṃ puṇyakarmaṇāṃ ||4198-1 aho samudragambhīradhīracittamanasvinaḥ |  4198-2 kṛtvāpyananyasāmānyaṃ ullekhaṃ nodgiranti ye ||4199-1 aho sāhajikaṃ prema dūrādapi virājate |  4199-2 cakoranayanadvandvaṃ āhlādayati candramāḥ ||4200-1 aho susadṛśī vṛttistulākoṭeḥ khalasya ca |  4200-2 stokenonnatimāyāti stokenāyātyadhogatiṃ ||4201-1 aho strīpreraṇā nāma rajasālaṅghitātmanāṃ |  4201-2 puṃsāṃ vātyeva sarasāmāśayakṣobhakāriṇī ||4202-1 aho sthiraḥ ko'pi tavepsito yuvā cirāya karṇotpalaśūnyatāṃ gate |  4202-2 upekṣate yaḥ ślathabandhalambinīrjaṭāḥ kapole kalamāgrapiṅgalāḥ ||4203-1 aho sthairyaṃ teṣāṃ prakṛtiniyamebhyaḥ sukṛtināṃ pratijñātatyāgo nahi bhavati kṛcchre'pi mahati |  4203-2 tathā hi tvatsenābharanamitadhātrībharadalat- kaṭāho'pi svāṅgaṃ kimu kamaṭhanāthaścalayati ||4204-1 aho hi me bahvaparāddhamāyuṣā yadapriyaṃ vācyamidaṃ mayedṛśaṃ |  4204-2 ta eva dhanyāḥ suhṛdaḥ parābhavaṃ jagatyadṛṣṭvaiva hi ye kṣayaṃ gatāḥ ||4205-1 ahau vā hāre vā balavati ripau vā suhṛdi vā maṇau vā loṣṭe vā kusumaśayane vā dṛṣadi vā |  4205-2 tṛṇe vā straiṇe vā mama samadṛśo yāntu divasāḥ kvacitpuṇye'raṇye śiva śiva śiveti pralapataḥ ||4206-1 ahnastriścaturambubhiḥ snapayasi svaṃ puṣkarāvarjitairbhuṅkṣe medhyatarāṇi bhadra taruṇānyaśvatthapatrāṇi ca |  4206-2 puṇyāraṇyacaro'si na praviśasi grāmaṃ sakṛtkuñjara jñānaṃ cetkiyadapyudeti na samā brahmarṣayo'pi tvayā ||4207-1 ahni bhāskaramicchanti rātrāvamṛtatejasaṃ |  4207-2 ahni rātrau ca rājānaṃ icchanti guṇinaṃ prajāḥ ||4208-1 ahni ravirdahati tvaci vṛddhaḥ puṣpadhanurdahati prabaloḍhaṃ |  4208-2 rātridinaṃ punarantaramantaḥ saṃvṛtirasti raverna tu kantoḥ ||4209-1 āṃ jñātaṃ nṛpate tvameva nikhilāṃ nityaṃ bibharṣi kṣitiṃ śailendrāḥ svayameva durbharabharāstaiḥ pratyutādho vrajet |  4209-2 asyāścoddharaṇe kṣamo'pi na parastvatto varāhādikaḥ paśvāderbharaṇakriyānipuṇatā naiva prabhāgocaraḥ ||4210-1 āḥ kaṣṭaṃ vanavāsisāmyakṛtayā siddhāśramaśraddhayā pallīṃ bālakuraṅga saṃprati kutaḥ prāpto'si mṛtyormukhaṃ |  4210-2 yatrānekakuraṅgakoṭikadanakrīḍollasallohita- srotobhiḥ paripūrayanti parikhāmuḍḍāmarāḥ pāmarāḥ ||4211-1 āḥ kaṣṭaṃ suvivekaśūnyahṛdayaiḥ saṃsargamāptaṃ ca tairvikrītaṃ badaraiḥ samaṃ kṣititale kugrāmasīmni sphuṭaṃ |  4211-2 saṃviṣṭaṃśaṭhagāḍhamūḍhavadane dhūtkāradūrīkṛtaṃ kiṃ jānātyaguṇo jano guṇamato muktāphalaṃ roditi ||4212-1 āḥ kaṣṭamapraḥṛṣṭāḥ śiṣṭā api vittacāpalāviṣṭāḥ |  4212-2 adhyāpayanti vedānādāya cirāya māsi māsi bhṛtiṃ ||4213-1 āḥ kimarthamidaṃ cetaḥ satāmambhodhidurbharaṃ |  4213-2 iti krudheva durvedhāḥ paraduḥkhairapūrayat ||4214-1 āḥ pākaṃ na karoṣi pāpini kathaṃ pāpī tvadīyaḥ pitā raṇḍe jalpasi kiṃ tavaiva jananī raṇḍā tvadīyā svasā |  4214-2 nirgaccha tvaritaṃ gṛhādbahirito nedaṃ tvadīyaṃ gṛhaṃ hā hā nātha mamādya dehi maraṇaṃ jārasya bhāgyodayaḥ ||4215-1 āḥ pātrī syāmakṛtakaghanapremavisphāritānāṃ savrīḍānāṃ sakalakaraṇānandanāḍiṃdhamānāṃ |  4215-2 teṣāṃ caramācalamūlacumbī paṅkeruhaprakarajāgaraṇapradīpaḥ ||4217-1 āḥ sīte patigarvavibhramabharabhrāntabhramadbāndhava- pradhvaṃsasmitakāntimattava tadā jātaṃ yadetanmukhaṃ |  4217-2 saṃpratyeva caturānanena śete kilātra bhagavānaravindanābhaḥ ||4219-1 ākaṇṭhārpitakañcukāñcalamuro hastāṅgulīmudraṇā- mātrāsūtritahāsyamāsyamalasāḥ pañcālikākelayaḥ |  4219-2 tiryaglocanaceṣṭitāni vacasāṃ kākaḥ kiṃ kramelakaḥ ||4370-1 āgacchāgaccha sajjaṃ kuru varaturagaṃ saṃnidhehi drutaṃ me khaṅgaḥ kvāsau kṛpāṇīmupanaya dhanuṣā kiṃ kimaṅga praviṣṭaṃ |  4370-2 saṃrambhonnidritānāṃ kṣitibhṛti gahane'nyo'nyamevaṃ pratīcchanvādaḥ svapnābhidṛṣṭe tvayi cakitadṛśāṃ vidviṣāmāvirāsīt ||4371-1 āgacchāmi jhaṭityahaṃ priyatame kāryaṃ vidhāyālpakaṃ gatvetastvamihaiva tiṣṭha vijane tāvadgṛhe sundare |  4371-2 ityuktvā sakhi vañcakaḥ sa tu gatastatra sthitā yā niśā sarvā sā hi gatā mamātikuṭilo no vai tathāpyāgataḥ ||4372-1 āgataṃ vigrahaṃ vidvānupāyaiḥ praśamaṃ nayet |  4372-2 vijayasya hyanityatvādrabhasena na saṃpatet ||4373-1 āgataḥ patiritīritaṃ janaiḥ śṛṇvatī cakitametya dehalīṃ |  4373-2 k_oṃudīva śiśirīkariṣyate locane mama kadā mṛgekṣaṇā ||4374-1 āgataḥ pāṇḍavāḥ sarve āgataśca gataścaiva gatvā yaḥ punarāgataḥ |  4376-2 akarṇahṛdayo mūrkhastatraiva nidhanaṃ gataḥ ||4377-1 āgatānagaṇitapratiyātānvallabhānabhisisārayiṣūṇāṃ |  4377-2 prāpi cetasi savipratisāre |  4379-2 tiṣṭhatāsya sarasīruhacakṣuḥ khañjanena cakitaṃ sahasaiva ||4380-1 āgatya praṇipātasāntvitasakhīdattāntare sāgasi svairaṃ kurvati talpapārśvanibhṛte dhūrte'ṅgasaṃvāhanaṃ |  4380-2 jñātvā sparśavaśāttayā kila sakhībhrāntyā svavakṣaḥ śanaiḥ khinnāsītyabhidhāya mīlitadṛśā sānandamāropitaḥ ||4381-1 āgatya saṃprati viyogavisaṃṣṭhulāṅgīṃ ambhojinīṃ kvacidapi kṣapitatriyāmaḥ |  4381-2 etāṃ ||4384-1 āgatyaiva kutaścideva gaganābhogaṃ ca kṛtvātmasātbhāvābhāvavilokanāspadamamūnnītvendumukhyānapi |  4384-2 jājvalyaṃ jagato vidhāya kimapi prāptaḥ priyo'hnāṃ patiryātvastaṃ vrajasundarīstanataṭīsāmrājyamujjṛmbhate ||4460-1 ācīrṇamaśubhaṃ karma dvijā bhogāya kalpate |  4460-2 aveṣṭitagalo nāgaḥ kimadaṣṭvā hi gacchati ||4461-1 ācumbitaṃ kāmivareṇa harṣātsakāmavāmācibukaṃ manojñaṃ |  4461-2 śṛṅgārasatsaṃpuṭapadmamadhye bhṛṅgābhidhaḥ (?)korakavadvibhāti ||4462-1 ācumbya bimbādharamaṅgavallīṃ āliṅgya saṃspṛśya kapolapāliṃ |  4462-2 guṇaśca vāridaravaḥ karmāpi vārikriyā ||4465-1 ācchādayasi kiṃ mugdhe vastreṇādharapallavaṃ |  4465-2 khaṇḍitā eva śobhante vīrādharapayodharāḥ ||4466-1 ācchāditāyatadigambaramuccakairgāṃ ākramya 4468-2 hṛṣyadbhiḥ paricumbitaṃ nayanayornyastaṃ hṛdi sthāpitaṃ sīmante nihitaṃ kathaṃcana tataḥ karṇāvataṃsīkṛtaṃ ||4469-1 ācchidya lakṣmīmita eva pūrvaṃ atraiva visrambhasukhaprasuptaḥ |  4469-2 ||4475-1 ā janmanaḥ kuśalamaṇvapi re kujanmanpāṃso tvayā yadi kṛtaṃ vada tattvametat |  4475-2 utthāpito'syanalasārathinā yadarthaṃ duṣṭena tatkuru kalaṅkaya viśvametat ||4476-1 ā janmanaḥ 4530-2 kopoparāgajanitāṃ tu mukhendubimbe hartuṃ kṣamo yadi paraṃ karuṇāmayi syāt ||4531-1 ātāmrāḥ kiraṇā ravernavadalatvakpallavāḥ pādapāḥ vallyastārakatulyakāntisumanaḥsaurabhyasaṃbhāvitāḥ |  4531-2 vātyasminmadhumattaṣaṭpadapadavyādhūtacūtadruma- prāgbhāraprapatatparāgapaṭalāmodī maruddākṣiṇaḥ ||4532-1 ātāmrābhā roṣabhājaḥ kaṭāntādāśūtkhāte mārgaṇe dhūrgatena |  4532-2 niścyotantī dhikko veda manaḥ striyā iti girā ruṣṭāṃ priyāṃ bhīṣayaṃstasyāstatkṣaṇakātarekṣaṇaparispṛṣṭo hariḥ pātu vaḥ ||4535-1 ātāmrau pūjitāvoṣṭhau lelihānau mṛdutvacau |  4535-2 jihvā raktā ca tanvī ca tālu ātithye rantidevasya madhuparkaṃ gavāṃ śataṃ ||4538-1 ātithye śrāddhayajñeṣu devayātrotsaveṣu ca |  4538-2 mahājane ca siddhārtho na gacchedyogavitkvacit ||4539-1 āturasya kuto nidrā āture ca pitā vaidyaḥ svasthībhūte ca bāndhavaḥ |  4541-2 gate roge kṛte svāsthye vaidyo bhavati pālakaḥ ||4542-1 āture niyamo nāsti bāle vṛddhe tathaiva ca |  4542-2 parācārarate caiva eṣa dharmaḥ sanātanaḥ ||4543-1 āttamāttamadhikāntamukṣituṃ kātarā śapharaśaṅkinī jahau |  4543-2 añjalau jalamadhīralocanā locanapratiśarīralāñchitaṃ ||4544-1 ātte vāsasi roddhumakṣamatayā doḥkandalībhyāṃ stanau tasyoraḥsthalamuttarīyaviṣaye sadyo mayā sañjitaṃ |  4544-2 śroṇīṃ tasya kare'dhirohati punarvrīḍāmbudhau māmatho majjantīmudatārayanmanasijo devaḥ sa mūrcchāguruḥ ||4545-1 ātte sīmantaratne marakatini hṛte hematāṭaṅkapatre luptāyāṃ mekhalāyāṃ jhaṭiti maṇitulākoṭiyugme gṛhīte |  4545-2 śoṇaṃ bimboṣṭhakāntyā tvadarimṛgadṛśāmitvarīṇāmaraṇye rājanguñjāphalānāṃ sraja iti śabarā naiva hāraṃ haranti ||4546-1 ātmakāryaṃ mahākāryaṃ parakāryaṃ na kevalaṃ |  4546-2 ātmakāryasya doṣeṇa kūpe patati mānavaḥ ||4547-1 ātmacchandena vartante nāryo manmathacoditāḥ |  4547-2 na ca dahyanti gacchantyaḥ sutaptairapi pāṃsubhiḥ ||4548-1 ātmacchidraṃ na jānāti paracchidrāṇi paśyati |  4548-2 śvacchidraṃ yadi jānāti paracchidraṃ na paśyati ||4549-1 ātmajanmāspadaṃ vaṃśaṃ kāmaṃ dahana vāryase |  4549-2 kiṃ tu saṃnihitānetāṇapyagne kiṃ dahasyaho ||4550-1 ātmajādiparikleśaṃ ātmanyāropya mūḍhadhīḥ |  4550-2 pratikartumaśakto'pi vārddhakye śocate paraṃ ||4551-1 ātmajñaḥ śaucavāndāntastapasvī vijitendriyaḥ |  4551-2 dharmakṛdvedavidyāvitsāttviko devayonitāṃ ||4552-1 ātmajñānaṃ samārambhastitikṣā dharmanityatā |  4552-2 yamarthānnāpakarṣanti sa vai paṇḍita ucyate ||4553-1 ātmajñānamanāyāsastitikṣā dharmanityatā |  4553-2 vākcaiva guptā dānaṃ ca naitānyantyeṣu bhārata ||4554-1 ātmajñānī yato dhanyo madhyaḥ pitṛpitāmahaiḥ |  4554-2 mātṛpakṣeṇa mātrā ca ||4643ā-1 ātmānamākhyāti hi karmabhirnaraḥ svaśīlacāritrakṛtaiḥ śubhāśubhaiḥ |  4643ā-2 pranaṣṭamapyātmakulaṃ tathā naraḥ punaḥ prakāśaṃ kurute svakarmabhiḥ ||4644-1 ātmānamātmanā vetsi samadhitiṣṭhati |  4650-2 saṃyogādātmamanasoḥ pravṛttirupajāyate ||4651-1 ātmābhidhaṃ sukhamanantamakhaṇḍamekaṃ yajñādikarmajanitena sukhena tulyaṃ |  4651-2 mā brūhi karma sukhadaṃ tadapīti buddhyā ratnākarasya sadṛśaṃ nu kulālakuṇḍaṃ ||4652-1 ātmā manaśca tadvidyairantaḥkaraṇamucyate |  4652-2 tābhyāṃ tu saprayatnābhyāṃ saṃkalpa upajāyate ||4653-1 ātmā buddhīndriyāṇyarthā bahiṣkaraṇamucyate |  4653-2 saṃkalpādhyavasāyābhyāṃ siddhirasya prakīrttitā ||4654-1 ubhe ete hi karaṇe yatnānantaryake smṛte |  4654-2 tasmātprayatnasaṃrodhādbhāvayennirmanaskatāṃ ||4655-1 ātmāyatte guṇagrāme nairguṇyaṃ vacanīyatā |  4655-2 daivāyatteṣu vitteṣu puṃsāṃ kā nāma vācyatā ||4656-1 ātmāyamātmani gato hṛdaye'tisūkṣmo grāhyo'calena manasā satatābhiyogāt |  4656-2 yo yaṃ vicintayati yāti sa tanmayatvaṃ yasmādataḥ subhagameva gatā yuvatyaḥ ||4657-1 ātmā yasya vaśe nāsti kutastasya pare janāḥ |  4657-2 ātmānaṃ vaśamānīya trailokyaṃ vartate vaśe ||4658-1 ātmā rakṣyaḥ prayatnena yuddhasiddhirhi cañcalā |  4658-2 te svāmivacanaṃ sarve pratigṛhya mahaujasaḥ ||4659-1 ātmārāmā vihitaratayo nirvikalpe samādhau jñānodrekādvighaṭitatamogranthayaḥ sattvaniṣṭhāḥ |  4659-2 yaṃ vīkṣante kamapi tamasāṃ jyotiṣāṃ vā parastāttaṃ mohāndhaḥ kathamayamamuṃ vettu devaṃ purāṇaṃ ||4660-1 ātmārthaṃ jīvaloke'sminko na jīvati mānavaḥ |  4660-2 paraṃ paropakārārthaṃ yo jīvati sa jīvati ||4661-1 ātmārthaṃ yaḥ paśūnhanyātso'vaśyaṃ narakaṃ vrajet |  4661-2 devānpitnsamabhyarcya khādanmāṃsaṃ na doṣabhāk ||4662-1 ātmārthaṃ yuktavittānāṃ mitramaṇḍalabhedināṃ |  4662-2 atilaṅghitalokānāṃ na bandhaḥ kenacitkvacit ||4663-1 ātmārthatvena hi preyānviṣayo na svataḥ priyaḥ |  4663-2 svata eva hi sarveṣāṃ ātmā priyatamo yataḥ |  4663-3 tata ātmā sadānando nāsya duḥkhaṃ kadācana ||4664-1 ātmārthe saṃtatistyājyā rājyaṃ ratnaṃ dhanaṃ tathā |  4664-2 api sarvasvamutsṛjya rakṣedātmānamātmanā ||4665-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  4665-2 ātmā vai yamito yena sa yamastu viśiṣyate ||4666-1 ātmā samastajagatāṃ bhavatīti samyagvijñāya yadvitanute tvayi bhāvabandhaṃ|  4666-2 sā bhaktirityabhimataṃ yadi siddhamiṣṭaṃ vyarthaṃ viśeṣyamalamastu viśeṣaṇaṃ naḥ ||4667-1 ātmā sahaiti manasā mana indriyeṇa svārthena cendriyamiti krama eṣa śīghraḥ |  4667-2 yogo'yameva manasaḥ kimagamyamasti yasminmano vrajati tatra gato'yamātmā ||4668-1 ātmāsti sarvajagatāṃ ādhāraḥ pūrvamiti vicintyaiva |  4668-2 paścāttattvavicāraḥ kuḍye satyeva citrakarma syāt ||4669-1 ātmā hi dārāḥ sarveṣāṃ dārasaṃgrahavartināṃ |  4669-2 ... ... ... ... ... ... ||4670-1 ātmīyaṃ caraṇaṃ dadhāti purato nimnonnatāyāṃ bhuvi svīyenaiva kareṇa karṣati taroḥ puṣpaṃ śramāśaṅkayā |  4670-2 talpe kiṃ ca mṛgatvacā viracite nidrāti bhāgairnijairantaḥpremabharālasāṃ priyatamāmaṅge dadhāno haraḥ ||4671-1 ātmaiva tātasya caturbhujasya jātaścaturdorucitaḥ smaro'pi |  4671-2 taccāpayoḥ karṇalate bhruvorjye vaṃśatvagaṃśau cipiṭe kimasyāḥ ||4672-1 ātmaiva devatāḥ sarvāḥ sarvamātmanyavasthitaṃ |  4672-2 ātmā hi janayatyeṣāṃ karmayogaṃ śarīriṇāṃ ||4673-1 ātmaiva bhāra iti taṃ tvayi yo nidhatte so'ṅgāni kāni kalayatvalasaḥ prapatteḥ |  4673-2 viśvatra sātra savilakṣaṇalakṣaṇāyā visrambhasaṃpadiyameva samastamaṅgi ||4674-1 ātmaiva yadi nātmānaṃ ahitebhyo nivārayet |  4674-2 ko'nyo hitakarastasmādātmānaṃ vārayiṣyati ||4675-1 ātmaiva hyātmanaḥ sākṣī gatirātmā tathātmanaḥ |  4675-2 māvamaṃsthāḥ svamātmānaṃ nṛṇāṃ sākṣiṇamuttamaṃ ||4676-1 ātmaiva hyātmano bandhurātmaiva ripurātmanaḥ |  4676-2 ātmaiva cātmanaḥ sākṣī kṛtasyāpyakṛtasya ca ||4677-1 atmodayaḥ parajyānirdvayaṃ nītiritīyatī |  4677-2 tadūrīkṛtya kṛtibhirvācaspatyaṃ pratīyate ||4678-1 ātmopakāracaturā narā na gaṇayanti gurukulakleśaṃ |  4678-2 vedhavyathaiva kiyatī śravaso hyavataṃsabhūṣaṇīyasya ||4679-1 ātmopamaśca bhūteṣu yo vai bhavati pūruṣaḥ |  4679-2 nyastadaṇḍo jitakrodhaḥ sa pretya sukhamedhate ||4680-1 ātmaupamyena yo vetti durjanaṃ satyavādinaṃ |  4680-2 sa eva vañcyate tena brāhmaṇāśchāgato yathā ||4681-1 ātmyaupamyena sarvatra samaṃ paśyati yo'rjuna |  4681-2 sukhaṃ vā yadi vā duḥkhaṃ sa yogī paramo mataḥ ||4682-1 ādadānaḥ pratidinaṃ kalāḥ samyaṅmahīpatiḥ |  4682-2 śuklapakṣe pravicaranśaśāṅka iva varddhate ||4683-1 ādaraṃ rājasadasi dhanena labhate naraḥ |  4683-2 subhaṭaḥ śatrusaṃgrāme vikrameṇa yathā jayaṃ ||4684-1 ādaraṇīyaguṇā sakhi mahatā nihitāsi tena śirasi tvaṃ |  4684-2 tava lāghavadoṣo'yaṃ saudhapatākeva yaccalasi ||4685-1 ādareṇa yathā stauti dhanavantaṃ dhanecchayā |  4685-2 tathā cedviśvakartāraṃ ko na mucyeta bandhanāt ||4686-1 ādareṇārjavenaiva śauryāddānena vidyayā |  4686-2 pratyutthānābhigamanairānandasmitabhāṣaṇaiḥ |  4686-3 upakāraiḥ svāśayena vaśīkuryājjagatsadā ||4687-1 ā darśanātpraviṣṭā sā me suralokasundarī hṛdayaṃ |  4687-2 bāṇena makaraketoḥ kṛtamārgamavandhyapātena ||4688-1 ādarśāya śaśāṅkamaṇḍalamidaṃ harmyāya hemācalaṃ dīpāya dyumaṇiṃ mahīmiva kathaṃ no bhikṣave dattavān |  4688-2 ditsāpallavitapramodasalilavyākīrṇanetrāmbujo jānīmo bhṛgunandanastadakhilaṃ na prāyaśo dṛṣṭavān ||4689-1 ādātavyaṃ na dātavyaṃ priyaṃ brūyannirarthakaṃ |  4689-2 āśāṃ kālavatīṃ kuryātkālaṃ vighnena yojayet ||4690-1 ādātuṃ sakṛdīkṣite'pi kusume hastāgramālohitaṃ lākṣārañjanavārtayāpi sahasā raktaṃ talaṃ pādayoḥ |  4690-2 aṅgānāmanulepanasmaraṇamapyatyantakhedāvahaṃ hantādhīradṛśaḥ kimanyadalakāmodo'pi bhārāyate ||4691-1 ādānaṃ caiva tūṇīrātsaṃdhānaṃ karṣaṇaṃ tathā |  4691-2 kṣepaṇaṃ ca tvarāyukto bāṇasya kurute tu yaḥ |  4691-3 nityābhyāsavaśāttasya śīghrasaṃdhānatā bhavet ||4692-1 ādānapānalepaiḥ kāścidgaralopatāpahāriṇyaḥ |  4692-2 sadasi sthitaiva siddhau- ṣadhivallī kāpi jīvayati ||4693-1 ādānamapriyakaraṃ dānaṃ ca priyakārakaṃ |  4693-2 abhīpsitānāmarthānāṃ kāle yuktaṃ praśasyate ||4694-1 ādāya karamāḍhyebhyaḥ kīkaṭeṣvapi varṣasi |  4694-2 prapīya vāri sindhubhyaḥ sthaleṣviva ghanāghanaḥ ||4695-1 ādāya cāpamacalaṃ kṛtvāhīnaṃ guṇaṃ viṣamadṛṣṭiḥ |  4695-2 yaścitramacyutaśaro lakṣyamabhāṅkṣīnnamastasmai ||4696-1 ādāya daṇḍaṃ sakalāsu dikṣu yo'yaṃ paribhrāmyati bhānubhikṣuḥ |  4696-2 abdhau nimajjanniva tāpaso'yaṃ saṃdhyābhrakāṣāyamadhatta sāyaṃ ||4697-1 ādāya dhanamanalpaṃ dadānayā subhaga tāvakaṃ vāsaḥ |  4697-2 mugdhā rajakagṛhiṇyā kṛtā dinaiḥ katipayairniḥsvā ||4698-1 ādāya patraṃ tvaritaṃ yadi śvā dūrvāṃ navāṃ vā navag_oṃayaṃ vā |  4698-2 prayāti yātuḥ paratastadānīṃ rājaprasādaṃ niyataṃ bravīti ||4699-1 ādāya pratipakṣakīrtinivahānbrahmāṇḍamūṣāntare nirvighnaṃ dhamatā nitāntamuditaiḥ svaireva tejo'gnibhiḥ |  4699-2 tattādṛkpuṭapākaśodhitamiva prāptaṃ guṇotkarṣiṇāṃ piṇḍasthaṃ ca mahattaraṃ ca bhavatā niḥkṣāratāraṃ yaśaḥ ||4700-1 ādāya māṃsamakhilaṃ stanavarjamaṅgānmāṃ muñca vāgurika yāmi kuru prasādaṃ |  4700-2 sīdanti śaṣpakavalagrahaṇānabhijñā manmārgavīkṣaṇaparāḥ śiśavo madīyāḥ ||4701-1 ādāya vakulagandhānandhīkurvanpade pade bhramarān |  4701-2 ayameti mandamandaṃ kāverīvāripāvanaḥ pavanaḥ ||4702-1 ādāya vāri paritaḥ saritāṃ mukhebhyaḥ kiṃ tāvadarjitamanena durarṇavena |  4702-2 kṣārīkṛtaṃ ca vaḍavādahane hutaṃ ca pātālakukṣikuhare viniveśitaṃ ca ||4703-1 ādāya vāri yata eva jahāti bhūyastatraiva yaḥ sa jaladaḥ prathamo jaḍānāṃ |  4703-2 vāntaṃ pratīpsati tadeva tadeva yastu srotaḥpatiḥ sa nirapatrapasārthavāhaḥ||4704-1 ādāya viprasvamapi nāśayedrājyaghātinaḥ |  4704-2 ādāyāsthi dadhīcestu śakro daityānjaghāna hi ||4705-1 ādāyādāya muktāstadanu śikhidhiyādāya māṇikyavargaṃ dhūmabhrāntiṃ vahantyaḥ svavadanakamalāmodalubdhālivṛnde |  4705-2 paktuṃ bhillyaḥ pravṛttāḥ sarabhasamasakṛdyaddviṣatpattaneṣu brūmaḥ kiṃ kīrtipūraṃ dhavalitavasudhaṃ mallaśāhasya tasya ||4706-1 ādāyāmṛtapūrṇamarkacaṣakaṃ śoṇāravindaprabhe pāṇāvindravadhūrvilokya ca punastasminnabhaḥśyāmikāṃ |  4706-2 cikṣepopari kopataḥ parijane'saṃśodhya dattā sudhetyenaṃ taṃ śaśinaṃ praśaṃsati janastatpāṇimuktārjunaṃ ||4707-1 ādāvaghaṭitaṃ kāryaṃ madhye sughaṭitaṃ mama |  4707-2 bhūyo vighaṭitaṃ bhūyo bhūyādghaṭayituṃ prabhuḥ ||4708-1 ādāvaṅkuritaṃ punaḥ pratipadaṃ patrāvṛtaṃ tvāṃ mudā saurabhyasphuritaprasūnakalitaṃ dṛṣṭvātha hṛṣṭo'smyahaṃ |  4708-2 kiṃ brūmaḥ phalite tvayi drutataraṃ hā hanta kimpāka he bhūyo vyākulayanti kaṇṭakabharāḥ sarvatra tatkiṃ bruve ||4709-1 ādāvañjanapuñjaliptavapuṣāṃ śvāsānilollāsita- protsarpadvirahānalena ca tataḥ saṃtāpitānāṃ dṛśāṃ |  4709-2 saṃpratyeva niṣekamaśrupayasā devasya cetobhuvo bhallīnāmiva pānakarma kurute kāmaṃ kuraṅgekṣaṇā ||4710-1 ādāvapyupacāracāṭuvinayālaṃkāraśobhānvitaṃ madhye cāpi vicitravākyakusumairabhyarcitaṃ niṣphalaiḥ |  4710-2 paiśunyāvinayāvamānamalinaṃ bībhatsamante ca yaddūre vo'stvakulīnasaṃgatamasaddharmārthamutpāditaṃ ||4711-1 ādāvādipitāmahasya niyamavyāpārapātre jalaṃ paścātpannagaśāyino bhagavataḥ pādodakaṃ pāvanaṃ |  4711-2 bhūyaḥ śambhujaṭāvibhūṣaṇamaṇirjahnormaharṣeriyaṃ kanyā kalmaṣanāśinī bhagavatī bhāgīrathī dṛśyate ||4712-1 ādāvāyuḥ parīkṣeta paścāllakṣaṇamuttamaṃ |  4712-2 āyurhīnanarāṇāṃ ca lakṣaṇaiḥ kiṃ prayojanaṃ ||4713-1 ādāvutsṛjya kāryāṇi paścācca prārthayanti ye |  4713-2 te loke hāsyatāṃ yānti palāṇḍuharaṇādiva ||4714-1 ādāveva gajendramaulivilasaddaṇḍā patākāvalī paścādvāraṇarājadhoraṇiratiproddāmayodhāśritā |  4714-2 uddaṇḍadhvajalāñchitāpyatha ghanībhūtā rathānāṃ tatistatpaścātturagāvalī vijayate yodhaiḥ samaṃ sarvataḥ ||4715-1 ādāveva manuṣyeṇa vartitavyaṃ yathā kṣamaṃ |  4715-2 yathā nātītamarthaṃ vai paścāttāpena yujyate ||4716-1 ādikavī caturāsyau kamalajavalmīkajau vande |  4716-2 lokaślokavidhātroryayorbhidā leśamātreṇa ||4717-1 āditāmajananāya dehināṃ antatāṃ ca dadhate'napāyine |  4717-2 bibhrate bhuvamadhaḥ sadātha ca brahmaṇo'pyupari tiṣṭhate namaḥ ||4718-1 āditālo jayantaḥ syācchṛṅgārarasasaṃyutaḥ |  4718-2 rudrasaṃkhyākṣarapadairāyurvṛddhikaraḥ paraḥ |  4718-3 eka eva laghuryasminnāditālaḥ sa kathyate ||4719-1 ādityacandrahariśaṃkaravāsavādyāḥ śaktā na jetumatiduḥkhakarāṇi yāni |  4719-2 tānīndriyāṇi balavanti sudurjayāni ye nirjayanti bhuvane balinasta eke ||4720-1 ādityacandrāvanijajñajīvaḥ śukrārkaputrā api rāhuketū |  4720-2 kurvantu nityaṃ dhanadhānyasauṣṭhyaṃ dīrghāyurārogyaśubhānyamī vaḥ ||4721-1 ādityacandrāvanilānalau ca dyaurbhūmirāpo hṛdayaṃ yamaśca |  4721-2 ahaśca rātriśca ubhe ca sandhye dharmaśca jānāti narasya vṛttaṃ ||4722-1 ādityasya gatāgatairaharahaḥ saṃkṣīyate jīvitaṃ vyāpārairbahukāryabhāragurubhiḥ kālo na vijñāyate |  4722-2 dṛṣṭvā janmajarāvipattimaraṇaṃ trāsaśca notpadyate pītvā mohamayīṃ pramādamadirāmunmattabhūtaṃ jagat ||4723-1 ādityasya namaskāraṃ ye kurvanti dine dine |  4723-2 janmāntarasahasreṣu dāridryaṃ nopajāyate ||4724-1 ādityasyodayo gānaṃ tāmbūlaṃ bhāratīkathā |  4724-2 iṣṭā bhāryā sumitraṃ ca apūrvāṇi dine dine ||4725-1 ādityāḥ kiṃ daśaite pralayabhayakṛtaḥ svīkṛtākāśadeśāḥ kiṃ volkāmaṇḍalāni tribhuvanadahanāyodyatānīti bhītaiḥ |  4725-2 pāyāsurnārasiṃhaṃ vapuramaragaṇairbibhrataḥ śārṅgapāṇerdṛṣṭā dṛptāsurorastaladaraṇagaladraktaraktā nakhā vaḥ ||4726-1 ādityādapi nityadīptamamṛtaprasyandi candrādapi trailokyābharaṇaṃ maṇerapi tamaḥkāṣaṃ hutāśādapi |  4726-2 viśvāloki vilocanādapi parabrahmasvarūpādapi svāntānandanamastu dhāma jagatastoṣāya sārasvataṃ ||4727-1 ādityādigrahāḥ sarve nakṣatrāṇi ca rāśayaḥ |  4727-2 āyuḥ kurvantu te nityaṃ yasyaiṣā janmapatrikā ||4728-1 ādityādyā grahāḥ sarve yathā tuṣyanti dānataḥ |  4728-2 sarvasve'pi na tuṣyeta jāmātā daśamo grahaḥ ||4728ā-1 ādityāya tamaḥ sṛṣṭaṃ meghāya grīṣmaśoṣaṇaṃ |  4728ā-2 mārgaśramastu vṛkṣāya duḥkhinastūpakāriṇe ||4729-1 ādityo'yaṃ sthito mūḍhāḥ snehaṃ kuruta mā bhayaṃ |  4729-2 bahurūpo muhūrtaśca jīvetāpi kadācana ||4730-1 ādimatsyaḥ sa jayatādyaḥ śvāsocchvāsitairjalaiḥ |  4730-2 gagane vidadhe'mbhodhiṃ gaganaṃ ca mahodadhau ||4731-1 ādimadhyanidhaneṣu sauhṛdaṃ sajjane bhavati netare jane |  4731-2 chedatāpananigharṣatāḍanairnānyabhāvamupayāti kāñcanaṃ ||4732-1 ādimadhyāntarahitaṃ daśāhīnaṃ purātanaṃ |  4732-2 advitīyamahaṃ vande madvastrasadṛśaṃ hariṃ ||4733-1 ādimadhyāvasāne ca naiva gacchati vikriyāṃ |  4733-2 ata eva kulīnānāṃ nṛpāḥ kurvanti saṃgrahaṃ ||4734-1 ādirājayaśobimbaṃ ādarśaṃ prāpya vāṅmayaṃ |  4734-2 teṣāmasaṃnidhāne'pi na svayaṃ paśya naśyati ||4735-1 ādīptavahnisadṛśairmarutāvadhūtaiḥ sarvatra kiṃśukavanaiḥ kusumāvanamraiḥ |  4735-2 sadyo vasantasamayena samāgateyaṃ raktāṃśukā navavadhūriva bhāti bhūmiḥ ||4736-1 ādīrgheṇa calena vakragatinā tejasvinā yoginā nīlābjadyutināhinā varamahaṃ dṛśyo na taccakṣuṣā |  4736-2 daṣṭe santi cikitsakā diśi diśi prāyeṇa dharmārthino mugdhākṣīkṣaṇavīkṣitasya nahi me vaidyo na cāpyauṣadhaṃ ||4737-1 ādūrātpratipānthamāhitadṛśaḥ pratyāśayonmīlati dhvānte svāntamaharvyaye'pi na parāvṛttaṃ kuraṅgīdṛśaḥ |  4737-2 tasyā niḥsahabāhuvallivigaladdhammillavadbhaṅgura- grīvaṃ dīrghamajīvavatpriyasakhīvargeṇa nītaṃ vapuḥ ||4738-1 ādṛtakupitabhavānī- kṛtakaramālādibandhanavyasanaḥ |  4738-2 kelikalākalahādau devo vaḥ śaṃkaraḥ pāyāt ||4739-1 ādṛtā nakhapadaiḥ parirambhāścumbitāni ghanadantanipātaiḥ |  4739-2 saukumāryaguṇasaṃbhṛtakīrtirvāma eva surateṣvapi kāmaḥ ||4740-1 ā dṛṣṭiprasarātpriyasya padavīmudvīkṣya nirviṇṇayā viśrānteṣu pathiṣvahaḥpariṇatau dhvānte samutsarpati |  4740-2 gatvaikaṃ saśucā gṛhaṃ prati padaṃ pānthastriyāsminkṣaṇe mā bhūdāgata ityamandavalitagrīvaṃ punarvīkṣitaṃ ||4741-1 ādeyasya pradeyasya kartavyasya ca karmaṇaḥ |  4741-2 kṣipramakriyamāṇasya kālaḥ pibati tadrasaṃ ||4742-1 ādehadāhaṃ kusumāyudhasya vidhāya saundaryakathādaridraṃ |  4742-2 tvadaṅgaśilpātpunarīśvareṇa cireṇa jāne jagadanvakampi ||4743-1 ādau kulaṃ parīkṣeta tato vidyāṃ tato vayaḥ |  4743-2 śīlaṃ dhanaṃ tato rūpaṃ deśaṃ paścātvivāhayet ||4744-1 ādau gṛhītapāṇiḥ paścādārūḍhajaghanakaṭibhāgā |  4744-2 nakhamukhalālanasukhadā sā kiṃ rāmāsti naiva bhoḥ pāmā ||4745-1 ādau citte tataḥ kāye satāṃ saṃjāyate jarā |  4745-2 asatāṃ ca punaḥ kāye naiva citte kadācana ||4746-1 ādau chāyātidīrghāpi prācyāmalpatarā tataḥ |  4746-2 tathā maitryasatāmādau dīrghāpyalpatarā bhavet ||4747-1 ādau taddhitakṛtsnehaṃ kāryaṃ snehamanantaraṃ |  4747-2 kṛtvā sadharmavādaṃ ca madhyasthaḥ sādhayeddhitaṃ ||4748-1 ādau tanvyo bṛhanmadhyā vistāriṇyaḥ pade pade |  4748-2 yāyinyo na nivartante satāṃ maitryaḥ saritsamāḥ ||4749-1 ādau tāto varaṃ paśyettato vittaṃ tataḥ kulaṃ |  4749-2 yadi kaścidvare doṣaḥ kiṃ dhanena kulena kiṃ ||4750-1 ādau tāvadvyāpārasthā yamavaruṇadhanadasadṛśā bhavantyatigarvitā mānonmattā darpotsiktāḥ paribhavaharaṇaniratā bhavantyatidāruṇāḥ |  4750-2 bhraṣṭāstebhyo vyāpārebhyo hatinigaḍaniyatacaraṇāstathā laguḍārditā lambaiḥ kūrcairdīnairvaktrairmunaya iva śamadamaratā bhavantyatibhadrakāḥ ||4751-1 ādau tu mandamandāni madhye samarasāni ca |  4751-2 ante snehāyamānāni saṃgatānyuttamaiḥ saha ||4752-1 ādau tu ramaṇīyāni madhye tu virasāni ca |  4752-2 ante vairāyamāṇāni saṃgatāni khalaiḥ saha ||4753-1 ādau darśayati natiṃ yāntī yāntī samunnatiṃ dhatte |  4753-2 anukūlāpi varāhī cireṇa tucchaṃ phalaṃ dhatte ||4754-1 ādau dharme pramāṇaṃ vividhavidhibhidāśeṣatāṃ ca prayuktiṃ paurvāparyādhikārau tadanu bahuvidhaṃ cātideśaṃ tathohaṃ |  4754-2 bādhaṃ tantraṃ prasaṅgaṃ nayamanayaśataiḥ samyagālocayadbhyo bhinnā mīmāṃsakebhyo vidadhati bhuvi ke sādaraṃ vedarakṣāṃ ||4755-1 ādau namaskṛtiḥ paścādāśaṃsāvacanāni ca |  4755-2 subhāṣitapraśaṃsā ca kavikāvyastutistataḥ ||4756-1 ādau namrastatahstabdhaḥ kāryakāle ca niṣṭhuraḥ |  4756-2 kṛte kārye punarnamraḥ śiśnatulyo vaṇigjanaḥ ||4757-1 ādau namrāḥ punarvakrāḥ svīyakāryeṣu tatparāḥ |  4757-2 kāryānte ca punarvakrāḥ kāṇvāstu prāṇaghātakāḥ ||4758-1 ādau na vāpraṇayināṃ praṇayo vidheyo datto'thavā pratidinaṃ paripoṣaṇīyaḥ |  4758-2 utkṣipya yatkṣipati tatprakaroti lajjāṃ bhūmau sthitasya patanādbhayameva nāsti ||4759-1 ādau necchati nojjhati smarakathāṃ vrīḍāvimiśrālasā madhye hrīparivarjitābhyuparame lajjāvinamrānanā |  4759-2 bhāvairnaikavidhaiḥ karotyabhinayaṃ bhūyaśca yā sādarā buddhvā puṃprakṛtiṃ yānucarati glānetaraiśceṣṭitaiḥ ||4760-1 ādau patravicitritaḥ punarasau mugdhaprasūnāṅkitaḥ paścātsnigdhaphalodgame ghanarasaiḥ sikto mayā sarvataḥ |  4760-2 dānonmattadurantavāraṇakaṭīsaṃghaṭṭanaiḥ kevalaṃ so'yaṃ ghūrṇita eva daivavaśato mākandabhūmīruhaḥ ||4761-1 ādau premakaṣāyitā haramukhavyāpāralolā śanairvrīḍābhāravidhūrṇitā mukulitā dhūmodgamavyājataḥ |  4761-2 patyuḥ saṃmilitā dṛśā sarabhasavyāvartanavyākulā pārvatyāḥ pariṇītimaṅgalavidhau dṛṣṭiḥ śivāyāstu vaḥ ||4762-1 ādau budhyeta paṇitaḥ paṇamānaśca kāraṇaṃ |  4762-2 tato vitarkyobhayato mataḥ śreyastato vrajet ||4763-1 ādau majjanacīrahāratilakaṃ netrāñjanaṃ kuṇḍalaṃ nāsāmauktikamālatīvikaraṇaṃ jhaṃkārakaṃ nūpuraṃ |  4763-2 aṅge candanacarcitaṃ maṇigaṇaḥ kṣudrāvalirghaṇṭikā tāmbūlaṃ karakaṅkaṇaṃ caturatā śṛṅgārakāḥ ṣoḍaśa ||4764-1 ādau mātā guroḥ patnī brahmaṇī rājapatnikā |  4764-2 dhenurdhātrī tathā pṛthvī saptaitā mātaraḥ smṛtāḥ ||4765-1 ādau ||4766-1 ādau yādonivāsoktiḥ pārāvāravaroktayaḥ |  4766-2 kṣīranīranidheruktirnadyuktirjāhnavyuktayaḥ ||4767-1 ādau raktaṃ punā raktaṃ madhya ujjvalabhāsvaraṃ |  4767-2 durnirīkṣyaprabhāvaṃ taṃ dṛśyaṃ draṣṭāramāśraye ||4768-1 ādau rājetyadhīrākṣi pārthivaḥ ko'pi gīyate |  4768-2 sanātanaśca naivāsau rājā nāpi sanātanaḥ ||4769-1 ādau rūpavināśinī kṛśakarī kāmasya vidhvaṃsinī prajñāmāndyakarī tapaḥkṣayakarī dharmasya nirmūlinī |  4769-2 putrabhrātṛkalatrabhedanakarī lajjāṅkuracchedinī sā māṃ pīḍati sarvadoṣajananī prāṇāpahantrī kṣudhā ||4770-1 ādau rūpavināśinī kṛśakarī kāmāṅkuracchedinī putrāmitrakalatrabhedanakarī garvāṅkuracchedinī |  4770-2 kāmaṃ mandakarī tapaḥkṣayakarī dharmasya nirmūlanī sā māṃ saṃprati sarvarogajananī prāṇāpahantrī kṣudhā ||4771-1 ādau lajjayati kṛtaṃ madhye paribhavati riktamavasāne |  4771-2 khalasaṃgatasya kathayata yadi susthitamasti kiṃcidapi ||4772-1 ādau varaṃ nirdhanatvaṃ dhanikatvamanantaraṃ |  4772-2 tathādau ākṛṣṭaṃ sahajābhijātyakalanātpremṇā purahpreritaṃ cakṣurbhūri kathaṃkathaṃcidagamatpreyāṃsameṇīdṛśaḥ ||4775-1 ādau veśyā punardāsī paścādbhavati kuṭṭinī |  4775-2 sarvopāyaparikṣīṇā vṛddhā nārī pañcajvalanamadhunā sevate yoginīva ||4778-1 ādyaḥ praveśasamayaḥ sa kaleryugasya prāptastiraskṛtabahūdakahaṃsasārthaḥ |  4778-2 āhūya sādaratayā tapaso'nti me'hni kāṇo dvijaḥ pratigṛhaṃ bata yatra vahnīnduvāyuvaruṇaputrau pitṛsamaprabhau ||4781-1 ādyādyasya guṇaṃ teṣāṃ avāpnoti paraḥ paraḥ |  4781-2 yo yo yāvatithaścaiṣāṃ sa sa tāvadguṇaḥ smṛtaḥ ||4782-1 ādyūnastamasāṃ  4789-2 turyaścāturyabhājāṃ visṛjati caturaḥ śrotrapānthaḥ pumarthānrāma tvannāmavarṇā jagati katipayaṃ kautukaṃ tanvate na ||4790-1 ā dvīpātparato'pyamī nṛpatayaḥ sarve samabhyāgatāḥ kanyeyaṃ ||4792-1 ādharmikaḥ kadaryo guṇavimukhaḥ paruṣavāganekamatiḥ |  4792-2 bhuṅkte saṃpadamīdṛgbrūta nṛkāraḥ kimasti daivaṃ vā ||4793-1 ādhātuṃ vinayaṃ nirāgasi nare kupyantu nāmeśvarāstena k_oṃalakarāmbujakelinālīṃ ālīsamājamadhikṛtya samālapantī |  4795-2 mandasmitena mayi sācivilokitena cetaścakoranayanā culukīcakāra ||4796-1 ādhāya dugdhakalaśe manthānaṃ śrāntadorlatā gopī |  4796-2 aprāptapārijātā daive doṣaṃ niveśayati ||4797-1 ādhāya drutamākṛterupaśamādviśvāsanaṃ saṃnidhau ekaikaṃ śapharaṃ bakoṭakapaṭācāryo jighṛkṣanmuhuḥ |  4797-2 audāsīnyanivedanāya nidadhaddikṣu |  4802-2 tvāṃ mātarjapato niraṅkuśanijādvaitāmṛtāsvādana- prajñāmbhaśculukaiḥ sphurantu pulakairaṅgāni tuṅgāni me ||4803-1 ādhikyādadharasudhā skhalediti prāptaśaṅkayā vidhinā |  4803-2 racitaṃ priyo vihāyādharamāyatākṣyāḥ papau cirāya pratiṣedhameva ||4809-1 ā dhūmādvinivartante suhṛdo bāndhavaiḥ saha |  4809-2 yena tatsaha gantavyaṃ tatkarma sukṛtaṃ kuru ||4810-1 ādhoraṇāṅkuśabhayātkarikumbhayugmaṃ jātaṃ payodharayugaṃ hṛdaye'ṅganānāṃ |  4810-2 tatrāpi vallabhanakhakṣatabhedabhinnaṃ naivānyathā bhavati yallikhitaṃ vidhātrā ||4811-1 ādhoraṇānāṃ gajasaṃnipāte śirāṃsi cakrairniśitaiḥ kṣurāgraiḥ |  4811-2 hṛtānyapi śyenanakhāgrakoṭi- vyāsaktakeśāni cireṇa petuḥ ||4812-1 ādhmātoddhatadāvavahnisuhṛdaḥ kīrṇoṣṇareṇūtkarāḥ mama cedanaucitī nirdayaṃ daśanadaṃśadāyinaḥ |  4815-2 śodhyate sudati vairamasya tatkiṃ tvayā vada vidaśya nādharaṃ ||4816-1 ānanāni hariṇīnayanānāṃ adbhutāni ca samīkṣya jagatyāṃ |  4816-2 lajjayeva ghanamaṇḍalalīno mandamandamahahendurudeti ||4817-1 ānanenduśaśalakṣma kapole sādaraṃ viracitaṃ tilakaṃ yat |  4817-2 tatpriye viracitāvadhibhaṅge dhautamīkṣaṇajalaistaralākṣyāḥ ||4818-1 ānanairvicakase hṛṣitābhirvallabhānabhi tanūbhirabhāvi |  4818-2 ārdratāṃ hṛdayamāpa ca roṣo lolati sma vacaneṣu vadhūnāṃ ||4819-1 ānandaṃ kumudādīnāṃ induḥ kandalayannayaṃ |  4819-2 laṅghayatyambarābhogaṃ hanūmāniva sāgaraṃ ||4820-1 ānandaṃ kṛtameva kairavakulaṃ prollāsito vāridhiḥ saṃtāpaṃ tapanopalasya śamitaḥ kāntyā diśo'laṃkṛtāḥ |  4820-2 etenābhyudayena candra bhavatā trailokyamāpyāyitaṃ kaivalyaṃ kamalasya daivaghaṭitaṃ nātrāpi nindyo bhavān ||4821-1 ānandaṃ dadhati mukhe karodakena śyāmāyā dayitatamena sicyamāne |  4821-2 īrṣyantyā vadanamasiktamapyanalpa- svedāmbusnapitamajāyatetarasyāḥ ||4822-1 ānandaṃ viduṣāṃ tanoti tanute karṇajvaraṃ vidviṣāṃ śrīmānādivarāhapādasarasījanma praṇāmaṃ muhuḥ |  4822-2 sadbandhurguṇasindhurandhalaguḍo dharmasya vartmāvaneḥ śrīmallakṣmaṇasenadakṣiṇabhujādaṇḍo'pi daṇḍe kaṭuḥ ||4823-1 ānandaṃ sadanaṃ sutāśca sudhiyaḥ kāntā na durbhāṣiṇī sanmitraṃ sudhanaṃ svayoṣiti ratiścājñāparāḥ sevakāḥ |  4823-2 ātithyaṃ śivapūjanaṃ pratidinaṃ miṣṭānnapānaṃ gṛhe sādhoḥ saṅgamupāsate ca satataṃ dhanyo gṛhasthāśramaḥ ||4824-1 ānandakandamakarandakarambitāni paṅkeruhāṇi parihṛtya samāgatastvaṃ |  4824-2 saurabhyasāri sahakāri tathā vidheyaṃ yenopahāsaviṣayo na bhaveddvirephaḥ ||4825-1 ānandakandamakhilaśrutisāramekaṃ adhyātmadīpamatidustaramañjanābhaṃ |  4825-2 ākṛṣya sāndrakucayoḥ parirabhya kāmaṃ saṃprāpya gopavanitā bata puṇyapuñjāḥ ||4826-1 ānandakāri madanajvaradarpahāri pīyūṣapaṅkaparihāsarasānukāri |  4826-2 premaprasāri paramābhyudayānukāri vāmabhruvāṃ harati kiṃ na mano vikāri||4827-1 ānanda kvacidañca muñca hṛdayaṃ cāturya dhairya tvayā stheyaṃ kveti vicāryatāṃ rasikate niryāhi paryākulā |  4827-2 raktāmbhojaparītaṣaṭpadanadatpakṣopamānakṣama- kṣubhyatpakṣmacalācalekṣaṇayugaṃ paśyāmi tasyā mukhaṃ ||4828-1 ānandajaḥ śokajamaśru bāṣpastayoraśītaṃ śiśiro bibheda |  4828-2 gaṅgāsarayvorjalamuṣṇataptaṃ himādrinisyanda ivāvatīrṇaḥ ||4829-1 ānandatāṇḍavapure draviḍasya gehe citraṃ vasiṣṭhavanitāsamamājyapātraṃ |  4829-2 vidyullateva parinṛtyati tatra darvī dhārāṃ vilokayati yogabalena siddhaḥ||4830-1 ānandadhāmani cidekarase'dvitīye tasminpade'stu mama cittamagocare'pi |  4830-2 yatsadvrajasthitijuṣāṃ suhṛdāṃ kumārā- dīnāmadhīnamiva gocaratāmupaiti ||4831-1 ānandabāṣpar_oṃāñcau yasya svecchāvaśaṃvadau |  4831-2 kiṃ tasya sādhanairanyaiḥ kiṃkarāḥ sarvapārthivāḥ ||4832-1 ānandamamandamimaṃ kuvalayadalalocane dadāsi tvaṃ |  4832-2 virahastvayaiva janitastāpayatitarāṃ śarīraṃ me ||4833-1 ānandamātramakarandamanantagandhaṃ yogīndrasusthiramilindamapāstabandhaṃ |  4833-2 vedāntasūryakiraṇaikavikāsaśīlaṃ herambapādaśaradambujamānato'smi ||4834-1 ānandamādadhatamāyatalocanānāṃ ānīlamāvalitakandharamāttavaṃśaṃ |  4834-2 āpādamā mukuṭamākalitāmṛtaughaṃ ākāramākalayatāmamumantaraṃ naḥ ||4835-1 ānandamiśramadanajvaradīpanāni gāḍhānurāgarasavanti tadā tadā ca |  4835-2 snehāṅkanāni mama mugdhadṛśaśca kaṇṭhe kaṣṭaṃ smarāmi tava tāni gatāgatāni ||4836-1 ānandamugdhanayanāṃ śriyamaṅkabhittau bibhratpunātu bhavato bhagavānnṛsiṃhaḥ|  4836-2 yasyāvalokanavilāsavaśādivāsīdutsannalāñchanamṛgaḥ kamalāmukhenduḥ ||4837-1 ānandamṛgadāvāgniḥ śīlaśākhimadadvipaḥ |  4837-2 jñānadīpamahāvāyurayaṃ khalasamāgamaḥ ||4838-1 ānandayati ko'tyarthaṃ sajjanāneva bhūtale |  4838-2 prabodhayati padmāni tamāṃsi ca nihanti kaḥ ||4839-1 ānandayati sattvāni yo hi maṅgalamañjuvāk |  4839-2 nindāmeṣyati loke saḥ paravākyanigūhakaḥ ||4840-1 ānandayantamaravindavanāni dhūpairudvejayantamasakṛnnavakairavāṇi |  4840-2 prakṣālayantamabhito bhuvanāni dhāmnā bhāsvantamantakamahaṃ vipadāṃ bhajāmi ||4841-1 ānandayanti madayanti viṣādayanti yūnāṃ manāṃsi tava yāni vilokanāni |  4841-2 kiṃ mantramāvahasi tādṛśamauṣadhaṃ vā kiṃ vā kṛśodari dṛśoriyameva rītiḥ ||4842-1 ānandayanti yuktyā tāḥ sevitā ghnanti cānyathā |  4842-2 durvijñeyāḥ prakṛtyaiva tasmādveśyā viṣopamāḥ ||4843-1 ānandasindhuraticāpalaśālicitta- saṃdānanaikasadanaṃ kṣaṇamapyamuktā |  4843-2 yā sarvadaiva bhavatā tadudantacintā tāntiṃ tanoti tava saṃprati dhigdhigasmān ||4844-1 ānandasundarapurandaramuktamālyaṃ maulau haṭhena nihitaṃ mahiṣāsurasya |  4844-2 pādāmbujaṃ bhavatu me vijayāya mañju- mañjīraśiñjitamanoharamambikāyāḥ ||4845-1 ānandastimitāḥ samādhiṣu mukhe gauryā vilāsālasāḥ saṃbhrāntāḥ kṣaṇamadbhutāḥ kṣaṇamatha smerā nije vaikṛte |  4845-2 krūrāḥ kṛṣṭaśarāsane manasije dagdhe ghṛṇākūṇitāstatkāntāruditeśrupūrataralāḥ śaṃbhordṛśaḥ pāntu vaḥ ||4846-1 ānandasrutirātmano nayanayorantaḥsudhābhyañjanaṃ prastāraḥ praṇayasya manmathataroḥ puṣpaṃ prasādo rateḥ |  4846-2 ālānaṃ hṛdayadvipasya viṣayāraṇyeṣu saṃcāriṇo daṃpatyoriha labhyate sukṛtataḥ saṃsārasāraḥ sutaḥ ||4847-1 ānandānatamīlitākṣiyugalaṃ kiṃ tvaṃ mudhā tiṣṭhasi jñāto'si prakaṭaprakampapulakairaṅgaiḥ sthitaṃ mugdhayā |  4847-2 muñcaināṃ jaḍa kiṃ na paśyasi galadvāṣpāmbudhautānanāṃ sakhyaivaṃ gadite vimucya rabhasātkaṇṭhe vilagno mayā ||4848-1 ānandāya ca vismayāya ca mayā dṛṣṭo'si duḥkhāya vā vaitṛṣṇyaṃ tu mamāpi saṃprati kutastvaddarśane cakṣuṣaḥ |  4848-2 tvatsāṃgatyasukhasya nāsmi viṣayastatkiṃ vṛthā vyāhṛtairasminviśrutajāmadagnyadamane pāṇau dhanurjṛmbhatāṃ ||4849-1 ānandāya satāṃ bhūyātsubhāṣitamidaṃ mama |  4849-2 pṛthakpaddhatisaṃmiśraparicchedairmanoramaṃ ||4850-1 ānandāśru pravṛttaṃ me kathaṃ dṛṣṭvaiva kanyakāṃ |  4850-2 akṣi me puṣparajasā vātoddhūtena dūṣitaṃ ||4851-1 ānandinī roditi vā nikāmaṃ yā duḥkhitā hāsyarasaṃ vidhatte |  4851-2 raktā viraktā viratā ratā ca durlakṣyacittā khalu vāṇinī yā ||4852-1 ānandena yaśodayā samadanaṃ gopāṅganābhiściraṃ sāśaṅkaṃ balavidviṣā sakusumaṃ siddhaiḥ pṛthivyākulaṃ |  4852-2 serṣyaṃ gopakumārakaiḥ sakaruṇaṃ pauraiḥ suraiḥ sasmitaṃ yo dṛṣṭaḥ sa punātu vo madhuripuḥ protkṣiptagovardhanaḥ ||4853-1 ānandodgatabāṣpapūrapihitaṃ cakṣuḥ kṣamaṃ nekṣituṃ bāhū sveditayaiva kampavidhurau śaktau na kaṇṭhagrahe |  4853-2 vāṇī sādhvasagadgadākṣarapadā saṃkṣobhalolaṃ manaḥ satyaṃ yatpriyasaṃgamo'pi sucirājjāto viyogāyate ||4854-1 ānandormivyatikaradarasmerasaṃsaktapakṣma premodgārapravaṇamasṛṇārecitasnigdhatāraṃ |  4854-2 antaścintābharaparicayākuñcitabhrūlatāntaṃ cakṣuśceto harati hariṇīlocanāyāḥ tadetat ||4855-1 ānamrāḥ stabakabhareṇa pallavinyaḥ śobhante kati na latāḥ parāgapūrṇāḥ |  4855-2 āmode madhuni ca mārdave ca tāsāṃ yo bhedaḥ sa khalu madhuvrataikavedyaḥ ||4856-1 ānamrāsyāḥ pihitavadanā cittamadhye nirīkṣye mānārambhaḥ sumukhi saphalo māmakīnaḥ kathaṃ syāt |  4856-2 yasyāṃ yasyāṃ diśi diśi mukhaṃ mānato'haṃ nayāmi tasyāṃ tasyāṃ sajalajaladaśyāmalo nandasūnuḥ ||4857-1 ānayati pathikataruṇaṃ hariṇa iha prāpayannivātmānaṃ |  4857-2 upakalamago'pi k_oṃala- kalamāvalikavalanottaralaḥ ||4858-1 ā nābheḥ sarasi natabhruvāvagāḍhe cāpalyādatha payasastaraṅgahastaiḥ |  4858-2 ucchrāyi stanayugamadhyarohi labdha- sparśānāṃ bhavati kuto'thavā vyavasthā ||4859-1 ānāmya phalinīṃ śākhāṃ pakvaṃ pakvaṃ praśātayet |  4859-2 phalārtho'yaṃ samārambho loke puṃsāṃ vipaścitāṃ ||4860-1 ānāyamiva matsyānāṃ pañjaraṃ śakuneriva |  4860-2 samastapāśaṃ mūḍhasya bandhanaṃ vāmalocanā ||4861-1 ānītā naṭavanmayā tava puraḥ śrīrāma yā bhūmikā vy_oṃākāśakhakhāṃbarābdhivasavastvatprītaye'dyāvadhi |  4861-2 prīto yarhi nirīkṣaṇāttvamadhunā yatprārthitaṃ dehi me no cedbrūhi kadāpi mānaya punarmāmīdṛśīṃ bhūmikāṃ ||4862-1 ānītā śayanāṅgane priyasakhīvṛndaiḥ kathaṃcicchalāccitrākrāntakuraṅgikeva vigalannetrāmbudhārātatiḥ |  4862-2 bāṣpodvāsamukhī vidhūnitakarā nikṣepitāṅghridvayā viṣvagvellitakuntalā navavadhūrbhāgyena saṃbhujyate ||4863-1 ānītairiṣukāra kāraṇamiha ślāghyaiḥ kimebhiḥ śaraiḥ prakhyātāmapi kiṃ na pāmarapurīmetāṃ puraḥ paśyasi |  4863-2 dātraṃ pātramiti bravīti kurute stotrāṇi totre rasaṃ dhatte yatra hale kutūhalamapi grāmīṇakagrāmaṇīḥ ||4864-1 ānīto malayācalānmalayajo ratnasthale ropitaḥ pīyūṣeṇa pariplutaḥ pratidinaṃ yatnena saṃvarddhitaḥ |  4864-2 ārabdhaṃ yadi tena saurabhabharairbhūmaṇḍalaṃ vāsituṃ tasminneva dine vidhātṛvaśato vajreṇa cūrṇīkṛtaḥ ||4865-1 ānīyate śarīreṇa kṣīṇo'pi vibhavaḥ punaḥ |  4865-2 vibhavaḥ punarānetuṃ śarīraṃ kṣīṇamakṣamaḥ ||4866-1 ānīlacūcukaśilīmukhamudgataika- r_oṃāvalīvipulanālamidaṃ priyāyāḥ |  4866-2 uttuṅgasaṃgatapayodharapadmayugmaṃ nābheradhaḥ kathayatīva mahānidhānaṃ ||4867-1 ānīlāṃ karapallavairapanayannacchāṃ ||4870-1 ānṛśaṃsyaṃ paro dharmaḥ kṣamā ca paramaṃ balaṃ |  4870-2 ātmajñānaṃ paraṃ jñānaṃ na satyādvidyate paraṃ ||4871-1 ānṛśaṃsyaṃ paro dharmaḥ sarvaprāṇabhṛtāṃ mataḥ |  4871-2 4881-2 smarasi puruṣāyitāṃ tāṃ smaracāmaracihnayaṣṭimiva ||4882-1 āndhratvamāndhrabhāṣā ca prābhākarapariśramaḥ |  4882-2 tatrāpi yājuṣī śākhā nālpasya tapasaḥ phalaṃ ||4883-1 āndhrī ||4884-1 ānvīkṣikīṃ trayīṃ vārtāṃ daṇḍanītiṃ ca pārthivaḥ |  4884-2 tadvidyaistatkriyopetaiścintayedvinayānvitaḥ ||4885-1 ānvīkṣikī trayī vārtā daṇḍanītiśca śāśvatī |  4885-2 vidyāścatasra evaitā lokasaṃsthitihetavaḥ || ...4886-1 ānvīkṣikyātmavijñānaṃ dharmādharmau trayīsthitau |  4886-2 arthānarthau tu vārtāyāṃ daṇḍanītyāṃ nayetarau ||4887-1 ānvīkṣikītrayīvārtāḥ satīrvidyāḥ pracakṣate |  4887-2 satyo'pi hi na satyastā daṇḍanītestu viplave ||4888-1 daṇḍanītiryadā samyaṅnetāramadhitiṣṭhati |  4888-2 tadā vidyāvidaḥ śeṣā vidyāḥ samyagupāsate || ...4889-1 ānvīkṣikyātmavidyā ānvīkṣikyāṃ tarkaśāstraṃ vedāntādyaṃ pratiṣṭhitaṃ |  4891-2 trayyāṃ dharmo hyadharmaśca kāmo'kāmaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ ||4892-1 ānvīkṣikyātmavijñānād_harṣaśokau vyudasyati |  4892-2 ubhau lokāvavāpnoti trayyāṃ tiṣṭhanyathāvidhi ||4893-1 āpahpavitraṃ prathamaṃ pṛthivyāṃ apāṃ pavitraṃ paramaṃ ca mantrāḥ |  4893-2 teṣāṃ ca sāmargyajuṣāṃ pavitraṃ maharṣayo vyākaraṇaṃ nirāhuḥ ||4894-1 āpajjalanimagnānāṃ hriyatāṃ vyasanormibhiḥ |  4894-2 vṛddhavākyairvinā nūnaṃ naivottāraṃ kathaṃcana ||4895-1 āpatkāle tu saṃprāpte yanmitraṃ mitrameva tat |  4895-2 vṛddhikāle tu saṃprāpte bandhūnāṃ jīvanto'pīha mṛtatulyāḥ ||4900-1 āpatsamuddharaṇadhīradhiyaḥ pareṣāṃ jātā mahatyapi kule na bhavanti sarve |  4900-2 vindhyāṭavīṣu viralāḥ khalu pādapāste ye dantidantamusalollikhanaṃ sahante ||4901-1 āpatsu kiṃ viṣādena saṃpattau vismayena kiṃ |  4901-2 bhavitavyaṃ bhavatyeva karmaṇāmeṣa niścayaḥ ||4902-1 āpatsu ca na muhyanti narāḥ paṇditabuddhayaḥ |  4902-2 manodehasamutthābhyāṃ duḥkhābhyāmarpitaṃ jagat ||4903-1 āpatsu mitraṃ jānīyādraṇe śūraṃ rahaḥ śuciṃ |  4903-2 bhāryāṃ ca vibhave kṣīṇe durbhikṣe ca priyātithiṃ ||4904-1 āpatsvamūḍho prāṇeṣu vidyamāneṣu sa bhṛtyo narakaṃ vrajet ||4908-1 āpadaḥ kṣaṇamāyānti saṃpadaḥ kṣaṇameva ca |  4908-2 kṣaṇaṃ janmātha maraṇaṃ mune kimiva na kṣaṇaṃ ||4909-1 āpadaḥ santi mahatāṃ mahatāmeva saṃpadaḥ |  4909-2 itareṣāṃ manuṣyāṇaṃ nāpado na ca saṃpadaḥ ||4910-1 āpadarthe dhanaṃ rakṣecśrīmatāṃ kuta āpadaḥ |  4910-2 kadāciccalate lakṣmīḥ saṃcitaṃ ca vinaśyati ||4911-1 āpadarthe dhanaṃ rakṣeddārānrakṣeddhanairapi |  4911-2 ātmānaṃ satataṃ rakṣeddārairapi dhanairapi ||4912-1 āpadāṃ kathitaḥ panthā indriyāṇāmasaṃyamaḥ |  4912-2 tajjayaḥ saṃpadāṃ mārgo yeneṣṭaṃ tena gamyatāṃ ||4913-1 āpadāmatha kāle tu kurvīta na vicālayet |  4913-2 aśaknuvaṃśca yuddhāya niṣpatetsaha mantribhiḥ ||4914-1 āpadāmapahartāraṃ dātāraṃ sarvasaṃpadāṃ |  4914-2 lokābhirāmaṃ śrīrāmaṃ bhūyo bhūyo namāmyahaṃ ||4915-1 āpadāmāgamaṃ dṛṣṭvā na viṣaṇṇo bhavedvaśī |  4915-2 saṃpadaṃ ca suvistīrṇāṃ prāpya no'dhṛtimānbhavet ||4916-1 āpadāmāpatantīnāṃ hito'pyāyāti hetutāṃ |  4916-2 mātṛjaṅghā hi vatsasya stambhībhavati bandhane ||4917-1 āpadāsthitapanthānāṃ indriyāṇāmasaṃyamāt |  4917-2 tyajyate saṃpadāṃ mārgo yo neṣṭastena paśyata ||4918-1 āpadi mitraparīkṣā śūraparīkṣā raṇāṅgaṇe ||4920-1 āpado mahatāmeva mahatāmeva saṃpadaḥ |  4920-2 kṣīyate vardhate candraḥ kadācinnaiva tārakāḥ ||4921-1 āpadgataṃ hasasi kiṃ draviṇāndha mūḍha lakṣmīḥ sthirā na bhavatīti kimatra citraṃ |  4921-2 kiṃ tvaṃ na paśyasi na ghaṭīrjalayantracakre riktā bhavanti bharitāḥ punareva riktāḥ ||4922-1 āpadgataḥ khalu mahāśayacakravartī vistārayatyakṛtapūrvamudārabhāvaṃ |  4922-2 ||4931-1 āpanno'smi śaraṇyo'smi sarvāvasthāsu sarvadā |  4931-2 bhagavaṃstvāṃ prapanno'smi rakṣa māṃ śaraṇāgataṃ ||4932-1 āpanmūlaṃ khalu yuvatayastannimitto'vamānastāsāṃ yāvatsalilalaharībhaṅguraḥ |  5071-2 atīte kāryaśeṣajño naro'rthairna prahīyate ||5072-1 āyatyā ca jayedāśāṃ arthaṃ saṅgavivarjanāt |  5072-2 anityatvena ca snehaṃ kṣudhaṃ yogena paṇḍitaḥ ||5073-1 āyadvāreṣu sarveṣu ||5075-1 āyavyaye'nnasaṃskāre gṛhopaskārarakṣaṇe |  5075-2 śauce'gnikārye saṃyojyāḥ rakṣā strīṇāmiyaṃ smṛtā ||5075ā-1 āyavyayau yasya ca saṃvibhaktau channaśca cāro nibhṛtaśca mantraḥ |  5075ā-2 na cāpriyaṃ mantriṣu yo bravīti sā sāgarāntāṃ pṛthivīṃ praśāsti ||5076-1 āyastā kalahaṃ pureva kurute na sraṃsane vāsasobhugnabhrūratikhaṇḍyamānamadharaṃ dhatte na keśagrahe |  5076-2 aṅgānyarpayati svayaṃ bhavati no vāmā haṭhāliṅgane tanvyā śikṣita eṣa saṃprati punaḥ kopaprakāro'paraḥ ||5077-1 āyasya tāvadapi karma karotu kaścithtenāpi mātaradhikaṃ kimihānubhāvyaṃ |  5077-2 āste sukhaṃ ya iha bhāratavarṣasīmany āste sa kiṃcidita uttarato'pasṛtya||5078-1 āyasya turyabhāgena vyayakarma pravartayan |  5078-2 anyūnatailadīpo'pi ciraṃ bhadrāṇi paśyati ||5079-1 āyāccaturthabhāgena vyayakarma pravartayet |  5079-2 prabhūtatailadīpo hi ciraṃ bhadrāṇi paśyati ||5080-1 āyātaṃ māmaparicitayā velayā mandiraṃ te coro daṇḍyastvamiti madhuraṃ vyāharantyā bhavatyā |  5080-2 mande dīpe madhulavamucāṃ mālayā mallikānāṃ baddhaṃ ceto dṛḍhataramidaṃ bāhubandhacchalena ||5081-1 āyātaṃ sakhi dayitaṃ cirātpravāsāthkṣāmāṅgaṃ tava virahānalena taptaṃ |  5081-2 sadyo'muṃ āyurvarṣaśataṃ nṛṇāṃ parimitaṃ rātrau tadardhaṃ gataṃ tasyārdhasya parasya cārdhamaparaṃ bālatvavṛddhatvayoḥ |  5148-2 śeṣaṃ vyādhiviyogaduḥkhasahitaṃ sevādibhirnīyate jīve vāritaraṅgacañcalatare saukhyaṃ kutaḥ prāṇināṃ ||5149-1 āyurvarṣaśataṃ nṛṇāṃ parimitaṃ rātrau tadardhaṃ hṛtaṃ tasyārdhasya ca kiṃcideva jarayā bālyena kiṃcid_hṛtaṃ |  5149-2 kiṃcidvyādhiviyogaduḥkhamaraṇairbhūpālasevārasair naṣṭaṃ śiṣṭamatastaraṅgataralaṃ puṃsāṃ sukhaṃ kva kṣaṇe ||5150-1 āyurvāyucalaṃ sureśvaradhanurlolaṃ balaṃ yauvanaṃ vidyudvaccapalaṃ dhanaṃ girinadīkallolavaccañcalaṃ |  5150-2 tāruṇyaṃ karikarṇatālataralaṃ dehaṃ ca rogākulaṃ jñātvā sarvamidaṃ kurudhvamamalaṃ dharmaṃ sadā niścalaṃ ||5151-1 āyurvāyuvyathitanalinīpatramitraṃ kimanyathsaṃpacchampādyutisahacarī svairacārī kṛtāntaḥ |  5151-2 kasmādasminbhramasi tamasi tvaṃ prayāhi prayāgaṃ paunaḥpunyaṃ bhuvi bhagavatī svardhunī te dhunīte ||5152-1 āyurvāsaramāsavatsaragaṇe gacchatyadūraṃ pathair ākrāmanti kṛtāntakāsarakhurakṣuṇṇā rajorājayaḥ |  5152-2 īṣallaṅghitaśaiśavā iti vayaḥsaṃdhiṃ dadhānā iti vyaktā varjitayauvanā iti tathā nandanti tandrālavaḥ ||5153-1 āyurvittaṃ gṛhacchidraṃ mantramaithunabheṣajaṃ |  5153-2 apamānaṃ tapo dānaṃ nava gopyāni yatnataḥ ||5154-1 āyurvittaṃ gṛhacchidraṃ mantramaithunabheṣajaṃ |  5154-2 dānamānāpamānaṃ ca navaitāni sugopayet ||5155-1 āyurvṛddhikṣayotkarṣahetuṃ kālavinirgataṃ |  5155-2 vāñchatāṃ dhanināmiṣṭaṃ jīvitātparamaṃ dhanaṃ ||5156-1 āyurvedakṛtābhyāsaḥ sarveṣāṃ priyadarśanaḥ |  5156-2 āryaśīlaguṇopeta eṣa vaidyo vidhīyate ||5157-1 āyurvedamadhīyānāḥ kevalaṃ saparigrahaṃ |  5157-2 dṛśyante bahavo vaidyā vyādhibhiḥ samabhiplutāḥ ||5158-1 āyuṣaḥ kṣaṇa eko'pi na labhyaḥ svarṇakoṭibhiḥ |  5158-2 sa cennirarthakaṃ nītaḥ kā nu hānistato'dhikā ||5159-1 āyuṣaḥ kṣaṇa eko'pi na labhyaḥ svarṇakoṭibhiḥ |  5159-2 sa vṛthā nīyate yena tasmai nṛpaśave namaḥ ||5160-1 āyuṣaḥ kṣaṇa eko'pi sarvaratnairna labhyate |  5160-2 nīyate yadvṛthā so'pi pramādaḥ sumahānayaṃ ||5161-1 āyuṣmānprāṅmukho bhuñjātdhanavāndakṣiṇāmukhaḥ |  5161-2 paścime tu yaśasvī syānna kadācidudaṅmukhaḥ ||5162-1 āyuṣyaṃ sarvathā rakṣyaṃ prāṇināmiha dhīmatā |  5162-2 apyalpaguṇasaṃpanno jīvanbhadrāṇi paśyati ||5163-1 āyustaḍiccalamapāyi śarīrametan mṛtyurgrasiṣyati kadeti na ko'pi veda|  5163-2 adyaiva tadbhajata muktipathaṃ dvijendrā jyeṣṭhāgamāvadhi hi tiṣṭhati kiṃ na darśaḥ ||5164-1 āyuste kiyadasti tatra ca kiyattāruṇyamatrāpi vāpy ardhaṃ nirgilitaṃ niśātmakatayā yatrāsti saṅgo na te |  5164-2 śeṣāḥ santi kati kṣaṇāḥ praṇayajastatrāpi kopo yadi vyarthaṃ niścinu cakravāki jananaṃ kaste hitaṃ vakṣyati ||5165-1 āyuste naravīra vardhatu sadā hemantarātriryathā lokānāṃ priyavardhano bhava sadā hemantasūryo yathā |  5165-2 lokānāṃ bhayavardhano bhava sadā hemantatoyaṃ yathā nāśaṃ yāntu tavārayo'pi satataṃ hemantapadmaṃ yathā ||5166-1 āyūṃṣi kṣaṇikāni yauvanamapi prāyo jarādhyāsitaṃ saṃyogā virahāvasānavirasā bhogāḥ kṣaṇadhvaṃsinaḥ |  5166-2 jānanto'pi yathāvyavasthitamidaṃ lokāḥ samastaṃ jagachcitraṃ yadgurugarvabhāvitadhiyaḥ krudhyanti mādyanti ca ||5167-1 āyūrekhāṃ cakārāsyāḥ kare drāghīyasīṃ vidhiḥ |  5167-2 śauṇḍīryagarvanirvāhapratyāśāṃ ca manobhuvaḥ ||5168-1 āye vyaye tathā nityaṃ tyaktalajjastu vai bhavet |  5168-2 na kuñcitena gūḍhena nityaṃ prāvaraṇādibhiḥ ||5169-1 āyodhane kṛṣṇagatiṃ sahāyaṃ avāpya yaḥ kṣatriyakālarātriṃ |  5169-2 dhārāṃ śitāṃ rāmaparaśvadhasya saṃbhāvayatyutpalapatrasārāṃ ||5170-1 āraktatāmeti mukhaṃ jihvā vā śyāmatāṃ yadā |  5170-2 tadā ||5172-1 āraktarājibhiriyaṃ kusumairnavakandalī salilagarbhaiḥ |  5172-2 kopādantarbāṣpe smarayati māṃ locane tasyāḥ ||5173-1 āraktāṅkuradanturā kamalinī nāyāminī āraktairnavapallavairviṭapino netrotsavaṃ tanvatetāndhunvannayamabhyupaiti madhurāmodo maruddakṣiṇaḥ |  5176-2 tenāliṅgitamātra eva vidhivatprādurbhavannirbhara- krīḍākūtakaṣāyitena manasā |  5178-2 ucitastatpariṇāmo viṣamaṃ viṣameva yajjātaṃ ||5179-1 ārabdhā kimu ketakīkisalayairmālā kimāyāminī karpūrasya paraṃparā malayajakṣodasya lekhāthavā |  5179-2 dhārā vaibudhasaindhavī nu  5196-2 anugrahairyojayanti bhaktānghnanti viparyaye ||5197-1 ārādhitā hi śīlena prayatnaiścopasevitāḥ |  5197-2 rājānaḥ saṃprasīdanti prakupyanti viparyaye ||5198-1 ārādhito vāpyaparādhito vā bhāskarādiccheddhanamicched_hutāśanāt |  5230-2 maheśvarājjñānamicchenmuktimicchejjanārdanāt ||5231-1 ārogyaṃ vidvattā sajjanamaitrī mahākule janma |  5231-2 svādhīnatā ca puṃsāṃ mahadaiśvaryaṃ vināpyarthaiḥ ||5232-1 ārogyaṃ saubhāgyaṃ dhanāḍhyatā nāyakatvamānandaḥ |  5232-2 kṛtapuṇyasya syādiha sadā jayo vāñchitāvāptiḥ ||5233-1 ārogyabuddhivinayodyamaśāstrarāgāḥ pañcāntarāḥ paṭhanasiddhiguṇā bhavanti |  5233-2 ācāryapustakanivāsasahāyakarṇā bāhyāstu pañca paṭhanaṃ parivardhayanti ||5234-1 ārogyamānṛṇyamavipravāsaḥ sadbhirmanuṣyaiḥ saha saṃprayogaḥ |  5234-2 svapratyayā vṛttirabhītavāsaḥ ṣaḍjīvalokasya sukhāni rājan ||5235-1 ārogyalakṣmīrupayāti pitta- jvarāturaṃ reṇukaṣāyabhājaṃ |  5235-2 mā tvaṃ yathā ratnakale smarārtā kṛtaprakopapraśamā sakhībhiḥ ||5236-1 āroḍhuṃ varamaupavāhyamapahartuṃ sundarī kanyakā bhoktuṃ bhogamupasthitaṃ sukhamalaṃkartuṃ ca ratnaistanuṃ |  5236-2 samnahyantyamṛtāndhaso hi śamite yenaiva hālāhale sa svāmī mama daivataṃ taditaro nāmnāpi na mnāyate ||5237-1 āropayasi mudhā kiṃ nāhamabhijñā kila tvadaṅkasya |  5237-2 divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ sthitveti na yuktamabhidhātuṃ ||5238-1 āropitaḥ pṛthunitambataṭe taruṇyā kaṇṭhe ca bāhulatayā niviḍaṃ gṛhītaḥ |  5238-2 uttuṅgapīnakucanirbharapīḍito'yaṃ kumbhaḥ karīṣadahanasya phalāni bhuṅkte ||5239-1 āropitā api prājyā guṇā lokeṣu pūjitaiḥ |  5239-2 pūjayantīha dṛṣṭāntaḥ pratimā dyuḥsadāṃ nanu ||5240-1 āropitā śilāyāṃ aśmeva tvaṃ bhaveti mantreṇa |  5240-2 magnāpi pariṇayāpadi jāramukhaṃ vīkṣya hasitaiva ||5241-1 āropyate'śmā śailāgraṃ yathā yatnena bhūyasā |  5241-2 nipātyate sukhenādhastathātmā guṇadoṣayoḥ ||5242-1 ārohaṇaṃ govṛṣakuñjarāṇāṃ prāsādaśailāgravanaspatīnāṃ |  5242-2 viṣṭhānulepo rudhiraṃ mṛtaṃ ca svapneṣvagamyāgamanaṃ ca dhanyaṃ ||5243-1 ārohaṇāya tava sajja ivāsti tatra sopānaśobhivapuraśmavalicchaṭābhiḥ |  5243-2 bhogīndraveṣṭaśataghṛṣṭikṛtābhirabdhi- kṣubdhācalaḥ kanakaketakagotragātri ||5244-1 ārohatu giriśikharaṃ samudramullaṅghya yātu pātālaṃ |  5244-2 vidhilikhitākṣaramālaṃ phalati kapālaṃ na bhūpālaḥ ||5245-1 ārohatyavanīruhaḥ praviśati śvabhraṃ nagaiḥ spardhate khaṃ vyāledhi viceṣṭate kṣititale kuñjodare līya |  5245-2 antarbhrāmyati koṭarasya virasatyālambate vīrudhaḥ kiṃ tadyanna karoti mārutavaśaṃ yātahkṛśānurvane ||5246-1 ārohanti sukhāsanānyapaṭavo nāgānhayāṃstajjuṣas tāmbūlādyupabhuñjate naṭaviṭāḥ khādanti hastyādayaḥ |  5246-2 prāsāde caṭakādayo'pi nivasantyete na pātraṃ stuteḥ sa stutyo bhuvane prayacchati kṛtī lokāya yahkāmitāṃ ||5247-1 ārohavallībhirivāmbudhārā- rājībhirābhūmivilambinībhiḥ |  5247-2 saṃlakṣyate vy_oṃa vaṭadrumābhaṃ ambhodharaśyāmadalaprakāśaṃ ||5248-1 ārjavaṃ cānṛśaṃsyaṃ ca damaścendriyanigrahaḥ |  5248-2 eṣa sādhāraṇo dharmaścāturvarṇye'bravīnmanuḥ ||5249-1 ārjavaṃ pratipadyasva putreṣu satataṃ vibho |  5249-2 iha kīrtiṃ parāṃ prāpya pretya svargamavāpsyasi ||5250-1 ārjavatvaṃ caturthaṃ ca pañcamaṃ dharmameva hi |  5250-2 madhuratvaṃ tataḥ proktaṃ ṣaṣṭhameva varānane ||5251-1 ārjavamamalakarāṇāṃ vinayo vararatnamukuṭānāṃ |  5251-2 dyūtaṃ durvyasanānāṃ strījitatā marutaṭīpiśācānāṃ ||5252-1 ārjavena dhṛtā dīkṣā yā no daivaṃ paraṃ prati |  5252-2 atyantamānuṣīyābhyaḥ pīḍābhyastadvimocanaṃ ||5253-1 ārjavena naraṃ yuktaṃ ārjavātsavypatrapaṃ |  5253-2 aśaktimantaṃ manyanto dharṣayanti kubuddhayaḥ ||5254-1 ārtatrāṇaparāyaṇena kariṇā dāhādimūleti yadvākyaṃ cakradhareṇa nakramukhato hākārarorīkṛtaṃ |  5254-2 yaḥ stambhe karatāḍanadhvanirabhūtkarṇe surasyāpyaho hā kṛṣṇeti yadakṣayaṃ sa bhagavānpāyādapāyājjagat ||5255-1 ārtaduḥkhyaparitrāṇadurgatādi yathākramaṃ |  5255-2 pātramāhurdayālūnāṃ alābhe guṇavāniti ||5256-1 ārtadrutasvarajñā vibhinnadīnaprabhinnalaghuraudrāḥ |  5256-2 nindyāḥ śubhāstu śabdāḥ pramuditaparipūrṇadṛḍhaśāntāḥ ||5257-1 ārtasya me praṇamato jagadantarātman paśyanna paśyasi vibho na śṛṇoṣi śṛṇvan |  5257-2 durdaivakumbhajanuṣā nanu sāṃprataṃ me pītastadīyakaruṇāvaruṇālayo'pi ||5258-1 ārtā devānnamasyanti tapaḥ kurvanti rogiṇaḥ |  5258-2 nirdhanā dānamicchanti vṛddhā nārī pativratā ||5259-1 ārtānāmārtisaṃbandhaṃ prītiviśrāmakāraṇaṃ |  5259-2 kena ratnamidaṃ sṛṣṭaṃ mitramityakṣaradvayaṃ ||5260-1 ārtānāmiha jantūnāṃ ārticchedaṃ karoti yaḥ |  5260-2 śaṅkhacakragadāhīno dvibhujaḥ parameśvaraḥ ||5261-1 ārtārte mudite hṛṣṭā proṣite malinā kṛśā |  5261-2 mṛte mriyeta yā patyau sā strī jñeyā pativratā ||5262-1 ārteṣu dīyate dānaṃ śūnyaliṅgasya pūjanaṃ |  5262-2 anāthapretasaṃskāraṃ aśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet ||5263-1 ārteṣu vipreṣu dayānvitaśca yacchraddhayā svalpamupaiti dānaṃ |  5263-2 anantapāraṃ samupaiti rājan yaddīyate tanna labheddvijebhyaḥ ||5264-1 ārto matsadṛśo nānyastvatto nānyaḥ kṛpāparaḥ |  5264-2 tulya evāvayoryogaḥ kathaṃ nātha na pāsi māṃ ||5265-1 ārto vā yadi vā trastaḥ pareṣāṃ śaraṇāgataḥ |  5265-2 ariḥ prāṇānparityajya rakṣitavyaḥ kṛtātmanā ||5266-1 ārdrakīkasamukhaḥ purataśceddṛśyate bhavati tacchubhadaḥ śvā |  5266-2 carma śuṣkamathavāsthi viśuṣkaṃ bibhradeṣa maraṇaṃ vidadhāti ||5267-1 ārdramapi stanajaghanān- nirasya sutanu tvayaitadunmuktaṃ |  5267-2 khasthamavāptumiva tvāṃ tapanāṃśūnaṃśukaṃ pibati ||5268-1 ārdrāṃ kaṇṭhe mukhābjasrajamavanamayatyambikā jānulambāṃ sthāne kṛtvendulekhāṃ nibiḍayati jaṭāḥ pannagendreṇa nandī |  5268-2 kālaḥ kṛttiṃ nibadhnātyupanayati kare ||5270-1 āryakarmaṇi rajyante bhūtikarmāṇi kurvate |  5270-2 hitaṃ ca nābhyasūyanti paṇḍitā bharatarṣabha ||5271-1 āryajananinditānāṃ pāpaikarasaprakāśanārīṇāṃ |  5271-2 etāvāneva guṇo yadabhīṣṭasamāgamo nirāvaraṇaḥ ||5272-1 āryajuṣṭamidaṃ vṛttaṃ iti vijñāya śāśvataṃ |  5272-2 santaḥ parārthaṃ kurvāṇā nāvekṣante pratikriyāṃ ||5273-1 āryatā puruṣajñānaṃ śauryaṃ karuṇaveditā |  5273-2 sthaulalakṣyaṃ ca satataṃ udāsīnaguṇodayaḥ ||5274-1 āryatvaṃ ca caturthaṃ ca pañcamaṃ dharmameva hi |  5274-2 ṣaṣṭhaṃ satītvaṃ dṛḍhatā saptamaṃ sāhaso'ṣṭamaṃ ||5275-1 āryadeśakularūpabalāyur- buddhibandhuramavāpya naratvaṃ |  5275-2 dharmakarma na karoti jaḍo yaḥ potamujjhati payodhigataḥ saḥ ||5276-1 āryaputra pitā mātā bhrātā putrastathā snuṣā |  5276-2 svāni puṇyāni bhuñjānāḥ svaṃ svaṃ bhāgyamupāsate ||5276-3 bharturbhāgyaṃ tu bhāryaikā prāpnoti puruṣarṣabha ||5277-1 āryānaṅga mahāvrataṃ vidadhatā vindhyānilaiḥ pāraṇāṃ kṛtvā sāṅgamakāri kena muralākūle kaṭhoraṃ tapaḥ |  5277-2 yenāsyā ratikhedameduramṛduśvāsādhivāsaspṛśaḥ pīyante'dharasīdhavo vihasitajyotsnopadaṃśaṃ rahaḥ ||5278-1 āryā mukhe tu capalā tathāpi caryā na me yataḥ sā tu |  5278-2 dhanyāstadaṅgarajasā malinībhavanti ||5282-1 ā laṅkānāthanārīstanataralapayovīcimudrātsamudrādā svargaṅgātaraṅgāvaliviralaśilādustarāduttarādreḥ |  5282-2 ā prākśailāsurastrīsuratagativido tuhināṃśulekheva ||5284-1 ālapa yathā yathecchasi yuktaṃ tava kitava kimapavārayasi |  5284-2 strījātilāñchanamasau jīvitaraṅkā sakhī subhaga ||5285-1 ālambihemaraśanāhstanasaktahārāḥ kandarpadarpaśithilīkṛtagātrayaṣṭyaḥ |  5285-2 māse madhau madhurakokilabhṛṅganādair nāryo haranti hṛdayaṃ prasabhaṃ narāṇāṃ||5286-1 ālambe jagadālambe herambacaraṇāmbuje |  5286-2 śuṣyanti bhagnāvadheradya me panthānaṃ vivṛtāśruṇā vadanakenālokya kiṃ vakṣyati ||5288-1 ālambhyāṅgaṇavāpikāparisare cūtadrume mañjarīṃ sarpatsāndraparāgalampaṭaraṇadbhṛṅgāṅganāśobhinīṃ |  5288-2 manye svāṃ tanumuttarīyaśakalenācchādya bālā sphurat-kaṇṭhadhvānanirodhakampitakucaśvāsodgamā roditi ||5289-1 ālavāle sthitaṃ toyaṃ śoṣaṃ na bhajate yadā |  5289-2 ajīrṇaṃ tadvijānīyānna deyaṃ tādṛśe jalaṃ ||5290-1 ālasyaṃ kuru pāpakarmaṇi bhava krūraḥ krudhastāḍane naiṣṭhuryaṃ bhaja lobhamohaviṣaye nidrāṃ samādhau hareḥ |  5290-2 jāḍyaṃ gaccha parāpavādakathane drohaṃ vidhehi smare doṣā eva guṇatvamevamakhilā yāsyanti cetastava ||5291-1 ālasyaṃ prathamaṃ paścādvyādhipīḍā prajāyate |  5291-2 pramādaḥ saṃśayasthāne cittasyehānavasthitiḥ ||5292-1 ālasyaṃ madamohau ca cāpalaṃ goṣṭhireva 5293-2 ālasyādiyamavaniḥ sasāgarāntā saṃpūrṇā narapaśubhiśca nirdhanaiśca ||5294-1 ālasyaṃ strīsevā sarogatā janmabhūmivātsalyaṃ |  5294-2 saṃtoṣo bhīrutvaṃ ṣaḍvyāghātā mahattvasya ||5295-1 ālasyaṃ sthiratāmupaiti bhajate cāpalyamudyogitāṃ mūkatvaṃ mitabhāṣitāṃ vitanute maugdhyaṃ bhavedārjavaṃ |  5295-2 pātrāpātravicārabhāvaviraho yacchatyudārātmatāṃ mātarlakṣmi tava prasādavaśato doṣā api syurguṇāḥ ||5296-1 ālasyaṃ harati prajñāṃ dhanamāyuryaśo balaṃ |  5296-2 yasminnāste tadālasyaṃ sarvadoṣākarastu saḥ ||5297-1 ālasyaṃ hi manuṣyāṇāṃ śarīrastho mahānripuḥ |  5297-2 nāstyudyamasamo bandhuḥ kṛtvā yaṃ nāvasīdati ||5298-1 ālasyamapi pārīndraṃ pratipadya vijṛmbhate |  5298-2 hatabhāgaṃ prayatno'pi pratihanyata eva hā ||5299-1 ālasyātsusahāyo'pi na gacchatyudayaṃ ||5302-1 ālānatvaruṣevaitā dantibhirvṛkṣapaṅktayaḥ |  5302-2 sphuratkaṭakaṭārāvaṃ pātyante kṛtacitkṛtaiḥ ||5303-1 ālānamunmūlya sukhābhidhānaṃ tāruṇyanāge gamanodyate'smin |  5303-2 palāyite kāmigaṇe'ṅganānāṃ vimardabhītyeva kucāḥ patanti ||5304-1 ālāne gṛhyate hastī vājī valgāsu gṛhyate |  5304-2 hṛdaye gṛhyate nārī yadīdaṃ nāsti gamyatāṃ ||5305-1 ālāpaṃ kalakaṇṭhikā na kurute kīrā na smitak_oṃudīsahacaro dṛṣṭiḥ praharṣojjvalābhrūrnṛtyādhvaradīkṣitā caraṇayornyāsaḥ same bhaṅguraḥ |  5306-2 veśeṣu kṣaṇikaspṛhā madavidherbandho na vādāśrayas tanvyā naikavikārabhūrmadhumadaprāyo madaḥ sphūrjati ||5307-1 ālāpamālinikarasya niśamya bhītā mugdhā vilokya vadanaṃ mukuraṃ jahāti |  5307-2 mandaṃ na niśvasiti manmathavedanārtā kīrendu māruta bhayātkimu manna bhūpa ||5308-1 ālāpayatyakāryāṇi kiṃcidākhyāti vā svayaṃ |  5308-2 yā na prayāti śayanaṃ sāpyanutpannasaspṛhā ||5309-1 ālāpādgātrasaṃsparśātsaṃsargātsahabhojanāt |  5309-2 āsanācśayanādyānātpāpaṃ saṃkramate nṛṇāṃ ||5310-1 ālāpānbhrūvilāso viralayati lasadbāhuvikṣiptiyātaṃ nīvigranthiṃ prathimnā pratanayati manāṅmadhyanimno nitambaḥ |  5310-2 utpuṣyatpārśvamūrcchatkucaśikharamuro nūnamantaḥsmareṇa spṛṣṭā kodaṇḍakoṭyā hariṇaśiśudṛśo dṛśyateyauvanaśrīḥ ||5311-1 ālāpairmadhuraiśca kāścidaparānālokitaiḥ sasmitair anyānvibhramakalpanābhiritarānaṅgairanaṅgojjvalaiḥ |  5311-2 ācāraiścaturaiḥ parānabhinavairanyānbhruvaḥ kampanair itthaṃ kāścana rañjayanti sudṛśo manye manastvanyathā ||5312-1 āli kapālini jaṭile patyāvatyāgrahaistavālamiti |  5312-2 haragatamiti duḥsahamapi muhurapi mukharānnigādayati gaurī ||5313-1 āli kalpaya puraḥ karadīpaṃ candramaṇḍalamiti prathitena |  5313-2 nanvanena pihitaṃ mama cakṣur maṅkṣu pāṇduratamogulakena ||5314-1 āliṅgatyanyamanyaṃ ramayati sṛṣṭā ||5315-1 āliṅgadāpya gopīṃ tadbāhuṃ sahariraṃsayādhāya |  5315-2 śrutveti niścin_oṃyahaṃ aṅgiṣu durvāratāṃ anaṅgasya ||5316-1 āliṅganādharasudhārasapānavakṣo- niṣpīḍanādividhirastu 5317-2 adya sthitvā draviḍamahilābhyantare śvaḥ prabhāte prasthātāro malayamarutaḥ kurvate saṃnidhānaṃ ||5318-1 āliṅganto vasudhāṃ nijakhuradalitāmivānunetumamī |  5318-2 vadanavigatacaraṇā iva saṃlakṣyante javādaśvāḥ ||5319-1 āliṅgannatisaurabhānavayavānbimbādharaṃ pāṭalaṃ cumbannākalayanpayodharataṭīṃ śṛṇvanrutaṃ hāṃsakaṃ |  5319-2 paśyanvāniśamāyatāṃ dṛśamupaskurvaṃllavaṅgīrasaṃ bālāyāṃ sakalartusaṃgamasukhaṃ dhanyaḥ paraṃ manyate ||5320-1 āliṅganbhṛśamaṅgakāni sudṛśāmāsyāni cumbaṃ nayan vakṣojorunitambakaṇṭhanakharaśrīcitrabhāvaṃ nayan |  5320-2 bimboṣṭhāmṛtamāpibañchithilayannīvīṃ karakrīḍanā-saṅgenātisahāsakeliparamaḥ svairaṃ vicikrīḍa nā ||5321-1 āliṅgayatyanunayatyavacumbayatyā- --- lokayatyanumṛjatyavagūhate ca |  5321-2 pārśvaṃ mṛgair mūlasekasarasaiśca vṛkṣakaiḥ |  5398-2 āśramāḥ praviśadagnidhenavo bibhrati śriyamudīritāgnayaḥ ||5399-1 āviṣkaroti na snehaṃ rāgaṃ badhnāti no rate |  5399-2 abhiyuktā tu mandecchā ||5402-1 āviṣṭa iva duḥkhena tadgatena garīyasā |  5402-2 samanvitaḥ karuṇayā parayā dīnamuddharet ||5403-1 āvṛṇoti yadi sā mṛgīdṛśī svāñcale kucakāñcanācalaṃ |  5403-2 bhūya eva bahireti 5419-2 khedāya yasya na paropakṛtiṣvaṭāṭyā dhīmānnamasyati na kastaminaṃ praśasyaṃ ||5420-1 āśāḥ prasādayatu puṣyatu vā cakorān kāmaṃ tanotu kumudeṣu mudaṃ sudhāṃśuḥ |  5420-2 ekaḥ sa eva ||5435-1 āśāpāśaiḥ parītāṅgā ye bhavanti naro'rditāḥ |  5435-2 te rātrau śerate naiva tadaprāptivicintayā ||5436-1 āśāpiśācikā māṃ bhramayati parito daśasvapi diśāsu |  5436-2 svīye piśācavarge |  5440-2 tasmādāśāṃ tyajetprājño yadīcchecśāśvataṃ sukhaṃ ||5441-1 āśābhareṇa nikhilāśāsu dhāvanamathāśātakumbhagiri vā kleśāvahaṃ vividhadeśāṭanaṃ draviṇaleśāyanāpi vavṛte |  5441-2 5462-2 āgatyāgatya bhītipraṇatanṛpaśataiḥ śaśvadeva kriyantecūḍāratnāṃśugarbhāstava caraṇayugasyāṅgulīrandhrabhāgāḥ ||5463-1 āśaiva rākṣasī puṃsāṃ āśaiva viṣamañjarī |  5463-2 āśaiva jīrṇamadirā ||5469-1 āścaryadhāmabhiratīva guṇaiḥ kimetaj jālaṃ tvayā viracitaṃ yadapūrvameva |  5469-2 cetāṃsi mūrtirahitānyapi cañcalāni badhnāti yacchrutigataṃ tadapūrvameva ||5470-1 āścaryamutpaladṛśo 5476-2 bhikṣābalipariśrāntaḥ pravrajanpretya vardhate ||5477-1 āśramī yadi vā varṇī pūjyo vātha gururmahān |  5477-2 nādaṇḍyo nāma rājño'sti yaḥ svadharmeṇa tiṣṭhati ||5478-1 āśrameṣu dvijātīnāṃ daśadigbhyaḥ ||5485-1 āśrayeṇaiva śobhante paṇḍitā vanitā latāḥ |  5485-2 bahumūlyaṃ hi māṇikyaṃ jaṭitaṃ hemni rājate ||5486-1 āśritasyāpradānena dattasya haraṇena ca |  5486-2 janmaprabhṛti yaddattaṃ sarvaṃ naśyati bhārata ||5487-1 āśritānāṃ bhṛtau svāmisevāyāṃ dharmasevane |  5487-2 putrasyotpādane caiva na santi pratihastakāḥ ||5488-1 āśritāścaiva lokena samṛddhiṃ yānti vidviṣaḥ |  5488-2 samṛddhāśca vināśāya tasmānnodvejayetprajāḥ ||5489-1 āśritya nūnamamṛtadyutayaḥ padaṃ te dehakṣayopanatadivyapadābhimukhyāḥ |  5489-2 lāvaṇyapuṇyanicayaṃ suhṛdi tvadāsye vinyasya yānti mihiraṃ pratimāsabhinnāḥ ||5490-1 āśliṣṭabhūmiṃ rasitāramuccair loladbhujākārabṛhattaraṅgaṃ |  5490-2 phenāyamānaṃ patimāpagānāṃ asāvapasmāriṇamāśaśaṅke ||5491-1 āśliṣṭāpi karoti sā mama tanuṃ kaṇṭhagrahotkaṇṭhitāṃ dṛṣṭāpi priyadarśanā niyamayatyakṣṇordidṛkṣāṃ punaḥ |  5491-2 antaścetasi saṃsthitāpi hṛdayaṃ bhūyo viśatyeva me rūḍhapremasamāgamāpi navatāṃ dhatte priyā pratyahaṃ ||5492-1 āśliṣṭā rabhasādvilīyata ivākrāntāpyanaṅgena yā yasyāḥ kṛtrimacaṇḍavastukaraṇākūteṣu khinnaṃ manaḥ |  5492-2 ko'yaṃ kāhamiti pravṛttasuratā jānāti yā nāntaraṃ rantuḥ sā ramaṇī sa eva ramaṇaḥ śeṣau tu jāyāpatī ||5493-1 āśliṣya vā pādaratāṃ pinaṣṭu māṃ adarśanānmarmahatāṃ karotu vā |  5493-2 yathā tathā vā vidadhātu nāgaro matprāṇanāthastu sa eva nāparaḥ ||5494-1 āśleṣacumbanaratotsavakautukāni krīḍādurodarapaṇaḥ pratibhūranaṅgaḥ |  5494-2 bhogaḥ sa yadyapi jaye ca parājaye ca yūnormanastadapi vāñchati jetumeva ||5495-1 āśleṣaśeṣā ratiraṅganānāṃ āmodaśeṣā kucakuṅkumaśrīḥ |  5495-2 tūṇīraśeṣaḥ kusumāyudho'pi prabhātaśeṣā rajanī babhūva ||5496-1 āśleṣādanu cumbanādanu nakhollekhādanu svāntaja- prodbodhādanu saṃbhramādanu ratārambhādanu prītayoḥ |  5496-2 anyārthaṃ gatayorbhramānmilitayoḥ saṃbhāṣaṇairjānator dampatyoriha ko na ko na tamasi vrīḍāvimiśro rasaḥ ||5497-1 āśleṣādharabimbacumbanasukhālāpasmitānyāsatāṃ dūre tāvadidaṃ mitho na sulabhaṃ jātaṃ mukhālokanaṃ |  5497-2 itthaṃ vyarthakṛtaikadehaghaṭanāvinyāsayorāvayoḥ keyaṃ prītividambanetyavatu vaḥ smero'rdhanārīśvaraḥ ||5498-1 āśleṣeṇa payodharapraṇayinīṃ pratyādiśantyā dṛśaṃ dṛṣṭvā cādharabaddhatṛṣṇamadharaṃ nirbhartsayantyā mukhaṃ |  5498-2 ūrvorgāḍhanipīḍanena jaghane pāṇiṃ ca ruddhvānayā patyuḥ prema na khaṇḍitaṃ nipuṇayā māno'pi naivojjhitaḥ ||5499-1 āśleṣe prathamaṃ kramādapahṛte hṛdye'dharasyārpaṇe kelidyūtavidhau paṇaṃ priyatame kāntāṃ punaḥ pṛcchati |  5499-2 antargūḍhavigāḍhasaṃbhramarasasphārībhavadgaṇḍayā tūṣṇīṃ śārivisāraṇāya nihitaḥ svedāmbugarbhaḥ karaḥ ||5500-1 āśleṣe sarvadā patyuḥ satṛṣṇevāntarātmanā |  5500-2 ardhanārīśvaratanau gaurīvṛttaṃ samīhate ||5501-1 saṃbhogāyogyakāleṣu sārdhaṃ kāntena kāminī |  5501-2 vāpīsaudhe gṛhodyāne yātrāsaṅgena tiṣṭhati ||5502-1 anyacchāyāvaloke'pi parālāpe manāgapi |  5502-2 patye kruddhyatyanarthādau svayaṃ cāpi nimajjati ||5503-1 aparopagamārambhaṃ unnāṭayati vallabhaṃ |  5503-2 daridrajaratīvārtā śiśire sāyamātapaṃ ||5504-1 patyuḥ śayyāparāvṛttiṃ viyogamiva manyate |  5504-2 devāgāraprayāṇaṃ ca pravāsamiva paśyati ||5505-1 atisnehasya nisyandādatipremṇaḥ pravṛttibhiḥ |  5505-2 chāyevānucaretkāntaṃ yāntaṃ tiṣṭhantamaṅganā ||5506-1 āśleṣe sundarīṇāṃ sthitavati sahasā sarvasaṃtṛptihetau vyarthaḥ pīyūṣamāptuṃ jalanidhimathane yatna ityākalayya |  5506-2 tasmādete viraktā jagati sumanaso yatsamastāstadaddhāsvargasthānāmivaiṣāṃ na kathamitarathā lāghavaṃ syātpratītaṃ ||5507-1 āśvapehi mama sīdhubhājanādyāvadagradaśanairna dṛśyase |  5507-2 candra maddaśanamaṇḍalāṅkitaḥ khaṃ na yāsyasi hi rohiṇībhayāt ||5508-1 āśvasihi mahābāho prāṇināṃ sarvamāpadaḥ |  5508-2 spṛśantyanilavalloke kṣaṇena pratiyānti ca ||5509-1 āśvāsayati kāko'pi duḥkhitāṃ pathikāṅganāṃ |  5509-2 tvaṃ candrāmṛtajanmāpi dahasīti kimucyatāṃ ||5510-1 āśvāsayeccāpi paraṃ sāntvadharmārthavṛttibhiḥ |  5510-2 athāsya praharetkāle yadā vicalite pathi ||5511-1 āśvāsasnehabhaktīnāṃ ekamāyatanaṃ mahat |  5511-2 prakṛṣṭasyeva dharmasya prasādo mūrtisundaraḥ ||5512-1 āśvāsitasya mama nāma sutopalabdhyā sadyastvayā saha kṛśodari viprayogaḥ |  5512-2 vyāvartitātaparujaḥ prathamābhravṛṣṭyā vṛkṣasya vaidyuta ivāgnirupasthito'yaṃ ||5513-1 āśvāsya parvatakulaṃ tapanoṣṇataptaṃ uddāmadāvavidhurāṇi ca kānanāni |  5513-2 nānānadīnadaśatāni ca pūrayitvā rikto'si yajjalada saiva tavottamaśrīḥ ||5514-1 āśvine kṛṣṇapakṣe ca ṣaṣṭhyāṃ bh_oṃo'tha rohiṇī |  5514-2 vyatīpātastadā ṣaṣṭhī kapilānantapuṇyadā ||5515-1 āṣāḍhaśuklapakṣe bhānordivase śirīṣavṛkṣasya |  5515-2 mūlaṃ jalena piṣṭvā pibenna bhīstasya sarpotthā ||5516-1 āṣāḍhī kārttikī māghī vacā śuṇṭhī harītakī |  5516-2 gayāyāṃ piṇḍadānena puṇyā śleṣmaharānṛṇī ||5517-1 āṣāḍhe śaśakā dṛṣṭā sthānāsthane subhikṣadāḥ |  5517-2 catuṣpadādināśāya tallabdhyai śaśadarśanaṃ ||5518-1 āṣāḍhe śrāvaṇe māsi bījāvapanaropaṇe |  5518-2 grīṣmādanyatra vallīnāṃ kecidicchanti ropaṇaṃ ||5519-1 ā saṃpravṛddherapi vṛddhikāmaḥ samena saṃdhānamihopagacchet |  5519-2 apakvayorvā ghaṭayoravaśyaṃ anyo'nyabhedī samasaṃnipātaḥ ||5520-1 āsaṃsāraṃ tribhuvanamidaṃ cinvatāṃ tāta tādṛṅnaivāsmākaṃ nayanapadavīṃ śrotravartmāgato vā |  5520-2 yo'yaṃ dhatte viṣayakariṇīgāḍharūḍhābhibhāna- kṣībasyāntaḥkaraṇakariṇaḥ saṃyamālānalīlāṃ ||5521-1 āsaktāḥ pratikoṭaraṃ viṣadharā bhānoḥ karā mūrdhani jvālājālakarāladāvadahanaḥ pratyaṅgamāliṅgati |  5521-2 sarvānandanacārucandanataroretasya jīvātave re jīmūta vimuñca vāri bahuśo yuṣmadyaśo jṛmbhatāṃ ||5522-1 āsajya svayameva cumbanavidhiṃ yācñā vināliṅganaṃ talpānte jaghanena vepathumatā paryarpitaṃ jānunoḥ |  5522-2 krodhotkampamamarṣayatyanunayatyasyāḥ smarakrīḍayā prauḍhaikābhiratiḥ priyasya hṛdayaṃ helābalātkarṣati ||5523-1 āsate śatamadhikṣiti bhūpās toyarāśirasi te khalu kūpāḥ |  5523-2 kiṃ grahā divi na jāgrati te te bhāskarasya katamastulayāste ||5524-1 āsatyalokamakhilaṃ bhuvanaṃ jaleṣu nirmajjayetprakupito jaladhirjavena |  5524-2 kiṃtu svamantayitumudyatamaurvamagniṃ antarvasantamapi hantumasau na śaktaḥ ||5525-1 ā satyalokādā bhūmeḥ svairacārakṛtaśramāḥ |  5525-2 tenurindukarāḥ svedaṃ drutanīhārabhūmikaṃ ||5526-1 āsanaṃ caiva yānaṃ ca saṃdhāya ca vigṛhya ca |  5526-2 kāryaṃ vīkṣya prayuñjīta dvaidhaṃ saṃśrayameva ca ||5527-1 āsanaṃ prāṇasaṃrodhaḥ pratyāhāraśca dhāraṇā |  5527-2 dhyānaṃ samādhiretāni yogāṅgāni smṛtāni ṣaṭ ||5528-1 āsanaṃ prāṇasaṃrodho dhyānaṃ caiva samādhikaḥ |  5528-2 etaccaṭuṣṭayaṃ viddhi sarvayogeṣu saṃmataṃ ||5529-1 āsanācśayanādyānātsaṃgateścāpi bhojanāt |  5529-2 kṛte saṃcarate pāpaṃ tailabindurivāmbhasi ||5530-1 āsanādekaśayyāyāṃ saṃbhāṣātsahabhojanāt |  5530-2 puṃsāṃ saṃkramate pāpaṃ ghaṭādghaṭamivodakaṃ ||5531-1 āsanāvasathau śayyāṃ anuvrajyāmupāsanaṃ |  5531-2 uttameṣūttamaṃ kuryād_hīne hīnaṃ same samaṃ ||5532-1 āsanāśanaśayyābhiradbhirmūlaphalena vā |  5532-2 nāsya kaścidvasedgehe śaktito'narcito'tithiḥ ||5533-1 āsane pādamāropya yo bhuṅkte sa dvijādhamaḥ |  5533-2 mukhena dhamate cānnaṃ tulyaṃ g_oṃāṃsabhakṣaṇaṃ ||5534-1 āsane lālayedbālāṃ taruṇīṃ śayane tathā |  5534-2 utsaṅge patirūḍhāṃ ca lālanaṃ trividhaṃ viduḥ ||5535-1 āsane śayane yāne pānabhojanavastuṣu |  5535-2 dṛṣṭvāntaraṃ pramatteṣu praharantyarayo'riṣu ||5536-1 āsane śayane yāne bhāvā lakṣyā viśeṣataḥ |  5536-2 puruṣāṇāṃ praduṣṭānāṃ svabhāvo valavattaraḥ ||5537-1 āsankṣīṇāni yāvanti cātakāśrūṇi te'mbuda |  5537-2 tāvanto'pi tvayodāra na muktā jalabindavaḥ ||5538-1 āsannataratāmeti mṛtyurjantordine dine |  5538-2 āghātaṃ nīyamānasya vadhyasyeva pade pade ||5539-1 āsannanāśaṃ salilaṃ taṭāke kūpādikānāmatiyatnalabhyaṃ |  5539-2 nadi tvamagryāsi jalāśrayāṇāṃ yasyāṃ yugasthāyi sulambhamambhaḥ ||5540-1 āsannamārgamatilaṅghya natena mūrdhnā paścātprasaṅgavalitena mukhena yāntyā |  5540-2 āropitāḥ katipaye mayi paṅkajākṣyā sākūtahāsamanatiprakaṭāḥ kaṭākṣāḥ ||5541-1 āsannamitrāgamasūcyamāna- samāgame vāsaravallabhasya |  5541-2 niryānti dīpā iva rātribhogyāḥ paśya prabhāte gaṇikāgṛhebhyaḥ ||5542-1 āsannameva nṛpatirbhajate manuṣyaṃ vidyāvihīnamakulīnamasaṃstutaṃ vā |  5542-2 prāyeṇa bhūmipatayaḥ pramadā latāśca yaḥ pārśvato vasati taṃ pariveṣṭayanti ||5543-1 āsannayauvanastvaṃ duhiturme yauvanaṃ tvayā prāyaḥ |  5543-2 kṣapitamalakṣyaṃ strīṇāṃ galati hi sahasaiva tāruṇyaṃ ||5544-1 āsannasevāṃ nṛpateḥ krīḍāśastrāhipāvakaiḥ |  5544-2 kauśalenātimahatā vinītaḥ sānurudhyate (?)||5545-1 āsannāḥ kaṇṭakino ripubhayadāḥ kṣīriṇo'rthanāśāya |  5545-2 phalinaḥ prajākṣayakarā dārūṇyapi varjayetteṣāṃ ||5546-1 āsannānpurato bhogāndarśayitvā punaḥ punaḥ |  5546-2 chāgo haritamuṣṭyeva dūraṃ nīto'smi tṛṣṇayā ||5547-1 āsannābhrajalasya dāvavigame vidyudbhayaṃ śākhino nakrāsyādgalataśca majjanamayī śaṅkā bhavedvāridhau |  5547-2 bhoktavyasya vidhiḥ śubhasya rabhasātsvādutvaniṣpattaye jantoḥ saṃtanute nirākṛtabhiyo bhītyantarotpādanaṃ ||5548-1 āsannāmavalambya kesaralatāmekena puṣpojjvalāṃ savyaṃ niḥsahayā nitambaphalake kṛtvā karāmbhoruhaṃ |  5548-2 āmīlannayanāntavāntasalilaṃ ślāghyasya nindyasya vā kasyedaṃ dṛḍhasauhṛdaṃ pratidinaṃ dīnaṃ tvayā smaryate ||5549-1 āsannāmavalambya kesaralatāmekena puṣpojjvalāṃ savyaṃ niḥsahayā nitambaphalake kṛtvā karāmbhoruhaṃ |  5549-2 udgrīvaṃ vada durdine'dya caraṇāvunnamya mārgastvayābālodbhrāntamṛgekṣaṇe sukṛtinaḥ kasyāyamālokyate ||5550-1 āsannāya sudūrāya suptāya prakaṭātmane |  5550-2 sulabhāyātidurgāya namaścitrāya śaṃbhave ||5551-1 āsanne phalamāsannaṃ dūrage dūragaṃ phalaṃ |  5551-2 miśraṃ tu miśre śakune phalamāhurmanīṣiṇaḥ ||5552-1 āsanno madhurāgataṃ vanabhuvaḥ sāmrājyamityadbhutāḥ śrūyante gira eṣa tattvamiha na jñātuṃ vidhātuḥ kṣamaḥ |  5552-2 yatparṇaistruṭitaṃ tadapyuparataṃ puṣpodgamaiḥ śākhināṃ yadglānaṃ viṭapairidaṃ punariha pratyakṣamālakṣyate ||5553-1 āsanno valmīko dakṣiṇapārśve vibhītasya |  5553-2 adhyardhe bhavati śirā puruṣe jñeyā diśi prācyāṃ ||5554-1 āsanyāvanti yācñāsu cātakāśrūṇi cāmbuda |  5554-2 tāvanto'pi tvayā megha na muktā vāribindavaḥ ||5555-1 ā saptateryasya vivāhapaṅktir vicchidyate nūnamapaṇḍito'sau |  5555-2 jīvanti tāḥ kartanakuṭṭanābhyāṃ gobhyaḥ kimukṣā yavasaṃ dadāti ||5556-1 āsaptamaṃ kulaṃ hanti śiro'bhyaṅge caturdaśī |  5556-2 māṃsāśane pañcadaśī kāmadharme tathāṣṭamī ||5557-1 ā samantāccaturdikṣu sannikṛṣṭāśca ye nṛpāḥ |  5557-2 tatparāstatparā ye'nye kramād_hīnabalārayaḥ ||5558-1 āsamastākṣivikṣepasamarpitamanobhuvāṃ |  5558-2 manmathoddīpanaṃ tāsāṃ viṭavṛttaṃ vidhāsyate ||5559-1 ā sargātprativāsaraṃ rasaśatairyā bodhitā poṣitā kalpāntāvasare'tha saiva pṛthivī svaireva dagdhā karaiḥ |  5559-2 kṛtvetthaṃ kimapi svakarma niyateḥ pūrvāparopaplutaṃ kaṣṭaṃ so'pi dināntavītakiraṇastigmāṃśurastaṃ gataḥ ||5560-1 āsavaratiratibahubhuk kaṭvamlāśī ca karmaṭhaḥ piśunaḥ |  5560-2 sthūlaḥ kṛśo'tidīrghaḥ kharvo vā kṛṣṇapīto vā ||5561-1 āsasāda munirātmanastataḥ śiṣyavargaparikalpitārhaṇaṃ |  5561-2 baddhapallavapuṭāñjalidrumaṃ darśanonmukhamṛgaṃ tapovanaṃ ||5562-1 āsāṃ jalāsphālanatatparāṇāṃ muktāphalaspardhiṣu śīkareṣu |  5562-2 payodharotsarpiṣu śīryamāṇaḥ saṃlakṣyate na cchiduro'pi hāraḥ ||5563-1 āsāṃ vratamatīvākṣṇoryatpuraḥ parisarpaṇaṃ |  5563-2 saha yātaṃ manastatra tyaktvā bhūyo nivartanaṃ ||5564-1 āsāditaprakaṭanirmalacandrahāsaḥ prāptaḥ śaratsamaya eṣa viśuddhakāntaḥ |  5564-2 utkhāya gāḍhatamasaṃ ghanakālamugraṃ rāmo daśāsyamiva saṃbhṛtabandhujīvaḥ ||5565-1 āsāditavyo'sti karālakeśaḥ sakhedayārhaḥ samayo'pakārī |  5565-2 taduttamaślokakathānubandhas tāvadyathā syātprayate tathāhaṃ ||5566-1 āsāditasya tamasā niyaterniyogādākāṅkṣataḥ punarapakramaṇena kālaṃ |  5566-2 patyustviṣāmiha mahauṣadhayaḥ kalatra- sthānaṃ parairanabhibhūtamamūrvahanti ||5567-1 āsādya kṛṣṇapakṣān atrasataḥ sarvadā'bhīkān |  5567-2 parayātmani ratacittān vibhāvya tatkarma kurvataḥ kva bhayaṃ ||5568-1 āsādyate kathaṃ vā śauryāśrayaṇena gauravadhvaṃsaḥ |  5568-2 tattatra dattacittaścittajasaṃtāpabhājanaṃ na janaḥ ||5569-1 āsādya dakṣiṇāṃ diśaṃ avilambaṃ tyajati cottarāṃ taraṇiḥ |  5569-2 puruṣaṃ haranti kāntāḥ prāyeṇa hi dakṣiṇā eva ||5570-1 āsādya bhaṅgamanayā dyūte vihitābhirucitakelipaṇe |  5570-2 niḥsārayatākṣāniti kapaṭaruṣotsāritāḥ sakhyaḥ ||5571-1 āsādya mandarāgo'pi bhujaṅgenātisaṃgatiṃ |  5571-2 tadbhogāttu bhramankaṣṭaṃ prāpnoti viṣamantataḥ ||5572-1 āsādya s_oṃabhuvamāsvahi yatra nityaṃ maṅktuṃ pralobhayati saikatamaṃśukābhaṃ |  5572-2 tattatra nirvahati saṃprati nityakṛtyaṃ etasya vismṛtagṛhasya parānubhūtyā ||5573-1 āsādyāpi mahodadhiṃ na vitṛṣo jāto jalairvāḍavo meghaṃ prāpya na cātako'pi caraṇau bhānuṃ na lebhe'ruṇaḥ |  5573-2 candraḥ śaṃkaraśekhare'pi nivasanpakṣakṣaye kṣīyate prāyaḥ sajjanasaṃgato'pi labhate daivānurūpaṃ phalaṃ ||5574-1 āsādyāmravanīmimāṃ prati navāmāsvādya tanmañjarīṃ maivaṃ pañcamamañca nandanavanabhrāntyā tayā kokila |  5574-2 eṣā vāyasamaṇḍalī ghanaśiraḥśūlāhativyākulā kudhvānairbadhirīkariṣyati vṛthā śrotrāṇi satpatriṇāṃ ||5575-1 āsāmupari dadyācca pānīyasya vicakṣaṇaḥ |  5575-2 evaṃ yāmadvayaṃ kuryāttatastvāsāṃ na dāpayet ||5576-1 āsāyaṃ salilabhare savitāramupāsya sādaraṃ tapasā |  5576-2 adhunābjena manāktava mānini tulanā mukhasyāptā ||5577-1 āsārāntamṛdupravṛttamaruto meghopaliptāmbarāvidyutpātamuhūrtadṛṣṭakakubhaḥ suptendutārāgrahāḥ |  5577-2 dhārāklinnakadambasaṃbhṛtasurāmododvahāḥ proṣitair niḥsaṃpātavisāridarduraravā nītāḥ kathaṃ rātrayaḥ ||5578-1 āsāreṇa na harmyataḥ priyatamairyātuṃ bahiḥ śakyateśītotkampanimittamāyatadṛśā gāḍhaṃ samāliṅgyate |  5578-2 jālaiḥ śīkaraśītalāśca maruto ratyantakhedacchido dhanyānāṃ bata durdinaṃ sudinatāṃ yāti paritaḥ patanti taralāḥ khadyotakaśreṇayaḥ ||5580-1 āsitāni hasitāni kṛtāni prekṣitāni gaditāni gatāni |  5580-2 prāyaśo'nukurute lalitāṅgī nartakīva caturaṃ dayitasya ||5581-1 āsitvā vijane ||5582-1 āsiṣye sukhito gṛhīti vihito mohena dāragrahas tatsaṅgātsutadāsabāndhavasuhṛtsaṃbandhināmudbhavaḥ |  5582-2 tannirvāhakadarthanāparibhavānaucityacintājuṣaḥ kiṃ saukhyaṃ katamā gṛhasthitirato'nartho mayā svīkṛtaḥ ||5583-1 āsījjanaḥ kṛtaghnaḥ kriyamāṇaghnaśca sāṃprataṃ jātaḥ |  5583-2 iti me manasi vitarko bhavitā lokaḥ kathaṃ bhavitā ||5584-1 āsītā maraṇātkṣāntā niyatā tīvraireva tapobhirindurakaroditthaṃ januryāpanaṃ kiṃ kuryādvidhuro na vāñchati vidhistallāñchanaproñchanaṃ ||5586-1 āsīttāmramayaṃ śarīramadhunā sauvarṇavarṇaṃ gataṃ āsītsatyayuge balistadanu ca tretāyuge bhārgavo rāmaḥ satyaparākramo'tha bhagavāndharmastathā dvāpare |  5588-2 dātā ko'pi na cāsti saṃprati kalau jīvanti kenārthinaścetyevaṃ kṛtaniścayena vidhinā phalaṃ ca ||5593-1 āsīdeva yadārdraḥ kimapi tadā kimayamāhato'pyāha |  5593-2 niṣṭhurabhāvādadhunā kaṭūni sakhi raṭati paṭaha iva ||5594-1 āsīdgaṅgādharastasya bhrātā gaṅgādharopamaḥ |  5594-2 ekānbabandha yo vyālānmumocaikānyadṛcchayā ||5595-1 āsīdgaṅgānvayāyakṣitipatitilako rājarājakṣitīśaḥkṣmāpālaprauḍhamauliprakaramaṇiruciprasphuratpādapīṭhaḥ |  5595-2 yo'rātikṣatracakrakrathanakarabhujāpālitāśeṣapṛt_hvī-cakraścakrāyudhābho'dadhadurasi ramāṃ vāci vācāmadhīśaḥ ||5596-1 āsīdyastava putrakastricaturaiḥ patrāṅkurairāvṛtomeghonmuktajalaikajīvanavidhiḥ 5598-2 tāṃ premākulavīkṣitāṃ smitamukhīṃ savrīḍamandāgamāṃ śliṣyantīṃ praṇayārdramugdhalapitāṃ paśyāmi naktaṃdivaṃ ||5599-1 āsīnaḥ sukhamāpaṇe yadi vaṇikśraddhālubhiḥ prārthitaḥ kiṃcicśaṃsati ||5604-1 āsīnaiḥ svaṃ vimānaṃ kṛtaparivṛtibhiḥ sundarīsaṃgataistair devaiḥ siddhaiśca yakṣairanimiṣanayanairdṛśyamānaḥ satṛṣṇaṃ |  5604-2 madhyemaghye payodairmurajasadṛśatāṃ bodhayadbhiḥ sumanda- 5621-2 etenaiva virantumarhasi na te gaṇḍūṣapānādhikā kācitkhyātirataḥparaṃ paramasau parjanyanīvīvyayaḥ ||5622-1 āstāṃ tatkarakānipātakṛtabhīmaṇḍūkanirmajjana- kṣemaikakṣamavāri palvalaśataṃ vidhṛtaṃ svodareṇāpi ghnanti putramapi svakaṃ ||5624-1 āstāṃ tāvadakīrtirme tvayā tathyaṃ tu kathyatāṃ |  5624-2 cittaṃ kathamivāsītte harivaṃśīravaśrutau ||5625-1 āstāṃ tāvadasīmapauruṣajuṣaḥ ||5626-1 āstāṃ tāvadaho samudramahimā dūre'pi karṇapriyas tīre yasya pipāsayaiva maraṇaṃ prāpnoti śīghraṃ janaḥ |  5626-2 tasmādambunidhervaraṃ laghusaraḥ kūpo'thavā vāpikā yatra svātmakaradvayena kasyāgamiṣyacchrutipathamavapurvaktraśeṣo'pi rāhus trailokyakhyātadhāmnoryadi raviśaśinorvairitāṃ nākariṣyat ||5628-1 āstāṃ tāvadvacanaracanābhājanatvaṃ vidūre dūre cāstāṃ tava guṇarucirbhūyaḥ sāṃprataṃ te'pi durlabhāḥ ||5630-1 āstāṃ dūratayā tadīyavadanāmbhojāmṛtāsvādanaṃ nodetyeva manoratho'pi hṛdaye tatsaṃgamāśāṃ prati |  5630-2 utkaṇṭhāśithilīkṛtāṅgalatikaṃ vīkṣeta
