varatanorvaktraśriyaścetkathā koṇe kutracidāsatāṃ kuvalayānyakṣṇoḥ prasaṅgo yadi |  5633-2 dūre tiṣṭhatu vallakīkalaravaḥ prastāvanā cedgirāṃ vārttā cedavalagnakasya yaśasāṃ vy_oṃnaḥ prathāyai namaḥ ||5634-1 āstāṃ mahābodhabalena sādhyo mokṣo vibādhāmalasaukhyayuktaḥ |  5634-2 dharmārthakāmā api no bhavanti jñānaṃ vinā tena tadarcanīyaṃ ||5635-1 āstāṃ mādya bhave śubhe sakhi latā nyastā tvayā mādhavī kānte tanmama saṃprayaccha kusumaṃ kiṃ vāmunā me phalaṃ |  5635-2 nālpaṃ nirmalayāmi mauktikamidaṃ nyastaṃ tvayā dahyatāṃ itthaṃ vibhramasaṃbhramo madayati preyāṃsameṇīdṛśaḥ ||5636-1 āstāṃ mānaḥ kathanaṃ sakhīṣu vā mayi nivedyadurvinaye |  5636-2 śithilitaratiguṇagarvā mamāpi sā lajjitā sutanuḥ ||5637-1 āstāṃ varamavakeśī mā dohadamasya racaya pūgataroḥ |  5637-2 etasmātphalitādapi kevalamudvegamadhigaccha ||5638-1 āstāṃ viśvasanaṃ sakhīṣu viditābhiprāyasāre jane tatrāpyarpayituṃ dṛśaṃ salilatāṃ śakn_oṃi na vrīḍayā |  5638-2 loko hyeṣa paropahāsacaturaḥ sūkṣmeṅgitajño'pyalaṃ mātaḥ kaṃ śaraṇaṃ vrajāmi hṛdaye jīrṇo'nurāgānalaḥ ||5639-1 āstāṃ sakaṇṭakamidaṃ vasudhādhipatyaṃ trailokyarājyamapi deva tṛṇāya manye|  5639-2 niḥśaṅkasuptahariṇīkulasaṃkulāsu cetaḥ paraṃ valati śailavanasthalīṣu ||5640-1 āstāmanaṅgīkaraṇādbhavena dṛśyaḥ smaro neti purāṇavāṇī |  5640-2 tavaiva dehaṃ śritayā śriyeti navastu vastu pratibhāti vādaḥ ||5641-1 āstāmanyatsujanāḥ ||5643-1 āstāmeva sarovareṇya bhavato dugdhodalabdhāmṛta- svādaspardhi sarojavṛndakhacitaṃ haṃsāvataṃsaṃ payaḥ |  5643-2 sphārollolasuśītaśīkaracayāsāraprasiktānila- sparśaireva manoharairapagatāḥ nibhṛtaṃ tarkayāmo na vidmaḥ ||5645-1 āstīkavacanaṃ smṛtvā yaḥ sarpo na nivartate |  5645-2 śatadhā bhidyate mūrdhni śiṃśavṛkṣaphalaṃ yathā ||5646-1 āstīryantāmupānte vanavṛtinipuṇairjālikairjālabandhā mucyantāṃ śṛṅkhalābhyaḥ śvagaṇabhiraṭavīgahvare sārameyāḥ |  5646-2 ākīryantāṃ sthalāni śramaśithilahayaiḥ sādibhiḥ pāśahastair vyādhūyantāṃ kṛtāntairiva mahiṣacarairdaṇḍibhiḥ kānanāni ||5647-1 āstṛte'bhinavapallavapuṣpair apyanārataratābhiratābhyaḥ |  5647-2 dīyate sma śayituṃ śayanīye na kṣaṇaḥ kṣaṇadayāpi vadhūbhyaḥ ||5648-1 āste kaścana bhikṣuḥ saṃgṛhṇannavyayāni daśa |  5648-2 na mametyavyayayugalaṃ yācāmastaṃ kimastyanyat ||5649-1 āste'traiva sarasyaho bata kiyānsaṃtoṣapakṣagraho haṃsasyāsya manāṅna dhāvati matiḥ śrīdhāmni padme kvacit |  5649-2 supto'dyāpi vibudhyate na taditastāvatpratīkṣāmahe velāmityuṣasi priyā madhulihaḥ soḍhuṃ ta eva kṣamāḥ ||5650-1 āste dāmodarīyāmiyamudaradarīṃ yāvalambya trilokī saṃmātuṃ śaknuvanti ||5652-1 āste no suṣamā na cāpi kusumāmodo hi no vā manāk cāturyaṃ makarandadānaviṣaye kiṃ cāturīyaṃ punaḥ |  5652-2 yattvaṃ citragataṃ kuśeśayadalaṃ puṣṇāsi guñjāravair māhātmyaṃ ka iva bravīmi vimuktanidro'pi |  5725-2 āgantuko'pi pathikaḥ śaithilyaṃ naiva vijahāti ||5726-1 āhūto malayācalātpracalito mauhurtiko māruto nediṣṭhāḥ pathi santi kokilagaṇā gīte pratiṣṭhābhṛtaḥ |  5726-2 āptābhiḥ prativeśinībhirabhitaḥ saṃtyajya kundālayaṃ soṣyantī sahakārasaṃtatiraliśreṇībhirāveṣṭyate ||5727-1 āhūto vāpyanāhūto yo rājñāṃ dvāri tiṣṭhati |  5727-2 sa vai rājyaśriyaṃ bhuṅkte nāvamānī kadācana ||5728-1 āhūto hālikenāśrutamiva vacanaṃ tasya kṛtvā kṣaṇaikaṃ tiṣṭhāsustabdhar_oṃā kathamapi viṭapaṃ niḥsamīraṃ vihāya |  5728-2 dorbhyāmāvṛtya vakṣaḥsthalamalasagatirdīnapādapracāraḥśītkārotkampabhinnasphuṭadadharapuṭaḥ pāmaraḥ kṣetrameti ||5729-1 āhṛtābhyudyatāṃ bhikṣāṃ purastādapracoditāṃ |  5729-2 mene prajāpatirgrāhyāṃ api veśyā ca śrīśca kasya kadā sthirā ||5732-1 āhnikottāpadagdhānāṃ trayāṇāṃ jagatāṃ bata |  5732-2 tapanārciṣi śānte tadbhasmedaṃ timiraṃ tu na ||5733-1 āhlādayatveṣa kharairnakhāgrair daiteyavakṣaḥkhanimutkhananvaḥ |  5733-2 prahlādahṛdyaṃ hṛdaye dvitīyaṃ anveṣṭumicchanniva sūnuratnaṃ ||5734-1 āhlādahetuniravadyaśarīrayaṣṭi- lāvaṇyakāntikaluṣīkaraṇena tāsāṃ |  5734-2 ||5737-1 ikṣutvakkṣodasārāḥ śakaṭasaraṇayo dhīradhūlīpatākāḥ pākasvīkāranamre śirasi niviśate śūkaśāleḥ śukālī |  5737-2 kedārebhyaḥ praṇālaiḥ praviśati śapharīpaṅktirādhāramārādacchaḥ kaccheṣu phalamauṣadhaṃ |  5739-2 bhakṣayitvāpi kartavyāḥ snānadānādikāḥ kriyāḥ ||5740-1 ikṣurdhanva śarāḥ prasūnavitatirbhṛṅgāvalī siñjinīyasyājñāvaśavartinaḥ pramanaso nirviṣṭarāṣṭrādayaḥ |  5740-2 5763-2 piṅgalāyāṃ tathā dīpte dvayoḥ kvāpi na śobhanaḥ ||5764-1 iḍā ca piṅgalā caiva suṣumṇā ca sarasvatī |  5764-2 gāndhārī hastijihvā ca pūṣā caiva nigadyate ||5765-1 alambuṣā kuhūścaiva iḍāyāṃ yadi bhūmyambutattve pravahatastadā |  5767-2 sthiras_oṃyādikāryāṇāṃ ārambhaḥ siddhikṛdbhavet ||5768-1 iḍā s_oṃasya nāḍī syātpiṅgalā sūryanāḍikā |  5768-2 iḍā s_oṃyā bhavetvāmā piṅgalogrā ca śuklā candradyutibhiriha raktāruṇakarais tamisrairapyantaḥskhalitagatibhirmecakaruciḥ |  5776-2 prabhātaśrīreṣā vilasati purasthā sukṛtināṃ mimaṅkṣūṇāṃ jahnudyumaṇividhijāsaṃgama iva ||5777-1 itaḥ  5779-2 ito'pi vaḍavānalaḥ saha samastasaṃvartakair aho vitatamūrjitaṃ bharasahaṃ ca sindhorvapuḥ ||5780-1 itaradeva bahirmukhamucyate hṛdi tu yatsphuratītaradeva tat |  5780-2 ||5782-1 itarabhajanaghanarasataḥ phalaniṣpattirnavā bhavediti na |  5782-2 muktāḥ paraṃ tu loke svātighanarasaṃ vinā na jāyeran ||5783-1 itarāṇyapi rakṣāṃsi peturvānarakoṭiṣu |  5783-2 rajāṃsi ||5788-1 itaścandraḥ sāndraḥ smaramayavayaḥsaṃdhimadhuraḥsphuranmugdhākelismitamiva mayūkhaiḥ sukhayati |  5788-2 cakorāṇāṃ cakraṃ kumudasamudāyo'pi ca ||5794-1 itastato'sminvilasanti meroḥ samānavapre maṇisānurāgāḥ |  5794-2 striyaśca patyau surasundarībhiḥ samā navapremaṇi sānurāgāḥ ||5795-1 itastāvannetre valaya malayādre nidhirapāṃ 5808-2 dviraṣṭasaṃvatsaravārasundarī- parīṣṭibhistuṣṭimupeyuṣāṃ niśi ||5809-1 iti dharmatarormūlaṃ aśuddhaṃ yasya mānasaṃ |  5809-2 śuddhaṃ yasya ca tadrūpaṃ phalaṃ tasya na saṃśayaḥ ||5810-1 iti nikhilamudāramarthasārtha- praṇihitamekamiheva khaḍgaśāstre |  5810-2 giriśamatamidaṃ niṣevya cakre kṣitipatimantrisamūhacakravartī ||5811-1 iti netrādivikārair vaśamupanītaṃ pralīnadhairyāṅgaṃ |  5811-2 māragrahābhibhūtaṃ parimṛṣṭaprāṅnirākṛtismaraṇaṃ ||5812-1 prādurbhūtariraṃsaṃ kṣaṇe kṣaṇe jaghanadeśagatadṛṣṭiṃ |  5812-2 pakvāmramiva vimokṣyasi pūrvavadācūṣya niḥśeṣaṃ ||5813-1 iti pathi viniveśitātmano ripurapi gacchati sādhu mitratāṃ |  5813-2 tadavanipatimatsarādṛte vinayaguṇena jagadvaśaṃ nayet ||5814-1 iti parigaṇitārthaḥ śāstramārgānusārī niyamayati yatātmā yaḥ prajā daṇḍanītyā |  5814-2 apunarapagamāya prāptamārgapracārā sarita iva samudraṃ saṃpadastaṃ viśanti||5815-1 iti pariṇayamitthaṃ yānamekatra yāne daracakitakaṭākṣaprekṣaṇaṃ cānayostatat |  5815-2 divi parataḥ ||5994-1 induḥ prayāsyati vinaṅkṣyati tārakaśrīḥ sthāsyanti līḍhatimirā na maṇipradīpāḥ |  5994-2 andhaṃ samagramapi kīṭamaṇe bhaviṣyaty unmeṣameṣyati bhavānapi durametat ||5995-1 induprabhārasavidaṃ vihagaṃ vihāya kīrānane sphurasi bhārati kā ratiste |  5995-2 ādyaṃ yadi śrayasi jalpatu k_oṃudīnāṃ govindarājavacasāṃ ca viśeṣameṣaḥ ||5996-1 indubimbādivotkīrṇaṃ padmagarbhādivoddhṛtaṃ |  5996-2 vadanaṃ tava tanvaṅgi vimṛśadbhirvibhāvyate ||5996ā-1 indubhāskarayoryatra nabhaḥsaṃcārakhinnayoḥ |  5996ā-2 patākāḥ pavanādhūtāḥ bhajante tālavṛntatāṃ ||5997-1 indumindumukhi lokaya lokaṃ bhānubhānubhiramuṃ paritaptaṃ |  5997-2 vījituṃ rajanihastagṛhītaṃ tālavṛntamiva nālavihīnaṃ ||5998-1 indumindradigasūta sarasvān uttaraṅgabhujarājiranṛtyat |  5998-2 ujjaharṣa jhaṣaketuravāpuḥ ṣaṭpadāḥ kumudabandhanamokṣaṃ ||5999-1 indumukhī kumudākṣī rambhorū kamalacārukaracaraṇā |  5999-2 amṛtadravalāvaṇyā hṛdayagatā devi kiṃ dahasi ||6000-1 indurinduriti kiṃ durāśayā bindureṣa payaso vilokyate |  6000-2 nanvidaṃ vijayate mṛgīdṛśaḥ śyāmak_oṃalakapolamānanaṃ ||6001-1 indurmūrdhni śivasya śailaduhiturvakro nakhāṅkaḥ stanedeyādvo'bhyudayaṃ dvayaṃ tadupamāmālambamānaṃ mithaḥ |  6001-2 samvādaḥ praṇavena yasya dalatā kāyaikatāyāṃ tayor ūrdhvadvāravicintitena ca hṛdi dhyātasvarūpeṇa ca ||6002-1 induryatra na nindyate na madhuraṃ dūtīvacaḥ śrūyate nālāpā nipatanti bāṣpakaluṣā nopaiti kārśyaṃ tanuḥ |  6002-2 svādhīnāmanukūlinīṃ svagṛhiṇīmāliṅgya yatsupyate tatkiṃ prema gṛhāśramavratamidaṃ kaṣṭaṃ samācaryate ||6003-1 induryadyudayādrimūrdhni na bhavatyadyāpi tanmā sma bhūn nāsīre'pi tamaḥsamuccayamamūrunmūlayanti tviṣaḥ |  6003-2 apyakṣṇormudamudgiranti kumudairāmodayante diśaḥsaṃpratyūrdhvamasau tu lāñchanamabhivyaṅktuṃ prakāśiṣyate ||6004-1 indurlipta ivāñjanena jaḍitā dṛṣṭirmṛgīṇāmiva pramlānāruṇimeva vidrumadalaṃ śyāmeva hemaprabhā |  6004-2 kārkaśyaṃ kalayā ca kokilavadhūkaṇṭheṣviva prastutaṃ sundaryāḥ purataśca hanta śikhināṃ barhāḥ sagarhā iva ||6005-1 induvratasahasraṃ tu caredyaḥ kāyaśodhanaṃ |  6005-2 pibedyaścāpi gaṅgāmbhaḥ samau syātāṃ na vā samau ||6006-1 industvadyaśasā jito'vanipate bhāsāṃnidhistejasā kandarpo vapuṣā sudhājalanidhirvāco vilāsena ca |  6006-2 tathyaṃ te jayaśīlametadadhunā tvaddānamaddainyayor madhye kaṃ nu vijeṣyatīti viṣaye dolāyate me manaḥ ||6007-1 indūdayaścandanaminduvaktraścaitrastathā yasya mahāya saṃpat |  6007-2 vapuśca śṛṅgāramayaṃ sa manye saṃtāpakastvaṃ haravahniyogāt ||6008-1 indoḥ kalākalāpena paṅktikramaniveśinā |  6008-2 sarvaduḥkhāpanodāya bālakānāṃ kṛtā bhujāḥ ||6009-1 indoḥ kāntiṃ jaḍatarakarānmattanāgādgatiṃ vā trastānnetre harasi hariṇāttatra kiṃ nāma citraṃ |  6009-2 etaccitraṃ punariha jagajjaitrakandarpacāpa- śrīsarvasvaṃ yadapaharasi preyasi bhrūvilāsaiḥ ||6010-1 indoḥ kiṃ druhiṇasya vā surapateḥ kiṃ vā kṛtāntasya vā kiṃ bhūteśa diśāsthi bhūṣaṇagaṇeśvākṛṣya deyaṃ mayā |  6010-2 itthaṃ maṇḍanamandirodaracaravyāhārato bhīkarāthbhītā yasya surāḥ prasādhanavidhau pāyātsa vaḥ śaṃkaraḥ ||6011-1 indoḥ saṃkṣayarakṣiṇākṣatasudhā kiṃ vedhasā nirmitā kiṃ dhairyāpaharā harasya vihitā kāmena kāntā tanuḥ |  6011-2 kiṃ tāruṇyavasantakāntilalitā śṛṅgārasiktā latā kiṃ lāvaṇyataraṅgiṇī punariyaṃ janmāntarāptā ratiḥ ||6012-1 indoragatayaḥ padme sūryasya kumudeṃ'śavaḥ |  6012-2 guṇāstasya vipakṣe'pi guṇino lebhire'ntaraṃ ||6013-1 indorasya triyāmāyuvatikucataṭīcandanasthāsakasya vy_oṃaśrīcāmarasya tripuraharajaṭāvallarīkorakasya |  6013-2 kaṃdarpakṣoṇipālasphaṭikamaṇigṛhasyaitadākha ṇḍalāśā- nāsāmuktāphalasya sthagayati jagatīṃ ko'pi bhāsāṃ vilāsaḥ ||6014-1 indorivāsya purato yadvimukhī sāpavāraṇā bhramasi |  6014-2 tatkathaya kiṃ nu duritaṃ sakhi tvayā chāyayeva kṛtaṃ ||6015-1 indorekakalāyā rudreṇoddhṛtya mūrdhani dhṛtāyāḥ |  6015-2 sthānamiva tucchametathkalaṅkarūpeṇa pariṇamati ||6016-1 indorlakṣma tripurajayinaḥ kaṇṭhamūlaṃ murārir diṅnāgānāṃ madajalamasībhāñji gaṇḍasthalāni |  6016-2 adyāpyurvīvalayatilaka śyāmalimnāvaliptāny ābhāsante vada dhavalitaṃ kiṃ yaśobhistvadīyaiḥ ||6017-1 indoścandanabindunaiva daśanacchāyaṃ tadīyaṃ mukhaṃ cakraṃ locanabhallamārjanavidhau śāṇasya tatkuṇḍalaṃ |  6017ā-2 bhinnānāṃ kucakandarā smitasudhākulyeva muktāvalī pādābje dhvanadindranīlavalayaṃ rolambamālaiva sā ||6017ā-1 indau nindyā cakorairasamayati niśājāgaraḥ puṇḍarīkaiḥ bhṛṅgaiḥ śīdhunyasaṅgaḥ śaradi samadhikā glānirindīvaraiśca |  6017-2 bhrūbhaṅge yasya vairākarayuvatidṛśāmekamevopamānaṃ paśyāmyaśrāntabāṣpaprakaramayajharīgūdacārāścamaryaḥ ||6018-1 indraṃ dvyakṣadharaṃ tvamanthamudadhiṃ pañcānanaṃ padmajaṃ sindhuṃ svādujalaṃ śivaṃ sitagalaṃ kāmaṃ ca sadvigrahaṃ |  6018-2 śailānpakṣadharāṃstathaiva ca hayāṃllakṣmīpatiṃ piṅgalaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ sarvamidaṃ kvacinna raghurāḍdattaṃ svayaṃ hāritaṃ ||6019-1 indraṃ vai ṣaṇḍhamāhurmalinamuḍupatiṃ mādhavaṃ gopasūnuṃ vyāsaṃ matsītanūjaṃ gatarasamudadhiṃ pāvakaṃ sarvabhakṣaṃ |  6019-2 veśyāputraṃ vasiṣṭhaṃ janapadavacanaiḥ pāṇḍavāścānyajātā itthaṃ saṃcintya mahyaṃ kathaya narapate kasya doṣā na santi ||6020-1 indraḥ prakṣubdhacitto diśi diśi sakalāndikpatīnsāvadhānān kurvanvajrāstrapāṇiḥ suravaravalitāṃ devasenāṃ nigṛhya |  6020-2 svargadvāre yadīyoddhatabalinihataprauḍhaḍhakkāninādaṃ śrutvātiṣṭhatprakampatkucakalaśataṭīkinnarīgīyamānaḥ ||6021-1 indraḥ pradhānaṃ divi daivateṣu vipro manuṣyeṣu nadīṣu gaṅgā |  6021-2 gāvaḥ paśuṣveṣu dhaneṣu dhānyaṃ sarvatra gātrasya śiraḥ pradhānaṃ ||6021ā-1 indragopakaparamparā bhṛśaṃ kānaneṣu śuśubhe visarpiṇī |  6021ā-2 prāvṛṣaḥ sarabhasāgamāccyutā padmarāgaghaṭiteva karṇikā ||6022-1 indragopairbabhau bhūmirnicitaiva pravāsināṃ |  6022-2 anaṅgabāṇairhṛdbhedasrutalohitabindubhiḥ ||6023-1 indrajiccaṇḍavīryo'si nāmnaiva balavānasi |  6023-2 dhikdhikpracchannarūpeṇa yudhyase'smadbhayākulaḥ ||6024-1 indranīlaśukapakṣak_oṃalā śaṅkhakundakumudendusaṃnibhā |  6024-2 taptakāñcanavikāsicampaka- spardhinī vasumatī praśasyate ||6025-1 indrastvaṃ nṛpa sundarī tava śacī putro jayantopamo gehaṃ bhāti ca vaijayantasadṛśaṃ nāgo'bhramorvallabhaḥ |  6025-2 itthaṃ bodhakarairasatyavacanaiḥ svairaṃ stutaḥ svaṃ hariṃ vetti prasphuṭavikramaṃ sa mahimā jñeyo harermāyinaḥ ||6026-1 indrasya vajreṇa hato vṛtrāsuramahāyaśāḥ |  6026-2 medasā sarvavicchinnaṃ tadarthamupalepanaṃ ||6027-1 indrasyārkasya vāyośca yamasya varuṇasya ca |  6027-2 candrasya ca pṛthivyāśca nṛpaḥ saptaguṇo bhavet ||6028-1 indrātprabhutvaṃ jvalanātpratāpaṃ krodho yamādvaiśravaṇācca vittaṃ |  6028-2 parākramaṃ rāmajanārdanābhyāṃ ādāya rājñaḥ kriyate śarīraṃ ||6029-1 indrādyā lokapālā harividhutapanā nāgavidyādharādyā dveṣyāḥ sarve'pi devāḥ priya tava varadaḥ ko'sti vandyo garīyān |  6029-2 śrutvā vācaṃ priyāyā iti daśamukhataḥ prāha vākyaṃ daśāsyaḥ śūlī śaṃbhuḥ pinākī śivabhavapaśupaḥ śarva īśaśca bhargaḥ ||6030-1 indrādyaiḥ kiṃ pradattaṃ pradiśasi dhavalaṃ dhāma dhanyaṃ yadebhyo mahyaṃ yannāpi dhatse tṛṇaghaṭitakuṭīṃ kiṃ mayā te'parāddhaṃ |  6030-2 viśvebhyo viśvamātarvitarasi yadi vā śarma karmānusāriprottuṅgāyāḥ kṛpāyāstava tuhinagireḥ putri kutropayogaḥ ||6031-1 indrānilayamārkāṇāṃ agneśca varuṇasya ca |  6031-2 candravitteśayoścāpi mātrā nirhṛtya śāśvatīḥ ||6032-1 indrābhyarthanayā pūrvaṃ bharatāya caturmukhaḥ |  6032-2 pramodāya mahendrasya nāṭyaṃ samupadiṣṭavān ||6033-1 indrāya vīkṣamāṇas tanmukhamāsvādayannanantāya |  6033-2 spṛhayāmi cādya dayitāṃ āliṅgankārtavīryāya ||6034-1 indriyaṃ vijitaṃ yena tenaiva bhuvanaṃ jitaṃ |  6034-2 yaścendriyaiḥ parābhūtaḥ sa sarvatra parājitaḥ ||6035-1 indriyasyendriyasyārthe rāgadveṣau vyavasthitau |  6035-2 tayorna vaśamāgacchettau hyasya paripanthinau ||6036-1 indriyāṇāṃ jaye yogaṃ samātiṣṭheddivāniśaṃ |  6036-2 jitendriyo hi śaknoti vaśe sthāpayituṃ prajāḥ ||6037-1 indriyāṇāṃ jaye śūro dharmaṃ carati paṇḍitaḥ |  6037-2 satyavādī bhavedvaktā dātā bhavati vā na vā ||6038-1 indriyāṇāṃ tu sarveṣāṃ yadyekaṃ kṣaratīndriyaṃ |  6038-2 tato'sya kṣarati prajñā dṛteḥ pādādivodakaṃ ||6039-1 indriyāṇāṃ nirodhena rāgadveṣakṣayeṇa ca |  6039-2 ahiṃsayā ca bhūtānāṃ amṛtatvāya kalpate ||6040-1 indriyāṇāṃ prasaṅgena doṣamṛcchatyasaṃśayaṃ |  6040-2 saṃniyamya tu tānyeva tataḥ siddhiṃ niyacchati ||6041-1 indriyāṇāṃ prasaṅgena dharmasyāsevanena ca |  6041-2 pāpānsaṃyānti saṃsārānavidvāṃso narādhamāḥ ||6042-1 indriyāṇāṃ prasṛṣṭānāṃ hayānāmiva vartmasu |  6042-2 dhṛtiṃ kurvīta sārathye dhṛtyā tāni jayeddhruvaṃ ||6043-1 indriyāṇāṃ vicaratāṃ viṣayeṣvapahāriṣu |  6043-2 saṃyame yatnamātiṣṭhedvidvānyanteva vājināṃ ||6044-1 indriyāṇāṃ hi caratāṃ yanmano'nuvidhīyate |  6044-2 tadasya harati prajñāṃ vāyurnāvamivāmbhasi ||6045-1 indriyāṇāmadhiṣṭhātrī bhūtānāṃ cākhileṣu yā |  6045-2 bhūteṣu satataṃ tasyai vyāptyai devyai namo namaḥ ||6046-1 indriyāṇāmanutsargo mṛtyunā na viśiṣyate |  6046-2 atyarthaṃ punarutsargaḥ sādayeddaivatānyapi ||6047-1 indriyāṇi ca saṃyamya rāgadveṣavivarjitaḥ |  6047-2 samaduḥkhasukhaḥ śāntaḥ tattvajñaḥ sādhurucyate ||6048-1 indriyāṇi parāṇyāhurindriyebhyaḥ paraṃ manaḥ |  6048-2 manasastu parā buddhiryo buddheḥ paratastu saḥ ||6049-1 indriyāṇi paśūnkṛtvā vedīṃ kṛtvā tap_oṃayīṃ |  6049-2 ahiṃsāmāhutiṃ kṛtvā ātmayajñaṃ yajāmyahaṃ ||6050-1 indriyāṇi purā jitvā jitaṃ tribhuvanaṃ tvayā |  6050-2 smaradbhariva taidvairaṃ indriyaireva nirjitaḥ ||6051-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  6051-2 indriyāṇi pramāthīni harantyapi yatermanaḥ ||6052-1 indriyāṇi manaḥ prāṇo jñānamāyuḥ sukhaṃ dhṛtiḥ |  6052-2 dhāraṇā preraṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ icchāhaṅkāra eva ca ||6053-1 prayatna ākṛtirvarṇaḥ svaradveṣau bhavābhavau |  6053-2 tasyaitadātmajaṃ sarvaṃ anāderādimicchataḥ ||6054-1 indriyāṇi mano buddhirasyādhiṣṭhānamucyate |  6054-2 etairvimohayatyeṣa jñānamāvṛtya dehinaṃ ||6055-1 indriyāṇi mahatprepsurniyacchedarthadharmayoḥ |  6055-2 indriyairniyatairbuddhirvardhate'gnirivendhanaiḥ ||6056-1 indriyāṇīndriyārthebhyaḥ prāṇādīnmana eva ca |  6056-2 nigṛhya samavāyena pratyāhāramupakramet ||6057-1 indriyāṇyanupakleśya labhyaṃ śreyo gṛhāśrame |  6057-2 atasturyāśramaṃ prāhurabādhanyāyabādhitaṃ ||6058-1 indriyāṇyantaraṅgāṇi pātayanti yathā janān |  6058-2 abhyantarāstathā rāṣṭre bhṛtyāḥ svārthaparāyaṇāḥ ||6059-1 indriyāṇyeva tatsarvaṃ yatsvarganarakāvubhau |  6059-2 nigṛhītavisṛṣṭāni svargāya narakāya ca ||6060-1 indriyārtheṣu sarveṣu na prasajyeta kāmataḥ |  6060-2 atiprasaktiṃ caiteṣāṃ manasā saṃnivartayet ||6061-1 indriyairindracandrādyā hrepitā yaiḥ surā api |  6061-2 aparimlānamānatvaṃ tairmartyasyāthavā kathaṃ ||6062-1 indriyairindriyārtheṣu vartamānairanigrahaiḥ |  6062-2 tairayaṃ tāpyate loko nakṣatrāṇi grahairiva ||6063-1 indro nindati vāhamāha dinakṛttvarvvācamevārvataścañcūrnyañcati kiṃ na pannagariporantastrapodrekataḥ |  6063-2 vātaḥ khañjati paṅgupuñjati manorājirbbhavadvājiṣu dbeṣādājiṣu vairiṇāmabhimukhaṃ dhāvatsu yāvatsukhaṃ ||6064-1 indro yacchatamanyurasti dahano yatpāvako'pyantakaḥ kīnāśo dhanado vimānanirataḥ pāśī jalānāṃ patiḥ |  6064-2 īśaḥ kāmaharaścalo yadanilo yannairṛto rākṣasas tannānyo'vanilokapāla bhavataḥ kaścitsamaḥ syādguṇaiḥ ||6065-1 indro yamo'si varuṇo'si hutāśano'si brahmā haro harirasītyasakṛdyaduktiḥ |  6065-2 bhūpālamaulimaṇirañjitapādapīṭha tasyānṛtasya phalamindhanamudvahāmi ||6066-1 ibhakumbhatuṅgakaṭhinetaretara- stanabhāradūravinivāritodarāḥ |  6066-2 pariphullagaṇḍaphalakāḥ parasparaṃ parirebhire kukurakauravastriyaḥ ||6067-1 ibhyā yadi nṛpadvāre saṃmanyante kimadbhutaṃ |  6067-2 idānīṃ vibudhadvāre teṣāmeva puraskriyā ||6068-1 imaṃ kanakavarṇābhaṃ bhūṣaṇaiḥ samalaṃkṛtaṃ |  6068-2 gṛdhravākyātkathaṃ putraṃ tyajadhvaṃ pitṛpiṇḍadaṃ ||6069-1 imaṃ tilasumāyitaṃ yuvatināsikāsaṃpuṭaṃ vibhāvya sumanojano manasi modamāpadyate |  6069-2 sakhe bhujagamutphaṇaṃ saviṣaphūtkṛtāhaṃkṛtaṃ vibhāvaya na tatspṛhāṃ kuru jahīhi taddṛśyatāṃ ||6070-1 imaṃ parityajya paraṃ raṇādariḥ svameva bhagnaḥ śaraṇaṃ budhāviśat |  6070-2 na vetti yattrātumitaḥ kṛtasmayo na durgayā śailabhuvāpi śakyate ||6071-1 imaṃ lokaṃ mātṛbhaktyā pitṛbhaktyā tu madhyamaṃ |  6071-2 guruśuśrūṣayā tveva brahmalokaṃ samaśnute ||6072-1 imāṃ ca vindyādanuraktaceṣṭāṃ priyāṇi vakti svadhanaṃ dadāti |  6072-2 vilokya saṃhṛṣyati vītaroṣā pramārṣṭi doṣānguṇakīrtanena ||6073-1 imāṃ parīpsurdurjāte parābhibhavakātarāṃ |  6073-2 bhartṛpriyaḥ priyairbharturānṛṇyamasubhirgataḥ ||6074-1 imāṃ vidhātuṃ bhujavallimujjvalāṃ gṛhītasāraṃ vidhinā natabhruvaḥ |  6074-2 kaṭhorabhāvapriyameva kevalaṃ mṛṇālamantastaralaṃ kuto'nyathā ||6075-1 imāṃ sāgaraparyantāṃ himavadvindhyakuṇḍalāṃ |  6075-2 mahīmekātapatrāṅkāṃ rājasiṃhaḥ praśāstu naḥ ||6076-1 imāni prāyaśastāni veśyāsvevaṃ pradāpayet |  6076-2 sā muñcatyacirātsarvaṃ upabhogaṃ tadātmanaḥ ||6077-1 imā yadi bhavanti no galitayauvanā nīrucas tadā kamalalocanāstaruṇamāninīrmā mucat |  6077-2 vilāsamadavibhramānbhramati luṇṭhayatrī jarā yato bhuvi vadhustato bhavati niḥspṛhastanmukhe ||6078-1 imā rūpasthānasvajanatanayadravyavanitā-sutālakṣmīkīrtidyutiratimatiprītidhṛtayaḥ |  6078-2 madāndhastrīnetraprakṛticapalāḥ sarvabhavināṃ aho kaṣṭaṃ martyastadapi viṣayānsevitumanāḥ ||6079-1 imāstāḥ kastūrīprakharakhuraṭaṅkakṣatataṭās taṭinyo'raṇyānīmanu kamalinīcchannasalilāḥ |  6079-2 jale yāsāṃ haṃsā bisakisalayagrāsarasikāḥ salīlaṃ līyante yuvatigatividyaikaguravaḥ ||6080-1 imāstā vindhyādreḥ śukaharitavaṃśīvanaghanā bhuvaḥ krīḍāloladviradadaśanābhugnataravaḥ |  6080-2 latākuñje yāsāmupanadi rataklāntaśabarī- kapolasvedāmbhaḥkaṇacayanudo vānti marutaḥ ||6081-1 imā hindolāsu bhramitamahasaḥ kuṅkumarucātrapārūpākārāstaralatarahārāścaladṛśaḥ |  6081-2 udañcatkāñcīnāṃ bahalataraghoṣairmanasija- trilokīsamrājo dadhati jayaghaṇṭālininadaṃ ||6082-1 ime tāruṇyaśrīnavaparimalāḥ prauḍhasurata- pratāpaprārambhāḥ smaravijayadānapratibhuvaḥ |  6082-2 ciraṃ cetaścaurā abhinavavikāraikaguravo vilāsavyāpārāḥ kimapi vijayante mṛgadṛśāṃ ||6083-1 ime padme nāmbhaḥ pulinataṭametanna taṭinī khametanna vyāptiḥ stabakayugametanna latikā |  6083-2 pravālo'yaṃ nābdhiḥ śiśirakiraṇo'yaṃ na rajanī ghano'yaṃ na prāvṛṭśiva śiva vidheḥ śilparacanā ||6084-1 ime mama dhanāṅgajasvajanavallabhādehajā- suhṛjjanakamātulaprabhṛtayo bhṛśaṃ vallabhāḥ |  6084-2 mudheti hatacetano bhavavane ciraṃ khidyate yato bhavati kasya ko jagati vālukāmuṣṭivat ||6085-1 ime hi dainyena nimīlitekṣaṇā muhuḥ skhalanto vivaśāsturaṅgamāḥ |  6085-2 gajāśca saptacchadadānagandhino nivedayantīva raṇe nivartanaṃ ||6086-1 imau rambhāstambhau dviradapatikumbhadvayamidaṃ tadetallīlābjaṃ śaradamṛtaraśmiḥ sphuṭamayaṃ |  6086-2 kimaṅge tanvaṅgyāḥ kalayati jagatkāntamadhikaṃ yadetasyāṃ śaśvatparavaśamivonmattamiva ca ||6087-1 iyaṃ kalāvilāsinī kalāvatī samīpagā dhṛtāravindalocanā manojaśokamocanā |  6087-2 navīnanīradacchaṭāsamānakeśabhūṣitā na kasyacijjanasya cittavṛttitāpakhaṇḍitā ||6088-1 iyaṃ kiyaccārukuceti paśyate payaḥpradāyā hṛdayaṃ samāvṛtaṃ |  6088-2 dhruvaṃ manojñā vyataradyaduttaraṃ miṣeṇa bhṛṅgāradhṛteḥ karadvayī ||6089-1 iyaṃ gehe lakṣmīriyamamṛtavartirnayanayor asāvasyāḥ sparśo vapuṣi bahulaścandanarasaḥ |  6089-2 ayaṃ bāhuḥ kaṇṭhe śiśiramasṛṇo mauktikasaraḥ kimasyā na preyo yadi paramasahyastu virahaḥ ||6090-1 iyaṃ gauruddāmā tava nibiḍabandhāpi hi kathaṃ na vaidarbhādanyatspṛśati sulabhatve'pi hi kathaṃ |  6090-2 avandhyā ca khyātā bhuvi kathamagamyā kavivṛṣaiḥ kathaṃ vā pīyūṣaṃ sravati bahu dugdhāpi bahubhiḥ ||6091-1 iyaṃ gaurekā naḥ kvacidapi na saṃyojanavidhāv amuṣyāḥ paśyāmo rasabharamucaṃ kāṃcidaparāṃ |  6091-2 gale baddhā dadhmo yadi na dhṛtiruddāmavidhṛtau bhayaṃ gocorebhyastadiha ka upāyaḥ prabhavatu ||6092-1 iyaṃ ghaṭī mattagajendragāminī- vicitrasiṃhāsanasaṃsthitā sadā |  6092-2 anekarāmājanalālitā paraṃ vidhervaśātsaiva satī prajārthinī ||6093-1 iyaṃ cidrūpāpi prakaṭajaḍarūpā bhagavatī yadīyāmbhobindurvitarati hi śaṃbhorapi padaṃ |  6093-2 punānā dhunvānā nikhilamapi nānāvidhamaghaṃ jagatkṛtsnaṃ pāyādanudinamapāyātsuradhunī ||6094-1 iyaṃ tāvallīlā yadadhiruruhe vṛddhavṛṣabho yadunnehe ruṇḍaṃ yadiha citibhasmāpi lilipe |  6094-2 ayaṃ ko vyāpāro yadatilaki bhāle hutavaho yadagraivi vyālo yadakavali hālāhalamapi ||6095-1 iyaṃ te jananī prāptā tvadālokanatatparā |  6095-2 snehaprasnavanirbhinnaṃ udvahantī stanadvayaṃ ||6096-1 iyaṃ triyāmā śatayāmadhāriṇī sudhākarādagnirudeti sarvataḥ |  6096-2 tanoti tāpaṃ mṛducandanānilo vidhau viruddhe hi vipatpade pade ||6097-1 iyaṃ tvabhinnamaryādaiḥ svanuśiṣṭaiḥ kṛtātmabhiḥ |  6097-2 sarvaṃsahairupāyajñairamūḍhaireva dhāryate ||6098-1 iyaṃ dhatte dhīre malayajasamīre na ca mudaṃ na padmānāṃ vṛnde lalitamakarande'pi ramate |  6098-2 na vā sā sānandā bhavati navakundāvalikule tadetasyā bādhāharamapi samādhānamiha kiṃ ||6099-1 iyaṃ pallī bhillairanucitasamārambharasikaiḥ samantādākīrṇā viṣaviṣamabāṇapraṇayibhiḥ |  6099-2 tarorasya skandhe gamaya samayaṃ kīra nibhṛtaṃ na vāṇī kalyāṇī tadiha mukhamudraiva śaraṇaṃ ||6100-1 iyaṃ prītirvallīhṛdayabhuvi daivātsamuditā tathā yatnādrakṣyā prakṛtimṛdulāpāyabahulā |  6100-2 yathā naināṃ sphītāṃ piśunajanadurvākyadahano dahatyantaḥ śoṣaṃ vrajati na punaḥ sauhṛdanidheḥ ||6101-1 iyaṃ bālā navodvāhā satyaṃ śrutvā vyathāṃ vrajet |  6101-2 kāmaṃ dhīrasvabhāveyaṃ strīsvabhāvastu kātaraḥ ||6102-1 iyaṃ bālā māṃ pratyanavaratamindīvaradala- prabhācauraṃ cakṣuḥ kṣipati kimabhipretamanayā |  6102-2 gato moho'smākaṃ smarasamarabāṇavyatikara- jvarajvālā śāntā tadapi na varākī viramati ||6103-1 iyaṃ bālā vallī mṛdukisalayaṃ tāpavilayaṃ ghanacchāyaṃ śālaṃ navamativiśālaṃ parigatā |  6103-2 paraṃtvasyābhyantargaralalavabhasmīkṛtavanaṃ bhujaṃgaṃ prottuṅgaṃ kathamiva varākī kalayatu ||6104-1 iyaṃ bhujaginīśritā lasadanekapuṣpānvitā dvirephatatisevitā pramadakhañjanālaṃkṛtā |  6104-2 phaladvayabharānatā vilasitā navaiḥ pallavair vilocanapathaṃ gatā bhavati kāpi haimī latā ||6105-1 iyaṃ mayi proṣita eva saṃgatā himatviṣābhūtkṛtamaṇḍanā satī |  6105-2 itīrṣyayeva drutamacchinadruṣā vicitratārābharaṇāni bhāskaraḥ ||6106-1 iyaṃ mahendraprabhṛtīnadhiśriyaścaturdigīśānavamatya māninī |  6106-2 arūpahāryaṃ madanasya nigrahāthpinākapāṇiṃ patimāptumicchati ||6107-1 iyaṃ mukhāmbhoruhasaṃnidhāne vilambidhammillataticchalena |  6107-2 samāgatāṃ sādarameva bālā dvirephamālāmuta vā dadhāti ||6108-1 iyaṃ yaśāṃsi dviṣataḥ sudhārucaḥ kimaṅkametaddviṣataḥ kimānanaṃ |  6108-2 yaśobhirasyākhilalokadhāvibhir vibhīṣitā dhāvati tāmasī masī ||6109-1 iyaṃ raṅgapraveśena kalānāṃ copaśikṣayā |  6109-2 vañcanāpaṇḍitatvena svaranaipuṇyamāśritā ||6110-1 iyaṃ vilāsadrumadohadaśrīr iyaṃ sudhā yauvanadugdhasindhoḥ |  6110-2 lāvaṇyamāṇikyarucicchaṭeyaṃ iyaṃ manaḥkārmaṇacūrṇamuṣṭiḥ ||6111-1 iyaṃ vyādhāyate bālā bhrūrasyāḥ kārmukāyate |  6111-2 kaṭākṣāśca śarāyante mano me hariṇāyate ||6112-1 iyaṃ samdhyā dūrādahamupagato hanta malayāthtadekāṃ tvadgehe karuṇavati neṣyāmi rajanīṃ |  6112-2 samīreṇaivoktā navakusumitā cūtalatikā dhunānā murddhānaṃ nahi nahi nahītyeva kurute ||6113-1 iyaṃ sā kālindī kuvalayadalasnigdhamadhurāmadāndhavyākūjattaruṇajalaraṃkupraṇayinī |  6113-2 purā yasyāstīre sarabhasasatṛṣṇaṃ murabhido gatāḥ prāyo gopīnidhuvanavinodena divasāḥ ||6114-1 iyaṃ sā lolākṣī tribhuvanalalāmaikavasatiḥ sa cāyaṃ duṣṭātmā svasurapakṛtaṃ yena mama tat |  6114-2 itastīvraḥ kāmo gururayamitaḥ krodhadahanaḥ kṛto veṣaścāyaṃ kathamidamiti bhrāmyati manaḥ ||6115-1 iyaṃ sunayanā dāsīkṛtatāmarasaśriyā |  6115-2 ānanenākalaṅkena jayantīnduṃ kalaṅkitaṃ ||6116-1 iyaṃ surataraṅgiṇī na punaratra nausaṃgamo bhavettaraṇimajjanaṃ pathika naiva pānthāgamaḥ |  6116-2 nidhāya hṛdaye sadā vipulacārukumbhadvayaṃ sakhe ghanaghanāgame ghanarasasya pāraṃ vraja ||6117-1 iyaṃ sustanī mastakanyastakumbhā kusumbhāruṇaṃ cāru vāso vasānā |  6117-2 samastasya lokasya cetaḥpravṛttiṃ gṛhītvā ghaṭe nyasya yātīva bhāti ||6118-1 iyaṃ sṛṣṭā cañcatkanakalatikā paṅkajabhuvā niṣiktā lāvaṇyāmṛtarasabhareṇānudivasaṃ |  6118-2 akasmādr_oṃālīmadhupapaṭalīha sphurati yathtataḥ śaṅke puṣpodgamasamayamāyātamadhunā ||6119-1 iyaṃ svargādhināthasya lakṣmīḥ kiṃ yakṣakanyakā |  6119-2 athavā vipinasyaiva devatā kimu pārvati ||6120-1 iyaṃ hi nidrā nayanāvalambinī lalāṭadeśādupasarpatīva māṃ |  6120-2 adṛśyarūpā capalā jareva yā manuṣyasattvaṃ paribhūya vardhate ||6121-1 iyaṃ hi yoniḥ prathamā yāṃ prāpya jagatīpate |  6121-2 ātmā vai śakyate trātuṃ karmabhiḥ śubhalakṣaṇaiḥ ||6122-1 iyaṃ hi lokavyatirekavartinī svabhāvataḥ pārthivatā samuddhatā |  6122-2 balāttadenāṃ vinayena yojayen nayasya siddhau vinayaḥ puraḥsaraḥ ||6123-1 iyatā vayasā na sādhitaṃ yathparataḥ kiṃ nu kariṣyatīti vedhāḥ |  6123-2 tilataṇḍulitāsya r_oṃarekhā- cchalataḥ kajjalacūrṇamālilimpa ||6123-1 iyatīṃ subhagāvasthāṃ gato'si yasyāḥ kṛte smarātaṅkāt |  6123-2 mūrcchāṃ harāmi sā tava gatapuṇyā nayanasalilena ||6124-1 iyatī jagatī kiyatī bhavitā namitānanatāmiti yāti hayaḥ |  6124-2 viyadaṅgaṇariṅgaṇaraṅgavidhau parinartitumutkramatīva nabhaḥ ||6125-1 iyatpṛthvīmātraṃ tadanu ca nabh_oṃaṇḍalamiya- diyānpātālānto jalamapi pṛthivyāmiyaditi |  6125-2 iti jñātvā kūpe viditaviṣayo nāyamaparaḥ paraṃ mugdho bhekaḥ prabalatararāvaṃ prakurute ||6126-1 iyatyapyetasminniravadhimahatyadhvani guṇās ta evāmī dvitrā jaraṭhajaraṭhā yānti gaṇanāṃ |  6126-2 aho grāmyo lokaḥ sa na paramamībhiḥ kṛtadhṛtiḥ smayastabdho yāvatkalayati samagraṃ tṛṇamidaṃ ||6127-1 iyatyāṃ saṃpattāvapi ca salilānāṃ tvamadhunā na tṛṣṇāmārtānāṃ harasi yadi kāsāra sahasā |  6127-2 nidāghe caṇḍāṃśau kirati parito'ṅgāranikarān kṛśībhūtaḥ keṣāmahaha parihartāsi khalu tāṃ ||6128-1 iyatyāmapi sāmagryāṃ sukṛtaṃ na kṛtaṃ tvayā |  6128-2 itīva kupito dantānantakaḥ pātayatyalaṃ ||6129-1 iyatyetasminvā niravadhicamatkṛtyatiśayo varāho vā rāhuḥ prabhavati camatkāraviṣayaḥ |  6129-2 mahīmeko magnāṃ yadayamavahaddantaśalalaiḥ śiraḥśeṣaḥ śatruṃ nigilati paraṃ saṃtyajati ca ||6130-1 iyamatra kayāpi diśā nītidṛśāṃ darśitā padavī |  6130-2 cāṇakyādyabhidhānāj jñeyanidhānādathānyadunneyaṃ ||3131-1 iyamatra satāmalaukikī mahatī kāpi kaṭhoracittatā |  3131-2 upakṛtya bhavanti dūrataḥ parataḥ pratyupakārabhīravaḥ ||6132-1 iyamapratibodhaśāyinīṃ raśanā tvāṃ prathamā rahaḥsakhī |  6132-2 gativibhramasādanīravā na śucā nānumṛteva lakṣyate ||6133-1 iyamavayavaiḥ pāṇḍukṣāmairalaṃkṛtamaṇḍanā kalitakusumā bālevāntarlatā pariśoṣiṇī |  6133-2 vahati ca varārohā ramyāṃ vivāhamahotsava- śriyamudayinīmudgāḍhāṃ ca vyanakti manorujaṃ ||6134-1 iyamasau taralāyatalocanā gurusamunnatapīnapayodharā |  6134-2 pṛthunitambabharālasagāminī priyatamā mama jīvitahāriṇī ||6135-1 iyamānandalatikā na grīvā hariṇīdṛśaḥ |  6135-2 yato'syāṃ viluṭhantyete muktāḥ śuddhaguṇāntarāḥ ||6136-1 iyamiyaṃ mayadānavanandinī tridaśanāthajitaḥ prasavasthalī |  6136-2 kimaparaṃ daśakaṃdharagehinī tvayi karoti karadvayayojanaṃ ||6137-1 iyamiṣṭaguṇāya rocatāṃ rucirārthā bhavate'pi bhāratī |  6137-2 nanu vaktṛviśeṣaniḥspṛhā guṇagṛhyā vacane vipaścitaḥ ||6138-1 iyamudaradarī durantapūrā yadi na bhavedabhimānabhaṅgabhūmiḥ |  6138-2 kṣaṇamapi na sahe bhavādṛśānāṃ kuṭilakaṭākṣanirīkṣaṇaṃ nṛpāṇāṃ ||6139-1 iyamudgatiṃ harantī netranikocaṃ ca vidadhatī purataḥ |  6139-2 na vijānīmaḥ kiṃ tava vadati sapatnīva dinanidrā ||6140-1 iyeṣa sā kartumavandhyarūpatāṃ samādhimāsthāya tapobhirātmanaḥ |  6140-2 avāpyate vā kathamanyathā dvayaṃ tathāvidhaṃ prema patiśca tādṛśaḥ ||6141-1 ilātalabharākrāntagrīvaṃ mā śeṣa vakraya |  6141-2 tvayi duḥkhini caikasmiñjīvalokaḥ sadā sukhī ||6142-1 ilikā bhramarīdhyānaṃ dhyāyantī bhramarī bhavet |  6142-2 vītarāgapadaṃ dhyāyanvītarāgo bhaveddhruvaṃ ||6143-1 iṣutrayeṇaiva jagattrayasya vinirjayātpuṣpamayāśugena |  6143-2 śeṣā dvibāṇī saphalīkṛteyaṃ priyādṛgambhojapade'bhiṣicya ||6144-1 iṣṭaṃ dadāti gṛhṇāti kāryamākhyāti pṛcchati |  6144-2 bhuṅkte bhojayate caiva ṣaḍvidhaṃ mitralakṣaṇaṃ ||6145-1 iṣṭakacite samantāthpuruṣanikhāte'vaṭe tarurjātaḥ |  6145-2 vāmana eva hi dhatte phalakusumaṃ sarvakālamiti ||6146-1 iṣṭāṃ bhāryāṃ priyaṃ mitraṃ putraṃ cāpi kanīyasaṃ |  6146-2 riktapāṇirna paśyeta tathā naimittikaṃ prabhuṃ ||6147-1 iṣṭāni cāpyapatyāni dravyāṇi suhṛdaḥ priyāḥ |  6147-2 āpaddharmavimokṣāya bhāryā cāpi satāṃ mataṃ ||6148-1 iṣṭānbhogānhi vo devā dāsyante yajñabhāvitāḥ |  6148-2 tairdattānapradāyaibhyo yo bhuṅkte stena eva saḥ ||6149-1 iṣṭāpūrtāni kalayetjagatkhyāto vaseddivi |  6149-2 akūpāroktavṛtto'gādindradyumno divaṃ punaḥ ||6150-1 iṣṭā bālakaceṣṭā yauvanadarpo'tha vṛddhavairāgyaṃ |  6150-2 sāpi gatā so'pi gatas tadapi gataṃ svapnamāyeyaṃ ||6151-1 iṣṭā makhā dvijavarāśca mayi prasannāḥ prajñāpitā bhayarasaṃ samadā narendrāḥ |  6151-2 evaṃvidhasya ca na me'sti manaḥpraharṣaḥ kanyāpiturhi satataṃ bahu cintanīyaṃ ||6152-1 iṣṭeṣu visṛjatyarthānkubera visrambhaṃ bhujaga ivāṅkamadhyasuptaḥ||6154-1 iṣṭvā saṃgrāmayajñena nānāpraharaṇāmbhasā |  6154-2 asminnavabhṛthe snātaḥ kathaṃ patnyā mayā vinā ||6155-1 iha kapaṭakutukataralita- dṛśi viśvāsaṃ kuraṅga kiṃ kuruṣe |  6155-2 tava rabhasataraliteyaṃ vyādhavadhūrvāladhau valate ||6156-1 iha kiṃ kuraṅgaśāvaka kedāre kalamamañjarīṃ tyajasi |  6156-2 tṛṇabāṇastṛṇadhanvā tṛṇaghaṭitaḥ kapaṭapuruṣo'yaṃ ||6157-1 iha kiṃ pratisphurati me tavāgrato nayaśāstranīranidhipāradṛśvanaḥ |  6157-2 avalīḍhaviśvatamasaḥ puro raver nahi jātu dīpakaśikhā prakāśate ||6158-1 iha khalu viṣamaḥ purā kṛtānāṃ vilasati jantuṣu karmaṇāṃ vipākaḥ |  6158-2 haraśirasi śirāṃsi yāni rejuḥ śiva śiva tāni luṭhanti gṛdhrapādaiḥ ||6159-1 iha gamiṣyati vaidyamatiḥ śramaṃ prathamameva purastu mahāsukhaṃ |  6159-2 priyatamasya mṛgākṣi samāgame navakaragrahaṇā gṛhiṇī yathā ||6160-1 iha gurujalabhārapūrṇagarbhāḥ pradaradarībhramabhūribhīmavegāḥ |  6160-2 taṭakaṭakaniyudhyamānaveṇī- dviguṇamahāravabhairavāstaṭinyaḥ ||6161-1 iha catvāri dānāni proktāni paramarṣibhiḥ |  6161-2 vicārya nānāśāstrāṇi śarmaṇe'tra paratra ca ||6162-1 bhītebhyaścābhayaṃ deyaṃ vyādhitebhyastathauṣadhaṃ |  6162-2 deyā vidyārthināṃ vidyā deyamannaṃ kṣudhāture ||6163-1 iha caiva striyo dhanyāḥ śīlasya parirakṣaṇāt |  6163-2 śīlabhaṅge ca nārīṇāṃ yamalokaḥ sudāruṇaḥ ||6164-1 śīlaṃ rakṣyaṃ sadā strībhirduṣṭasaṃgavivarjanāt |  6164-2 śīlena hi paraḥ svargaḥ strīṇāṃ vaiśya na saṃśayaḥ ||6165-1 iha jagati janasya kasya citte na vasati saukhyavidhānamukhyavārtā |  6165-2 khalu bhavati tadeva tasya sarvaṃ bhuvanapatistu yadīśvaraḥ karoti ||6166-1 iha jagati ratīśaprakriyākauśalinyaḥ kati kati na niśīthe subhruvaḥ saṃcaranti |  6166-2 mama tu vidhihatāyā jāyamānasmitāyāḥ sahacari paripanthī hanta dantāṃśureva||6167-1 iha tava deva nipatatā karakamalakuśodakena jāyante |  6167-2 tattaddūradaridra- dvāri dvipadānavāribhiḥ saritaḥ ||6168-1 iha turagaśataiḥ prayāntu mūrkhā dhanarahitā vibudhāḥ prayāntu padbhyāṃ|  6168-2 giriśikharagatāpi kākapaṅktiḥ pulinagatairna samatvameti haṃsaiḥ ||6169-1 iha duḥkhaṃ nṛpādibhyaḥ paratra narakāditaḥ |  6169-2 prāpnoti steyatastena steyaṃ tyājyaṃ sadā budhaiḥ ||6170-1 iha duḥkhaṃ layaḥ prokto duḥkhaṃ hartuṃ layaḥ kṣamaḥ |  6170-2 duḥkhe śubhe layo duḥkhaṃ duḥkhaṃ kiṃ tasya kathyate ||6172-1 iha dharmārthakāmānāṃ avāptiphalamiṣyate |  6172-2 tatrārthaḥ saha kāmena nirīkṣyo dharmacakṣuṣā ||6172-3 parityajya hi yo dharmaṃ arthamarthāya paśyati |  6172-4 kāmaṃ vā kāmalābhāya na sa buddheṣu buddhimān ||6173-1 iha nagare pratirathyaṃ bhujaṃgasaṃbādharucirasaṃcāre |  6173-2 sundari mama matametan nakulapratipālanaṃ śreyaḥ ||6174-1 iha niculanikuñje madhyamadhye'sya rantur vijanamajani śayyā kasya bālapravālaiḥ |  6174-2 iti kathayati vṛnde yoṣitāṃ pāntu yuṣmān smitaśabalitarādhāmādhavālokitāni ||6175-1 iha niculanikuñje vaṃśasaṃbhārabhāji svapimi yadi muhūrtaṃ paśyasi kṣetrametat |  6175-2 sthānamasmadvidhānāṃ ||6178-1 iha niśi nibiḍanirantara- kucakumbhadvitayadattahṛdayabharā |  6178-2 ramaṇaguṇakṛṣyamāṇā saṃtarati tamastaraṅgiṇīṃ kāpi ||6179-1 iha paricitā jātyandhānāmiyaṃ na tavonnatir guṇaparicaye cakṣuṣmanto tvayātiviḍambitāḥ |  6179-2 kṛpaṇavaṇijāmalpīkartuṃ guṇāṃstava kevalaṃ marakata mṛṣā doṣodgāraḥ kariṣyati duryaśaḥ ||6180-1 iha parimalo yatra vyakto na tatra madhuśriyo madhu samadhikaṃ yasmiṃstasminna gandhasamṛddhayaḥ |  6180-2 iti maruvakaṃ nindankundādapetakutūhalaḥ kamalamadhikaṃ smāraṃ smāraṃ viṣīdati ṣaṭpadaḥ ||6181-1 iha puro'nilakampitavigrahā yāti tīraṃ tīrāttaruṃ tarutalātpunareti vāpīṃ |  6424-2 vāpyāṃ na tiṣṭhati na cāti mṛṇālakhaṇḍaṃ cakraḥ kṣapāsu virahe khalu cakravākyāḥ ||6425-1 utkūjantu vaṭe vaṭe bata bakāḥ kākā varākā api krāṃkurvantu sadā ninādapaṭavaste pippale pippale |  6425-2 so'nyaḥ ko'pi rasālapallavalavagrāsollasatpāṭava-krīḍatkokilakaṇṭhakūjanakalālīlāvilāsakramaḥ ||6426-1 utkṛtya jvalitātśavātkathamapi pretāśanaḥ paiśitīṃ peśīmagnimayīṃ nigīrya sahasā dandahyamānodaraḥ |  6426-2 dhāvatyutplavate muhurnipatati prottiṣṭhati prekṣateviṣvakkrośati saṃpinaṣṭi jaṭharaṃ muṣṭyā hate mastakaṃ ||6427-1 utkṛtyotkṛtya kṛttiṃ prathamamatha pṛthūcchophabhūyāṃsi māṃsānyaaṃsasphikpṛṣṭhapiṇḍādyavayavasulabhānyugrapūtīni jagdhvā |  6427-2 āttasnāyvantranetraḥ prakaṭitadaśanaḥ pretara kaḥ kara kāda kasthādasthisaṃsthaṃ sthapuṭagatamapi kravyamavyagramatti ||6428-1 utkṛtyotkṛtya garbhānapi śakalayataḥ kṣatrasaṃtānaroṣāduddāmasyaikaviṃśatyavadhi vidhasataḥ sarvato rājavaṃśyān |  6428-2 pitryaṃ tadraktapūrṇahradasavanamahānandamandāyamāna- krodhāgneḥ kurvato me na khalu na viditaḥ sarvabhūtaiḥ svabhāvaḥ ||6429-1 utkṛṣṭabalavīryasya vijigīṣorjayaiṣiṇaḥ |  6429-2 guṇānuraktaprakṛteryātrā yānamiti smṛtaṃ ||6430-1 utkṛṣṭamadhyamanikṛṣṭajaneṣu maitrī yadvacchilāsu sikatāsu jaleṣu rekhā |  6430-2 vairaṃ kramādadhamamadhyamasajjaneṣu yadvacchilāsu sikatāsu jaleṣu rekhā ||6431-1 utkocaṃ prītidānaṃ ca dyūtadravyaṃ subhāṣitaṃ |  6431-2 kāminīṃ prathamāvasthāṃ sadyo gṛhṇāti buddhimān ||6432-1 utkocakāścaupadhikā vañcakāḥ kitavāstathā |  6432-2 ma galādeśavṛttāśca bhadraprekṣaṇikaiḥ saha ||6433-1 asamyakkāriṇaścaiva mahāmātrāścikitsakāḥ |  6433-2 śilpopacārayuktāśca nipuṇāḥ puṇyayoṣitaḥ ||6434-1 evamādyānvijānīyātprakāśāṃllokakaṇṭakān |  6434-2 vigūḍhacāriṇaścānyānanāryānāryali ginaḥ ||6435-1 utkocapāritoṣaka- bhāṭasubhāṣitatarārthacauryāṃśāḥ |  6435-2 tatkṣaṇameva grāhyāḥ ṣaḍanyakāle na labhyante ||6436-1 utkrāntaṃ girikūṭala ghanasahaṃ te vajrasārā nakhās tattejaśca tadūrjitaṃ sa ca nagonmāthī ninādo mahān |  6436-2 ālasyādavimuñcatā giriguhāṃ siṃhena nidrālunā sarvaṃ viśvajayaikasādhanamidaṃ labdhaṃ na kiṃcitkṛtaṃ ||6437-1 utkrāntānāmāmiṣāyopariṣṭādadhyākāśaṃ babhrumuḥ patravāhāḥ |  6437-2 mūrtāḥ prāṇā nūnamadyāpyavekṣā- māsuḥ kāyaṃ tyājitā dāruṇāstraiḥ ||6438-1 utkrāmadbhiśca yaḥ prāṇaiḥ prayataḥ śiṣṭasaṃmataḥ |  6438-2 cintayenmanasā ga gāṃ sa gatiṃ paramāṃ labhet ||6439-1 utkṣiptaṃ karaka kaṇadvayamidaṃ baddhā dṛḍhaṃ mekhalā yatnena pratipāditā mukharayormañjīrayormūkatā |  6439-2 ārabdhe rabhasānmayā priyasakhi krīḍābhisārotsavecaṇḍālastimirāvaguṇṭhanapaṭakṣepaṃ vidhatte vidhuḥ ||6440-1 utkṣiptaṃ sakhi vartipūritamukhaṃ mūkīkṛtaṃ nūpuraṃ kāñcīdāma nivṛttagharghararavaṃ kṣiptaṃ dukūlāntare |  6440-2 suptāḥ pañjarasārikāḥ parijano'pyāghūrṇito nidrayā śūnyo rājapathastamāṃsi niviḍānyehyehi nirgamyatāṃ ||6441-1 utkṣiptaṃ saha kauśikasya pulakaiḥ sākaṃ mukhairnāmitaṃ bhūpānāṃ janakasya saṃśayadhiyā sārdhaṃ samāsphālitaṃ |  6441-2 vaidehīmanasā samaṃ ca sahasā kṛṣṭaṃ tato bhārgava- prauḍhāhaṃkṛtikandalena ca samaṃ bhagnaṃ tadaiśaṃ dhanuḥ ||6442-1 utkṣiptabāhudarśita- bhujamūlaṃ cūtamukula mama sakhyā |  6442-2 ākṛṣyamāṇa rājati bhavataḥ paramuccapadalābhaḥ ||6443-1 utkṣiptamucchritasitāṃśukarāvalambair uttambhitoḍubhiratīvatarāṃ śirobhiḥ |  6443-2 śraddheyanirjharajalavyapadeśamasya viṣvaktaṭeṣu patati sphuṭamantarīkṣaṃ ||6444-1 utkṣiptā api dantīdraiḥ kopanaiḥ pattayaḥ paraṃ |  6444-2 tadasūnaharankhaḍgaghātaiḥ svasya puraḥ prabhoḥ ||6445-1 utkṣipya karibhirdūrānmuktānāṃ yodhināṃ divi |  6445-2 prāpi jīvātmabhirdivyā gatirvā vigrahairmahī ||6446-1 utkṣipya ṭiṭṭibhaḥ pādāvāste bha gabhayāddivaḥ |  6446-2 svacittakalpito garvaḥ kasya nātrāpi vidyate ||6447-1 utkṣipyālakamālikāṃ vilulitāmāpāṇḍugaṇḍasthalādviśliṣyadvalayaprapātabhayataḥ prollāsya kiṃcitkarau |  6447-2 dvārastambhaniṣaṇṇagātralatikā kenāpi puṇyātmanāmārgālokanadattadṛṣṭirabalā tatkālamāli gyate ||6448-1 utkṣipyoccaiḥ prasphurantaṃ radābhyāṃ īṣādantaḥ kuñjaraṃ śātravīyaṃ |  6448-2 śṛ gaprotaprāvṛṣeṇyāmbudasya spaṣṭaṃ prāpatsāmyamurvīdharasya ||6449-1 utkhātaṃ nidhiśa kayā kṣititalaṃ dhmātā girerdhātavo nistīrṇaḥ saritāṃpatirnṛpatayo yatnena saṃsevitāḥ |  6449-2 mantrārādhanatatpareṇa manasā nītāḥ śmaśāne niśāḥ prāptaḥ kāṇavarāṭako'pi na mayā tṛṣṇe'dhunā mā bhava ||6450-1 utkhātacchinnasaṃdhyāruṇakamalavano vy_oṃakāsāramadhyaṃ manye matto niśīthāhvayavanamahiṣo ma kṣvavikṣanmima kṣuḥ |  6450-2 tatkālodbhidyamānaḥ saha tanupṛthubhistārakābudbudaughais tasmādevojjihīte kaluṣitabhuvanaṃ bhīṣaṇo dhvāntapa kaḥ ||6451-1 utkhātadaivatamivāyatanaṃ purārer astācalāntaritasūryamivāntarikṣaṃ |  6451-2 hammīrabhūbhuji gate suraveśma viśvaṃ paśyāmi hāramiva nāyakaratnaśūnyaṃ ||6452-1 utkhātānpratiropayankusumitāṃścinvaṃllaghūnvardhayan atyuccānnamayanpṛthūnvidalayanviśleṣayansaṃhatān |  6452-2 tīkṣnānkaṇṭakino bahirniyamayansvāropitānpālayan mālākāra iva prayogakuśalo rājye ciraṃ tiṣṭhati ||6453-1 utkhāya cittopavanātsumedho- mālā kṛtā pustakaniṣkuṭeṣu |  6453-2 kāvyadrumāṇāmadhiropitānāṃ phalaṃ parāṃ nirvṛtimunnayāmaḥ ||6454-1 utkhelattrivalītara gataralā r_oṃāvalīśaivala- stragvalliryuvatī dhruvaṃ janamanonirvāṇavārāṇasī |  6454-2 etasyā yadurastaṭīparisare yadbālyacāpalyayoḥ sthāne yauvanaśilpikalpitacitācaityadvayaṃ dṛśyate ||6455-1 uttaṃsaḥ kekipicchairmarakatavalayaśyāmale doḥprakāṇḍe hāraḥ sāndrendranīlairmṛgamadaracito vaktrapatraprapañcaḥ |  6455-2 nīlābjaiḥ śekharaśrīrasitavasanatā cetyabhīkābhisāre saṃpratyeṇekṣaṇānāṃ timirabharasakhī vartate veṣalīlā ||6456-1 uttaṃsakautukarasena vilāsinīnāṃ lūnāni yasya na nakhairapi pallavāni |  6456-2 udyānamaṇḍanataro sahakāra sa tvaṃ a gārakārakaragocaratāṃ gato'si ||6457-1 uttaṃsitaṃ bhāti mukhaprabhābhir na kiṃcidabjaṃ yadaho tadasyāḥ |  6457-2 yuktaṃ dṛśāveva vidhirvidhijñaḥ karṇadvayālaṃkaraṇaṃ cakāra ||6458-1 uttaṃsīkṛtacandramāḥ sabhujagānvīcīnparāvartayan jyotsnābhasmavilepane niravadhisphīte mahimni sthitaḥ |  6458-2 pre kaccha karoṭikoṭihananaiḥ svaḥsindhumudghoṣayann atyantaṃ pathi garjitāṭṭahasito rudraṃ hasatyarṇavaḥ ||6459-1 uttaṃseṣu nanarta na kṣitibhujāṃ na prekṣakairlakṣitaḥ sākā kṣaṃ luṭhito na ca stanataṭe līlāvatīnāṃ kvacit |  6459-2 kaṣṭaṃ bhościramantareva jaladherdaivādviśīrṇo'bhavathkheladvyālakulā gagharṣaṇaparikṣīṇapramāṇo maṇiḥ ||6460-1 uttapto'yamuraṃgamaḥ śikhitalacchāyāṃ samālambate vairaṃ sāhajikaṃ vihāya ca śikhī mūlaṃ tarorgacchati |  6460-2 yācante ca jalaṃ nikuñjabhavane tṛṣṇāturāḥ sārikās tapte vāriṇi pa kajāni madhupāstyaktvā śrayante latāḥ ||6461-1 uttamaṃ puṣkarakṣetraṃ tārākṣetraṃ na madhyamaṃ |  6461-2 adhamaṃ ca kurukṣetraṃ prabhāsaṃ tvadhamādhamaṃ ||6462-1 uttamaṃ praṇipātena śūraṃ bhedena yojayet | nīcamalpapradānena samaśaktiṃ parākramaiḥ ||6463-1 uttamaṃ suciraṃ naiva vipado'bhibhavantyalaṃ |  6463-2 rāhugrasanasaṃbhūtiḥ kṣaṇaṃ vicchāyayedvidhuṃ ||6464-1 uttamaṃ svārjitaṃ vittaṃ madhyamaṃ piturarjitaṃ |  6464-2 adhamaṃ bhrātṛvittaṃ ca strīvittamadhamādhamaṃ ||6465-1 uttamaḥ kleśavikṣobhaṃ kṣamaḥ soḍhuṃ na hītaraḥ |  6465-2 maṇireva mahāśāṇagharṣaṇaṃ na tu mṛtkaṇaḥ ||6466-1 uttamaḥ ṣaṭpadaḥ prokto madhyamaḥ pañcabhistathā |  6466-2 kaniṣṭhastu caturbhiḥ syādevaṃ syurdhruvakāstridhā ||6467-1 uttamakule'pi jātaḥ sevāṃ vidadhāti nīcalokasya |  6467-2 vadati ca vācaṃ nīcāṃ udareśvarapīḍito martyaḥ ||6468-1 uttamataruṇaprakṛtiḥ pulakādikasūcitānyatanusaktiḥ |  6468-2 sphuṭasaṃnihitavibhāvo nivāryate kena śṛ gāraḥ ||6469-1 uttamapadārtharasikāḥ sulabhā loke bhavanti sarve'pi |  6469-2 dūṣitapadārtharasikas tvamiva matastvaṃ punaḥ karaṭa ||6470-1 uttamabhujaṃgasaṃgama- nispandanitambacāpalastasyāḥ |  6470-2 mandaragiririva vibudhair itastataḥ kṛṣyate kāyaḥ ||6471-1 uttamarṇadhanadānaśa kayā pāvakotthaśikhayā hṛdisthayā |  6471-2 deva dagdhavasanā sarasvatī nāsyato bahirupaiti lajjayā ||6472-1 uttamarṇamukhaṃ paśyannadhamarṇo hriyā naman |  6472-2 mṛtyujīvitayoryuddhasaṃbhramaṃ parilokate ||6473-1 uttamavanitaikagatiḥ karīva sarasīpayaḥ sakhīdhairyaṃ |  6473-2 āskanditoruṇā tvaṃ hastenaiva spṛśanharasi ||6474-1 uttamaścintitaṃ kuryātproktakārī tu madhyamaḥ |  6474-2 adhamo'śraddhayā kuryādakartoccaritaṃ pituḥ ||6475-1 uttamastoṣamāyāti tada gaṃ poṣyate yadi |  6475-2 vṛkṣaḥ prasīdati prāyaḥ pādābhya gena na svayaṃ ||6476-1 uttamasya kṣaṇaṃ kopo madhyasya praharadvayaṃ |  6476-2 adhamasya tvahorātraṃ pāpiṣṭho naiva mucyate ||6477-1 uttamasyāpi varṇasya nīco'pi gṛhamāgataḥ |  6477-2 pūjanīyo yathāyogyaṃ sarvadevamayo'tithiḥ ||6478-1 uttamasyāpi varṇasya nīco'pi gṛhamāgataḥ |  6478-2 bālo vā yadi vā vṛddhaḥ sarvasyābhyāgato guruḥ ||6479-1 uttamāḥ svaguṇaiḥ khyātā madhyamāśca piturguṇaiḥ |  6479-2 adhamā mātulasyāpi śvaśurasyādhamādhamāḥ ||6480-1 uttamāḥ svārjitairdravyaiḥ piturvittena madhyamāḥ |  6480-2 adhamā mātṛvittena strīvittenādhamādhamāḥ ||6481-1 uttamā ātmanaḥ khyātāḥ pituḥ khyātāśca madhyamāḥ |  6481-2 adhamā mātulātkhyātāḥ śvaśurāccādhamādhamaḥ ||6482-1 uttamā godbhavājjyaiṣṭhyādbrahmaṇaścaiva dhāraṇāt |  6482-2 sarvasyaivāsya sargasya dharmato brāhmaṇaḥ prabhuḥ ||6483-1 uttamādhamamadhyānāṃ śrotavyaṃ vacanaṃ budhaiḥ |  6483-2 tatra cātmahitaṃ grāhyaṃ vastavākyaṃ yathā nṛpaḥ ||6484-1 uttamādhamamadhyāni buddhvā kāryāṇi pārthivaḥ |  6484-2 uttamādhamamadhyeṣu puruṣeṣu niyojayet ||6485-1 uttamādhamasaṃsaktau ||6487-1 uttamānāmapi strīṇāṃ viśvāso naiva vidyate |  6487-2 rājapriyāḥ kairaviṇyo ramante madhupaiḥ saha ||6488-1 uttamānuttamāneva gacchanhīnāṃśca varjayan |  6488-2 brāhmaṇaḥ śreṣṭhatāmeti pratyavāyena śūdratāṃ ||6489-1 uttamāneva seveta prāpte kāle tu madhyamān |  6489-2 adhamāṃstu na seveta ya icchecśreya ātmanaḥ ||6490-1 uttamābhijanopetānna nīcaiḥ saha vardhayet |  6490-2 kṛśo'pi hi vivekajño yāti saṃśrayaṇīyatāṃ ||6491-1 uttamāścātmanā khyātāḥ pitrā khyātāśca madhyamāḥ |  6491-2 adhamā mātulaiḥ khyātāḥ śvaśuraiścādhamādhamāḥ ||6492-1 uttamāstājikāḥ proktāḥ pārasīkāḥ samudrajāḥ |  6492-2 kokkāṇākhatalāṇāśca tathā saurāṣṭrajā hayāḥ ||6493-1 uttame tu kṣaṇaṃ kopo madhyame ghaṭikādvayaṃ |  6493-2 adhame syādahorātraṃ cāṇḍāle maraṇāntikaḥ ||6494-1 uttamenottamaṃ sarvaṃ manuṣyāṇāṃ prayatnataḥ |  6494-2 adṛṣṭamīkṣya sarveṣāṃ vaktavyaṃ suvicakṣaṇaiḥ ||6495-1 uttame vighnavattāsti adhamo duḥkhabhājanaṃ |  6495-2 tasmātsarvatra yogyatvācśreṣṭho vai madhyamaḥ smṛtaḥ ||6496-1 uttamaiḥ saha sa gena ko na yāti samunnatiṃ |  6496-2 mūrdhnā tṛṇāni dhāryante grathitaiḥ kusumaiḥ saha ||6497-1 uttamaiḥ saha sāṃgatyaṃ paṇḍitaiḥ saha saṃkathāṃ |  6497-2 alubdhaiḥ saha mitratvaṃ kurvāṇo nāvasīdati ||6498-1 uttamaiḥ saha sāṃgatyaṃ yatprājñaiḥ satyavādibhiḥ |  6498-2 bandhanastho'pi tiṣṭheta na tu rājye narādhamaiḥ ||6499-1 uttamaiḥ svīkṛto nīco nīca eva na cottamaḥ |  6499-2 bhairavādhiṣṭhitaḥ śvā tu kadācinnaiva kesarī ||6500-1 uttamairananujñātaṃ kāryaṃ necchecca taiḥ saha |  6500-2 devaiḥ sākaṃ sudhāpānādrāhośchinnaṃ śiro yataḥ ||6501-1 uttamairuttamairnityaṃ saṃbandhānācaretsaha |  6501-2 ninīṣuḥ kulamutkarṣaṃ adhamānadhamāṃstyajet ||6502-1 uttamo nātivaktā syādadhamo bahubhāṣakaḥ |  6502-2 na hi svarṇe dhvanistādṛgyādṛkkāṃsye prajāyate ||6503-1 uttamo'pi kulajo'pi manuṣyaḥ sarvalokamahito'pi budho'pi |  6503-2 dāsatāṃ bhajati yāṃ bhajamānas tāṃ bhajanti gaṇikāṃ kimu santaḥ ||6504-1 uttamo'pyadhamasya syādyācñānamrakaraḥ kvacit |  6504-2 kaustubhādīni ratnāni yayāce harirambudhiṃ ||6505-1 uttamo'prārthito datte madhyamaḥ prārthitaḥ punaḥ |  6505-2 yācakairyācyamāno'pi datte na tvadhamādhamaḥ ||6506-1 uttamo madhyamo nīco'dhamo bhrātṛguṇairnaraḥ |  6506-2 kanyāstrībhaginībhāgyo naro'dhamatamo mataḥ ||6507-1 uttamo rasavādaśca dhātuvādaśca madhyamaḥ |  6507-2 adhamo mantravādaśca mithyāvādo'dhamādhamaḥ ||6508-1 uttara gaya kura galocane locane kamalagarvamocane |  6508-2 astu sundari kalindanandinī- vīciḍambaragabhīramambaraṃ ||6509-1 uttarataśca madhūkādahinilayaḥ paścimottare toyaṃ |  6509-2 parihṛtya pañcahastān ardhāṣṭamapauruṣaṃ vācyaṃ ||6510-1 uttaranti vinikīrya palvalaṃ gāḍhapa kamativāhitātapāḥ |  6510-2 daṃṣṭriṇo vanavarāhayūthapā daṣṭabha gurabisā kurā iva ||6511-1 uttarāduttaraṃ vākyaṃ uttarādeva jāyate |  6511-2 suvṛṣṭiguṇasaṃpannādbījādbījamivāparaṃ ||6512-1 uttarāpathakāntānāṃ kiṃ brūmo rāmaṇīyakaṃ |  6512-2 yāsāṃ tuṣārasaṃbhede na mlāyati mukhāmbujaṃ ||6513-1 uttarīyavinayāttrapamāṇā rundhatī kila tadīkṣaṇamārgaṃ |  6513-2 āvariṣṭa vikaṭena vivoḍhur vakṣasaiva kucamaṇḍalamanyā ||6514-1 uttareṇa kimātmaiva pañcabāṇāgnisākṣikaṃ |  6514-2 tava sakhyai mayā datto na sevyaḥ sevitā rahaḥ ||6515-1 uttareṇa sadā kāryaṃ prāṇasya na virodhakaṃ |  6515-2 saṃgrāmeṇa vinā kāryaṃ na lakṣyaṃ dakṣiṇāmukhaṃ ||6516-1 uttānaphalalubdhānāṃ varaṃ rājopajīvinaḥ |  6516-2 na tu tatsvāminastīvraparikleśaiḥ phalanti ye ||6517-1 uttānāḥ kati vellitāḥ kati rayādābhugnamadhyāḥ katikṣiptotkṣiptavikuñcitāḥ kati bhujāstauryatrikānukramāt |  6517-2 kalpānteṣu mahānaṭasya jhaṭiti prakrāntacakrabhrami- bhrāntau kevalamagnihāsagaralairlekhātrayaṃ pātu vaḥ ||6518-1 uttānāmupadhāya bāhulatikāmekāmapā gaśritāṃ anyāmapyalasāṃ nidhāya vipulābhoge nitambasthale |  6518-2 nīvīṃ kiṃcidavaślathāṃ vidadhatī niśvāsalolālakātalpotpīḍanatiryagunnatakucaṃ nidrāti śātodarī ||6519-1 uttānocchūnamaṇḍūkapāṭitodarasaṃnibhe |  6519-2 kledini strīvraṇe saktirakṛmeḥ kasya jāyate ||6520-1 uttānollapitapratāritanavaśrotraiḥ kathaṃ bhāvyatāṃ vākpratyaṃśaniveśitākhilajagattattvā kavīnāṃ kalā |  6520-2 rathyāgartavigāhanādbhutakṛtairgāhyaḥ kva ratnākaroyasyāntaḥśapharādhamānanataṭīmajjadgirīndrāḥ śriyaḥ ||6521-1 uttānau caraṇau kṛtvā ūrusaṃsthau prayatnataḥ |  6521-2 ūrumadhye tathottānau pāṇī padmāsanaṃ tvidaṃ ||6522-1 uttārakamatisnigdhaṃ bhrūkṣepavaśavarti ca |  6522-2 sadā mukhasthaṃ mitraṃ cennetreṇa capalena kiṃ ||6523-1 uttārayati vipattāv iti dhanavattāmapekṣate kṣitipaḥ |  6523-2 cenneha tadupayogas taṃ niyataṃ vittasaṃcayo rogaḥ ||6524-1 uttālatāṭakotpātadarśane'pyaprakampitaḥ |  6524-2 niyuktastatpramāthāya straiṇena vicikitsati ||6525-1 kasīra-protkhātākṛṣṭakālāgururuciraruciḥ strotasonmādaśīlā |  6526-2 acchaṇḍīdvīpavandībhavadakhilacalatkāndiśīkogranakrā kālindī vo'stu saṃdīpitasukṛtacayodrekamndīkṛtaināḥ ||6527-1 uttālālakabhañjanāni kabarīpāśeṣu śikṣāraso dantānāṃ parikarma nīvinahanaṃ bhrūlāsyayogyāgrahaḥ |  6527-2 tiryaglocanaceṣṭitāni vacasāṃ chekoktisaṃkrāntayaḥ strīṇāṃ mlāyati śaiśave pratikalaṃ ko'pyeṣa kelikramaḥ ||6528-1 uttiṣṭha kṣaṇamekamudvaha sakhe dāridryabhāraṃ guruṃ śrāntastāvadahaṃ cirānmaraṇajaṃ seve tvadīyaṃ sukhaṃ |  6528-2 ityukto dhanavarjitena viduṣā gatvā śmaśānaṃ śavo dāridryānmaraṇaṃ varaṃ sukhamiti jñātvā sa tūṣṇīṃ sthitaḥ ||6529-1 uttiṣṭhati namati vaṇik pṛcchati kuśalaṃ dadāti ca sthānaṃ |  6529-2 nikṣepapāṇimāptaṃ dṛṣṭvā dharmyāṃ kathāṃ kurute ||6530-1 uttiṣṭha dūti yāmo yāmo yātastathāpi nāyātaḥ |  6530-2 yātaḥ paramapi jīvej jīvitanātho bhavettasyāḥ ||6531-1 uttiṣṭhantyā ratānte bharamuragapatau pāṇinaikena kṛtvā dhṛtvā cānyena vāso pathyamicchatā |  6532-2 samau hi śiṣṭairāmnātau vartsyantāvāmayaḥ sa ca ||6533-1 uttiṣṭha yadi jīvantīṃ māmicchasi tamānaya |  6533-2 ahaṃ netumaśakyāpi sudūramidamantaraṃ ||6534-1 uttiṣṭha vatsetyamṛtāyamānaṃ vaco niśamyotthitamutthitaḥ san |  6534-2 dadarśa rājā jananīmiva svāṃ gāmagrataḥ prasraviṇīṃ na siṃhaṃ ||6535-1 uttiṣṭhārāttarau me taruṇimama taroḥ śaktirārohaṇa kā sākṣādākhyāmi mugdhe taraṇimiha raverākhyayā kā ratirme |  6535-2 vārteyaṃ nauprasa ge kathamapi bhavitā nāvayoḥ saṃgamārthā vārtāpīti smitāsyaṃ jitagiramajitaṃ rādhayārādhayāmi ||6536-1 uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha kiṃ śeṣe prāpte paribhave nave |  6536-2 adya vai nirbhayā la kāṃ praviṣṭāḥ sūryaraśmayaḥ ||6537-1 uttīrṇabhāralaghunāpyalaghūlapaugha- sauhityaniḥsahatareṇa taroradhastāt |  6537-2 r_oṃanthamantharacaladgurusāsnamāsāṃ cakre nimīladalasekṣaṇamaukṣakeṇa ||6538-1 uttīrya dakṣiṇe pūrvaṃ paścādvāme'tininditāḥ |  6538-2 kaiścitkṛṣṇo mṛgaścaikaḥ kaiścitsarve'pi nādṛtāḥ ||6539-1 uttīrya pṛṣṭhato yāti veṣṭanaṃ vākaroti cet |  6539-2 svasthasya veṣṭanaprāptiḥ sabhayasya bhayaṃ haret ||6540-1 uttu gapīvarakucadvayapīḍitā gaṃ āli gitaḥ pulakitena bhujena ratyā |  6540-2 6543-2 siṃhaḥ pracaṇḍagajakumbhavidārako'pi ucchiṣṭameva labhate khalu pakṣahīnaḥ ||6544-1 uttu gaśailaśikharāśrayaṇena keciduddāmavīcivalitāḥ sarito bhavanti |  6544-2 anye puṇarjalakanāstṛṇaloṣṭapātādambh_oṃucāṃ payasi na kṣayamāpnuvanti||6545-1 uttu gaśailaśikhare nanu pādapasya kāko'pi pakvaphalamālabhate sapakṣaḥ |  6545-2 siṃho balī gajavidāraṇadāruṇo'pi sīdatyaho tarutale nijapakṣahīnaḥ ||6546-1 uttu gastanaparvatādavataradga geva hārāvalī r_oṃālī navanīlanīrajaruciḥ seyaṃ kalindātmajā |  6546-2 jātaṃ tīrthamidaṃ supuṇyajanakaṃ yatrānayoḥ saṃgamaścandro majjati lāñchanāpahṛtaye nūnaṃ nakhāṃkacchalāt ||6547-1 uttu gastanaparvataistanuruhai r_oṃāvalībhūruhaiḥ kāñcīka kaṇanūpuradhvaniparairhārāvalīvāguraiḥ |  6547-2 bhrūcāpena ||6553-1 uttu gādanilacalāṃśukāstaṭāntāchcetobhiḥ saha bhayadarśināṃ priyāṇāṃ |  6553-2 śroṇībhirgurubhiratūrṇamutpatantyas toyeṣu drutatarama ganā nipetuḥ||6554-1 uttu ge kṛtasaṃśrayasya śikhariṇyuccāvacagrāvaṇi nyagrodhasya kima ga tasya vacasā ślāghāsu paryāpyate |  6554-2 bandurvā sa purākṛtaḥ kimathavā satkarmaṇāṃ saṃcayo mārge rūkṣavipatraśākhini jano yaṃ prāpya viśrāmyati ||6555-1 uttu ge vibhavadrumasya śikhare bhuktvā phalaṃ svecchayātasmātpraskhalitaḥ padādvidhivaśādbhraṣṭo nirālambanaḥ |  6555-2 pātālodarabhīṣaṇe bahuvidhakleśoragādhyāsite daurgatyāvaṭagarbhake 6570-2 hutvāgniṃ brāhmaṇāṃścārya praviśecca śubhāṃ sabhāṃ ||6571-1 utthāyotthāya pāpeṣvabhiramati matirmandabuddheryadā te naivedvego na śāntirna ca bhavati ghṛṇā kurvataḥ karma nindyaṃ |  6571-2 utpattyutpannaśiṣṭā vividhaguṇagaṇā yatra yānti praṭiṣṭhāṃ bādhena prāktanānāṃ na ca niyamavidhirnāpi saṃkhyārthadāne |  6592-2 ūhaḥ sarvatra yasya sphurati ca sakalaḥ satya evārthavādomīmāṃsābhāvamañcatyabhinavamadhunā mūrtireṣā tvadīyā ||6593-1 utpatreva dṛśo'rciṣā kusumitevendoḥ karairbhogibhiḥ sāroheva jaṭāṭavī phalatu vaḥ śreyo bhavānīpateḥ |  6593-2 parārthabaddhakakṣyāṇāṃ tādṛśāmudbhavaḥ kutaḥ ||6597-1 utpannaṃ sudhiyāṃ kule yadakhilaistyaktaṃ budhairna kṣaṇaṃ yanno vismṛtamekadāpi sujanairyadyanna yuktaṃ khalaiḥ |  6597-2 daurgatyasya ||6599-1 utpannaputramātrasya puṃsaḥ svargo bhaveddhrṛvaṃ |  6599-2 ṭiṭṭibhotpādanādeva mandapālo divaṃ yayau ||6600-1 utpannamiha loke vai janmaprabhṛti mānavaṃ |  6600-2 vividhānyupavartante duḥkhāni ca sukhāni ca ||6601-1 tayorekatare mārge yadyenamabhisaṃnayet |  6601-2 na sukhaṃ prāpya saṃhṛṣyetna duḥkhaṃ prāpya saṃjvaret ||6602-1 utpannasya ruroḥ śṛ gaṃ vardhamānasya vardhate |  6602-2 prārthanā puruṣasyeva tasya mātrā na vidyate ||6603-1 utpannāḥ saritāṃ hradeṣu suciraṃ tatraiva puṣṭāstataḥ prāptāḥ prāvṛṣi sāgaraṃ jalacarāstāsāṃ mukhādeva ye |  6603-2 dvitraireva dinaistimiṃgilakulasyāsādya kūṭasthatāṃ mṛṣyantyadya na te rahasyapi kṛtāṃ nādeyatāsaṃkathāṃ ||6604-1 utpannā bahavastaleṣu sarasāmambhoruhāṇāṃ cayā ye yāminyadhipānukāriramaṇīvaktropamānaṃ gatāḥ |  6604-2 nābhau bh_oṃariporajāyata mahāpadmaḥ sa ko'pyekakoyastrailokyasamudbhavaprabhaviturjanmāvanitvaṃ gataḥ ||6605-1 utpannāmāpadaṃ yastu samādhatte sa buddhimān |  6605-2 vaṇijo bhāryayā jāraḥ pratyakṣe nihnuto yathā ||6606-1 utpanneṣu ca kāryeṣu matiryasya na hīyate |  6606-2 sa nistarati durgāṇi gopī jāradvayaṃ yathā ||6607-1 utpanno ghaṭa cakravartyasi punarvahniṃ praviśya tvayā prātaḥ snānapariśrameṇa payasāṃ pānena taptaṃ tapaḥ |  6607-2 ākramyonnatajānu yanmṛgadṛśāṃ tiṣṭhannitambasthalekaṇṭhālambitabāhuvallikucayoḥ sīmānamāskandasi ||6608-1 utpalasya ca padmasya matsyasya kumudasya ca |  6608-2 ekajātiprasūtānāṃ rūpaṃ gandhaḥ pṛthakpṛthak ||6609-1 utpalasya hi raktimā sādhoḥ paropakāritā |  6609-2 asādhoḥ karuṇābhāvaḥ svabhāvāstrividhā yathā ||6610-1 utpallava iva kiraṇaiḥ kusumita iva tārakābhirayaminduḥ |  6610-2 udayatyudayataṭānte surataruriva śītalacchāyaḥ ||6611-1 utpaśyāmi drutamapi sakhe matpriyārthaṃ yiyāsoḥ kālakṣepaṃ kakubhasurabhau subhadrā |  6612-2 kādambarīmadavighūrṇitalocanasya yuktaṃ hi lā galadhṛtaḥ patanaṃ pṛthivyāṃ ||6613-1 utpātaketuriva manmathanāyakasya vajraprahāra iva kelilatāvanasya |  6613-2 saṃhārakāla iva kīrṇasaṭo'bhyudeti ||6615-1 utpātāya ca kāvye durupaśrutirabhinaye ca nāṭyānāṃ |  6615-2 svasthānāmapi yadvaddhvastā dhārā dharitrīti ||6616-1 utpādakabrahmadātrorgarīyānbrahmadaḥ pitā |  6616-2 brahmajanma hi viprasya pretya ceha ca śāśvataṃ ||6617-1 utpādanamapatyasya jātasya paripālanaṃ |  6617-2 pratyarthaṃ lokayātrāyāḥ pratyakṣaṃ strīnibandhanaṃ ||6618-1 utpādayati lokasya prītiṃ ||6692-1 uda mukho vakti bhaṣanniśīthe dvijopapīḍāṃ maraṇaṃ gavāṃ ca |  6692-2 kumārikādūṣaṇagarbhapāta- vahnīnniśānte śivadi mukhaḥ syāt ||6693-1 udañcatkāverīlahariṣu pariṣva gara ge udañcaya dṛgañcalaṃ racaya ma galaṃ sarvataścirāya samupāgataḥ purata eṣa te vallabhaḥ |  6700-2 iti priyagirā śrutīpulakadanture kurvatī prakaśayati no dṛśau priyasakhī mṛṣāśa kayā ||6701-1 ||6718-1 udayati yadi bhānuḥ paścime digvibhāge pracalati yadi meruḥ śītatāṃ yāti vahniḥ |  6718-2 vikasati yadi padmaṃ parvatāgre śilāyāṃ na bhavati punaruktaṃ bhāṣitaṃ sajjanānāṃ ||6719-1 udayati sārambhamujjṛmbhate cūto dūta ivāntakasya kalikājālasphuratpallavaḥ ||6779-1 udgatā mathanakṣobhātphenarājiḥ payodadheḥ |  6779-2 tārakāvalirityajñairiyaṃ sakhi nivedyate ||6780-1 nairghṛṇyamālambitaṃ tatsmṛtvā yadi yuktamāsitumaho yūyaṃ pramāṇaṃ mama ||6790-1 udgrīvastimitekṣanastata itaḥ paśyannilīya sthitaṃ pādodghṛṣṭiparasparapratibhayabhrāntaṃ calatpakṣatiḥ |  6790-2 6853-2 madrakametadadya subhagairvidagdhagaticeṣṭitaiḥ sulalitair nṛtyasi vibhramākulapadaṃ viviktarasabhāvitaṃ śaśimukhi ||6854-1 udyatasya paraṃ hantuṃ stabdhasya vivaraiṣiṇaḥ |  6854-2 patanaṃ jāyate'vaśyaṃ kṛcchreṇa punarunnatiḥ ||6855-1 udyatasya hi kāmasya prativādo na śasyate |  6855-2 api nirmuktasa gasya kāmaraktasya kiṃ punaḥ ||6856-1 udyatāsirnṛpo yatra tatraiva dhanarakṣaṇaṃ |  6856-2 kaṇṭakākulaśākhyāyāṃ lagnaṃ gṛhṇāti no phalaṃ ||6857-1 udyateta yathāśakti na prasajyeta jātucit |  6857-2 sādhyānāṃ siddhyasiddhī yanniyatyā niyate kṛte ||6858-1 udyateṣvapi śastreṣu dūto vadati nānyathā |  6858-2 sadaivāvadhyabhāvena yathārthasya hi vācakaḥ ||6859-1 udyateṣvapi śastreṣu yathoktaṃ śāsanaṃ vadet |  6859-2 rāgāparāgau jānīyāddṛṣṭivaktraviceṣṭitaiḥ ||6860-1 udyatkarakaravālaḥ śakatimiradhvaṃsane mahānipuṇaḥ |  6860-2 kalkiharirvaḥ pāyādapāyataḥ kaliniśāntotthaḥ ||6861-1 udyattārādhināthadyutihṛtipaṭavaḥ sāndrasindūraśoṇāḥśrīmadvetaṇḍatuṇḍapratibhaṭabaṭavaḥ padmarāgātirāgāḥ |  6861-2 dūrādānamrakamracchaviravikiraṇaśreṇikirmīritāntāguñjāpuñjānurāgadviguṇitamahasaḥ pāntu kṛṣṇā ghribhāsaḥ ||6862-1 udyattāruṇyavāruṇyatiśayitamadocchvāsacāruṇyatī vaprodañcatpañcabāṇapracuraruciradṛkcañcarīkaprapañce |  6862-2 mandaśrīścandramāste sati sutanu mukhe procchvasattandramāstehīnaṃ śobhābhirambhoruhamapi rajanau naiti rambhoru hāsaṃ ||6863-1 udyatsaurabhagarbhanirbharamiladvālā kuraśrīmṛto mākandānavalokya yaḥ pratidiśaṃ sānandamutkūjitaḥ |  6863-2 tānevādya phalāśayā 6864-2 saukhyaṃ sarvendriyāṇāmabhimatamabhitaḥ kurvatīṃ mānaseṣṭāṃ satsaubhāgyāllabhante kṛtasukṛtavaśāḥ kāminīṃ martyamukhyāḥ ||6865-1 udyadduḥsahavittatānavatayā baddhāvadhāne manasy unmārgabhramaṇe'vaśasya rabhasācchvabhre paribhrāmyataḥ |  6865-2 anyo'pāhitakośapṛṣṭhaluṭhanātsaṃdarśitā gakṣater jantorhanta tanoti durgatiśamaṃ ramyānul_oṃyo vidhiḥ ||6866-1 udyadbarhiṣi dardurāravapuṣi prkṣīṇapānthāyuṣiścyotadvipruṣi candraru muṣi sakhe haṃsadviṣi prāvṛṣi |  6866-2 mā muñcoccakucāgrasantatapatadbāṣpākulāṃ bālikāṃ kāle kālakarālanīlajaladavyāluptabhāsvattviṣi ||6867-1 udyadbālā kuraśrīrdiśi diśi daśanairebhirāśāgajānāṃ rohanmūlā sugaurairuragapatiphaṇairatra pātālakukṣau |  6867-2 asminnākāśadeśe vikasitakusumā rāśibhistārakāṇāṃ nātha tvatkīrtivallī phalati phalamidaṃ bimbamindoḥ sudhārdraṃ ||6868-1 udyadvidrumakāntibhiḥ kisalayaistāmrāṃ tviṣaṃ bibhrato bhṛ gālīvirutaiḥ kalairaviśadavyāhāralīlābhṛtaḥ |  6868-2 ghūrṇanto malayānilāhaticalaiḥ janmaprabhṛti gaurnāsti payaḥ pibati nityaśaḥ ||6881-1 udyamaḥ kalahaḥ kaṇḍūrdyūtamadyaparastriyaḥ |  6881-2 nidrā maithunamālasyaṃ sevanāttu vivardhate ||6882-1 udyamaḥ sāhasaṃ dhairyaṃ balaṃ nahi suptasya siṃhasya praviśanti mukhe mṛgāḥ ||6889-1 udyame nāsti dāridryaṃ japyato nāsti pātakaṃ |  6889-2 maunena kalaho nāsti nāsti jāgarato bhayaṃ ||6890-1 udyamenaiva kāryāṇi sidhyanti na udyallāvaṇyalakṣmīvalayitavapuṣāṃ svargavārā ganānāṃ āśleṣe yaḥ pramodaḥ sphurati ca garimā yo'mṛte mādhurīṇāṃ |  6892-2 saurabhyaṃ ku kume yatpayasi vimalatā yāpyaho tatsamastaṃ mitraikatrekṣituṃ śīkarasaṃgamātsurabhayo mitraṃ sarojānilāḥ ||6896-1 udyānapāla kalaśāmbuniṣecanānāṃ etasya campakatarorayameva kālaḥ |  6896-2 tasminnidāghanihate ghanavāriṇā vā saṃvardhite tava vṛthobhayathopayogaḥ ||6897-1 udyānamārutoddhūtāścūtacampakareṇavaḥ |  6897-2 udaśrayanti pānthānāṃ aspṛśanto'pi locane ||6898-1 udyānasahakārāṇāṃ anudbhinnā na mañjarī |  6898-2 deyaḥ pathikanārīṇāṃ satilaḥ salilāñjaliḥ ||6899-1 udyānāni na sarvadā paribhavatrāsādivādhyāsate bhūmau nopaviśanti ye khalu rajaḥsaṃparkatarkādiva |  6899-2 teṣāmapyatipūjanīyavapuṣāṃ nūnaṃ pikānāmiyaṃ 6901-2 kiṃtu dhvā kṣavijṛmbhiteṣu ca pikaprārabdhagāneṣu ca kreṃkāreṣu ca pañcamadhvaniṣu ca śrotā na vettyantaraṃ ||6903-1 udyogaḥ kṣayameti hanta sahasā jāḍyaṃ samujjṛmbhate mitrasyāpi ca darśanaṃ 6925-2 daṇḍena nṛpatistasmādyuktadaṇḍaḥ praśasyate ||6926-1 udvejayati daridraṃ paramudrāyā jhaṇatkāraḥ |  6926-2 gṛhapatiratimilitāyāḥ ka kaṇarāvo yathā jāraṃ ||6927-1 udvejayati bhūtāni payodharabharastanvyāḥ kaṃ na cakre'bhilāṣiṇaṃ ||6936-1 unnataghanamadhyagataṃ nirguṇamapi suradhanuḥ śobhāṃ |  6936-2 tena mahadbhiḥ sākaṃ saṃvāsaḥ prārthyate vijñaiḥ ||6937-1 unnatadakṣiṇapakṣā bhakṣyamukhī vihitapārthivaninādā |  6937-2 tārā tarumadhigacchati tadyacchati vāñchitādadhikaṃ ||6938-1 unnatānāṃ suvaṃśānāṃ dvaidhaṃ tāvanna jāyate |  6938-2 yāvatkuṭhāradhāreva yoṣidviśati nirdhanas tūlarāśiriva yāti lāghavaṃ ||6942-1 unnatyai namati prabhuṃ prabhugṛhāndraṣṭuṃ bahistiṣṭhatisvadravyavyayamātanoti jaḍadhīrāgāmivittāśayā |  6942-2 prāṇānprāṇitumeva muñcati raṇe kliśnāti bhogecchayā sarvaṃ tadviparītameva kurute tṛṣṇāndhadṛksevakaḥ ||6943-1 unnamayya sakacagrahamāsyaṃ cumbati priyatame haṭhavṛttyā |  6943-2 huṃ hu muñca mama meti ca mandaṃ jalpitaṃ jayati mānadhanāyāḥ ||6944-1 unnamitaikabhrūlataṃ ānanamasyāḥ padāni racayantyāḥ |  6944-2 kaṇṭakitena prathayati mayyanurāgaṃ kapolena ||6945-1 unnamya dūraṃ muhurānamantyaḥ kāntāḥ ślathībhūtanitambajāḍyāḥ |  6945-2 dolāvilāsena jitaśramatvāthprakarṣamāpuḥ puruṣāyiteṣu ||6946-1 unnamyonnamya tatraiva daridrāṇāṃ manorathāḥ |  6946-2 patanti hṛdaye vyarthā vidhavāstrīstanā iva ||6947-1 unnamrasvapayodharāntarapayodhārābhirānandi saḥ cañcadbālakalāpakānkalagiro mugdhānnavā ghrikramān |  6947-2 tvayyādhāya śikhaṇḍinaḥ śiva śiva prāvṛṭsamāptiṃ gatā teṣu tvaṃ tu śaraccharārucalitā jātāsi dhautāsivat ||6948-1 unnayati nābhinimnān muktāvalipāśi r_oṃarājinalaṃ |  6948-2 smaraśabaraḥ stanabhūdhara- nipatattarunākṣipakṣibandhāya ||6949-1 unnidrakandaladalāntaralīyamāna- guñjanmadāndhamadhupe navameghakāle |  6949-2 svapne'pi yaḥ pravasati pravihāya kāntāṃ tasmai viṣāṇarahitāya namo vṛṣāya ||6950-1 unnidrakokanadareṇupiśa gitā gā gāyanti mañju madhupā gṛhadīrghikāsu|  6950-2 etaccakāsti ca ravernavabandhujīva- puṣpacchadābhamudayācalacumbi bimbaṃ||6951-1 unnidratā matsyasagandhitā ca pravālahāniḥ sapipīlikātvaṃ |  6951-2 bhavatyalaṃ jalaughaḥ ||6953-1 unnidreṇa mayādya cintitamabhūdyatrāvatārā harer ākhyātā daśa kīrtito'si na kathaṃ tatra tvamekādaśaḥ |  6953-2 tviccāritramagocaraṃ kavigirāṃ jānannapi kṣmāpate na prast_oṃi bhayena bhāratakaveḥ kastādṛśaṃ vakṣyati ||6954-1 unnīto bhavabhūtinā pratidinaṃ bāṇe gate yaḥ purā yaścīrṇaḥ kamalāyudhena suciraṃ yenāgamatkeśaṭaḥ |  6954-2 yaḥ śrīvākpatirājapādarajasāṃ saṃparkapūtaściraṃ diṣṭyā ślāghyaguṇasya kasyacidasau mārgaḥ samunmīlati ||6955-1 unmagnacañcalavanāni vanāpagānāṃ āśyānasaikatatara gaparaṃparāṇi |  6955-2 nimnāvaśiṣṭasalilāni mano haranti rodhāṃsi haṃsapadamudritakardamāni ||6956-1 unmajjanmakara ivāmarāpagāyā vegena pratimukhametya bāṇanadyāḥ |  6956-2 gāṇḍīvī kanakaśilānibhaṃ bhujābhyāṃ ājaghne viṣamavilocanasya vakṣaḥ ||6957-1 unmatta kaṇṭakiphalapratiyogibuddhyā vairaṃ vṛthaiva kuruṣe panasena sārdhaṃ |  6957-2 santo hasanti na bhajanti bhajanti cettvāṃ bhrāntā bhavanti sahasā na punarbhajanti ||6958-1 unmatta dhūrta taruṇendunivāsayogye sthāne piśācapatinā viniveśito'si |  6958-2 kiṃ kairavāṇi vikasanti tamaḥ prayāti candropalo dravati vārdhirupaiti vṛddhiṃ ||6959-1 unmattapremasaṃrambhādārabhante yada ganāḥ |  6959-2 tatra pratyūhamādhātuṃ brahmāpi khalu kātaraḥ ||6960-1 unmattamāsādya haraḥ smaraśca dvāvapyasīmāṃ mudamudvahete |  6960-2 pūrvaṃ paraspardhitayā prasūnaṃ nūnaṃ dvitīyo virahādhidūnaṃ ||6961-1 unmattānāṃ ca yā gāthāḥ śiśūnāṃ yacca bhāṣitaṃ |  6961-2 striyo yacca prabhāṣante tasya nāsti vyatikramaḥ ||6962-1 unmattānāṃ bhuja gānāṃ madyapānāṃ ca dantināṃ |  6962-2 strīṇāṃ aiśvaryasīdhurasapānavighūrṇamānāḥ ke nāma na pratipadaṃ puruṣāḥ skhalanti||6966-1 unmādameke puṣyanti yāntyanye dviṣatāṃ vaśaṃ |  6966-2 dāsyameke ca gacchanti pareṣāmarthahetunā ||6967-1 unmīlattrivalītara gavalayā prottu gapīnastana-dvandvenodyatacakravākamithunā vaktrāmbujodbhāsinī |  6967-2 kāntākāradharā nadīyamabhitaḥ krūrāśayā neṣyate saṃsārārṇavamajjanaṃ yadi tato dūreṇa 6971-2 navyāmikṣurasodadheryadi sudhāmutthāpayetsā bhavaj jihvāyāḥ kṛtimāhvayeta paramāṃ matkarṇayoḥ pāraṇāṃ ||6972-1 unmīladyauvanāsi priyasakhi viṣamāḥ śreṇayo nāgarāṇāṃ tasmātko'pi ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ||7019-1 upakārameva tanute vipadgataḥ sadguṇo nitarāṃ |  7019-2 mūrcchāṃ gato mṛto vā nidarśanaṃ pārado'tra rasaḥ ||7020-1 upakāraśatenāpi gṛhyate kena durjanaḥ |  7020-2 sādhuḥ saṃmānamātreṇa bhavatyevātmavikrayī ||7021-1 upakāraśatenāpi dānaiścāpi suvistaraiḥ |  7021-2 lālanātprītipūrvācca na grāhyo bhaginīsutaḥ ||7022-1 upakāraścāpakāro yasya vrajati dhṛṣṭadyumno madhye- vīraṃ hatavānguruṃ śāntaṃ ||7028-1 upakāriṇi vikṣīṇe śanaiḥ kedāravāriṇi |  7028-2 sānukrośatayā śālirabhūtpāṇḍuravā mukhaḥ ||7029-1 upakāriṇi viśrabdhe śuddhamatau yaḥ samācarati pāpaṃ |  7029-2 taṃ janamasatyasaṃdhaṃ bhagavati vasudhe kathaṃ vahasi ||7030-1 upakāriṇi vītamatsare vā sadayatvaṃ yadi tatra ko'tirekaḥ |  7030-2 ahite sahasāparāddhalabdhe saghṛṇaṃ yasya manaḥ satāṃ sa dhuryaḥ ||7031-1 upakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sādhutve tasya ko guṇaḥ |  7031-2 apakāriṣu yaḥ sādhuḥ sa sādhuḥ sadbhirucyate ||7032-1 upakāre kṛtajñatvaṃ apakāre kṛtaghnatā |  7032-2 viṣayasya guṇāvetau kartuḥ syātāṃ viparyayau ||7033-1 upakāreṇa dūyante na sahante'nukampitāṃ |  7033-2 āpatsvapi durārādhyā nityaduḥkhā manasvinaḥ ||7034-1 upakāreṇa nīcānāṃ apakāro hi jāyate |  7034-2 payaḥpānaṃ bhujaṃgānāṃ kevalaṃ viṣavardhanaṃ ||7035-1 upakāreṇa vīrastu pratikāreṇa yujyate |  7035-2 akṛtajño'pratikṛto hanti sattvavatāṃ manaḥ ||7036-1 upakāryopakāritvaṃ dūre cetsā hi mitratā |  7036-2 puṣpavantau kimāsannau paśya kairavapadmayoḥ ||7037-1 upakṛtaṃ bahu tatra kimucyate sujanatā prathitā bhavatā paraṃ |  7037-2 vidadhadīdṛśameva sadā sakhe sukhitamāssva tataḥ śaradāṃ śataṃ ||7038-1 upakṛtamanena sutarāṃ ityasatāmasti na kvacidapekṣā |  7038-2 hotuḥ svahastamāśrita udvahato'gnirdahatyeva ||7039-1 upakṛtavatāpyanārye nāśvasitavyaṃ kṛtipriyo'smīti |  7039-2 payasāpi siktamūlo bhavati hi madhuro na picumandaḥ ||7040-1 upakṛtavatā śrīratnābhyāṃ hareḥ śaśilekhayā manasijaripoḥ pīyūṣeṇāpyaśeṣadivaukasāṃ |  7040-2 kathamitarathā tena stheyaṃ yaśobharamantharaṃ yadi na mathanāyāsaṃ dhīraḥ saheta payonidhiḥ ||7041-1 upakṛtireva khalānāṃ doṣasya garīyaso bhavati hetuḥ |  7041-2 anukūlācaraṇena hi kupyanti vyādhayo'tyarthaṃ ||7042-1 upakṛtisāhasikatayā kṣatimapi gaṇayanti no guṇinaḥ |  7042-2 janayanti hi prakāśaṃ dīpaśikhāḥ svā gadāhena ||7043-1 upakṛtya bhavanti dūrataḥ parataḥ pratyupakāraśa kayā |  7043-2 iyameva hi sattvaśālināṃ mahatāṃ kāpi kaṭhoracittatā ||7044-1 upakramaṃ vāñchitamāśu kuryāddūtopayānātkriyamāṇasaṃdhiḥ |  7044-2 sa cedvisaṃdhiḥ sa tu tatra caikaḥ kṛto bhavatyātmasamucchrayaśca ||7045-1 upagūḍhavelamalaghūrmibhujaiḥ saritāmacukṣubhadadhīśamapi |  7045-2 rajanīkaraḥ kimiva citramado yadurāgiṇāṃ gaṇamana galaghuṃ ||7046-1 upagūhati davadahane tribhuvanadhanyāmaraṇyānīṃ |  7046-2 mūrtā ivāndhakārāḥ pratidiśamapayānti kāsarāvalayaḥ ||7047-1 upacaritāpyatimātraṃ paṇyavadhūḥ kṣīṇasaṃpadaḥ puṃsaḥ |  7047-2 pātayati dṛśaṃ vrajataḥ spṛhayā paridhānamātre'pi ||7048-1 upacaritā hariṇadṛśaḥ sajjanagoṣṭhīṣu miśritā vācaḥ |  7048-2 caritaṃ klamanamadavanaṃ na vidheḥ kuṭilādapi trāsaḥ ||7049-1 upacāraḥ kartavyo yāvadanutpannasauhṛdāḥ puruṣāḥ |  7049-2 utpannasauhṛdānāṃ upacāraḥ kaitavaṃ bhavati ||7050-1 upacāravidhijño'pi nirdhanaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati |  7050-2 nira kuśa ivārūḍho mattadviradamūrdhani ||7051-1 upacārānunayāste kitavasyopekṣitāḥ sakhīvacasā |  7051-2 adhunā niṣṭhuramapi yadi sa vadati kalikaitavādyāmi ||7052-1 upacitāvayavā śucibhiḥ kaṇair alikadambakayogamupeyuṣī |  7052-2 sadṛśakāntiralakṣyata mañjarī tilakajālakajālakamauktikaiḥ ||7053-1 upaciteṣu pareṣvasamarthatāṃ vrajati kālavaśādbalavānapi |  7053-2 tapasi mandagabhastirabhīṣumān nahi mahāhimahānikaro'bhavat ||7054-1 upacchandyāpi dātavyaṃ baline śāntimicchatā |  7054-2 samūlameva gāndhāriraprayacchangataḥ kṣayaṃ ||7055-1 upajapyānupajapedbudhyetaiva ca tatkṛtaṃ |  7055-2 yukte ca daive yudhyeta jayaprepsurapetabhīḥ ||7056-1 upajāpaḥ kṛtastena tānākopavatastvayi |  7056-2 āśu dīpayitālpo'pi sāgnīnedhānivānilaḥ ||7057-1 upajāpaścirārodho'vaskandastīvrapauruṣaṃ |  7057-2 durgasya la ghanopāyāścatvāraḥ kathitā ime ||7058-1 upajāpasahānvila ghayan sa vidhātā nṛpatīnmahoddhataḥ |  7058-2 sahate na jano'pyadhaḥkriyāṃ kimu lokādhikadhāma rājakaṃ ||7059-1 upajāpahṛtasvāmisnehasīmni parāśrayaṃ |  7059-2 maule vāñchati medinyāḥ patyuḥ pāto na saṃśayaḥ ||7060-1 upajīvati sma satataṃ dadhataḥ parimugdhatāṃ vaṇigivoḍupateḥ |  7060-2 ghanavīthivīthimavatīrṇavato nidhirambhasāmupacayāya kalāḥ ||7061-1 upajīvyā hatā kanyā svārthe pākakriyā hatā |  7061-2 śūdrabhikṣāhato yāgaḥ kṛpaṇasya hataṃ dhanaṃ ||7062-1 upatāpyamānamalaghūṣṇimabhiḥ śvasitaiḥ sitetarasarojadṛśaḥ |  7062-2 dravatāṃ na netumadharaṃ kṣamate navanāgavallidalarāgarasaḥ ||7063-1 upadiśati lokavṛttaṃ vitarati vittaṃ vinodayati cittaṃ |  7063-2 uttambhayati mahattvaṃ vidyā hṛdyā surājaseveva ||7064-1 upadeśaṃ viduḥ śuddhaṃ santastamupadeśinaḥ |  7064-2 śyāmāyate na yuṣmāsu yaḥ kāñcanamivāgniṣu ||7065-1 upadeśapradātṇāṃ narāṇāṃ hitamicchatāṃ |  7065-2 parasminnihaloke ca vyasanaṃ nopapadyate ||7066-1 upadeśo na dātavyo yādṛśe tādṛśe nare |  7066-2 paśya vānaramūrkheṇa sugṛhī nirgṛhīkṛtā ||7067-1 upadeśo hi mūrkhāṇāṃ krodhāyaiva śamāya na |  7067-2 payaḥpānaṃ bhuja gānāṃ viṣāyaivāmṛtāya na ||7068-1 upadeśo hi mūrkhāṇāṃ prakopāya na śāntaye |  7068-2 payaḥpānaṃ bhuja gānāṃ kevalaṃ viṣavardhanaṃ ||7069-1 upadraṣṭānumantā ca bhartā bhoktā maheśvaraḥ |  7069-2 paramātmeti cāpyukto dehe'sminpuruṣaḥ paraḥ ||7070-1 upadhāśodhitāḥ samyagīhamānāḥ phalodayaṃ |  7070-2 te'sya sarvaṃ parīkṣeransānurāgāḥ kṛtākṛtaṃ ||7071-1 upetya dhīyate yasmādupadheti tataḥ smṛtā |  7071-2 upāya upadhā jñeyā tayāmātyānparīkṣayet ||7072-1 ... ... ... |  7072-2 upadhitrayaśuddhito'sya kiṃ kanakasyeva paraṃ parīkṣaṇaṃ ||7073-1 upadhivasatipiṇḍāngṛhṇate no viruddhāṃs tanuvacanamanobhiḥ sarvathā ye munīndrāḥ |  7073-2 vratasamitisametā dhvastamohaprapañcā dadatu mama vimuktiṃ te hatakrodhayodhāḥ ||7074-1 upanatabhaye yo yo mārgo hitārthakaro bhavethsa sa nipuṇayā buddhyā sevyo mahānkṛpaṇo'pi vā |  7074-2 karikaranibhau jyāghātā kau mahāstraviśāradau valayaracitau strīvadbāhū kṛtau na kirīṭinā ||7075-1 upanatamatipuṇyacayaiḥ saṃpūrṇaṃ rakṣitaṃ ca yatnena |  7075-2 saṃpadi vipadi trāṇaṃ bhavati nidhānaṃ ca mitraṃ ca ||7076-1 upanadipuline mahāpalāśaḥ pavanasamucchaladekapattrapāṇiḥ |  7076-2 davadahanavinaṣṭajīvitānāṃ salilamivaiṣa dadāti pādapānāṃ ||7077-1 upanayati kapole lolakarṇapravāla- kṣaṇamukulaniveśāndolanavyāpṛtānāṃ |  7077-2 parimalitaharidrānsaṃprati dvāviḍīnāṃ navanakhapadatiktānātapaḥ svedabindūn ||7078-1 upanayanavivāhāvutsavaikapradhānau kalivibhavata eṣāṃ kālabhedānabhijñāḥ |  7078-2 vijahati na kadācidvedapāṭhaikayogye vayasi ca yavanānīvācanābhyāsamete ||7079-1 upanayati masiṃ pattraṃ cedaṃ likhāmi kimatra vā tvamiti vinayabhraṃśo yūyaṃ tviti praṇayakṣatiḥ |  7079-2 suhṛditi mṛṣā nāthetyūnaṃ nṛpeti taṭasthatā kathamiti tataḥ saṃdeṣṭavyo mayā yadunandanaḥ ||7080-1 upaniṣadaḥ paripītā gītāpi na hanta matipathaṃ nītā |  7080-2 tadapi na hā vidhuvadanā mānasasadanādbahiryāti ||7081-1 upanihitahalīṣāsārgaladvāramārāthparicakitapurandhrīsāritābhyarṇabhāṇḍaṃ|  7081-2 pavanarayatiraścīrvāridhārāḥ pratīcchan viśati valitaśṛ gaḥ pāmarāgāramukṣā ||7082-1 upanītanītinaukaḥ saṃsāravikāravārivanyāsu |  7082-2 satpuruṣakarṇadhāras tārayati janānbahūnekaḥ ||7083-1 upanīya kalamakuḍavaṃ kathayati sabhayaścikitsake halikaḥ |  7083-2 śoṇaṃ s_oṃārdhanibhaṃ vadhūstane vyādhimupajātaṃ ||7084-1 upanīya priyamasamaya- vidaṃ ca me dagdhamānamapanīya |  7084-2 narmopakrama eva kṣaṇade dūtīva calitāsi ||7085-1 upanīya yannitambe bhujaṃgamuccairalambi vibudhaiḥ śrīḥ |  7085-2 ekaḥ sa mandaragiriḥ sakhi garimāṇaṃ samudvahatu ||7086-1 upanetumunnatimateva divaṃ kucayoryugena tarasā kalitāṃ |  7086-2 rabhasotthitāmupagataḥ sahasā parirabhya kaścana vadhūmarudhat ||7087-1 upapattibhiramlānā nopadeśaiḥ kadarthitāḥ |  7087-2 svasaṃvedanasaṃvedyasārāḥ sahṛdayoktayaḥ ||7088-1 upapannaṃ nanu śivaṃ saptasvaṅgeṣuyasya me |  7088-2 daivīnāṃ mānuṣīṇāṃ ca pratihartā tvamāpadāṃ ||7089-1 upaparisaraṃ godāvaryāḥ parityajatādhvagāḥ saraṇimaparo mārgastāvadbhavadbhirihekṣyatāṃ |  7089-2 iha hi vihito raktāśokaḥ kayāpi hatāśayācaraṇanalinanyāsodañcannavāṅkurakañcukaḥ ||7090-1 upapradānaṃ sāntvaṃ vā bhedaṃ kāle ca vikramaṃ |  7090-2 yogaṃ ca rakṣasāṃ śreṣṭha tāvubhau ca nayānayau ||7091-1 upaprākārāgraṃ prahiṇu nayane tarkaya manāṅanākāśe ko'yaṃ galitahariṇaḥ śītakiraṇaḥ |  7091-2 sudhābaddhagrāsairupavanacakorairanusṛtāṃ kirañjyotsnāmacchāṃ navalavalapākapraṇayinīṃ ||7092-1 upaplavo'sau kimu rājaputrī jyotsnādravo'sāvuta vajrapātaḥ |  7092-2 alaṃ tayā saiva hi jīvitaṃ me dhiṅmāmahaṃ vā caritārtha ekaḥ ||7093-1 upaplutaṃ pātumado madoddhatais tvameva viśvaṃbhara viśvamīśiṣe |  7093-2 ṛte raveḥ kṣālayituṃ kṣameta kaḥ kṣapātamaskāṇḍamalīmasaṃ nabhaḥ ||7094-1 upabarhamambujadṛśo nijaṃ bhujaṃ viracayya vaktramapi gaṇḍamaṇḍale |  7094-2 nijasakthi sakthini nidhāya sādaraṃ svapiti stanārpitakarāmbujo yuvā ||7095-1 upabhuktaṃ yathā vāsaḥ srajo vā mṛditā yathā |  7095-2 evaṃ rājyātparibhraṣṭaḥ samartho'pi nirarthakaḥ ||7096-1 upabhuktakhadiravīṭaka- janitādhararāgabhaṅgabhayāt |  7096-2 pitari mṛte'pi na veśyā roditi hā tāta tāteti ||7097-1 upabhuktāśeṣavṛṣaṃ dhāvantaṃ mṛgaśireśabhogāya |  7097-2 kaḥ khecarakesariṇaṃ paśyatu bhāsvantamantakapratimaṃ ||7098-1 upabhoktuṃ na jānāti kadāpi kṛpaṇo janaḥ |  7098-2 ākaṇṭhajalamagno'pi kukkuro leḍhi jihvayā ||7099-1 upabhogakātarāṇāṃ puruṣāṇāmarthasaṃcayaparāṇāṃ |  7099-2 kanyāmaṇiriva sadane tiṣṭhatyarthaḥ parasyārthe ||7100-1 upabhogādṛte tasya nāśa eva na vidyate |  7100-2 prāktanaṃ bandhanaṃ karma ko'nyathā kartumarhati ||7101-1 upabhogāya ca dhanaṃ jīvitaṃ yena rakṣitaṃ |  7101-2 na rakṣitā tu bhūryena kiṃ tasya dhanajīvitaiḥ ||7102-1 upabhogena puṇyānāṃ prāktanānāṃ tathāṃhasāṃ |  7102-2 kartavyamiti nityānāṃ akāmakaraṇāttathā ||7103-1 upabhogairapi tyaktaṃ nātmānamavasādayet |  7103-2 caṇḍālatve'pi mānuṣyaṃ sarvathā tāta durlabhaṃ ||7104-1 upamā kālidāsasya bhāraverarthagauravaṃ |  7104-2 daṇḍinaḥ padalālityaṃ māghe santi trayo guṇāḥ ||7105-1 upamānamabhūdvilāsināṃ karaṇaṃ yattava kāntimattayā |  7105-2 tadidaṃ gatamīdṛśīṃ daśāṃ na vidīrye kaṭhināḥ khalu striyaḥ ||7106-1 upayayau tanutāṃ madhukhaṇḍitā himakarodayapāṇḍumukhacchaviḥ |  7106-2 sadṛśamiṣṭasamāgamanirvṛtiṃ vanitayānitayā rajanīvadhūḥ ||7107-1 upari kabarībandhagrantheratha grathitāṅgulī nijabhujalate tiryaktanvyā vitatya vivṛttayā |  7107-2 vivṛtavilasadvāmāpāṅgastanārdhakapolayā kuvalayadalasraksaṃdigdhaśriyaḥ prahitā dṛśaḥ ||7108-1 upari karavāladhārā- kārāḥ krūrā bhujaṅgamapuṅgavāt |  7108-2 antaḥ sākṣāddrākṣā- dīkṣāguravo jayanti ke'pi janāḥ ||7109-1 uparigataṃ hi savarṇaṃ hṛtvā karato dadāsi rantuṃ me |  7109-2 dhanyaḥ sarojayugalaṃ tvaktvā stanayugamathāspṛśatkṛṣṇaḥ ||7110-1 upari ghanaṃ ghanapaṭalaṃ tiryaggirayo'pi nartitamayūrāḥ |  7110-2 kṣitirapi kandaladhavalā dṛṣṭiṃ pathikaḥ kva pātayatu ||7111-1 upari ghanaṃ ghanaraṭitaṃ dūre dayitā kimetadāpatitaṃ |  7111-2 himavati divyauṣadhayaḥ śīrṣe sarpaḥ samāviṣṭaḥ ||7112-1 uparijatarujāni yājamānāṃ kuśalatayā parirambhalolupo'nyaḥ |  7112-2 prathitapṛthupayodharāṃ gṛhāṇa svayamiti mugdhavadhūmudāsa dorbhyāṃ ||7113-1 upari tamālataroḥ sakhi pariṇataśaradindumaṇḍalaḥ ko'pi |  7113-2 tatra ca muralīkhuralī kulamaryādāmadho nayati ||7114-1 uparitalanipātiteṣṭako'yaṃ śirasi tanurvipulaśca madhyadeśe |  7114-2 asadṛśajanasaṃprayogabhīror hṛdayamiva sphuṭitaṃ mahāgṛhasya ||7115-1 upari pariplavate mama bāleyaṃ gṛhiṇi haṃsamāleva |  7115-2 sarasa iva nalinanālā tvamāśayaṃ prāpya vasasi punaḥ ||7116-1 upari pīnapayodharapātitā paṭakuṭīva manobhavabhūpateḥ |  7116-2 vijayinastripurārijigīṣayā tava virājati bhāmini kañcukī ||7117-1 upari mihiraḥ krūraḥ krūrāstale'calabhūmayo vahati pavanaḥ pāṃśūtkarṣī kṛśaḥ saraso rasaḥ |  7117-2 ahaha na jahatyete prāṇāṃstadaiva kimadhvagā yadi na bhavataḥ patracchatraṃ viśanti mahīruhaḥ ||7118-1 upari vidhṛtaśāriprauḍhadhanviprasārādiha payasi nadīnāṃ gāhituṃ naiva śaktāḥ |  7118-2 taṭanikaṭanirūḍhāḥ prasthitau yasya caṇḍāḥ saralitakaradaṇḍāḥ kumbhino'mbhaḥ pibanti ||7119-1 upariṣṭhā yadā nārī ramate kāmukaṃ naraṃ |  7119-2 viparītaṃ rataṃ jñeyaṃ sarvakāmijanapriyaṃ ||7120-1 uparisthā bhaktirantarnirmūlā tārayetkathaṃ |  7120-2 nahi bhārakṣamā dṛṣṭā vārāṃ sāndrāpi nīlikā ||7121-1 uparundhanti śvāsān munayo nāśnanti na pibanti |  7121-2 stūyante sujanaiḥ kiṃ kaṇṭhe kurvanti kanakapāśamime ||7122-1 uparyaṃśumataḥ siddhāścaranto yasya sānuṣu |  7122-2 chatrāṇyātapasaṃtrāsādavācīnāni bibhrati ||7123-1 uparyaṣṭau śatānyāhustathā bhūyaśca saptatiḥ |  7123-2 gajānāṃ tu parīmāṇaṃ etadeva vinirdiśet ||7124-1 uparyupari lokasya sarvo gantuṃ samīhate |  7124-2 yatate ca yathāśakti na ca tadvartate tathā ||7125-1 upalakṣya varṇasaṃkara- mapagataguṇayogamujjhitasthairyaṃ |  7125-2 pathikāḥ samudvijante kudeśamiva vīkṣya śakradhanuḥ ||7126-1 upalanikaṣaṃ suvarṇaṃ puruṣo vyavahāranikaṣa uddiṣṭaḥ |  7126-2 dhūrnikaṣo govṛṣabhaḥ strīṇāṃ tu na vidyate nikaṣaḥ ||7127-1 upalaśakalametadbhedakaṃ g_oṃayānāṃ vaṭubhirupahṛtānāṃ barhiṣāṃ stūpametat |  7127-2 śaraṇamapi samidbhiḥ śuṣyamāṇābhirābhir vinamitapaṭalāntaṃ dṛśyate jīrṇakuḍyaṃ ||7128-1 upavanatarunṛtyādhyāpane labdhavarṇo viracitajalakeliḥ padminīkāminībhiḥ |  7128-2 priyasuhṛdasameṣorāyayau yogiyoga- sthitividalanadakṣo dakṣiṇo gandhavāhaḥ||7129-1 upavananavamālikāprasūnaiḥ srajamapi yā parikhidyate sṛjantī |  7129-2 parijanavanitocitāni karmāṇy aparicitāni kathaṃ vidhāsyasi tvaṃ ||7130-1 upavanapavanānupātadakṣair alibhiralābhi yadaṅganājanasya |  7130-2 parimalaviṣayastadunnatānāṃ anugamane khalu saṃpado'grataḥsthāḥ ||7131-1 upavanamiva vārimadhyamagnaṃ vimalatayā pratibiṃbitaṃ dadhānā |  7131-2 śaśikaranikareṇa pūriteva kvacidupaneyapayāḥ sukhāya vāpī ||7132-1 upavanasalilānāṃ bālapadmair bhramaraparabhṛtānāṃ kaṇṭhanādaiḥ |  7132-2 samadagativilāsaiḥ kāminīnāṃ kathayati paṭuvṛttaṃ madhumāsaḥ ||7133-1 upaviśati
