samudīkṣase ||7226-1 urasi phaṇipatiḥ śikhī lalāṭe śirasi vidhuḥ suravāhinī jaṭāyāṃ |  7226-2 priyasakhi kathayāmi kiṃ rahasyaṃ puramathanasya raho'pi saṃsadeva ||7227-1 urasi murabhidaḥ kā gāḍhamāliṅgitāste sarasijamakarandāmoditā nandane kā|  7227-2 girisamalaghuvarṇairarṇavākhyātisaṃkhyair gurubhirapi kṛtā kā chandasāṃ vṛttirasti ||7228-1 urastava payodharāṅkitamidaṃ kuto me kṣamā tato mayi vidhīyatāṃ vasu purā yadaṅgīkṛtaṃ |  7228-2 iti pracalacetasaḥ priyatamasya vārastriyā kvaṇatkanakakaṅkaṇaṃ karatalātsamākṛṣyate ||7229-1 urasyasya bhraśyatkabarabharaniryatsumanasaḥ patanti svarbālāḥ smaraparavaśā dīnamanasaḥ |  7229-2 surāstaṃ gāyanti sphuritatanugaṅgādharamukhās tavāyaṃ dṛkpāto yadupari kṛpāto vilasati ||7230-1 uruguṃ dyuguruṃ yutsu cukuśustuṣṭuvuḥ puru |  7230-2 lulubhuḥ pupuṣurmutsu mumuhurnu muhurmuhuḥ ||7231-1 urojavaccakramanojñarūpā keśāvalīva bhramarājitā vā |  7231-2 saṃgītavatsatpuṭabhedahṛdyā vidyeta nābhīsarasī mṛgākṣyāḥ ||7232-1 urojātāśca kīrāśca turuṣkāraṭṭajāśca ye |  7232-2 ṭakkajāḥ saindhavā madhyāḥ sthalajātāstathā hayāḥ ||7233-1 urobhāvotsedaṃ bhavadapi vilāsairabhinavair mṛgākṣyāstāruṇyaṃ tribhuvanamidaṃ vyākulayati |  7233-2 stanābhogasphītaṃ yadi kila bhavetkā khalu kathā bhavitrī kiṃ cānyadvijitamakhilaṃ puṣpadhanuṣā ||7234-1 urobhuvā kumbhayugena jṛmbhitaṃ navopahāreṇa vayaskṛtena kiṃ |  7234-2 trapāsariddurgamapi pratīrya sā nalasya tanvī hṛdayaṃ viveśa yat ||7235-1 urobhuvi na tuṅgimā na ca gatāgate caṅgimā na vā vacasi vakrimā taralimā na tādṛgbhruvoḥ |  7235-2 tathāpi hariṇīdṛśo vapuṣi kāpi kānticchaṭāpaṭāvṛtamahāmaṇidyutirivāntarā lakṣyate ||7236-1 uro māsadvaye jāte tribhirmāsaistathodaraṃ |  7236-2 caturmāsairnitambaṃ ca hastapādāviva sthitaḥ ||7237-1 uroruhādudgamitaiḥ payobhir āpūrya kelyā nijamāsyagarbhaṃ |  7237-2 phūtkṛtya māturvadane hasantaṃ tanūbhavaṃ paśyati ko'pi dhanyaḥ ||7238-1 uroruhāmbhoruhadarśanāya vimuñcataḥ kañcukabandhanāni |  7238-2 ānandanīrākulalocanasya priyasya jāto viphalaḥ prayāsaḥ ||7239-1 uro viśālaṃ śastaṃ ca kakṣe dīrghonnate śubhe |  7239-2 ūrū vṛttau samau bāhū gūḍhaṃ jānu praśasyate ||7240-1 urvaśī yadi rūpeṇa rambhā yadi tilottamā |  7240-2 gopālī menakā caiva varjanīyāḥ parastriyaḥ ||7241-1 urvīṃ gurvīṃ vahati satataṃ nṛtyato bhūtabhartur bhūtvā hāro bhavati śayanaṃ kiṃ ca viśvaṃbharasya |  7241-2 etatkarma trijagati paraṃ śeṣanāgaikaśakyaṃ bhekānanye vipulavapuṣo bhogino bhakṣayantu ||7242-1 urvīṃ maurvīkiṇabhṛti bhavaddoṣṇi bibhratyaśeṣāṃ śāntaklāntiḥ kimapi kurute narmaṇā karma kūrmaḥ |  7242-2 kṛtvā velāpulinalavalīpallavagrāsagoṣṭhīṃ diṅmātaṅgāḥ samamatha sarinnāthapāthaḥ pibanti ||7243-1 urvīṅgurvītimurvīdhara laghaya śarairvairighairvīryagurvīsvarvīthīrvītadarvīkaranikaramadairvīrakurvīti gurvīḥ |  7243-2 kharvī kurvīta ko'nyastvamiva ripucamūrvījitairvaijayantyāḥkurvandurvīkṣyamojo nijamitaradhanurvāraṇairvītihotraṃ ||7244-1 urvīpateśca sphaṭikāśmanaśca śīlojjhitastrīhṛdasya cāntaḥ |  7244-2 asaṃnidhānātsatatasthitīnāṃ anyoparāgaḥ kurute praveśaṃ ||7245-1 urvīmuddāmasasyāṃ janayatu visṛjanvāsavo vṛṣṭimiṣṭāṃ iṣṭaistraiviṣṭapānāṃ vidadhatu vidhivatprīṇanaṃ vipramukhyāḥ |  7245-2 ākalpāntaṃ ca bhūyātsthirasamupacitā saṃgatiḥ sajjanānāṃ niḥśeṣaṃ yāntu śāntiṃ piśunajanagiro duḥsahā vajralepāḥ ||7246-1 urvyasāvatra tarvālī marvante cārvavasthitiḥ |  7246-2 nātrarju yujyate gantuṃ śiro namaya tanmanāk ||7247-1 urvyāṃ ko'pi mahīdharo laghutaro dorbhyāṃ dhṛto līlayā tena tvaṃ divi bhūtale ca satataṃ govardhano gīyase |  7247-2 tvāṃ trailokyadharaṃ vahāmi kucayoragre na tadgaṇyate kiṃ vā keśava bhāṣaṇena bahunā puṇyairyaśo labhyate ||7248-1 ulūkhalaṃ yathā madhye tailayantre dṛḍhaṃ sthitaṃ |  7248-2 sarvādhārastathā merurmadhye bhūmaṇḍale sthitaṃ ||7249-1 ulbena saṃvṛtastasminnārdraiśca bahirāvṛtaḥ |  7249-2 āste kṛtvā śiraḥ kukṣau bhugnapṛṣṭhaśirodharaḥ ||7250-1 ullaṅghya jaṅghāmavalambamānā veṇī sphuratyāyatalocanāyāḥ |  7250-2 jitvā jagaccandanaśākhikāyāṃ nyastāsivallīva manobhavena ||7251-1 ullaṅghya saridaraṇya- grāmagirīnkāmakātarā yāntu |  7251-2 abhisāriṇya ivāntas- tṛṣṇāṃ nigadanti na svayaṃ sudhiyaḥ ||7252-1 ullaṅghyāpi sakhīvacaḥ samucitāmutsṛjya lajjāmalaṃ hitvā bhītibharaṃ nirasya ca nijaṃ saubhāgyagarvaṃ manāk |  7252-2 ājñāṃ kevalameva manmathagurorādāya nūnaṃ mayā tvaṃ niḥśeṣavilāsivargagaṇanācūḍāmaṇiḥ saṃśritaḥ ||7253-1 ullasatsaurabhaiḥ puṣpairbibhranmālāṃ sugumphitāṃ |  7253-2 paryyantasthāyino'pyanyānāmodayati bhūpatiḥ ||7254-1 ullasitabhrūḥ kimati- krāntaṃ cintayasi nistaraṅgākṣi |  7254-2 kṣudrāpacāravirasaḥ pākaḥ premṇo guḍasyeva ||7255-1 ullasitabhrūdhanuṣā tavapṛthunā locanena rucirāṅgi |  7255-2 acalā api na mahāntaḥ ke cañcalabhāvamānītāḥ ||7256-1 ullasitalāñchano'yaṃ jyotsnāvarṣī sudhākaraḥ sphurati |  7256-2 āsaktakṛṣṇacaraṇaḥ śakaṭa iva prakaṭitakṣīraḥ ||7257-1 ullasitaśītadīdhiti- kalopakaṇṭhe sphuranti tāraughāḥ |  7257-2 kusumāyudhavidhṛtadhanur- nirgatamakarandabindunibhāḥ ||7258-1 ullāpayantyā dayitasya dūtīṃ vadhvā vibhūṣāṃ ca niveśayantyāḥ |  7258-2 prasannatā kāpi mukhasya jajñe veṣaśriyā nu priyavārtayā nu ||7259-1 ullāso'dharapallavasya tanute paryāptamasyāḥ smite vinyāso nayanāñcalasya gamayatyutsāhavatsāhasaṃ |  7259-2 ratyāgārapathāmukhīnagamakaṃ vaijātyakakṣāvadhiḥ paryaṅke padaropaṇaṃ punaraparyantā viparyastatā ||7260-1 ullāso virutena maṅgalabaligrāsena viśvāsanaṃ saṃcāreṇa kṛto vilocanayuge bāṣpodgamāvagrahaḥ |  7260-2 yāto'staṃ ravireṣa saṃprati puraḥ svastyastu te gamyatāṃ ete tvāmanuyāntu saṃprati mama prāṇāḥ priyānveṣiṇaḥ ||7261-1 ullāsya kālakaravālamahāmbuvāhaṃ devena yena jaraṭhorjitagarjitena |  7261-2 nirvāpitaḥ sakala eva raṇe ripūṇāṃ dhārā jalaistrijagati jvalitaḥ pratāpaḥ||7262-1 ullāsyatāṃ spṛṣṭanalāṅgamaṅgaṃ tāsāṃ nalacchāyapibāpi dṛṣṭiḥ |  7262-2 aśmaiva ratyāstadanarti patyā chede'pyabodhaṃ yadaharṣi l_oṃa ||7263-1 ullekhaṃ nijamīkṣate bhaṇitiṣu prauḍhiṃ parāṃ śikṣate saṃdhatte padasaṃpadaḥ paricayaṃ dhatte dhvaneradhvani |  7263-2 vaicitryaṃ vitanoti vācakavidhau vācaspaterantike deva tvadguṇavarṇanāya kurute kiṃ kiṃ na vāgdevatā ||7264-1 uvāca dhātryā prathamoditaṃ vaco yayau tadīyāmavalambya cāṅguliṃ |  7264-2 abhūcca namraḥ praṇipātaśikṣayā piturmudaṃ tena tatāna so'rbhakaḥ ||7265-1 uśanā veda yacchāstraṃ yacca veda bṛhaspatiḥ |  7265-2 strībuddhyā na viśiṣyete tāḥ sma rakṣyāḥ kathaṃ naraiḥ ||7266-1 uṣaḥkālaśca gargaśca śakunaṃ ca bṛhaspatiḥ |  7266-2 aṅgirāśca manotsāho vipravākyaṃ janārdanaḥ ||7267-1 uṣaḥ śaśaṃsa gārgyastu śakunaṃ tu bṛhaspatiḥ |  7267-2 manojayaṃ tu māṇḍavyo vipravākyaṃ janārdanaḥ ||7268-1 uṣasi gurusamakṣaṃ lajjamānā mṛgākṣī ratirutamanukartuṃ rājakīre pravṛtte |  7268-2 tirayati śiśulīlānartanacchadmatāla- pracalavalayamālāsphālakolāhalena ||7269-1 uṣasi gurusamīpe vāsasā sāvadhānā priyalikhitanakhāṅkaṃ gopayantī samantāt |  7269-2 kimidamiti sakhībhiḥ sādaraṃ pṛcchyamānā hari hari hariṇākṣī hrīsamudre nimagnā ||7270-1 uṣasi nibiḍayantyāḥ kuṇḍalaṃ keliparyā- vilavigalitamantaḥ karṇapāli priyāyāḥ |  7270-2 sarasahasitatiryagbhaṅgurāpāṅgarītiḥ sukṛtibhiravalīḍhā locanābhyāṃ mukhaśrīḥ ||7271-1 uṣasi parivartayantyā muktādāmopavītatāṃ nītaṃ |  7271-2 puruṣāyitavaidagdhyaṃ vrīḍāvati kairna kalitaṃ te ||7272-1 uṣasi bhramarayuvānaḥ svapne dṛṣṭvā sarojasāmrājyaṃ |  7272-2 gatakalpakundatalpāḥ sarasīsalilāni jighranti ||7273-1 uṣasi malayavāsī jālamārgapraviṣṭo vikacakamalareṇuṃ vyākiranmohacūrṇaṃ|  7273-2 sapadi śamitadīpo vāyucoro vadhūnāṃ harati suratakhedasvedamuktāphalāni ||7274-1 uṣasyeva bhrāntaṃ hatajaṭharahetostata itaḥ svayaṃ ca svaṃ bibhradvicarati kuṭumbaṃ diśi diśi |  7274-2 batāsmābhiḥ kākairiva kavalamātraikamuditair na cāyurdurgatyoravadhiriha labdhaḥ kathamapi ||7275-1 uṣāpatimukhāmbhoje narīnarti sarasvatī |  7275-2 ṛturājakavereva gāyantī guṇagauravaṃ ||7276-1 uṣṭrāṇāṃ ca vivāheṣu gītaṃ gāyanti gardabhāḥ |  7276-2 parasparaṃ praśaṃsanti aho rūpamaho aho dhvaniḥ ||7277-1 uṣṇaṃ jalaṃ kṣipettatra mātrā nāstīha kasyacit |  7277-2 pakṣaikaṃ sthāpite bhāṇḍe koṣṇasthāne manīṣiṇā |  7277-3 kuṇapastu bhavedeva tarūṇāṃ puṣṭikārakaḥ ||7278-1 uṣṇakāle jalaṃ dadyācśītakāle hutāśanaṃ |  7278-2 prāvṛṭkāle gṛhaṃ deyaṃ sarvakāle ca bhojanaṃ ||7279-1 uṣṇamannaṃ ghṛtaṃ madyaṃ taruṇī kṣīrabhojanaṃ |  7279-2 vāpīkapavaṭacchāyā ṣaḍkaṃ tatbalavardhanaṃ ||7280-1 uṣṇāluḥ śiśire niṣīdati tarormūlālavāle śikhī nirbhidyopari karṇikāramukulānyālīyate ṣaṭpadaḥ |  7280-2 taptaṃ vāri vihāya tīranalinīṃ kāraṇḍavaḥ sevate krīḍāveśmani caiṣa pañjaraśukaḥ klānto jalaṃ yācate ||7281-1 uṣṇālu kvacidarkadhāmani manāṅnidrālu śītānile hālānāṃ gṛhayālu cumbadasakṛllajjālu jāyāmukhaṃ |  7281-2 nityaṃ niṣpatayālu tiryagavanīśayyāśayālu kṣaṇaṃ gītebhyaḥ spṛhayālu dhāma dhavalaṃ dīne dayālu śraye ||7282-1 uṣṇīṣavānyathā vastraistribhirbhavati saṃvṛtaḥ |  7282-2 saṃvṛto'yaṃ tathā dehī sattvarājasatāmasaiḥ ||7283-1 uṣmāyamāṇastanamaṇḍalībhir vārāṅganābhiḥ sphuṭavibhramābhiḥ |  7283-2 āliṅgitā rātriṣu śaiśirīṣu te śerate yaiḥ praṇato śaśāṅkaḥ ||7284-1 ūcivānucitamakṣaramenaṃ pāśapāṇirapi pāṇimudasya |  7284-2 kīrtireva bhavatāṃ priyadārā dānanīrajharamauktikahārā ||7284ā-1 ūḍhā khaḍgalatā śyāmā tvayā mātaṅgadārikā |  7284ā-2 ata eva bhavānmanye dūraṃ parihṛtaḥ paraiḥ ||7285-1 ūḍhāpi dyutaraṅgiṇi trijagatīvandyena tenāpyaho maulau bālakuraṅgaketanakalālīlāvataṃsāṅkite |  7285-2 tārakṣārakaraṃ karālamakaraṃ saśvabhramabhraṃkaṣaṃ mugdhe jāḍyanidhiṃ mudhā jalanidhiṃ yātāsi citrāḥ striyaḥ ||7286-1 ūḍhāmunātivāhaya pṛṣṭhe lagnāpi kālamacalāpi |  7286-2 sarvaṃsahe kaṭhora- tvacaḥ kimaṅkena kamaṭhasya ||7287-1 ūḍhā yena mahādhurāḥ suviṣame mārge sadaikākinā soḍho yena kadācideva na nije goṣṭhe'nyaśauṇḍadhvaniḥ |  7287-2 āsīdyastu gavāṃ gaṇasya tilakastasyaida saṃpratyaho dhikkaṣṭaṃ dhavalasya jātajaraso goḥ paṇyamudghoṣyate ||7288-1 ūdhaśchindyāddhi yo dhenvāḥ kṣīrārthī na labhetpayaḥ |  7288-2 evaṃ rāṣṭramayogena pīḍitaṃ na vivardhate ||7289-1 ūnaṣoḍaśavarṣāyāṃ aprāptaḥ pañcaviṃśatiṃ |  7289-2 yadyādhatte pumāngarbhaḥ kukṣisthaḥ sa vipadyate ||7290-1 ūne dadyādgurūneva yāvatsarvalaghurbhavet |  7290-2 prastāro'yaṃ samākhyātaśchandovicitivedibhiḥ ||7291-1 ūnenāpi hi tucchena vairiṇāpi kathaṃcana |  7291-2 maitrī buddhimatā kāryā āpadyapi nivartate ||7292-1 ūrīkartuṃ tuhinakiraṇaprītidhārāmudārāṃ dūrīkartuṃ dinakarakarakleśabādhāmagādhāṃ |  7292-2 yasyāḥ puṇye payasi viśati snātukāmā triyāmāprāyastasyāstimiratatibhiḥ śyāmalaṃ nīramasyāḥ ||7293-1 ūruḥ kuraṅgadṛśaścañcalacelāñcalo bhāti |  7293-2 sapatākaḥ kanakamayo vijayastambhaḥ smarasyeva ||7294-1 ūrudvandvamaninditaṃ prathayatā śroṇīṃ samātanvatā r_oṃālīṃ sṛjatā samāgamayatā nābhiṃ gabhīraśriyā |  7294-2 madhyaṃ kṣāmayatā stanau ghanayatā kāntyā mukhaṃ limpatā tanvaṅgyā navayauvanena kimapi pratyaṅgamunmīlitaṃ ||7295-1 ūrudvayaṃ kadalakandalayoḥ savaṃśaṃ śroṇiḥ śilāphalakasodarasanniveśā |  7295-2 vakṣaḥ stanadvitayatāḍitakumbhaśobhaṃ sabrahmacāri śaśinaśca mukhaṃ mṛgākṣyāḥ ||7296-1 ūrudvayaṃ mṛgadṛśaḥ kadalasya kāṇḍau madhyaṃ ca vediratulaṃ stanayugmamasyāḥ |  7296-2 lāvaṇyavāriparipūritaśātakumbha- kumbhau manojanṛpaterabhiṣecanāya ||7297-1 ūruprakāṇḍadvitayena tanvyāḥ karaḥ parājīyata vāraṇīyaḥ |  7297-2 yuktaṃ hriyā kuṇḍalanacchalena gopāyati svaṃ mukhapuṣkaraṃ saḥ ||7298-1 ūrumūlagatanetrayugasya preyaso rabhasavellitakeśī |  7298-2 cumbati sma ratikelividagdhā hāvahāri vadanaṃ dayitasya ||7299-1 ūrumūlacapalekṣaṇamaghnan yairvataṃsakumumaiḥ priyametāḥ |  7299-2 cakrire sapadi tāni yathārthaṃ manmathasya kusumāyudhanāma ||7300-1 ūrū rambhā dṛgapi kamalaṃ śevalaṃ keśapāśo vaktraṃ candro lapitamamṛtaṃ madhyadeśo mṛṇālaṃ |  7300-2 nābhiḥ kūpo valirapi saritpallavaḥ kiṃ ca pāṇir yasyāḥ sā cedurasi na kathaṃ hanta tāpasya śāntiḥ ||7301-1 ūrū rambhe bāhū late vidhātrā kucau punaḥ kamale |  7301-2 yauvanamupavanamasyāṃ madanavilāsāya kiṃ racitaṃ ||7302-1 ūrau śirastava niveśya dayāvitīrṇa- saṃyānapallavasamīravinītakhedaṃ |  7302-2 atraiva janmani vibhoḥ paramopadeśaṃ ākarṇayeyamapi kiṃ maṇikarṇikāyāṃ ||7303-1 ūrjitaṃ sajjanaṃ dṛṣṭvā dveṣṭi nīcaḥ punaḥ punaḥ |  7303-2 kavalīkurute svasthaṃ vidhuṃ divi vidhuṃtudaḥ ||7304-1 ūrṇāṃ naiva dadāti naiva viṣayo vāhasya dohasya vā tṛptirnāsti mahodarasya bahubhirghāsaiḥ palāśairapi |  7304-2 hā kaṣṭaṃ kathamasya pṛṣṭhaśikhare goṇī samāropyate ko gṛhṇāti kapardakairalamiti grāmyairgajo hasyate ||7305-1 ūrdhvaṃ gacchanti yaṃ tyaktvā yaṃ gṛhītvā patantyadhaḥ |  7305-2 tasya gauravamarthasya tāvataivānumīyatāṃ ||7306-1 ūrdhvaṃ gacchanti sattvasthā madhye tiṣṭhanti rājasāḥ |  7306-2 jaghanyaguṇavṛttasthā adho gacchanti tāmasāḥ ||7307-1 ūrdhvaṃ na kṣīravicchedātpayo dhenoravāpyate |  7307-2 evaṃ rāṣṭrādayogena pīḍitānnāpyate baliḥ ||7308-1 ūrdhvaṃ nīradavṛndamaindavamidaṃ bimbaṃ tvadho nirmitaṃ vy_oṃnaḥ palvalacitritasya nihitau śailāvuparyunnatau |  7308-2 kiṃ cādhaḥ pulinoccayasya kadalīkāṇḍāvavāropitau tanmanye caturasya puṣpadhanuṣaḥ sargo'yamanyādṛśaḥ ||7309-1 ūrdhvaṃ prāṇā hyutkrāmanti yūnaḥ sthavira āyati |  7309-2 pratyutthānābhivādābhyāṃ punastānpratipadyate ||7310-1 ūrdhvaṃ yāti cāpamuṣṭirguṇamuṣṭiradho bhavet |  7310-2 sa mukto mārgaṇo lakṣyāddūraṃ yāti na saṃśayaḥ ||7311-1 ūrdhvaṃvrīhitrayaṃ mānaṃ aṅgulasya nigadyate |  7311-2 hasto'pi hi samākhyātaścaturviśadbhiraṅgulaiḥ ||7312-1 ūrdhvaṃ śvasaṃstataḥ prāṇo yātyalabdhasthitistanoḥ |  7312-2 taṃ yāntamanuyātyeva jīvaḥ kālapraṇoditaḥ ||7313-1 ūrdhvagaṃ kapilābhāsaṃ aṅgaṃ yasminpratīyate |  7313-2 nakulāṅgaṃ tu taṃ vidyātsparśastasyāhināśanaḥ ||7314-1 ūrdhvabāhurvir_oṃyeṣa na ca kaścicśrṇoti me |  7314-2 dharmādarthaśca kāmaśca sa kimarthaṃ na sevyate ||7315-1 ūrdhvavedhī bhavejjyeṣṭho nābhivedī ca madhyamaḥ |  7315-2 yaḥ pādavedhī lakṣyasya sa kaniṣṭho mato mayā ||7316-1 ūrdhvaśaktinipātena adhaḥśakternikuñcanāt |  7316-2 madhyaśaktiprabodhena jāyate paramaṃ sukhaṃ ||7317-1 ūrdhvānanā bhāskarasaṃmukhīnāḥ śvāno ruvanto mahate bhayāya |  7317-2 evaṃ hi saṃdhyāsamaye'nyadā tu nirvāsakāḥ syurnagarasya tasya ||7318-1 ūrdhvārohe ya ālambaheturbhūbhṛcchinatti taṃ |  7318-2 kuṭhārikastaruskandhaṃ ivādhogamanonmukhaḥ ||7319-1 ūrdhvārdhe lakṣaṇaṃ yasya nādho'rdhe lakṣaṇaṃ bhavet |  7319-2 taṃ khaḍgaṃ madhyamaṃ prāhuḥ pravīṇamatayo budhāḥ ||7320-1 ūrdhvīkṛtagrīvamaho mudhaiva kiṃ yācase cātakapota meghaṃ |  7320-2 atyūrjitaṃ garjitamātramasminn ambhodhare bindulavastu dūraṃ ||7321-1 ūrdhvīkṛtāsyā ravidattadṛṣṭayaḥ sametya sarve suravidviṣaḥ puraḥ |  7321-2 śvānaḥ svareṇa śravaṇāntaśātinā mitho rudantaḥ karuṇena niryayuḥ ||7322-1 ūṣaraṃ karmasasyānāṃ kṣetraṃ vārāṇasī purī |  7322-2 yatra saṃlabhyate mokṣaḥ samaṃ caṇḍālapaṇḍitaiḥ ||7323-1 ūṣareṣu ca kṣetreṣu yathā bījaṃ hi niṣphalaṃ |  7323-2 upakāro'pi nīcānāṃ kṛto bhavati tādṛśaḥ ||7324-1 ūṣareṣu vivareṣu cāmbhasāṃ vīcayo'pi bhavatā vinirmitāḥ |  7324-2 kṣetrasīmni nihitāstu bindavo vārivāha bhavato navo nayaḥ ||7325-1 ūṣare sariti śālmalīvane dāvapāvakacite'pi candane |  7325-2 tulyamarpayati vāri vāride kīrtirastu guṇagauravairgataṃ ||7326-1 ūṣmavyapetā rahitāśca vṛddhyā saṃyogahīnā laghavo'pi cāntaḥ |  7326-2 ślokasya varṇā iva vidviṣaste pādāntamāgamya gurūbhavanti ||7327-1 ūṣmā yasyāṃ dhātryāṃ dhūmo vā tatra vāri narayugale |  7327-2 nirdeṣṭavyā ca śirā mahatā vāripravāheṇa ||7328-1 ūṣmā hi vittajo vṛddhiṃ tejo nayati dehināṃ |  7328-2 kiṃ punastasya saṃbhogastyāgadharmasamanvitaḥ ||7329-1 ṛkṣasya kroḍasaṃdhiprahitamukhatayā maṇḍalībhūtamūrter ārātsuptasya vīra tvadarivarapuradvāri nīhārakāle |  7329-2 prātarnidrāvinodakramajanitasukhonmīlitaṃ cakṣurekaṃ vyādhāḥ pālālabhasmasthitadahanakaṇākāramālokayanti ||7330-1 ṛkṣāṇāṃ bhūridhāmnāṃ śritamadhipatinā prasphuradbhīmatāraṃ sphāraṃ netrānalena prasabhaniyamitoccāpamīnadhvajena |  7330-2 rāmāyattaṃ purāreḥ kumudaśuci lasannīlasugrīvamaṅgaṃ plāvaṅgaṃ sainyamanyaddaśavadanaśiracchedahetu śriyai vaḥ ||7331-1 ṛkṣairvṛto haripade nivasansamīra- saṃtānaśaityajanakaḥ kumudapramodī |  7331-2 praśasyeta vakrataiva tayoḥ punaḥ ||7334-1 ṛjutvaṃ ca parityajya kalāṃ darśayato'rcanā |  7334-2 dvijarājo'nṛjutvena maheśenāpi mahyate ||7335-1 ṛjutvaṃ tyāgitā śauryaṃ sāmānyaṃ sukhaduḥkhayoḥ |  7335-2 dākṣiṇyaṃ cānuriktaśca satyatā ca suhṛdguṇāḥ ||7336-1 ṛjutvamaunaśrutipāragāmitā yadīyametatparameva hiṃsituṃ |  7336-2 atīva viśvāsavidhāyi ceṣṭitaṃ bahurmahānasya sa dāmbhikaḥ śaraḥ ||7337-1 ṛjudṛśaḥ kathayanti purāvido madhubhidaṃ kila rāhuśiraśchidaṃ |  7337-2 virahimūrdhabhidaṃ nigadanti na kva nu śaśī yadi tajjaṭharānalaḥ ||7338-1 ṛjunayananipātaḥ kāmatantrābhighātas tanurapi taralākṣyāḥ kasya na syātkaṭākṣaḥ |  7338-2 iti namitamukhenduṃ paśyati prāṇanāthaṃ janasadasi vidagdhā pakṣmaṇāmantareṇa ||7339-1 ṛjunā nidhehi caraṇau parihara sakhi nikhilanāgarācāraṃ |  7339-2 iha ḍākinīti pallī- patiḥ kaṭākṣe'pi daṇḍayati ||7340-1 ṛju paśyati yaḥ sarvaṃ cakṣuṣānupibanniva |  7340-2 āsīnamapi tūṣṇīkaṃ anurajyanti taṃ prajāḥ ||7341-1 ṛjureṣa pakṣavāniti kāṇḍe parivartamānā kiṃcitkaroti bhujagasya viceṣṭitāni ||7344-1 ṛjvī dṛṣṭiranulbaṇaṃ vihasitaṃ mandaṃ parispanditaṃ dveṣo narmaṇi dūratīrthagamane yatno ratirliṅgiṣu |  7344-2 yasyāstyaktasukhaspṛhaṃ ||7346-1 ṛṇaṃ kṛtaṃ tvadattaṃ cedbādhate'tra paratra ca |  7346-2 na naśyedduṣkṛtaṃ tadvadbhuktiṃ vā niṣkṛtiṃ vinā ||7347-1 ṛṇaṃ mitrānna kartavyaṃ na deyaṃ cāpi mitrake |  7347-2 prīticchedakarī ||7355-1 ṛṇapāpasamuddhārādṛṇoddhāro varaḥ smṛtaḥ |  7355-2 paraloke dahetpāpaṃ ṛṇāgniriha tatra ca ||7356-1 ṛṇapradātā vaidyastu śrotriyaḥ sajalā nadī |  7356-2 rājā yatra na vidyante na 7361-2 punaḥ punarvivardheta svalpo'pyanivāritaḥ ||7362-1 ṛṇasaṃbandhinaḥ sarve putradāraṃ paśustathā |  7362-2 ṛṇakṣaye kṣayaṃ yānti kā tatra paridevanā ||7363-1 ṛṇāni trīṇyapākṛtya mano mokṣe ṛṣirayamatithiścedviṣṭaraḥ pādyamarghyaṃ tadanu ca madhuparkaḥ kalpyatāṃ śrotriyāya |  7384-2 atha tu ripurakasmāddveṣṭi naḥ putrabhāṇḍaṃ tadiha nayavihīne kārmukasyādhikāraḥ ||7385-1 ṛṣisenā vinā na saṃbhramanti ||7387-1 ṛṣīṇāṃ ca nadīnāṃ ca kulānāṃ ca mahātmanāṃ |  7387-2 prabhavo nādhigantavyaḥ strīṇāṃ duścaritasya ca ||7388-1 ṛṣīṇāṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ idaṃ bharatasattama |  7388-2 cakṣurviveko hi dvitīyaṃ satsamāgamaḥ |  7391-2 tau na sto yasya sa kṣipraṃ mohakūpe pateddhruvaṃ ||7392-1 ekaṃ citramatīva dṛṣṭamiha yannālokitaṃ na śrutaṃ kiṃ kasmai kathayāmi kasya manasi syādvā antarvahati varākī sā tvāṃ nāseva niḥśvāsaṃ ||7394-1 ekaṃ dantacchadasya sphurati japavaśādardhamanyatprakopādekaḥ pāṇiḥ praṇantuṃ śirasi kṛtapadaḥ kṣeptumanyastameva |  7394-2 ekaṃ dhyānānnimīlatyaparamaviṣahaṃ vīkṣituṃ cakṣuritthaṃ tulyānicchāpi vāmā tanuravatu sa vo yasya saṃdhyāvasāne ||7395-1 ekaṃ dṛṣṭvā śataṃ dṛṣṭvā dṛṣṭvā pañcaśatānyapi |  7395-2 atilobho na kartavyaścakraṃ bhramati mastake ||7395ā-1 ekaṃ dvijaṃ ca spṛhaṇīyavācaṃ mattadvirephaṃ ca madhuḥ pupoṣa |  7395ā-2 sato guṇānapyasato'pi doṣān jātyā vihīno na vivektumīṣṭe ||7396-1 ekaṃ dhāma śamīṣu līnamaparaṃ sūryopalajyotiṣāṃ vyājādadriṣu gūḍhamanyadudadhau saṃguptamaurvāyate |  7396-2 tvattejastapanāṃśumāṃsalasamuttāpena durgaṃ bhayādvārkṣaṃ pārvatamaudakaṃ yadi yayustejāṃsi kiṃ pārthivāḥ ||7397-1 ekaṃ dhyānanimīlanānmukulitaprāyaṃ dvitīyaṃ punaḥ pārvatyā vadanāmbujastanabhare śṛṅgārabhāvālasaṃ |  7397-2 anyaddūravikṛṣṭacāpamadanakrodhānaloddīpitaṃ śaṃbhorbhinnarasaṃ samādhisamaye netratrayaṃ pātu vaḥ ||7398-1 ekaṃ nāma jaḍātmakasya muṣitaṃ lāvaṇyamindostayānetrābhyāmasitotpalasya ca ruciḥ prāyeṇa tanno mṛṣā |  7398-2 no jānāti hṛtāmasau padagatiṃ matto varākaḥ karī tanvaṅgyā vidato'pi yanmama hṛtaṃ cetastadatyadbhutaṃ ||7399-1 ekaṃ bhūmipatiḥ karoti sacivaṃ rājye pramāṇaṃ yadā taṃ mohācśrayate madaḥ sa ca madālasyena nirvidyate |  7399-2 nirviṇṇasya padaṃ karoti hṛdaye tasya svatantraspṛhāsvātantryaspṛhayā tataḥ sa nṛpateḥ prāṇānabhidruhyati ||7400-1 ekaṃ mahiṣaśiraḥsthitaṃ aparaṃ sānandasuragaṇapraṇataṃ |  7400-2 giriduhituḥ padayugalaṃ śoṇitamaṇirāgarañjitaṃ jayati ||7401-1 ekaṃ mitraṃ bhajate māsenenduḥ svayaṃ kṣayaṃ gacchan |  7401-2 mitraśatāni bhajaṃstvaṃ pratikṣaṇaṃ vṛddhimupayāsi ||7402-1 ekaṃ mitraṃ bhūpatirvā yatirvā ekā bhāryā sundarī vā darī vā |  7402-2 ekaṃ śāstraṃ vedamadhyātmakaṃ vā eko devaḥ keśavo vā jino vā ||7403-1 ekaṃ liṅgaṃ pramadā- hṛdayaṃ vidadhāti jarjaraṃ sahasā |  7403-2 teṣāṃ ṣaṭkaṃ yeṣāṃ antargūḍhaṃ na te kathaṃ paśavaḥ ||7404-1 ekaṃ vadati mano mama yāmi na yāmīti hṛdayamaparaṃ me |  7404-2 hṛdayadvayamucitaṃ tava sundari hṛtakāntacittāyāḥ ||7405-1 ekaṃ vastu dvidhā kartuṃ bahavaḥ santi dhanvinaḥ |  7405-2 dhanvī sa māra evaiko dvayoraikyaṃ karoti yaḥ ||7406-1 ekaṃ vastu yadasti viśvajanatānandapramodātmakaṃ satyaṃ tattvamasīti vākyamakhilaṃ tvayyeva viśrāmyati |  7406-2 tvāmākarṇya na kiṃcidanyadavanīśṛṅgāra bho manyate tvayyāpte janakādikīrtijanake kiṃ jñānamīmāṃsayā ||7407-1 ekaṃ vā kupitapriyāpraṇayinīṃ kṛtvā manonirvṛtiṃ tiṣṭhāmo nijacārupīvarakucakrīḍārasāsvādane |  7407-2 anyadvā surasindhusaikatataṭīdarbhāṣṭakasrastara- sthāne brahmapadaṃ samāhitadhiyo dhyāyanta evāsmahe ||7408-1 ekaṃ viṣaraso hanti śastreṇaikaśca vadhyate |  7408-2 sarāṣṭraṃ saprajaṃ hanti rājānaṃ mantravisravaḥ ||7409-1 ekaṃ vai sevate nityaṃ anyaṃ cetasi rocate |  7409-2 puruṣāṇāmalābhena nārī caiva pativratā ||7410-1 ekaṃ saṃdigdhayostāvadbhāvi tatreṣṭajanmani |  7410-2 hetumāhuḥ svamantrādīnasaṅgānanyathā viṭāḥ ||7411-1 ekaṃ sāgaratīranīranikarasphārāñjalikṣālitaiḥ puṣpairacyutapūjanaṃ nijakaravyāpārasaṃpāditaiḥ |  7411-2 no cenmañjulamālatīdalalasatkhaṭvārcite mandirekāntātuṅganitambabimbasuratakrīḍārasaiḥ sthīyate ||7412-1 ekaṃ sute mṛgāriṇī bahūnsūte vṛkī sutān |  7412-2 uttāraḥ pralayaṃ yānti nādyamānāḥ kathaṃcana ||7413-1 ekaṃ hanyānna vā hanyādiṣuḥ kṣipto dhanuṣmatā |  7413-2 prājñena tu matiḥ kṣiptā hanyādgarbhagatānapi ||7414-1 ekaṃ hanyānna vā hanyādiṣurmukto dhanuṣmatā |  7414-2 buddhirbuddhimatotsṛṣṭā hanyādrāṣṭraṃ sarājakaṃ ||7415-1 ekaṃ hanyānna vā hanyādiṣurmukto dhanuṣmatā |  7415-2 sarāṣṭraṃ saprajaṃ hanti rājānaṃ mantriniścayaḥ ||7416-1 ekaṃ hi cakṣuramalaṃ sahajo viveko vidvadbhireva saha saṃvasatirdvitīyaṃ |  7416-2 etaddvayaṃ bhuvi na yasya sa tattvato'ndhas tasyāpamārgacalane vada ko'parādhaḥ ||7417-1 ekaḥ karṇamahīpatiḥ pratidinaṃ lakṣādhikā yācakāḥ kasmai kiṃ vitariṣyatīti manasā cintāṃ vṛthā mā kṛthāḥ |  7417-2 āste kiṃ pratiyācakaṃ surataruḥ pratyambujaṃ kiṃ raviścandraḥ kiṃ pratikairavaṃ pratilatāgulmaṃ kimambhodharaḥ ||7418-1 ekaḥ kāpuruṣo dīrṇo dārayenmahatīṃ camūṃ |  7418-2 taṃ dīrṇamanu dīryante yodhāḥ śūratamā api ||7419-1 ekaḥ ko'pi mahīdharo laghutaro dorbhyāṃ dhṛto līlayā tena tvaṃ divi bhūtale ca vidito govarddhanoddhārakaḥ |  7419-2 tvāṃ trailokyavahaṃ vahāmi kucayoragre sadā puṣpavathtatkiṃ keśava jalpitena bahunā puṇyairyaśo labhyate ||7420-1 ekaḥ kṣamāvataṃ doṣo dvitīyo nopalabhyate |  7420-2 yadenaṃ kṣamayā yuktaṃ aśaktaṃ manyate janaḥ ||7421-1 so'sya doṣo na mantavyaḥ kṣamā hi paramaṃ balaṃ |  7421-2 kṣamā guṇo hyaśaktānāṃ śaktānāṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ kṣamā ||7422-1 ekaḥ khalo'pi yadi nāma bhavetsabhāyāṃ vyarthīkaroti viduṣāmakhilaṃ prayāsaṃ|  7422-2 ekāpi pūrṇamudaraṃ madhuraiḥ padārthair āloḍya recayati hanta na makṣikā kiṃ ||7423-1 ekaḥ pañcatvamāsādya jāyate punaraṣṭadhā |  7423-2 aho vāṇijyasaṃpattiḥ kāśīpuranivāsināṃ ||7424-1 ekaḥ pathā na gantavyaṃ na suptiṃ bāhyamandire |  7424-2 janavākyaṃ na kartavyaṃ strīṇāmālocanaṃ vinā ||7425-1 ekaḥ pāpāni kurute phalaṃ bhuṅkte mahājanaḥ |  7425-2 bhoktāro vipramucyante kartā doṣeṇa lipyate ||7426-1 ekaḥ pālayate lokaṃ ekaḥ pālayate kulaṃ |  7426-2 majjatyeko hi niraya ekaḥ svarge mahīyate ||7427-1 ekaḥ putro varaṃ vidvānbahubhirnirguṇaistu kiṃ |  7427-2 ekastārayate vaṃśaṃ anye saṃtāpakārakāḥ ||7428-1 ekaḥ prajāyate jantureka eva pralīyate |  7428-2 eko'nubhuṅkte sukṛtaṃ eka eva ca duṣkṛtaṃ ||7429-1 ekaḥ prayātyuparamaṃ draviṇaṃ tadīyaṃ hṛtvāparaḥ prasabhamudvahati pramodaṃ|  7429-2 no vetti tatsvanidhane parakośagāmi dhigvāsanāmasamamohakṛtāndhakārāṃ ||7430-1 ekaḥ śataṃ yodhayati prākārastho dhanurdharaḥ |  7430-2 śataṃ daśasahasrāṇi tasmāddurgaṃ vidhīyate ||7431-1 ekaḥ śatrurna dvitīyo'sti śatrur ajñānatulyaḥ puruṣasya rājan |  7431-2 yenāvṛtaḥ kurute saṃprayukto ghorāṇi karmāṇi sudāruṇāni ||7432-1 ekaḥ saṃgrāmariṅgatturagakhurarajorājibhirnaṣṭadṛṣṭir digyātrājaitramattadviradabharanamadbhūmibhagnastathānyaḥ |  7432-2 vīrāḥ ke nāma tasmāttrijagati na yayuḥ kṣīṇatāṃ kāṇakubja-nyāyādetena muktāvabhayamabhajatāṃ vāsavo vāsukiśca ||7433-1 ekaḥ saṃpannamaśnāti vaste vāsaśca śobhanaṃ |  7433-2 yo'saṃvibhajya bhṛtyebhyaḥ ko nṛśaṃsatarastataḥ ||7434-1 ekaḥ saṃprati pākaśāsanapurīpīyūṣasattrī puraḥ pārakyaṃ tamasāmasau kumudinīcaitanyacintāmaṇiḥ |  7434-2 mānoccāṭanakārmaṇaṃ mṛgadṛśāṃ devo nabho'mbhonidhau paśyodañcati pañcabāṇavaṇijo yātrāvahitraṃ śaśī ||7435-1 ekaḥ sa eva jīvati svahṛdayaśūnyo'pi sahṛdayo rāhuḥ |  7435-2 yaḥ sakalalaghimakāraṇaṃ udaraṃ na bibharti duṣpūraṃ ||7436-1 ekaḥ sa eva tejasvī saihikeyaḥ suradviṣāṃ |  7436-2 śir_oṃātrāvaśeṣeṇa jīyante yena śatravaḥ ||7437-1 ekaḥ sa eva paripālayatājjaganti gaurīgirīśacaritānukṛtiṃ dadhānaḥ |  7437-2 ābhāti yo daśanaśūnyamukhaikadeśa- dehārdhahāritavadhūka ivaikadantaḥ ||7438-1 ekaḥ sakalajanānāṃ hṛdayeṣu kṛtāspado madaḥ śatruḥ |  7438-2 yenāviṣṭaśarīro na śṛṇoti na paśyati stabdhaḥ ||7439-1 ekaḥ sakhā priyo bhūya upakārī guṇānvitaḥ |  7439-2 hantavyaḥ strīnimittena kaṣṭamāpatitaṃ mama ||7440-1 ekaḥ sa vyasanī pumānacaramairniḥśvāsavātaiḥ samaṃ hā me sā dayiteti yasya vadataḥ prāṇāḥ samaṃ nirgatāḥ |  7440-2 anye tu vyasanaṃ kṣipanti paśavaḥ kāntāviyogodbhavaiścintāglāniviṣādadainyajanitairbāṣpairanāhāriṇaḥ ||7441-1 ekaḥ sudhāṃśurna kathaṃcana syāthtṛptikṣamastvannayanadvayasya |  7441-2 tvallocanāsecanakastadastu nīcamupasarpati ||7447-1 eka eva careddharmaṃ nāsti dharme sahāyatā |  7447-2 kevalaṃ vidhimāsādya sahāyaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati ||7448-1 eka eva dame doṣo dvitīyo nopapadyate |  7448-2 yadenaṃ kṣamayā ||7456-1 eka eva hitārthāya tejasvī pārthivo bhuvaḥ |  7456-2 yugānta iva bhāsvanto bahavo'tra vipattaye ||7457-1 eka eva hi bhūtātmā bhūte bhūte vyavasthitaḥ |  7457-2 ekadhā bahudhā caiva dṛśyate jalacandravat ||7458-1 eka eva hi vandhyāyāḥ śoko bhavati mānasaḥ |  7458-2 aprajāsmīti saṃtāpo na hyanyaḥ putra vidyate ||7459-1 eka evopahārastu saṃdhiretanmataṃ hi naḥ |  7459-2 upahārasya bhedāstu sarve'nye maitravarjitāḥ ||7460-1 ekakāryaniyoge'pi nānayostulyaśīlatā |  7460-2 vivāhe ca citāyāṃ ca yathā hutabhujordvayoḥ ||7461-1 ekakṣitibhṛdutpannāḥ sacchidrāḥ 7483-2 ityākulānāṃ kulakāminīnāṃ gatāgataireva gatā triyāmā ||7484-1 ekatra nāsya ratirityavadhūyamānaḥ kopādiva śvasanakampavighūrṇitāyāḥ |  7484-2 raktacchadaṃ madhusugandhi saroruhiṇyā 7493-2 ālāpo'pi na miśritaḥ parijanaṃ vyāpārayantyāntike kāntaṃ pratyupacārataścaturayā kopaḥ kṛtārthīkṛtaḥ ||7494-1 ekatrāsanasaṅgate priyatame paścādupetyādarādekasyā nayane pidhāya mahataḥ ||7501-1 ekadvikaraṇe hetū mahāpātakapañcake |  7501-2 na tṛṇe manyate kopakāmau yaḥ pañca kārayan ||7502-1 ekadvitrikalākrameṇa śaśinaṃ gṛhṇanvimuñcannayaṃ yaccaṇḍadyutirātanoti bhagavānadyāpi cāndrāyaṇaṃ |  7502-2 devaitadbhavadīyabhāsvarabhujastambhapratāpānala- spardhāyai kramabhuktalāñchanapaśornaitatpunaḥ setsyati ||7503-1 ekadviprabhṛtikrameṇa gaṇanāmeṣāmivāstaṃ yatāṃ kurvāṇā samakocayaddaśaśatānyambhojasaṃvartikāḥ |  7503-2 bhūyo'pi kramaśaḥ prasārayati tāḥ saṃpratyamūnudyataḥ saṃkhyātuṃ sakutūhaleva nalinī bhānoḥ sahasraṃ karān ||7504-1 ekadveṣu rasālaśākhiṣu manāgunmīlitaṃ kuḍmalaiḥ karṇākarṇikayā mithaḥ kathamamī ghūrṇanti viśve'dhvagāḥ |  7504-2 dvitraiḥ kvāpi kila śrutāśrutamapi spaṣṭānyapuṣṭārutaṃ viṣvaṅmūrchati duḥsaho virahiṇīgeheṣu hāhāravaḥ ||7505-1 ekadvaiḥ kimabhāvi sūribhiratha dvitrāṇi mitrāṇi kiṃ vyāpannāni gatāśca kiṃ tricaturā ghorā mahāvyādhayaḥ |  7505-2 saptāṣṭairalamiṣṭametadapi naścetaḥ kṣaṇānpañcaṣān svātmanyeva ramasva tejasi gate kāle'thavā sarvataḥ ||7506-1 ekadvairdivasairbhaviṣyati manāgdorantaraṃ danturaṃ dvitraireva dinaiśca locanapathaṃ r_oṃāvalī yāsyati |  7506-2 kiṃ cābhūdiva vāsaraistricaturaiścāñcalyamasyā dṛśos tajjetuṃ jagatīmanaṅga kimatīvāyāsamālaṃbase ||7507-1 ekadvairmadhubindubhirmadhulihaḥ syādeva kukṣimbhariḥ kasminvā kusume bhavanti sulabhā te'mī punaḥ pañcaṣāḥ |  7507-2 kālaḥ ko'pi sa tādṛśaḥ pariṇato yenaikatṛṣṇākuloyadyatpuṣpamupāgamatkṛpaṇavattenāsya mā kuñcitaṃ ||7508-1 ekadhāturdvikhaṇḍaḥ syādyatrodgrāhastataḥ paraṃ |  7508-2 tṛtīyaṃ kiṃciduccaṃ syātkhaṇḍaṃ gamakaśobhanaṃ ||7509-1 ekanibhā yatra mahī tṛṇataruvalmīkagulmaparihīnā |  7509-2 tasyāṃ yatra vikāro bhavati dharitryāṃ jalaṃ tatra ||7510-1 ekantu lokavedebhyaḥ sāramākṛṣya kathyate |  7510-2 prāṇātyaye'pi na tyājyo nyāyyo dharmaślathaḥ pathaḥ ||7511-1 ekapaṅktyupaviṣṭānāṃ viprāṇāṃ sahabhojane |  7511-2 yadyeko'pi tyajedannaṃ sarvairucchiṣṭabhojanaṃ ||7512-1 ekapatnīsamāsaktairbhavadbhiḥ saṃhatairmithaḥ |  7512-2 sthātavyamaprasādena bhedamūlaṃ hi yoṣitaḥ ||7513-1 ekapuṃsā na gantavyaṃ kākasarpasya kāraṇāt |  7513-2 karkaṭasya prasādena brāhmaṇo jīvito yathā ||7514-1 ekapucchaścatuṣpādaḥ kakudmānlambakambalaḥ |  7514-2 gorapatyaṃ balīvardo ghāsamatti sukhena saḥ ||7515-1 ekapriyācaraṇapadmaparīṣṭijāta- kleśasya me hṛdayamuttaralīcakāra |  7515-2 udbhinnanirbharamanobhavabhāvamugdha- nānāṅganāvadanacandramasāṃ didṛkṣā ||7516-1 ekabhave ripupannagaduḥkhaṃ janmaśateṣu manobhavaduḥkhaṃ |  7516-2 cārudhiyeti vicintya mahāntaḥ kāmaripuṃ kṣaṇataḥ kṣapayanti ||7516ā-1 ekabhuktaṃ sadārogyaṃ dvibhuktaṃ balavarddhanaṃ |  7516ā-2 tribhuktervyādhipīḍā syāccaturbhuktermṛtirdhruvaṃ ||7517-1 ekamapi kṣaṇaṃ labdhvā samyaktvaṃ yo vimuñcati |  7517-2 saṃsārārṇavamuttīrya labhate so'pi nirvṛtiṃ ||7518-1 ekamapi satāṃ sukṛtaṃ vikasati tailaṃ yathā jale nyastaṃ |  7518-2 asatāmupakāraśataṃ saṃkucati suśītale ghṛtavat ||7519-1 ekamapyakṣaraṃ yastu guruḥ śiṣyaṃ prabodhayet |  7519-2 pṛthivyāṃ nāsti taddravyaṃ yaddatvā so'nṛṇī bhavet ||7520-1 ekamapyatra yo binduṃ bhakṣayenmadhuno naraḥ |  7520-2 so'pi duḥkhavṛṣākīrṇe patate bhavasāgare ||7521-1 ekamasya paramekamudyamaṃ nistrapatvamaparasya vastunaḥ |  7521-2 nityamuṣṇamahasā nirasyate nityamandhatamasaṃ pradhāvati ||7522-1 ekamātro laghuḥ prokto dvimātraśca guruḥ smṛtaḥ |  7522-2 plutastrimātrako jñeyo drutaḥ syādardhamātrakaḥ ||7523-1 ekamāśīviṣo hanti śastreṇaikaśca vadhyate |  7523-2 hanti vipraḥ sarāṣṭrāṇi purāṇyapi hi kopitaḥ ||7524-1 ekamutkaṇṭhayā vyāptaṃ anyaddayitayā hṛtaṃ |  7524-2 caitanyamaparaṃ dhatte kiyanti hṛdayāni me ||7525-1 ekameva guṇaṃ prāpya namratāmagamaddhanuḥ |  7525-2 tavāśeṣaguṇā rājñaḥ stabdhateti suvismayaḥ ||7526-1 ekameva tu śūdrasya prabhuḥ karma samādiśat |  7526-2 eteṣāmeva varṇānāṃ śuśrūṣāmanasūyayā ||7527-1 ekameva dahatyagnirnaraṃ durupasarpiṇaṃ |  7527-2 kulaṃ dahati rājāgniḥ sapaśudravyasaṃcayaṃ ||7528-1 ekameva puraskṛtya daśa jīvanti mānavāḥ |  7528-2 vinā tena na śobhante yathā saṃkhyāṅkabindavaḥ ||7529-1 ekameva baliṃ baddhvā jagāma harirunnatiṃ |  7529-2 asyāstribalibandhena saiva madhyasya namratā ||7530-1 ekameva hi dāridryaṃ kliśnāti sakalaṃ jagat |  7530-2 tamahaṃ śābdikaṃ vande yaścakāra napuṃsakaṃ ||7531-1 ekamevākṣi vāmākṣi rañjayāñjanalekhayā |  7531-2 jāyatāmaindave bimbe khañjanāmbujasaṃgamaḥ ||7532-1 ekamevādvitīyaṃ tadyadrājannāvabudhyase |  7532-2 satyaṃ svargasya sopānaṃ pārāvārasya nauriva ||7533-1 ekayā dve viniścitya trīṃścaturbhirvaśe kuru |  7533-2 pañca jitvā viditvā ṣaṭsapta hitvā sukhī bhava ||7534-1 ekayāpi kalayā viśuddhayā yo'pi ko'pi bhajate girīśatāṃ |  7534-2 bhūyasīrapi kalāḥ kalaṅkitāḥ prāpya kaścidapacīyate śanaiḥ ||7535-1 ekayaiva gurordṛṣṭyā dvābhyāṃ vāpi labheta yat |  7535-2 na tattisṛbhiraṣṭābhiḥ sahasreṇāpi kasyacit ||7536-1 ekarada dvaimātura nistriguṇa caturbhujo'pi pañcakara |  7536-2 jaya ṣaṇmukhanuta sapta- cchadagandhimadāṣṭatanutanaya ||7537-1 ekavarṇaṃ yathā dugdhaṃ bahuvarṇāsu dhenuṣu |  7537-2 tathā dharmasya vaicitrye tattvamekaṃ paraṃ nṛpatervijñeyaḥ śubhakārakaḥ ||7540-1 ekavāpījalaṃ paśya ikṣau madhuratāṃ vrajet |  7540-2 nimbe kaṭukatāṃ yāti pātrāpātrāya bhojanaṃ ||7541-1 ekavāpībhavaṃ toyaṃ pātrāpātraviśeṣataḥ |  7541-2 āmre madhuratāmeti nimbe kaṭukatāmapi ||7542-1 ekaviṃśatirādiṣṭāḥ narakāḥ śāstrapāragaiḥ |  7542-2 garbhavāsasamīpe te kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīṃ ||7543-1 ekaviṃśativarṇāṅghrirbhavecśṛṅgārake rase |  7543-2 kāmado'bhīṣṭadaḥ pusāṃ tāle turagalīlake ||7543-3 ... ... ... ... ... ... ||7544-1 ekaviṃśativāreṇa kukkuṭasyāsṛjokṣitaṃ |  7544-2 tatkṣaṇāddāḍimībījaṃ vardhate phalati dhruvaṃ ||7545-1 ekaviṃśatisaṃjaptaṃ jalaṃ mantreṇa pāyayet |  7545-2 yadā vāntistadā mṛtyurna vāntirjīvati dhruvaṃ ||7546-1 ekavidyāpradhāno'pi bahujñānī bhavennaraḥ |  7546-2 subhāṣitāni śikṣeta yāni śāstroddhṛtāni vai ||7547-1 ekavṛkṣasamārūḍhā nānāvarṇā vihaṃgamāḥ |  7547-2 prātardaśa diśo yānti kā tatra paridevanā ||7548-1 ekavṛkṣe yathā rātrau nānāpakṣisamāgamaḥ |  7548-2 prātardaśa diśo yānti tadvadbhūtasamāgamaḥ ||7549-1 ekaveśāśrayājjātervarṇasyāpi pragopanaṃ |  7549-2 yathā hastipade'nyeṣāṃ līyante caraṇā api ||7550-1 ekaśaktiprahāreṇa mriyate'śvo naro'pi hi |  7550-2 sahenmahāprahārāṇāṃ śataṃ yuddheṣu vāraṇaḥ ||7551-1 ekaśīlavayovidyājātivyasanavṛttayaḥ |  7551-2 sāhacarye bhavenmitraṃ ebhiryadi tu sārjavaiḥ ||7552-1 ekaścetpūrvapuruṣaḥ kule yaśca bahuśrutaḥ |  7552-2 aparaḥ pāpakṛnmūrkhaḥ kulaṃ kasyānuvartate ||7553-1 ekasārthaprayātānāṃ sarveṣāṃ tatra gāmināṃ |  7553-2 yasya kālaḥ prayātyagre tatra kā paridevanā ||7554-1 ekasukṛtena duṣkṛta- śatāni ye nāśayanti te sevyāḥ |  7554-2 na tvekadoṣajanito yeṣāṃ kopaḥ kṛtaśataghnaḥ ||7555-1 ekastapo dviradhyāyī tribhirgītaṃ catuḥ pathaṃ |  7555-2 sapta pañca kṛṣīṇāṃ ca saṅgrāmo bahubhirjanaiḥ ||7557-1 ekastridhā hṛdi sadā vasasi sma citraṃ yo vidviṣāṃ ca viduṣāṃ ca mṛgīdṛśāṃ ca |  7557-2 tāpaṃ ca saṃmadarasaṃ ca ratiṃ ca tanvan śauryoṣmaṇā ca vinayena ca līlayā ca ||7557ā-1 ekastredhā nayasunipuṇairyogibhiḥ sevakairvā nirbādhaṃ yaḥ sapadi vidito bhāti sarvasvarūpaḥ |  7557ā-2 so'yaṃ nandavrajamupagataḥ sākamābhīravṛndair vṛndāraṇye viharati parānandabhūtirmukundaḥ ||7558-1 ekastvaṃ gahane'smin kokila na kalaṃ kadācidapi kuryāḥ |  7558-2 sājātyaśaṅkayāmī na tvāṃ nighnanti nirdayāḥ kākāḥ ||7559-1 ekastvaṃ marubhūruhendra vitataiḥ śākhāśatairañcitaḥpuṣpyatpuṣpaphalānvitairamṛditairjīvyāḥ sahasraṃ samāḥ |  7559-2 aśrāntaṃ śramarugṇapānthajanatāsarvārthanirvāhaṇaṃ kastvāṃ sāttvikamantareṇa bhuvanaṃ nirmātu dharmāśayaḥ ||7560-1 ekastvamāvahasi janmani saṃkṣaye ca bhoktuṃ svayaṃ svakṛtakarmaphalānubandhaṃ |  7560-2 anyo na jātu sukhaduḥkhavidhau sahāyaḥ svājīvanāya militaṃ viṭapeṭakaṃ te ||7561-1 ekasthaṃ jīviteśe tvayi sakalajagatsāramālokayāmaḥ śyāme cakṣustavāsminvapuṣi niviśate nālpapuṇyasya puṃsaḥ |  7561-2 kasyānyatrāmṛte'sminratirativipulā dṛṣṭirevāmṛtaṃ tedaityairityucyamāno munibhirapi hariḥ straiṇarūpo'vatādvaḥ ||7562-1 ekasmādvṛkṣādyajñapātrāṇi rājan srukca droṇī voḍhanī pīḍanī ca|  7562-2 etadrājanbruvato me nibodha ekasmātpuruṣājjāyate'sacca sacca ||7563-1 ekasmiñjanirāvayoḥ samajani svacche sarovāriṇi bhrātaḥ kācidihaiva kānicidahānyatra vyatītāni nau |  7563-2 labdhaṃ tāmarasa tvayā mṛgadṛśāṃ līlāvataṃsāspadaṃ śaivālaṃ viluṭhāmi pāmaravadhūpādāhate pāthasi ||7564-1 ekasmiñśayane parāṅgukhatayā vītottaraṃ tāmyator anyonyasya hṛdi sthite'pyanunaye saṃrakṣatorgauravaṃ |  7564-2 dampatyoḥ śanakairapāṅgavalanānmiśrībhavaccakṣuṣor bhagno mānakaliḥ sahāsarabhasavyāvṛttakaṇṭhagrahaḥ ||7565-1 ekasmiñśayane vipakṣaramaṇīnāmagrahe mugdhayā sadyaḥkopaparāṅmukhaglapitayā cāṭūni kurvannapi |  7565-2 āvegādavadhīritaḥ priyatamastūṣṇīṃ sthitastatkṣaṇaṃ mā bhūtsupta ivetyamandavalitagrīvaṃ punarvīkṣitaḥ ||7566-1 ekasmiñśayane saroruhadṛśorvijñāya nidrāṃ tayor ekāṃ pallavitāvaguṇṭhanapaṭāmutkandharo dṛṣṭavān |  7566-2 anyasyāḥ savidhaṃ sametya nibhṛtavyālolahastāṅguli-vyāpārairvasanāñcalaṃ capalayansvāpacyutiṃ kliptavān ||7567-1 ekasmindivase mayā vicaratā prāptaḥ kathaṃcinmaṇir mūlyaṃ yasya na vidyate bhavati cetpṛthvī samastā tataḥ |  7567-2 so'yaṃ daivavaśādabhūdatitarāṃ kācopamaḥ sāmprataṃ kiṃ kurmaḥ kamupāsmahe kva sa suhṛdyasyaitadāvedyate ||7568-1 ekasminnapyatikrānte dine dharmavivarjite |  7568-2 dasyubhirmuṣitasyeva hṛdayaṃ dahyate ciraṃ ||7569-1 ekasminnayane bhṛśaṃ tapati yaḥ kāle sa dāhakramo yenātanyata yatprakāśasamaye naiśaṃ padaṃ durlabhaṃ |  7569-2 savy_oṃāvayavasya yasya viditā loke prakāśasthitiḥ śrīsūryaḥ kṣaṇasevito'pi hi mahādevaḥ sa nastrāyatāṃ ||7570-1 ekasminneva jāyete kule klībamahārathau |  7570-2 phalāphalavatī śākhe yathaikasminvanaspatau ||7571-1 ekasminmalayācale bahuvidhaiḥ kiṃ tairakiṃcitkaraiḥkākolūkakapotakokilakulaireko'pi pārśvasthitaḥ |  7571-2 kekī kūjati cettadā vighaṭitavyālāvalībandhanaḥ sevyaḥ syādiha sarvalokamanasāmānandanaścandanaḥ ||7572-1 ekasminyatra nidhanaṃ prāpite duṣṭakāriṇi |  7572-2 bahūnāṃ bhavati kṣemaṃ tasya puṇyaprado vadhaḥ ||7573-1 ekasminvijite citte vijitaṃ sakalaṃ jagat |  7573-2 ajite tu punastasminna putro'pi vinirjitaḥ ||7574-1 ekasminvinipātite'pi śirasi krodhopaśāntiḥ kutaḥ kiṃtu svānunayāya mūrdhanidhanaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ na yatrāriṇā |  7574-2 tvatto mūrdhabahutvataḥ phalamidaṃ samyaṅmayā labhyate chinnaṃ chinnamavekṣya rākṣasapate svaṃ durnayaṃ jñāsyasi ||7575-1 ekasmai pūrṇamanyasmai kṛśaṃ tulyaguṇodaye |  7575-2 bhedādyadarpitaṃ rāgadveṣadānena tena kiṃ ||7576-1 ekasya karma saṃvīkṣya karotyanyo'pi garhitaṃ |  7576-2 gatānugatiko loko na lokaḥ pāramārthikaḥ ||7577-1 ekasya janmano'rthe mūḍhāḥ kurvanti yāni pāpāni |  7577-2 janayanti tāni duḥkhaṃ teṣāṃ janmāntarasahasraṃ ||7578-1 ekasya tasya manye chidreṣvanarthā bahulībhavanti ||7580-1 ekasya viśvapāpena tāpe'nante nimajjataḥ |  7580-2 kaḥ śrautasyātmano bhīro bhāraḥ syādduritena te ||7581-1 ekasya sṛṣṭiḥ parameśvarasya bhinnā caturdhā viniyogakāle |  7581-2 bhoge bhavānī samareṣu durgā kopeṣu kālī puruṣeṣu viṣṇuḥ ||7582-1 ekasya hi prasādena kṛtsno lokaḥ prasīdati |  7582-2 vyākulenākulaḥ sarvo bhavatīti viniścayaḥ ||7583-1 ekasyāpi na yaḥ śakto manasaḥ sannibarhaṇe |  7583-2 mahīṃ sāgaraparyantāṃ kathaṃ nu sa vijeṣyate ||7584-1 ekasyāpi manobhuvastadabalāpāṅgairjagannirjaye kāmaṃ nihnutasarvavismayarasavyaktiprakārā vayaṃ |  7584-2 yastvenaṃ sabalaṃ ca jetumabhitastatkampamātraṃ bhruvor nārebhe sugatastu tadguṇakathā stambhāya naḥ kevalaṃ ||7585-1 ekasyāpyatitherannaṃ yaḥ pradātuṃ na śaktimān |  7585-2 tasyānekaparikleśe gṛhe kiṃ vasataḥ phalaṃ ||7586-1 ekasyāyamudeti mūrdhani gireranyasya caiva kramādastaṃ yāti kalānidhistadubhayorastaḥ praśasto'calaḥ |  7586-2 ko nāmodayinaṃ karoti na śir_oṃāṇikyamastaṃ punar yātaṃ yaḥ kurute bhavāniva sa duṣprāpo'yamuccaiḥśirāḥ ||7587-1 ekasyārthāya yo hanyādātmano vā parasya vā |  7587-2 bahūnvai prāṇino'thaikaṃ bhavettasyeha pātakaṃ ||7588-1 sukhamedhanti bahavo yasmiṃstu nihate sati |  7588-2 tasminhate nāsti bhadre pātakaṃ nopapātakaṃ ||7589-1 ekasyāstapanakaraiḥ karālitāyā bibhrāṇaḥ sapadi sitoṣṇavāraṇatvaṃ |  7589-2 sevāyai vadanasarojanirjitaśrīr āgatya priyamiva candramāścakāra ||7590-1 ekasyaiva na paryāptaṃ asti yadbrahmakośajaṃ |  7590-2 āśayā varddhitasyāsti tasyālpamapi pūrtikṛt ||7591-1 ekāṃ kṛtvā tanumanupamāṃ candracūḍena sārdhaṃ yastyakto'rdhaḥ satatavirahakleśabhāgī bhavānyā |  7591-2 tenāṅgānāṃ racitamucitaṃ saṃvibhaktena kartuṃ nūnaṃ dūnāṃ tanutanulatāṃ nirmame tāṃ viriñciḥ ||7592-1 ekākinā tapo dvābhyāṃ paṭhanaṃ gāyanaṃ tribhiḥ |  7592-2 caturbhirgamanaṃ kṣetraṃ pañcabhirbahubhī raṇaḥ ||7593-1 ekākinā na gantavyaṃ yadi kāryaśataṃ bhavet |  7593-2 ekakukkuṭamātreṇa brāhmaṇaḥ mṛgapatau rājeti giraḥ pariṇamanti ||7596-1 ekākinīṃ rahaḥ kṣībāṃ labdhvā durlabhayoṣitaṃ |  7596-2 aprauḍho'nupabhujyānyadine dūtyārthayeta yaḥ ||7597-1 vibhūtiṃ rabhasāvāptāṃ yaśca saṃtyajya śvaśrūrmamāndhabadhirā nanu mūḍha pāntha||7599-1 ekākinyā mama gṛhamidaṃ yāmiko māmako'ndhaḥ kā me nodetyahaha manasastaskareṇātra bhītiḥ |  7599-2 daivenaivaṃ yadi na sukhitaḥ syāḥ śrameṇa ekākṣarapradātāraṃ yo guruṃ naiva manyate |  7603-2 śvānayoniśataṃ gatvā cāṇḍāleṣvabhijāyate ||7604-1 ekā gaṅgā prayāge malayaparisare candanaṃ mauktikālī kāntākaṇṭhe himāṃśurviyati sarasi |  7686-2 ityullāsitadoṣṇi gopanivahe kiṃcidbhujākuṇcana-nyañcacchailabharārdite viramati smero hariḥ pātu vaḥ ||7687-1 ekenaiva hi kaścidguṇena jagati prasiddhimupayāti |  7687-2 ekena kareṇa gajaḥ karī na sūryaḥ sahasreṇa ||7688-1 ekenoddhṛtya khaṅgaṃ hṛdi patitamiṣuṃ pāṇinaikena bhañjan bhrūbhedālaṃkṛtāsyaḥ sarabhasanayanaḥ spaṣṭadaṣṭādharoṣṭhaḥ |  7688-2 bhītaiḥ kravyādavṛndairanupahatatanuḥ kuñjarendropadhānaḥ śete yodhapradhāno yadi maraṇamidaṃ labhyate kiṃ jayena ||7689-1 ekeyaṃ rasanā na śabdamabhajadbheje'nuvāraṃ parā netraṃ kiṃcidanūrusaṅgamabhavajjātorusaṅgaṃ paraṃ |  7689-2 rāgaḥ kaścana nirjagāma hṛdayāttasthau tathaivāparo bāhye satpulako'ntare vipulako jāto'ṅkabhūsaṃbhramaḥ ||7690-1 eke vārinidhau praveśamapare lokāntarālokanaṃ kecitpāvakayogitāṃ nijagaduḥ kṣīṇe'hni caṇḍārciṣaḥ |  7690-2 mithyā caitadasākṣikaṃ priyasakhi pratyakṣatīvrātapaṃ manye'haṃ punaradhvanīnaramaṇīceto'dhiśete raviḥ ||7691-1 ekeṣāṃ vāci śukavadanyeṣāṃ hṛdi mūkavat |  7691-2 hṛdi vāci tathānyeṣāṃ valgu valganti sūktayaḥ ||7692-1 eke satpuruṣāḥ parārthaghaṭakāḥ svārthaṃ parityajya ye sāmānyāstu parārthamudyamabhṛtaḥ svārthāvirodhena ye |  7692-2 te'mī mānuṣarākṣasāḥ parahitaṃ svārthāya nighnanti ye ye tu ghnanti nirarthakaṃ parahitaṃ te ke na jāmīmahe ||7693-1 ekaikamakṣaviṣayaṃ bhajatāmamīṣāṃ saṃpadyate yadi kṛtāntagṛhātithitvaṃ |  7693-2 pañcākṣagocararatasya kimasti vācyaṃ akṣārthamityamaladhīradhiyastyajanti||7694-1 ekaikaśo'pi nighnanti viṣayā viṣasaṃnibhāḥ |  7694-2 kṣemī tu sa kathaṃ nu syādyaḥ samaṃ pañca sevate ||7695-1 ekaikaśo yuvajanaṃ vilaṅghamānākṣanikaramiva taralā |  7695-2 viśrāmyati subhaga tvāṃ aṅgulirāsādya merumiva ||7696-1 ekaikaśo vinighnanti viṣayā viṣasaṃnibhāḥ |  7696-2 kiṃ punaḥ pañca militāḥ na kathaṃ nāśayanti hi ||7697-1 ekaikasya yadādāya puṣpasya madhu saṃcitaṃ |  7697-2 kiṃcinmadhukarīvargaistadapyaśnanti nirghṛṇāḥ ||7698-1 ekaikasya śarasyaiva catuṣpakṣāṇi yojayet |  7698-2 ṣaḍaṅgulapramāṇena pakṣacchedaṃ ca kārayet ||7699-1 ekaikasyopakārasya prāṇāndāsyāmi te kape |  7699-2 pratyahaṃ kriyamāṇasya śeṣasya ṛṇino vayaṃ ||7700-1 ekaikātiśayālavaḥ paraguṇajñānaikavaijñānikāḥ santyete dhanikāḥ kalāsu sakalāsvācāryacaryācaṇāḥ |  7700-2 apyete sumanogirāṃ niśamanādbibhyatyaho ślāghayā dhūte mūrdhani kuṇḍale kaṣaṇataḥ kṣīṇe bhavetāmiti ||7701-1 ekaiko'saṃkhyajīvānāṃ ghātato madhunaḥ kaṇaḥ |  7701-2 niṣpadyate yatastena madhvaśnāti kathaṃ budhaḥ ||7702-1 ekaiva kavitā puṃsāṃ grāmāyāśvāya hastine |  7702-2 antato'nnāya vastrāya tāmbūlāya ca kalpate ||7703-1 ekaiva kācinmahatāmavasthā sūkṣmāṇi vastrāṇyathavā ca kanthā |  7703-2 karāgralagnābhinavā ca bālā gaṅgātaraṅgeṣvathavākṣamālā ||7704-1 ekaiva daṇḍanītistu vidyetyauśanasāḥ sthitāḥ |  7704-2 tasyāṃ hi sarvavidyānāṃ ārambhāḥ saṃpratiṣṭhitāḥ ||7705-1 ekaiva saṃgame bālā viyoge tanmayaṃ jagat |  7705-2 kṛtopakāra evāyaṃ viyogaḥ kena nindyate ||7706-1 ekaiva sāmṛtamayī sutarāmanarghyā kāpyastyasau himakarasya kalā yayaiva |  7706-2 āropito guṇavidā parameśvareṇa cūḍāmaṇau na gaṇito'sya kalaṅkadoṣaḥ ||7707-1 ekaiva sārthakā cintā dharmasyārthe vicintyate |  7707-2 dvitīyā sārthakā cintā yogināṃ dharmanandinī ||7708-1 ekaiśvarye sthito'pi praṇatabahuphale yaḥ svayaṃ kṛttivāsāḥkāntāsaṃmiśradeho'pyaviṣayamanasāṃ yaḥ parastādyatīnāṃ |  7708-2 aṣṭābhiryasya kṛtsnaṃ jagadapi tanubhirbibhrato nābhimānaḥsanmārgālokanāya vyapanayatu sa vastāmasīṃ vṛttimīśaḥ ||7709-1 eko giriśaḥ svāmī gaṇatā tulyaiva vallabhatvaṃ ca |  7709-2 kiṃ kurmaḥ karmagatau śuṣyati bhṛṅgī vināyakaḥ pīnaḥ ||7710-1 eko gotre pumānproktaḥ prāktanaiḥ svakuṭumbabhṛt |  7710-2 eko'pyanekaḥ puruṣaḥ pareṣāṃ bharaṇakṣamaḥ ||7711-1 eko jayati sadvṛttaḥ kiṃ punardvau susaṃhatau |  7711-2 kiṃ citraṃ yadi tanvaṅgyāḥ stanābhyāṃ nirjitaṃ jagat ||7712-1 eko jīvo bahavo dehā ekaṃ tattvaṃ bahavo mohāḥ |  7712-2 ekā vidyā bahupāṣaṇḍā vibudhaiḥ kriyate kimiti vitaṇḍā ||7713-1 ekodarasamudbhūtā ekanakṣatrajātakāḥ |  7713-2 na bhavanti samāḥ śīle yathā badarakaṇṭakāḥ ||7714-1 ekodarāḥ pṛthaggrīvā anyānyaphalabhakṣiṇaḥ |  7714-2 asaṃhatā vinaśyanti bhāruṇḍā iva pakṣiṇaḥ ||7715-1 eko dāśarathiḥ kāmaṃ yātudhānāḥ sahasraśaḥ |  7715-2 te tu yāvanta evājau tāvāṃśca dadṛśe sa taiḥ ||7716-1 eko devaḥ keśavo vā śivo vā ekaṃ mitraṃ bhūpatirvā yatirvā |  7716-2 eko vāsaḥ pattane vā vane vā ekā bhāryā sundarī vā darī vā ||7717-1 eko dharmaḥ paraṃ śreyaḥ kṣamaikā śāntiruttamā |  7717-2 vidyaikā paramā dṛṣṭirahiṃsaikā sukhāvahā ||7718-1 eko na ropito yāvadutpanno'yaṃ vraṇo'paraḥ |  7718-2 satyaḥ pravādo yacchidreṣvanarthā yānti bhūritāṃ ||7719-1 ekonā viṃśatiḥ strīṇāṃ snānārthaṃ sarayūṃ gatā |  7719-2 viṃśatiḥ punarāyātā eko vyāghreṇa bhakṣitaḥ ||7720-1 ekonā viṃśatirnāryaḥ krīḍāṃ kartuṃ vane gatāḥ |  7720-2 viṃśatirgṛhamāyātāḥ śeṣo vyāghreṇa bhakṣitaḥ ||7721-1 eko netā kṣatriyo vā dvijo vā caikā vidyānvīkṣikī vā trayī vā |  7721-2 ekā bhāryā vaṃśajā vā priyā vāpy ekaṃ mitraṃ bhūpatirvā yatirvā ||7722-1 eko'nte dvisamastrilocana iti khyātaścaturbhiḥ stuto vedaiḥ pañcamukhaḥ ṣaḍānanapitā saptarṣibhirvanditaḥ |  7722-2 aṣṭāṅgo navatulya āmaragaṇe vāso daśāśā dadhathsvaścaikādaśa so'vatānna vijito yo dvādaśātmāṃśubhiḥ ||7723-1 eko'pi kṛṣṇasya kṛtaḥ praṇāmo daśāśvamedhāvabhṛthena tulyaḥ |  7723-2 daśāśvamedhī punareti janma kṛṣṇapraṇāmī na punarbhavāya ||7724-1 eko'pi ko'pi sevyo yaḥ kṣīṇaṃ kṣīṇaṃ punarnavaṃ |  7724-2 anudvignaṃ karotyeva sūryaścandramasaṃ yathā ||7725-1 eko'pi guṇavānputro nirguṇena śatena kiṃ |  7725-2 ekaścandrastamo hanti na ca tārāḥ sahasraśaḥ ||7726-1 eko'pi guṇavānputro nirguṇaiḥ kiṃ śatairapi |  7726-2 ekaścandro jagannetraṃ nakṣatraiḥ kiṃ prayojanaṃ ||7727-1 eko'pi guṇavānputro mā nirguṇaśataṃ bhavet |  7727-2 ekaścandrastamo hanti na ca tārāḥ sahasraśaḥ ||7728-1 eko'pi jīyate hanta kālidāso na kenacit |  7728-2 śṛṅgāre lalitodgāre kālidāsatrayī kimu ||7729-1 eko'pi traya iva bhāti kanduko'yaṃ kāntāyāḥ karatalarāgaraktaraktaḥ |  7729-2 bhūmau taccaraṇanakhāṃśugauragauraḥ svaḥsthaḥ sannayanamarīcinīlanīlaḥ ||7730-1 eko'pi yaḥ sakalakāryavidhau samarthaḥ sattvādhiko bhavatu kiṃ bahubhiḥ prasūtaiḥ |  7730-2 candraḥ prakāśayati diṅmukhamaṇḍalāni tārāgaṇaḥ samudito'pyasamartha eva ||7731-1 eko'pi yatra nagare prasiddhaḥ syāddhanurgharaḥ |  7731-2 tato yāntyarayo dūraṃ mṛgāḥ siṃhagṛhādiva ||7732-1 eko'pi vāraṇapatirdviṣatāmanīkaṃ yuktaṃ nihanti madasattvaguṇopapannaḥ |  7732-2 nāgeṣu hi kṣitibhṛtāṃ vijayo nibaddhas tasmādgajādhikabalo nṛpatiḥ sadā syāt ||7733-1 eko'pi siṃhaḥ sāhasraṃ yūthaṃ mathnāti dantināṃ |  7733-2 tasmātsiṃhamivodāraṃ ātmānaṃ vīkṣya saṃpatet ||7734-1 eko'pyamātyo medhāvī śūro dakṣo vicakṣaṇaḥ |  7734-2 rājānaṃ rājamātraṃ vā prāpayenmahatīṃ śriyaṃ ||7735-1 eko baṭurdarbhakuśāgrapāṇir vane vanaiḥ siñcati bālacūtān |  7735-2 āmrāśca siktāḥ pitaraśca tṛptā ekā kriyā dvyarthakarī prasiddhā ||7736-1 eko bahūnāṃ mūrkhāṇāṃ madhye nipatito budhaḥ |  7736-2 padmaḥ pāthastaraṅgāṇāṃ iva viplavate dhruvaṃ ||7737-1 eko bāṇaḥ sphurati valitālokanaṃ kāminīnāṃ kāmasyānyo malayapavanaḥ kāmināṃ marmabhedī |  7737-2 vīṇāveṇukvaṇitamaparaścūtapuṣpaṃ turīyaḥ sarvotkaṇṭhaprathamasacivaḥ pañcamaḥ pañcamo'pi ||7738-1 eko bhavānmama samaṃ daśa vā namanti jyāghoṣapūritaviyanti śarāsanāni |  7738-2 tallokapālasahitaḥ saha lakṣmaṇena cāpaṃ gṛhāṇa sadṛśaṃ kṣaṇamastu yuddhaṃ ||7739-1 eko bhāvaḥ sadā śasto yatīnāṃ bhāvitātmanāṃ |  7739-2 śrīlubdhānāṃ na lokānāṃ viśeṣeṇa mahībhujāṃ ||7740-1 eko'bhūtpulināttatastu nalināccānyo'pi nākorabhūthprācyāste traya eva divyakavayo dīvyantu devyā girā |  7740-2 arvāñco yadi gadyapadyaracanācāturyavāguddhatās tānsarvānatiśayya khelatitarāṃ śākallamallaḥ kaviḥ ||7741-1 eko'bhūnnalināttataśca pulinādvalmīkataścāparas te sarve kavayo bhavanti guravastebhyo namaskurmahe |  7741-2 arvāñco yadi gadyapadyaracanaiścetaścamatkurvate teṣāṃ mūrdhni dadāmi vāmacaraṇaṃ karṇāṭarājapriyā ||7742-1 eko bhekaḥ paramamuditaḥ prāpya goṣpādanīraṃ ko me ko me raṭati satataṃ sparddhayā vākyamuccaiḥ |  7742-2 gaṅgādīnāṃ sakalasaritāṃ prāpya toyaṃ samudraḥ kiṃcidgarvaṃ na vahati mahānprāyaśo bhūri ratnaiḥ ||7743-1 eko me śāśvatātmā sukhamasukhabhujo jñānadṛṣṭisvabhāvonānyatkiṃcinnijaṃ me tanudhanakaraṇabhrātṛbhāryāsukhādi |  7743-2 karmodbhūtaṃ samastaṃ capalamasukhadaṃ tatra moho mudhā me paryālocyeti jīva svahitamavitathaṃ muktimārgaṃ śraya tvaṃ ||7744-1 eko'mbudhirjagati jīvati yena tāni tāvanti hanta salilāni samuccitāni |  7744-2 yebhyaḥ kathaṃcidapi kiṃcidamī payodāḥ pītvā cirāya dharaṇīmapi tarpayanti||7745-1 eko raviratitejā atiśūraḥ kesarī vane vāsī |  7745-2 ativipulaṃ khaṃ śūnyaṃ hyatigambhīro'mbudhiḥ kṣāraḥ ||7746-1 eko rasaḥ karuṇa eva nimitta bhedādbhinnaḥ pṛthakpṛthagivāśrayate vivartān |  7746-2 āvartabudbudataraṅgamayānvikārān ambho yathā salilameva hi tatsamastaṃ ||7747-1 eko rāgiṣu rājate priyatamādehārdhahārī haro nīrāgeṣu jino vimuktalalanāsaṅgo na yasmātparaḥ |  7747-2 durvārasmarabāṇapannagaviṣavyāsaṅgamugdho janaḥ śeṣaḥ kāmaviḍambito hi viṣayānbhoktuṃ na moktuṃ kṣamaḥ ||7748-1 eko'rthaṃ vimṛśedeko dharme prakurute manaḥ |  7748-2 ekaḥ kāryāṇi kurute tamāhurmadhyamaṃ naraṃ ||7749-1 eko lalāṭe dvau mūrdhni dvau dvau pārśvopapārśvayoḥ |  7749-2 dvau ca vakṣasi vijñeyau prayāṇe caika eva tu ||7750-1 eko lobho mahāgrāho lobhātpāpaṃ pravartate |  7750-2 tataḥ pāpādadharmāptistato duḥkhaṃ pravartate ||7751-1 eko vittavataḥ sūnuḥ pitṛhīnaḥ suyauvane |  7751-2 mugdhe bhūbhuji kāyasthaḥ kāmispardhī vaṇiksutaḥ ||7752-1 nityāturāmātyavaidyaprasiddhasya guroḥ sutaḥ |  7752-2 ... ... pracchannakāmo jaṭādharaḥ ||7753-1 napuṃsakapravādasya praśamārthī phalāśanaḥ |  7753-2 matto dhūrtasahāyaśca rājasūnurniraṅkuśaḥ ||7754-1 grāmyo dhātṛdvijasutaḥ prāptalābhaśca gāyanaḥ |  7754-2 sadyaḥ sārthapatiḥ prāptaḥ śrīmāndaivaparāyaṇaḥ ||7755-1 gatānugatiko mūrkhaḥ śāstronmādaśca paṇḍitaḥ |  7755-2 nityakṣībaśca veśyānāṃ jaṅgamāḥ kalpapādapāḥ ||7756-1 eko viśvasatāṃ harāmyapaghṛṇaḥ prāṇānahaṃ prāṇināṃ ityevaṃ paricintya mātmamanasi vyādhānutāpaṃ kṛthāḥ |  7756-2 bhūpānāṃ bhavaneṣu kiṃ ca vimalakṣetreṣu gūḍhāśayāḥ sādhūnāmarayo vasanti kati na tvattulyakakṣā narāḥ ||7757-1 eko vaiśyaśca dvau śūdrau brāhmaṇāstraya eva ca |  7757-2 vidyopajīvinaḥ pañca na gaccheyuḥ samaṃ svayaṃ ||7757ā-1 eko vaiśyo dvau ca śūdrau kṣatriyāḥ sapta pañca vā |  7757ā-2 nava nāryo na gaccheyuḥ na gacchedbrāhmaṇatrayaṃ ||7758-1 eko'hamasahāyo'haṃ kṛśo'hamaparicchadaḥ |  7758-2 svapne'pyevaṃvidhā cintā mṛgendrasya na jāyate ||7759-1 eko'hamasmīti ca manyase tvaṃ na hṛcchayaṃ vetsi muniṃ purāṇaṃ |  7759-2 yo veditā karmaṇaḥ pāpakasya yasyāntike tvaṃ vṛjinaṃ karoṣi ||7760-1 eko'hamasmītyātmānaṃ yattvaṃ kalyāṇa manyase |  7760-2 nityaṃ sthitaste hṛdyeṣa puṇyapāpekṣitā muniḥ ||7761-1 eko haraḥ priyādhara- guṇavedī diviṣado'pare mūḍhāḥ |  7761-2 viṣamamṛtaṃ vā samamiti yaḥ paśyangaralameva papau ||7762-1 eko hi kurute pāpaṃ kālapāśavaśaṃ gataḥ |  7762-2 nīcenātmāpacāreṇa kulaṃ tena vinaśyati ||7763-1 eko hi khañjanavaro nalinīdalastho dṛṣṭaḥ karoti caturaṅgabalādhipatyaṃ |  7763-2 kiṃ me kariṣyati bhavadvadanāravinde jānāmi no nayanakhañjanayugmametat ||7764-1 eko hi doṣo guṇasaṃnipāte nimajjatītyetadayuktamuktaṃ |  7764-2 rūpādikānsarvaguṇānnihanti kiṃ maurkhyamekaṃ na śarīrabhājāṃ ||7765-1 eko hi doṣo guṇasaṃnipāte nimajjatīndoḥ kiraṇeṣvivāṅkaḥ |  7765-2 kenāpi nūnaṃ kavinā ca dṛṣṭaṃ dāridryamekaṃ guṇarāśināśi ||7766-1 eko hyamātyo medhāvī śūro dānto vicakṣaṇaḥ |  7766-2 rājānaṃ rājaputraṃ vā prāpayenmahatīṃ śriyaṃ ||7767-1 eṇaḥ krīḍati śūkaraśca khanati dvīpī ca garvāyate kroṣṭā krandati valgate ca śaśako vegādrururdhāvati |  7767-2 niḥśaṅkaḥ karipotakastarulatāmunmoṭate līlayā haṃho siṃha vinā tvayādya vipine kīdṛgdaśā vartate ||7768-1 eṇaśreṇiḥ śaśakanikaraḥ śallakīnāṃ kadambaṃ kolavyūhaḥ spṛśati sukhitāṃ yatra tatrāpi kuñje |  7768-2 ko nāmāsminbata hatavane pādapastādṛguccair yasya cchāyāmayamadhivasatyuṣṇarugṇo gajendraḥ ||7769-1 eṇākṣīspṛhayālutā na kathamapyāste vivekodayān nityaṃ pracyutiśaṅkayā kṣaṇamapi svarge na modāmahe |  7769-2 apyanyeṣu vināśivastuviṣayābhogeṣu tṛṣṇā na me svarṇadyāḥ puline paraṃ haripadadhyānaṃ samīhāmahe ||7770-1 eṇādyāḥ paśavaḥ kirātapariṣannaiṣā guṇagrāhiṇī saṃcāro'pi na nāgarasya viṣayocchinnaṃ munīnāṃ manaḥ |  7770-2 dhūmenaiva sugandhinā pratipadaṃ dikcakramāmodayan āmūlaṃ paridahyate'gurutaruḥ kasmai kimācakṣmahe ||7771-1 eṇīgaṇeṣu gurugarvanimīlitākṣaḥ kiṃ kṛṣṇasāra khalu khelasi kānane'smin |  7771-2 sīmāmimāṃ kalaya bhinnakarīndrakumbha- muktāmayīṃ harivihāravasundharāyāḥ ||7772-1 eṇīdṛśaḥ pāṇipuṭe niruddhā veṇī vireje śayanotthitāyāḥ |  7772-2 sarojakośādiva niṣpatantī śreṇī ghanībhūya madhuvratānāṃ ||7773-1 eṇīdṛśaḥ śravaṇasīmni yadānayanti tenaiva tasya mahimā navacampakasya |  7773-2 tvaṃ tatra no viharase yadi bhṛṅga tena naitasya kiṃcidapi tattu tavaiva hāniḥ ||7774-1 eṇīdṛśo vijayate veṇī pṛṣṭhāvalambinī |  7774-2 kaśeva pañcabāṇasya yuvatarjanahetave ||7775-1 eṇī yāti vilokya bālaśalabhānśaṣpāṅkurāditsayā chatrīkuḍmalakāni rakṣati cirādaṇḍabhramādkukkuṭī |  7775-2 dhūtvā dhāvati kṛṣṇakīṭapaṭalaśreṇīṃ śikhaṇḍī śiro dūrādeva vanāntare viṣadharagrāsābhilāṣāturaḥ ||7776-1 eṇīśābavilocanābhiralasaśroṇībharaprauḍhi bhir veṇībhūtarasakramābhirabhitaḥ śreṇīkṛtābhirvṛtaḥ |  7776-2 pāṇī nāma vinodayanratipatestūṇīśayaiḥ sāyakair vāṇīnāmapadaṃ paraṃ vrajajanakṣoṇīpatiḥ pātu naḥ ||7777-1 eṇo gajaḥ pataṅgaśca bhṛṅgo mīnastu pañcamaḥ |  7777-2 śabdasparśarūpagandharasairete hatāḥ khalu ||7778-1 etacca tapaso mūlaṃ tapaso mūlameva ca |  7778-2 sarvadā kāmavijayaḥ saṃkalpavijayastathā ||7779-1 etaccaturguṇaṃ tailaṃ tasmāccāpi caturguṇaṃ |  7779-2 kāṃjikaṃ prakṣipeddhīmāṃstatastailaṃ vipācayet ||7780-1 etacchāntavicitracatvarapathaṃ viśrāntavaitālika-ślāghāślokamaguñjimañjumurajaṃ vidhvastagītadhvani |  7780-2 vyāvṛttādhyayanaṃ nivṛttasukavikrīḍāsamasyaṃ namad- vidvadvādapathaṃ kathaṃ puramidaṃ maunavrate vartate ||7781-1 etacchāstrārthatattvaṃ tu mayākhyātaṃ tavānagha |  7781-2 aviśvāso narendrāṇāṃ aparaṃ guhyamucyate ||7782-1 etajjaḍājaḍavivecanametadeva kṣityāditattvapariśodhanakauśalaṃ ca |  7782-2 jñānaṃ ca śaivamidamāgamakoṭilabhyaṃ māturyadaṅghriyugale nihito mayātmā||7783-1 etatkarālakaravālanikṛttakaṇṭha- nāloccaladbahulaphenilabudbudaughaiḥ |  7783-2 sārdhaṃ ḍamaḍḍamaruḍāṃkṛtihūtabhūta- vargeṇa bhargagṛhiṇīṃ rudhirairdhin_oṃi||7784-1 etatkavīndramukhacandramasaḥ kadācithkāvyābhidhānamamṛtaṃ yadi nāgaliṣyat |  7784-2 saṃsāriṇāṃ vividhaduḥkhasahasrabhājāṃ cetovinodasadanaṃ kimihābhaviṣyat ||7785-1 etatkāntamidaṃ kāntaṃ ityāvasathatṛṣṇayā |  7785-2 tasyā bhramati sarvāṅgaṃ manye mūḍha iva smaraḥ ||7786-1 etatkāmaphalaṃ loke yaddvayorekacittatā |  7786-2 anyacittakṛte kāme śavayoriva saṃgamaḥ ||7787-1 etatkāryamamarāḥ saṃśrutaṃ me dhṛtiḥ śamaḥ satyadharmānuvṛttiḥ |  7787-2 granthiṃ vinīya hṛdayasya sarvaṃ priyāpriye cātmavaśaṃ nayīta ||7787ā-1 etatkiṃ nanu karṇabhūṣaṇamayaṃ hāraḥ sukāñcī navā baddhā kācidiyaṃ tvayādya tilakaḥ ślāghyaḥ priye kalpitaḥ |  7787ā-2 pratyaṅgaṃ spṛśateti tatkṣaṇabhavadr_oṃāñcamālāñcitā tanvī mānamupekṣayaiva śanakairdhūrtena saṃmocitā ||7788-1 etatkiṃ praṇayinyapi praṇayinī yanmāninī jāyate manye mānavidhau bhaviṣyati sukhaṃ kiṃcidviśiṣṭaṃ rasāt |  7788-2 vāñchā tasya sukhasya me'pi hṛdaye jāgarti nityaṃ paraṃ svapne'pyeṣa na me'parādhyati patiḥ kupyāmi tasmai kathaṃ ||7789-1 etatkiṃ śrutasadṛśaṃ tvadvratayogyaṃ kulānurūpaṃ vā |  7789-2 kṛtavānasi yatsumate paribhūtaguṇodayaṃ karma ||7790-1 etatkīrtivivartadhautanikhilatrailokyanirvāsitair viśrāntiḥ kalitā kathāsu jagatāṃ śyāmaiḥ samagrairapi |  7790-2 jajñe kīrtimayādaho bhayabharairasmādakīrteḥ punaḥ sā yannāsya kathāpathe'pi malinacchāyā babandha sthitiṃ ||7791-1 etatkucaspardhitayā dhaṭasya khyātasya śāstreṣu nidarśanatvaṃ |  7791-2 tasmācca śilpānmaṇikādikārī prasiddhanāmājani kumbhakāraḥ ||7792-1 etatkṛtvā priyamanucitaprārthanāvartmano me sauhārdādvā vidhura iti vā mayyanukrośabuddhyā |  7792-2 iṣṭāndeśānvicara jalada prāvṛṣā saṃbhṛtaśrīr mā bhūdevaṃ kṣaṇamapi ca te vidyutā viprayogaḥ ||7793-1 etatkokakuṭumbinījanamanaḥśalyaṃ cakorāṅganā-cañcūkoṭikapāṭayorghaṭitayorudghāṭinī kuñcikā |  7793-2 dagdhasyāpi navāṅkuraḥ smaratarorārdrāgasāṃ preyasī-mānoddāmagajāṅkuśo vijayate mugdhaṃ sudhāṃśorvapuḥ ||7794-1 etattaddurjayaṃ loke putradāramayaṃ viṣaṃ |  7794-2 jāyante ca mriyante ca yatpītvā mohitāḥ prajāḥ ||7795-1 etattaddhṛtarāṣṭravaktrasadṛśaṃ meghāndhakāraṃ nabho hṛṣṭo saroruhavanaśrīkelikārāḥ karāḥ ||7798-1 etattarkaya cakravākahṛdayāśvāsāya tārāgaṇa- grāsāya sphuradindumaṇḍalaparīhāsāya bhāsāṃ nidhiḥ |  7798-2 dikkāntākucakumbhakuṅkumarajonyāsāya paṅkeruho- aṅgulyagralaghukriyāpravilayinyādīyamāne śanais kutroḍḍīya gato mametyanudinaṃ nidrāti nāntaḥśucā ||7800-1 etattu māṃ dahati yadgṛhamasmadīyaṃ kṣīṇārthamityatithayaḥ parivarjayanti|  7800-2 tataḥ pāthodāḥ paripūrayanti jagatīṃ ruddhāmbarā vāribhiḥ |  7852-2 asmānmandarakūṭakoṭighaṭanābhītibhramattārakāṃ prāpyaikāṃ jalamānuṣīṃ tribhuvane śrīmānabhūdacyutaḥ ||7853-1 etasmātkathamindrajālamaparaṃ strīgarbhavāso'sthiraṃ retaḥ ścyotati mastamastakapadāvirbhūtanānāṅkuraṃ |  7853-2 paryāyeṇa śiśutvayauvanajarāveṣairaśeṣairvṛtaṃ paśyatyatti śṛṇoti jighrati muhurnidrāti jāgarti ca ||7854-1 etasmātparamānandācśuddhacinmātrarūpiṇaḥ |  7854-2 jīvaḥ saṃjāyate pūrvaṃ tasmāccittaṃ tato jagat ||7855-1 etasmātsarasaścirāya calitaṃ cakreṇa cetasvatā nīrakṣīraparīkṣakeṇa sudhiyā haṃsena hā nirgataṃ |  7855-2 niryātaṃ nibhṛtaṃ kaladhvanikṛtā kāraṇḍavena kvacithsārdhaṃ kena karotu sārasayuvā saṃbhāṣaṇaṃ savyathaḥ ||7856-1 etasmādamṛtaṃ suraiḥ śatamakhenoccaiḥśravāḥ sadguṇaḥkṛṣṇenādbhutavikramaikavasatirlakṣmīḥ samāsāditā |  7856-2 ityādi pracurāḥ purātanakathāḥ sarvebhya eva śrutā asmābhistu na dṛṣṭamatra jaladhau miṣṭaṃ payo'pi kvacit ||7857-1 etasmādviramendriyārthagahanādāyāsakādāśrayāchśrey_oṃārgamaśeṣaduḥkhaśamanavyāpāradakṣaṃ kṣaṇāt |  7857-2 śāntaṃ bhāvamupaihi saṃtyaja nijāṃ kallolalolāṃ gatiṃ mā bhūyo bhaja bhaṅgurāṃ bhavaratiṃ cetaḥ prasīdādhunā ||7858-1 etasmānmāṃ kuśalinamabhijñānadānādviditvā mā kaulīnādasitanayane mayyaviśvāsinī bhūḥ |  7858-2 snehānāhuḥ kimapi virahe hrāsinaste hyabhogādiṣṭe vastunyupacitarasāḥ premarāśībhavanti ||7859-1 etasminkusume svabhāvamahati prāyo mahīyaḥ phalaṃ ramyaṃ svādu sugandhi śītalamalaṃ prāptavyamityāśayā |  7859-2 śālmalyāḥ paripākakālakalanābodhena kīraḥ sthitoyāvattatpuṭasaṃdhinirgatapatattūlaṃ phalātpaśyati ||7860-1 etasminghanacandanārdravapuṣo nidrākaṣāyekṣaṇālīlālolamṛdūllasadbhujalatāvyājṛmbhamāṇā muhuḥ |  7860-2 nirgacchanti śanairahaḥpariṇatau mandā latāmandirāthsvedāmbhaḥkaṇadanturastanataṭābhogāḥ kuraṅgīdṛśaḥ ||7861-1 etasminghanabaddhasampadi vanotsaṅge navāptoṣmabhiḥ svacchandaṃ gamitaḥ sukhena katibhiḥ kālo na dantāvalaiḥ |  7861-2 dhigjāto'si tadātra dagdhasamaye dantinyadā nodakaṃ no vṛkṣā na tṛṇāni kevalamayaṃ dāvānalaḥ krīḍati ||7862-1 etasmindākṣiṇāśānilacalitalatālīnamattālimālā-pakṣakṣobhāvadhūtacyutabahalarajohlādihṛdye vasante |  7862-2 premasvedārdrabāhuślathavalayaraṇatprauḍhasīmantinīnāṃ mandaḥ kaṇṭhagraho'pi glapayati hṛdayaṃ kiṃ punarviprayogaḥ ||7863-1 etasmindivasasya madhyasamaye vāto'pi caṇḍātapa- trāseneva na saṃcaratyahimagorbimbe lalāṭaṃtape |  7863-2 kiṃ cānyatparitaptadhūliluṭhanaploṣāsahatvādiva cchāyā mahāsarasyaḥ ||7865-1 etasminnavadātakāntini kucadvandve kuraṅgīdṛśaḥsaṃkrāntapratibimbamaindavamidaṃ dvedhā vibhaktaṃ vapuḥ |  7865-2 ānandottaralasya  7869-2 na trastaṃ na palāyitaṃ na calitaṃ notkaṇṭhitaṃ notplutaṃ mṛgyā yadvaśinaṃ karoti dayitaṃ kāmo'yamityāśayā ||7870-1 etasminvanamārgabhūparisare saundaryamudrāṅkitaḥ prodyadbhiḥ ||7872-1 etasminvipine mayā balavatā nājñāpitāḥ ke mṛgāḥ kasmai vā na phalaṃ vikīrṇamucitaṃ roṣasya toṣasya ca |  7872-2 so'haṃ mūṣakamadya bandhanaguṇacchedārthamabhyarthaye nāsthāṃ so'pi karoti |  7881-2 yāmāgatā duritapūritacetaso'pi pāpaṃ nirasya cirajaṃ virajībhavanti ||7882-1 etasyāṃ rativallabhakṣitipateḥ krīḍāsarasyāṃ śanaiḥ saṃśoṣaṃ nayatīha śaiśavavadhūstāruṇyatigmadyutiḥ | niḥśaktīkṛtacandanauṣadhividhāvasmiṃścamatkāriṇo lājasphoṭamamī sphuṭanti maṇayo viśve'pi hārasrajāṃ ||7887-1 etasyonnatasarvakarmakṛtinastrailokyacūḍāmaṇeḥśaṃbhubrahmapuraṃdaraprabhṛtayaḥ stutyai ||7915-1 etāni sarvadā tasya na jāyante tataḥ paraṃ |  7915-2 strīsaṅgaṃ varjayedyatnādbinduṃ rakṣetprayatnataḥ |  7915-3 āyuḥkṣayo bindunāśādasāmarthyaṃ ca jāyate ||7916-1 etānguṇāṃstāta vibhānti rāmamāsādya vāridhārā vaṣaṃ yathā ||7923-1 etāvacchakyamasmābhirvaktuṃ tvaṃ guṇavāniti |  7923-2 ratnākarasya ratnaughaparicchede tu ke vayaṃ ||7924-1 etāvajjanmasāphalyaṃ dehināmiha
