nanvanumeyaśobhi kāñcīguṇasthānamaninditāyāḥ |  7926-2 āropitaṃ yadgiriśena paścādananyanārīkamanīyamaṅkaṃ ||7927-1 etāvataiva kāryeṇa manyadhvaṃ no kṛtārthatāṃ |  7927-2 kartavyānāṃ parā kāṣṭhā nedānīṃ vidyate khalu ||7928-1 etāvatsarasi saroruhasya kṛtyaṃ bhittvāmbhaḥ sapadi bahirvinirgataṃ yat |  7928-2 saurabhyaṃ vikasanamindirānivāsas tatsarvaṃ dinakarakṛtyamāmananti ||7929-1 etāvadeva paryāptaṃ bhikṣorekāntaśāyinaḥ |  7929-2 na tasya mriyate kaścinmriyate so'sya kasyacit ||7930-1 etāvadeva hi phalaṃ paryāptaṃ jñānasattvayuktasya |  7930-2 yadyāpatsu na muhyati nābhyudaye vismito bhavati ||7931-1 etāvantaṃ samayamanayaḥ kesarotsaṅgaraṅgī hṛdbhṛṅgīnāṃ satatamaharastvaṃ saraḥsaṃcareṣu |  7931-2 daivādasminmadhupa nipatankānane ketakīnāṃ etāṃ dīnāmanubhava daśāṃ kīlitaḥ kaṇṭakeṣu ||7932-1 etāvānavyayo dharmaḥ puṇyaślokairupāsitaḥ |  7932-2 yo bhūtaśokaharṣābhyāṃ ātmā śocati hṛṣyati ||7933-1 etāvāneva puruṣaḥ kṛtaṃ yasminna naśyati |  7933-2 yāvacca kuryādanyo'sya kuryādbahuguṇaṃ tataḥ ||7934-1 etāvāneva puruṣo yajjāyātmā prajeti ha |  7934-2 viprāḥ prāhustathā caitadyo bhartā sā smṛtāṅganā ||7935-1 etāvāneva puruṣo yadamarṣī yadakṣamī |  7935-2 kṣamavānniramarṣaśca naiva strī na punaḥ punaḥ ||7936-1 etāścatuṣṭayakalā dvātriṃśatkramadhṛtāḥ samastā vā |  7936-2 saṃsāravañcakānāṃ vidyā vidyāvatāmeva ||7937-1 etāścandrodaye'sminnaviralamuśalotkṣepadolāyamāna-snigdhaśyāmāgrapīnastanakalasanamatkaṇṭhanālāgraramyāḥ |  7937-2 udvelladbāhuvallīpracalitavalayaśreṇayaḥ pāmarāṇāṃ gehinyo dīrghagītidhvanijanitasukhāstaṇḍulānkaṇḍayanti ||7938-1 etāścaladvalayasaṃhatimekhalottha- jhaṃkāranūpuraravāhṛtarājahaṃsyaḥ |  7938-2 kurvanti kasya na mano vivaśaṃ taruṇyovitrastamugdhahariṇīsadṛśākṣipātaiḥ ||7939-1 etāsu ketakilatāsu vikāsinīṣu saubhāgyamadbhutataraṃ bhavatī bibharti |  7939-2 yatkaṇṭakairvyathitamātmavapurna jānaṃs tvāmeva sevitumupakramate dvirephaḥ ||7940-1 etāstā divasāntabhāskaradṛśo dhāvanti paurāṅganāḥskandhapraskhaladaṃśukāñcaladhṛtivyāsaṅgabaddhādarāḥ |  7940-2 prātaryātakṛṣīvalāgamabhiyā protplutya vartmacchidohaṭṭakrītapadārthamūlyakalanavyagrāṅguligranthayaḥ ||7941-1 etāstā malayopakaṇṭhasaritāmeṇākṣi rodhobhuvaścāpābhyāsaniketanaṃ bhagavataḥ preyo manojanmanaḥ |  7941-2 yāsu śyāmaniśāsu pītatamaso muktāmayīścandrikāḥ pīyante vivṛtordhvacañcu vicalatkaṇṭhaṃ cakorāṅganāḥ ||7942-1 etāstu nirghṛṇatvena nirdayatvena nityaśaḥ |  7942-2 viśeṣājjāḍyakṛtyena dūṣayanti kulatrayaṃ ||7943-1 etā hasanti ca rudanti ca kāryahetor viśvāsayanti ca paraṃ na ca viśvasanti |  7943-2 tasmānnareṇa kulaśīlasamanvitena nāryaḥ śmaśānaghaṭikā iva varjanīyāḥ ||7944-1 ete karburitātapāstata itaḥ saṃjāyamānāmbuda- cchedaiḥ saṃprati ketakīdalamiladdarbhātitheyodayāḥ |  7944-2 grāmāntodgataśālibījayavasāśleṣaprahṛṣyanmano-govāhāyatagītigarbhitadiśo ramyāḥ sakhe vāsarāḥ ||7945-1 ete kiṃ nanu satyameva taravaścañcatprasūnotkarāḥ kiṃ vā kānanavāṭikeyamanaghāyasyāmamī kokilāḥ |  7945-2 citraṃ kutra tirohitā marudharā sā yatra me pattanaṃ nānānirjharavaibhavaṃ kuta idaṃ sadyaḥ samunmīlitaṃ ||7946-1 ete kūrcakacāḥ sakaṅkaṇaraṇatkarṇāṭasīmantinī- hastākarṣaṇalālitāḥ pratidinaṃ prāptāḥ parāmunnatiṃ |  7946-2 te'mī saṃprati pāpināpitakarabhrāmyatkṣuraprānana- kṣuṇṇāḥ kṣoṇitale patanti paritaḥ këptāparādhā iva ||7947-1 ete ketakadhūlidhūsararucaḥ śītadyuteraṃśavaḥ prāptāḥ saṃprati paścimasya jaladhestīraṃ jarājarjarāḥ |  7947-2 apyete vikasatsaroruhavanīdṛkpātasaṃbhāvitāḥ prācīrāgamudīrayanti taraṇestāruṇyabhājaḥ karāḥ ||7948-1 ete ketakasūcisaurabhajuṣaḥ paurapragalbhāṅganā-vyālolālakavallarīvilulanavyājopabhuktānanāḥ |  7948-2 kiṃconnidrakadambakuḍmalakuṭīdhūlīluṭhatṣaṭpada- vyūhavyāhṛtihāriṇo virahiṇaḥ karṣanti varṣānilāḥ ||7949-1 ete'kṣṇorjanayanti kāmavirujaṃ sītāviyoge ghanā vātāḥ śīkariṇo'pi lakṣmaṇa dṛḍhaṃ saṃtāpayantyeva māṃ |  7949-2 itthaṃ vṛddhaparaṃparāpariṇatairyasminvacobhirmunīn adyāpyunmanayanti kānanaśukāḥ so'yaṃ girirmālyavān ||7950-1 ete candraśilāsamuccayamayāścandrātapaprasphurat-sarvāṅgīṇapayaḥpravṛttasarito jhātkurvate parvatāḥ |  7950-2 yeṣāmunmadajāgarūkaśikhini prasthe namerusthitāḥ śyāmā meghagabhīragadgadagiraḥ krandanti koyaṣṭayaḥ ||7951-1 ete cāṃśakalāḥ puṃsaḥ kṛṣṇastu bhagavānsvayaṃ |  7951-2 indrārivyākulaṃ lokaṃ mṛḍayanti yuge yuge ||7952-1 ete cānye ca bahavaḥ prayogāḥ pāradārikāḥ |  7952-2 deśe deśe pravartante rājabhiḥ saṃpravartitāḥ ||7952-1 na tvevaitānprayuñjīta rājā lokahite rataḥ |  7952-2 nigṛhītāriṣaḍvargastathā vijayate mahīṃ ||7954-1 ete cānye ca bahavo doṣāḥ prādurbhavantyuta |  7954-2 nṛpatau mārdavopete harṣule ca yudhiṣṭhira ||7955-1 ete cāpīndratulyāḥ kṣitipatitanayā bhīmasenārjunādyāḥ śūrāḥ satyapratijñā dinakararucayaḥ keśavenopagūḍhāḥ |  7955-2 te dṛṣṭā pātrahastā jagati kṛpaṇavadbhaikṣacaryānuyātāḥ kaḥ śakto bhālapaṭṭe vidhikaralikhitāṃ karmarekhāṃ pramārṣṭuṃ ||7956-1 ete cūtamahīruho'pyaviralairdhūmāyitāḥ ṣaṭpadair ete prajvalitāḥ sphuṭatkisalayodbhedairaśokadrumāḥ |  7956-2 ete kiṃśukaśākhino'pi malinairaṅgāritāḥ kuḍmalaiḥ kaṣṭaṃ viśramayāmi kutra nayane sarvatra vāmo vidhiḥ ||7957-1 ete jīrṇakulāyajālajaṭilāḥ pāṃsūtkarākarṣiṇaḥśākhākampavihastaduḥsthavihagānākampayantastarūn |  7957-2 helāndolitanartitojjhitahatavyāghaṭṭitonmūlita-protkṣiptabhramitaiḥ prapāpaṭalakaiḥ krīḍanti jhañjhānilāḥ ||7958-1 ete te girikūṭasaṃghaṭaśilāsaṃghaṭṭaśīrṇāmbhasaḥpreṅkhaccāmaracārusīkarakaṇasmerā darīnirjharāḥ |  7958-2 yatpāteṣu nikuñjakuñjaramukhabhraśyanmṛṇālāṅkura-grāsodgranthitaṭaṃ raṭanti paritaḥ kaṇṭhīravā bhairavaṃ ||7959-1 ete te divasā viyogiguravaḥ pūrollasatsindhavovindhyaśyāmapayodanīlanabhaso nīpārjunāmodinaḥ |  7959-2 āsannaprasavālasāṃ sahacarīmālokya nīḍārthinīṃ cañcuprāntakiliñjasaṃcayaparaḥ kāko'pi yeṣvākulaḥ ||7960-1 ete te divasāsta eva taravastāśca pragalbhastriyas taccaivāmravanaṃ sakokilarutaṃ seyaṃ sacandrā niśā |  7960-2 vātaḥ so'pi ca dakṣiṇo dhṛtiharaḥ so'yaṃ vasantānilo hā tāruṇya vinā tvayādya sakalaṃ pālālabhārāyate ||7961-1 ete te duratikramakramamiladdharmormimarmacchidaḥ kādambena rajobhareṇa kakubho rundhanti jañjhānilāḥ |  7961-2 gāḍhārambhaniruddhanīradaghaṭāsaṃghaṭṭanīlībhavad-vy_oṃakroḍakaṭāhapātukapayoveṇīkaṇagrāhiṇaḥ ||7962-1 ete te purato marusthalabhuvaḥ proccaṇḍadāvānala-jvālālīḍhakaṭhorasūrakiraṇapluṣṭacchadāḥ śākhinaḥ |  7962-2 tānetānavadhīrya khinnavapuṣo duḥśīlajhañjhānila- krīḍābhirna payoda gantumucitaṃ velābhiṣiktadrumān ||7963-1 ete te malayādrikandarajuṣastacchākhiśākhāvalī-līlātāṇḍavasaṃpradānaguravaścetobhuvo bāndhavāḥ |  7963-2 cūtonmattamadhuvratapraṇayinīhuṅkārajhaṅkāriṇo hā kaṣṭaṃ prasaranti pānthayuvatījīvadruho vāyavaḥ ||7964-1 ete tvadvadanānukārirucayo rākāsudhāṃśvādayo nītvā te smaraṇaṃ dahanti bata māmantaḥsphurantyāstava |  7964-2 tvaṃ svāminyasi tajjahīhi jahi vā nedaṃ punaḥ sāṃprataṃ yatsvaspardhibhireva mardayasi māmetairjaghanyaiḥ priye ||7965-1 ete daridraśiśavastanujīrṇakanthāṃ skandhe nidhāya malināṃ pulakākulāṅgāḥ |  7965-2 sūryasphuratkarakarambitabhittideśa- lābhāya śītasamaye kalimācaranti ||7966-1 etena baddhabalinā saṃkocamavāpya vṛddhadehena |  7966-2 yātaṃ hariṇeva mayā dvitrāṇi padāni kṛcchreṇa ||7967-1 ete nartitamaulayo guṇagaṇaprastāvanābhirmaṇer jāyantāṃ vaṇijo vayaṃ tu kanaka tvatkīrtivaitālikāḥ |  7967-2 te cāmlānamukhena hanta bhavatā dāhacchidā vedanāṃ aṅgīkṛtya narendraśekharasukhāsīnāḥ kriyante yataḥ ||7968-1 ete nīvāravaprāḥ pṛthukusumasamitpārvataḥ kandaro'yaṃ devīyaṃ jahnuputrī sikatilaśayitaḥ śāntaniḥśaṅkaraṅkaḥ |  7968-2 kāntāre darbhadūrvācayaśucini vacaḥ smārtamāvartayanti brahmāṇo durvipākagrahagahanatayā yāminījāgarūkāḥ ||7969-1 ete nūtanacūtakorakaghanagrāsātirekībhavat- kaṇṭhadhvānajuṣo haranti hṛdayaṃ madhyevanaṃ kokilāḥ |  7969-2 yeṣāmakṣinibhena bhānti bhagavadbhūteśanetrānala-jvālājālakarālitāsamaśarāṅgārasphuliṅgā ime ||7970-1 etenotkṛttakaṇṭhapratisubhaṭanaṭārabdhanāṭyādbhutānāṃ kaṣṭaṃ draṣṭaiva nābhūdbhuvi samarasamālokilokāspade'pi |  7970-2 aśvairasvairavegaiḥ kṛtakhurakhuralīmaṅkṣuvikṣudyamāna-kṣmāpṛṣṭhottiṣṭhadandhaṃkaraṇaraṇa dhurāreṇudhārāndhakārāt ||7971-1 ete pañcadaśānarthā hyarthamūlā matā nṛṇāṃ |  7971-2 tasmādanarthamarthākhyaṃ śreyo'rthī dūratastyajet ||7972-1 bhidyante bhrātaro dārāḥ pitaraḥ suhṛdastathā |  7972-2 ekāsnigdhāḥ kākiṇinā sadyaḥ sarve'rayaḥ kṛtāḥ ||7973-1 arthenālpīyasā hyete saṃrabdhā dīptamanyavaḥ |  7973-2 tyajantyāśuspṛdho ghnanti sahasotsṛjya sauhṛdaṃ ||7974-1 ete pallipurandhrinirbharajalakrīḍāhṛtāmbhaḥkaṇa-kṣodakṣālitalagnapānthavanitāniḥśvāsatīvrātapāḥ |  7974-2 vānti svairavihārakuñjarakaracchidrodarāghūrṇana-prārabdhoccamṛdaṅganādamukharāstāpīnikuñjānilāḥ ||7975-1 ete pallīparivṛḍhavadhūprauḍhakandarpakeli-kliśyatpīnastanaparisarasvedasaṃpadvipakṣāḥ |7980-1 ete mekalakanyakāpraṇayinaḥ pātālamūlaspṛśaḥ saṃtrāsaṃ janayanti vindhyabhidurā vārāṃ pravāhāḥ puraḥ |  7980-2 līlonmūlitanartitapratihatavyāvartitaprerita-tyaktasvīkṛtanihnutapracalitaproddhūtatīradrumāḥ ||7981-1 ete lakṣmaṇa jānakīvirahiṇaṃ māṃ khedayantyambudā marmāṇīva ca ghaṭṭayantyalamamī krūrāḥ kadambānilāḥ |  7981-2 itthaṃ vyāhṛtapūrvajanmaviraho yo rādhayā vīkṣitaḥ serṣyaṃ śaṅkitayā sa vaḥ sukhayatu svapnāyamāno hariḥ ||7982-1 ete vayaṃ tanudhanāḥ kṛpaṇeyamurvī dīnāḥ śataṃ mṛdu ca vistarayanti vācaḥ|  7982-2 tadbhrātaraḥ śakunipheravasārameyā ḍhaukadhvametadahaha sphuṭatu kṣaṇena ||7983-1 ete vayamamī dārāḥ kanyeyaṃ kulajīvitaṃ |  7983-2 brūta yenātra vaḥ kāryaṃ anāsthā bāhyavastuṣu ||7984-1 ete vaśyakaropāyā durjane niṣphalāḥ smṛtāḥ |  7984-2 tatsaṃnidhiṃ tyajetprājñaḥ śaktastaṃ daṇḍato jayet |  7984-3 chalabhūtaistu tadrūpairupāyairebhireva vā ||7985-1 ete vāmavilocanākucasakhaiḥ soḍhavyaśītārtayaḥ prāptāḥ paścimasaindhavasya marutaḥ premacchido vāsarāḥ |  7985-2 yatrāpāsya purāṇapaṅkajamayaṃ devaḥ saśṛṅgārabhūr ādatte navakundakuḍmalaśikhānirmāṇamanyaddhanuḥ ||7986-1 ete vārikaṇānkiranti puruṣānvarṣanti nāmbhodharāḥ śailāḥ śādvalamudvamanti na vamantyete punarnāyakān |  7986-2 trailokye taravaḥ phalāni suvate naivārabhante janān dhātaḥ kātaramālapāmi kulaṭāhetostvayā kiṃ kṛtaṃ ||7987-1 ete vaiyākaraṇapaśavaḥ svīyamāyurvṛthaiva prājñaṃmanyāḥ śravaṇakaṭubhiḥ śabdajālaiḥ kṣipanti |  7987-2 śaśvatkāntādharamadhuratāvarṇanaṃ kurvatāṃ nas tvāśīrvādairiha sahṛdayāḥ pratyahaṃ vardhayante ||7988-1 ete vy_oṃani śoṣayanti hariṇatrāsācciraṃ cīvare saṃdhyākarmavidhau kamaṇḍalumime paśyanti riktaṃ bhṛtaṃ |  7988-2 bhikṣante ca phalānyamī karapuṭīpātreṇa cānokahān eṣāmarghavidhau ca saṃnidhigatāḥ puṣpyantyakāṇḍe latāḥ ||7989-1 ete śāradak_oṃudīkulabhuvaḥ kṣīrodadheḥ sodarāḥ śeṣāheḥ suhṛdo vinidrakumudaśreṇīmahaḥsrāviṇaḥ |  7989-2 śītāṃśoḥ sahapāṃśukhelanasakhāḥ svaḥsindhusaṃbandhinaḥ prāleyācalabandhavastava guṇāḥ kairneha karṇārpitāḥ ||7990-1 eteṣāṃ navacakrāṇāṃ ekaikaṃ dhyāyato muneḥ |  7990-2 siddhayo muktisahitāḥ karasthāḥ syurdine dine ||7991-1 eteṣāmanukūlo dakṣiṇadhṛṣṭau śaṭhaśceti |  7991-2 bhedacatuṣṭayameṣāṃ vadāmyudāharaṇamekaikaṃ ||7992-1 eteṣu hā taruṇamārutadhūyamāna- dāvānalaiḥ kavaliteṣu mahīruheṣu |  7992-2 ambho na cejjalada muñcasi mā vimuñca vajraṃ punaḥ kṣipasi nirdaya kasya hetoḥ ||7993-1 ete saṃtatabhṛjyamānacaṇakāmodapradhānā manaḥkarṣyantyūṣarasaṃniveśajaraṭhacchāyāḥ sthalīgrāmakāḥ |  7993-2 tāruṇyātiśayāgrapāmaravadhūsollāsahastagraha-bhrāmyatpīvarayantrakaghvanirasadgambhīragehodarāḥ ||7994-1 ete saṃprati vaimanasyamaniśaṃ niḥśaṅkamātanvatekāntārasthalapadminīparimalairānanditendindirāḥ |  7994-2 unmīlatsahakārakānanataṭīvācālapuṃskokila-dhvānākarṇanakāṃdiśīkapathikāvaskandino vāsarāḥ ||7995-1 ete samullasadbhāso rājante kundakorakāḥ |  7995-2 śītabhītā latākundaṃ āśritā iva tārakāḥ ||7996-1 ete snigdhatamā iti mā mā kṣudreṣu kuruta viśvāsaṃ |  7996-2 siddhārthānāmeṣāṃ sneho'pyaśrūṇi pātayati ||7997-1 ete hi kāmakalitāḥ parimalalīnālivalayahuṃkāraiḥ |  7997-2 sūcitadānāḥ kariṇo badhyante kṣipramabalābhiḥ ||7998-1 ete hi guṇāḥ paṅkaja santo'pi na te prakāśamāyānti |  7998-2 yallakṣmīvasatestava madhupairupabhujyate kośaḥ ||7999-1 ete hi jīvāścidbhāvā bhave bhāvanayā hitāḥ |  7999-2 brahmaṇaḥ kalitākārāḥ sahasrāyutakoṭiśaḥ ||8000-1 ete hi dehadāhādvirahā iva duḥsahā bhiṣajaḥ |  8000-2 grīṣmadivasā ivogrā bahutṛṣṇāḥ śoṣayantyeva ||8001-1 ete hi vidyudguṇabaddhakakṣā gajā ivānyonyamabhidravantaḥ |  8001-2 śakrājñayā vāridharāḥ sadhārā gāṃ rūpyarajjveva samuddharanti ||8002-1 ete hi samupāsīnā vihagā jalacāriṇaḥ |  8002-2 nāvagāhanti salilaṃ apragalbhā ivāhavabh ||8003-1 etaiḥ piṣṭatamālavarṇakanibhairāliptamambhodharaiḥ saṃsaktairupavījitaṃ surabhibhiḥ śītaiḥ pradoṣānilaiḥ |  8003-2 eṣāmbhodasamāgamapraṇayinī svacchandamabhyāgatā raktā kāntamivāmbaraṃ priyatamā vidyutsamāliṅgati ||8004-1 etairārdratamālapatramalinairāpītasūryaṃ nabho valmīkāḥ śaratāḍitā iva gajāḥ sīdanti dhārāhatāḥ |  8004-2 vidyutkāñcanadīpikeva racitā prāsādasaṃcāriṇī jyotsnā durbalabhartṛkeva vanitā protsārya meghairhṛtā ||8005-1 etaireva yadā gajendramalinairādhmātalambodarair garjadbhiḥ sataḍidbalākaśabalairmeghaiḥ saśalyaṃ manaḥ |  8005-2 tatkiṃ proṣitabhartṛvadhyapaṭaho hā hā hṛtāśo bakaḥ prāvṛṭprāvṛḍiti bravīti śaṭhadhīḥ kṣāraṃ kṣate prakṣipan ||8006-1 etairjahnusutājalairayamunābhinnairalagnāñjanair nārīṇāṃ nayanairakardamalavāliptairmṛṇālāṅkuraiḥ |  8006-2 hārairasphuradindranīlataralaiḥ kundairalīnālibhir velladbhirbhuvanaṃ vibhūṣitamidaṃ śītadyuteraṃśubhiḥ ||8007-1 etairjātaiḥ kimiha bahubhirbhogibhiḥ kiṃ tu manye mānyaḥ ko'pi prabhavati jagatyekaśeṣaḥ sa śeṣaḥ |  8007-2 yasmingaurīpṛthukucataṭīkuṅkumasthāsakāṅke yena sthāṇorurasi rahito hāravallīvilāsaḥ ||8008-1 etairdakṣiṇagandhavāhavalanaiḥ śrīkhaṇḍa kiṃ saurabhaṃ brūmaste parito madhuvratayuvā yenāyamānīyate |  8008-2 mākandādapahṛtya paṅkajavanāduddhūya kundodarādudbhrāmyaddvipagaṇḍamaṇḍalatalādākṛṣya hṛṣyanmanāḥ ||8009-1 etairyadi susnigdhair valmīkaiḥ parivṛtāstatastoyaṃ |  8009-2 hastaistribhiruttarataścaturbhirardhena ca narasya ||8010-1 etairyadyadsamādiṣṭaṃ śubhaṃ vā yadi vāśubhaṃ |  8010-2 kartavyaṃ niyataṃ bhītairapramattairbubhūṣubhiḥ ||8011-1 etau dvau daśakaṇṭhakaṇṭhakadalīkāntārakānticchida uvaidehīkucakumbhakuṅkumarajaḥsāndrāruṇāṅkāṅkitau |  8011-2 lokatrāṇavidhānasādhusavanaprārambhayūpau bhujau deyāstāmuruvikramau raghupateḥ śreyāṃsi bhūyāṃsi vaḥ ||8012-1 enaṃ vihāya tulasīvipinopakaṇṭhaṃ gopyaḥ paratra nayanāmbujamīlanāni |  8012-2 kurvantu kiṃtu tulasīdalanīlabhāsaṃ kā vā mukundamanuvindatu līnamasmin ||8013-1 enasānena tiryaksyādityādiḥ kā vibhīṣikā |  8013-2 rājilo'pi hi rājeva svaiḥ sukhī sukhahetubhiḥ ||8014-1 enāmamandamakarandavinidrabindu- saṃdohadohadapadaṃ nalinīṃ vimucya |  8014-2 he mugdha ṣaṭpada nirarthakarāgabhāji jātaṃ manastava japākusume kimatra ||8015-1 ebhirjitairjitaṃ sarvaṃ sarutena mahātmanā |  8015-2 smṛtvā vivarjayedetānṣaḍdoṣāṃśca mahīpatiḥ ||8016-1 ebhirdinaistu śiṣyāya guruḥ śastrāṇi dāpayet |  8016-2 saṃtarpya dānah_oṃābhyāṃ surānvedavidhānataḥ ||8017-1 ebhirnāśitayogāstu sakalā devayonayaḥ |  8017-2 upasargairmahāghorairāvartante punaḥ punaḥ ||8018-1 eraṇḍapattraśayanā janayantī svedamalaghujaghanataṭā |  8018-2 dhūlipuṭīva milantī smarajvaraṃ harati halikavadhūḥ ||8019-1 eraṇḍabījapratimaṃ aṅgaṃ yasminpratīyate |  8019-2 mahiṣākhyaḥ sa vai khaḍgo nīlameghasamacchaviḥ ||8020-1 eraṇḍabhiṇḍārkanalaiḥ prabhūtairapi saṃbhṛtaiḥ |  8020-2 dārukṛtyaṃ yathā nāsti tathā nājñaiḥ prayojanaṃ ||8021-1 elākaraṇaḍhekībhirvartanyā ḍūmaḍena ca |  8021-2 lambharāsaikatālībhiḥ śuddhasūḍo'ṣṭabhiḥ smṛtaḥ ||8022-1 evaṃ kadācinnarakaṃ svargaṃ yonyantarāṇyapi |  8022-2 prayānti jīvā mohena mohitā bhavasaṃkaṭe ||8023-1 evaṃ karaṇasāmarthyātsaṃyamyātmānamātmanā |  8023-2 nayāpanayavidrājā kurvīta hitamātmanaḥ ||8024-1 evaṃ kartuṃ va vaktuṃ ca yo jānāti chalapriyaḥ |  8024-2 sa karotu sa yātvevaṃ kartuṃ bhoktuṃ nijaṃ hitaṃ ||8025-1 evaṃ kukarma sarvasya phalatyātmani sarvadā |  8025-2 yo yadvapati bījaṃ hi labhate so'pi tatphalaṃ ||8026-1 tasmātparaviruddheṣu notsahante mahāśayāḥ |  8026-2 etaduttamasattvānāṃ vidhisiddhaṃ hi sadvrataṃ ||8027-1 evaṃ kuryātsamudayaṃ vṛddhiṃ cāyasya darśayet |  8027-2 hrāsaṃ vyayasya ca prājñaḥ sādhayecca viparyayaṃ ||8028-1 evaṃgatasya mama sāṃpratametadarhaṃ atredamaupayikamitthamidaṃ ca sādhyaṃ |  8028-2 asminpramāṇamidamityapi boddhumamba śaktirna me bhuvanasākṣiṇi kiṃ kar_oṃi ||8029-1 evaṃ ca bhāṣate lokaścandanaṃ kila śītalaṃ |  8029-2 putragātrasya saṃsparśaścandanādatiricyate ||8030-1 evaṃ cetsarasi svabhāvamahimā jāḍyaṃ kimetādṛśaṃ yasmādeva nisargataḥ saralatā kiṃ granthimattedṛśī |  8030-2 mūlaṃ cecśuci paṅkajaśrutiriyaṃ kasmādguṇā yadyamī kiṃ chidrāṇi sakhe mṛṇāla bhavatastattvaṃ na manyāmahe ||8031-1 evaṃ cedvidhinā kṛto'syupakṛtau kasyāṃcidapyakṣamaḥ kāmaṃ mopakṛthāstatastava maro vācyaṃ na dhīro bhava |  8031-2 kiṃ tvārānmṛgatṛṣṇayopajanayannambh_oṃucāṃ vañcanāṃ premṇā karṣasi tarṣamūrchitadhiyo'pyanyānataḥ śocyase ||8032-1 evaṃ corānacorākhyānvaṇikkārukuśīlavān |  8032-2 bhikṣukānkuhakāṃścānyānvārayeddeśapīḍanāt ||8033-1 evaṃ jaḍeṣu lokeṣu strīṣu mugdhāsu kā kathā |  8033-2 buddhihīnaprasādena jīvāmaḥ kevalaṃ vayaṃ ||8033ā-1 evaṃ jarā hanti ca nirviśeṣaṃ smṛtiṃ ca rūpaṃ ca parākramaṃ ca |  8033ā-2 na caiva saṃvegamupaiti lokaḥ pratyakṣato'pīdṛśamīkṣamāṇaḥ ||8034-1 evaṃjñātvā narendreṇa bhṛtyāḥ kāryā vicakṣaṇāḥ |  8034-2 kulīnāḥ śauryasaṃpannāḥ śaktā bhaktāḥ kramāgatāḥ ||8035-1 evaṃjñātvā mahābhāgāḥ puruṣeṇa vijānatā |  8035-2 divā tatkarma kartavyaṃ yena rātrau sukhaṃ svapet ||8036-1 evaṃ duravadhāryaiva gatiścittasya yoṣitāṃ |  8036-2 savairasyāvicārasya nīcaikābhimukhasya ca ||8037-1 evaṃ cātyaktaśīlānāṃ sasattvānāṃ jitakrudhāṃ |  8037-2 tuṣṭyaivācintitā eva svayamāyānti saṃpadaḥ ||8038-1 evaṃ devopahāsyatvaṃ loke gacchantyabuddhayaḥ |  8038-2 labhante nārthasaṃsiddhiṃ pūjyante tu subuddhayaḥ ||8039-1 evaṃ dravyaṃ dvipavanaṃ setubandhamathākarān |  8039-2 rakṣetpūrvakṛtānrājā navāṃścābhipravartayet ||8040-1 evaṃ nareśa vanitāhṛdaye kadācithkūṭādṛte vasati satyakathālavo'pi |  8040-2 tatsārthasādhyagamanāsu sadaiva tāsu śūnyāṭavīṣviva rameta na bhūtikāmaḥ ||8041-1 evaṃ na śaknuvantīha yattatkartumaśeṣataḥ |  8041-2 yathāśakti na tasyāṃśaṃ api kurvantyabuddhayaḥ ||8042-1 evaṃ niścitamabhyeti śubhameva śubhātmanāṃ |  8042-2 evaṃ cātikramo nāma kleśāya mahatāmapi ||8043-1 aviśvāsāspadaṃ caiva strīṇāṃ spṛśati nāśayaṃ |  8043-2 prāṇadānopakāro'pi kiṃ tāsāmanyaducyate ||8044-1 evaṃ nisargacapalā lalanā viveka- vairāgyadāyibahuduścaritaprabandhāḥ |  8044-2 sādhvī tu kācidapi tāsu kulaṃ viśālaṃ yālaṃkarotyabhinavā khamivendulekhā||8045-1 evaṃ nihatya saṃgrāme duṣṭaśatruṃ madoddhataṃ |  8045-2 jayatūryaninādena harṣayansubhaṭānsvakān ||8046-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  8046-2 evaṃ nojjhati mūḍho'rthānyāvadarthaiḥ sa nojjhitaḥ ||8047-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  8047-2 evaṃ paśuśca mūrkaśca nirvivekamatī samau ||8048-1 evaṃ putrāśca pautrāśca jñātayo bāndhavāstathā |  8048-2 teṣu sneho na kartavyo viprayogo hi tairdhruvaṃ ||8049-1 evaṃ prajñaiva paramaṃ balaṃ na tu parākramaḥ |  8049-2 yatprabhāveṇa nihataḥ śaśakenāpi kesarī ||8050-1 evaṃ prayatnaṃ kurvīta yānaśayyāsanāśane |  8050-2 sthāne prasādhane caiva sarvālaṅkārakeṣu ca ||8051-1 evaṃ phalati sarvasya vidhiḥ sattvānusārataḥ |  8051-2 tatsusattvo bhavetsattvahīnaṃ na vṛṇvate śriyaḥ ||8052-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  8052-2 evaṃ bahu kṣapayati svalpasyārthe dhanāndhadhīḥ ||8053-1 evaṃ bahūnapi ripūnsamarapravṛttān dveṣākulānagaṇitasvaparasvarūpān |  8053-2 eko'pyananyasamapauruṣabhagnasāra- darpajvarāñjayati saṃyugamūrdhni dhīraḥ ||8054-1 evaṃ buddheḥ paraṃ buddhvā saṃstabhyātmānamātmanā |  8054-2 jahi śatruṃ mahābāho kāmarūpaṃ durāsadaṃ ||8055-1 evaṃ bruvanti loke'tra dhanināṃ purataḥsthitāḥ |  8055-2 kulīnā api pāpānāṃ dṛśyante dhanalipsayā |  8055-3 daridrasya manuṣyasya kṣitau rājyaṃ prakurvataḥ ||8056-1 evaṃ bhavati loke'smindeva sarvasya sarvadā |  8056-2 prākkarmopārjitaṃ jantoḥ sarvameva śubhāśubhaṃ ||8057-1 evaṃ bhavanti veśyāḥ svārthaikaratā vyapetasadbhāvāḥ |  8057-2 abhilaṣitaviṣayasiddheḥ kā hānistadapi yuṣmākaṃ ||8058-1 evaṃ manaḥ karmavaśaṃ prayuṅkte avidyayātmanyupadhīyamāne |  8058-2 prītirna yāvanmayi vāsudeve na mucyate dehayogena tāvat ||8059-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  8059-2 evaṃ mūḍhaprabhurvetti nigrahaṃ nāpyanugrahaṃ ||8060-1 evaṃ mūḍhasya mūḍhatvaṃ svārthāndhasyāticitratā |  8060-2 ... ... ... ... ... ... ||8061-1 evaṃ mohaprabhavo rāgo na strīṣu kasya duḥkhāya |  8061-2 tāsveva vivekabhṛtāṃ bhavati virāgastu mokṣāya ||8062-1 evaṃ yathāha bhavatī mama sarvadoṣāḥ kaḥ svāminā kuvalayākṣi sahānubandhaḥ |  8062-2 eṣo'ñjalirviracitaḥ kuru nigrahaṃ me dāse'parādhavati ko'vasaraḥ kṣamāyāḥ ||8063-1 evaṃ lepatrayaṃ kuryātsaptame saptame'hani |  8063-2 tato janmāvadhi kacāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ syurbhramaraprabhāḥ ||8064-1 evaṃ lokaṃ paraṃ vidyānnaśvaraṃ karmanirmitaṃ |  8064-2 satulyātiśayadhvaṃsaṃ yathā maṇḍalavartināṃ ||8065-1 evaṃ vaśīkṛtasvātmā nityaṃ smitamukho bhavet |  8065-2 bhaṣaṇaṃ vimuñcet |  8069-2 saṃbhakṣya piṇḍaṃ sthiratāṃ gatasya ceṣṭādikaṃ tasya nirūpaṇīyaṃ ||8070-1 evaṃ vilokyāsya guṇānanekān samastapāpārinirāsadakṣān |  8070-2 viśuddhabodhā na kadācanāpi rakṣitacaritradhanā hi sādhvyaḥ |  8072-2 guptāḥ svasattvavibhavena mahattamena kalyāṇamādadhati patyurathātmanaśca ||8073-1 evaṃvṛttasya rājñastu śiloñchenāpi jīvataḥ |  8073-2 vistīryate yaśo loke tailabindurivāmbhasi ||8074-1 evaṃ vedhatrayaṃ kuryācśaṅkhadundubhiniḥsvanaiḥ |  8074-2 tataḥ praṇamya gurave dhanurbāṇānnivedayet ||8075-1 evaṃ śramavidhiṃ kuryādyāvatsiddhiḥ prajāyate |  8075-2 śrame siddhe ca varṣāsu naiva grāhyaṃ dhanuḥ kare ||8076-1 evaṃ saṃcintya manasā pretya karmaphalodayaṃ |  8076-2 manovākkarmabhirnityaṃ śubhaṃ karma samācaret ||8077-1 evaṃ santyeva deveha bhartṛbhaktāḥ kulāṅganāḥ |  8077-2 na punaḥ sarvathā sarvā durvṛttā eva yoṣitaḥ ||8078-1 evaṃ sarvaṃ vidhāyedaṃ itikartavyamātmanaḥ |  8078-2 yuktaścaivāpramattaśca parirakṣedimāḥ prajāḥ ||8079-1 evaṃ sarvajagadvilokya kalitaṃ durvāravīryātmanā nistriṃśena samastasattvasamitipradhvaṃsinā mṛtyunā |  8079-2 sadratnatrayaśātamārgaṇagaṇaṃ gṛhṇanti tacchittaye santaḥ śāntadhiyo jineśvaratapaḥ sāmrājyalakṣmīśritāḥ ||8080-1 evaṃ sarvajanānāṃ duḥkhakaraṃ jaṭharaśikhinamativiṣamaṃ |  8080-2 saṃtoṣajalairamalaiḥ śamayanti yatīśvarā ye te ||8081-1 evaṃ sarvamidaṃ kṛtvā yanmayāsāditaṃ śubhaṃ |  8081-2 tena syāṃ sarvasattvānāṃ sarvaduḥkhapraśāntikṛt ||8082-1 evaṃ sarvamidaṃ rājā saṃmantrya saha mantribhiḥ |  8082-2 vyāyamyāplutya madhyāhne bhoktumantaḥpuraṃ vrajet ||8083-1 evaṃ sarvātmanā kāryā rakṣā yogavidāniśaṃ |  8083-2 dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ śarīraṃ sādhanaṃ yataḥ ||8084-1 evaṃ sarveṣu bhūteṣu bhaktiravyabhicāriṇī |  8084-2 kartavyā paṇḍitairjñātvā sarvabhūtamayaṃ hariṃ ||8085-1 evaṃ sādhāraṇaṃ dehaṃ avyaktaprabhavāpyayaṃ |  8085-2 ko vidvānātmasātkṛtvā hanti jantūnṛte'sataḥ ||8086-1 evaṃ siddho bhavedyogī vañcayitvā vidhānataḥ |  8086-2 kālaṃ kalitasaṃsāraṃ pauruṣeṇādbhutena hi ||8087-1 evaṃ sthāpaya subhru bāhulatikāmevaṃ kuru sthānakaṃ nātyuccairnama kuñcayāgracaraṇau māṃ paśya tāvatkṣaṇaṃ |  8087-2 evaṃ nartayataḥ svavaktramurajenāmbhodharadhvāninā śaṃbhorvaḥ paripāntu nartitalayacchedāhatāstālikāḥ ||8088-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  8088-2 evaṃ svadoṣaḥ prakaṭo'pyajñairdeva na budhyate ||8089-1 evaṃ svabhāvaṃ jñātvāsāṃ prajāpatinisargajaṃ |  8089-2 paramaṃ yatnamātiṣṭhetpuruṣo rakṣaṇaṃ prati ||8090-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  8090-2 evaṃ hi kurute deva yoṣidīrṣyāniyantritā ||8091-1 ... ||8093-1 evamajñātahṛdayā mūrkhāḥ kṛtvā viparyayaṃ |  8093-2 ghnanti svārthaṃ parārthaṃ ca tādṛgdadati co'ttaraṃ ||8094-1 evamanekavidhaṃ vidadhāti yo jananārṇavapātanimittaṃ |  8094-2 ceṣṭitamaṅgajabāṇavibhinno neha sukhī na paratra sukhī saḥ ||8095-1 evamanyāyyayā buddhyā kṛtaṃ karmāśubhāvahaṃ |  8095-2 tasmāttannyāyyayā kuryādbakenāheḥ kṛtaṃ yathā ||8096-1 evamanyonyasaṃcāraṃ ṣaḍguṇyaṃ yo'nupaśyati |  8096-2 sa buddhinigalairbaddhairiṣṭaṃ krīḍati pārthivaiḥ ||8097-1 evamapāstamatiḥ kramato'tra puṣpadhanurdharavegavidhūtaḥ |  8097-2 kiṃ na jano labhate jananindyo duḥkhamasahyamanantamavācyaṃ ||8098-1 evamabhyāhate loke kālenābhinipīḍite |  8098-2 sumahaddhairyamālambya mano mokṣe niveśayet ||8099-1 evamalpaśruto mantrī kalyāṇābhijano'pyuta |  8099-2 dharmārthakāmasaṃyuktaṃ nālaṃ mantraṃ parīkṣituṃ ||8100-1 evamācārato dṛṣṭvā dharmasya munayo gatiṃ |  8100-2 sarvasya tapaso mūlaṃ ācāraṃ jagṛhuḥ paraṃ ||8101-1 evamāptavacanātsa pauruṣaṃ kākapakṣakadhare'pi rāghave |  8101-2 śraddadhe tridaśagopamātrake dāhaśaktimiva kṛṣṇavartmani ||8102-1 evamāli nigṛhītasādhvasaṃ śaṃkaro rahasi sevyatāmiti |  8102-2 sā sakhībhirupadiṣṭamākulā evamuttamajanmānastiryañco'pyāpadi priye |  8104-2 prabhuṃ nojjhanti mitraṃ vā tārayanti tataḥ punaḥ ||8105-1 hīnajātyudbhavā ye tu teṣāṃ spṛśati nāśayaṃ |  8105-2 kadācidapi sattvaṃ vā sneho vā cañcalātmanāṃ ||8106-1 evamupacīyamānaṃ stokaṃ stokaṃ vicinvataḥ puṇyaṃ |  8106-2 saṃpadyate viśālaṃ śrutimapyevaṃ tapo'pyevaṃ ||8107-1 evameva kriyāyuktā sarvasaubhāgyadāyinī |  8107-2 yasyaiṣā ca bhavedbhāryā devendro'sau na mānuṣaḥ ||8108-1 evameva nahi jīvyate khalāthtatra kā nṛpativallabhe kathā |  8108-2 pūrvameva hi suduḥsaho'nalaḥ kiṃ punaḥ prabalavāyuneritaḥ ||8109-1 evameva manuṣyeṣu teṣu pūrvāpakāriṣu |  8109-2 viśvāso nopagantavyo nadī gatajalā yathā ||8110-1 evameva hi yo'śvatthaṃ ropayedvidhinā naraḥ |  8110-2 yatra kutrāpi vā sthāne gacchetsa bhavanaṃ hareḥ ||8111-1 eṣa eva manastāpaḥ paṅke magnasya dantinaḥ |  8111-2 patate yatsamuddhartuṃ jñātayo nibhṛtasmitāḥ ||8112-1 eṣa krīḍāntatāmyatkusumapuravadhūvaktrasaurabhyabandhur mugdhaṃ nidrājaḍānāṃ rasitamanusarodrāghayansārasānāṃ |  8112-2 āvātyaṅgānukūlaścalitavicakilaśreṇigandhānudhāvad-rolambodghuṣyamāṇasmarajayabirudāḍambaro mātariśvā ||8113-1 eṣa kṣubhnāti paṅkaṃ dalati kamalinīmatti gundrāprarohān ārānmustāsthalāni sthapuṭayati jalānyutkasetūni yāti |  8113-2 prāptaḥ prāptaḥ praviṣṭo vanagahanamayaṃ yāti yātīti sainyaiḥpaścādanviṣyamāṇaḥ praviśati viṣamānkānanāntānvarāhaḥ ||8114-1 eṣa gajo'drimastakatale kalabhaparivṛtaḥ krīḍati vṛkṣagulmagahane kusumabharanate |  8114-2 megharavaṃ niśamya muditaḥ pavanajavasamaḥ sundari vaṃśapatrapatitaṃ punarapi kurute ||8115-1 eṣa cārumukhi yogatārayā yujyate taralabimbayā śaśī |  8115-2 sādhvasādupagataprakampayā kanyayeva navadīkṣayā varaḥ ||8116-1 eṣa tūḍḍamaravīciḍambaraḥ kṣobhamātramagamatpayonidhiḥ |  8116-2 vibhramaistadudayakramocitair ullalāsa lalanāsu manmathaḥ ||8116ā-1 eṣa durniyatidaṇḍacaṇḍima- prerito bata ravirgatacchaviḥ |  8116ā-2 sthāsyati svayamadhaḥpatankiyat- kālamambaravilambibhiḥ karaiḥ ||8117-1 eṣa dharmastu suśroṇi piturmātuśca vaśyatā |  8117-2 ataścājñāṃ vyatikramya nāhaṃ jīvitumutsahe ||8118-1 eṣa dharmo mayākhyāto nārīṇāṃ paramā gatiḥ |  8118-2 yā nārī kurute cānyatsā yāti narakaṃ dhruvaṃ ||8119-1 eṣa bakaḥ sahasaiva vipannaḥ śāṭhyamaho kva nu tadgatamasya |  8119-2 sādhu kṛtāntaka kaścidapi tvāṃ vañcayituṃ na kuto'pi samarthaḥ ||8120-1 eṣa brahmā saroje rajanikarakalāśekharaḥ śaṃkaro'yaṃ dorbhirdaityāntako'sau sadhanurasigadācakracihnaiścaturbhiḥ |  8120-2 eṣo'pyairāvatasthastridaśapatiramī devi devāstathānye nṛtyanti vy_oṃni caitāścalacaraṇaraṇannūpurā divyanāryaḥ ||8121-1 eṣa bho nirmalajyotsno rāhuṇā grasyate śaśī |  8121-2 jalaṃ kūlāvapātena prasannaṃ kaluṣāyate ||8122-1 eṣa ravistejasvī khadyoto'pyeṣa hanta tejasvī |  8122-2 eṣa rasālaḥ śākhī śākhī śākhoṭako'pyeṣaḥ ||8123-1 eṣa rājñāṃ paro dharmo hyārtānāmārtinigrahaḥ |  8123-2 ... ... ... ... ... ... ||8124-1 eṣa vandhyāsuto yāti khapuṣpakṛtaśekharaḥ |  8124-2 mṛgatṛṣṇāmbhasi snātaḥ śaśaśṛṅgadhanurdharaḥ ||8125-1 eṣa viśeṣaḥ spaṣṭo vahneśca tvatpratāpavahneśca |  8125-2 aṅkurati tena dagdhaṃ dagdhasyānena nodbhavo bhūyaḥ ||8126-1 eṣa vṛkṣaśikhare svargataraṅgiṇījalamiladdigdantidantadyutir bhraśyadrājatakumbhavibhramadharaḥ śītāṃśurabhyudyataḥ |  8131-2 haṃsīyatyamalāmbujīyati lasaḍḍiṇḍīrapiṇḍīyati sphārasphāṭikakuṇḍalīyati diśāmānandakandīyati ||8132-1 eṣa hi prathamo dharmaḥ kṣatriyasyābhiṣecanaṃ |  8132-2 yena śakyaṃ mahāprājña prajānāṃ paripālanaṃ ||8133-1 eṣāṃ gopavadhūvilāsasuhṛdāṃ rādhārahaḥsākṣiṇāṃ bhadraṃ kā jaghanasthalī sulalitā pronmattakāmādhikā bhrūbhaṅgaṃ kuṭilaṃ tvanaṅgadhanuṣaḥ prakhyaṃ prabhācandravat |  8135-2 rākācandrakapolapaṅkajamukhī kṣāmodarī sundarī veṇīdaṇḍamidaṃ vibhāti tulitaṃ velladbhujaṃ gacchati ||8136-1 eṣā kā navayauvanā śaśimukhī kāntā patho gacchati nidrāvyākulitā vighūrṇanayanā saṃpakvabimbādharā |  8136-2 keśairvyākulitā nakhairvidalitā dantaiśca khaṇḍīkṛtā kenedaṃ ratirākṣasena ramitā śārdūlavikrīḍitā ||8137-1 eṣā kāntā vrajati lalitaṃ vepamānā gulmacchannaṃ vanamurunagaiḥ saṃpraviddhaṃ |  8137-2 hā hā kaṣṭaṃ kimidamiti no vedmi mūḍho vyaktaṃ krodhaccharabhalalitaṃ kartukāmā ||8138-1 eṣā kā paripūrṇacandravadanā gaurīmṛgā kṣobhinīlīlāmattagajendrahaṃsagamanā - - . - - . - |  8138-2 niḥśvāsādharagandhaśītalamukhī vācā mṛdūllāsinī sa śaṅkayantī |  8140-2 kenedaṃ vaktrapadmaṃ sphuradadhararasaṃ ṣaṭpadenaiva pītaṃ svargaḥ kenādya bhukto haranayanahato manmathaḥ kasya tuṣṭaḥ ||8141-1 eṣā kā ratihāvabhāvavilasaccandrānanaṃ bibhratī gātraṃ campakadāmagaurasadṛśaṃ pīnastanālambitā |  8141-2 padbhyāṃ saṃcarati pragalbhahariṇī saṃlīlayā svecchayā kiṃ caiṣā gaganāṅganā bhuvitale saṃpāditā brahmaṇā ||8142-1 eṣā kā stanapīnabhārakaṭhinā madhye daridrāvatī vibhrāntā hariṇī vilolanayanā saṃtrastayūthodgatā |  8142-2 aṃtaḥsvedagajendragaṇḍagalitā saṃlīlayā gacchati dṛṣṭvā rūpamidaṃ priyāṅgagahanaṃ vṛddho'pi kāmāyate ||8143-1 eṣā kusumaniṣaṇṇā tṛṣitāpi satī bhavantamanuraktā |  8143-2 pratipālayati madhukarī na khalu madhu vinā tvayā pibati ||8144-1 eṣāgataiva nibirīsanitambabimba- bhāreṇa 8145-2 asyāḥ priye vicinumaḥ stabakāṃstathānyāḥ kartuṃ yathā na hi kadāpi latāḥ smareyuḥ ||8146-1 eṣā te hara kā sugātri katamā mūrdhni sthitā kiṃ jaṭā haṃsaḥ kiṃ bhajate jaṭāṃ nahi śaśī candro ||8148-1 eṣā dharmapatākinī taṭasudhāsevāvasannākinī śuṣyatpātakinī bhagīrathatapaḥsāphalyahevākinī |  8148-2 premārūḍhapinākinī girisutāsyākekarālokinī pāpāḍambaraḍākinī tribhuvanānandāya mandākinī ||8149-1 eṣā puṣkariṇī marāla malinaiśchannā kuvīthījalair yasyāmajñatayā vidherakṛpayā cedvastumākāṅkṣase |  8149-2 viśrambho bakamaṇḍaleṣu vinayo bhekeṣu saṃbandhitā rātryandheṣu vidhīyatāṃ kṛpaṇatā koyaṣṭikaśreṇiṣu ||8150-1 eṣā pravāsaṃ kathamapyatītya yātā punaḥ saṃśayamanyathaiva |  8150-2 ko nāma pākābhimukhasya jantor dvārāṇi daivasya pidhātumīṣṭe ||8151-1 eṣā sthitā ||8152-1 eṣā bhaviṣyati vinidrasaroruhākṣī kāmasya kāpi dayitā tanujānujā vā|  8152-2 yaḥ paśyati kṣaṇamimāṃ kathamanyathāsau kāmastamastakaruṇastaruṇaṃ hinasti ||8153-1 eṣā mano me ||8156-1 eṣā vrajantī lalitaṃ smayantī sakhījanaiḥ sārdhamatipragalbhā |  8156-2 surīva nityaṃ suratāsukhāptā vibhāti bhūmīdharapāṭhakastrī ||8157-1 eṣā sā 8176-2 iti vitrastasāraṅganetrayā ko na vañcitaḥ ||8177-1 ehi gaccha patottiṣṭha vada maunaṃ samācara |  8177-2 evamāśāgrahagrastaiḥ krīḍanti dhanino'rthibhiḥ ||8178-1 ehi tatra cinuvaḥ sukausumaṃ ehyāliṅga tvarayati mano durbalā vāsaraśrīr āśliṣṭāsi kṣapaya rajanīmekikā cakravāki |  8182-2 nānyāsakto na khalu kupito nānurāgacyuto vā daivādhīnaḥ sapadi bhavatīmasvatantrastyajāmi ||8183-1 ehyehi kva gatāsi maithili mṛgaḥ prāpto mayā kāñcanīṃ etasya tvacamuccarāmi kucayorvinyasya varṇāṃśukaṃ |  8183-2 matsaubhāgyabubhutsayāpi vipineṣvekākinī mā sma bhūr vidviṣṭā mayi saṃcaranti sarale samuttiṣṭhati ||8186-1 aikaguṇyamanīhāyāṃ abhāvaḥ karmaṇāṃ phalaṃ |  8186-2 atha dvaiguṇyamīhāyāṃ phalaṃ bhavati vā na vā ||8187-1 aikamatyamupāgamya śāstradṛṣṭena cakṣuṣā |  8187-2 mantriṇo yatra saṃpratibhāṣyate |  8189-2 na caikamatye śreyo'sti mantraḥ so'dhama ucyate ||8190-1 aiṇaṃ carma palāśaveśma purato dṛṣṭvaiva kṛṣṇājinaṃ bhikṣārthī kṣudhitastapovanadhiyā kiṃ dhārmika bhrāmyasi |  8190-2 enāṃ bhillapurīmavaihi surabhīśṛṅgeṇa yatra sthitaiḥ pīyante vanavahnidagdhamahiṣīmāṃsopadaṃśaṃ surāḥ ||8191-1 aindavādarciṣaḥ kāmī śiśiraṃ havyavāhanaṃ |  8191-2 abalāvirahakleśavihvalo gaṇayatyayaṃ ||8192-1 aindavī vahati nāḍikā yadā svecchayā praviśati prabhañjanaḥ |  8192-2 potakī vrajati dakṣiṇā yadā syāttadā sakalamīpsitaṃ phalaṃ ||8193-1 aindraṃ dhanuḥ pāṇḍupayodhareṇa śaraddadhānārdranakhakṣatābhaṃ |  8193-2 prasādayantī sakalaṅkaminduṃ tāpaṃ raverapyadhikaṃ cakāra ||8194-1 aindriḥ kila nakhaistasyā vidadāra stanau dvijaḥ |  8194-2 priyopabhogacihneṣu paurobhāgyamivācaran ||8195-1 aindryāṃ digavalokita- sūryābhimukho gṛhe gṛhiṇaḥ |  8195-2 rājabhayaṃ caurabhayaṃ vadhakalahaḥ paśubhayaṃ ca syāt ||8196-1 airāvaṇanti kariṇaḥ phaṇino'pyaśeṣāḥ śeṣanti hanta vihagā api haṃsitāraḥ|  8196-2 nīlotpalāni kumudanti ca sarvaśailāḥ kailāsituṃ vyavasitā bhavato yaśobhiḥ ||8197-1 airāvaṇānanamadāmbukaṇāvapāta- saṃsaktatāmarasareṇupiśaṅgitāṅgaḥ |  8197-2 caṇḍānilāhatatuṣāraviśīrṇapakṣaḥ kṣīṇaḥ kṣitau madhukaro vivaśo'tra śete ||8198-1 airāvaṇe suravadhūparigīyamāna- yuṣmadyaśaḥśravaṇaniścalakarṇatāle |  8198-2 nirvighnamāpibati bhṛṅgakulaṃ madāmbhaḥ kalyāṇamāvahati kasya na ceṣṭitaṃ te ||8199-1 aiśānyāṃ patanaṃ duṣṭaṃ vidiśo'nyāśca śobhanāḥ |  8199-2 harṣapuṣṭikarāścaiva siddhidāḥ śastrakarmaṇi ||8200-1 aiśānyāṃ saṃprāptir ghṛtapūrṇānāṃ bhavedanaḍuhaśca |  8200-2 evaṃ phalaṃ gṛhapater gṛhapṛṣṭhasamāśrite bhavati ||8201-1 aiśvaryaṃ nahuṣasya śaṃbhuviṣayaśraddhā daśāsyasya sā śauryaṃ śrīraghunāyakasya sahajaṃ gāmbhīryamambhonidheḥ |  8201-2 dātṛtvaṃ balikarṇayoriha jagatyekatra cetsyāttadāśrīvīrakṣitipālamaulinṛpateḥ sāmyaṃ kathaṃcidbhavet ||8202-1 aiśvaryatimiraṃ cakṣuḥ paśyaccāpi na paśyati |  8202-2 paścādvimalatāṃ yāti dāridryagulikāñjanaiḥ ||8203-1 aiśvaryadhanaratnānāṃ pratyamitre'pi tiṣṭhatāṃ |  8203-2 dṛṣṭā hi punarāvṛttirjīvatāmiti naḥ śrutaṃ ||8204-1 aiśvaryamattaḥ pāpiṣṭho madhupānamadādapi |  8204-2 aiśvaryamadamattānāṃ gatirūrdhvā na vidyate ||8205-1 aiśvaryamadapāpiṣṭhā madāḥ pānamadādayaḥ |  8205-2 eśvaryamadamatto hi nāpatitvā vibudhyate ||8206-1 aiśvaryamadamattāṃśca mattānmadyamadena ca |  8206-2 apramattāḥ śaṭhāḥ śūrā vikrāntāḥ paryupāsate ||8207-1 aiśvaryamadamattānāṃ kṣudhitānāṃ ca kāmināṃ |  8207-2 ahaṃkāravimūḍhānāṃ viveko naiva jāyate ||8208-1 aiśvaryamadhruvaṃ prāpya dhruvadharme matiṃ kuru |  8208-2 kṣaṇādeva vināśinyaḥ sampado'pyātmanā saha ||8209-1 aiśvaryamalpametya prāyeṇa hi durjano bhavati mānī |  8209-2 sumahatprāpyaiśvaryaṃ praśamaṃ pratipadyate sujanaḥ ||8209ā-1 aiśvaryamavyāhatamāvahantu herambapādāmbujapāṃsavo naḥ |  8209ā-2 ye nirvahanti śrutisundarīṇāṃ sīmantasindūraparāgalakṣmīṃ ||8210-1 aiśvaryamīrṣyā nairghṛṇyaṃ kṣībatvaṃ nirvivekatā |  8210-2 ekaikaṃ kiṃ na yatkuryātpañcāṅgitve tu kā kathā ||8211-1 aiśvaryavanto'pi hi nirdhanāste vyarthaśramā jīvitamātrasārāḥ |  8211-2 kṛtā na lobhopahṛtātmabhiryaiḥ suhṛtsvayaṃgrāhavibhūṣaṇā śrīḥ ||8212-1 aiśvaryasya parā kāṣṭhā yatra nityaṃ vibhāvyate |  8212-2 dhanadaḥ sa na keṣāṃ syātspṛhaṇīyaguṇodayaḥ ||8213-1 aiśvaryasya vibhūṣaṇaṃ sujanatā śauryasya vāksaṃyamo jñānasyopaśamaḥ śamasya vinayo vittasya pātre vyayaḥ |  8213-2 akrodhastapasaḥ kṣamā prabhaviturdharmasya nirvyājatā sarveṣāmapi sarvakāraṇamidaṃ śīlaṃ paraṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ ||8214-1 aiśvaryātsaha saṃbandhaṃ na kuryācca kadācana |  8214-2 gate ca gauravaṃ nāsti āgate ca dhanakṣayaḥ ||8215-1 aiśvaryādanapetamīśvaramayaṃ loko'rthataḥ sevate taṃ gacchantyanu ye vipattiṣu punaste tatpratiṣṭhāśayā |  8215-2 bharturye pralaye'pi pūrvasukṛtāsaṅgena niḥsaṅgayā bhaktyā kāryadhuraṃ vahanti kṛtinaste durlabhāstvādṛśāḥ ||8216-1 aiśvarye'pi kṣamā yasya dāridrye'pi hitaiṣitā |  8216-2 āpattāvapi dhīratvaṃ dadhato martyatā kathaṃ ||8217-1 aiśvarye vā suvistīrṇe vyasane vā sudāruṇe |  8217-2 rajjveva puruṣaṃ baddhvā kṛtāntaḥ parikarṣati ||8218-1 aihalaukikapāratryaṃ karma puṃbhirniṣevyate |  8218-2 karmāṇyapi tu kalyāṇi labhate kāmamāsthitaḥ ||8219-1 aihalaukikamīhante māṃsaśoṇitavardhanaṃ |  8219-2 pāralaukikakāryeṣu prasuptābhṛśanāstikāḥ ||8220-1 aihikāmuṣmikānkāmāṃllobhamohātmakāṃśca yān |  8220-2 nirudhyāste sadā yogī prāptiḥ syātsārvakāmikī ||8221-1 oṃkāraḥ puruṣaḥ pūrvaḥ vyāhṛtiḥ prakṛtiḥ striyaḥ |  8221-2 ubhayoḥ karasaṃyoge vastreṇācchādayennaraḥ ||8222-1 oṃkāraśabdo viprāṇāṃ yasya rāṣṭre pravartate |  8222-2 sa rājā hi bhavedyogī vyādhibhiśca na pīḍyate ||8223-1 oṃkārāḥ kusumāyudhopaniṣadāṃ mantrānuvādaḥ smara- svādhyāyasya rateḥ punarbhavavidhau gandhābhirāmaśrutiḥ |  8223-2 cittākarṣaṇasādhyasiddhirasatīnetrasya karṇajvaraḥ pānthānāṃ sahakārakānanasudhāsekaḥ pikānāṃ dhvaniḥ ||8224-1 oṃkāre satpradīpe mṛgaya gṛhapatiṃ sūkṣmamekāntarasthaṃ saṃyamya dvāravāhaṃ pavanamavirataṃ nāyakaṃ cendriyāṇāṃ |  8224-2 vāgjālaṃ kasya hetorvitarasi hi girāṃ dṛśyate naiva kiṃciddehasthaṃ paśya nāthaṃ bhramasi kimapare śāstramohāndhakāre ||8225-1 oṃkāro madanadvijasya gaganakroḍaikadaṃṣṭrāṅkuras tārāmauktikaśuktirandhatamasastamberamasyāṅkuśaḥ |  8225-2 śṛṅgārārgalakuñcikā virahiṇīmānacchidā kartarīsaṃdhyāvāravadhūnakhakṣatiriyaṃ cāndrī kalā rājate ||8226-1 oṃkāro yasya kandaḥ salilamupaniṣannyāyajālaṃ mṛṇālaṃ brahmāṇḍaṃ yasya kāṇḍaṃ prasarati parito yasya yāgaḥ parāgaḥ |  8226-2 bhṛṅgadhvānaḥ purāṇaṃ vijanasuradhunītīravāso'dhivāso yasyānando marandaḥ puraharacaraṇāmbhoruhaṃ tadbhajāmaḥ ||8227-1 oṃ namaḥ paramārthaikarūpāya paramātmane |  8227-2 svecchāvabhāsitāsatyabhedabhinnāya śaṃbhave ||8228-1 oṃ hr_oṃ śikhāsthāne śaṃkarāya namaḥ |  8228-2 oṃ hr_oṃ bāhvoḥ keśavāya namaḥ |  8228-2 oṃ hr_oṃ nābhimadhye brahmaṇe namaḥ |  8228-3 oṃ hr_oṃ jaṅghayorgaṇapataye namaḥ |  8229-1 oghavātāhṛtaṃ bījaṃ yasya kṣetre prarohati |  8229-2 kṣetrikasyaiva tadbījaṃ na bījī labhate phalaṃ ||8230-1 ojasāpi khalu nūnamanūnaṃ nāsahāyamupayāti jayaśrīḥ |  8230-2 yadvibhuḥ śaśimayūkhasakhaḥ sann ādade vijayi cāpamanaṅgaḥ ||8231-1 ojobhājāṃ yadraṇe saṃsthitānāṃ ādattīvraṃ sārdhamaṅgena nūnaṃ |  8231-2 jvālāvyājādudvamantī tadantas- tejastāraṃ dīptajihvā vavāśe ||8232-1 oṃityetatparaṃ brahma śrutīnāṃ mukhamakṣaraṃ |  8232-2 prasīdatu satāṃ svānteṣvekaṃ tripuruṣīmayaṃ ||8233-1 oṣāmāse matsarotpātavātā- śliṣyaddantakṣmāruhāṃ gharṣaṇotthaiḥ |  8233-2 yaugāntairvā vahnibhirvāraṇānāṃ uccairmūrdhavy_oṃni nakṣatramālā ||8234-1 oṣṭhapallavavidaṃśarucīnāṃ hṛdyatāmupayayau ramaṇānāṃ |  8234-2 phullalocanavinīlasarojair aṅganāsyacaṣakairmadhuvāraḥ ||8235-1 oṣṭhāgraṃ sphuratīkṣaṇe vicalataḥ kūpodare matsyavaddhammillaḥ kusumāñcito vigalitaḥ prāpnoti bandhaṃ punaḥ |  8235-2 pracchannau vrajataḥ stanau prakaṭatāṃ śroṇītaṭaṃ dṛśyate nīvī ca skhalati sthitāpi sudṛḍhaṃ kāmeṅgitaṃ yoṣitāṃ ||8236-1 saubhāgyarūpaparihāsaguṇānurāga- saṃkīrtanena dayitasya ca labdhasaukhyaṃ |  8236-2 saṃbandhimitramukhadarśanadattadūra- toṣaṃ parokṣamapi kāmaguṇeṅgitaṃ syāt ||8237-1 oṣṭhe bimbaphalāśayālamalakeṣūtpākajambūdhiyā karṇālaṃkṛtibhāji dāḍimaphalabhrāntyā ca śoṇe maṇau |  8237-2 niṣpattyā sakṛdutpalacchadadṛśāmāttaklamānāṃ maraurājangūrjararājapañjaraśukaiḥ sadyastṛṣā mūrcchitaṃ ||8238-1 aucityaṃ stutyānāṃ guṇarāgaścandanādilepānāṃ |  8238-2 kanyā śokakarāṇāṃ buddhivihīno'nukampyānāṃ ||8239-1 aucityapracyutācāro yuktyā svārthaṃ na sādhayet |  8239-2 vyājabālivadhenaiva rāmakīrtiḥ kalaṅkitā ||8240-1 aucityamekamekatra guṇānāṃ rāśirekataḥ |  8240-2 viṣāyate guṇagrāma aucityaparivarjitaḥ ||8241-1 aujjhi priyāṅgairghṛṇayaiva rūkṣā na vāridurgāttu varāṭakasya |  8241-2 na kaṇṭakairāvaraṇācca kāntir dhūlībhṛtā kāñcanaketakasya ||8242-1 autsukyagarbhā bhramatīva dṛṣṭiḥ paryākulaṃ kvāpi manaḥ prayāti |  8242-2 viyujyamānasya guṇānvitena nirantarapremavatā janena ||8243-1 autsukyamātramavasādayati pratiṣṭhā kliśnāti labdhaparipālanavṛttireva|  8243-2 nātiśramāpanayanāya yathā śramāya rājyaṃ svahastadhṛtadaṇḍamivātapatraṃ ||8244-1 autsukyahetuṃ vivṛṇoṣi na tvaṃ tattvāvabodhaikaraso na tarkaḥ |  8244-2 tathāpi rambhoru kar_oṃi lakṣyaṃ ātmānameṣāṃ paridevitānāṃ ||8245-1 autsukyātparimilatāṃ trapayā saṃkocamañcatāṃ ca muhuḥ |  8245-2 navasaṃgamayoryūnor nayanānāmutsavo jayati ||8246-1 autsukyena kṛtatvarā sahabhuvā vyāvartamānā hriyātaistairbandhuvadhūjanasya vacanairnītābhimukhyaṃ punaḥ |  8246-2 dṛṣṭvāgre varamāttasādhvasarasā gaurī nave saṅgame saṃrohatpulakā hareṇa hasatā śliṣṭā śivāyāstu vaḥ ||8247-1 audāryaṃ dākṣiṇyaṃ pāpajugupsā ca nirmalo bodhaḥ |  8247-2 liṅgāni dharmasiddheḥ prāyeṇa janapriyatvaṃ ca ||8248-1 audāryaṃ bhuvanatraye'pi viditaṃ saṃbhūtirambhonidher vāso nandanakānane parimalo gīrvāṇacetoharaḥ |  8248-2 evaṃ dātṛgurorguṇāḥ surataroḥ sarve'pi lokottarāḥsyādarthipravarārthitārpaṇavidhāveko viveko yadi ||8249-1 audāryaṃ sadhane nayo guṇijane lajjā kulastrījane satkāvyaṃ vadane mado dviradane puṃskokilaḥ kānane |  8249-2 rolambaḥ kamale nakhāṅkaracanā kāntākapolasthale tanvī talpatale bhavānapi vibho bhūmaṇḍale maṇḍanaṃ ||8250-1 audāsīnyaṃ dayālūnāṃ arthināṃ bhāgyahīnatā |  8250-2 nahi svamukhavairūpyaṃ darpaṇasyāparādhataḥ ||8251-1 audumbarāṇi puṣpāṇi śvetavarṇaṃ ca vāyasaṃ |  8251-2 matsyapādaṃ jale paśyenna nārīhṛdayasthitaṃ ||8252-1 aunnatyaṃ bhavataḥ sumeruśikharocchrāyopamāṃ gāhate vyāptiste girirājamūlamahimanyāyena nirṇīyate |  8252-2 ekasyāpi na kiṃtu cātakaśiśoḥ pūrttyai payo vartatevandhyāpīnapayodharopamatayā buddho'si pāthodhara ||8253-1 aurasaṃ maitrasaṃbaddhaṃ tathā vaṃśakramāgataṃ |  8253-2 rakṣitaṃ vyasanebhyaśca mitraṃ jñeyaṃ caturvidhaṃ ||8254-1 aurasānapi putrānhi tyajantyahitakāriṇaḥ |  8254-2 samarthānsaṃpragṛhṇanti janānapi narādhipāḥ ||8255-1 aurasīṃ bhaginīṃ vāpi bhāryāṃ vāpyanujasya yaḥ |  8255-2 pracareta naraḥ kāmāttasya daṇḍo vadhaḥ smṛtaḥ ||8256-1 aurvā ivātilubdhā bhavanti dhanalavaṇavāribahutṛṣṇāḥ |  8256-2 tṛṇalavamiva nijadehaṃ tyajanti leśaṃ na vittasya ||8257-1 auṣadhaṃ mūḍhavaidyānāṃ tyajantu jvarapīḍitāḥ |  8257-2 parasaṃsargasaṃsaktaṃ kalatramiva sādhavaḥ ||8258-1 auṣadhānāṃ ca mantrāṇāṃ buddheścaiva mahātmanāṃ |  8258-2 asādhyaṃ nāsti loke'tra kiṃcidbrahmāṇḍamadhyagaṃ ||8259-1 auṣadhāni ca mantrāṇi nakṣatraṃ śakunaṃ grahāḥ |  8259-2 bhāgyakāle prasannāḥ syurabhāgye niṣphalāśca te ||8260-1 auṣadhānyagado vidyā daivī ca vividhā sthitiḥ |  8260-2 tapasaiva prasidhyanti tapasteṣāṃ hi sādhanaṃ ||8261-1 auṣadhāyāpi yo martyo madhvasyati vicetanaḥ |  8261-2 kuyonau jāyate so'pi kiṃ punastatra lolupaḥ ||8262-1 auṣasātapabhayādapalīnaṃ vāsaracchavivirāmapaṭīyaḥ |  8262-2 saṃnipatya śanakairatha nimnādandhakāramudavāpa samāni ||8263-1 auṣṇyaṃ tathā vikramaṃ ca s_oṃyaṃ daṇḍaṃ prasannatāṃ |  8263-2 dhārayanti mahātmāno rājānaḥ prāyaśo bhuvi ||8263-3 tasmātsarvāsvavasthāsu mānyāḥ pūjyāśca pārthivāḥ ||8264-1 auṣmāyamāṇanavayauvanamugdhabhāvāḥ śṛṅgārasāgaramanojñataraṅgalekhāḥ |  8264-2 kandarpakelirasalabdhayaśaḥpatākāḥ paṇyāṅganāḥ puramimāmadhivāsayanti ||8265-1 kaṃcana vañcanacature prapañcaya tvaṃ murāntake mānaṃ |  8265-2 bahuvallabhe hi puruṣe dākṣiṇyaṃ duḥkhamudvahati ||8266-1 kaṃcitkālaṃ naya giriguhāgahvare re mudhaiva krīḍanhālāhalarasalasaddarpa mā sarpa ! sarpa |  8266-2 mādyannudyatsajalajaladavyākule meghakāle yena prāpto vanaviharaṇotkaṇṭhayā nīlakaṇṭhaḥ ||8267-1 kaṃcitkṣaṇaṃ nanu sahasva vimuñca vāso jāgartyayaṃ parijano dhigapatrapo'si |  8267-2 eṣo'ñjaliḥ śamaya dīpamiti priyāyā vāco ratādapi parāṃ mudamāvahanti ||8268-1 kaṃcideva samayaṃ samāgataṃ tvāṃ na vismarati śaśvadambujaṃ |  8268-2 mānase vihara haṃsa mānase mā vimuñca punarasya sauhṛdaṃ ||8269-1 kaṃjānanā kamjaparāgapuñja- guñjanmilindāvalikuntalaśrīḥ |  8269-2 vidvaddvijākrāntamukhāntarālā jyotirvidāryā taṭinīva bhāti ||8270-1 kaṃ na spṛśanti puruṣaṃ vyasanāni kāle ko vā nirantarasukhī ya ihāsti loke |  8270-2 duḥkhaṃ sukhaṃ ca pariṇāmavaśādupaiti nakṣatracakramiva khe parivartamānaṃ ||8271-1 kaṃ pṛcchāmaḥ surāḥ svarge nivasāmo vayaṃ bhuvi |  8271-2 kiṃ vā kāvyarasaḥ svāduḥ kiṃ vā svādīyasī sudhā ||8272-1 kaṃ prati kathayitumīśe saṃprati ko vā pratītimāyātu |  8272-2 gopatitanayākuñje gopavadhūṭīviṭaṃ brahma ||8273-1 kaṃ yojayanmanujo'rthaṃ labheta nipātayannaṣṭadṛśaṃ hi garte |  8273-2 evaṃ narāṇāṃ viṣayaspṛhā ca nipātayanniraye tvandhakūpe ||8274-1 kaṃ viśeṣamavalambya yoṣitaḥ preyase bhajasi varcase bhuvaṃ |  8274-2 tyāgaheturapi tulya eva te sāpi sāpi malamocanasthalī ||8275-1 kaṃ saṃjaghāna kṛṣṇaḥ kā śītalavāhinī gaṅgā |  8275-2 ke dārapoṣaṇaratāḥ kaṃ balavantaṃ na bādhate śītaṃ ||8276-1 kaṃsaṃ dhvaṃsayate muraṃ tirayate haṃsaṃ tathā hiṃsate bāṇaṃ kṣīṇayate bakaṃ laghayate pauṇḍraṃ tathā lumpate |  8276-2 bh_oṃaṃ kṣāmayate balādbalabhido darpaṃ parākurvate kliṣṭaṃ śiṣṭagaṇaṃ praṇamramavate kṛṣṇāya tubhyaṃ namaḥ ||8277-1 kaṃsārātervada gamanaṃ kena syāthkasmindṛṣṭiṃ saṃlabhate svalpecchuḥ |  8277-2 kaṃ sarveṣāṃ śubhakaramūcurdhīrāḥ kiṃ kuryāstvaṃ sujana saśokaṃ lokaṃ ||8278-1 kaṃsāricaraṇodbhūtasindhukallolalālitaṃ |  8278-2 manye haṃsa mano nīre kulyānāṃ ramate kathaṃ ||8279-1 kaṃso rāvaṇo rāmaśca rājā duryodhanastathā |  8279-2 catvāro'pi mahāmūrkhāḥ pañcamaḥ śālivāhanaḥ ||8280-1 kaḥ kaṃ śakto rakṣituṃ mṛtyukāle rajjucchede ke ghaṭaṃ dhārayanti |  8280-2 evaṃ lokastulyadharmo vanānāṃ kāle kāle chidyate ruhyate ca ||8281-1 kaḥ kaḥ kutra na ghurghurāyitaghurīghoro ghuretsūkaraḥ kaḥ kaḥ kaṃ kamalākaraṃ vikamalaṃ kartuṃ karī nodyataḥ |  8281-2 ke ke kāni vanānyaraṇyamahiṣā nonmūlayeyuryataḥsiṃhīsnehavilāsabaddhavasatiḥ pañcānano vartate ||8282-1 kaḥ kaṇṭakānāṃ prakaroti taikṣṇyaṃ yāvattāvadvaraṃ subhage rataṃ ||8364-1 kaṭhinahṛdaye muñca bhrāntiṃ vyalīkakathāśrayāṃ piśunavacanairduḥkhaṃ netuṃ na yuktamimaṃ janaṃ |  8364-2 kimidamatha vā satyaṃ mugdhe tvayādya viniścitaṃ yadabhirucitaṃ tanme kṛtvā priye sukhamāsyatāṃ ||8365-1 kaṭhināstīkṣṇavaktrāśca tīkṣṇodarkāstathaiva ca |  8365-2 gaṇakaiḥ kiṃ nu lekhanyastā vā kiṃ te vinirmitāḥ ||8366-1 kaṭhine durgame vāso guptaśaktiprakāśanaṃ |  8366-2 raṇe putraḥ yathā śocyaḥ kalahaṃ veśyayā saha ||8367-1 kaṭhoranakharāhatadviradakumbhapīṭhasthalī- luṭhadrudhirarañjitollalitakesaraḥ kesarī |  8367-2 gabhīraravakātarāturatarāturavyāhṛtaiḥ patanhariṇakaiḥ samaṃ samarabhūmikāṃ lajjate||8368-1 kaṭhorapārāvatakaṇṭhamecakaṃ vapurvūṣaskandhasubandhurāṃsakaṃ |  8368-2 prasannarsihastimitaṃ ca vīkṣitaṃ dhvaniśca maṅgalyamṛdaṅgamāṃsalaḥ ||8369-1 kaṭhorāsthigranthivyatikararaṇatkāramukharaḥkharasnāyucchedakṣaṇavihitavegavyupaśamaḥ |  8369-2 nirātaṅkaḥ paṅkeṣviva piśitapiṇḍeṣu vilasa- nnasirgātraṃ gātraṃ sapadi lavaśaste vikiratu ||8370-1 kaṇa iva purāṃ vahnerbhasmāvadhūlanasaṅgato jayati bahalālokasphārāvadhūtaniśodayaḥ |  8370-2 smaraharajaṭābandhagranthirbhujaṅgaphaṇāmaṇi- stridaśataṭinīpūrānītaḥ sphuranniva tārakaḥ ||8371-1 kaṇācāmatuṣāṅgārānyatnena parirakṣasi |  8371-2 mūṣakāpahṛtaṃ koṣe ratnarāśiṃ na paśyasi ||8372-1 kaṇṭakasya tu bhagnasya dantasya calitasya ca |  8372-2 amātyasya ca duṣṭasya mūlāduddharaṇaṃ sukhaṃ ||8373-1 kaṇṭakānkūpamagniṃ ca varjayanti yathā narāḥ |  8373-2 tathā nṛśaṃsakarmāṇaṃ varjayanti narā naraṃ ||8374-1 kaṇṭakāvaraṇaṃ yādṛkphalitasya phalāptaye |  8374-2 tādṛgdurjanasaṅgo'pi sādhusaṅgāya bādhanaṃ ||8375-1 kaṇṭakitatanuśarīrā lajjāmukulāyamānanayaneyaṃ |  8375-2 tava kumudinīva vāñchati nṛcandra bālā karasparśaṃ ||8376-1 kaṇṭakenāpi ye spṛṣṭā yānti kāmapi vikriyāṃ |  8376-2 te'pi śastranikṛntasya paśormāṃsāni bhuñjate ||8377-1 kaṇṭakenāpi viddhasya mahatī vedanā bhavet |  8377-2 cakrabhīṣaṇakhaḍgādyairmāryamāṇasya kiṃ punaḥ ||8378-1 kaṇṭakairiva vidāritapādaḥ padminīparicitairaparādreḥ |  8378-2 āruroha sarasīruhabandhuḥ skandhamambudhitaṭīgamanāya ||8378ā-1 kaṇṭako dārukhaṇḍaṃ ca vitanoti galavyathāṃ |  8378ā-2 vyañjanāntarnipatitastālu vidhyati vṛścikaḥ ||8379-1 kaṇṭakyakaṇṭakānāṃ vyatyāse'mbhastribhiḥ karaiḥ paścāt |  8379-2 khātvā puruṣatritayaṃ tribhāgayuktaṃ dhanaṃ vā syāt ||8380-1 kaṇṭārikāyā anyoktiḥ saṇānyoktirudāhṛtā |  8380-2 dhattūrapādapānyoktiravadheyā tṛṇoktayaḥ ||8381-1 kaṇṭhakoṇaviniviṣṭamīśa te kālakūṭamapi me mahāmṛtaṃ |  8381-2 apyupāttamamṛtaṃ bhavadvapur- bhedavṛtti yadi me na rocate ||8382-1 kaṇṭhagatairapyasubhiḥ kasyātmā nopasarpate jātu |  8382-2 mūrkhasya viṣādasya ca garvasya tathā kṛtaghnasya ||8383-1 kaṇṭhagrahaṃ na vātyeva bhartuḥ kruddhāpi yatnataḥ |  8383-2 kaṅkaṇaśreṇikevāsau doṣamevāvalambate ||8384-1 unmatteva pramatteva prahṛṣṭevātureva ca |  8384-2 na śakyopāsituṃ rāmā prauḍhaṃ yauvanamāśritā ||8385-1 sukhaduḥkhapradāyinyastṛtīye yauvane sthitāḥ |  8385-2 jāyante gahanā rāmāḥ saṃsārasyeva rītayaḥ ||8386-1 kaṇṭhagrahe śithilatāṃ gamite kathaṃcidyo manyate maraṇameva sukhābhyupāyaṃ |  8386-2 gacchansa eṣa na balādvidhṛto yuvābhyāṃ ityujjhite bhujalate valayairivāsyāḥ ||8387-1 kaṇṭhacchāyamiṣeṇa kalparajanīmuttaṃsamandākinī- rūpeṇa pralayābdhimūrdhvanayanavyājena kalpānalaṃ |  8387-2 bhūṣāpannagakelipānakapaṭādekonapañcāśa taṃ vātānapyupasaṃharannavatu vaḥ kalpāntaśāntau śivaḥ ||8388-1 kaṇṭhacchedaviśīryamāṇarudhiraprāgbhārabhagnadyuter yena smeramukhena h_oṃaśikhinaḥ saṃdhukṣaṇākāṅkṣiṇā |  8388-2 bhrūbhaṅgaḥ śitikaṇṭhakaṇṭhaphaṇine phūtkārahetoḥ kṛtaḥśauṭīryavratatuṣṭadhūrjaṭirasau kiṃ varṇyate rāvaṇaḥ ||8389-1 kaṇṭhacchede suvarṇaṃ cetkṣuraṃ yadvaddhitaṃ na hi |  8389-2 bandhurapyapakārī cetsarvaistyājyastathaiva saḥ ||8390-1 kaṇṭhamākuñcya hṛdaye sthāpayeddṛḍhamicchayā |  8390-2 jālaṃdharo bandha eṣa sudhāvyayanivāraṇaḥ ||8391-1 kaṇṭhaśriyaṃ kuvalayastabakābhirāma- dāmānukārivikaṭacchavikālakūṭāṃ |  8391-2 bibhratsukhāni diśatādupahārapīta- dhūpotthadhūmamalināmiva dhūrjaṭirvaḥ ||8392-1 kaṇṭhaśleṣaṃ samāsādya tasyāḥ prabhraṣṭayānayā |  8392-2 tulyāvasthā sakhīveyaṃ tanurāśvāsyate mama ||8393-1 kaṇṭhasaktamṛdubāhubandhanaṃ nyastapādatalamagrapādayoḥ |  8393-2 prārthayanta śayanotthitaṃ priyās taṃ niśātyayavisargacumbanaṃ ||8394-1 kaṇṭhastasyāḥ kuvalaydṛśaḥ kāñcanaḥ ko'pi kambur lāvaṇyāmbusmaranarapaterarghyamāviḥ karoti |  8394-2 tisro rekhāstribhuvanajayavyañjikāstatra tatkiṃ na syānmadhye trivaliracanā paunaruktyāya dhātuḥ ||8395-1 kaṇṭhasthā yā bhavedvidyā sā prakāśyā sadā budhaiḥ |  8395-2 yā gurau pustake vidyā tayā mūḍhaḥ pratāryate ||8396-1 kaṇṭhasya tasyāḥ stanabandhurasya muktākalāpasya ca nistalasya |  8396-2 anyonyaśobhājananādbabhūva sādhāraṇo bhūṣaṇabhūṣyabhāvaḥ ||8397-1 kaṇṭhasya vidadhe kāntiṃ muktābharaṇatā yathā |  8397-2 tasyāḥ svabhāvaramyasya muktābharaṇatā tathā ||8398-1 kaṇṭhādūrdhvaṃ viniryāti prāṇā yāñcākṣaraiḥ saha |  8398-2 dadāmītyakṣarairdātuḥ punaḥ śrotrādviśanti te ||8399-1 kaṇṭhādraktaṃ pibati guṇināṃ madyamāṃsaṃ na bhuṅkte viṣṇudravyaṃ harati kurute dvādaśīṣūpavāsaṃ |  8399-2 sāṃkhyaṃ śrutvāpaharati gavāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ ca vṛttiṃ pāpo dambhaḥ kaliyugasakhaḥ kasya mitraṃ niyogī ||8400-1 kaṇṭhāntaḥ kvaṇitaṃ divākarakaraklāntyā rajoviplavais tannetrāñcalakuñcanaṃ śitakuśaprāntakṣataiḥ sītkṛtiḥ |  8400-2 śvāsormiprabhavo vanecarabhiyā tvadvairivāmabhruvāṃ evaṃ deva marostaṭe'pi suratakrīḍānurūpaḥ kramaḥ ||8401-1 kaṇṭhālaṃkāraghaṇṭāghaṇaghaṇaraṇitādhmātarodaḥkaṭāhaḥ kaṇṭhekālādhirohocitaghanasubhagaṃ bhāvukasnindhapṛṣṭhaḥ |  8401-2 sākṣāddharmo vapuṣmāndhavalakakudanirdhūtakailāsakūṭaḥ kūṭastho vaḥ kakudmānnibiḍataratamaḥst_oṃatṛṇyāṃ vitṛṇyāt ||8402-1 kaṇṭhāliṅganamaṅgalaṃ ghanakucābhogopabhogotsavaṃ śroṇīsaṃgamasaubhagaṃ ca satataṃ matpreyasīnāṃ puraḥ |  8402-2 prāptuṃ ko'yamitīrṣyayeva yamunākūle balādyaḥ svayaṃ gopīnāmaharaddukūlanicayaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ sa puṣṇātu naḥ ||8403-1 kaṇṭhāvasaktamṛdubāhulatāsturaṅgādrājāvarodhanavadhūravatārayantaḥ |  8403-2 āliṅganānyadhikṛtāḥ sphuṭamāpureva gaṇḍasthalīḥ śucitayā na cucumburāsāṃ ||8404-1 kaṇṭhāśleṣiṇamunnatastanabharaśroṇītaṭagrāhiṇaṃ saṃsaktoruyugaṃ gṛhītajaghanaprākāramapyantataḥ |  8404-2 drāgeva ślathabandhaminduvadanā gāḍhāvamardāsahaṃ vijñāyātyajadāśu kāñcanapaṭaṃ vrīḍākulāpi kṣaṇaṃ ||8405-1 kaṇṭhe ka eṣa tava vallabha nūpuro'yaṃ tatpādabhūṣaṇamayaṃ valayastadānīṃ |  8405-2 ityādivācyamavibhāvya vaco mṛgākṣyā jñāne'pi tadvihṛtamutsukatāṃ tanoti ||8405ā-1 kaṇṭhe kṛttāvaśeṣaṃ kanakamayamadhaḥ śṛṅkhalādāma karṣan krāntvā dvārāṇi helācalacaraṇaraṇatkiṅkaṇīcakravālaḥ |  8405ā-2 dattātaṅko'ṅganānāmanusṛtasaraṇiḥ saṃbhramādaśvapālaiḥ prabhraṣṭo'yaṃ plavaṅgaḥ praviśati nṛpatermandiraṃ mandurāyāḥ ||8406-1 kaṇṭhe gadgadatā svedo mukhe vaivarṇyavepathū |  8406-2 mriyamāṇasya cihnāni yāni tānyeva yācataḥ ||8407-1 kaṇṭhe cintāmaṇirjñeyaścintitārthapradaḥ sadā |  8407-2 āvartaḥ pṛṣṭhavaṃśe yaḥ sa sūryākhyaḥ śubhaḥ smṛtaḥ ||8408-1 kaṇṭhe jīvitamānane tava guṇāḥ pāṇau kapolastanau saṃtāpastvayi mānasaṃ nayanayoracchinnadhāraṃ payaḥ |  8408-2 sarvaṃ niṣkaruṇa tvadīyavirahe sālambanaṃ kiṃ punas tasyāḥ saṃprati jīvite bata sakhīvargo nirālambanaḥ ||8409-1 kaṇṭhe madaḥ kodravajo hṛdi tāmbūlajo madaḥ |  8409-2 lakṣmīmadastu sarvāṅge putradāramukheṣvapi ||8410-1 kaṇṭhe mauktikamālikāḥ stanataṭe kārpūramacchaṃ rajaḥ sāndraṃ candanamaṅgake valayitāḥ pāṇau mṛṇālīlatāḥ |  8410-2 tanvī naktamiyaṃ cakāsti śucinī cīnāṃśuke bibhratī śītāṃśoradhidevateva galitā vy_oṃāgramārohataḥ ||8411-1 kaṇṭhe rajjuṃ baddhvā mṛtasya puṃsastu rajjumādāya |  8411-2 tasyāḥ khaṇḍaṃ kaṇṭhe baddhaṃ gaṇḍasrajaṃ harati ||8412-1 kaṇṭhe vasantī caturā yadasyāḥ sarasvatī vādayate vipañcīṃ |  8412-2 tadeva vāgbhūya mukhe mṛgākṣyāḥ śrotuḥ śrutau yāti sudhārasatvaṃ ||8413-1 kaṇṭhocito'pi huṃkṛti- mātranirastaḥ padāntike patitaḥ |  8413-2 yasyāścandraśikhaḥ smara- bhallanibho jayati sā caṇḍī ||8414-1 kaṇḍūyate dakṣiṇapāṇinā cethsa sārameyo vadanaṃ tadānīṃ |  8414-2 bhaktaiḥ prabhūtaiḥ saha bhūmipālair bhojyāni bhakṣyāṇi ciraṃ bhavanti ||8415-1 kaṇḍūladvipagaṇḍapiṇḍakaṣaṇākampena sampātibhir dharmasraṃsitabandhanaiḥ svakusumairarcanti godāvarīṃ |  8415-2 chāyāpaskiramāṇaviṣkiramukhavyākṛṣṭakīṭatvacaḥkūjatklāntakapītakukkuṭakulāḥ kūle kulāyadrumāḥ ||8416-1 kaṇḍūyamānaḥ khalu dakṣiṇena hastena bhālaṃ bhaṣaṇo dadāti |  8416-2 prabhāvinamrīkṛtarājacakraṃ rājyābhiṣeke varapaṭṭabandhaṃ ||8417-1 kataratpurahara paruṣaṃ hālāhalakavalayācanāvacasoḥ |  8417-2 ekaiva tava rasajñā tadubhayarasatāratamyajñā ||8418-1 kati kati na punaścaranti hanti pratiśikharaṃ pratikānanaṃ kuraṅgāḥ |  8418-2 tadapi janamanovinodahetur vilasati keṣvapi ko'pi nābhigandhaḥ ||8419-1 kati kati na madoddhatāścaranti pratiśikhari pratikānanaṃ kuraṅgāḥ |  8419-2 kvacidapi punaruttamā mṛgāste madayati yanmada eva medinīśān ||8420-1 kati kati na latāḥ kalitāḥ saṃcaratā cañcarīkarasikena |  8420-2 nalini bhavanmadhu madhuraṃ yatpītaṃ tattadeva paripītaṃ ||8421-1 kati kati na vasante vallayaḥ śākhino vā surabhitasumanobhirbhūṣitāṅgā babhūvuḥ |  8421-2 tadapi yuvajanānāṃ prītaye kevalo'bhūdabhinavakalikālībhāraśālī rasālaḥ ||8422-1 katiciduddhatanirbharamatsarāḥ katicidātmavacaḥstutiśālinaḥ |  8422-2 ahaha ke'pi nirakṣarakukṣayas tadiha saṃprati kaṃ prati me śramaḥ ||8422ā-1 katiciddivasāni kāṇḍaśeṣāḥ patitāśeṣapurāṇajīrṇaparṇāḥ |  8422ā-2 taravastvaci garhitapravālāḥ samavāpyanta na nāmato vivektuṃ ||8423-1 katiciddivasāni tayā gamitā- ni gṛhe tava saṅgamarocanayā |  8423-2 katicidvipine nalinīśayane vacanena pikīmadamocanayā ||8424-1 na vane'pi ratirbhavane'pi na yaṃ pratirūpavinirjjitarocanayā |  8424-2 karuṇāvaruṇālaya kiṃ kriyatāṃ aruṇāyatapaṅkajalocanayā ||8425-1 kati te kabarībhāraḥ sumanaḥsaṅgātpriye'tinīlatvāt |  8425-2 bhavati ca kalāpavattvān nijairasevyaḥ kathaṃ na syāt ||8426-1 kati na santi janā jagatītale tadapi tadvirahākulitaṃ manaḥ |  8426-2 kati na santi niśākaratārakāḥ kamalinī malinī raviṇā vinā ||8427-1 kati na santi mahīṣu mahīruhaḥ surabhipuṣparasālaphalālayaḥ |  8427-2 surabhayanti na ke'pi ca bhūruhān iti yaśo'sti paraṃ tava candana ||8428-1 kati no viṣayā nibhālitāḥ kati vā bhūmibhujo na śīlitāḥ |  8428-2 dharaṇīdhara tāvakānguṇān avadhāryājagaṇaṃ guruṃ laghuṃ ||8429-1 katipayadivasasthāyini madakāriṇi yauvane durātmānaḥ |  8429-2 vidadhati tathāparādhaṃ janmaiva yathā vṛthā bhavati ||8430-1 kattipayadivasasthāyī pūro dūronnato'pi bhavitā te |  8430-2 taṭini taṭadrumapātana- pātakamekaṃ cirasthāyi ||8431-1 katipayadivasaiḥ kṣayaṃ prayāyāthkanakagiriḥ kṛtavāsarāvasānaḥ |  8431-2 iti mudamupayāti cakravākī vitaraṇaśālini vīrarudradeve ||8432-1 katipayanimeṣavartini janmajarāmaraṇavihvale jagati |  8432-2 kalpāntakoṭibandhuḥ sphurati kavīnāṃ yaśaḥprasaraḥ ||8433-1 katipayapurasvāmī kāyavyayairapi durgraho mitavitaritā mohenāho mayānusṛtaḥ purā |  8433-2 tribhuvanapatirbuddhyārādhyo'dhunā svapadapradaḥpunaradhigatastatprācīno dunoti dinavyayaḥ ||8434-1 katipayasahakārapuṣparamyas tanutuhino'lpavinidrasinduvāraḥ |  8434-2 surabhimukhahimāgamāntaśaṃsī samupayayau śiśiraḥ smaraikabandhuḥ ||8435-1 kati pallavitā na puṣpitā vā taravaḥ santi samantato vasante |  8435-2 jagato vijaye tu puṣpaketoḥ sahakārī sahakāra eka eva ||8436-1 katiṣu na kṛtā sevā ke vā na vāgvibhavaiḥ stutās tṛṇamapi guṇaprītaḥ prādānna ko'pi vipaścitāṃ |  8436-2 ayamiha paraṃ duḥkhajvālākalāpamakhaṇḍayathkanakapayasāṃ dhārādaṇḍairakāṇḍaghanāghanaḥ ||8437-1 kati santi nonnatibhṛtastaravas tadapi tvameva gurukīrtivaraḥ |  8437-2 nibiḍādaraṃ navamarandaharaḥ sahakāra kāraṇamiha bhramaraḥ ||8438-1 kati santi latā vipine kusuma- stavakānamitāḥ khalu pallavitāḥ |  8438-2 praticampakacandananīpavanī- navapaṅkajinīmadhusaṃvalitāḥ ||8439-1 suciraṃ kusumeṣu paribhramatā na ca mālati kāpi tathā militā |  8439-2 madhupena punarmadhupānavidhau hṛdaye na yathā bhavatī kalitā ||8440-1 kati santi lavaṅgalatā lalitā navakorakitā dharaṇīsutale |  8440-2 kati bandhuragandhabhṛtastaravo guravo nivasanti girau malaye ||8441-1 katyakṣīṇi karoṭayaḥ kati kati dvīpidvipānāṃ tvacaḥ kākolāḥ kati pannagāḥ kati sudhādhāmnaśca khaṇḍāḥ kati |  8441-2 kiṃ ca tvaṃ ca kati trilokajanani tvadvāripūrodare majjajjantukadambakaṃ samudayatyekaikamādāya yat ||8442-1 katyaśvāḥ kati dhenavaḥ kati gajāḥ katyadbhutāḥ pādapāḥ sundaryaḥ kati susruvaḥ kati mahāratnānyanardhyāṇyapi |  8442-2 jātaikā kila kanyakā jalanidherdātuṃ prasaktā yadā sarvaṃ tadvyayitaṃ tadā pariṇatau nāmaikamuccheṣitaṃ ||8443-1 kathaṃcitkālidāsasya kālena bahunā mayā |  8443-2 avagāḍheva gambhīramasṛṇaudhā sarasvatī ||8444-1 kathaṃcidahni hṛdaye kuśalairviniveśitā |  8444-2 śikṣā gaurakhareṇeva rājñā vismāryate niśi ||8445-1 kathaṃcinnaidāghe divasa iva kope vigalite prasattau prāptāyāṃ tadanu ca niśāyāmiva śanaiḥ |  8445-2 smitajyotsnārambhakṣapitavirahadhvāntanivaho mukhendurmāninyāḥ sphurati kṛtapuṇyasya surate ||8446-1 kathaṃ te tyaktasadvṛttāḥ sukhaṃ rātriṣu śerate |  8446-2 maraṇāntaritā yeṣāṃ narakeṣūpapattayaḥ ||8447-1 kathaṃ tvadupalambhāśāvihatāviha tādṛśī |  8447-2 avasthā nālamāroḍhuṃ aṅganāmaṅganāśinī ||8447ā-1 kathaṃ na ramate cittaṃ dharme'nekasukhaprade |  8447ā-2 jīvānāṃ duḥkhabhīrūṇāṃ prāyo mithyādṛśo yataḥ ||8448-1 kathaṃ na parītaṃ gopībhiḥ kṣaṇarucimanojñābhirabhitaḥ |  8533-2 gamiṣyāmastoṣaṃ nayanaviṣayīkṛtya kṛtino vayaṃ premodrekaskhalitagatayo vepathubhṛtaḥ ||8534-1 kadā vṛndāraṇye mihiraduhituḥ saṅgamahite muhurbhrāmaṃ bhrāmaṃ caritalaharīṃ gokulapateḥ |  8534-2 lapannuccairuccairnayanapayasāṃ veṇibhirahaṃ kariṣye sotkaṇṭho niviḍamavasekaṃ viṭapināṃ ||8535-1 kadā vṛndāraṇye vimalayamunātīrapuline carantaṃ govindaṃ haladharasudāmādisahitaṃ |  8535-2 aye kṛṣṇa svāminmadhuramuralīvādana vibho prasīdetyākrośannimiṣamiva neṣyāmi divasān ||8536-1 kadā śayāno maṇikarṇikāyāṃ karṇe japāmyakṣaramindumauleḥ |  8536-2 avāpya mudrāṃ gatamohamudrāṃ nālokayiṣyāmi punaḥ prapañcaṃ ||8537-1 kadā śrīmatpaṅkeruhavanavikāśiprasṛmara- prathāpuñjaṃ tejaḥ kimapi kalayannaupaniṣadaṃ |  8537-2 graheśa śrībhāno mihira taraṇe sūrya savitaḥprasīdetyākrośannimiṣamiva neṣyāmi divasān ||8538-1 kadā saṃsārajālāntarbaddhaṃ triguṇarajjubhiḥ |  8538-2 ātmānaṃ mocayiṣyāmi śivabhaktiśalākayā ||8539-1 kadā samyagdhyāyannanupamacaritraṃ maṇigaṇa- sphuradbhūṣācitraṃ puraripukalatraṃ kimapi tat |  8539-2 śive durge kātyāyani janani bhaktapraṇayiniprasīdetyākrośannimiṣamiva neṣyāmi divasān ||8540-1 kadā hi mūrkho vacaneṣu bhītaḥ khalo na kutrāpi chaleṣvadakṣaḥ |  8540-2 andhena kācidyuvatī hi dṛṣṭā kasyātra kāmeṣu bhavecca lajjā ||8541-1 kadā hyahaṃ sameṣyāmi bharatena mahātmanā |  8541-2 śatrughnena ca vīreṇa tvayā ca raghunandana ||8542-1 kanakaṃ sugandhi tava tanvi vapur madhuro maṇiśca sakhi te'pyadharaṃ |  8542-2 nigaḍaṃ sukhasya karaṇaṃ bhavatīṃ sṛjato vidherniravadhirmahimā ||8543-1 kanakakamalakāntaiḥ sadya evāmbudhautaiḥ śravaṇataṭaniṣaktaiḥ pāṭalopāntanetraiḥ |  8543-2 uṣasi vadanabimbairaṃsasaṃsaktakeśaiḥ śriya iva gṛhamadhye saṃsthitā yoṣito'dya ||8544-1 kanakakamalakāntairānanaiḥ pāṇḍugaṇḍair uparinihitahāraiścandanārdraiḥ stanāntaiḥ |  8544-2 madajanitavilāsairdūṣṭipātairmunīndrān stanabharanatanāryaḥ kāmayanti praśāntān ||8545-1 kanakakalaśaśreṇī yatra prabhākaracumbanair atikharakarāghātairmadhyandine śithilīkṛtā |  8545-2 dravati bhajate dārḍhyaṃ siktā samīraṇakampita-dhvajapaṭasamānītasvargāpagājalabindubhiḥ ||8546-1 kanakakunḍalamaṇḍitabhāṣiṇe śakaripurviṣayāndaśa vidviṣaḥ |  8546-2 magadhakekayakeralakośalān kariśataṃ ca madālasalocanaṃ ||8547-1 kanakakramukāyitaṃ purastādatha paṅgeruhakorakāyamāṇaṃ |  8547-2 kramaśaḥ kalaśāyamānamāste sudṛśo vakṣasi kasya bhāgadheyaṃ ||8548-1 kanakacchatramambāyāḥ kurute kutukaṃ mahat |  8548-2 viśadeva dṛśorantaryannirgacchati mūdhaini ||8549-1 kanakadravakāntikāntayā militaṃ rāmamudīkṣya kāntayā |  8549-2 capalāyutavāridabhramān nanṛte cātakapotakairvane ||8549ā-1 kanakadravagauramambaraṃ dadhatorudvitayena sundaraṃ |  8549ā-2 udayanmaṇinūpuraprabhā- saraṇiśreṇijaṭālajānukaṃ ||8550-1 kanakanikaṣabhāsā sītayāliṅgitāṅgo navakuvalayadāmaśyāmavarṇābhirāmaḥ |  8550-2 abhinava iva vidyunmaṇḍito medhakhaṇḍaḥ śamayatu mama tāpaṃ sarvato rāmacandraḥ ||8551-1 kanakanikaṣasvacche rādhāpayodharamaṇḍale navajaladharaśyāmāmātmadyutiṃ pratibimbitāṃ |  8551-2 asitasicayaprāntabhrāntyā muhurmuhurutkṣipañ jayati janitavrīḍānamrapriyāhasito hariḥ ||8552-1 kanakabhaṅgapiśaṅgadalairdadhe sarajasāruṇakeśaracārubhiḥ |  8552-2 priyavimānitamānavatīruṣāṃ nirasanairasanairavṛthārthatā ||8553-1 kanakabhūṣaṇasaṃgrahaṇocito yadi maṇistrapuṇi pratibadhyate |  8553-2 na sa virauti na cāpi na śobhate bhavati yojayiturvacanīyatā ||8554-1 kanakamṛgamudasya svāṃ kuṭīṃ saṃpraviṣṭaḥ kvacidapi na vadhūṭīṃ nodadarśāṅganādau |  8554-2 tadapi sa raghuvīraḥ parṇaśālāgṛhāntar na viśati hṛdayāśātantunāśātibhīruḥ||8555-1 kanakarasamasṛṇavartita- hayagandhāmūlamiśraparyuṣitaṃ |  8555-2 māhiṣamiha navanītaṃ gatabīje kanakaphalamadhye8556-1 g_oṃayagāḍhodvartita- pūrvaṃ paścādanena saṃliptaṃ |  8556-2 bhavati hayaliṅgasadṛśaṃ liṅgaṃ kaṭhināṅganādayitaṃ ||8557-1 kanakasya tu pañcāṅgaṃ karpūraṃ ketakīrajaḥ |  8557-2 ātmaśukreṇa saṃyuktaṃ vaśyakṛdbhakṣitaṃ striyāḥ ||8558-1 kanakahariṇaṃ hatvā rāmo yayau nijamāśramaṃ janakatanayāṃ prāṇebhyo'pi priyāmavilokayan |  8558-2 dṛḍhamupagatairbāṣpāpūrairnimīlitalocano na viśati kuṭīmāśātantupraṇāśabhayādasau ||8559-1 kanakācalakānticauryabhājoḥ kucayoḥ kuṅkumapaṅkapūjanāni |  8559-2 anibandhanameva bandhanaṃ te kṛśatābhāgini kiṃ nu madhyabhāge ||8560-1 kanakācalajitvarastanīnāṃ ramaṇīnāṃ khalu yatra sanniveśaḥ |  8560-2 manasaḥ paramāṇutāṃ vadantaḥ kathamadyāpi na tārkikāstrapante ||8561-1 kaniṣṭhāṅgulivatsthūlaṃ pūrvārdhakṛtakuñcitaṃ |  8561-2 abhāve dantakāṣṭhasya pratiṣiddhadine'pi ca |  8561-3 apāṃ dvādaśagaṇḍūṣairmukhaśuddhirbhaviṣyati ||8562-1 kaniṣṭheṣu ca sarveṣu samatvenānuvartate |  8562-2 samopabhogajīveṣu yathaiva tanayeṣu ca ||8562ā-1 kanīnikākāntibhirañjanaṃ dṛśoḥ smitatviṣā candanacarccanaṃ hṛdaḥ |  8562ā-2 kaṭākṣabhābhirnavamutpalaṃ śrutes tadā vadhūnāmiti bhūṣaṇānyabhān ||8562bh-1 kanīnikeva netrasya kusumasyeva saurabhaṃ |  8562bh-2 samyaktvamucyate sāraṃ sarveṣāṃ dharmakarmaṇāṃ ||8563-1 kanthāṃ vahasi durbuddhe gardabhairapi durvahāṃ |  8563-2 śikhāyajñopavītābhyāṃ bhāraḥ kaste bhaviṣyati ||8563ā-1 kandamūlāni ye mūḍhāḥ sūryadeve jarnādane |  8563ā-2 bhakṣayanti narāḥ pārtha te vai naraka gāminaḥ ||8564-1 kandarpakaṇḍūlakaṭākṣabandīr indīvarākṣorabhilaṣyamāṇān |  8564-2 mandasmitādhāramukhāravindān vandāmahe vallavadhūrtapādān ||8565-1 kandarpakandali salīladṛśā lunīhi kopāṅkuraṃ caraṇayoḥ śaraṇātithiḥ syāṃ|  8565-2 paśya prasīda caramācalacūlacumbi bimbaṃ vidhorlavalapāṇḍuramastameti ||8566-1 kandarpajvarasaṃjvarākulatanorāścaryamasyāściraṃ cetaścandanacandramaḥkamalinīcintāsu saṃtāmyati |  8566-2 kiṃ tu klāntivaśena śītalataraṃ tvāmekameva kṣaṇaṃ dhyāyantī rahasi sthitā kathamapi kṣīṇā kṣaṇaṃ prāṇiti ||8567-1 kandarpadarpakalitāṅgamanoharāṇāṃ premṇā svayaṃ suratamandiramāgatānāṃ |  8567-2 aṅgāni k_oṃalatarāṇi manoramāṇāṃ dhanyā narāḥ sarabhasaṃ hi pariṣvajante ||8568-1 kandarpadevasya vimānasṛṣṭiḥ prāsādamālā rasapārthivasya |  8568-2 caitrasya sarvartuviśeṣacihnaṃ dolāvilāsaḥ sudṛśāṃ rarāja ||8569-1 kandarpapratibhūniveśitavalīrekhāvalīśobhitelīlodañcitabāhupāśayugalāpātaiśca bhoḥ kāmukāḥ |  8569-2 veśyānāṃ vipule nitambaphalake śāraiḥ kaṭākṣairito yadvaḥ krīḍitamatra dāsyati puro dāridryamevottaraṃ ||8570-1 kandarpapratimallakāntivibhavaṃ kādambinībāndhavaṃ vṛndāraṇyavilāsinīvyasaninaṃ veṣeṇa bhūṣāmayaṃ |  8570-2 mandasmeramukhāmbujaṃ madhurimavyāmṛṣṭabimbādharaṃ vande kandalitārdrayauvanavanaṃ kaiśorakaṃ śārṅgiṇaḥ ||8571-1 kandarpaśca ratiśca kuṅkumamṛdālepena mūṣādvayaṃ kurvāte rasasādhanāya vidhivatkastūrikāmudvayā |  8571-2 antardarpakabāṇatāpitayuvapremoṣmabhūyastayā niryātā rasabindavo bahirito hārasya muktācchalāt ||8572-1 kandarpasya jagattrayīvijayinaḥ sāmrājyadīkṣāguruḥkāntāmānaśiloñchavṛttirakhiladhvāntābhicā re kṛtī |  8572-2 devastryambakamaulimaṇḍanasarittīrasthalītāpasaḥ śṛṅgārādhvaradīkṣito vijayate rājā dvijānāmayaṃ ||8573-1 kandarpādapi sundarākṛtiriti prauḍhotsaladrāgayā vṛddhatvaṃ varayoṣito'nayaditi trāsākulasvāntayā |  8573-2 mārasyāpi śarairabhedyahṛditi śraddhābharaprahvayā pāyādvaḥ sphuṭabāṣpakampapulakaṃ ratyā jino vanditaḥ ||8574-1 kandarpādapi sundaro ravimahāḥ pratyarthisīmantinī-vaktrāmbhojasudhākaro'tivibhavo yuddheṣu pārthopamaḥ |  8574-2 rakṣākṛjjagataḥ svakīrtividito rāmo'stu yukto mudā dānīṃ śaṅkarasevako varaguṇo nītyuttamaḥ sarvadā ||8575-1 kandarpe nalakūvare kumudinīkānte'pyavajñāvatāṃ tvatsaundaryakathāsu tāsu marutāṃ vṛttāsu kautūhalāt |  8575-2 prāptā tānavamurvaśī ratiratiklāntā hatā rohiṇī jātā kiṃca kharasmarajvarabharā rambhāpi rambhātanuḥ ||8576-1 kandarpaikakṛpāṇavallari vane kasmādakasyādiyaṃ he kālāgurubālamañjari hahā mohādiha prāruhaḥ |  8576-2 sahyantāmupajātasaurabhapariṣvaṅgaistadaṅgairimāḥ kāntaiḥ kāntapuraṃdhrikuntalabharacchāyaiḥ kuṭhāracchidaḥ ||8577-1 kandalayatyānandaṃ nindati mandānilenducandanakaṃ |  8577-2 mandayati mandabhāvaṃ medhāvinā nirmitaḥ ||8581-1 kandaiḥ kandalitaṃ vanaiḥ kiśalitaṃ vallībhirujjṛmbhitaṃ vṛkṣaiḥ pallavitaṃ janaiḥ pramuditaṃ dhārādhare varṣati |  8581-2 bhrātaścātaka pātakaṃ kimapi te samyagna durbharātkimudarādviyogataḥ ||8583-1 kandharāvanatasyorvī gatasyādh_oṃukhasya te |  8583-2 lajjā na nāma nirlajjā garvo na galitaḥ kathaṃ ||8584-1 kanyāṃ kāmapyudūhya pravijahadudayadyauvanāmajña 8587-2 aihāhikajvaraṃ hanti śikhāyāmativegataḥ ||8588-1 kanyā kācidihāpi karmaṇi paṇaḥ syādityasūyācalat-sītāpāṅgamayūkhamāṃsalamukhajyotsnāviluptīṃ divaṃ |  8588-2 kurvāṇena raghūdvahena cakṛṣe vāñchantītthamanekakāraṇavaśātpuṃbhiḥ striyaḥ saṃgamaṃ śuddhasnehanibandhanā paravadhūḥ puṇyaiḥ paraiḥ prāpyate ||8590-1 kanyāgate savitari tiṣṭhanti pitaro gṛhe |  8590-2 śūnyaṃ pretapuraṃ tatra nāgendro'śvo ratho vā nṛpatirabhimukhaḥ pūrṇakumbho dhvajo vā |  8590bh-2 utkṣiptā naiva bhūmirkhalacarayugalaṃ siddhamannaṃ śatāyur veśyāstrī madyamāṃso hitamapi gaditaṃ maṅgalaṃ prasthitānāṃ ||8591-1 kanyādātre tu hyadhanaṃ dasyave sadhanaṃ naraṃ |  8591-2 guptaṃ jighāṃsave naiva vijñātamapi darśayet ||8592-1 kanyā niṣkāsitā śreṣṭhā vadhūḥ śreṣṭhā praveśitā |  8592-2 annaṃ saṃkalitaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ dharmaḥ śreṣṭho dine dine ||8593-1 kanyāprasūtasya dhanuḥprasaṅgādaṅgādhikāsāditavikramasya |  8593-2 dhanaṃjayādhīnaparākramasya himasya karṇasya ca ko viśeṣaḥ ||8594-1 kanyāyāḥ kila jīvitaṃ ||8595-1 kanyā varayate rūpaṃ mātā vittaṃ pitā śrutaṃ |  8595-2 bāndhavāḥ kulamicchanti miṣṭānnamitare janāḥ ||8595ā-1 kanyāvikrayiṇaścaiva rasavikrayiṇastathā |  8595ā-2 viṣavikrayiṇaścaiva narā nirayagāminaḥ ||8596-1 kanye samālokaya kānyakubjaṃ akubjakīrtiṃ naranāthamenaṃ |  8596-2 kakubjaye yasya dharāparāgair bhavanti vārāṃnidhayaḥ sthalāni ||8597-1 kapaṭaṃ ca bahutaraṃ na jānāti hi kaścana |  8597-2 kauliko viṣṇurūpeṇa bhuñjati rājakanyakāṃ ||8598-1 kapaṭakalitanidraṃ mandamālokayantī priyamadharamadhūni svecchayā pātumaicchat |  8598-2 madanamadamanojñā lajjayākṛṣṭacittā mukulitamukhapadmā citrasaṃstheva tasthau ||8599-1 kapaṭanaṭanakoṭerdhūrjaṭeḥ sannaṭasyod- bhaṭavikaṭajaṭābhistāḍitāḥ śailakūṭāt |  8599-2 kharatarakaraghātairutthitā diksthitāste nabhasi niravalambaṃ dantinaḥ saṃcaranti ||8600-1 kapaṭapaṭutā drohe cittaṃ satāṃ ca vimānane matirapanaye śāṭhyaṃ mitre suteṣvapi vañcanā |  8600-2 kṛtakamadhurā vākpratyakṣaṃ parokṣavighātinī kaliyugamahārājasyaitāḥ svarājyavibhūtayaḥ ||8601-1 kapaṭavacanabhājā kenacidvārayoṣā sakalarasikagoṣṭhīvañcikā vañcitāsau |  8601-2 iti vihasati riṅgadbhṛṅgavikṣiptacakṣur vikacakusumakānticchadmanā kelikuñjaḥ ||8602-1 kapaṭaśatanadīṣṇairvairibhirvañcito'pi nikṛtikaraṇadakṣo'pyatra saṃsārabhīruḥ |  8602-2 tanuvacanamanobhirvakratāṃ yo na yāti gatamalamṛjumānaṃ tasya sādhorvadanti ||8603-1 kapaṭādapi ripuhananaṃ kuryāditi nītirauśanasī |  8603-2 hananamṛte ca gurumate bandhādi vidhīyate ripoḥ kapaṭaiḥ ||8604-1 kapaṭena punarnaiva vyāpāro yadi yā kṛtaḥ |  8604-2 punarna paripākārhā haṇḍikā kāṣṭhanirmitā ||8605-1 kapardī bhūtisaṃpanno jagatīpatiradvayaḥ |  8605-2 dhigdaivamavyayaḥ so'pi bhṛṅgī śuṣyatyato bhṛśaṃ ||8606-1 kapāṭamuddhāṭaya cārunetre kāmo'sti śatrurmama pṛṣṭhalagnaḥ |  8606-2 āpūritaṃ tasya śaraiḥ śarīraṃ candrānane tvāṃ śaraṇaṃ prapannaḥ ||8607-1 kapāṭamuddhāṭaya lolalocane kandarpaśatrurmama pṛṣṭhalagnaḥ |  8607-2 ākṛṣya bāṇaṃ śithilīkaroti candrānane tvāṃ śaraṇāgato'smi ||8608-1 kapāṭavistīrṇamanoramoraḥ- sthalasthitiśrīlalanasya tasya |  8608-2 ānanditāśeṣajanā babhūva sarvāṅgasaṅginyaparaiva lakṣmīḥ ||8609-1 kapālaṃ vṛkṣamūlāni kucelasasahāyatā |  8609-2 samatā caiva sarvasminnetanmuktasya lakṣaṇaṃ ||8610-1 kapāla upahāraśca saṃtānaḥ saṃgatastathā |  8610-2 |  8612-2 iti ṣoḍaśakaṃ prāhuḥ saṃdhiṃ sandhivicakṣaṇāḥ ||8613-1 kapālasaṃdhirvijñepaḥ kevalaṃ samasaṃdhikaḥ |  8613-2 saṃpradānādbhavati ya upahāraḥ sa ucyate ||8614-1 kapāle gambhīraḥ kuhariṇi ||8619-1 kapikacchūmūlena ca madavihralachāgamūtrapiṣṭena |  8619-2 milanaṃ stabdhīkaraṇaṃ mūlena durālabhāyāśca ||8620-1 kapikulanakhamukhakhaṇḍita- tarutalaphalabhojano varaṃ puruṣaḥ |  8620-2 divyāḥ strīrdīvyata svayaṃ |  8688-2 kalistu caratu brahma praita vātipriyāya vaḥ ||8689-1 kayāsi kāminsuratāparādhāthpādānataḥ kopanayāvadhūtaḥ |  8689-2 tasyāḥ kariṣyāmi dṛḍhānutāpaṃ dakṣiṇāśāvalambinā |  8691-2 na kevalamanenātmā divaso'pi laghūkṛtaḥ ||8692-1 karakaṅkaṭakuṭyaṅkakhaṅgasaṃghaṭṭaṭāṅkṛtaiḥ |  8692-2 kālarātryā pranṛtyantyā raṇavīṇeva vādyate ||8693-1 karakajalapūtabhūtala- nihitapado vihitavikṛtahuṃkāraḥ |  8693-2 api vitathamantragaṇanā- vyagrasamagrāṅgulīparvā ||8694-1 karakampitakhaṅgayaṣṭibhīme raṇasaṃnāhitarāmanāthavīre |  8694-2 aribhūbhṛdamartyasundarīṇāṃ acalandakṣiṇavāmalocanāni ||8695-1 karakalitadāranarake śerata iha ye sajanti bhavasindhau |  8695-2 rasikāsta eva mānyā manyantāṃ dhanyamātmānaṃ ||8696-1 karakalitapināka nākanātha dbiṣadurumānasaśūla śūlapāṇe |  8696-2 bhava vṛṣabhavimāna mānaśauṇḍa trijagadakāraṇatāraka prasīda ||8697-1 karakākṛtabhīkabhekaloka- pratipālyāḥ kimu sāgareṇa kulyāḥ |  8697-2 valabhitkuliśaprahārabhīru- kṣitibhṛdrakṣaṇadakṣiṇena tulyāḥ ||8697ā-1 karakiśalayacālyamānasūrpa- kramanamadunnamadakṣipakṣmapāli |  8697ā-2 karanihitakanīnikaṃ smitākṣyāḥ kṣaṇamapi ramyaṃ tanvī punaḥ punarīkṣyate ||8698ā-1 karakisalayamūlaṃ dhunvatīnāṃ sa dhanyaḥ śravaṇapathamanalpaṃ yasya puṃsaḥ praviṣṭāḥ |  8698ā-2 navarataparirambhe bālasīmantinīnāṃ ahaha na na na mā mā muñca muñceti vācaḥ ||8699-1 karacaraṇakāñcihāra- prahāramavacintya balagṛhītakacaḥ |  8699-2 praṇayī cumbati dayitā- vadanaṃ sphuradadharamaruṇākṣaṃ ||8700-1 karacaraṇakṛtaṃ vā kāyajaṃ karmajaṃ vā śravaṇanayanajaṃ vā mānasaṃ vāparādhaṃ |  8700-2 vihitamavihitaṃ vā sarvametatkṣamasva jaya jaya karuṇābdhe śrīmahādeva śaṃbho ||8701-1 karacaraṇanāsamādau karṇau gṛhṇāti raktatāṃ gamayan |  8701-2 pāśālīva manobhuvaḥ ||8772-1 kare veṇīmeṇīsadṛśanayanā snānaviratau dadhānā harmyāgre haranayanatejohutamapi |  8772-2 iyaṃ mugdhā dugdhāmbudhibahalakallolasadṛśā dṛśā vāraṃ vāraṃ manasijataruṃ pallavayati ||8773-1 kare ślāghyastyāgaḥ śirasi gurupādapraṇamatā mukhe satyā vāṇī vijayi bhujayorvīryamatulaṃ |  8773-2 hṛdi svacchā vṛttiḥ śrutamadhigataṃ ca śravaṇayor vināpyaiśvaryeṇa prakṛtimahatāṃ maṇḍanamidaṃ ||8773ā-1 karairupāttānkamalotkarebhyo nijairvivasvānvikacodarebhyaḥ |  8773ā-2 tasyā nicikṣepa mukhāravinde svedāpadeśānmakarandabindūn ||8774-1 karairvā ||8776-1 karo'titāmro rāmāṇāṃ tantrītāḍanavibhramaṃ |  8776-2 karoti serṣyaṃ kānte ca śravaṇotpalatāḍanaṃ ||8777-1 karoti doṣaṃ na tamatra kesarī na dandaśūko na karī na bhūmipaḥ |  8777-2 atīva cedvarāhī samānyapatyāni vijāyate vā |  8779-2 samudbhavadbhānumayūkhavahnau jājvalyate tajjagatī samastā ||8780-1 karoti pāpaṃ yo'jñānānnātmano vetti ca kṣamaṃ |  8780-2 pradveṣṭi sādhuvṛttāṃśca ||8793bh-1 karotu karaṭaḥ śabdaṃ sarvadā prāṅgaṇe vasan |  8793bh-2 na śṛṇoti budhaḥ prītyā śṛṇoti pikabhāṣitaṃ ||8794-1 karotu tādṛśīṃ prītiṃ yādṛśī nīrapaṅkayoḥ |  8794-2 raviṇā śoṣite nīre 8839-2 jīvitamarakṣi pārthaiḥ svātmānaṃ sarvato rakṣet ||8840-1 karṇena nirjito'smīti cintāṃ cintāmaṇe tyaja |  8840-2 jitā devadrumāḥ pañca na duḥkhaṃ pañcabhiḥ saha ||8841-1 karṇe baddhā ravau 8845-2 nirdhautāñjanaśoṇakoṇanayanā snānāvasāne'ṅganā prasyandatkabarībharā na kurute kasya spṛhārdraṃ manaḥ ||8845ā-1 karṇotpalaṃ kaṭākṣāḥ kāntiste kanakakañcukaviśeṣaḥ |  8845ā-2 hasitāni sindhukanye hārāsstanaśailanirjhaṃravihārāḥ ||8846-1 karṇotpalānnayanamapi gaticyutātte tanmīlane mukhamayaṃ na jahāti bhṛṅgaḥ|  8846-2 yenaivamadya vinivārayasi pramatte tasminkare'pi na kimambujasāmyadoṣaḥ||8847-1 karṇotpalenāpi mukhaṃ sanāthaṃ labheta netradyutinirjitena |  8847-2 yadyetadīyena tataḥ kṛtārthā svacakṣuṣī kiṃ kurute kuraṅgī ||8848-1 karṇotsaṅgavisarpiṇī nayanayoḥ kāntirvataṃsotpalaṃ lākṣāsaṃbhramanirvyapekṣamadharaṃ lāvaṇyamevāñcati |  8848-2 hāro'syāḥ smitacandrikaiva kucayoraṅgaprabhā kañcukī tanvyāḥ kevalamaṅgabhāramadhunā manye paraṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ ||8849-1 karṇau tāvatkuvalayadṛśāṃ locanāmbhoruhābhyāṃ abhyākrāntau kanakaruciro bhāladeśo'pi neyaḥ |  8849-2 ityāśaṅkākulitamanasā vedhasā kajjalaughaiḥ sīmārekhā vyaraci nibiḍabhrūlatākaitavena ||8850-1 karṇau sapatnyaḥ praviśālayeyur viśālayeyurna kadāpi netre |  8850-2 vidyā sadabhyāsavaśena labhyā saujanyamabhyāsavaśādalabhyaṃ ||8850ā-1 kartavyaṃ jinavandanaṃ ||8851-1 kartavyaṃ tveva karmeti manoreṣa viniścayaḥ |  8851-2 ekāntena hyanīho'yaṃ parābhavati pūruṣaḥ ||8852-1 kartavyaṃ na karoti bandhubhirapi snehātmabhirbodhitaḥ kāmitvādavamanyate hitamataṃ dhīro'pyabhīṣṭaṃ naraḥ |  8852-2 niṣkāmasya na vikriyā tanubhṛto loke kvaciddṛśyate yattasmādidameva mūlamakhilānarthasya nirdhāritaṃ ||8853-1 kartavyaṃ bhūmipālena śaraṇāgatarakṣaṇaṃ |  8853-2 kapotarakṣaṇaṃ śyenātkṛtvā kīrtiṃ śibirgataḥ ||8854-1 kartavyaṃ vacanaṃ sarvaiḥ samūhahitavādināṃ |  8854-2 ... ... ... ... ... ... ||8855-1 kartavyaḥ pratidivasaṃ prasannacittaiḥ svalpo'pi dhanuṣā jambuko hataḥ ||8857-1 kartavyameva kartavyaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi |  8857-2 akartavyaṃ na kartavyaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi ||8858-1 kartavyā cārthasāre'pi kāvye śabdavicitratā |  8858-2 vinā ghaṇṭāṭaṇatkāraṃ gajo gacchanna śobhate ||8859-1 kartavyāni ca mitrāṇi durbalāni balāni ca |  8859-2 paśya kūrmapatirbaddho mūṣikeṇa vimocitaḥ ||8860-1 kartavyānyeva mitrāṇi |  8863-2 saṃbandho bandhubhiḥ śreyānlokayorubhayorapi ||8864-1 kartavyo hṛdi vartate yadi tarorasyopakārastadā mā kālaṃ gamayāmbuvāha samaye siñcainamambhobharaiḥ |  8864-2 śīrṇe puṣpaphale dale kartā kārayitā caiva yaścaivamanumanyate |  8866-2 śubhaṃ vā yadi vā pāpaṃ teṣāmapi samaṃ phalaṃ |  8867-1 kartā dyūtacchalānāṃ jatumayaśaraṇoddīpanaḥ
