pratīmaḥ ||8932-1 karmadāyādavallokaḥ karmasaṃbandhalakṣaṇaḥ |  8932-2 karmāṇi codayantīha yathānyonyaṃ tathā vayaṃ ||8933-1 karmabrahmavicāraṇāṃ vijahato bhogāpavargapradāṃ ghoṣaṃ kaṃcana kaṇṭhaśoṣaphalakaṃ kurvantyamī tārkikāḥ |  8933-2 pratyakṣaṃ na punāti nāpaharate pāpāni pīlucchaṭā vyaptirnāvati naiva pātyanumitirno pakṣatā rakṣati ||8934-1 karmabhiḥ svairavāptasya janmanaḥ pitarau yathā |  8934-2 rājñaṃ tathānye rājyasya pravṛttāveva kāraṇaṃ ||8935-1 karmabhūmimimāṃ prāpya kartavyaṃ karma yacchubhaṃ |  8935-2 agnirvāyuśca s_oṃaśca karmaṇāṃ phalabhāginaḥ ||8936-1 karmabhūmiriyaṃ brahmanphalabhūmirasau matā |  8936-2 iha yatkriyate karma tatparatropabhujyate ||8937-1 karma lokaviruddhaṃ tu kurvāṇaṃ kṣaṇadācara |  8937-2 tīkṣṇaṃ sarvajano hanti sarpaṃ duṣṭamivāgataṃ ||8938-1 karma sarvottamaṃ kiṃ me karaṇīyaṃ bhavediti |  8938-2 mānavaḥ prabhavedvettuṃ labdhvā sthairyaṃ śamaṃ tathā ||8939-1 karmāṇi janmāntarasaṃcitāni mahānti vijñānamahāhutāśe |  8939-2 sarvāṇi dagdhāni bhavanti sadyo mahānalasyāsti kimārdrabhāvaḥ ||8940-1 karmāṇi badhnanti śubhāśubhāni kartātramaupādhikameva jīvaṃ |  8940-2 paraṃ na tatsākṣiṇamastadoṣaṃ ābhīramadyātkimaje śayāne ||8941-1 karmāṇi yāni loke duḥkhanimittāni lajjanīyāni |  8941-2 sarvāṇi tāni kurute jaṭharanarendrasya vaśamito jantuḥ ||8941ā-1 karmāṇi sarvāṇi ca mohanīye duḥkhāni sarvāṇi daridratāyāṃ |  8941ā-2 pāpāni sarvāṇi ca cauryabhāve doṣā aśeṣā anṛte bhavanti ||8942-1 karmāṇyārabhamāṇānāṃ duḥkhahatyai sukhāya ca |  8942-2 paśyetpākaviparyāsaṃ mithunīcāriṇāṃ nṛṇāṃ ||8943-1 karmāniṣṭaṃ vidhatte bhavati paravaśo lajjate no janānāṃ dharmādharmau na vetti tyajati gurukulaṃ sevate nīcalokaṃ |  8943-2 bhūtvā prājñaḥ kulīnaḥ prathitapṛthuguṇo mānanīyo budho'pi grasto yenātra dehī nuda madanaripuṃ jīva taṃ buḥkhadakṣaṃ ||8943ā-1 karmānubhāvaduḥkhita evaṃ mohāndhakāragahanavati |  8943ā-2 andha iva durgamārge bhramati hi saṃsārakāntāre ||8944-1 karmānumeyāḥ sarvatra parokṣaguṇavṛttayaḥ |  8944-2 tasmātparokṣavṛttīnāṃ phalaiḥ karma vibhāvayet ||8945-1 karmānyajanmani kṛtaṃ sadasacca daivaṃ tatkevalaṃ bhavati janmani satkulādye|  8945-2 bālyātparaṃ vinayasauṣṭhavapātratāpi puṃdaivajā kṛṣivadityata udyameta ||8946-1 karmāparādhātsattvānāṃ vināśe samupasthite |  8946-2 anayo nayarūpeṇa buddhimākramya tiṣṭhati ||8947-1 karmāyattaṃ phalaṃ puṃsāṃ buddhiḥ karmānusāriṇī |  8947-2 tathāpi sudhiyā bhāvyaṃ suvicāryaiva kurvatā ||8948-1 karmāraṇyaṃ dahati śikhivanmātṛvatpāti duḥkhāthsamyagrītiṃ vadati guruvatsvāmivadyadbibharti |  8948-2 tattvātattvaprakaṭanapaṭuḥ spaṣṭamāpnoti pūtaṃ tatsaṃjñānaṃ vigalitamalaṃ jñānadānena martyaḥ ||8949-1 karmendriyāṇi saṃyamya ya āste manasā smaran |  8949-2 indriyārthānrvimūḍhātmā mithyācāraḥ sa ucyate ||8950-1 yastvindriyāṇi manasā niyamyārabhate'rjuna |  8950-2 karmendriyaiḥ karmayogaṃ asaktaḥ sa viśiṣyate ||8950ā-1 karmendhanaṃ yadajñānātsaṃcitaṃ janmakānane |  8950ā-2 upavāsaśikhī sarvaṃ tadbhasmīkurute kṣaṇāt ||8950bh-1 karmendhanaṃ samāśritya dṛḍhā sadbhāvanāhutiḥ |  8950bh-2 dharmadhyānāgninā kāryā dīkṣitenāgnikārikā ||8951-1 karmaiva kāraṇaṃ cātra sugatiṃ durgatiṃ prati |  8951-2 karmaiva prāktanamapi kṣaṇaṃ kiṃ ko'sti cākriyaḥ ||8952-1 karmoktinarmanirmāṇaiḥ prātaḥ prātaḥ pradhāvatāṃ |  8952-2 dhanaṃ dhanaṃ pralapatāṃ nidhanaṃ vismṛtaṃ nṛṇāṃ ||8952ā-1 karmodayādbhavagatir bhavagatimūlā śarīranirvṛttiḥ |  8952ā-2 dehādindriyaviṣayā viṣayanimitte ca sukhaduḥkhe ||8953-1 kāryasya niḥsaṃśayamātmahetoḥ sarūpatāṃ hetubhirabhyupetya |  8953-2 duḥkhasya kāryaṃ sukhamāmanantaḥ svenaiva vākyena hatā varākāḥ ||8954-1 karṣaṇānveṣaṇe yātuḥ kṣutaṃ jaladavṛṣṭaye |  8954-2 hemādibhūṣaṇe navye vidhṛte bhūṣaṇāptaye ||8955-1 karṣati vapati lunīte dīvyati sīvyati punāti vayate ca |  8955-2 vidadhāti kiṃ na kṛtyaṃ jaṭharānalaśāntaye tanumān ||8956-1 karṣadbhiḥ sicayāñcalānatirasātkurvadbhirāliṅganaṃ gṛhṇānaiḥ kacamālikhadbhiradharaṃ vidrāvayadbhiḥ kucau |  8956-2 pratyakṣe'pi kaliṅgamaṇḍalapaterantaḥpurāṇāmaho dhikkaṣṭaṃ viṭapairviṭairiva vane kiṃ nāma nāceṣṭitaṃ ||8957-1 kalaṃ kamuktaṃ tanumadhyanāmikā stanadvayī ca tvadṛte na hantyataḥ |  8957-2 na yāti bhūtaṃ gaṇane bhavanmukhe kalaṅkamuktaṃ tanumadhyanāmikā ||8958-1 kalakaṇṭha gaṇāsvādye kāmasyāstre nijāṅkure |  8958-2 nimbavṛttibhirudgadīrṇe na cūtaḥ paritapyate ||8959-1 kalakalamaparā mudhā vidhāya kṣititilakānnayanāntamāsasāda |  8959-2 avatarati mṛgīdṛśāṃ tṛtīyaṃ manasijacakṣurupāyadarśaneṣu ||8960-1 kalakokilanādavivādabalad- bhramarāvalilolarasāladruma- |  8960-2 kramamālatikādikadambalasat- kusumāgamamodamanojaśaraiḥ ||8961-1 paripīḍitayā vidhusāndrakalā- kamalākaracampakasaṃgadadhat- |  8961-2 pavanairanucintitayā priya sā sakhi samprati kiṃ kriyate'balayā ||8962-1 kalakvaṇitagarbheṇa kaṇṭhenāghūrṇitekṣaṇaḥ |  8962-2 pārāvataḥ paribhramya riraṃsuścumbati priyāṃ ||8963-1 kalakvāṇe vīṇe virama raṇitātkokila sakhe sakhedo mābhūstvaṃ druhiṇavihitaste paribhavaḥ |  8963-2 sudhe muñca spardhāmadharamadhusaṃsargasarasāḥ sphuṭantyetā vācaḥ kimapi kamanīyā mṛgadṛśaḥ ||8964-1 kalaṅkadāśo gaganāmburāśau prasārya candrātapatantujālaṃ |  8964-2 lagnoḍumīnāṃllaghu saṃjighṛkṣuścandraplavasthaścaramāvdhimeti ||8965-1 kalaṅkayanti sanmārgajuṣaḥ paribhavantyalaṃ |  8965-2 vātyā ivāticapalāḥ striyo bhūrirajovṛtāḥ ||8966-1 tattāsu na prasaktavyaṃ dhīrasattvaiḥ subuddhibhiḥ |  8966-2 śīlamabhyasanīyaṃ tu vītarāgapadāptaye ||8967-1 kalaṅkahīnaḥ kṣayadoṣaśūnyaḥ sadā nivṛttastamaso bhayācca |  8967-2 batābhaviṣyaddvijanāyako'pi tadāpi manye na tavānanābhaṃ ||8968-1 kalaṅkinaḥ priye doṣākarasya ca jaḍasya ca |  8968-2 na jātu śaktirindoste mukhena pratigarjituṃ ||8969-1 kalaṅkini jale kvāpi sauraṃ pratiphalanmahaḥ |  8969-2 tamo'pahatvaṃ tanute samṛddhiṃ ca dine dine ||8970-1 kalaṅkī niḥśaṅkaṃ paritapatu śītadyutirasau bhujaṅgavyāsaṅgīvamatu garalaṃ candanarasaḥ |  8970-2 svayaṃ dagdho dāhaṃ vitaratu manobhūrapi bhṛśaṃ jagatprāṇa prāṇānapaharasi kiṃ te samucitaṃ ||8970ā-1 kalaṅkena yathā candraḥ kṣāreṇa lavaṇāmbudhiḥ |  8970ā-2 kalahena tathā bhāti jñānavānāpi mānavaḥ ||8971-1 kalatraṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā ramate yaḥ parastriyaḥ |  8971-2 adharmaścāpadastasya sadyaḥ phalati nityaśaḥ ||8972-1 kalatracintākucitasya puṃsaḥ śrutaṃ ca śīlaṃ ca guṇāśca sarve |  8972-2 apakvakumbhe nihitā ivāpaḥ prayānti dehena samaṃ vināśaṃ ||8973-1 kalatranindāguruṇā kilaivaṃ abhyāhataṃ kīrtiviparyayeṇa |  8973-2 ayoghanenāya ivābhitaptaṃ vaidehibandhorhṛdayaṃ vidadre ||8974-1 kalatraputrādinimittataḥ kdacidvinindyarūpe vihite'pi karmaṇi |  8974-2 idaṃ kṛtaṃ karma vininditaṃ satāṃ mayeti bhavyaścakito vinindati ||8975-1 kalatrabhāreṇa vilolanīvinā galaddukūlastanaśālinorasā |  8975-2 valivyapāyasphuṭar_oṃarājinā nirāyatattvādudareṇa tāmyatā ||8976-1 vilambamānākulakeśapāśayā kayācidāviṣkṛtabāhumūlayā |  8976-2 taruprasūnānyapadiśya sādaraṃ manodhināthasya manaḥ samādade ||8977-1 kalatramātmā suhṛdo dhanāni vṛthā bhavantīha nimeṣamātrāt |  8977-2 muhurmuhuścākulitāni tāni tasmānna vidvānativigrahī syāt ||8977ā-1 kalatraharaṇalkeśātkhinnānāmātmanastanau |  8977ā-2 dhartumutsukatā naṣṭeḥ sudṛśāṃ sudhiyāmiva ||8978-1 kalabha tavāntikamāgataṃ alimetaṃ mā kadāpyavajñāsīḥ |  8978-2 api dānasundarāṇāṃ dvipadhuryāṇāmayaṃ śirodhāryaḥ ||8979-1 kalamākrāntaviśvasya maṣīkṛṣṇasya bhoginaḥ |  8979-2 āsannabandhanasyānte divirasya dhanena kiṃ ||8980-1 kalamaṃ phalabhārātigurumūrdhatayā śanaiḥ |  8980-2 vināmāntikodbhūtaṃ samāghrātumivotpalaṃ ||8980ā-1 kalamadhuraraktakaṇṭhī śayane madirālasā samadanā ca |  8980ā-2 vaktrāparavaktrābhyāṃ upatiṣṭhatu vāramukhyā tvāṃ ||8981-1 kalamāḥ pākavinamrā mūlatalāghrātasurabhikalhārāḥ |  8981-2 pavanākampitaśirasaḥ prāyaḥ kurvanti parimalaślāghāṃ ||8982-1 kalamāntanirgatamaṣī- binduvyājena sāñjanāśrukaṇā |  8982-2 kāyasthaluṇṭhyamānā roditi khinneva rājaśrīḥ ||8983-1 kalaya kamalamasmirnnityudīrya sthitānāṃ pratiphalitamukheṣu nyastahastāravindāḥ |  8983-2 sphaṭikavipinamadhye māṇikapreyasīnāṃ nibhṛtahasitapātraṃ yatra yātā yuvānaḥ ||8984-1 kalayati kamalopamānamakṣṇoḥ prathayati vāci sudhārasasya sāmyaṃ |  8984-2 sakhi kathaya kimācarāmi kānte samajani tatra sahiṣṇutaiva doṣaḥ ||8985-1 kalayati kiṃ na sadā phalatāṃ bahuphalatāṃ ca sa vṛkṣaḥ |  8985-2 yasya paropakṛtau kaścinna sapakṣo'pi vipakṣaḥ ||8986-1 kalayati kuvalayamālā- lalitaṃ kuṭilaḥ kaṭākṣavikṣepaḥ |  8986-2 adharaḥ kisalayalīlā- mānanamasyāḥ kalānidhivilāsaṃ ||8987-1 kalayati mama cetastalpamaṅgārakalpaṃ jvalayati mama gātraṃ candanaṃ candrakaśca |  8987-2 tirayati mama netre mohajanmāndhakāro vikṛtabahuvikāraṃ manmatho māṃ dunoti ||8988-1 kalayatu haṃsavilāsagatiṃ sa bakaḥ sarasi varākaḥ |  8988-2 nīrakṣīravivekavidhau tasya kutaḥ paripākaḥ ||8989-1 kalaya valayaṃ dhammille'sminniveśaya mallikāṃ racaya sicayaṃ muktāhāraṃ vibhūṣaya satvaraṃ |  8989-2 mṛgamadamaṣīpatrālepaṃ kuruṣva kapolayoḥ sahacari samāyātaḥ prātaḥ sa te hṛdayapriyaḥ ||8990-1 kalayasi vayasya kasmāthtvaṃ ruciraṃ bhāratīśāstraṃ |  8990-2 atro'ktipratyuktau kalaya mitho bhūriśastrapātaraṇaṃ ||8991-1 kalayā tuṣārakiraṇasya puraḥ parimandabhinnatimiraughajaṭaṃ |  8991-2 kṣaṇamabhyapadyata janairna mṛṣā gaganaṃ gaṇādhipatimūrtiriti ||8992-1 kalayātra prakāśyaṃ cetkiṃcidvā divyajīvane |  8992-2 tasyāmapi prakāśā syādviśālā śāntirujjvalā ||8992ā-1 kalaye kisalayamadharaṃ śaṅke paṅkeruhaṃ karadvandvaṃ |  8992ā-2 manye manasijavetraṃ gātraṃ netraikamohanaṃ tanvyāḥ ||8992bh-1 kalaravakaṇṭhakarambita- kalaravakalakaṇṭhakūjite surate |  8992bh-2 tava manumīlitalocana- mānanamavalokituṃ priye kalaye ||8993-1 kalaśe nijahetudaṇḍajaḥ kimu cakrabhramakāritāguṇaḥ |  8993-2 sa taduccakucau bhavanprabhā- jharacakrabhramamātanoti yat ||8994-1 kalahaḥ kadāpi māstviti kalitaśarīraikyayoḥ śivayoḥ |  8994-2 ahamasmyahamasmīti prāptaḥ kalaho mama trāṇe ||8995-1 kalahakalabhavindhyaḥ kopagṛdhraśmaśānaṃ vyasanabhujagarandhraṃ dveṣadasyupradoṣaḥ |  8995-2 sukṛtavanadavāgnirmārdavāmbhodavāyur nayanalinatuṣāro'tyarthamarthānurāgaḥ ||8996-1 kalahakalayā yatsaṃvṛtyai trapāvanatānanā pihitapulakodbhedaṃ subhrūścakarṣa na kañcukaṃ |  8996-2 dayitamabhitastāmutkaṇṭhāṃ vivavruranantaraṃ jhaṭiti taṭiti truṭyanto'ntaḥ stanāṃśukasandhayaḥ ||8997-1 kalahapriyātidīrghā kharvā vā śyāmapītaharitā vā |  8997-2 lamboṣṭhī laghunāsā laghuśithilastanavibhāgā ca ||8998-1 kalahamātanute madirāvaśas tamiha yena nirasyati jīvitaṃ |  8998-2 vṛṣamapāsyati saṃcinute malaṃ dhanamapaiti janaiḥ paribhūyate ||8999-1 kalahāntaritāpralapanaṃ ataḥ paraṃ nāyakasya śikṣā ca |  8999-2 saṃbhogāviṣkaraṇaṃ kulaṭā saṃkīrṇamiti ca śṛṅgāraḥ ||9000-1 kalahāntāni harmyāṇi kuvākyāntaṃ ca sauhṛdaṃ |  9000-2 kurājāntāni rāṣṭrāṇi kukarmāntaṃ yaśo nṛṇāṃ ||9001-1 kalahāyante mūḍhāḥ kaḥ pratibhūḥ śvaḥ prabhāta iti |  9001-2 tasyāmeva rajanyāṃ kaḥ pratibhūḥ svasya sattāyāṃ ||9002-1 kalāṃ tāmaindavīṃ vande yayā yādaṣpatiḥ pitā |  9002-2 āruhya haramūrdhānaṃ kṛtastrailokyamūrdhani ||9003-1 kalāḥ sarve harereva saprajāpataystathā |  9003-2 ete tvaṃśakalāḥ puṃsaḥ kṛṣṇastu bhagavānsvayaṃ ||9003ā-1 kalākalāpasampannā upakartuḥ parañmukhāḥ |  9003ā-2 na bhavanti mahātmānaḥ sarasaḥ śikhino yathā ||9004-1 kalākāṣṭhāmuhūrtānāṃ kālasya vrajatāṃ javāt |  9004-2 na lakṣyate vibhāgena dīpasyevārciṣāṃ gatiḥ ||9005-1 kalāttamāyālavakāntamūrtiḥ kalakvaṇadveṇuninādaramyaḥ |  9005-2 śrito hṛdi vyākulayaṃstrilokīṃ śriye'stu gopījanavallabho vaḥ ||9006-1 kalādhāro vakraḥ sphuradadhararāgo navatanur galanmānāveśāstaruṇaramaṇīrnāgara iva |  9006-2 ghanaśroṇībimbe nayanamukule cādharadale kapole grīvāyāṃ kucakalaśayoścumbati śaśī ||9007-1 kalādhināthādhigamāddvitīye kimadvitīyeti tanoṣi garvaṃ |  9007-2 ayi tvamasmadvacasi pratīyā ayaṃ tṛtīyāmupagantukāmaḥ ||9008-1 kalādhināthānayanāya sāyaṃ kumudvatīpreṣita eva bhṛṅgaḥ |  9008-2 kimindunāliṅgya sarāgamaṅke kṛtaḥ kalaṅkabhramamātanoti ||9009-1 kalānāṃ grahaṇādeva saubhāgyamupajāyate |  9009-2 deśakālau tvapekṣyāsāṃ prayogaḥ saṃbhavenna vā ||9010-1 kalānāthaḥ kāmaṃ bhajati bahudoṣāṅkitatanuṃ kumudvatyāstasminnapi bhavati kiṃ nāma na ruciḥ |  9010-2 na padminyā modaḥ kimudayatyuṣṇamahasi priye prāyo doṣānna gaṇayati cittaṃ mṛgadṛśaḥ ||9010ā-1 kalānidhikarasparśātprasannollāsitārakā |  9010ā-2 bimraṇāmbaramānīlaṃ kāminī yāminīyate ||9011-1 kalānidhirayaṃ raveḥ samupalabhya rūpaṃ svayaṃ dināntasamaye'spṛśatsapadi padminīṃ rāgavān |  9011-2 dhavānyakarasaṃgamānmukuliteti pūrvākṛtiṃ samīkṣya jahasuḥ priyā dhruvamabhūdataḥ pāṇḍuraḥ ||9012-1 kalāpināṃ cārutayopayānti vṛndāni lāpoḍhaghanāgamānāṃ |  9012-2 vṛndānilāpoḍhaghanāgamānāṃ kalāpināṃ cārutayo'payānti ||9013-1 kalābhirucchritā veśyā rūpaśīlaguṇānvitā |  9013-2 labhate gaṇikāśabdaṃ sthānaṃ ca janasaṃsadi ||9014-1 kalāminduḥ karaṃ dātā dhārāṃ dhārādharo yadi |  9014-2 saṃkocayiṣyate tarhi jīviṣyati kathaṃ jagat ||9015-1 kalāratnaṃ gītaṃ gaganatalaratnaṃ dinamaṇiḥ sabhāratnaṃ vidvānśravaṇapuṭaratnaṃ harikathā |  9015-2 niśāratnaṃ candraḥ śayanatalaratnaṃ śaśimukhī mahīratnaṃ śrīmāñjayati raghunātho nṛpavaraḥ ||9016-1 kalāvataḥ saiva kalā yayādhaḥkriyate bhavaḥ |  9016-2 bahvībhiśca kalābhiḥ kiṃ yābhiraṅkaḥ pradarśyate ||9017-1 kalāvati kṣatatamasi prabhāvati sphuṭodaye jananayanābhinandini |  9017-2 dadurdūśaṃ śaśini ruṣābhisārikāḥ kvacidbhavatyatisubhago'pi durbhagaḥ ||9018-1 kalāvati calāṃ dṛṣṭiṃ na kuryāstvaṃ muhurmuhuḥ |  9018-2 lagno'pi na tathā bāṇo bādhate cālito yathā ||9019-1 kalāsīmā kāvyaṃ sakalaguṇasīmā vitaraṇaṃ bhaye sīmā mṛtyuḥ sakalasukhasīmā suvadanā |  9019-2 tapaḥsīmā muktiḥ sakalakṛtisīmāśritabhṛtiḥ priye sīmāhlādaḥ śravaṇasukhasīmā harikathā ||9020-1 kalā sevātha dharmārthau tṛṣṇādāridryapaddhatī |  9020-2 santoṣakṣāntikaruṇā vairāgyaṃ tadanu stutiḥ ||9021-1 kalāstāstāḥ samyagvahasi yadasi tvaṃ dvijapatir dyutistādṛgnūtnā janirapi ca ratnākarakule |  9021-2 bahu brūmaḥ kiṃ vā puraharaśir_oṃaṇḍanamasi tvadīyaṃ tatsarvaṃ śaśadhara kalaṅkādviphalitaṃ ||9022-1 kalikaluṣasaṅkaṭākula- kuṭumbasaṃvalanakhedavikalasya9022-2 pratinidhiriva pravāsaḥ saṃsāravirāgasukhasamudrasya ||9023-1 kalikaluṣe manasi sve kathamiva jagadārjavaṃ labhate |  9023-2 cakṣurdoṣe jāgrati candradvitvaṃ kuto yātu ||9024-1 kalikālamiyaṃ yāvadagastyasya munarepi |  9024-2 mānasaṃ khaṇḍayatyatra śaśikhaṇḍānukāriṇī ||9025-1 kalitagarimā śroṇirmadhyaṃ vivṛddhavalitrayaṃ hṛdayamudayallajjaṃ majjaccirantanacāpalaṃ |  9025-2 mukulitakucaṃ vakṣaścakṣurmanāgdhṛtavakrima kramaparigaladbālyaṃ tasyā vapustanute śriyaṃ ||9026-1 kalitamambaramākalayankarair mṛditapaṅkajakośapayodharaḥ |  9026-2 vikasadutpalanetravilokitaḥ sakhi niśāṃ sarasīkurute vidhuḥ ||9027-1 kalito ruciraṃ na karma cethkriyate'naṅgakṛteḥ kutaḥ phalaṃ |  9027-2 smarato hṛdi puṇḍarīkadṛṅbhajate'sau saphalastataḥ ||9028ā-1 kalindajānīrabhare'rdhamagnā bakāḥ prakāmaṃ kṛtabhūriśabdāḥ |  9028ā-2 dhvāntena vairādvinigīryaṃmāṇāḥ krośanti manye śaśinaḥ kiśorāḥ||9029-1 kalibhūpe samāyāte dharmo'dharmāyate bhuvi |  9029-2 adharmaḥ sarvaṃtaḥ puṃsāṃ hanta dharmavadarthyate ||9030-1 kalimāyāntamutprekṣya vilīyante surā api |  9030-2 tadāśritasya dharmādeḥ kā kathā jīvane punaḥ ||9031-1 kalilaṃ caikarātreṇa pañcarātreṇa budbudaṃ |  9031-2 pakṣaikenāṇḍakaḥ so'tha māsapūrṇe śiro kuru ||9032-1 kalisāmrājyamāsādya na bhetavyaṃ bhavāntarāt |  9032-2 dharmānuṣṭhānamūḍhāvāṃ bhītirekāvaśiṣyate ||9033-1 kaluṣaṃ kaṭukaṃ lavaṇaṃ virasaṃ salilaṃ yadi vāśubhagandhi bhavet |  9033-2 tadanena bhavatyamalaṃ surasaṃ sasugandhi guṇairaparaiśca yutaṃ ||9034-1 kaluṣaṃ ca  9037-2 kīrtinādeva kṛṣṇasya muktabandhaḥ paraṃ vrajet ||9037ā-1 kalau karāle na sukhaṃ labheta pakṣadvayādeva virodhakāle |  9037ā-2 madhyasthatā pratyuta nindyate'pi samantato hā sa kale 9042-2 yenotkṣipya kṣaṇamasilatāṃ dhūmavatkalmaṣecchān mlecchānhatvā dalitakalinākāri satyāvatāraḥ ||9043-1 kalpakṣoṇiruho'yamityanudinaṃ bhūmīsurairbhāvyase kāmo'sāviti kāminībhirabhitaścitte ciraṃ rajobharapayas tejaḥścāsāntarāmbaraireṣaḥ ||9045-1 kalpadrumaḥ kalpitameva sūte sā kāmadhukkāmitameva dogdhi |  9045-2 cintāmaṇiścintitameva datte satāṃ hi saṅgaḥ sakalaṃ prasūte ||9046-1 kalpadrumānvigatavāñchajane sumerau ratnānyagādhasalile saritāmadhīśe |  9046-2 dhātrā śriyaṃ nidadhatā prakhaleṣu nityaṃ atyujjvalaḥ khalu ghaṭe nihitaḥ pradīpaḥ ||9047-1 kalpadrumāśca santaśca yaḥ pānthasārthaṃ kurute kṛtārthaṃ ||9049-1 kalpadrumo na jānāti na dadāti bṛhaspatiḥ |  9049-2 ayaṃ tu jagatījānirjānāti ca dadāti ca ||9050-1 kalpadrumo'pi kāle na bhavedyadi phalapradaḥ |  9050-2 ko viśeṣastadā tasya vanyairanyamahīruhaiḥ ||9050ā-1 kalpadrorapi kalpadrurmahato'pi maṇermaṇiḥ |  9050ā-2 devānāmapi pūjyo'si kiyatte mama pūraṇaṃ ||9051-1 kalpayati yena vṛttiṃ sadasi ca ||9052-1 kalpavṛkṣaśikhareṣu saṃprati prasphuradbhiravikalpasundari |  9052-2 hārayaṣṭigaṇanāmivāṃśubhiḥ kartumudyatakutūhalaḥ śaśī ||9053-1 kalpasthāyi na jīvitaṃ aiśvaryaṃ nāpyate ca yadabhimataṃ |  9053-2 lokastathāpyakāryaṃ kurute kāryaṃ kimuddiśya ||9054-1 kalpāntakrūrakeliḥ kratukadanakaraḥ kundakarpūrakāntiḥkrīḍankailāsakūṭe kalitakumudinīkāmukaḥ kāntakāyaḥ |  9054-2 kaṅkālakrīḍanotkaḥ kalitakalakalaḥ kālakālīkalatraḥ kālindīkālakaṇṭhaḥ kalayatu kuśalaṃ ko'pi kāpāliko naḥ ||9055-1 kalpāntapavanā vāntu yāntu caikatvamarṇavāḥ |  9055-2 tapantu dvādaśādityā nāsti kalyāṇaṃ naḥ kimadhikamito jīvanārthaṃ yadasmāl lūtvā vṛkṣānahaha dahasi mrātaraṅgārakāra |  9060-2 kiṃ tvetasminnaśanipiśunairātapairākulānāṃ adhvanyānāmaśaraṇamaruprāntare ko'bhyupāyaḥ ||9061-1 sakhyā bhṛśaṃ vāritaḥ ||9062-1 kalyāṇaṃ bhagavatkathākathanataḥ kāvyaṃ vidhātuḥ kaves tasyaivāṅkatayā kvacidracayataḥ śṛṅgāravīrādikaṃ |  9062-2 ko doṣo bhavitā yadatra kavitāśīlaiḥ samāśrīyate sukhe duḥkhe samare cāpalāyitaḥ ||9073-1 kulaśīleṣu sampanno nītidharmeṣu paṇḍitaḥ |  9073-2 tathaiva pūjyate rājā caturasraḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||9074-1 kalyāṇāṅgarucānuraktamanasā tvaṃ yena ||9076-1 kalyāṇānāṃ nidhānaṃ kalimalamathanaṃ pāvanaṃ pāvanānāṃ pātheyaṃ yanmumukṣoḥ sapadi parapadaprāptaye prasthitasya |  9076-2 viśrāmasthānamekaṃ kavivaravacasāṃ jīvanaṃ sajjanānāṃ bījaṃ  9077-2 unmīlatkanakāravindakalikākiñjalkapuñjakṣarad-dhūlīdhūsarasiddhasindhulaharīsindūritendūni vaḥ ||9078-1 kalyāṇi candanarasaiḥ pariṣicya gātraṃ dvitrāṇyahāni kathamapyativāhayethāḥ |  9078-2 aṅke nidhāya bhavatīṃ parirabhya dorbhyāṃ neṣyāmi sūryakiraṇānapi śītalatvaṃ ||9079-1 kalyāṇi pāṇipatitāni vinā vicāraṃ etāni moktumucitāni na mauktikāni |  9079-2 guñjeti saṃjanayate yadiha bhramante hastāravindanayanotpalayoḥ prabhaiva ||9080-1 kalyāṇī bata gātheyaṃ laukikī pratibhāti me |  9080-2 eti jīvantamānando naraṃ varṣaśatādapi ||9081-1 kalyāṇollāsasīmā kalayatu kuśalaṃ kālameghābhirāmā kācitsāketadhāmā bhavagahanagatiklāntihāripraṇāmā |  9081-2 saundaryahrīṇakāmā dhṛtajanakasutāsādarāpāṅgadhāmā dikṣu prakhyātabhūmā diviṣadabhinutā devatā rāmanāmā ||9082-1 kalyotthānaparā nityaṃ guruśuśrūṣaṇe ratā |  9082-2 susaṃmṛṣṭagṛhā caiva gośakṛtkṛtalepanā ||9083-1 kallolakṣiptapaṅkatripuraharaśiraḥsvaḥsravantīmṛṇālaṃ karpūrakṣodajālaṃ svapnasannibhāḥ |  9083ā-2 vātyāvyatikarotkṣiptatūlatulyaṃ ca yauvanaṃ ||9084-1 kallolavellitadṛṣatparuṣaprahārai ratnānyamūni makarālaya māvamaṃsthāḥ |  9084-2 kiṃ kaustubhena vihito bhavato na nāma yācñāprasāritakaraḥ puruṣottamo'pi ||9085-1 kallolasaṃcaladagādhajalairalolaiḥ kallolinīparivṛḍhaiḥ kimapeyatoyaiḥ |  9085-2 jīyātsa jarjaratanurgirinirjharo'yaṃ yadvipruṣāpi tṛṣitā vitṛṣībhavanti ||9086-1 kallolaiḥ sthagayanmukhāni kakubhāmabhraṃlihairambhasā kṣāreṇāpi divāniśaṃ jalanidhe garjanna viśrāmyasi |  9086-2 etatte yadi ghoranakranilayaṃ svādu vyadhāsyādvidhiḥ kiṃ kartāsi tadā na vedmi taralaiḥ svaireva duśceṣṭitaiḥ ||9087-1 kallolairvikiratvasau girivarānvelāvilāsotthitaiḥ śabdairvā badhirīkarotu kakubho dhattāṃ ca vistīrṇatāṃ |  9087-2 pānthānāṃ ravitāpataptavapuṣāṃ tṛṣṇātirekacchidaḥ kiṃ sāmyaṃ pratanoḥ karotu saraso'pyabdhiḥ kṛtāḍambaraḥ ||9088-1 kavayaḥ kavayantu tailabhuktāḥ sarasā eva parantu dākṣiṇātyāḥ |  9088-2 api locanacañcalā hariṇyo madirākṣyā na samāḥ kaṭākṣapātaiḥ ||9089-1 kavayaḥ kālidāsādyāḥ kavayo vayamapyamī |  9089-2 parvate paramāṇau ca vastutvamubhayorapi |  9090-1 kavayaḥ kiṃ na paśyanti kiṃ na bhakṣanti vāyasāḥ |  9090-2 pramadāḥ kiṃ na kurvanti kiṃ na jalpanti madyapāḥ ||9091-1 kavayaḥ kiṃ na paśyanti kiṃ na bhakṣanti vāyasāḥ |  9091-2 madyapāḥ kiṃ na jalpanti kiṃ na kurvanti yoṣitaḥ ||9092-1 ||9095-1 kavayo vada kutra kīdṛśāḥ kaṭhinaṃ kiṃ viditaṃ samantataḥ |  9095-2 adhunā tava vairiyoṣitāṃ hṛdi tāpaḥ prabalo vihāya kāḥ ||9095ā-1 kavalayasi candradīdhitī- rnaviralamaśnāsi nūnamaṅgārān |  9095ā-2 adhikataramuṣṇamanayoḥ kimiha cakorāvadhārayasi ||9096-1 kavalitamiha nālaṃ kandalaṃ ceha dṛṣṭaṃ iha hi kumudakośe pītamambhaḥ suśītaṃ|  9096-2 iti viraṭati rātrau paryaṭantī taṭānte 9098-2 sundaryā api lāvaṇyaṃ patirjānāti no pitā ||9099-1 kaviḥ karoti padyāni lālayatyuttamo janaḥ |  9099-2 taruḥ prasūte puṣpāṇi marudvahati saurabhaṃ ||9100-1 kaviḥ pitā poṣayati pālako yo'rthinamabhimukhamāgataṃ anabhimukhaḥ sanvisarjayati ||9172-1 kastāṃ nindati lumpati kaḥ smaraphalakasya barṇakaṃ mugdhaḥ |  9172-2 ko bhavati ratnakaṇṭakaṃ amṛte kasyārucirudeti ||9173-1 9315-2 ādhāraḥ kiyatāmasi sthirataraṃ śuddhaṃ ca labdhaṃ yaśaḥ pānthā nopasaranti cetkṣatamitaḥ kiṃ vṛkṣarājasya te ||9316-1 kā kālī kā madhurā kā śītalavāhinī gaṅgā |  9316-2 kaṃ saṃjaghāna kṛṣṇaḥ kaṃ balavantaṃ na bādhate śītaṃ ||9317-1 kākāllaulyaṃ yamātkrauryaṃ sthapaterdṛḍhaghātitāṃ |  9317-2 ekaikākṣaramādāya kāyasthaḥ kena nirmitaḥ ||9317ā-1 kākā vṛkā ghukabakāśca bhekāḥ praṇamya yuṣmānidameva yāce |  9317ā-2 kolāhalaṃ mā kuruta kṣamadhvaṃ puṃskokilaḥ kūjati mañjurāvaṃ ||9318-1 kākinyāḥ patramūlaṃ sahacarasahitaṃ ketakīnāṃ ca kandaṃ chāyāśuṣkaṃ ca bhṛṅgaṃ triphalarasayutaṃ tailamadhye nidhāya |  9318-2 lauhe pātre praṇītaṃ dharaṇitalagataṃ māsamātrasthitaṃ tathkeśāḥ kāśaprakāśā alikulasadṛśāḥ sambhavantyasya lepāt ||9319-1 kākuṃ karoṣi gṛhakoṇakarīṣapuñja- gūḍhāṅga kiṃ nanu vṛthā kitava prayāhi|  9319-2 kutrādya jīrṇataraṇibhramanātibhīta- gopāṅganāgaṇaviḍambanacāturī te ||9320-1 kākutsthasya daśānano na kṛtavāndārāpahāraṃ yadi kvāmbhodhiḥ kva ca setubandhaghaṭanā kvottīrya laṅkājayaḥ |  9320-2 pārthasyāpi parābhavaṃ yadi ripurnādātkva tādṛktapo nīyante ripubhiḥ samunnatipadaṃ prāyaḥ paraṃ māninaḥ ||9321-1 kākutsthasya pratāpāgnirdīptapiṅgairvalīmukhaiḥ |  9321-2 nirvāṇo rākṣasendrasya manye nīlairniśācaraiḥ ||9322-1 kākutsthena śirāṃsi yāni śataśaśchinnāni māyānidheḥ paulastyasya vimānasīmani tathā bhrāntāni nākaukasāṃ |  9322-2 tānyevāsya dhanuḥśramapraśamanaṃ kurvanti sītāpateḥkrīḍācāmaraḍambarānukṛtibhirlolāyamānai ḥ kacaiḥ ||9323-1 kā kṛtā viṣṇunā kīdṛgyoṣitāṃ kaḥ praśasyate |  9323-2 asevyaḥ kīdṛśaḥ svāmī ko nihantā niśātamaḥ ||9324-1 kāke karṇapuṭīkaṭhoraninade pīyūṣadhārārasa- syandodañcitacārupañcamarute sādhāraṇe mayyapi |  9324-2 vanyāṃ vṛttimayaṃ vyadhāditi mudhā vatsa vyathāṃ mā kṛthāḥ kva kaivaṃ na kṛtaṃ janeṣu nikṛtaṃ durmedhasā vedhasā ||9325-1 kāke kārṣṇyamalaukikaṃ dhavalimā haṃse nisargasthito gāṃbhīrye mahadantaraṃ vacasi yo bhedaḥ sa kiṃ kathyate |  9325-2 etāvatsu viśeṣaṇeṣvapi sakhe yatredamālokyate ke kākāḥ khalu ke ca haṃsaśiśavo deśāya tasmai namaḥ ||9326-1 kāke śaucaṃ dyūtakāreṣu satyaṃ sarpe kṣāntiḥ strīṣu kāmopaśāntiḥ |  9326-2 klībe dhairyaṃ madyape tattvacintā rājā mitraṃ kena dṛṣṭaṃ śrutaṃ vā ||9327-1 kākaiḥ saha vivṛddhasya kokilasya kalā giraḥ |  9327-2 khalasaṅge'pi naiṣṭhuryaṃ kalyāṇaprakṛteḥ kutaḥ ||9327ā-1 kākaiḥ sārddhaṃ vasanhaṃsaḥ kṣobhate cāvasīdati |  9327ā-2 gataḥ k_oṃala evā'so jihmo duṣṭo na kākavat ||9328-1 kākairimāṃścitrabarhānmayūrān parājaiṣṭhāḥ pāṇḍavāndhārtarāṣṭraiḥ |  9328-2 hitvā siṃhānkroṣṭukāngūhamānaḥ prāpte kāle śocitā tvaṃ narendra ||9329-1 kākairniṣkuṣitaṃ śvabhiḥ kabalitaṃ vīcībhirāndolitaṃ srotobhiścalitaṃ taṭāntamalinaṃ g_oṃāyubhirloḍitaṃ |  9329-2 divyastrīkaracārucāmaramarutsaṃvījyamānaḥ kadā drakṣye'haṃ parameśvari tripathage bhāgīrathi svaṃ vapuḥ ||9330-1 kākodumbarikāyāṃ valmīko dṛśyate śirā tasmin |  9330-2 puruṣatraye sapāde paścimadiksthā na sā vahati ||9331-1 kākolaḥ kalakaṇṭhikā kuvalayaṃ kādambinī kardamaḥ kaṃsāriḥ kabarī kṛpāṇalatikā kastūrikā kajjalaṃ |  9331-2 kālindī kaṣapaṭṭikā karighaṭā kāmārikaṇṭhasthalī yasyaite karadā bhavanti sakhi tadvande vinidraṃ tamaḥ ||9332-1 kā khalena saha spardhā sajjanasyābhimāninaḥ |  9332-2 bhāṣaṇaṃ bhīṣaṇaṃ sādhu dūṣaṇaṃ yasya bhūṣaṇaṃ ||9333-1 kā gaṇanā viṣayavaśe puṃsi varāke varāṅganā spṛhayā |  9333-2 vyājena vīkṣamāṇā dhyānadhiyāṃ spṛśati sajjñānaṃ ||9334-1 kāṅkṣitenāpyalabdhena bhogārhe navayauvane |  9334-2 jarājīrṇaśarīrasya bhāreṇeva dhanena kiṃ ||9335-1 kācaṃ maṇiṃ kāñcanamekasūtre mugdhā nibadhnanti kimatra citraṃ |  9335-2 vicāravānpaṇinirekasūtre śvānaṃ yuvānaṃ maghavānamāha ||9336-1 kācaḥ kāñcanasaṃsargāddhatte mārakatīṃ dyutiṃ |  9336-2 aśmāpi yāti devatvaṃ mahadbhiḥ supratiṣṭhitaḥ ||9337-1 kācaḥ kāñcanasaṃsargāddhatte mārakatīṃ dyutiṃ |  9337-2 tathā satsaṃnidhānena mūrkho yāti pravīṇatāṃ ||9337ā-1 kācakāmaladoṣeṇa paśyennetre viparyayaṃ |  9337ā-2 abhyākhyānaṃ vadejjihvā tatra rāgaka ucyate ||9338-1 kā cakre hariṇā,dhane kṛpaṇadhīḥ kīdṛg,bhujaṃge'sti kiṃ,kīdṛk,kumbhasamudbhavasya jaṭharaṃ,kīdṛgyiyāsurvadhūḥ |  9338-2 ślokaḥ kīdṛgabhīpsitaḥ sukṛtināṃ,kīdṛṅnabho nirmalaṃ,kṣoṇīmāhvaya sarvagaṃ kimuditaṃ rātrau saraḥ kīdṛśaṃ ||9339-1 kācāḥ kāñcanabhūṣitāḥ kati na vā puṣṇanti ratnaśriyaṃ maulau vā kati nodvahantyapadhiyastāneva ratnabhramāt |  9339-2 akṣṇāṃ ye punarunmṛjanti timiraṃ yairnāma ratnākaraḥ sindhuste pṛthageva hanta maṇayasteṣvapyabhijñāḥ pṛthak ||9340-1 kācitkarābhyāṃ kusumāni nītvā dadhāra śaṃbhoḥ padayoḥ samīpe |  9340-2 vivakṣayā manmathaduṣpravṛtteḥ samutsṛjantī viśikhānivāgre ||9341-1 kācitkīrṇā rajobhirdivamanuvidadhe bhinnavakrendulakṣmīr aśrīkāḥ kāścidantardiśa iva dadhire dāhamudbhrāntasattvāḥ |  9341-2 mremurvātyā ivānyāḥ pratipadamaparā bhūmivatkampamāpuḥ prasthāne pārthivānāmaśivamiti purobhāvi nāryaḥ śaśaṃsuḥ ||9342-1 kācitkṛtā kṛtiriti tvayi sārpiteti kāpi pramodakaṇikā mama nāntaraṅge |  9342-2 mauḍhyaṃ madīyamiha yadviditaṃ mamaiva kiṃ tvamba viśvasimi dīnaśaraṇyatāṃ te ||9343-1 kācittṛṣārtā vanitā nidāghe gaṅgāṃ samabhyetya sudhāsavarṇāṃ |  9343-2 ādāya tadvāri karadvayena vilokayantī na papau kimetat ||9343-5 (karakisalayakāntikāntyā śoṇitaśaṅkayeti |)9344-1 kācitpadairaskhalitaiḥ sakhelaṃ vāntīṣu śuddhāntakareṇukāsu |  9344-2 rājāṅganānāmakarodavajñāṃ śroṇībhare ca stanagaurave ca ||9345-1 kācitpurā virahiṇī parivṛddhihetor yasyai dideśa salilaṃ navamālikāyai|  9345-2 sā puṣpitaiva jalamaśruvaśādviyoge tasyai pradāya kathamapyanṛṇī babhūva ||9346-1 kācitsvarṇalatā tadūrdhvamamalaścandrastadabhyantare padme tannikaṭaṃ tilasya kusumaṃ tatsannidhau pallave |  9346-2 hemnaḥ kiṃcidadhastayośca kalaśau kāntau jaganmohanausvastyetatprakarotu vastrijagatāṃ kiṃ brahmakṛṣṇādibhiḥ ||9347-1 kācidbalinā krāntā kācinna jahāti kāminaṃ ruciraṃ |  9347-2 anyā pānakagoṣṭhyāṃ nayati dinaṃ prītakaiḥ sārdhaṃ ||9348-1 kācidbālakavanmahītalagatā mūlacchidākāraṇaṃ dravyeṇārjanapuṣpitāpi viphalī kācicca jātiprabhā |  9348-2 kācicchrīḥ kadalīva bhogasubhagā satpuṇyabījacyutā sarvāṅge subhagā rasālalatikāvatpuṇyabījāṅkitā ||9349-1 kācidbālā ramaṇavasatiṃ preṣayantī karaṇḍaṃ dāsīhastātsabhayamalikhadvyālamasyopariṣṭāt |  9349-2 gaurīkāntaṃ pavanatanayaṃ campakaṃ cātra bhāvaṃ pṛcchatyāryo nipuṇatilako mallināthaḥ kavīndraḥ ||9350-1 kācidvibhūṣayati darpaṇasaktahastā bālātapeṣu vanitā vadanāravindaṃ |  9350-2 dantacchadaṃ priyatamena nipītasāraṃ dantāgrabhinnaṃ avakṛṣya nirīkṣate ca||9351-1 kācidviyogānalataptagātrī prāṇānsamādhārayituṃ lilekha |  9351-2 bāhvorbhujaṅgaṃ hṛdi rāhubimbaṃ nābhau ca karpūramayaṃ maheśaṃ ||9352-1 kācidvilolanayanā ramaṇe svakīye dūraṃ gate sati manobhavabāṇakhinnā |  9352-2 tyaktaṃ śarīramacirānmalayādrivāyuṃ saurabhyaśālinamaho pibati sma citraṃ||9353-1 kācidvihṛtya kila kantukakeliraṅgādbhūreṇurūṣitatanurniragānmṛgākṣī |  9353-2 utphullapaṅkajavane suciraṃ caritvā kiñjalkareṇuparidhūsariteva lakṣmīḥ ||9354-1 kā cintā mama jīvane yadi harirviśvaṃbharo gīyate no cedarbhakajīvanāya jananīstanyaṃ kathaṃ nirmame |  9354-2 mārgaṇamokṣadakṣaṃ akalpayaccāpamiva smarasya ||9356-1 kācinnideśājjaratījanānāṃ kulocitaṃ kiṃcidihālapantī |  9356-2 kuñjadrumālekhanamācarantī saṃjñāpitālībhirabhūtsalajjā ||9357-1 kācinnivāritabahirgamanā jananyā draṣṭuṃ haraṃ bhavanajālakamāsasāda |  9357-2 tasyā vilocanamadṛśyata dāśayantra- yatroparuddhaśapharopamitaṃ kṣaṇena ||9358-1 kācinmṛgākṣī priyaviprayoge gantuṃ ||9360-1 kāco maṇirmaṇiḥ kāco yeṣāṃ te'nye hi dehinaḥ |  9360-2 santi te sudhiyo yeṣāṃ kācaḥ kāco maṇirmaṇiḥ ||9360ā-1 kāñcanāṅgi kamanīyakalāpau kañculīkavacitau likucau te |  9360ā-2 pāṇinā nanu bhavennaraḥ ||9362-1 kāñcīṃ kāñcī na dhatte kalayati na dṛśā keralī kelitalpaṃ sindūraṃ dūra eva kṣipati karatalanyastamāndhrī purandhrī |  9362-2 saurāṣṭrī mārṣṭi bhūyaḥ sapadi nayanayo raktayo raktimānaṃ kārṇāṭī karṇikāyāṃ malinayati mano mānasiṃhaprayāṇe ||9362ā-1 kāñcīkalakvaṇitak_oṃalanābhikānti pārāvatadhvanitacitritakaṇṭhapāliṃ |  9362ā-2 udbhrāntalocanacakoramanaṅgaraṅgaṃ āśāsmahe kamapi vāravilāsavatyāḥ ||9363-1 kāñcī kāṃcidiyaṃ cakāra jaghananyastā gatermandatāṃ gāḍhaṃ baddhamidaṃ ca kañcukamadāducchrūnatāṃ vakṣasaḥ |  9363-2 netraprāntamathākulaṃ kalayati purārer dhyāyāmi te nikhilamamba nitambabibhbaṃ ||9365-1 kāñcīguṇaiḥ kāñcanaratnacitrair no bhūṣayanti pramadā nitambaṃ |  9365-2 na nūpuraihaṃsarutaṃ bhajadbhiḥ pādāmbujānyambujakāntibhāñji ||9366-1 kāñcīguṇairviracitā jaghaneṣu lakṣmīr labdhā sthitiḥ stanataṭeṣu ca ratnahāraiḥ |  9366-2 no bhūṣitā vayamitīva nitambinīnāṃ kārśya nirargalamadhāryata madhyabhāgaiḥ||9367-1 kāñcīdāmakabandhanaṃ salalitā karṇotpalaistāḍanāhelāliṅnavighnamāhitaruṣā maunena nirbhartsanaṃ |  9367-2 kiṃ pūrvocitametadatra sahasā vismṛtya manyorbharān-mayyutkaṇṭhamanasyadarśanapathaṃ yātāsyaho kopane ||9368-1 kāñcīdāma dṛḍhaṃ vidhāya kavarīmābadhya gāḍhaṃ guṇair vakṣojādapasārya hāramasakṛdvyādhūya karṇotpalaṃ |  9368-2 dūrotsāritakaṅkaṇā vidhumukhī sotprāsahāsaṃ haṭhāthkaṇṭhe kasya karoti hanta dayitāśleṣāya dorbandhanaṃ ||9369-1 kāñcīdāma niveśayanvitanute vāsaḥ ślathaṃ subhruvo hāraṃ vakṣasi yojayankaratalaṃ dhatte kucāmbhoruhe |  9369-2 jalpaṃścāṭuvaco'dharaṃ dhayati yatpreyānkuto vismayaḥ pāṃsuṃ cakṣuṣi vikṣipanyadi dhanaṃ gṛhṇāsi pāṭaccaraḥ ||9369ā-1 kāñcīsīmani kāpi kāñcanamayī niśreṇikā rājate tāmāsādya raṇotsavena mahatā kenāpi dhīra tvayā |  9369ā-2 sadyaḥ kaṇṭakaśālinā karayugenākramya śailadvayaṃ tasyopāntanivāsinaśca śaśinaḥ sphītā sudhā lapsyate ||9370-1 kāñcyā gāḍhatarāvabaddhavasanaprāntā kimarthaṃ punar mugdhākṣī svapitīti tatparijanaṃ svairaṃ priye pṛcchati |  9370-2 mātaḥ suptiṃ apīha lumpati mametyāropitakrodhayā paryasya svapanacchalena śayane datto'vakāśastayā ||9371-1 kāṭhinyaṃ kucayoḥ sraṣṭuṃ vāñchantyaḥ pādapadmayoḥ |  9371-2 nindanti ca vidhātāraṃ tvadghāṭīṣvariyoṣitaḥ ||9372-1 kāṭhinyaṃ kucakumbhayornayanayoścāñcalyametaddvayaṃ bho brahmanbhavatā kathaṃ na padayorasmākamāsāditaṃ |  9372-2 itthaṃ śrīnarasiṃha te tribhuvanādhīśasya ghāṭībhiyā kāntāreṣu mithaḥ palāyanaparā jalpanti vairistriyaḥ ||9373-1 kāṭhinyaṃ giriṣu sadā mṛdutā salile dhruvā prabhā sūrye |  9373-2 vairamasajjanahṛdaye sajjanahṛdaye punaḥ kṣāntiḥ ||9374-1 kāṭhinyamaṅgairnikhilairnirastaṃ stanau kṛśāṅgyāḥ śaraṇaṃ jagāma |  9374-2 adhaḥ patiṣyāva itīva bhītyā na śaknutastāvapi hātumetat ||9375-1 kāṇaḥ kubjo'tha khañjaḥ śrutibalavikalo vāmanaḥ paṅgurandhaḥ ṣaṇḍo'pi cchinnanāsaḥ parijanarahito durbhago rogadehī |  9375-2 duṣputro duṣkalatraḥ svajanaparijanairnindino hīnamānaḥ satyaṃ yajjāyate tatsvakṛtamidamaho ceṣṭate jīvaloke ||9376-1 kāṇāḥ kamalapatrākṣāḥ kadaryāḥ kalpaśākhinaḥ |  9376-2 kātarā vikramādityāḥ kavidṛggocaraṃ gatāḥ ||9377-1 kāṇāḥ kubjāśca ṣaṇḍāśca tathā vṛddhāśca paṅgavaḥ |  9377-2 ete cāntaḥpure nityaṃ niyoktavyāḥ kṣamābhṛtā ||9378-1 kāṇāḥ khañjāśca kubjāśca atividdhāśca paṅgulāḥ |  9378-2 eteṣvantaḥ purarakṣāyāṃ niyojyāḥ pārthivena tu ||9378ā-1 kāṇāśchaṭāśca raṃḍāśca tathā vṛddhāśca paṅgavaḥ |  9378ā-2 ete cāntaḥpure nityaṃ niyoktavyāḥ kṣamābhṛtā ||9378bh-1 kāṇo nimagnaviṣamonnatadṛṣṭirekaḥ śakto virāgajanane jananāturāṇāṃ |  9378bh-2 yo naiva kasyacidupaiti manaḥpriyatvaṃ ālekhyakarma likhito'pi kimu svarūpaḥ ||9379-1 kātaratākekarita- smaralajjāroṣamasṛṇamadhurākṣī |  9379-2 yoktuṃ na moktumathavā valate'sāvarthalabdharatiḥ ||9380-1 kātaryaṃ kevalā nītiḥ śauryaṃ śvāpadaceṣṭitaṃ |  9380-2 ataḥ siddhiṃ sametābhyāṃ ubhābhyāmanviyeṣa saḥ ||9381-1 kātaryaṃ tu na kārmaṇaṃ na na paraṃ dambho na kiṃ yoṣitāṃ yaccittā tanucāpalaṃ madhuvidhudbeṣastanutvaṃ tanoḥ |  9381-2 asmākaṃ sakhi paśya saṃprati tanū r_oṃāpi vakrāyate sadyaḥ proṣita nāthayābhinavayā pānthastriyo hāsitāḥ ||9382-1 kātaryaṃ durvinītatvaṃ kārpaṇyamavivekatā |  9382-2 sarvaṃ mārjanti kavayaḥ śālīnāṃ muṣṭikiṃkarāḥ ||9383-1 kā tava kāgtā kaste putraḥ saṃsāro'yamatīva vicitraḥ |  9383-2 kasya tvaṃ vā kuta āyātas tattvaṃ cintaya tadidaṃ bhrātaḥ ||9384-1 kā tārairmama garjitairuparatā dhārāmbubhiḥ kā hatā kā mohaṃ gamitā viyogavidhurā kā vā kadambānilaiḥ |  9384-2 nītā kā ca vilolatāṃ madakalaiḥ kekārabairbarhiṇāṃ itthaṃ pānthagṛheṣu paśyati ghano vidyutpradīpairiva ||9385-1 kātyāyanīkusumakāmanayā kimarthaṃ kāntārakukṣikuharaṃ kutukādgatāsi |  9385-2 paśya stanastabakayostava kaṇṭakāṅkaṃ gopaḥ sukaṇṭhi bata paśyati jātakopaḥ ||9386-1 kātra śrīḥ śroṇibimbe sravadudarapurāvastikhadvāravācye lakṣmīḥ kā kāminīnāṃ kucakalaśayuge māṃsapiṇḍasvarūpe |  9386-2 kā kāntirnetrayugme jalakaluṣajuṣi śleṣmaraktādipūrṇe kā śobhāvartagarte nigadata yadaho mohinastāḥ stuvanti ||9386ā-1 kā tvaṃ kāmini jāhnavī,kimiha te,bhartā haro nanvasāv ambhastvaṃ kila vetsi manmathakalāṃ,jānātyayaṃ te patiḥ |  9386ā-2 svāminsatyamidaṃ,nahi priyatame satyaḥ kutaḥ kāmināṃ ityevaṃ harajāhnavīgirisutāsaṃjalpitaṃ pātu vaḥ ||9387-1 kā tvaṃ,kuntalamallakīrtir,ahaha kvāsi sthitā,na kvacithsakhyastāstava kutra kutra vada vāglakṣmīstathā kāntayaḥ |  9387-2 vāgyātā caturānanasya vadanaṃ lakṣmīrmurāreruraḥkāntirmaṇḍalamaindavaṃ mama punarnādyāpi viśrāmabhūḥ ||9388-1 kā tvaṃ padmapalāśākṣi pītakauśeyavāsini |  9388-2 drumasya śākhāmālambya tiṣṭhasi tvamanindate ||9389-1 kā tvaṃ putri,narendra lubdhakavadhūr,haste kimetat,palaṃ kṣāmaṃ kiṃ,sahajaṃ bravīmi nṛpate yadyādarācchrūyate |  9389-2 gāyanti tvadaripriyāśrutaṭinītīreṣu siddhāṅganā gītāndhā na tṛṇaṃ caranti hariṇāstenāmiṣaṃ durbalaṃ ||9390-1 kā tvaṃ,mādhavadūtikā,vadasi kiṃ,mānaṃ jahīhi priye dhūrtaḥ so'nyamanā,manāgapi sakhi tvayyādaraṃ nojjhati |  9390-2 ityanyonyakathārasaiḥ pramuditāṃ rādhāṃ sakhīveṣavān nītvā kuñjagṛhaṃ prakāśitatanuḥ smero hariḥ pātu vaḥ ||9391-1 kā tvaṃ,mukti,rupāgatāsmi bhavatī kasmādakasmādiha śrīkṛṣṇasmaraṇena deva madabhyāgamakāraṇaṃ te |  9392-2 ācakṣva matvā vaśināṃ raghūṇāṃ manaḥ parastrīvimukhapravṛtti ||9393-1 kādambinī kambalikā kadamba- kedārakāntākucakuṭṭimaṃ ca |  9393-2 kastūrikā ketakapuṣpagamdhaḥ kekāravaḥ prāvṛṣi harṣamūlaṃ ||9394-1 kādambinī kimiyamāli kadambamūle kiṃ vā tamālatarureva kimandhakāraḥ |  9394-2 jānāsi naiva sakhi gopakulāṅganānāṃ kaulavratavratatibhaṅgakaraḥ karīndraḥ ||9394ā-1 kā dīyatāṃ tava raghūdvaha samyagāśīr niṣkaṇṭakāni vihitāni jaganti yena |  9394ā-2 āśāsmahe nanu tathāpi saha svavīrair bhūkāśyapopamasutadvitayā vadhūḥ syāt ||9395-1 kā durdaśā ||9403-1 kāntaṃ nirīkṣya valayāṅkitakaṇṭhadeśaṃ muktāstayā parabhiyā paruṣā na vācaḥ |  9403-2 dūtīmukhe mṛgadṛśā skhaladambupūrā dūrātparaṃ nidadhire nayanāntapātāḥ ||9403ā-1 kāntaṃ rūpaṃ yauvanaṃ ||9441C-1 kāntāprītiparānujo vinayavānhṛnnandano nandano bhāgyaṃ svarlalanopabhogyamamalā lakṣmīḥ sukhaṃ nistuṣaṃ |  9441C-2 pūjā rājakule yaśo'tiviśadaṃ goṣṭhī samaṃ kovidair dāne'tivyasanaṃ ratirjinamate syātkasyacitpuṇyataḥ ||9442-1 kāntāmukhaṃ suratakelivimardakheda- saṃjātagharmakaṇavicchuritaṃ ratānte |  9442-2 āpāṇḍuraṃ taralatāranimīlitākṣaṃ saṃsmṛtya he hṛdaya kiṃ śatadhā na yāsi ||9443-1 kāntāmukhadyutijuṣāmapi codgatānāṃ śobhāṃ parāṃ kuravakadrumamañjarīṇāṃ|  9443-2 dṛṣṭvā priye sahṛdayasya bhavenna kasya kandarpabāṇapatanavyathitaṃ hi cetaḥ ||9444-1 kāntāmukhāsvādaparāṅmukhā yathpānthāḥ śaśāṅkasya karairvimṛṣṭāḥ |  9444-2 suduḥsahaṃ tāpamime prayānti manye tatau naiva sudhetaratra ||9445-1 kāntāyāḥ karajaiḥ kapolaphalake patrāvalī kalpitā kelidyūtapaṇīkṛto viharatā pītaḥ sa bimbādharaḥ |  9445-2 svedārdrīkṛtacandanastanataṭī sānandamāliṅgitā nirviṣṭā viṣayāḥ śivātmamahasi nyastaṃ manaḥ saṃprati ||9446-1 kāntāyā vikasadvilāsahasitasvacchāṃśavaścāmaraṃ saṃsaktāvabhiṣekahemakalaśau yaccandanāṅkau stanau |  9446-2 yatkārtasvarakānti cāru jaghanaṃ siṃhāsanaṃ bhūbhujāṃ sāmrājyaṃ tadidaṃ jayājayamayaḥ śeṣastu cintāmayaḥ ||9447-1 kāntāraṃ na yathetaro jvalayituṃ dakṣo davāgniṃ vinā dāvāgniṃ na yathā paraḥ śamayituṃ śakto vināmbhodharaṃ |  9447-2 niṣṇātaḥ pavanaṃ vinā nirasituṃ nānyo yathāmbhodharaṃ karmaughaṃ sukṛtaṃ vinā kimaparaṃ hantuṃ samarthaṃ tathā ||9448-1 kāntāraṃ parito jvalatyatibale dāvānale daivato g_oṃāyorgahanāṃ guhāṃ paripatandarpoddhuraḥ kesarī |  9448-2 yadvyāpādayati sma taṃ na kṛpayā tenaiṣa tasminvanesiṃhānāmabhayaprado'hamadhunetyutpucchamuddhāvati ||9449-1 kāntāraḥ samarākhyaśca vaikuṇṭho vāñchitastathā |  9449-2 viśālaśca tathā nandaḥ ṣoḍhāḥ niḥsāruko bhavet ||9450-1 kāntārapādapānāṃ yathā phalaṃ mānuṣairananubhogyaṃ |  9450-2 evamanāryeṣvarthāḥ manasā'pyāryairananubhogyāḥ ||9451-1 kāntārabhūmiruhamaulinivāsaśīlāḥ prāyaḥ palāyanaparā janavīkṣaṇena |  9451-2 kūjanti te'pi hi śukāḥ khalu rāmanāma saṅgaḥ svabhāvaparivartavidhau nidānaṃ ||9452-1 kāntāravanadurgeṣu kṛcchrāsvāpatsu saṃbhrame |  9452-2 udyateṣu ca śastreṣu nāsti sattvavatāṃ bhayaṃ ||9453-1 kāntā ruciṃ munijanastaruṇo'viyogī kāmaśca ratnamaṇirujjvalakaṅkaṇena|  9453-2 dhatte payodharayuge kucabhūṣaṇena hāre hare himakare makare kare ca ||9454-1 kāntāre ghanatimire bhujaṃgamebhyo no bhītā na ca gaṇitā mahāpagāpi |  9454-2 kiṃ bāle vahasi bhayaṃ madaṅgasaṃgāthvikrīte kariṇi kimaṅkuśe vivādaḥ ||9455-1 kāntāre jalavṛkṣavairiṇi muhustvadvairivāmabhruvo bālairākulalocanaiḥ pratipadaṃ ruddhakramāścaṅkrame |  9455-2 pṛthvīcaṇḍaruce paṭaccaradaśāsaṃghaṭṭadīptaprabhaṃ siñcantyañjalisañcitāśrubhiralaṃ yuṣmatpratāpānalaṃ ||9456-1 kāntāre daivagatyā kathamapi galitānyantarālokya bhakṣyāṇy uḍḍīyoḍḍīya bhūyastaruśikharaśikhāmeva tebhyaḥ śrayante |  9456-2 itthaṃ tvadvairinārī giriṣu narapate jambulambīkadamba- bhrāntyā bharturbubhukṣoḥ kathayati purataśceṣṭitaṃ ṣaṭpadānāṃ ||9457-1 kāntāreṣu karāvalambiśiśavaḥ pādaiḥ sravallohitair arcantyaḥ padavīṃ vilocanajalairāvedayantyaḥ śucaṃ |  9457-2 dṛṣṭāḥ pānthajanairvivṛtya sakṛpaṃ hāśabdagarbhairmukhair yantyahnā sakalena yojanaturīyāṃśaṃ tavāristriyaḥ ||9458-1 kāntāreṣu ca kānaneṣu ca sarittīreṣu ca kṣmābhṛtāṃ utsaṅgeṣu ca pattaneṣu ca saridbhartustaṭānteṣu ca |  9458-2 bhrāntāḥ ketakagarbhapallavarucaḥ śrāntā iva kṣmāpate kānte nandanakandalīparisare rohanti te kīrtayaḥ ||9459-1 kāntāreṣvapi viśrāmo narasyādhvanikasya vai |  9459-2 yaḥ sadāraḥ sa viśvāsyastasmāddārāḥ parā gatiḥ ||9460-1 kāntāviyogaḥ svajanāpamānaṃ ṛṇasya śeṣaṃ kunṛpasya sevā |  9460-2 dāridryabhāvādvimukhaṃ ca mitraṃ vināgninā pañca dahanti kāyaṃ ||9461-1 kāntāśleṣaparāṅmukhaṃ yadi daheddoṣākaraḥ kaṃcana sthāne tarhi yataḥ sa hanta vidhinā hantuṃ vyadhāyīdṛśān |  9461-2 kaṣṭaṃ yatpunareṣa candanabhuvo labdhaprabhāvo'bhitaḥ svarṇadyādyavagāhako marudayaṃ dagdhaṃ pracaṇḍojvalaṃ ||9462-1 kāntāsuhṛdguṇakathāśravaṇotsukasya ramyā vinidranayanasya gatā mamāsau|  9462-2 sarvendriyārthajanitāni hi sevyamānā dīrghā svavṛttiriva hanti sukhāni nidrā ||9463-1 kāntiṃ kuṅkumakeśarānmadhuratāṃ drākṣārasasyāsavādvaidarbhīparipākapūtavacasaḥ kāvyātkavermārdavaṃ |  9463-2 pārśvādeva jarātureṇa vidhinā taṃ taṃ gṛhītvā guṇaṃ sṛṣṭā hanta haranti kasya na manaḥ kaśmīravāmabhruvaḥ ||9464-1 kāntiṃ ketakakorakadyutisakhīṃ rākāmṛgāṅkasya yachcañcaccañcu culumpati pratidinaṃ premṇā cakorārbhakaḥ |  9464-2 tanmanye nayanāmṛtaṃ ratipatermṛtyuñjayenārthinā tenedaṃ ramaṇīkapolaphalake lāvaṇyamālokitaṃ ||9465-1 kāntikallolavalitāṃ nayanāmṛtavāhinīṃ |  9465-2 bhajamānaṃ svayaṃ subhru kastvāṃ na bahu manyate ||9465ā-1 kāntiprakarṣaṃ daśanacchadena sandhyāghane baddhapadaṃ harantyāḥ |  9465ā-2 tasyā gṛhodyānasarogatasya hastasya evāmburuhasya rāgaḥ ||9466-1 kāntimayādativimalādavirataviśvopakāragatakālāt |  9466-2 sudaśānmahatotimahān prasarati dīpānpradīpa iva ||9467-1 kāntiryasya vinidranīlanalinacchāyāsakhī subhruvāṃ yatpaṅke'pi mudo'sti yasya surabhiḥ kāsāṃ raso'gocaraḥ |  9467-2 aṅgārārthitayā janeratijaḍairuḍḍāmaraiḥ pāmaraiḥ paśyaiṣa praguṇairguṇairapi gururdagdhaḥ sa kālāguruḥ ||9468-1 kāntiryasya śaranniśākarakalālāvaṇyasaṃvādinī taṃ vikretumihāsi yāsi kimaho hāraṃ vihāraṃ śriyaḥ |  9468-2 etāṃ paśya puraḥ pulindanagarīṃ bhūpāḥ kuraṅgīdṛśāṃ yatraitā galakandale ca kucayoraṅke ca guñjāsrajaḥ ||9469-1 kāntirlocanavartiradbhutamayī mūrtirmahatsaurabhaṃ niḥṣyando'tha sudhākarādapi sudhāsyandādapi hlādakaḥ |  9469-2 sarvo'yaṃ viralo jagatyapi guṇagrāmo'bhirāmo hahāpaśyottaṃsabhujaṃgasaṃgamajuṣaḥ śrīkhaṇḍa te khaṇḍitaḥ ||9469ā-1 kāntiścandramaso mṛgasya nayane bāhū mṛṇālasya te haṃsānāṃ gamanaṃ sarojavadane hemno ghaṭau te kucau |  9469ā-2 etatte parakīyavastu sakalaṃ namaikamātraṃ tava mānaṃ mā kuru mānini priyatame rūpābhimānaṃ prati ||9470-1 kāntiśriyā nirjitapadmarāgaṃ manojñagandhaṃ dvayameva śastaṃ |  9470-2 navaprabuddhaṃ jalajaṃ jaleṣu sthaleṣu tasyā vadanāravindaṃ ||9470ā-1 kāntiste kanakācalapratinidhiḥ kāntākucaspardhi te saubhāgyaṃ kṣitipāladarśanavidhau tvatpūrvakaṃ darśanaṃ |  9470ā-2 saurabhyaṃ sakalātiśāyi bhavato jambira kiṃ brūmahe karpūrapratikūlatā yadi na te tvayyeva sarve guṇāḥ ||9471-1 kāntiste yadi nirmalā yadi guṇā lakṣmīryadi sthāyinī mā gāḥ padma madaṃ tathāpi galitā hyete śaradvāsarāḥ |  9471-2 saṃsparśena tuṣāravāripṛṣatāmālūnamūrteḥ saro- madhye'traiva varāṭakena bhavataḥ stheyaṃ punaḥ kevalaṃ ||9472-1 kānte katyapi vāsarāṇi gamaya tvaṃ mīlayitvā dṛśau svasti svasti nimīlayāmi nayane yāvanna śūnyā diśaḥ |  9472-2 āyātā vayaṃ āgamiṣyati suhṛdvargasya bhāgyodayaiḥ sandeśo vada kastavābhilaṣitastīrtheṣu toyāñjaliḥ ||9473-1 kānte kathaṃcitkathitaprayāṇe kṣaṇaṃ vinamrā virahārditāṅgī |  9473-2 tatastamālokya kadāgato'sīty āliṅgya mugdhā mudamāsasāda ||9474-1 kānte kanakajambīraṃ kare kimapi kurvati |  9474-2 āgāralikhite bhānau bindumindumukhī dadau ||9475-1 kānte kalitacolānte dīpe vairiṇi dīpyati |  9475-2 āsīdasitapadmākṣyāḥ pakṣo nayanamudraṇaṃ ||9476-1 kānte kāñculikāvalokini kalāvatyā namantyā sthitaṃ tasmink_oṃalakākubhāṣiṇi tayā spandī niruddho'dharaḥ |  9476-2 utthāyātha karaspṛśi priyatame yūnornave saṃgame kāñcīkūjitakaitavena madano dyauḥśāntimabhyasyati ||9476ā-1 kānte kathaya kathaṃ vā gacchasi pānīyaśālikāmekā |  9476ā-2 aṅgamanaṅgaṃ nitarāṃ aṅkurayati paṅkajākṣi vayo'pi tava ||9477-1 kānte kiṃ kupitāsi,kaḥ parajane prāṇeśa kopo bhavethko'yaṃ subhru para,stvameva,dayite dāso'smi kiṃ te paraḥ |  9477-2 ityuktvā praṇataḥ priyaḥ kṣititalādutthāpya sānandayānetrāmbhaḥkaṇikāṅkite stanataṭe tanvyā samāropitaḥ ||9478-1 kānte kuṭilamālokya karṇakaṇḍūyanena kiṃ |  9478-2 kāmaṃ kathaya kalyāṇi kiṅkaraḥ karavāṇi yat ||9479-1 kānte gṛhāṇa tvamimāṃ svamālāṃ akāraṇaṃ kiṃ kalahaṃ karoṣi |  9479-2 yatpūrvapādaṃ manuṣe'tra śuddhaṃ tattathyamevāsti na cedidaṃ syāt ||9480-1 kānte ghorakṛtāntavakrakuharāttvaṃ puṇyapuñjena me muktā kṛnta tadarjanaśramabharaṃ pratyaṅgamāliṅgya māṃ |  9480-2 ityākarṇya nimīlitārdhanayanaṃ smeraṃ śanairānataṃ sollāsaṃ vadanāmbujaṃ mṛgadṛśaḥ svairaṃ cucumba priyaḥ ||9481-1 kānte jagmuṣi tāmracūḍaraṭitaṃ śrutvā prabuddhā javāthkiṃcidvāsavadiṅmukhaṃ pravikasaddṛṣṭvā gavākṣādhvanā |  9481-2 saṃtrāsena samīritā priyatamapremṇāvaruddhā śanair utthānopaniveśanāni kurute talpe muhuḥ pāṃsulā ||9482-1 kānte tathā kathamapi prathitaṃ mṛgākṣyā cāturyamuddhatamanobhavayā sthitaṃ |  9483-2 etāvatsakhi vedmi kevalamahaṃ tasyāṅgasaṅge punaḥ ko'sau kāsmi rataṃ tu kiṃ kathamiti svalpāpi me na smṛtiḥ ||9484-1 kāntetyutpalalocaneti ||9484ā-1 kānte tvatkucacūcukau tadupari smerā ca hārāvalī tadvaktraṃ taruṇāṅgi bimbitamanucchāyālatāśyāmatāṃ |  9484ā-2 tvaṃ sarvāṅgamanorame trijagatāṃ badhnāsi dṛṣṭyā rambhākāṇḍastvadūrucchavirapi sulabhaḥ kambavaśca tvadīyāḥ kaṇṭhākārā śikhaṇḍāstava kacasadṛśāstatkathaṃ te'samatvaṃ ||9486-1 kānte dhāvaya me pādāviti bhartrā niveditā |  9486-2 na tayā dhāvitau pādau bharturājñā na laṅghitā ||9487-1 kāntena prahito navaḥ priyasakhīvargeṇa baddhaspṛhaścittenopahṛtaḥ smarāya na samutsraṣṭuṃ gataḥ pāṇinā |  9487-2 āmṛṣṭo muhurīkṣito muharabhighrāto sahasā babhūva |  9489ā-2 roṣākṣaraṃ sudṛśi vaktumapārayantyāṃ indīvaradvayamavāpa tuṣāradhārāṃ ||9489bh-1 kānte paśyati sānurāgamabalā sācīkarotyānanaṃ tasminkāmakalākalāpakuśale vyāvṛttavaktre kila |  9489bh-2 paśyantī muhurantaraṅgamadanā dolāyamānekṣaṇā lajjāmanmathamadhyagāpi nitarāṃ tasyābhavatprītaye ||9490-1 kānte yāmi,kva,deśāntara,mapi śayanā,nneti,kiṃ sadmano'pi kvaitāvanmātra,māḥ kiṃ kathayasi nagarā,nna priye nirvṛto'pi |  9490-2 ityākarṇyoktavastukramaghanaghanahṛdvedanā veda nāhaṃ kāhaṃ kutrāsmi ko'yaṃ bata hatasamayo'pyasmi vā nāsmi veti ||9491-1 kānte vicitrasuratakramabaddharāge saṅketake'pi mṛgaśābadṛśā rasena |  9491-2 tatkūjitaṃ kimapi yena tadīyatalpaṃ nālpaiḥ parītamanukūjitalāvakaughaiḥ ||9492-1 kānte vilāsini kalāvati padmanetre nityaṃ tvayi priyatame ramate mano me |  9492-2 itthaṃ bhavantamurubhāvanayā vadantaṃ śrīkṛṣṇa māṃ budhajanā api hā hasanti||9493-1 kānte sāgasi kañcukaspṛśi tayā sācīkṛtagrīvayā muktāḥ kopakaṣāyamanmathaśaratkrūrāḥ kaṭākṣāṅkurāḥ |  9493-2 sākūtaṃ darahāsakesaravac_oṃādhvīkadhārālasā prītiḥ kalpalateva kācana mahādānīkṛtā subhruvā ||9493ā-1 kānte sāgasi kācidantikagate nirbhartsya priyasakhīveṣaṃ vidhāyāgate bhrāntyāliṅgya mayā rahasyamuditaṃ tatsaṃgamākāṅkṣayā |  9494-2 mugdhe duṣkarametadityatitarāmuktvā sahāsaṃ balādāliṅgya cchalitāsmi tena kitavenādya pradoṣāgame ||9495-1 kānte snehanidhau samīyuṣi madhau jitvā śriyaṃ śaiśirīṃ viśleṣādiva tasya pāṇḍimabhṛtāmālīlatānāmiyaṃ |  9495-2 kartuṃ nūtanacitrapatraracanāṃ kiṃ kānanaśrīrimāṃ prācīnāṃ pavanāñcalena paritaḥ patrāvalīṃ lumpati ||9496-1 kānte hanta suk_oṃalā bata matā prāgvyarthameva bhramāthkiṃtu tvaṃ bhuvi niṣṭhurā nirupamā paśyasyapīmaṃ na māṃ |  9496-2 tasmādvakṣasi te payodharamiṣāddhātrā nikhāyārpitau śailendrāviti sāṃprataṃ na hi ciraṃ saukhyaṃ parakleśituḥ ||9497-1 kānto narmaṇi naipuṇena viditastvaṃ śaiśavadveṣiṇīkrīḍāśailaśir_oṃaṇirgṛhamidaṃ ramyo vasantotsavaḥ |  9497-2 sakhyaḥ kāmakathopacāracaturāḥ saṃbhogakāle'dhunā māno vā kalaho'thavā yadi kadā taccetaso nirvṛtiḥ ||9498-1 kānto yāsyati dūradeśamiti me cintā paraṃ jāyate lokānandakaro hi candravadane vairāyate candramāḥ |  9498-2 kiṃ cāyaṃ vitanoti kokilakalālāpo vilāpodayaṃ prāṇāneva haranti hanta nitarāmārāmamandānilāḥ ||9499-1 kānto'si nityamadhuro'si rasākulo'si kiṃ cāsi pañcaśarakārmukamadvitīyaṃ |  9499-2 ikṣo tavāsti sakalaṃ paramekamūnaṃ yatsevito bhajasi nīrasatāṃ krameṇa ||9500-1 kāntyā kāñcanakāntayā parimalairbhāgyaikabhogyaistathā saundaryeṇa ca sādhunaiva kusumaṃ hā hanta na tvatsamaṃ |  9500-2 akrodhaṃ śṛṇu kintu dūṣaṇamiva tvayyasti kiñcitpunas tattvajñairyadacumbitaṃ tvamasi re cāmpeya puṣpandhayaiḥ ||9501-1 kāntyā daridratvamupaiti candraḥ kimasti tattvaṃ vikacotpaleṣu |  9501-2 na vedyi viśvāsya kathaṃ mṛgākṣyā saundaryasṛṣṭirmuṣitā vidhātuḥ ||9502-1 kāntyā viluptāni vilocanānāṃ āpāṭalānāmatirodanena |  9502-2 sakuṅkumānīva punarbhaṃvanti yasyārinārīkucamaṇḍalāni ||9503-1 kāntyā suvarṇavarayā parayā ca śuddhyā nityaṃ svikāḥ khalu śikhāḥ paritaḥ kṣipantīṃ |  9503-2 cetoharāmapi kṛśeśayalocane tvāṃ jānāmi kopakaluṣo dahano dadāha ||9504-1 kānyakubjā dvijāḥ sarve māgadhaṃ mādhuraṃ vinā |  9504-2 gauḍadrāviḍavikhyātāḥ kānyakubjāḥ mahodbhavāḥ ||9505-1 kā pāṇḍupatnī gṛhabhūṣaṇaṃ kiṃ ko rāmaśatruḥ kimagastyajanma |  9505-2 kaḥ sūryaputro viparītapṛcchā kuntīsuto rāvaṇakumbhakarṇāḥ ||9506-1 kāpi kāntamidamāha mahelā sādhu sādhaya tathā yudhi kāryaṃ |  9506-2 vartate tava yathā ca jayaśrīr lokanāthalalanā ca sapatnī ||9507-1 kāpi kuḍyalikhitāvadhirekhāḥ proṣitapriyatamā gaṇayantī |  9507-2 veśmani prabalavahniparīte sāsrayā bahiranīyata sakhyā ||9508-1 kāpi mukhyapadavīmadhiropya svāṃ sakhīṃ svakaradhāritadīpā |  9508-2 prāṇanātharatigehamayāsīdadbhuto ratipaterupadeśaḥ ||9509-1 kāpiśāyanasugandhi vighūrṇann unmado'dhiśayituṃ samaśeta |  9509-2 phulladṛṣṭivadanaṃ pramadānāṃ abjacāru caṣakaṃ ca śaḍaṅghriḥ ||9510-1 kāpi śīghramavadhīritamānā mānino vicalitā priyadhāmni |  9510-2 āgatena marutāpi purastāl lāghavasya parihāramamaṃsta ||9511-1 kāpuruṣaḥ kukkuraśca bhojanaikaparāyaṇaḥ |  9511-2 lālitaḥ pārśvamāyāti vārito naiva gacchati ||9512-1 kāpyaṅghrī raṅgapatryāruṇayati ramaṇī bhūṣaṇairbhāti kācidgāyatyanyā parāpi pralasati laharīlakṣma vāso vasānā |  9512-2 yatrānyā snehapūrānvitarati ca mudaṃ yāti dolābhiranyā sā śṛṅgāradvitīyā racayati na manaḥ kasya śṛṅgāramagnaṃ ||9513-1 kāpyanyā mukulādhikāramilitā lakṣmīraśokadrume mākandaḥ samayocitena vidhinā dhatte'bhijātaṃ vapuḥ |  9513-2 kiṃ cāṣāḍhagireranaṅgavijayaprastāvanāpaṇḍita ḥ svairaṃ sarpati bālacandanalatālīlāsakho mārutaḥ ||9514-1 kāpyabhikhyā tayorāsīdvrajato śuddhaveṣayoḥ |  9514-2 himanirmuktayoryoge citrācandramasoriva ||9515-1 kāpyāgataṃ vīkṣya manodhināthaṃ samutthitā sādaramāsanāya |  9515-2 kareṇa śiñjadvalayena talpaṃ āsphālayantī kalamājuhāva ||9516-1 kā prastutābhiṣekādāryaṃ pracyāvayedguṇajyeṣṭhaṃ |  9516-2 manye mamaiva puṇyaiḥ sevāvasaraḥ kṛto vidhinā ||9517-1 kā priyeṇa rahitā varāṅganā dhāmni kena tanayena nanditā |  9517-2 kīdṛśena puruṣeṇa pakṣiṇāṃ bandhanaṃ samabhilaṣyate sadā ||9518-1 kā prītiḥ saha mārjāraiḥ kā prītiravanīpatau |  9518-2 gaṇikābhiśca kā prītiḥ kā prītirbhikṣukaiḥ saha ||9519-1 kābhirna tatrābhinavasmarājñā viśvāsanikṣepavaṇikkriye'haṃ |  9519-2 jihneti yannaiva kuto'pi tiryak kaścittiraścastrapate na tena ||9520-1 kā bhūṣā balināṃ,kṣamā,paribhavaḥ,kopaḥ svakulyaiḥ kṛtaḥ kiṃ duḥkhaṃ,parasaṃśrayo,jagati kaḥ ślāghyo,ya āśrīyate |  9520-2 ko mṛtyu,rvyasanaṃ,śucaṃ jahati ke,yairnirjitā śatravaḥ kairvijñātamidaṃ virāṭanagaracchannasthitaiḥ pāṇḍavaiḥ ||9521-1 kāmaṃ karīṣāgnimadho nidhāyā- bhrameṇa tāpātiśayaṃ bhajadhvaṃ |  9521-2 yuṣmākamadyāvadhi nādhikāro dugdhātimugdhādharamādhurīṣu ||9522-1 kāmaṃ karṇakaṭuḥ kṛto'timadhuraḥ kekāravaḥ kekināṃ meghāścāmṛtadhāriṇo'pi vihitāḥ prāyo viṣasyandinaḥ |  9522-2 unmīlannavakandalāvalirasau śayyāpi sarpāyate tatkiṃ yadviparītamatra na kṛtaṃ tasyā viyogena me ||9523-1 kāmaṃ kāmadughaṃ dhuṅkṣva mitrāya varuṇāya ca |  9523-2 vayaṃ dhīreṇa dānena sarvānkāmānaśīmahi ||9524-1 kāmaṃ kāmayate na kelinalinīṃ nāmodate k_oṃudī- nisyandairna samīhate mṛgadṛśāmālāpalīlāmapi |  9524-2 sīdanneṣa niśāsu duḥsahatanurbhogābhilāṣālasair aṅgaistāmyati cetasi vrajavadhūmādhāya mugdho hariḥ ||9525-1 kāmaṃ kāmayamānasya yadā kāmaḥ samṛddhyate |  9525-2 athainamaparaḥ kāmastṛṣṇā vidhyati bāṇavat ||9526-1 kāmaṃ kāmasamastvamatra jagati khyāto'si yatsarvadā rūpeṇaiva mahīpate tava dhanuḥpāṇḍityamanyādṛśaṃ |  9526-2 tvaṃ yasminviśikhaṃ vimuñcasi tamevoddiśya muktatrapaṃ truṭyatkaṃcukamudgataspṛhamaho dhāvanti devāṅganāḥ ||9527-1 kāmaṃ kumīnasadṛśaṃ rājyamapi prājyakaṇṭakaṃ kuśalaḥ |  9527-2 pākānvitamatisurasaṃ bhuṅkte bahudhāvadhānena ||9528-1 kāmaṃ kūle jāte locanagocare yadi bhavānsthātā tadā manmahe ||9530-1 kāmaṃ krodhaṃ ca lobhaṃ ca dambhaṃ darpaṃ ca bhūmipaḥ |  9530-2 samyagvijetuṃ yo veda sa mahīmabhijāyate ||9530ā-1 kāmaṃ krodhaṃ bhayaṃ sūnṛtāṃ vācamāhuḥ ||9538-1 kāmaṃ durviṣahajvaraṃ janayati vyāghūrṇayatpakṣiṇīgātrāṇyūrunitambagaṇḍahṛdayānyucchūnayatyulbaṇaṃ |  9538-2 tāṃ tāṃ durvikṛtaṃ karoti suhṛdo gāḍhaṃ vyathante yayāvyādhiyauvanamātmanāśaniyataḥ ke te grahaṇyādayaḥ ||9539-1 kāmaṃ dṛṣṭā mayā sarvā vivastrā rāvaṇastriyaḥ |  9539-2 na tu me manasaḥ kiṃcidvaikṛtyamupapadyate ||9540-1 mano hi hetuḥ sarveṣāṃ indriyāṇāṃ pravartane |  9540-2 śubhāśubhāsvavasthāsu tacca me suvyavasthitaṃ ||9541-1 kāmaṃ na paśyati didṛkṣata eva bhūmnā noktāpi jalpati vivakṣati cādareṇa |  9541-2 lajjāsmaravyatikareṇa diśatu sa munigrāmaṇīrarkabandhuḥ ||9591-1 kāmakrodhau puraskṛtya yo'rthaṃ rājānutiṣṭhati |  9591-2 na sa dharmaṃ na cāpyarthaṃ parigṛhṇāti bāliśaḥ ||9592-1 kāmakrodhau madyatamau niyoktavyau yathocitaṃ |  9592-2 kāmaḥ prajāpālane ca krodhaḥ śatrunibarhaṇe ||9593-1 kāmakrodhau vinirjitya kimaraṇyaiḥ kariṣyati |  9593-2 annena dhāryaṃte dehaḥ kulaṃ śīlena dhāryate ||9594-1 kāmakrodhau hi puruṣaṃ arthebhyo vyapakarṣataḥ |  9594-2 tau tu śatrū vinirjitya rājā vijayate mahīṃ ||9595-1 kāmaghnādviṣamadṛśo bhūtyavaliptādbhujaṅgasaṅgaruceḥ |  9595-2 ko bhṛṅgīva na śuṣyati vāñcha na phalamīśvarādaguṇāt ||9596-1 kāmajaṃ mṛgayā dyūtaṃ striyaḥ pānaṃ tathaiva ca |  9596-2 vyasanaṃ vyasanārthajñaiścaturvidhamudāhṛtaṃ ||9597-1 kāma jānāmi te mūlaṃ saṃkalpātkila jāyase |  9597-2 na tvāṃ saṃkalpayiṣyāmi samūlo na bhaviṣyasi ||9598-1 kāmajeṣu prasakto hi vyasaneṣu mahīpatiḥ |  9598-2 viyujyate'rthadharmābhyāṃ krodhajeṣvātmanaiva tu ||9598ā-1 kāmatantreṣu nipuṇaḥ kruddhānunayakovidaḥ |  9598ā-2 sphurite'nādare kiṃciddayitāyā virajyati ||9599-1 kāmato rūpadhāritvaṃ śastrāstrāśmāmbuvarṣaṇaṃ |  9599-2 tamo'nilo'calo medhā iti māyā hyamānuṣī ||9600-1 jaghāna kīcakaṃ bhīma āśritaḥ strīsarūpatāṃ |  9600-2 ciraṃ pracchannarūpo'bhūddivyayā māyayā nalaḥ ||9601-1 kāmadarpādiśīlānāṃ avicāritakāriṇāṃ |  9601-2 āyuṣā saha naśyanti sampado mūḍhacetasāṃ ||9602-1 kāmadhenuguṇā vidyā hyakāle phaladāyinī |  9602-2 pravāse mātṛsadṛśī vidyā guptaṃ dhanaṃ smṛtaṃ ||9602ā-1 kāmadhenudharādīnāṃ dātāraḥ sulabhā bhuvi |  9602ā-2 durlabhaḥ puruṣo loke sarvabhūtadayāparaḥ ||9603-1 kāmanāmnā kirātena vitatā mūḍhacetasāṃ |  9603-2 nāryo naravihaṃgānāṃ aṅgabandhanavāgurāḥ ||9604-1 kāmapi dhatte sūkararūpī kāmapi rahitāmicchati bhūpaḥ |  9604-2 kenākāri ca manmathajananaṃ kena virājati taruṇīvadanaṃ ||9605-1 kāmapi śriyamāsādya yastadvṛddhau na ceṣṭate |  9605-2 tasyāyatiṣu na śreyo bījabhojikuṭumbavat ||9606-1 kāmaprasaktamātmānaṃ smṛtvā pāṇḍuṃ nipātitaṃ |  9606-2 nivartayettathā krodhādanuhādaṃ hatātmajaṃ ||9607-1 kāmabandhanamevaikaṃ nānyadastīha bandhanaṃ |  9607-2 kāmabandhanamukto hi brahmabhūyāya kalpate ||9608-1 kāmabāṇaprahāreṇa mūrcchitāni pade pade |  9608-2 jīvanti yuvacetāṃsi yuvatīnāṃ smitāmṛtaiḥ ||9609-1 kāmamastu jagatsarvaṃ kālasyāsya vaśaṃvadaṃ |  9609-2 kālakālaprapannānāṃ kālaḥ kiṃ naḥ kariṣyati ||9610-1 kāmamā maraṇāttiṣṭhedgṛhe kanyartumatyapi |  9610-2 na caivaināṃ prayaccheta guṇahīnāya karhicit ||9611-1 kāmamāśritya duṣpūraṃ dambhamānamadānvitāḥ |  9611-2 mohādgṛhītvāsadgrāhānpravartante'śucivratāḥ ||9612-1 kāmayante virajyante rañjayanti tyajanti ca |  9612-2 karṣayantyo'pi sarvārthāñjñāyante naiva yoṣitaḥ ||9613-1 kāmayeta na hi kṣudraṃ arthaṃ jātu mahāmanāḥ |  9613-2 vardhayeta svamaudāryaṃ prabhāvaṃ ca yaśo bhuvi ||9614-1 kāmavarṣī ca parjanyo nityaṃ sasyavatī mahī |  9614-2 gāvaśca ghaṭadohinyaḥ pādapāśca sadāphalāḥ ||9615-1 kāmavṛttastvayaṃ lokaḥ kṛtsnaḥ samupavartate |  9615-2 yadvṛttāḥ santi rājānastadvṛttāḥ santi hi prajāḥ ||9616-1 kāmavyāghre kumatiphaṇini svāntadurvāranīḍemāyāsiṃhīviharaṇamahīlobhabhallūkabhīme |  9616-2 janmāraṇye na bhavati ratiḥ sajjanānāṃ kadācithtattvajñānāṃ viṣayatuṣitākaṇṭakākīrṇapārśve ||9617-1 kāmavyādhaśarāhatirna gaṇitā saṃjīvanī tvaṃ smṛtā no dagdho virahānalena jhaṭiti tvatsaṃgamāśābhṛtaiḥ |  9617-2 nīto'yaṃ divaso vicitralikhitaiḥ samkalparūpairmayā kiṃ vānyad_hṛdaye sthitāsi nanu me tatra svayaṃ sākṣiṇī ||9618-1 kāmasaṅgaravidhau mṛgīdṛśaḥ prauḍhapeṣaṇadhare payodhare |  9618-2 svedarājirudiyāya sarvataḥ puṣpavṛṣṭiriva puṣpadhanvanaḥ ||9618ā-1 kāyastapasviṣu jayatyadhikārakāmo viśvasya cittavibhurindriyavājyadhīśaḥ |  9618ā-2 bhūtāni bibhrati mahāntyapi yasya śiṣṭiṃ vyāvṛttamaulimaṇiraśmibhiruttamāṅgaiḥ ||9619-1 kāmastu tasya naivāsti pratyakṣeṇopalakṣyate |  9619-2 dampatyoḥ sahadharmeṇa trayīdharmamavāpnuyāt ||9620-1 kāmastu bāṇāvasaraṃ pratīkṣya pataṅgavadvahnimukhaṃ vivikṣuḥ |  9620-2 umāsamakṣaṃ harabaddhalakṣyaḥ śarāsanajyāṃ muhurāmamarśa ||9621-1 kāmasya kaściccaturaḥ śarāṃścedvilaṅghayāmāsa kathaṃcidanyān |  9621-2 unmajjatā kokilakaṇṭhayantrāthna pañcamāstreṇa vaśīvabhūva ||9622-1 kāmasya jetukāmasya milanāya mahīpateḥ |  9622-2 divo mīnaṃ tviṣāmīśo dvārīkartumivāyayau ||9623-1 kāmasya veṣaśobhā peśalatā cārutā guṇotkarṣaḥ |  9623-2 nānāvidhāśca līlāścittajñānaṃ ca kāntānāṃ ||9624-1 kāmasyāpi nidānamāhurapare māyāṃ mahāśāsanāṃ niścitkāṃ sakalaprapañcaracanācāturyalīlāvatīṃ |  9624-2 yatsaṅgādbhagavānapi prabhavati pratyaṅmahāmohahā śrīraṅgo bhuvanodayāvanalayavyāpāracakre'kriyaḥ ||9625-1 kāmasvabhāvo yo yasya na sa śakyaḥ pramārjituṃ |  9625-2 na hi duṣṭātmanāmārya mā vasatyālaye ciraṃ ||9626-1 kāmāgniḥ parivardhito virahiṇīśvāsānilairnirbharaṃ tūrṇaṃ tena kṛśānunā kṛśatanurmugdhā na dagdhā kathaṃ |  9626-2 bālā lolavilocanāmbujagalatsadvāridhārābharaiḥ siktā samprati tena jīvasi hare tāṃ tvaṃ samullāsaya ||9627-1 kāmaturo nādhigacchenmahāpuruṣakāminīṃ |  9627-2 sahasrayonideho'bhūdindro'halyāparigrahāt ||9628-1 kāmātkrodhādbhayādanyairlobhymāno na lumpati |  9628-2 yayā śaktyā yutaḥ kārye mantraśaktistu sā smṛtā ||9629-1 kāmātklāmyasi kā rītirnārīti narakābhidhā |  9629-2 malamajjāmayī māṃsasthagī kiṃ na vigīyate ||9630-1 kāmātmatā na praśastā na caivāstyakāmatā |  9630-2 kāmyo hi vedādhigamaḥ karmayogaśca vaidikaḥ ||9631-1 kāmāditrikameva mūlamakhilakleśasya māyodbhavaṃ martyānāmiti devamaulivilasadbhrājiṣṇucūḍāmaṇiḥ |  9631-2 śrīkṛṣṇo bhagavānavocadakhilaprāṇipriyo matprabhur yasmāttattrikamudyatena manasā heyaṃ pumarthārthinā ||9632-1 kāmādhikaraṇagrāhyakulādibalaśālinaḥ |  9632-2 ahīne'pi narendrasya śaktayaḥ siddhihetavaḥ ||9633-1 kāmānāmapi dātāraṃ kartāraṃ mānasāntvayoḥ |  9633-2 rakṣitāraṃ na mṛṣyanti bhartāraṃ paramaṃ striyaḥ ||9634-1 kāmānuśāsanaśate sutarāmadhītī so'yaṃ raho nakhapadairmahatu stanau te |  9634-2 ruṣṭādrijācaraṇakuṅkumapaṅkarāga saṃkīrṇaśaṅkaraśaśāṅkakalāṅka kāraiḥ ||9365-1 kāmānusārī puruṣaḥ kāmānanu vinaśyati |  9365-2 kāmānvyudasya dhunute yatkiñcitpuruṣo rajaḥ ||9636-1 kāmānvyudasya dhunute yatkiṃcitpuruṣo rajaḥ |  9636-2 kāmakrodhodbhavaṃ duḥkhaṃ ahrīraratireva ca ||9637-1 kāmābhibhūtaḥ krodhādvā yo mithyā pratipadyate |  9637-2 sveṣu cānyeṣu vā tasya na sahāyā bhavantyuta ||9638-1 kāmā manuṣyaṃ prasajanta eva dharmasya ye vighnamūlaṃ narendra |  9638-2 pūrvaṃ narastāndhṛtimānvinighnan loke praśaṃsāṃ labhate'navadyāṃ ||9639-1 kāmāya spṛhayatyātmā saṃyato'pi manīṣiṇaḥ |  9639-2 vīthīniyamito'pyukṣā śaṣpamāsādya dhāvati ||9640-1 kāmārtāṃ svayamāyātāṃ yo na bhuṅkte nitambinīṃ |  9640-2 so'vaśyaṃ narakaṃ yāti tanniḥśvāsahato naraḥ ||9641-1 kāmārtāṃ svastriyaṃ dīnāṃ prārthayantīṃ punaḥ punaḥ |  9641-2 na bhajedbhajamānāṃ yaḥ sa vai cāṇḍāladarśanaḥ ||9641ā-1 kāmārtā gharmataptā vetyaniścayakaraṃ vacaḥ |  9641ā-2 yuvānamākulīkartuṃ iti dūtyāha narmaṇā ||9641bh-1 kāmārthamajñaḥ kṛpaṇaṃ karoti prāpnoti duḥkhaṃ vadhabandhanādi |  9641bh-2 kāmārthamāśākṛpaṇastapasvī mṛrtyu śramaṃ cācchati jīvalokaḥ ||9642-1 kāmārthau lipsamānastu dharmamevāditaścaret |  9642-2 na hi dharmādapaityarthaḥ kāmo vāpi kadācana ||9642ā-1 kāmāllobhādbhayātkrodhātsākṣivādāttathaiva ca |  9642ā-2 mithyā vadati yatpāpaṃ tadasatyaṃ prakīrtitaṃ ||9642bh-1 kāmāveśaḥ kaitavasyopadeśaḥ māyākośo vañcanāsanniveśaḥ |  9642bh-2 nirdravyāṇāmaprasiddhapraveśo ramyakleśaḥ supraveśo'stu veśaḥ||9643-1 kāmijanaparamabhogye kāmasukhe dhārayanti bībhatsaṃ |  9643-2 santaḥ śamasukharasikāḥ sudhāśanāḥ sūkarānna iva ||9644-1 kāminaḥ kṛtaratotsavakāla- kṣepamākṛlavadhūkarasaṅgi |  9644-2 mekhalāguṇavilagnamasūyāṃ dīrghasūtramakarotparidhānaṃ ||9645-1 kāminaścaritairebhiḥ kurvanto niśi jāgaraṃ |  9645-2 kurvantyapriyamātmānaṃ kecinmūḍhāḥ priyā api ||9645ā-1 kāmināṃ kāminīnāṃ ca saṅgātkāmī bhavetpumān |  9645ā-2 dehāntare tataḥ krodhī lobhī mohī ca jāyate ||9646-1 kāmināmasakalāni vibhugnaiḥ svedavārimṛdubhiḥ karajāgraiḥ |  9646-2 akriyanta kaṭhineṣu kathaṃcithkāminīkucataṭeṣu padāni ||9647-1 kāminīṃ prathamayauvanānvitāṃ mandavalgumṛdupīḍitasvanāṃ |  9647-2 utstanīṃ samavalambya yā ratiḥ sā na dhātṛbhavane'sti me matiḥ ||9648-1 kāminīkāyakāntāre kucaparvatadurgame |  9648-2 mā saṃcara manaḥpāntha tatrāste smarataskaraḥ ||9648ā-1 kāminījanavilocanapātā- nunmiṣatkaluṣānpratigṛhṇan |  9648ā-2 mandamandamuditaḥ prayayau khaṃ bhītabhīta iva śītamayūkhaḥ ||9649-1 kāminīnayanakajjalapaṅkādutthito madanamattavarāhaḥ |  9649-2 kāmimānasavanāntaracārī mūlamutkhanati mānalatāyāḥ ||9650-1 kāminīvadananirjitakāntiḥ śobhituṃ na hi śaśāka śaśāṅkaḥ |  9650-2 lajjayeva vimalaṃ vapurāptuṃ śīdhupūrṇacaṣakeṣu mamajja ||9651-1 kāminīvargasaṃsargairna kaḥ saṃkrāntapātakaḥ |  9651-2 nāśnāti snāti hā mohātkāmakṣāmavrataṃ jagat ||9652-1 kāminīsahacarasya kāminas tasya veśmasu mṛdaṅganādiṣu |  9652-2 ṛddhimantamadhikarddhiruttaraḥ pūrvamutsavamapohadutsavaḥ ||9653-1 kāmino hanta hemantaniśi śītajvarāturāḥ |  9653-2 jīvanti hariṇākṣīṇāṃ vakṣojāśleṣarakṣitāḥ ||9654-1 kāminyāḥ kucadurgaparvatabhuvi tvaṃ mā manaḥpānthaka saṃcāraṃ kuru r_oṃarājigahane tatrāsti nābhyāṃ guhā |  9654-2 tallīno madhusūdanamya tanayastenātra caureṇa bho nirvastrīkriyate divāpi hi naro rātrau tu kiṃ kathyate ||9655-1 kāminyāḥ kucayoḥ kāntiḥ pīnatvena puraskṛtā |  9655-2 suvarṇācalaśṛṅgābhāṃ vinirjetuṃ samudyatā ||9656-1 kāminyāḥ stanabhāramantharagaterlīlācalaccakṣuṣaḥkandarpaikavilāsanityavasateḥ kīdṛkpumānvallabhaḥ |  9656-2 helākṛṣṭakṛpāṇapāritagajānīkātkutaste'rayaḥśvrāsāyāsaviśuṣkakaṇṭhakuharā niryānti jīvārthinaḥ ||9657-1 kāminyo nīcagāminyastaṭinya iva niścitaṃ |  9657-2 dārā rājño'pi yattārāḥ praṇayaṃ yānti gopateḥ ||9658-1 kāmī kāmavraṇaparigataḥ kāminīreva hitvā bhuṅkte paścādapagatabhayaṃ kāminīnāṃ sahasraṃ |  9658-2 itthaṃkāraṃ viṣayasukhabhogaikatānairnarairapy asmindehe katipayadinānyeṣa bhogo vivarjyaḥ ||9659-1 kāmukāḥ syuḥ kathā nīcāḥ sarvaḥ kasminpramodate |  9659-2 arthinaḥ prāpya puṇyāhaṃ kariṣyadhve vasūni kiṃ ||9660-1 kāmuke nūtanāsaṅgagāḍhāliṅganakātare |  9660-2 gaṇikā gehagaṇanāṃ karoti dhyānamāsthitā ||9661-1 kāmuke bhramaraḥ proktaḥ kāminyāṃ cūtamañjarī |  9661-2 tathāhvānāṅkurāścāpi prākāro vāraṇe smṛtaḥ ||9662-1 kāmujjahāra harirambudhimadhyalagnāṃ kīdṛkśrutaṃ bhavati nirmalamāgamānāṃ|  9662-2 āmantrayasva vanamagniśikhāvalīḍhaṃ yaccāpi ko dahati ke madayanti bhṛṅgān ||9663-1 kāmekapatnīvrataduḥkhaśīlāṃ lolaṃ manaścārutayā praviṣṭāṃ |  9663-2 nitambinīmicchasi muktalajjāṃ kaṇṭhe svayaṃgrāhaniṣaktabāhuṃ ||9664-1 kā me gatiriti pṛcchati caramaśvāse'pi yaḥ svārthaṃ |  9664-2 tasya janasyāpi kṛte pāpāḥ pāpāni kurvanti ||9665-1 kā meghādupayāti,kṛṣṇadayitā kā vā,sabhā kīdṛśī,kāṃ rakṣatyahihā,śaradvikacayetkaṃ,dhairyahantrī ca kā |  9665-2 kaṃ dhatte gaṇanāyakaḥ karatale,kā cañcalā kathyatām,ārohādavarohataśca nipuṇairekaṃ dvayoruttaraṃ ||9666-1 kāmena kāmaṃ prahitā javena prāvṛṭcacāla trijagadvijetuṃ |  9666-2 kiṃ candrabimbaṃ dadhi bhakṣayatnī saṃdhārayantī haritaḥ śubhāya ||9667-1 kāmenākṛṣya cāpaṃ hatapaṭupaṭahaṃ valgubhirmāravīrair bhrūbhaṅgotkṣepajṛmbhāsmitalalitadṛśā divyanārījanena |  9667-2 siddhaiḥ prahvottamāṅgaiḥ pulakitavapuṣā vismayādvāsavena dhyāyanyo yogapīṭhādacalita iti vaḥ pātu dṛṣṭo munīdraḥ ||9668-1 kāmenāpi na bhettuṃ kimu hṛdayamapāri bālavanitānāṃ |  9668-2 mūḍhaviśikhaprahāro- cchūnamivābhāti yadvakṣaḥ ||9669-1 kāmeṣuṇā kāmaripormano'pi kallolitaṃ kā manujeṣu vārtā |  9669-2 āṣāḍhavāte calati dvipendre cūlīvato vāridhireva kāṣṭhā ||9670-1 kāmaistaistairhṛtajñānāḥ prapadyante'nyadevatāḥ |  9670-2 taṃ taṃ niyamamāsthāya prakṛtyā niyatāḥ svayā ||9671-1 kāmo'kṣamā dakṣiṇatānukampā hrīḥ sādhvasaṃ krauryamanāyaitā ca |  9671-2 dambho'bhimāno'tha ca dhārmikatvaṃ dainyaṃ svayūthasyavimānanaṃ ca ||9672-1 droho bhayaṃ śaśvadupekṣaṇaṃ ca śītoṣṇavarṣāsvasahiṣṇutā ca |  9672-2 etāni kāle samupāhitāni kurvantyavaśyaṃ khalu siddhivighnaṃ ||9673-1 kāmottaptaṃ marakatamahāgrāvahāro gabhīre magnaṃ nābhīsarasi hṛdayaṃ jagrase'nekapaṃ me |  9673-2 lilāveśapracalitakaraḥ ko'pyahīnāriketus tadbhaṅgena pratividhimihaivānurūpaṃ vyatānīt ||9674-1 kāmodvegagṛhītaṃ dhūrtairupahasyamānaśṛṅgāraṃ |  9674-2 dāridryahataṃ yauvanaṃ abudhānāṃ kevalaṃ vipade ||9675-1 kāmo nāsti napuṃsakasya kulaṭāvargasya nāsti trapā toyaṃ nāsti marīcakāsu satataṃ nāsti sthiratvaṃ striyaḥ |  9675-2 dharmo nāsti ca nāsti kasya vibhavo nāsti pramattātmanaḥ snehānāṃ kaṇikāpi nāsti gaṇikālokasya ca prāyaśaḥ ||9676-1 kāmopabhogasāphalyaphalo rājñāṃ mahījayaḥ |  9676-2 ahaṅkāreṇa jīyante dviṣantaḥ kiṃ nayaśriyā ||9677-1 kāmo vāmadṛśāṃ nidhirnayajuṣāṃ kālānalo vidviṣāṃ svaḥśākhī viduṣāṃ gururguṇavatāṃ pārtho dhanurdhāriṇāṃ |  9677-2 līlāvāsagṛhaṃ kulākulajuṣāṃ karṇaḥ suvarṇārthināṃ śrīmānvīravaraḥ kṣitīśvaravaro varvarti sarvopari ||9678-1 kāmbojāḥ kambujanmākaraśaraṇakṛtaḥ sahyakāntārakacchā- nvicchāyāḥ kacchavāhā vidadhati katame kāmarūpāḥ kurūpāḥ |  9678-2 kurvāṇe tvayyakasmātkarakamalahṛtaṃ kārmukaṃ kūrmapṛṣṭho- tkṛṣṭaṃ karṇāntakṛṣṭaṃ narapakulamaṇe karṇamākarṇayanti ||9679-1 kāmyāḥ kriyāstathā kāmānmānuṣānabhivāñchati |  9679-2 striyo dānaphalaṃ vidyāṃ māyāṃ kupyaṃ dhanaṃ divaṃ ||9680-1 devatvamamareśatvaṃ rasāyanacayaḥ kriyāḥ |  9680-2 marutprapatanaṃ yajñaṃ jalādyāveśanaṃ tathā ||9681-1 śrāddhānāṃ sarvadānānāṃ phalāni niyamāṃstathā |  9681-2 tathopavāsātpūrttācca devatābhyarccanādapi ||9682-1 tebhyastebhyaśca karmabhya upasṛṣṭo'bhivāñchati |  9682-2 cittamitthaṃ varttamānaṃ yatnādyogī nivarttayet ||9683-1 kāmyānāṃ katicitsamāparimitasvargaikasaṃdāyināṃ sadyaḥ svāntanitāntamohanakṛtāṃ kartā janaḥ karmaṇāṃ |  9683-2 ātmānandamananyavedyamaparicchinnaṃ na jānāti taṃ vikretā lavaṇasya vetti kimu tatkarpūramūlyaṃ paraṃ ||9684-1 kāmyānāṃ karmaṇāṃ nyāsaṃ saṃnyāsaṃ kavayo viduḥ |  9684-2 sarvakarmaphalatyāgaṃ prāhustyāgaṃ vicakṣaṇāḥ ||9685-1 kāyaṃ matvā puṣpāṇi cyutasaurabhāṇi na dalaśreṇī manohāriṇī |  9686-2 kiṃ brūmaḥ phalapākamasya yadupanyāse'pi lajjāmahe tadbhoḥ kena guṇena śālmalitaro jāto'si s_oṃadrumaḥ ||9687-1 kāyaḥ saṃnihitāpāyaḥ so'nvicchati duḥkhameva ||9688-1 kāyakleśena mahatā puruṣaḥ prāpnuyātphalaṃ |  9688-2 tatsarvaṃ labhate nārī sukhena patipūjayā ||9689-1 kāyacchinnāstu ṛṣikā marmaghnā guravastathā |  9689-2 tīkṣṇāśchedasahā vāṅgā dṛḍhā śūrpārakodbhavāḥ ||9689ā-1 kāyavāṅmanasāṃ duṣṭapraṇidhānamanādaraḥ |  9689ā-2 smṛtyanupasthāpanaṃ ca smṛtāḥ sāmāyikavrate ||9690-1 kāyasthasya ca śalyasya kāyasthasya karaṇapaṭutāṃ bandhusampattimarthaṃ cāturyaṃ vā kimiva hi balaṃ bibhrato nirbharāḥ smaḥ |  9692-2 antyaḥ śvāsaḥ kimayamathavopāntya ityāmṛśanto vismṛtyeśaṃ nimiṣamapi kiṃ vartituṃ pārayāmaḥ ||9693-1 kāyena kurute pāpaṃ manasā sampradhārya ca |  9693-2 anṛtaṃ jihvayā cāha trividhaṃ karma pātakaṃ ||9694-1 kāyena trividhaṃ caiva vācā caiva caturvidhaṃ |  9694-2 manasā trividhaṃ nityaṃ ||9699-1 kāraṇena vinā bhṛtye yastu kupyati pārthivaḥ |  9699-2 sa gṛhṇāti viṣonmādaṃ kṛṣṇasarpapradaṃśitaḥ ||9700-1 kāraṇenaiva jāyante mitrāṇi ripavastathā |  9700-2 ripavo yena jāyante kāraṇaṃ ||9704-1 kāraya nāmba vilambaṃ muñca karaṃ me hariṃ yāmi |  9704-2 na sahe sthātuṃ yadasau garjati muralī pragalbhadūtīva ||9705-1 kāraṇātpriyatāmeti dveṣyo bhavati kāraṇāt |  9705-2 arthārthī 9707-2 māyā mohamatīnāṃ kṛtaghnatā narakapātahetūnāṃ ||9708-1 kāruṇyaṃ saṃvibhāgaśca yathā bhṛtyeṣu lakṣyate |  9708-2 cittenānena te śaṅkyā trailokyasyāpi nāthatā ||9709-1 kāruṇyapuṇyasatsadma te maulau bhavatāṃ milantu jagatīrājyābhiṣekocita- sragbhedā abhayapradānacaraṇapreṅkhannakhāgrāṃśavaḥ ||9711-1 kāruṇyāmṛtanīramāśritajanaśrīcātakānandadaṃ 9742-2 sarveṣāṃ prāṇināṃ yatra nātra kāryā vicāraṇā ||9743-1 kāryākāryamanāryair unmārganirargalairgalanmatibhiḥ |  9743-2 nākarṇyate vikarṇair nayoktibhiryuktamuktamapi ||9744-1 kāryākārye kimapi 9750-2 niḥsārālpaphalāni ye tvavidhinā vāñchanti daṇḍodyamais teṣāṃ durnayaceṣṭitairnarapaterāropyate śrīstulāṃ ||9751-1 kāryā na pratikūlatā na ca bahirgantavyamasmādgṛhāthkopaśca anānuguṇyagaṇanāṃ kurvāṇairna vigarhyate ||9756-1 kāryārthinaḥ kṣīṇatarasya naiva niḥśeṣakāryaṃ kuṭilasya kuryāt |  9756-2 doṣākaraḥ prāptavivṛddhadarpaḥ palāyate dūrataraṃ hi mitrāt ||9757-1 kāryārthino dīrghamivādhvakhedaṃ vikrītadāsā iva karmabhāraṃ |  9757-2 kaṣṭaṃ kaṭudravyamivāmayārtāḥ svabhartṛgehaṃ vanitā sahante ||9758-1 kāryārthī bandhujanaḥ kāryairbahubhirbhavanti mitrāṇi |  9758-2 dārāḥ sutāśca sulabhā dhanamekaṃ durlabhaṃ loke ||9759-1 kāryārthī bhajate loke yāvatkāryaṃ na sidhyati |  9759-2 uttīrṇe ca pare pāre naukāyāḥ kiṃ prayojanaṃ ||9760-1 kāryārthī bhajate ||9762-1 kāryāvetau hi kālena dharmo hi vijayāvahaḥ |  9762-2 trayāṇāmapi lokānāṃ ālokakaraṇo bhavet ||9763-1 kāryāsamarthe mahati na kuryātparihāsakaṃ |  9763-2 lambodaraṃ natyaśaktaṃ apreṣyo'bhūcchaśī hasan ||9764-1 kāryā saikatalīnahaṃsamithunā srotovahā mālinī pādāstāmabhito niṣaṇṇahariṇā gaurīguroḥ pāvanāḥ |  9764-2 śākhālambitavalkalasya ca tarornirmātumicchāmyadhaḥ śṛṅge kṛṣṇamṛgasya vāmanayanaṃ kaṇḍūyamānāṃ mṛgīṃ ||9765-1 kāryaṃ karmaṇi nirdiṣṭo yo bahūnyapi sādhayet |  9765-2 pūrvakāryāvirodhena sa kāryaṃ kartumarhati ||9766-1 na hyekaḥ sādhako hetuḥ svalpasyāpīha karmaṇaḥ |  9766-2 yo hyarthaṃ bahudhā veda sa samartho'rthasādhane ||9767-1 kāryeṇa loke nijadharmagarhaṇā vicāracarcācaraṇaistu yairbhuvi |  9767-2 syāttanna kāryaṃ suhitāvahaṃ bhavadapīha bhavyaṃ svavicāradṛṣṭitaḥ ||9767ā-1 kāryeṇāpi vilambanaṃ paragṛhe śvaśrūrna saṃmanyate śaṅkāmāracayanti yūni bhavanaṃ prāpte mitho yātaraḥ |  9767ā-2 vīthīnirgamane'pi tarjayati ca kruddhā nanāndā punaḥ kaṣṭaṃ hanta mṛgīdṛśāṃ patigṛhaṃ prāyeṇa kārāgṛhaṃ ||9768-1 kārye tu duḥkhasādhye tu kāryo nātiśramo janaiḥ |  9768-2 kārye siddhe śramo na syādasiddhe śrama eva hi ||9769-1 kārye dāsī ratau veśyā bhojane jananīsamā |  9769-2 vipattau buddhidātrī ca sā bhāryā sarvadurlabhā ||9769ā-1 kārye mahati yuñjāno hīyate'rthapatiḥ śriyā |  9769ā-2 strīpradhānāni rājyāni vidvadbhirvarjitāni ca |  9769ā-3 mūrkhāmātyaprataptāni śuṣyanti jalabinduvat ||9770-1 kāryeṣu mantrī karaṇeṣu dāsī bhojyeṣu mātā śayaneṣu rambhā |  9770-2 dharme'nukūlā kṣamayā dharitrī bhāryā ca ṣāḍguṇyavatīha dhanyā ||9771-1 kāryeṣu mantrī karaṇeṣu dāsī sneheṣu mātā kṣamayā dharitrī |  9771-2 dharmasya patnī śayane ca veśyā ṣaṭkarmabhiḥ strī kulamuddharanti ||9772-1 kārye satyapi jātu yāti na bahirnāpyanyamālokatesādhvīrapyanukurvatī gurujanaṃ śvaśrūṃ ca śuśrūṣate |  9772-2 visrambhaṃ kurute ca patyuradhikaṃ prāpte niśīthe punar nidrāṇe sakale jane śaśimukhī niryāti rantuṃ viṭaiḥ ||9773-1 kāryehānusaraṇato vāraṃvāraṃ paraṃ pumāṃsamanu |  9773-2 yatamānasyānudinaṃ bhavati yataḥ premalakṣaṇaṃ bhajanaṃ ||9774-1 kāryopakṣepamādau tanumapi racayaṃstasya vistāramicchan bījānāṃ garbhitānāṃ phalamatigahanaṃ gūḍhamudbhedayaṃśca |  9774-2 kurvanbuddhyā vimarśaṃ prasṛtamapi punaḥ saṃharankāryajātaṃ kartā vā nāṭakānāmiyamanubhavati kleśamasmadvidho vā ||9775-1 kārśyaṃ kṣutprabhavaṃ kadannamaśanaṃ śītoṣṇayoḥ pātratā pāruṣyaṃ ca śiroruheṣu śayanaṃ mahyāstale kevale |  9775-2 etānyeva gṛhe vahantyavanatiṃ yāntyunnatiṃ kānane doṣā eva guṇībhavanti munibhiryogye pade yojitāḥ ||9776-1 kārśyaṃ cetpratipatkalā himanidheḥ sthūlātha cetpāṇḍimā līlā eva mṛṇālikā yadi ghanā bāṣpāḥ kiyānvāridhiḥ |  9776-2 santāpo yadi śītalo hutavahastasyāḥ kiyadvarṇyate rāma tvatsmṛtimātrameva hṛdaye lāvaṇyaśeṣaṃ vapuḥ ||9777-1 kārśyajāgarasantāpānyaḥ karoti śruto'pyalaṃ |  9777-2 tameva durlabhaṃ kāntaṃ cetaḥ kasmāddidṛkṣate ||9778-1 kārṣakaḥ sarvabījāni samāloḍya pravāpayet |  9778-2 utpannabījasadbhāvaṃ tvaṅkureṇa vibhāvayet ||9779-1 kālaṃ kapālamālāṅkaṃ ekamandhakasūdanaṃ |  9779-2 vande varadamīśānaṃ śāsanaṃ puṣpadhanvanaḥ ||9780-1 kālaṃ niyamya karmāṇi hyācarennānyathā kvacit |  9780-2 gavādiṣvātmavajjñānaṃ ātmānaṃ cārthadharmayoḥ |  9780-3 niyuñjītānnasaṃsiddhyai mātaraṃ śikṣaṇe guruṃ ||9781-1 kālaṃ nirīkṣya kurute kāryaṃ tasyāśu sidhyati |  9781-2 grahaṃ vicārya krīḍāyāṃ dīvyato na parājayaḥ ||9782-1 kālaṃ purā garalamambunidherudasthādadyendunāma dhavalaṃ viṣamabhyudeti |  9782-2 adyādidaṃ sa giriśo yadi hanta hanyāthkārṣṇyaṃ svakaṇṭhanihitaṃ sakhi madbhayaṃ ca ||9783-1 kālaṃ muhūrtāṅgulimaṇḍalena dinatriyāmāñjalinā pibantaṃ |  9783-2 rūpaṃ vilokyaiva vapuśca keṣāṃ bhaṅgena nāṅgānyalasībhavanti ||9784-1 kālaḥ karoti kāryāṇi kāla eva nihanti ca |  9784-2 kar_oṃīti vihanmīti mūrkho muhyati kevalaṃ ||9785-1 kālaḥ kirātaḥ sphuṭapadmakasya vadhaṃ vyadhādyasya dinadbipasya |  9785-2 tasyeva sandhyā rucirāsradhārā tārāśca kumbhasthalamauktikāni ||9786-1 kālaḥ pacati bhūtāni kālaḥ saṃharate prajāḥ |  9786-2 kālaḥ supteṣu jāgarti kālo hi duratikramaḥ ||9787-1 kālaḥ pacati bhūtāni kālaḥ saṃharati prajāḥ |  9787-2 nirdahantaṃ prajāḥ kālaṃ kālaḥ śamayate punaḥ ||9788-1 kālaḥ saṃprati vartate kaliyugaṃ satyā narā durlabhāḥ deśāśca pralayaṃ gatāḥ karabharairlobhaṃ gatāḥ pārthivāḥ |  9788-2 nānācauragaṇā muṣanti pṛthivīmāryo janaḥ kṣīyate putrasyāpi na viśvasanti pitaraḥ kaṣṭaṃ yuge vartate ||9789-1 kālaḥ sadāgatirapi sthāyīva pariceṣṭate |  9789-2 caṇḍamārutavadviśvaṃ adharottarayankṣaṇāt ||9790-1 kālaḥ samaviṣamakaraḥ paribhavasanmānakārakaḥ kālaḥ |  9790-2 kālaḥ karoti puruṣaṃ dātāraṃ yācitāraṃ ca ||9791-1 kālaḥ supteṣu jāgarti kālo hi duratikramaḥ |  9791-2 kālaḥ sarveṣu bhūteṣu caratyavidhṛtaḥ samaḥ ||9792-1 kālaḥ sūkṣmagatirnityaṃ dvividhaśceha bhāvyate |  9792-2 sthūlasaṃgrahacāreṇa sūkṣmācārāntareṇa ca ||9793-1 kālaḥ mṛjati bhūtāni kālaḥ saṃharate prajāḥ |  9793-2 sarve kālasya vaśagā na kālaḥ kasyacidvaśe ||9794-1 kāla evātra kālena nigrahānugrahau dadat |  9794-2 buddhimāviśya bhūtānāṃ dharmārtheṣu pravartate ||9795-1 kālakālagalakālakālamukhakālakāla! ||9798-1 kālakūṭādayo bhedā viṣasya nava santi ye |  9798-2 cikitsā kathyate teṣāṃ mantrapūrvamavistarāt ||9799-1 kālakramaṃ pratyakathaiva tāvathkṣaṇaṃ viyogo maraṇena tulyaḥ |  9799-2 priyāmukhodvīkṣaṇalālasānāṃ akṣṇornimeṣo'pi hi vighnabhūtaḥ ||9800-1 kālakramakamanīya- kroḍeyaṃ ketakīti kāśaṃsā |  9800-2 vṛddhiryathā yathā syās tathā tathā kaṇṭakotkarṣaḥ ||9801-1 kālakramatruṭitasaṃśrayabhūḥ svamūla- mātrāśrayī taṭataruḥ sarito'mbupūraiḥ |  9801-2 yaiḥ śaṅkyate nipatatīti vitīrṇamṛddhis taireva tasya hi bhavetsthitibhumidārḍhyaṃ ||9802-1 kālakrameṇa pariṇāmavaśādanavyā bhāvā bhavanti khalu pūrvamatīva tucchāḥ |  9802-2 muktāmaṇirjaladatoyakaṇo'pyaṇīyān sampadyate ca cirakīcakarandhramadhye ||9803-1 kālakṣepo na kartavya āyuryāti dine dine |  9803-2 nirīkṣate yamo rājā dharmasya vividhāṃ gatiṃ ||9804-1 kā lakṣmīḥ padamunnataṃ,kimu padaṃ yadgauravaṃ svāminaḥ kiṃ tadgaurava,mantarāyarahitāpūrvaiva gurvī sthitiḥ |  9804-2 kā cāsau sthiti,rātmabhūṣaṇaparavyāpārasambhāvanā kasyaitatsakalaṃ samasti,śaśinaḥ śrīkaṇṭhacuḍāmaṇeḥ ||9805-1 kālañjarapatiścakre bhīmaṭaḥ pañcanāṭakīṃ |  9805-2 prāpa prabandharājatvaṃ teṣu 9808-2 ahanyahani sanduhyānmahīṃ gāmiva buddhimān ||9809-1 kālayāpanamāśānāṃ vardhanaṃ phalakhaṇḍanaṃ |  9809-2 virakteśvaracihnāni jānīyānmatimānnaraḥ ||9810-1 kālarātrikarāleyaṃ strīti kiṃ kālavarṣī ca parjanyo dharmacārī ca pārthivaḥ |  9812-2 sampadyadaiṣā bhavati sā bibharti sukhaṃ prajāḥ ||9813-1 kālavidbhirvinirṇītaṃ pāṇḍityaṃ yasya rāghava |  9813-2 anadhyārpita evāsau ||9820-1 ... ... ... ... ... ... |  9820-2 kālasya sumahadbīryaṃ sarvabhūteṣu lakṣmaṇa ||9821-1 kālasyaiva vaśo sarvaṃ durgaṃ durgataraṃ ca yat |  9821-2 kāle kruddhe kathaṃ kālāttrāṇaṃ no'dya 9837-2 śatārdhamaṅgulānāṃ tu śreṣṭhaṃ khaḍgaṃ prakīrtitaṃ ||9838-1 kālidāsa kalāvāsa dāsavaccālito yadi |  9838-2 rājamārge vrajannatra pareṣāṃ tatra kā trapā ||9839-1 kālidāsakavitā navaṃ vayo pade ||9841-1 kālindi,brūhi kumbhodbhava,jaladhirahaṃ nāma gṛhṇāsi kasmāchchatrorme,narmadāhaṃ tvamapi vadasi me nāma kasmātsapatnyāḥ |  9841-2 mālinyaṃ tarhi kasmādanubhavasi,milatkajjalairmālavīnāṃ netrāmbhobhiḥ,kimāsāṃ samajani,kupitaḥ kuntalakṣoṇipālaḥ ||9842-1 kālindīṃ vīkṣya yātāṃ sulalitavadano mātaraṃ gehagopīḥ kāryāsaktāḥ samantādanugatanayano gorasāgāramantaḥ |  9842-2 gatvā bhāṇḍāni bhittvā madhumadhu śanakairgorasaṃ bhakṣamāṇaḥśīghrapratyāptanandākalitasitamukho nandasūnuḥ śivāya ||9843-1 kālindīkalakūlakānanakṛtakrīḍākalāpollasa d- gogopālakabālakaiḥ pratidiśaṃ sānandamāviṣṭitaṃ |  9843-2 vaṃśīnādavaśīkṛtavrajavadhūsvāntaṃ sadāhnādakaṃ sadbhaktyā samupāsmahe vayamaghadhvaṃsaikadhīraṃ mahaḥ ||9844-1 kālindīkeśapāśaḥ parilasati mahīnāyikāyāstanūjā jahnīḥ satpuṇyasaṃgho guṇa iha salilaṃ yacca sārasvasaṃ tu |  9844-2 veṇī tveṣā viśeṣādamaravaralasatsnehayuktā viyuktā bandhenetyatra citraṃ vilasati nitarāṃ yattamovarṇahīnā ||9845-1 kālindīcāruvīcīnicaya iti mudā gāhitā naicikībhir bālā kādambinīti pramuditahṛdayaṃ vīkṣitā nīlakaṇṭhaiḥ |  9845-2 uttaṃsārthaṃ tamālastabaka iti hṛtā mugdhagopāṅganābhiḥ śreyo naḥ kalpayantāṃ madhumathanatanusvacchakāntipravāhāḥ ||9846-1 kālindījalakuñjavañjulavanacchāyāniṣaṇṇātmanorādhābaddhanavānurāgarasikasyotkaṇṭhitaṃ gāyataḥ |  9846-2 tatpāyādapariskhalajjalaruhāpīḍaṃ kalaspṛṅnata-grīvottānitakarṇatarṇakakulairākarṇyamānaṃ hareḥ ||9847-1 kālindījalakelilolataruṇīrāvītacīnāṃśu kā nirgatyāṅgajalāni sāritavatīrālokya sarvā diśaḥ |  9847-2 tīropāntamilannikuñjabhavane gūḍhaṃ cirātpaśyataḥ śaureḥ saṃbhramayannimā vijayate sākūtaveṇudhvaniḥ ||9847ā-1 kālindītaṭabhedi hāstinapurīdausthyādibhiḥ khyāpita- sthemā yasya jayatyakhaṇḍajagadānandaikakando bhūjaḥ |  9847ā-2 muṣṭyā niṣṭhurayaiṣa muṣṭikaśironiṣṭyūtaraktakchaṭāc-chadmodvāntaruṣā bhinattu bhavatāṃ bhadretaraṃ lāṅgalaṃ ||9848-1 kālindīnarmadāmbhaḥsrutamadasalilotsaṅginau puṣpavantau vibhrāṇaḥ kumbhayugmaṃ gaganatalatataḥ svardhunīpūraśuṇḍaḥ |  9848-2 ghaṇṭālaḥ sādhuvādairanabhimatayaśo deva mṛdnanmṛṇālaṃ 9856-2 kastūrīkokilānāṃ tatibhiriva sahācākacikyaprapañcais trailokyaṃ pūrayantī śamayatu vipadaḥ śāṃbhavī kaṇṭhanālā ||9857-1 kālindyāḥ pulinaṃ pradoṣamaruto ramyāḥ śaśāṅkāṃśavaḥ santāpaṃ na vyavahāravide śivetarakṣataye |  9917-2 sadyaḥ paranirvṛtaye kāntāsammitatayopadeśayuje ||9918-1 kāvyaṃ sudhā rasajñānāṃ kāmināṃ kāminī sudhā |  9918-2 dhanaṃ sudhā salobhānāṃ śāntiḥ sanyasināṃ sudhā ||9919-1 kāvyaprapañcacuñcū racayati kāvyaṃ na sāravidbhavati |  9919-2 taravaḥ phalāni suvate vindati sāraṃ pataṅgasamudāyaḥ ||9920-1 kāvyamayyo giro yāvaccaranti viśadā bhuvi |  9920-2 tāvatsārasvataṃ sthānaṃ kavirāsādya modate ||9921-1 kāvyaśāstravinodena kālo gacchati dhīmatāṃ |  9921-2 vyasanena tu mūrkhāṇāṃ nidrayā kalahena vā ||9922-1 kāvyasyākṣaramaitrī- bhājo na ca karkaśā ||9926ā-1 kāvye gāndharve nṛttaśāstre vidhijñaṃ dakṣaṃ dātāraṃ dakṣiṇaṃ dākṣiṇātyaṃ |  9926ā-2 veśyā kā necchetsvāminaṃ koṅkaṇānāṃ syāccedasya strīṣvārjavātsaṃnipātaḥ ||9927-1 kāvyena ||9943-1 kāśmīragauravapuṣāmabhisārikāṇāṃ ābaddharekhamabhito rucimañjarībhiḥ |  9943-2 etattamāladalanīlatamaṃ tamisraṃ tatpremahemanikaṣopalatāṃ tanoti ||9944-1 kāśmīradravagauri hanta kimayaṃ kāśmīradhūlīkalikāvirājad- bālendurekhātilakābhirāmā |  9944ā-2 kṛkāṭikākīlitakeśapāśā sā vaiṣṇavī sārasapatranetrā ||9945-1 kāśmīrapaṅkakhacitastanapṛṣṭhatāmra- paṭṭāvakīrṇadayitārdranakhākṣarālī|  9945-2 eṇīdṛśaḥ kusumacāpanarendradatta- tāruṇyaśāsanamiva prakaṭīkaroti ||9946-1 kāśmīrīgātralekhāsu lolallāvaṇyavīciṣu |  9946-2 drāvayitveva vinyastaṃ svarṇaṃ ṣoḍaśavarṇakaṃ ||9947-1 kāśmīreṇa dihānamambaratalaṃ vāmabhruvāmānana- dvairājyaṃ vidadhānamindudṛṣadāṃ bhindānamambhaḥśirāḥ |  9947-2 pratyudyatpuruhūtapattanavadhūdattārghadūrvāṅkura-kṣīvotsaṅgakuraṅgamaindavamidaṃ tadvimbamujjṛmbhate ||9948-1 kāśyāṃ tiṣṭha sakhe suparvanivahairnityaṃ nutāyāṃ bhaja śrīkaṇṭhaṃ nijabhaktarakṣaṇavidhau dakṣaṃ dayāvāridhiṃ |  9948-2 gāṅge vāriṇi pāpahāriṇi kuru snānaṃ smara 9963-2 lokaḥ kasminprathayati mudaṃ,kā tvadīyā ca jaitrī prāyo loke sthitamiha sukhaṃ jantunā kīdṛśena ||9964-1 kā saṃsṛtiḥ kimapacāranibandhaneyaṃ kīdṛgvidhasya tava kiṃ kṣatametayeti |  9964-2 praśne tu nāsmi kuśalaḥ prativaktumeva khedastu me janani ko'pyayamevamāste ||9964ā-1 kāsaśvāsajvarājīrṇaśokatṛṣṇāsya pākayuk |  9964ā-2 na ca kuryācchironetrahṛtkarṇāmayavānapi ||9965-1 kāsāṃciddhavalaściraṃ nivasatāṃ vitteparāsāṃ punar nīlo vā kapilo'thavā varavṛṣo rakto'thavā mecakaḥ |  9965-2 grāmīṇairavadhīrito'pi śithilaskandho'pyanūrdhvaśravāḥ svānte me kāsāre'pi payaḥ pibanti pathikā na kvāpi vāri tvayi kṣāratvādudadheḥ samudra iti te nāmaitadevocitaṃ |  9969-2 na tvetāni nirarthakāni bhavato nāmānyanarthāntarāṇy ambhodhirjaladhiḥ bhavenmānināṃ |  9971-2 ityālocya vimucya cātakayuvā teṣu spṛhāmādarādudgrīvastava vārivāha kurute dhārādharālokanaṃ ||9971ā-1 kāsāryavarya kalitāmburuhāvataṃsa muktāsamānajalabindutaraṅgaraṅga |  9971ā-2 kiṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ tava bakairbahubhiḥ kurārvair haṃsairvinā kalaravairnaradevapūjyaiḥ ||9972-1 kāsi tvaṃ vada cauryakāriṇi kutaḥ,kastvaṃ,puroyāmikaḥ kiṃ brūṣe,muṣitau suvarṇakalaśau |  9973-2 jihvālaulyaṃ ca rogāḍhyo jīvituṃ yo'tra vāñchati ||9974-1 kāse śvāse tathā śoṣe mandāgnau viṣamajvare |  9974-2 pramehe mūtrakṛcchre ca sevayenmadhupippalīṃ ||9975-1 kā strī na
